package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.animation.effects;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;

import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.HashMap;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Animate Visibility Node: 鍔ㄧ敾鍙鎬ц妭鐐?
 * 瀹炵幇鏂瑰潡鐨勬贰鍏ユ贰鍑烘晥鏋?
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "animation.effects.animate_visibility",
    displayName = "Animate Visibility",
    description = "瀹炵幇鏂瑰潡鐨勬贰鍏ユ贰鍑烘晥鏋?,
    category = "animation.effects"
)
public class AnimateVisibilityNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_GEOMETRY_ID = "input_geometry";
    private static final String INPUT_TIME_FACTOR_ID = "input_time_factor";
    private static final String INPUT_TRANSITION_MODE_ID = "input_transition_mode";
    private static final String INPUT_STEPS_ID = "input_steps";
    private static final String INPUT_DEFAULT_BLOCK_ID = "input_default_block";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_RENDERED_GEOMETRY_ID = "output_rendered_geometry";
    
    // --- 杩囨浮妯″紡鏋氫妇 ---
    public enum TransitionMode {
        FADE_IN(0, "Fade In", "浠庝笉鍙鍒板彲瑙?),
        FADE_OUT(1, "Fade Out", "浠庡彲瑙佸埌涓嶅彲瑙?),
        TOGGLE(2, "Toggle", "鍦?.5鍓嶆贰鍏ワ紝0.5鍚庢贰鍑?);
        
        private final int id;
        private final String name;
        private final String description;
        
        TransitionMode(int id, String name, String description) {
            this.id = id;
            this.name = name;
            this.description = description;
        }
        
        public static TransitionMode fromId(int id) {
            for (TransitionMode mode : values()) {
                if (mode.id == id) {
                    return mode;
                }
            }
            return FADE_IN; // 榛樿妯″紡
        }
    }
    
    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public AnimateVisibilityNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "animation.effects.animate_visibility");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_GEOMETRY_ID, "Target Blocks", "鐩爣鏂瑰潡", NodeDataType.LIST, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_TIME_FACTOR_ID, "Time Factor", "鏃堕棿鍥犲瓙锛?-1锛?, NodeDataType.FLOAT, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_TRANSITION_MODE_ID, "Transition Mode", "杩囨浮妯″紡锛?=娣″叆, 1=娣″嚭, 2=鍒囨崲锛?, NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_STEPS_ID, "Steps", "娣″叆娣″嚭鐨勬楠ゆ暟", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_DEFAULT_BLOCK_ID, "Default Block", "榛樿鏇挎崲鏂瑰潡锛堥€氬父涓虹┖姘旓級", NodeDataType.ANY, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_RENDERED_GEOMETRY_ID, "Rendered Blocks", "娓叉煋鍚庣殑鏂瑰潡", NodeDataType.LIST, this));
    }
    
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "瀹炵幇鏂瑰潡鐨勬贰鍏ユ贰鍑烘晥鏋?;
    }

    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object geometryObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_GEOMETRY_ID);
        Float timeFactor = (Float) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_TIME_FACTOR_ID, 0.0f);
        Integer transitionModeId = (Integer) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_TRANSITION_MODE_ID, TransitionMode.FADE_IN.id);
        Integer steps = (Integer) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_STEPS_ID, 10);
        Object defaultBlock = inputValues.get(INPUT_DEFAULT_BLOCK_ID);
        
        // 纭繚鏃堕棿鍥犲瓙鍦?-1鑼冨洿鍐?
        timeFactor = Math.max(0.0f, Math.min(1.0f, timeFactor));
        
        // 纭繚姝ラ鏁拌嚦灏戜负2
        steps = Math.max(2, steps);
        
        // 鑾峰彇杩囨浮妯″紡
        TransitionMode transitionMode = TransitionMode.fromId(transitionModeId);
        
        // 澶勭悊鍑犱綍浣?
        List<Object> renderedGeometry = processGeometry(geometryObj, timeFactor, transitionMode, steps, defaultBlock);
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_RENDERED_GEOMETRY_ID, renderedGeometry);
    }
    
    /**
     * 澶勭悊鍑犱綍浣擄紝鏍规嵁鏃堕棿鍥犲瓙鍜岃繃娓℃ā寮忚绠楀彲瑙佹€?
     */
    private List<Object> processGeometry(Object geometryObj, float timeFactor, TransitionMode transitionMode, int steps, Object defaultBlock) {
        List<Object> result = new ArrayList<>();
        
        if (geometryObj instanceof List) {
            @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
            List<Object> geometryList = (List<Object>) geometryObj;
            
            // 濡傛灉鍑犱綍浣撲负绌猴紝鐩存帴杩斿洖绌哄垪琛?
            if (geometryList.isEmpty()) {
                return result;
            }
            
            // 璁＄畻鏄剧ず鐨勬鐜?
            float visibilityFactor = calculateVisibilityFactor(timeFactor, transitionMode);
            
            // 瀵规瘡涓柟鍧楀簲鐢ㄥ彲瑙佹€?
            for (Object block : geometryList) {
                Object processedBlock = applyVisibility(block, visibilityFactor, steps, defaultBlock);
                if (processedBlock != null) {
                    result.add(processedBlock);
                }
            }
        }
        
        return result;
    }
    
    /**
     * 璁＄畻鍙鎬у洜瀛?
     */
    private float calculateVisibilityFactor(float timeFactor, TransitionMode transitionMode) {
        switch (transitionMode) {
            case FADE_IN:
                // 娣″叆锛氫粠0澧炲姞鍒?
                return timeFactor;
                
            case FADE_OUT:
                // 娣″嚭锛氫粠1鍑忓皯鍒?
                return 1.0f - timeFactor;
                
            case TOGGLE:
                // 鍒囨崲锛?-0.5娣″叆锛?.5-1娣″嚭
                if (timeFactor < 0.5f) {
                    return timeFactor * 2.0f; // 0-0.5 鏄犲皠鍒?0-1
                } else {
                    return (1.0f - timeFactor) * 2.0f; // 0.5-1 鏄犲皠鍒?1-0
                }
                
            default:
                return timeFactor;
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * 鏍规嵁鍙鎬у洜瀛愬喅瀹氭柟鍧楁槸鍚﹀彲瑙?
     */
    private Object applyVisibility(Object block, float visibilityFactor, int steps, Object defaultBlock) {
        // 濡傛灉鍙鎬у洜瀛愪负0锛屽垯杩斿洖榛樿鏂瑰潡锛堥€氬父涓虹┖姘旀垨null锛?
        if (visibilityFactor <= 0.0f) {
            return defaultBlock;
        }
        
        // 濡傛灉鍙鎬у洜瀛愪负1锛屽垯瀹屽叏鏄剧ず鍘熷鏂瑰潡
        if (visibilityFactor >= 1.0f) {
            return block;
        }
        
        // 璁＄畻褰撳墠鐨勮繃娓￠樁娈碉紙鍩轰簬姝ラ鏁帮級
        int currentStep = Math.round(visibilityFactor * (steps - 1));
        float stepFactor = (float) currentStep / (steps - 1);
        
        // 濡傛灉鏂瑰潡鍦ㄥ綋鍓嶉樁娈靛簲璇ユ樉绀猴紝鍒欒繑鍥炲師濮嬫柟鍧?
        // 浣跨敤闅忔満鍖栧鐞嗘潵鍒涘缓"娣″叆娣″嚭"鐨勮瑙夋晥鏋?
        boolean shouldShow = visibilityFactor >= (currentStep + 1.0f) / steps;
        
        return shouldShow ? block : defaultBlock;
    }
} 
===FILE: C:\Users\navib\Desktop\development\NC\nodecraft\src\main\java\com\nodecraft\nodesystem\nodes\animation\effects\BlockAppearanceChangeNode.java===
package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.animation.effects;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;

import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.HashMap;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Block Appearance Change Node: 鏂瑰潡澶栬鍙樺寲鑺傜偣
 * 鍦ㄤ袱绉嶄笉鍚屽瑙備箣闂村疄鐜版柟鍧楃殑骞虫粦杩囨浮
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "animation.effects.block_appearance_change",
    displayName = "Block Appearance Change",
    description = "鍦ㄤ袱绉嶄笉鍚屽瑙備箣闂村疄鐜版柟鍧楃殑骞虫粦杩囨浮",
    category = "animation.effects"
)
public class BlockAppearanceChangeNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_GEOMETRY_ID = "input_geometry";
    private static final String INPUT_START_BLOCK_INFO_ID = "input_start_block_info";
    private static final String INPUT_END_BLOCK_INFO_ID = "input_end_block_info";
    private static final String INPUT_FACTOR_ID = "input_factor";
    private static final String INPUT_TRANSITION_STEPS_ID = "input_transition_steps";
    private static final String INPUT_TRANSITION_MODE_ID = "input_transition_mode";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_ANIMATED_BLOCKS_ID = "output_animated_blocks";
    
    // --- 杩囨浮妯″紡鏋氫妇 ---
    public enum TransitionMode {
        ALL_AT_ONCE(0, "All at Once", "鎵€鏈夋柟鍧楀悓鏃跺彉鍖?),
        SEQUENTIAL(1, "Sequential", "鎸夐『搴忛€愪釜鍙樺寲"),
        RANDOM(2, "Random", "闅忔満椤哄簭鍙樺寲"),
        DISTANCE_BASED(3, "Distance Based", "璺濈瓒婅繎瓒婂厛鍙樺寲");
        
        private final int id;
        private final String name;
        private final String description;
        
        TransitionMode(int id, String name, String description) {
            this.id = id;
            this.name = name;
            this.description = description;
        }
        
        public static TransitionMode fromId(int id) {
            for (TransitionMode mode : values()) {
                if (mode.id == id) {
                    return mode;
                }
            }
            return ALL_AT_ONCE; // 榛樿妯″紡
        }
    }
    
    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public BlockAppearanceChangeNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "animation.effects.block_appearance_change");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_GEOMETRY_ID, "Geometry", "鍑犱綍浣?, NodeDataType.LIST, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_START_BLOCK_INFO_ID, "Start BlockInfo", "璧峰鏂瑰潡淇℃伅", NodeDataType.ANY, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_END_BLOCK_INFO_ID, "End BlockInfo", "缁撴潫鏂瑰潡淇℃伅", NodeDataType.ANY, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_FACTOR_ID, "Factor", "杩囨浮鍥犲瓙锛?-1锛?, NodeDataType.FLOAT, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_TRANSITION_STEPS_ID, "Transition Steps", "杩囨浮姝ラ鏁?, NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_TRANSITION_MODE_ID, "Transition Mode", "杩囨浮妯″紡", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_ANIMATED_BLOCKS_ID, "Animated Blocks", "鍔ㄧ敾鍚庣殑鏂瑰潡", NodeDataType.LIST, this));
    }
    
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "鍦ㄤ袱绉嶄笉鍚屽瑙備箣闂村疄鐜版柟鍧楃殑骞虫粦杩囨浮";
    }

    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object geometryObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_GEOMETRY_ID);
        Object startBlockInfo = inputValues.get(INPUT_START_BLOCK_INFO_ID);
        Object endBlockInfo = inputValues.get(INPUT_END_BLOCK_INFO_ID);
        Float factor = (Float) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_FACTOR_ID, 0.0f);
        Integer transitionSteps = (Integer) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_TRANSITION_STEPS_ID, 10);
        Integer transitionModeId = (Integer) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_TRANSITION_MODE_ID, TransitionMode.ALL_AT_ONCE.id);
        
        // 纭繚杩囨浮鍥犲瓙鍦?-1鑼冨洿鍐?
        factor = Math.max(0.0f, Math.min(1.0f, factor));
        
        // 纭繚杩囨浮姝ラ鑷冲皯涓?
        transitionSteps = Math.max(2, transitionSteps);
        
        // 鑾峰彇杩囨浮妯″紡
        TransitionMode transitionMode = TransitionMode.fromId(transitionModeId);
        
        // 澶勭悊鍑犱綍浣?
        List<Object> animatedBlocks = processGeometry(geometryObj, startBlockInfo, endBlockInfo, factor, transitionSteps, transitionMode);
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_ANIMATED_BLOCKS_ID, animatedBlocks);
    }
    
    /**
     * 澶勭悊鍑犱綍浣擄紝搴旂敤澶栬鍙樺寲
     */
    private List<Object> processGeometry(Object geometryObj, Object startBlockInfo, Object endBlockInfo, 
                                       float factor, int transitionSteps, TransitionMode transitionMode) {
        List<Object> result = new ArrayList<>();
        
        if (geometryObj instanceof List) {
            @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
            List<Object> geometryList = (List<Object>) geometryObj;
            
            // 濡傛灉鍑犱綍浣撲负绌猴紝鐩存帴杩斿洖绌哄垪琛?
            if (geometryList.isEmpty()) {
                return result;
            }
            
            // 濡傛灉娌℃湁璧峰鎴栫粨鏉熸柟鍧椾俊鎭紝鐩存帴杩斿洖鍘熷鍑犱綍浣?
            if (startBlockInfo == null || endBlockInfo == null) {
                return new ArrayList<>(geometryList);
            }
            
            // 棰勫鐞嗗嚑浣曚綋锛堟牴鎹繃娓℃ā寮忚绠楁瘡涓柟鍧楃殑鍗曠嫭杩囨浮鍥犲瓙锛?
            List<Float> blockFactors = calculateBlockFactors(geometryList, factor, transitionMode);
            
            // 澶勭悊姣忎釜鏂瑰潡
            for (int i = 0; i < geometryList.size(); i++) {
                Object block = geometryList.get(i);
                float blockFactor = blockFactors.get(i);
                
                // 纭畾褰撳墠鏂瑰潡搴旇鏄剧ず鐨勫瑙?
                int step = determineTransitionStep(blockFactor, transitionSteps);
                Object blockInfo = interpolateBlockInfo(startBlockInfo, endBlockInfo, step, transitionSteps);
                
                // 鍒涘缓鏂扮殑鏂瑰潡瀵硅薄锛堜繚鐣欎綅缃紝鏇存敼澶栬锛?
                Object transformedBlock = createTransformedBlock(block, blockInfo);
                if (transformedBlock != null) {
                    result.add(transformedBlock);
                }
            }
        }
        
        return result;
    }
    
    /**
     * 鏍规嵁杩囨浮妯″紡璁＄畻姣忎釜鏂瑰潡鐨勫崟鐙繃娓″洜瀛?
     */
    private List<Float> calculateBlockFactors(List<Object> geometry, float globalFactor, TransitionMode mode) {
        int size = geometry.size();
        List<Float> factors = new ArrayList<>(size);
        
        switch (mode) {
            case ALL_AT_ONCE:
                // 鎵€鏈夋柟鍧椾娇鐢ㄧ浉鍚岀殑鍏ㄥ眬鍥犲瓙
                for (int i = 0; i < size; i++) {
                    factors.add(globalFactor);
                }
                break;
                
            case SEQUENTIAL:
                // 绾挎€у垎甯冪殑鍥犲瓙
                for (int i = 0; i < size; i++) {
                    float localFactor = globalFactor * size - i;
                    factors.add(Math.max(0.0f, Math.min(1.0f, localFactor)));
                }
                break;
                
            case RANDOM:
                // 浣跨敤鏂瑰潡鍝堝笇鍊艰绠椾吉闅忔満鍥犲瓙
                for (int i = 0; i < size; i++) {
                    Object block = geometry.get(i);
                    
                                         // 浣跨敤鏂瑰潡鍧愭爣璁＄畻闅忔満绉嶅瓙
                     float[] pos = getCoordinateAsFloatArray(block);
                     int seed;
                     if (pos != null) {
                         int x = (int)(pos[0] * 73856093);
                         int y = (int)(pos[1] * 19349663);
                         int z = (int)(pos[2] * 83492791);
                         seed = x ^ y ^ z;
                     } else {
                         seed = block.hashCode();
                     }
                    
                    // 鍩轰簬绉嶅瓙璁＄畻0-1涔嬮棿鐨勫€?
                    float randomOffset = (seed % 1000) / 1000.0f;
                    
                    // 搴旂敤鍏ㄥ眬鍥犲瓙锛岃€冭檻闅忔満鍋忕Щ
                    float localFactor = globalFactor - randomOffset * 0.8f; // 淇濈暀20%鍏ㄥ眬鎺у埗
                    factors.add(Math.max(0.0f, Math.min(1.0f, localFactor * 1.25f))); // 鏀惧ぇ鏁堟灉
                }
                break;
                
            case DISTANCE_BASED:
                // 璁＄畻鍑犱綍浣撲腑蹇冪偣
                float[] center = calculateCenter(geometry);
                
                // 鎵惧嚭鏈€澶ц窛绂荤敤浜庡綊涓€鍖?
                float maxDistance = 0.1f;
                List<Float> distances = new ArrayList<>(size);
                
                for (Object block : geometry) {
                    float[] pos = getCoordinateAsFloatArray(block);
                    if (pos == null) {
                        distances.add(0.0f);
                        continue;
                    }
                    
                    float distance = calculateDistance(pos, center);
                    distances.add(distance);
                    maxDistance = Math.max(maxDistance, distance);
                }
                
                // 鏍规嵁璺濈璁＄畻鍥犲瓙
                for (int i = 0; i < size; i++) {
                    float normalizedDistance = distances.get(i) / maxDistance;
                    float localFactor = globalFactor - normalizedDistance * 0.7f; // 淇濈暀30%鍏ㄥ眬鎺у埗
                    factors.add(Math.max(0.0f, Math.min(1.0f, localFactor * 1.4f))); // 鏀惧ぇ鏁堟灉
                }
                break;
        }
        
        return factors;
    }
    
    /**
     * 璁＄畻鍑犱綍浣撶殑涓績鐐?
     */
    private float[] calculateCenter(List<Object> geometry) {
        float[] center = new float[3];
        int count = 0;
        
        for (Object block : geometry) {
            float[] pos = getCoordinateAsFloatArray(block);
            if (pos != null) {
                center[0] += pos[0];
                center[1] += pos[1];
                center[2] += pos[2];
                count++;
            }
        }
        
        if (count > 0) {
            center[0] /= count;
            center[1] /= count;
            center[2] /= count;
        }
        
        return center;
    }
    
    /**
     * 璁＄畻涓ょ偣涔嬮棿鐨勮窛绂?
     */
    private float calculateDistance(float[] p1, float[] p2) {
        float dx = p1[0] - p2[0];
        float dy = p1[1] - p2[1];
        float dz = p1[2] - p2[2];
        return (float) Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy + dz * dz);
    }
    
    /**
     * 纭畾褰撳墠杩囨浮姝ラ
     */
    private int determineTransitionStep(float factor, int totalSteps) {
        return Math.min(totalSteps - 1, Math.round(factor * (totalSteps - 1)));
    }
    
    /**
     * 鍦ㄨ捣濮嬪拰缁撴潫鏂瑰潡淇℃伅涔嬮棿鎻掑€?
     */
    private Object interpolateBlockInfo(Object startInfo, Object endInfo, int step, int totalSteps) {
        // 濡傛灉鍦ㄨ捣濮嬫楠わ紝鐩存帴杩斿洖璧峰淇℃伅
        if (step == 0) return startInfo;
        
        // 濡傛灉鍦ㄧ粨鏉熸楠わ紝鐩存帴杩斿洖缁撴潫淇℃伅
        if (step >= totalSteps - 1) return endInfo;
        
        // 鏍规嵁姝ラ閫夋嫨鍚堥€傜殑涓棿鏂瑰潡
        // 娉ㄦ剰锛氳繖閲屽簲璇ユ牴鎹疄闄呯殑鏂瑰潡淇℃伅缁撴瀯杩涜鍏蜂綋瀹炵幇
        // 涓嬮潰鏄竴涓畝鍗曠殑绀轰緥
        
        if (startInfo instanceof Map && endInfo instanceof Map) {
            try {
                @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
                Map<String, Object> startMap = (Map<String, Object>) startInfo;
                @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
                Map<String, Object> endMap = (Map<String, Object>) endInfo;
                
                // 鍒涘缓鏂板璞★紝浠庤捣濮嬩俊鎭鍒跺熀鏈睘鎬?
                Map<String, Object> resultMap = new HashMap<>(startMap);
                
                // 濡傛灉鏈夋柟鍧桰D/绫诲瀷瀛楁锛岃繘琛屾彃鍊?
                if (startMap.containsKey("id") && endMap.containsKey("id") && 
                    startMap.get("id") instanceof String && endMap.get("id") instanceof String) {
                    
                    String startId = (String) startMap.get("id");
                    String endId = (String) endMap.get("id");
                    
                    // 濡傛灉ID涓嶅悓锛屽湪杩囨浮涓棿鐐规椂閫夋嫨缁撴潫ID
                    if (!startId.equals(endId) && step > totalSteps / 2) {
                        resultMap.put("id", endId);
                    }
                }
                
                // 濡傛灉鏈夊睘鎬у瓧娈碉紝鏍规嵁姝ラ杩涜娓愯繘鍙樺寲
                if (startMap.containsKey("properties") && endMap.containsKey("properties") &&
                    startMap.get("properties") instanceof Map && endMap.get("properties") instanceof Map) {
                    
                    @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
                    Map<String, Object> startProps = (Map<String, Object>) startMap.get("properties");
                    @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
                    Map<String, Object> endProps = (Map<String, Object>) endMap.get("properties");
                    
                    // 鍒涘缓鏂板睘鎬ф槧灏?
                    Map<String, Object> resultProps = new HashMap<>(startProps);
                    
                    // 瀵逛簬鏁板€煎睘鎬э紝杩涜绾挎€ф彃鍊?
                    for (String key : endProps.keySet()) {
                        if (startProps.containsKey(key)) {
                            Object startVal = startProps.get(key);
                            Object endVal = endProps.get(key);
                            
                            if (startVal instanceof Number && endVal instanceof Number) {
                                double startNum = ((Number) startVal).doubleValue();
                                double endNum = ((Number) endVal).doubleValue();
                                double interpolated = startNum + (endNum - startNum) * step / (totalSteps - 1);
                                
                                // 鏍规嵁鍘熷鍊肩被鍨嬶紝璁剧疆姝ｇ‘绫诲瀷鐨勫€?
                                if (startVal instanceof Integer) {
                                    resultProps.put(key, (int) Math.round(interpolated));
                                } else if (startVal instanceof Float) {
                                    resultProps.put(key, (float) interpolated);
                                } else {
                                    resultProps.put(key, interpolated);
                                }
                            }
                            // 闈炴暟鍊煎睘鎬э紙濡傚瓧绗︿覆锛夊湪瓒呰繃鍗婄▼鍚庡垏鎹?
                            else if (!startVal.equals(endVal) && step > totalSteps / 2) {
                                resultProps.put(key, endVal);
                            }
                        }
                        // 浠呭湪缁撴潫灞炴€т腑瀛樺湪鐨勯敭锛屽湪瓒呰繃1/3鍚庢坊鍔?
                        else if (step > totalSteps / 3) {
                            resultProps.put(key, endProps.get(key));
                        }
                    }
                    
                    resultMap.put("properties", resultProps);
                }
                
                return resultMap;
            } catch (Exception e) {
                // 澶勭悊澶辫触锛岃繑鍥炲熀浜庢楠ょ殑榛樿鏂瑰潡
                return (step < totalSteps / 2) ? startInfo : endInfo;
            }
        }
        
        // 榛樿杩斿洖鍩轰簬姝ラ鐨勬柟鍧?
        return (step < totalSteps / 2) ? startInfo : endInfo;
    }
    
    /**
     * 鍒涘缓鍙樻崲鍚庣殑鏂瑰潡瀵硅薄
     */
    private Object createTransformedBlock(Object block, Object blockInfo) {
        if (block instanceof int[] && blockInfo != null) {
            // 瀵逛簬int[]鏍煎紡鐨勬柟鍧楋紙浠呭潗鏍囷級锛屽垱寤轰竴涓甫鏈変綅缃拰淇℃伅鐨勬柊瀵硅薄
            int[] coord = (int[]) block;
            if (coord.length >= 3) {
                Map<String, Object> result = new HashMap<>();
                result.put("x", coord[0]);
                result.put("y", coord[1]);
                result.put("z", coord[2]);
                
                // 鍚堝苟鏂瑰潡淇℃伅
                if (blockInfo instanceof Map) {
                    @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
                    Map<String, Object> infoMap = (Map<String, Object>) blockInfo;
                    for (Map.Entry<String, Object> entry : infoMap.entrySet()) {
                        if (!entry.getKey().equals("x") && !entry.getKey().equals("y") && !entry.getKey().equals("z")) {
                            result.put(entry.getKey(), entry.getValue());
                        }
                    }
                }
                
                return result;
            }
        }
        else if (block instanceof Map && blockInfo instanceof Map) {
            try {
                @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
                Map<String, Object> blockMap = (Map<String, Object>) block;
                @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
                Map<String, Object> infoMap = (Map<String, Object>) blockInfo;
                
                // 鍒涘缓鏂板璞★紝澶嶅埗鎵€鏈夊睘鎬?
                Map<String, Object> result = new HashMap<>(blockMap);
                
                // 鍚堝苟鏂瑰潡淇℃伅锛屼絾淇濈暀鍘熷鍧愭爣
                for (Map.Entry<String, Object> entry : infoMap.entrySet()) {
                    if (!entry.getKey().equals("x") && !entry.getKey().equals("y") && !entry.getKey().equals("z")) {
                        result.put(entry.getKey(), entry.getValue());
                    }
                }
                
                return result;
            } catch (Exception e) {
                // 澶勭悊澶辫触锛岃繑鍥炲師濮嬫柟鍧?
                return block;
            }
        }
        
        // 濡傛灉鏃犳硶澶勭悊锛岃繑鍥炲師濮嬫柟鍧?
        return block;
    }
    
    /**
     * 灏嗗潗鏍囧璞¤浆鎹负娴偣鏁扮粍
     */
    private float[] getCoordinateAsFloatArray(Object coordObj) {
        // 澶勭悊int[]鏍煎紡鐨勫潗鏍?
        if (coordObj instanceof int[]) {
            int[] coord = (int[]) coordObj;
            if (coord.length >= 3) {
                return new float[]{(float) coord[0], (float) coord[1], (float) coord[2]};
            }
        }
        // 澶勭悊鍖呭惈x,y,z瀛楁鐨勫璞★紙濡侰oordinate绫伙級
        else if (coordObj instanceof Map) {
            try {
                @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
                Map<String, Object> coordMap = (Map<String, Object>) coordObj;
                
                if (coordMap.containsKey("x") && coordMap.containsKey("y") && coordMap.containsKey("z")) {
                    float x = ((Number) coordMap.get("x")).floatValue();
                    float y = ((Number) coordMap.get("y")).floatValue();
                    float z = ((Number) coordMap.get("z")).floatValue();
                    
                    return new float[]{x, y, z};
                }
            } catch (Exception e) {
                // 澶勭悊澶辫触锛岃繑鍥瀗ull
                return null;
            }
        }
        
        return null;
    }
} 
===FILE: C:\Users\navib\Desktop\development\NC\nodecraft\src\main\java\com\nodecraft\nodesystem\nodes\animation\effects\ExplosionEffectNode.java===
package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.animation.effects;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;

import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.HashMap;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;
import java.util.Random;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Explosion Effect Node: 鐖嗙偢鏁堟灉鑺傜偣
 * 璁╁嚑浣曚綋鐨勬柟鍧楁部鐖嗙偢杞ㄨ抗绉诲姩
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "animation.effects.explosion",
    displayName = "Explosion Effect",
    description = "璁╁嚑浣曚綋浜х敓鐖嗙偢鎴栧唴鐖嗘晥鏋?,
    category = "animation.effects"
)
public class ExplosionEffectNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_GEOMETRY_ID = "input_geometry";
    private static final String INPUT_CENTER_ID = "input_center";
    private static final String INPUT_MAX_FORCE_ID = "input_max_force";
    private static final String INPUT_TIME_FACTOR_ID = "input_time_factor";
    private static final String INPUT_MODE_ID = "input_mode";
    private static final String INPUT_GRAVITY_ID = "input_gravity";
    private static final String INPUT_RANDOMNESS_ID = "input_randomness";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_ANIMATED_GEOMETRY_ID = "output_animated_geometry";
    
    // --- 鐖嗙偢妯″紡鏋氫妇 ---
    public enum ExplosionMode {
        EXPLOSION(0, "Explosion", "鍚戝鐖嗙偢"),
        IMPLOSION(1, "Implosion", "鍚戝唴鍐呯垎");
        
        private final int id;
        private final String name;
        private final String description;
        
        ExplosionMode(int id, String name, String description) {
            this.id = id;
            this.name = name;
            this.description = description;
        }
        
        public static ExplosionMode fromId(int id) {
            return id == 1 ? IMPLOSION : EXPLOSION;
        }
    }
    
    // 闅忔満鏁扮敓鎴愬櫒
    private final Random random = new Random();
    
    // 缂撳瓨鏂瑰潡鐨勫垵濮嬩綅缃紙鐢ㄤ簬璁＄畻鐖嗙偢杞ㄨ抗锛?
    private final Map<String, float[]> initialPositions = new HashMap<>();
    
    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public ExplosionEffectNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "animation.effects.explosion");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_GEOMETRY_ID, "Original Geometry", "鍘熷鍑犱綍浣?, NodeDataType.LIST, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_CENTER_ID, "Explosion Center", "鐖嗙偢涓績鐐?, NodeDataType.VECTOR, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_MAX_FORCE_ID, "Max Force", "鏈€澶х垎鐐稿姏", NodeDataType.FLOAT, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_TIME_FACTOR_ID, "Time Factor", "鏃堕棿鍥犲瓙锛?-1锛?, NodeDataType.FLOAT, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_MODE_ID, "Mode", "妯″紡锛?=鐖嗙偢, 1=鍐呯垎锛?, NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_GRAVITY_ID, "Gravity", "閲嶅姏鍥犲瓙", NodeDataType.FLOAT, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_RANDOMNESS_ID, "Randomness", "闅忔満鍥犲瓙", NodeDataType.FLOAT, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_ANIMATED_GEOMETRY_ID, "Animated Geometry", "鍔ㄧ敾鍚庣殑鍑犱綍浣?, NodeDataType.LIST, this));
    }
    
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "璁╁嚑浣曚綋浜х敓鐖嗙偢鎴栧唴鐖嗘晥鏋?;
    }

    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object geometryObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_GEOMETRY_ID);
        float[] center = (float[]) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_CENTER_ID, new float[]{0.0f, 0.0f, 0.0f});
        Float maxForce = (Float) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_MAX_FORCE_ID, 10.0f);
        Float timeFactor = (Float) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_TIME_FACTOR_ID, 0.0f);
        Integer modeId = (Integer) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_MODE_ID, ExplosionMode.EXPLOSION.id);
        Float gravity = (Float) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_GRAVITY_ID, 9.8f);
        Float randomness = (Float) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_RANDOMNESS_ID, 0.3f);
        
        // 纭繚鏃堕棿鍥犲瓙鍦?-1鑼冨洿鍐?
        timeFactor = Math.max(0.0f, Math.min(1.0f, timeFactor));
        
        // 纭繚鍚戦噺鏈夋晥
        if (center.length < 3) center = new float[]{0.0f, 0.0f, 0.0f};
        
        // 纭繚鍔涘害涓烘鏁?
        maxForce = Math.abs(maxForce);
        
        // 纭繚闅忔満鍥犲瓙鍦ㄥ悎鐞嗚寖鍥村唴
        randomness = Math.max(0.0f, Math.min(1.0f, randomness));
        
        // 鑾峰彇鐖嗙偢妯″紡
        ExplosionMode mode = ExplosionMode.fromId(modeId);
        
        // 澶勭悊鍑犱綍浣?
        List<Object> animatedGeometry = processGeometry(geometryObj, center, maxForce, timeFactor, mode, gravity, randomness);
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_ANIMATED_GEOMETRY_ID, animatedGeometry);
    }
    
    /**
     * 澶勭悊鍑犱綍浣擄紝搴旂敤鐖嗙偢/鍐呯垎鏁堟灉
     */
    private List<Object> processGeometry(Object geometryObj, float[] center, float maxForce, float timeFactor, 
                                       ExplosionMode mode, float gravity, float randomness) {
        List<Object> result = new ArrayList<>();
        
        if (geometryObj instanceof List) {
            @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
            List<Object> geometryList = (List<Object>) geometryObj;
            
            // 濡傛灉鍑犱綍浣撲负绌猴紝鐩存帴杩斿洖绌哄垪琛?
            if (geometryList.isEmpty()) {
                return result;
            }
            
            // 澶勭悊姣忎釜鏂瑰潡
            for (Object block : geometryList) {
                // 鑾峰彇鏂瑰潡鍧愭爣
                float[] blockPos = getBlockPosition(block);
                if (blockPos == null) continue;
                
                // 璁＄畻鏂瑰潡鐨勬柊浣嶇疆
                float[] newPos = calculateExplosionPosition(block, blockPos, center, maxForce, timeFactor, mode, gravity, randomness);
                
                // 鍒涘缓鏂扮殑鏂瑰潡瀵硅薄骞舵坊鍔犲埌缁撴灉涓?
                Object transformedBlock = createTransformedBlock(block, newPos);
                if (transformedBlock != null) {
                    result.add(transformedBlock);
                }
            }
        }
        
        return result;
    }
    
    /**
     * 璁＄畻鏂瑰潡鍦ㄧ垎鐐镐腑鐨勪綅缃?
     */
    private float[] calculateExplosionPosition(Object block, float[] blockPos, float[] center, float maxForce, 
                                             float timeFactor, ExplosionMode mode, float gravity, float randomness) {
        // 鑾峰彇鎴栧垱寤烘柟鍧楃殑鍒濆鐖嗙偢鏁版嵁
        String blockKey = getBlockKey(block);
        float[] initialDirection = initialPositions.computeIfAbsent(blockKey, k -> {
            // 璁＄畻浠庝腑蹇冪偣鍒版柟鍧楃殑鏂瑰悜鍚戦噺
            float[] direction = new float[3];
            for (int i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
                direction[i] = blockPos[i] - center[i];
            }
            
            // 璁＄畻璺濈
            float distance = (float) Math.sqrt(
                direction[0] * direction[0] + 
                direction[1] * direction[1] + 
                direction[2] * direction[2]
            );
            
            // 瑙勮寖鍖栨柟鍚戝悜閲?
            if (distance > 0.0001f) {
                for (int i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
                    direction[i] /= distance;
                }
            } else {
                // 濡傛灉璺濈澶皬锛岀粰涓€涓殢鏈烘柟鍚?
                direction[0] = (random.nextFloat() * 2.0f - 1.0f);
                direction[1] = (random.nextFloat() * 2.0f - 1.0f);
                direction[2] = (random.nextFloat() * 2.0f - 1.0f);
                
                // 褰掍竴鍖栭殢鏈烘柟鍚?
                float randLength = (float) Math.sqrt(
                    direction[0] * direction[0] + 
                    direction[1] * direction[1] + 
                    direction[2] * direction[2]
                );
                
                if (randLength > 0.0001f) {
                    for (int i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
                        direction[i] /= randLength;
                    }
                }
            }
            
            // 娣诲姞闅忔満鎬?
            if (randomness > 0) {
                for (int i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
                    direction[i] += (random.nextFloat() * 2.0f - 1.0f) * randomness;
                }
                
                // 閲嶆柊褰掍竴鍖?
                float newLength = (float) Math.sqrt(
                    direction[0] * direction[0] + 
                    direction[1] * direction[1] + 
                    direction[2] * direction[2]
                );
                
                if (newLength > 0.0001f) {
                    for (int i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
                        direction[i] /= newLength;
                    }
                }
            }
            
            // 璁＄畻鍒濆鍔涳紙鍩轰簬璺濈锛?
            float force = calculateForce(distance, maxForce);
            
            // 杩斿洖鍒濆鏂瑰悜鍜屽姏鐨勫鍚堝悜閲?
            float[] result = new float[3];
            for (int i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
                result[i] = direction[i] * force;
            }
            
            return result;
        });
        
        // 璁＄畻褰撳墠浣嶇疆
        float[] newPos = new float[3];
        
        // 鏄惁鍙嶈浆鏃堕棿锛堢敤浜庡唴鐖嗭級
        float effectiveTime = (mode == ExplosionMode.EXPLOSION) ? timeFactor : 1.0f - timeFactor;
        
        // 搴旂敤鐗╃悊妯℃嫙
        for (int i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
            // 浣嶇疆 = 鍒濆浣嶇疆 + 鏂瑰悜*鏃堕棿 + 閲嶅姏*鏃堕棿^2/2 (i=1涓篩杞?
            float gravityEffect = (i == 1) ? -0.5f * gravity * effectiveTime * effectiveTime : 0;
            
            if (mode == ExplosionMode.EXPLOSION) {
                newPos[i] = blockPos[i] + initialDirection[i] * effectiveTime + gravityEffect;
            } else {
                // 鍐呯垎锛氫粠鏈€缁堜綅缃悜鍒濆浣嶇疆绉诲姩
                float finalPos = blockPos[i] + initialDirection[i] + ((i == 1) ? -0.5f * gravity : 0);
                newPos[i] = finalPos - (finalPos - blockPos[i]) * effectiveTime;
            }
        }
        
        return newPos;
    }
    
    /**
     * 鏍规嵁璺濈璁＄畻鍔涘害
     */
    private float calculateForce(float distance, float maxForce) {
        // 璺濈瓒婅繙锛屽姏瓒婂皬锛堝弽姣斾緥锛?
        float minDistance = 0.1f; // 闃叉闄や互闆?
        distance = Math.max(minDistance, distance);
        
        // 浣跨敤骞虫柟鍙嶆瘮琛板噺
        return maxForce / (1.0f + distance * 0.1f);
    }
    
    /**
     * 鑾峰彇鏂瑰潡鐨勫敮涓€鏍囪瘑锛堢敤浜庣紦瀛橈級
     */
    private String getBlockKey(Object block) {
        float[] pos = getBlockPosition(block);
        if (pos != null) {
            return pos[0] + "," + pos[1] + "," + pos[2];
        }
        return block.hashCode() + "";
    }
    
    /**
     * 鑾峰彇鏂瑰潡鐨勪綅缃?
     */
    private float[] getBlockPosition(Object block) {
        // 澶勭悊int[]鏍煎紡鐨勫潗鏍?
        if (block instanceof int[]) {
            int[] coord = (int[]) block;
            if (coord.length >= 3) {
                return new float[]{(float) coord[0], (float) coord[1], (float) coord[2]};
            }
        }
        // 澶勭悊鍖呭惈x,y,z瀛楁鐨勫璞★紙濡侰oordinate绫伙級
        else if (block instanceof Map) {
            try {
                @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
                Map<String, Object> coordMap = (Map<String, Object>) block;
                
                if (coordMap.containsKey("x") && coordMap.containsKey("y") && coordMap.containsKey("z")) {
                    float x = ((Number) coordMap.get("x")).floatValue();
                    float y = ((Number) coordMap.get("y")).floatValue();
                    float z = ((Number) coordMap.get("z")).floatValue();
                    
                    return new float[]{x, y, z};
                }
            } catch (Exception e) {
                // 澶勭悊澶辫触锛岃繑鍥瀗ull
                return null;
            }
        }
        
        return null;
    }
    
    /**
     * 鍒涘缓鍙樻崲鍚庣殑鏂瑰潡瀵硅薄
     */
    private Object createTransformedBlock(Object originalBlock, float[] newPosition) {
        // 澶勭悊int[]鏍煎紡鐨勫潗鏍?
        if (originalBlock instanceof int[]) {
            int[] newCoord = new int[]{
                Math.round(newPosition[0]),
                Math.round(newPosition[1]),
                Math.round(newPosition[2])
            };
            return newCoord;
        }
        // 澶勭悊鍖呭惈x,y,z瀛楁鐨勫璞★紙濡侰oordinate绫伙級
        else if (originalBlock instanceof Map) {
            try {
                @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
                Map<String, Object> origMap = (Map<String, Object>) originalBlock;
                
                // 鍒涘缓鏂板璞★紝澶嶅埗鎵€鏈夊睘鎬?
                Map<String, Object> newMap = new HashMap<>(origMap);
                
                // 鏇存柊鍧愭爣
                newMap.put("x", Math.round(newPosition[0]));
                newMap.put("y", Math.round(newPosition[1]));
                newMap.put("z", Math.round(newPosition[2]));
                
                return newMap;
            } catch (Exception e) {
                // 澶勭悊澶辫触锛岃繑鍥瀗ull
                return null;
            }
        }
        
        return null;
    }
} 
===FILE: C:\Users\navib\Desktop\development\NC\nodecraft\src\main\java\com\nodecraft\nodesystem\nodes\animation\effects\ParticlesToBlocksNode.java===
package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.animation.effects;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;

import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.HashMap;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;
import java.util.Random;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Particles To Blocks Node: 绮掑瓙鍒版柟鍧楁晥鏋滆妭鐐?
 * 瀹炵幇绮掑瓙閫愭笎鍙樻垚鏂瑰潡鐨勬晥鏋?
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "animation.effects.particles_to_blocks",
    displayName = "Particles To Blocks",
    description = "瀹炵幇绮掑瓙閫愭笎鍙樻垚鏂瑰潡鐨勮瑙夋晥鏋?,
    category = "animation.effects"
)
public class ParticlesToBlocksNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_TARGET_BLOCKS_ID = "input_target_blocks";
    private static final String INPUT_PARTICLE_TYPE_ID = "input_particle_type";
    private static final String INPUT_TIME_FACTOR_ID = "input_time_factor";
    private static final String INPUT_PARTICLE_DENSITY_ID = "input_particle_density";
    private static final String INPUT_PARTICLE_SPEED_ID = "input_particle_speed";
    private static final String INPUT_TRANSITION_MODE_ID = "input_transition_mode";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_VISIBLE_BLOCKS_ID = "output_visible_blocks";
    private static final String OUTPUT_PARTICLE_EFFECTS_ID = "output_particle_effects";
    
    // --- 绮掑瓙绫诲瀷鏋氫妇 ---
    public enum ParticleType {
        DUST(0, "Dust", "鐏板皹绮掑瓙"),
        FLAME(1, "Flame", "鐏劙绮掑瓙"),
        SMOKE(2, "Smoke", "鐑熼浘绮掑瓙"),
        PORTAL(3, "Portal", "浼犻€侀棬绮掑瓙"),
        ENCHANT(4, "Enchant", "闄勯瓟绮掑瓙"),
        REDSTONE(5, "Redstone", "绾㈢煶绮掑瓙");
        
        private final int id;
        private final String name;
        private final String description;
        
        ParticleType(int id, String name, String description) {
            this.id = id;
            this.name = name;
            this.description = description;
        }
        
        public static ParticleType fromId(int id) {
            for (ParticleType type : values()) {
                if (type.id == id) {
                    return type;
                }
            }
            return DUST; // 榛樿绮掑瓙绫诲瀷
        }
    }
    
    // --- 杩囨浮妯″紡鏋氫妇 ---
    public enum TransitionMode {
        FADE(0, "Fade", "鏂瑰潡娣″叆锛岀矑瀛愭贰鍑?),
        ASSEMBLE(1, "Assemble", "绮掑瓙鑱氶泦鎴愭柟鍧?),
        MORPH(2, "Morph", "绮掑瓙鍙樺舰涓烘柟鍧?);
        
        private final int id;
        private final String name;
        private final String description;
        
        TransitionMode(int id, String name, String description) {
            this.id = id;
            this.name = name;
            this.description = description;
        }
        
        public static TransitionMode fromId(int id) {
            for (TransitionMode mode : values()) {
                if (mode.id == id) {
                    return mode;
                }
            }
            return FADE; // 榛樿杩囨浮妯″紡
        }
    }
    
    // 闅忔満鏁扮敓鎴愬櫒
    private final Random random = new Random();
    
    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public ParticlesToBlocksNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "animation.effects.particles_to_blocks");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_TARGET_BLOCKS_ID, "Target Blocks", "鐩爣鏂瑰潡", NodeDataType.LIST, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_PARTICLE_TYPE_ID, "Particle Type", "绮掑瓙绫诲瀷", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_TIME_FACTOR_ID, "Time Factor", "鏃堕棿鍥犲瓙锛?-1锛?, NodeDataType.FLOAT, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_PARTICLE_DENSITY_ID, "Particle Density", "绮掑瓙瀵嗗害", NodeDataType.FLOAT, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_PARTICLE_SPEED_ID, "Particle Speed", "绮掑瓙閫熷害", NodeDataType.FLOAT, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_TRANSITION_MODE_ID, "Transition Mode", "杩囨浮妯″紡", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_VISIBLE_BLOCKS_ID, "Visible Blocks", "鍙鏂瑰潡", NodeDataType.LIST, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_PARTICLE_EFFECTS_ID, "Particle Effects", "绮掑瓙鏁堟灉", NodeDataType.LIST, this));
    }
    
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "瀹炵幇绮掑瓙閫愭笎鍙樻垚鏂瑰潡鐨勮瑙夋晥鏋?;
    }

    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object targetBlocksObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_TARGET_BLOCKS_ID);
        Integer particleTypeId = (Integer) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_PARTICLE_TYPE_ID, ParticleType.DUST.id);
        Float timeFactor = (Float) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_TIME_FACTOR_ID, 0.0f);
        Float particleDensity = (Float) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_PARTICLE_DENSITY_ID, 5.0f);
        Float particleSpeed = (Float) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_PARTICLE_SPEED_ID, 0.1f);
        Integer transitionModeId = (Integer) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_TRANSITION_MODE_ID, TransitionMode.FADE.id);
        
        // 纭繚鏃堕棿鍥犲瓙鍦?-1鑼冨洿鍐?
        timeFactor = Math.max(0.0f, Math.min(1.0f, timeFactor));
        
        // 纭繚绮掑瓙瀵嗗害涓烘鏁?
        particleDensity = Math.max(0.1f, particleDensity);
        
        // 纭繚绮掑瓙閫熷害涓烘鏁?
        particleSpeed = Math.max(0.01f, particleSpeed);
        
        // 鑾峰彇绮掑瓙绫诲瀷鍜岃繃娓℃ā寮?
        ParticleType particleType = ParticleType.fromId(particleTypeId);
        TransitionMode transitionMode = TransitionMode.fromId(transitionModeId);
        
        // 澶勭悊杞崲
        processTransition(targetBlocksObj, particleType, timeFactor, particleDensity, particleSpeed, transitionMode);
    }
    
    /**
     * 澶勭悊绮掑瓙鍒版柟鍧楃殑杞崲
     */
    private void processTransition(Object targetBlocksObj, ParticleType particleType, float timeFactor, 
                                  float particleDensity, float particleSpeed, TransitionMode transitionMode) {
        List<Object> visibleBlocks = new ArrayList<>();
        List<Object> particleEffects = new ArrayList<>();
        
        if (targetBlocksObj instanceof List) {
            @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
            List<Object> targetBlocks = (List<Object>) targetBlocksObj;
            
            // 鏍规嵁鏃堕棿鍥犲瓙璁＄畻褰撳墠搴旇鏄剧ず鐨勬柟鍧楀拰绮掑瓙
            for (Object block : targetBlocks) {
                // 鑾峰彇鏂瑰潡浣嶇疆
                float[] position = getCoordinateAsFloatArray(block);
                if (position == null) continue;
                
                // 鏍规嵁杩囨浮妯″紡澶勭悊姣忎釜鏂瑰潡
                processBlockTransition(block, position, particleType, timeFactor, particleDensity, 
                                     particleSpeed, transitionMode, visibleBlocks, particleEffects);
            }
        }
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_VISIBLE_BLOCKS_ID, visibleBlocks);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_PARTICLE_EFFECTS_ID, particleEffects);
    }
    
    /**
     * 澶勭悊鍗曚釜鏂瑰潡鐨勮浆鎹?
     */
    private void processBlockTransition(Object block, float[] position, ParticleType particleType, float timeFactor,
                                      float particleDensity, float particleSpeed, TransitionMode transitionMode,
                                      List<Object> visibleBlocks, List<Object> particleEffects) {
        // 璁＄畻鍧楃殑闅忔満绉嶅瓙锛堢‘淇濈浉鍚岀殑鍧楀湪涓嶅悓甯т腑鏈夌浉鍚岀殑琛屼负锛?
        int blockSeed = getBlockSeed(block, position);
        Random blockRandom = new Random(blockSeed);
        
        // 涓烘柟鍧楁寚瀹氫竴涓敮涓€鐨勮浆鎹㈤槇鍊硷紙鍦?.2-0.8鑼冨洿鍐咃級
        float threshold = 0.2f + blockRandom.nextFloat() * 0.6f;
        
        // 鍩轰簬杩囨浮妯″紡璁＄畻鏂瑰潡鏄惁鍙
        boolean blockVisible = false;
        int particleCount = 0;
        
        switch (transitionMode) {
            case FADE:
                // 绠€鍗曟贰鍏ユ贰鍑猴細鏃堕棿鍥犲瓙瓒呰繃闃堝€兼椂鏄剧ず鏂瑰潡锛屽惁鍒欐樉绀虹矑瀛?
                blockVisible = timeFactor >= threshold;
                particleCount = blockVisible ? 
                    Math.round(particleDensity * (1.0f - timeFactor) * 2) : // 鏂瑰潡鍑虹幇鍚庣矑瀛愰€愭笎鍑忓皯
                    Math.round(particleDensity * 2); // 鏂瑰潡鍑虹幇鍓嶄繚鎸佽緝澶氱矑瀛?
                break;
                
            case ASSEMBLE:
                // 鑱氶泦鏁堟灉锛氭椂闂村洜瀛愭帴杩戦槇鍊兼椂绮掑瓙鏁伴噺澧炲姞锛岃秴杩囬槇鍊兼樉绀烘柟鍧?
                blockVisible = timeFactor >= threshold;
                float distanceToThreshold = Math.abs(timeFactor - threshold);
                particleCount = Math.round(particleDensity * (1.0f - distanceToThreshold * 3));
                
                // 闄愬埗绮掑瓙鏁伴噺鍦ㄥ悎鐞嗚寖鍥村唴
                particleCount = Math.max(0, Math.min(particleCount, (int)(particleDensity * 2)));
                break;
                
            case MORPH:
                // 鍙樺舰鏁堟灉锛氭椂闂村洜瀛愬鍔犳椂绮掑瓙閫愭笎鑱氭嫝锛屽悓鏃舵柟鍧楅€愭笎鏄剧幇
                blockVisible = timeFactor >= threshold * 0.8f; // 鎻愬墠鏄剧ず鏂瑰潡
                
                // 绮掑瓙鏁伴噺闅忔椂闂村噺灏戯紝浣嗕繚鎸佷竴瀹氭暟閲忕洿鍒板畬鍏ㄥ彉褰?
                float morphProgress = Math.min(1.0f, timeFactor / threshold);
                particleCount = Math.round(particleDensity * (1.0f - morphProgress * 0.7f));
                break;
        }
        
        // 濡傛灉鏂瑰潡鍙锛屾坊鍔犲埌鍙鏂瑰潡鍒楄〃
        if (blockVisible) {
            visibleBlocks.add(block);
        }
        
        // 鍒涘缓绮掑瓙鏁堟灉
        for (int i = 0; i < particleCount; i++) {
            // 鍒涘缓绮掑瓙鍙傛暟
            Map<String, Object> particleParams = createParticleParameters(
                position, particleType, blockRandom, timeFactor, particleSpeed, transitionMode);
            
            // 娣诲姞绮掑瓙鏁堟灉
            particleEffects.add(particleParams);
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * 鑾峰彇鏂瑰潡鐨勭瀛愬€?
     */
    private int getBlockSeed(Object block, float[] position) {
        if (position != null) {
            int x = Math.round(position[0]);
            int y = Math.round(position[1]);
            int z = Math.round(position[2]);
            return x * 73856093 ^ y * 19349663 ^ z * 83492791;
        }
        return block.hashCode();
    }
    
    /**
     * 鍒涘缓绮掑瓙鍙傛暟
     */
    private Map<String, Object> createParticleParameters(float[] blockPosition, ParticleType particleType, 
                                                      Random blockRandom, float timeFactor, 
                                                      float particleSpeed, TransitionMode transitionMode) {
        Map<String, Object> params = new HashMap<>();
        
        // 绮掑瓙绫诲瀷
        params.put("type", particleType.name().toLowerCase());
        
        // 鏍规嵁杩囨浮妯″紡璁＄畻绮掑瓙浣嶇疆
        float[] particlePos = new float[3];
        float dispersal = 0.5f; // 鍩虹鎵╂暎鑼冨洿锛堟柟鍧楀崐寰勶級
        
        switch (transitionMode) {
            case FADE:
                // 娣″叆娣″嚭锛氱矑瀛愬湪鏂瑰潡鍛ㄥ洿闅忔満鍒嗗竷
                dispersal = 0.5f + 0.5f * (1.0f - timeFactor); // 闅忔椂闂村噺灏忔墿鏁?
                break;
                
            case ASSEMBLE:
                // 鑱氶泦锛氱矑瀛愪粠杩滃鍚戞柟鍧楄仛闆?
                dispersal = 0.5f + 2.0f * (1.0f - timeFactor); // 杈冨ぇ鐨勫垵濮嬫墿鏁?
                break;
                
            case MORPH:
                // 鍙樺舰锛氱矑瀛愬洿缁曟柟鍧楁棆杞苟閫愭笎璐磋繎
                dispersal = 0.5f + 1.0f * (1.0f - timeFactor); // 涓瓑鎵╂暎
                break;
        }
        
        // 璁＄畻绮掑瓙浣嶇疆锛堟柟鍧椾腑蹇冨姞涓婇殢鏈哄亸绉伙級
        for (int i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
            float offset = (blockRandom.nextFloat() * 2 - 1) * dispersal;
            particlePos[i] = blockPosition[i] + offset;
        }
        
        // 璁剧疆绮掑瓙浣嶇疆
        params.put("x", particlePos[0]);
        params.put("y", particlePos[1]);
        params.put("z", particlePos[2]);
        
        // 璁＄畻绮掑瓙閫熷害鐭㈤噺
        float[] velocity = new float[3];
        
        switch (transitionMode) {
            case FADE:
                // 娣″叆娣″嚭锛氱矑瀛愮紦鎱㈤殢鏈虹Щ鍔?
                for (int i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
                    velocity[i] = (blockRandom.nextFloat() * 2 - 1) * particleSpeed * 0.2f;
                }
                break;
                
            case ASSEMBLE:
                // 鑱氶泦锛氱矑瀛愬悜鏂瑰潡涓績绉诲姩
                for (int i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
                    // 浠庣矑瀛愭寚鍚戞柟鍧椾腑蹇冪殑鍚戦噺
                    float direction = blockPosition[i] - particlePos[i];
                    float distance = Math.abs(direction);
                    
                    // 閫熷害涓庤窛绂绘垚姝ｆ瘮
                    velocity[i] = direction * particleSpeed * (0.5f + distance * 0.5f);
                }
                break;
                
            case MORPH:
                // 鍙樺舰锛氱矑瀛愬洿缁曟柟鍧楁棆杞?
                // 鍒涘缓鍥寸粫Y杞存棆杞殑鏁堟灉
                float dx = particlePos[0] - blockPosition[0];
                float dz = particlePos[2] - blockPosition[2];
                float radius = (float) Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dz * dz);
                
                if (radius > 0.01f) {
                    // 璁＄畻鍒囩嚎鏂瑰悜锛堝瀭鐩翠簬寰勫悜鏂瑰悜锛?
                    velocity[0] = -dz / radius * particleSpeed;
                    velocity[1] = (blockRandom.nextFloat() * 2 - 1) * particleSpeed * 0.2f;
                    velocity[2] = dx / radius * particleSpeed;
                } else {
                    // 濡傛灉澶潬杩戜腑蹇冿紝缁欎竴涓皬鐨勯殢鏈洪€熷害
                    for (int i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
                        velocity[i] = (blockRandom.nextFloat() * 2 - 1) * particleSpeed * 0.1f;
                    }
                }
                
                // 娣诲姞鍚戜腑蹇冪殑鍒嗛噺
                for (int i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
                    float direction = blockPosition[i] - particlePos[i];
                    velocity[i] += direction * particleSpeed * 0.2f;
                }
                break;
        }
        
        // 璁剧疆绮掑瓙閫熷害
        params.put("vx", velocity[0]);
        params.put("vy", velocity[1]);
        params.put("vz", velocity[2]);
        
        // 璁剧疆绮掑瓙棰滆壊锛堝鏋滈€傜敤锛?
        if (particleType == ParticleType.DUST || particleType == ParticleType.REDSTONE) {
            // 浠庢柟鍧楄幏鍙栭鑹叉垨浣跨敤榛樿棰滆壊
            int[] color = getBlockColor(blockRandom);
            params.put("r", color[0]);
            params.put("g", color[1]);
            params.put("b", color[2]);
        }
        
        // 璁剧疆绮掑瓙瀵垮懡
        float lifetime = 10.0f + blockRandom.nextFloat() * 10.0f;
        params.put("lifetime", lifetime);
        
        return params;
    }
    
    /**
     * 鑾峰彇鏂瑰潡鐨勯鑹诧紙RGB鍊硷級
     */
    private int[] getBlockColor(Random random) {
        // 杩欓噷鍙互鏍规嵁鏂瑰潡绫诲瀷杩斿洖閫傚綋鐨勯鑹?
        // 姝ょず渚嬬畝鍗曡繑鍥為殢鏈洪鑹?
        return new int[]{
            random.nextInt(256),
            random.nextInt(256),
            random.nextInt(256)
        };
    }
    
    /**
     * 灏嗗潗鏍囧璞¤浆鎹负娴偣鏁扮粍
     */
    private float[] getCoordinateAsFloatArray(Object coordObj) {
        // 澶勭悊int[]鏍煎紡鐨勫潗鏍?
        if (coordObj instanceof int[]) {
            int[] coord = (int[]) coordObj;
            if (coord.length >= 3) {
                return new float[]{(float) coord[0], (float) coord[1], (float) coord[2]};
            }
        }
        // 澶勭悊鍖呭惈x,y,z瀛楁鐨勫璞★紙濡侰oordinate绫伙級
        else if (coordObj instanceof Map) {
            try {
                @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
                Map<String, Object> coordMap = (Map<String, Object>) coordObj;
                
                if (coordMap.containsKey("x") && coordMap.containsKey("y") && coordMap.containsKey("z")) {
                    float x = ((Number) coordMap.get("x")).floatValue();
                    float y = ((Number) coordMap.get("y")).floatValue();
                    float z = ((Number) coordMap.get("z")).floatValue();
                    
                    return new float[]{x, y, z};
                }
            } catch (Exception e) {
                // 澶勭悊澶辫触锛岃繑鍥瀗ull
                return null;
            }
        }
        
        return null;
    }
} 
===FILE: C:\Users\navib\Desktop\development\NC\nodecraft\src\main\java\com\nodecraft\nodesystem\nodes\animation\effects\ProgressiveBuildNode.java===
package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.animation.effects;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;

import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.Collections;
import java.util.Comparator;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;
import java.util.Random;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Progressive Build Node: 閫愭鏋勫缓鑺傜偣
 * 鏍规嵁鏃堕棿鍥犲瓙閫愪釜鎴栭€愮粍鍦版樉绀哄嚑浣曚綋锛屽疄鐜?鐢熼暱"鏁堟灉
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "animation.effects.progressive_build",
    displayName = "Progressive Build",
    description = "闅忔椂闂撮€愭鏄剧ず鍑犱綍浣?,
    category = "animation.effects"
)
public class ProgressiveBuildNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_GEOMETRY_ID = "input_geometry";
    private static final String INPUT_TIME_FACTOR_ID = "input_time_factor";
    private static final String INPUT_BUILD_ORDER_ID = "input_build_order";
    private static final String INPUT_GROUP_SIZE_ID = "input_group_size";
    private static final String INPUT_REFERENCE_POINT_ID = "input_reference_point";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_VISIBLE_GEOMETRY_ID = "output_visible_geometry";
    
    // --- 鏋勫缓椤哄簭鏋氫妇 ---
    public enum BuildOrder {
        RANDOM(0, "Random", "闅忔満椤哄簭"),
        BY_HEIGHT(1, "By Height", "鎸夐珮搴︿粠涓嬪埌涓?),
        BY_DISTANCE(2, "By Distance", "鎸夊埌鍙傝€冪偣鐨勮窛绂?),
        SEQUENTIAL(3, "Sequential", "鎸夌储寮曢『搴?);
        
        private final int id;
        private final String name;
        private final String description;
        
        BuildOrder(int id, String name, String description) {
            this.id = id;
            this.name = name;
            this.description = description;
        }
        
        public static BuildOrder fromId(int id) {
            for (BuildOrder order : values()) {
                if (order.id == id) {
                    return order;
                }
            }
            return SEQUENTIAL; // 榛樿椤哄簭
        }
    }
    
    // 闅忔満鏁扮敓鎴愬櫒锛堢敤浜庨殢鏈洪『搴忥級
    private final Random random = new Random();
    
    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public ProgressiveBuildNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "animation.effects.progressive_build");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_GEOMETRY_ID, "Full Geometry", "瀹屾暣鐨勫嚑浣曚綋", NodeDataType.LIST, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_TIME_FACTOR_ID, "Time Factor", "鏃堕棿鍥犲瓙锛?-1锛?, NodeDataType.FLOAT, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_BUILD_ORDER_ID, "Build Order", "鏋勫缓椤哄簭锛?=闅忔満, 1=鎸夐珮搴? 2=鎸夎窛绂? 3=鎸夌储寮曪級", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_GROUP_SIZE_ID, "Group Size", "姣忔鏄剧ず鐨勬柟鍧楁暟", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_REFERENCE_POINT_ID, "Reference Point", "鍙傝€冪偣锛堢敤浜庤窛绂绘帓搴忥級", NodeDataType.VECTOR, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_VISIBLE_GEOMETRY_ID, "Visible Geometry", "褰撳墠鍙鐨勫嚑浣曚綋", NodeDataType.LIST, this));
    }
    
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "闅忔椂闂撮€愭鏄剧ず鍑犱綍浣?;
    }

    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object geometryObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_GEOMETRY_ID);
        Float timeFactor = (Float) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_TIME_FACTOR_ID, 0.0f);
        Integer buildOrderId = (Integer) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_BUILD_ORDER_ID, BuildOrder.SEQUENTIAL.id);
        Integer groupSize = (Integer) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_GROUP_SIZE_ID, 1);
        float[] referencePoint = (float[]) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_REFERENCE_POINT_ID, new float[]{0.0f, 0.0f, 0.0f});
        
        // 纭繚鏃堕棿鍥犲瓙鍦?-1鑼冨洿鍐?
        timeFactor = Math.max(0.0f, Math.min(1.0f, timeFactor));
        
        // 纭繚缁勫ぇ灏忚嚦灏戜负1
        groupSize = Math.max(1, groupSize);
        
        // 纭繚鍙傝€冪偣鏈夋晥
        if (referencePoint.length < 3) {
            referencePoint = new float[]{0.0f, 0.0f, 0.0f};
        }
        
        // 鑾峰彇鏋勫缓椤哄簭
        BuildOrder buildOrder = BuildOrder.fromId(buildOrderId);
        
        // 澶勭悊鍑犱綍浣?
        List<Object> visibleGeometry = processGeometry(geometryObj, timeFactor, buildOrder, groupSize, referencePoint);
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_VISIBLE_GEOMETRY_ID, visibleGeometry);
    }
    
    /**
     * 澶勭悊鍑犱綍浣擄紝鏍规嵁鏃堕棿鍥犲瓙鍐冲畾鏄剧ず鍝簺閮ㄥ垎
     */
    private List<Object> processGeometry(Object geometryObj, float timeFactor, BuildOrder buildOrder, int groupSize, float[] referencePoint) {
        List<Object> result = new ArrayList<>();
        
        if (geometryObj instanceof List) {
            @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
            List<Object> geometryList = (List<Object>) geometryObj;
            
            // 濡傛灉鍑犱綍浣撲负绌猴紝鐩存帴杩斿洖绌哄垪琛?
            if (geometryList.isEmpty()) {
                return result;
            }
            
            // 鏍规嵁鏋勫缓椤哄簭瀵瑰嚑浣曚綋鎺掑簭
            List<Object> sortedGeometry = sortGeometry(geometryList, buildOrder, referencePoint);
            
            // 璁＄畻瑕佹樉绀虹殑鏂瑰潡鏁伴噺
            int totalBlocks = sortedGeometry.size();
            int visibleBlocks = Math.min(totalBlocks, Math.round(totalBlocks * timeFactor));
            
            // 纭繚visibleBlocks鏄痝roupSize鐨勫€嶆暟
            visibleBlocks = (visibleBlocks / groupSize) * groupSize;
            
            // 娣诲姞鍙鐨勬柟鍧楀埌缁撴灉
            for (int i = 0; i < visibleBlocks; i++) {
                result.add(sortedGeometry.get(i));
            }
        }
        
        return result;
    }
    
    /**
     * 鏍规嵁鏋勫缓椤哄簭瀵瑰嚑浣曚綋鎺掑簭
     */
    private List<Object> sortGeometry(List<Object> geometry, BuildOrder buildOrder, float[] referencePoint) {
        List<Object> sortedGeometry = new ArrayList<>(geometry);
        
        switch (buildOrder) {
            case RANDOM:
                // 闅忔満鎺掑簭
                Collections.shuffle(sortedGeometry, random);
                break;
                
            case BY_HEIGHT:
                // 鎸塝鍧愭爣锛堥珮搴︼級鎺掑簭锛屼粠浣庡埌楂?
                sortedGeometry.sort(Comparator.comparingDouble(block -> getCoordinateY(block)));
                break;
                
            case BY_DISTANCE:
                // 鎸夊埌鍙傝€冪偣鐨勮窛绂绘帓搴忥紝浠庤繎鍒拌繙
                final float[] refPoint = referencePoint;
                sortedGeometry.sort(Comparator.comparingDouble(block -> getDistanceToPoint(block, refPoint)));
                break;
                
            case SEQUENTIAL:
                // 宸茬粡鎸夌储寮曢『搴忥紝涓嶉渶瑕侀澶栨帓搴?
                break;
        }
        
        return sortedGeometry;
    }
    
    /**
     * 鑾峰彇鏂瑰潡鐨刌鍧愭爣
     */
    private double getCoordinateY(Object block) {
        float[] coord = getCoordinateAsFloatArray(block);
        return (coord != null) ? coord[1] : 0.0;
    }
    
    /**
     * 璁＄畻鏂瑰潡鍒扮偣鐨勮窛绂?
     */
    private double getDistanceToPoint(Object block, float[] point) {
        float[] coord = getCoordinateAsFloatArray(block);
        if (coord == null) return Double.MAX_VALUE;
        
        double dx = coord[0] - point[0];
        double dy = coord[1] - point[1];
        double dz = coord[2] - point[2];
        
        return Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy + dz * dz);
    }
    
    /**
     * 灏嗗潗鏍囧璞¤浆鎹负娴偣鏁扮粍
     */
    private float[] getCoordinateAsFloatArray(Object coordObj) {
        // 澶勭悊int[]鏍煎紡鐨勫潗鏍?
        if (coordObj instanceof int[]) {
            int[] coord = (int[]) coordObj;
            if (coord.length >= 3) {
                return new float[]{(float) coord[0], (float) coord[1], (float) coord[2]};
            }
        }
        // 澶勭悊鍖呭惈x,y,z瀛楁鐨勫璞★紙濡侰oordinate绫伙級
        else if (coordObj instanceof Map) {
            try {
                @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
                Map<String, Object> coordMap = (Map<String, Object>) coordObj;
                
                if (coordMap.containsKey("x") && coordMap.containsKey("y") && coordMap.containsKey("z")) {
                    float x = ((Number) coordMap.get("x")).floatValue();
                    float y = ((Number) coordMap.get("y")).floatValue();
                    float z = ((Number) coordMap.get("z")).floatValue();
                    
                    return new float[]{x, y, z};
                }
            } catch (Exception e) {
                // 澶勭悊澶辫触锛岃繑鍥瀗ull
                return null;
            }
        }
        
        return null;
    }
}
