package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.animation.interpolation;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Vector Blend Node: 鍚戦噺娣峰悎鑺傜偣
 * 鍦ㄤ袱涓悜閲忎箣闂磋繘琛岀嚎鎬ф彃鍊?
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "animation.interpolation.vector_blend",
    displayName = "Vector Blend",
    description = "鍦ㄤ袱涓悜閲忎箣闂磋繘琛屾彃鍊兼贩鍚?,
    category = "animation.interpolation"
)
public class VectorBlendNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_VECTOR_A_ID = "input_vector_a";
    private static final String INPUT_VECTOR_B_ID = "input_vector_b";
    private static final String INPUT_FACTOR_ID = "input_factor";
    private static final String INPUT_NORMALIZE_ID = "input_normalize";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_BLENDED_VECTOR_ID = "output_blended_vector";
    
    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public VectorBlendNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "animation.interpolation.vector_blend");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_VECTOR_A_ID, "Vector A", "璧峰鍚戦噺", NodeDataType.VECTOR, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_VECTOR_B_ID, "Vector B", "缁撴潫鍚戦噺", NodeDataType.VECTOR, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_FACTOR_ID, "Factor", "娣峰悎鍥犲瓙锛?-1锛?, NodeDataType.FLOAT, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_NORMALIZE_ID, "Normalize", "鏄惁褰掍竴鍖栫粨鏋滐紙淇濇寔鍚戦噺闀垮害涓?锛?, NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_BLENDED_VECTOR_ID, "Blended Vector", "娣峰悎鍚庣殑鍚戦噺", NodeDataType.VECTOR, this));
    }
    
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "鍦ㄤ袱涓悜閲忎箣闂磋繘琛屾彃鍊兼贩鍚?;
    }

    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        float[] vectorA = (float[]) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_VECTOR_A_ID, new float[]{1.0f, 0.0f, 0.0f});
        float[] vectorB = (float[]) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_VECTOR_B_ID, new float[]{0.0f, 1.0f, 0.0f});
        Float factor = (Float) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_FACTOR_ID, 0.5f);
        Boolean normalize = (Boolean) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_NORMALIZE_ID, false);
        
        // 纭繚鎻掑€煎洜瀛愬湪0-1鑼冨洿鍐?
        factor = Math.max(0.0f, Math.min(1.0f, factor));
        
        // 纭繚鍚戦噺鏈夋晥
        if (vectorA == null || vectorA.length < 3) {
            vectorA = new float[]{1.0f, 0.0f, 0.0f}; // 榛樿x杞村崟浣嶅悜閲?
        }
        if (vectorB == null || vectorB.length < 3) {
            vectorB = new float[]{0.0f, 1.0f, 0.0f}; // 榛樿y杞村崟浣嶅悜閲?
        }
        
        // 娣峰悎鍚戦噺
        float[] blendedVector = blendVectors(vectorA, vectorB, factor, normalize);
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_BLENDED_VECTOR_ID, blendedVector);
    }
    
    /**
     * 娣峰悎涓や釜鍚戦噺
     */
    private float[] blendVectors(float[] vectorA, float[] vectorB, float factor, boolean normalize) {
        // 鍋囪鍚戦噺鏄?D鍚戦噺锛坸, y, z锛?
        float[] result = new float[3];
        
        // 绾挎€ф彃鍊?
        for (int i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
            result[i] = vectorA[i] + (vectorB[i] - vectorA[i]) * factor;
        }
        
        // 濡傛灉闇€瑕佸綊涓€鍖?
        if (normalize) {
            normalizeVector(result);
        }
        
        return result;
    }
    
    /**
     * 褰掍竴鍖栧悜閲忥紙浣垮叾闀垮害涓?锛?
     */
    private void normalizeVector(float[] vector) {
        // 璁＄畻鍚戦噺闀垮害
        float length = (float) Math.sqrt(
            vector[0] * vector[0] +
            vector[1] * vector[1] +
            vector[2] * vector[2]
        );
        
        // 闃叉闄や互闆?
        if (length > 0.0001f) {
            // 褰掍竴鍖?
            vector[0] /= length;
            vector[1] /= length;
            vector[2] /= length;
        }
    }
} 
===FILE: C:\Users\navib\Desktop\development\NC\nodecraft\src\main\java\com\nodecraft\nodesystem\nodes\animation\output\AnimatedPreviewBlocksNode.java===
package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.animation.output;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;

import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Animated Preview Blocks Node: 鍔ㄧ敾棰勮鏂瑰潡鑺傜偣
 * 鎺ユ敹鍑犱綍浣撳垪琛紝骞跺湪娓告垙涓栫晫涓疄鏃舵覆鏌撲负鍔ㄧ敾甯?
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "animation.output.animated_preview_blocks",
    displayName = "Animated Preview Blocks",
    description = "鍦ㄦ父鎴忎笘鐣屼腑瀹炴椂娓叉煋鍔ㄧ敾甯?,
    category = "animation.output"
)
public class AnimatedPreviewBlocksNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_ANIMATED_GEOMETRY_ID = "input_animated_geometry";
    private static final String INPUT_ENABLED_ID = "input_enabled";
    private static final String INPUT_FRAME_RATE_ID = "input_frame_rate";
    private static final String INPUT_RENDER_DISTANCE_ID = "input_render_distance";
    private static final String INPUT_RENDER_MODE_ID = "input_render_mode";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_RENDER_STATUS_ID = "output_render_status";
    private static final String OUTPUT_CURRENT_FRAME_ID = "output_current_frame";
    
    // --- 娓叉煋妯″紡鏋氫妇 ---
    public enum RenderMode {
        GHOST_BLOCKS(0, "Ghost Blocks", "浣跨敤閫忔槑骞界伒鏂瑰潡娓叉煋"),
        PARTICLES(1, "Particles", "浣跨敤绮掑瓙鏁堟灉娓叉煋"),
        MIXED(2, "Mixed", "娣峰悎浣跨敤骞界伒鏂瑰潡鍜岀矑瀛?);
        
        private final int id;
        private final String name;

        RenderMode(int id, String name, String description) {
            this.id = id;
            this.name = name;
        }
        
        public static RenderMode fromId(int id) {
            for (RenderMode mode : values()) {
                if (mode.id == id) {
                    return mode;
                }
            }
            return GHOST_BLOCKS; // 榛樿娓叉煋妯″紡
        }
    }
    
    // 涓婁竴娆℃覆鏌撶殑鏂瑰潡鍒楄〃锛堢敤浜庢竻闄わ級
    private List<Object> lastRenderedBlocks = new ArrayList<>();
    
    // 鏈€鍚庢洿鏂版椂闂存埑
    private long lastUpdateTime = 0;
    
    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public AnimatedPreviewBlocksNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "animation.output.animated_preview_blocks");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_ANIMATED_GEOMETRY_ID, "Animated Geometry", "鍔ㄧ敾鍑犱綍浣?, NodeDataType.LIST, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_ENABLED_ID, "Enabled", "鍚敤娓叉煋", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_FRAME_RATE_ID, "Frame Rate", "甯х巼 (FPS)", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_RENDER_DISTANCE_ID, "Render Distance", "娓叉煋璺濈", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_RENDER_MODE_ID, "Render Mode", "娓叉煋妯″紡", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_RENDER_STATUS_ID, "Render Status", "娓叉煋鐘舵€?, NodeDataType.STRING, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_CURRENT_FRAME_ID, "Current Frame", "褰撳墠甯?, NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
    }
    
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "鍦ㄦ父鎴忎笘鐣屼腑瀹炴椂娓叉煋鍔ㄧ敾甯?;
    }

    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object geometryObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_ANIMATED_GEOMETRY_ID);
        Boolean enabled = (Boolean) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_ENABLED_ID, true);
        Integer frameRate = (Integer) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_FRAME_RATE_ID, 20);
        Integer renderDistance = (Integer) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_RENDER_DISTANCE_ID, 64);
        Integer renderModeId = (Integer) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_RENDER_MODE_ID, RenderMode.GHOST_BLOCKS.id);
        
        // 纭繚甯х巼鍦ㄥ悎鐞嗚寖鍥村唴
        frameRate = Math.max(1, Math.min(60, frameRate));
        
        // 纭繚娓叉煋璺濈鍦ㄥ悎鐞嗚寖鍥村唴
        renderDistance = Math.max(16, Math.min(256, renderDistance));
        
        // 鑾峰彇娓叉煋妯″紡
        RenderMode renderMode = RenderMode.fromId(renderModeId);
        
        // 澶勭悊娓叉煋閫昏緫
        processRendering(context, geometryObj, enabled, frameRate, renderDistance, renderMode);
    }
    
    /**
     * 澶勭悊娓叉煋閫昏緫
     */
    private void processRendering(ExecutionContext context, Object geometryObj, boolean enabled, 
                                int frameRate, int renderDistance, RenderMode renderMode) {
        // 榛樿鐘舵€?
        String renderStatus;
        int currentFrame = 0;
        
        // 濡傛灉绂佺敤娓叉煋锛屾竻闄ゅ凡娓叉煋鐨勬柟鍧?
        if (!enabled) {
            clearRenderedBlocks(context);
            renderStatus = "Disabled";
        } else if (geometryObj instanceof List) {
            @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
            List<Object> geometryList = (List<Object>) geometryObj;
            
            // 妫€鏌ユ槸鍚﹂渶瑕佹洿鏂板抚锛堝熀浜庡抚鐜囷級
            long currentTime = System.currentTimeMillis();
            long frameInterval = 1000 / frameRate;
            
            if (currentTime - lastUpdateTime >= frameInterval) {
                // 鏇存柊鏃堕棿鎴?
                lastUpdateTime = currentTime;
                
                // 娓呴櫎涓婁竴甯?
                clearRenderedBlocks(context);
                
                // 娓叉煋鏂颁竴甯?
                renderNewFrame(context, geometryList, renderDistance, renderMode);
                
                // 鏇存柊鐘舵€?
                currentFrame = getFrameCounter();
                renderStatus = "Rendering at " + frameRate + " FPS";
            } else {
                // 褰撳墠甯т笉闇€瑕佹洿鏂?
                currentFrame = getFrameCounter();
                renderStatus = "Waiting for next frame";
            }
        } else {
            // 鍑犱綍浣撴牸寮忛敊璇?
            clearRenderedBlocks(context);
            renderStatus = "Error: Invalid geometry format";
        }
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_RENDER_STATUS_ID, renderStatus);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_CURRENT_FRAME_ID, currentFrame);
    }
    
    /**
     * 娓呴櫎宸叉覆鏌撶殑鏂瑰潡
     */
    private void clearRenderedBlocks(ExecutionContext context) {
        // 杩欓噷灏嗚皟鐢∕inecraft API鏉ョЩ闄ゅ凡娓叉煋鐨勪复鏃舵柟鍧楁垨绮掑瓙鏁堟灉
        // 鐢变簬杩欐槸涓€涓ā鎷熷疄鐜帮紝姝ゅ鍙竻绌轰笂涓€甯ф柟鍧楀垪琛?
        
        if (context != null && !lastRenderedBlocks.isEmpty()) {
            // 鍦ㄥ疄闄呭疄鐜颁腑锛岃繖閲屽皢鍚戝鎴风鍙戦€佹竻闄ゆ柟鍧楃殑鍛戒护
            // 渚嬪锛歝ontext.clearTemporaryRenderedBlocks(lastRenderedBlocks);
            
            lastRenderedBlocks.clear();
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * 娓叉煋鏂颁竴甯?
     */
    private void renderNewFrame(ExecutionContext context, List<Object> geometry, int renderDistance, RenderMode renderMode) {
        // 杩欓噷灏嗚皟鐢∕inecraft API鏉ユ覆鏌撴柊鐨勪复鏃舵柟鍧楁垨绮掑瓙鏁堟灉
        // 鐢变簬杩欐槸涓€涓ā鎷熷疄鐜帮紝姝ゅ鍙繚瀛樺綋鍓嶅抚鏂瑰潡鍒楄〃
        
        if (context != null && !geometry.isEmpty()) {
            // 绛涢€夊湪娓叉煋璺濈鍐呯殑鏂瑰潡
            List<Object> blocksToRender = filterBlocksByDistance(context, geometry, renderDistance);
            
            // 鍦ㄥ疄闄呭疄鐜颁腑锛岃繖閲屽皢鍚戝鎴风鍙戦€佹覆鏌撴柟鍧楃殑鍛戒护
            // 鏍规嵁娓叉煋妯″紡閫夋嫨涓嶅悓鐨勬覆鏌撴柟娉?
            switch (renderMode) {
                case GHOST_BLOCKS:
                    // 娓叉煋骞界伒鏂瑰潡
                    // 渚嬪锛歝ontext.renderGhostBlocks(blocksToRender);
                    break;
                    
                case PARTICLES:
                    // 娓叉煋绮掑瓙鏁堟灉
                    // 渚嬪锛歝ontext.renderBlockParticles(blocksToRender);
                    break;
                    
                case MIXED:
                    // 娣峰悎娓叉煋
                    // 渚嬪锛?
                    // List<Object> solidBlocks = filterSolidBlocks(blocksToRender);
                    // List<Object> transparentBlocks = filterTransparentBlocks(blocksToRender);
                    // context.renderGhostBlocks(solidBlocks);
                    // context.renderBlockParticles(transparentBlocks);
                    break;
            }
            
            // 淇濆瓨鏈娓叉煋鐨勬柟鍧楀垪琛?
            lastRenderedBlocks = new ArrayList<>(blocksToRender);
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * 绛涢€夊湪娓叉煋璺濈鍐呯殑鏂瑰潡
     */
    private List<Object> filterBlocksByDistance(ExecutionContext context, List<Object> blocks, int maxDistance) {
        List<Object> result = new ArrayList<>();
        
        if (context != null) {
            // 鑾峰彇鐜╁浣嶇疆锛堝湪瀹為檯瀹炵幇涓級
            // float[] playerPos = context.getPlayerPosition();
            float[] playerPos = new float[]{0, 0, 0}; // 妯℃嫙瀹炵幇
            
            // 绛涢€夊湪娓叉煋璺濈鍐呯殑鏂瑰潡
            for (Object block : blocks) {
                float[] blockPos = getCoordinateAsFloatArray(block);
                if (blockPos != null) {
                    float distance = calculateDistance(playerPos, blockPos);
                    if (distance <= maxDistance) {
                        result.add(block);
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        return result;
    }
    
    /**
     * 璁＄畻涓ょ偣涔嬮棿鐨勮窛绂?
     */
    private float calculateDistance(float[] p1, float[] p2) {
        float dx = p1[0] - p2[0];
        float dy = p1[1] - p2[1];
        float dz = p1[2] - p2[2];
        return (float) Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy + dz * dz);
    }
    
    /**
     * 鑾峰彇褰撳墠甯ц鏁板櫒
     */
    private int getFrameCounter() {
        // 鍦ㄥ疄闄呭疄鐜颁腑锛岃繖鍙兘鏄竴涓€掑鐨勫抚璁℃暟鍣?
        // 姝ゅ绠€鍗曞湴杩斿洖鍩轰簬褰撳墠鏃堕棿鐨勫抚鏁?
        return (int)((System.currentTimeMillis() / 1000) % 1000);
    }
    
    /**
     * 灏嗗潗鏍囧璞¤浆鎹负娴偣鏁扮粍
     */
    private float[] getCoordinateAsFloatArray(Object coordObj) {
        // 澶勭悊int[]鏍煎紡鐨勫潗鏍?
        if (coordObj instanceof int[] coord) {
            if (coord.length >= 3) {
                return new float[]{(float) coord[0], (float) coord[1], (float) coord[2]};
            }
        }
        // 澶勭悊鍖呭惈x,y,z瀛楁鐨勫璞★紙濡侰oordinate绫绘垨MinecraftBlock锛?
        else if (coordObj instanceof Map) {
            try {
                @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
                Map<String, Object> coordMap = (Map<String, Object>) coordObj;
                
                if (coordMap.containsKey("x") && coordMap.containsKey("y") && coordMap.containsKey("z")) {
                    float x = ((Number) coordMap.get("x")).floatValue();
                    float y = ((Number) coordMap.get("y")).floatValue();
                    float z = ((Number) coordMap.get("z")).floatValue();
                    
                    return new float[]{x, y, z};
                }
            } catch (Exception e) {
                // 澶勭悊澶辫触锛岃繑鍥瀗ull
                return null;
            }
        }
        
        return null;
    }
} 
===FILE: C:\Users\navib\Desktop\development\NC\nodecraft\src\main\java\com\nodecraft\nodesystem\nodes\animation\output\AnimationRecorderNode.java===
package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.animation.output;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;

import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.HashMap;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Animation Recorder Node: 鍔ㄧ敾璁板綍鍣ㄨ妭鐐?
 * 灏嗘暣涓姩鐢诲簭鍒楀鍑轰负涓€绯诲垪鏂囦欢锛屼互渚垮湪娓告垙涓噸鏀?
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "animation.output.animation_recorder",
    displayName = "Animation Recorder",
    description = "灏嗗姩鐢诲簭鍒楀鍑轰负鏂囦欢锛岀敤浜庨噸鏀?,
    category = "animation.output"
)
public class AnimationRecorderNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_ANIMATED_GEOMETRY_ID = "input_animated_geometry";
    private static final String INPUT_RECORD_TRIGGER_ID = "input_record_trigger";
    private static final String INPUT_STOP_TRIGGER_ID = "input_stop_trigger";
    private static final String INPUT_FRAME_RATE_ID = "input_frame_rate";
    private static final String INPUT_OUTPUT_FORMAT_ID = "input_output_format";
    private static final String INPUT_OUTPUT_PATH_ID = "input_output_path";
    private static final String INPUT_PREFIX_ID = "input_prefix";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_STATUS_ID = "output_status";
    private static final String OUTPUT_FRAMES_CAPTURED_ID = "output_frames_captured";
    private static final String OUTPUT_LAST_FILE_PATH_ID = "output_last_file_path";
    
    // --- 杈撳嚭鏍煎紡鏋氫妇 ---
    public enum OutputFormat {
        SCHEMATIC(0, "Schematic", ".schem鏂囦欢"),
        FUNCTION(1, "Function", "Minecraft鍑芥暟鏂囦欢"),
        COMMAND_BLOCK(2, "Command Block", "閫傜敤浜庡懡浠ゆ柟鍧楃殑鍛戒护"),
        NBT(3, "NBT", "NBT鏍煎紡缁撴瀯鏂囦欢");
        
        private final int id;
        private final String name;
        private final String description;
        
        OutputFormat(int id, String name, String description) {
            this.id = id;
            this.name = name;
            this.description = description;
        }
        
        public static OutputFormat fromId(int id) {
            for (OutputFormat format : values()) {
                if (format.id == id) {
                    return format;
                }
            }
            return SCHEMATIC; // 榛樿鏍煎紡
        }
    }
    
    // 鏄惁姝ｅ湪璁板綍涓?
    private boolean isRecording = false;
    
    // 涓婃璁板綍瑙﹀彂鐘舵€?
    private boolean lastRecordState = false;
    
    // 涓婃鍋滄瑙﹀彂鐘舵€?
    private boolean lastStopState = false;
    
    // 宸叉崟鑾风殑甯ф暟
    private int framesCaptured = 0;
    
    // 缂撳瓨鐨勫抚锛堢敤浜庤褰曟暣涓姩鐢伙級
    private final List<List<Object>> frameCache = new ArrayList<>();
    
    // 涓婃璁板綍鐨勬椂闂存埑
    private long lastFrameTime = 0;
    
    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public AnimationRecorderNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "animation.output.animation_recorder");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_ANIMATED_GEOMETRY_ID, "Animated Geometry", "鍔ㄧ敾鍑犱綍浣?, NodeDataType.LIST, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_RECORD_TRIGGER_ID, "Record", "寮€濮嬭褰曪紙鑴夊啿淇″彿锛?, NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_STOP_TRIGGER_ID, "Stop", "鍋滄璁板綍锛堣剦鍐蹭俊鍙凤級", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_FRAME_RATE_ID, "Frame Rate", "鎹曡幏甯х巼 (FPS)", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_OUTPUT_FORMAT_ID, "Output Format", "杈撳嚭鏍煎紡", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_OUTPUT_PATH_ID, "Output Path", "杈撳嚭鐩綍璺緞", NodeDataType.STRING, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_PREFIX_ID, "File Prefix", "鏂囦欢鍚嶅墠缂€", NodeDataType.STRING, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_STATUS_ID, "Status", "璁板綍鐘舵€?, NodeDataType.STRING, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_FRAMES_CAPTURED_ID, "Frames Captured", "宸叉崟鑾峰抚鏁?, NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_LAST_FILE_PATH_ID, "Last File Path", "鏈€鍚庡鍑虹殑鏂囦欢璺緞", NodeDataType.STRING, this));
    }
    
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "灏嗗姩鐢诲簭鍒楀鍑轰负鏂囦欢锛岀敤浜庨噸鏀?;
    }

    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object geometryObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_ANIMATED_GEOMETRY_ID);
        Boolean recordTrigger = (Boolean) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_RECORD_TRIGGER_ID, false);
        Boolean stopTrigger = (Boolean) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_STOP_TRIGGER_ID, false);
        Integer frameRate = (Integer) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_FRAME_RATE_ID, 20);
        Integer outputFormatId = (Integer) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_OUTPUT_FORMAT_ID, OutputFormat.SCHEMATIC.id);
        String outputPath = (String) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_OUTPUT_PATH_ID, "animations");
        String prefix = (String) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_PREFIX_ID, "animation");
        
        // 纭繚甯х巼鍦ㄥ悎鐞嗚寖鍥村唴
        frameRate = Math.max(1, Math.min(60, frameRate));
        
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳嚭鏍煎紡
        OutputFormat outputFormat = OutputFormat.fromId(outputFormatId);
        
        // 澶勭悊璁板綍閫昏緫
        processRecording(context, geometryObj, recordTrigger, stopTrigger, frameRate, outputFormat, outputPath, prefix);
        
        // 鏇存柊瑙﹀彂鍣ㄧ姸鎬?
        lastRecordState = recordTrigger;
        lastStopState = stopTrigger;
    }
    
    /**
     * 澶勭悊璁板綍閫昏緫
     */
    private void processRecording(ExecutionContext context, Object geometryObj, boolean recordTrigger, boolean stopTrigger,
                                int frameRate, OutputFormat outputFormat, String outputPath, String prefix) {
        // 妫€鏌ュ紑濮嬭褰曡Е鍙戯紙涓婂崌娌胯Е鍙戯級
        if (recordTrigger && !lastRecordState && !isRecording) {
            // 寮€濮嬫柊鐨勮褰?
            startRecording();
        }
        
        // 妫€鏌ュ仠姝㈣褰曡Е鍙戯紙涓婂崌娌胯Е鍙戯級
        if (stopTrigger && !lastStopState && isRecording) {
            // 鍋滄璁板綍骞跺鍑?
            stopRecordingAndExport(context, outputFormat, outputPath, prefix);
        }
        
        // 濡傛灉姝ｅ湪璁板綍锛屼笖鍑犱綍浣撴湁鏁堬紝鍒欐崟鑾峰綋鍓嶅抚
        if (isRecording && geometryObj instanceof List) {
            // 璁＄畻鍩轰簬甯х巼鐨勬崟鑾烽棿闅?
            long currentTime = System.currentTimeMillis();
            long frameInterval = 1000 / frameRate;
            
            if (currentTime - lastFrameTime >= frameInterval) {
                // 鎹曡幏褰撳墠甯?
                @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
                List<Object> geometryList = (List<Object>)geometryObj;
                captureFrame(geometryList);
                lastFrameTime = currentTime;
            }
        }
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        String status = isRecording ? "Recording: " + framesCaptured + " frames" : 
                       (framesCaptured > 0 ? "Ready to export" : "Idle");
        
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_STATUS_ID, status);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_FRAMES_CAPTURED_ID, framesCaptured);
    }
    
    /**
     * 寮€濮嬭褰?
     */
    private void startRecording() {
        // 娓呯┖缂撳瓨
        frameCache.clear();
        framesCaptured = 0;
        isRecording = true;
        lastFrameTime = System.currentTimeMillis();
    }
    
    /**
     * 鎹曡幏褰撳墠甯?
     */
    private void captureFrame(List<Object> geometry) {
        // 鍒涘缓褰撳墠甯х殑娣卞鍒?
        List<Object> frameCopy = new ArrayList<>();
        for (Object block : geometry) {
            frameCopy.add(cloneBlock(block));
        }
        
        // 灏嗗抚娣诲姞鍒扮紦瀛?
        frameCache.add(frameCopy);
        framesCaptured++;
    }
    
    /**
     * 鍋滄璁板綍骞跺鍑烘枃浠?
     */
    private void stopRecordingAndExport(ExecutionContext context, OutputFormat format, String outputPath, String prefix) {
        isRecording = false;
        
        if (framesCaptured > 0) {
            // 鎵ц瀵煎嚭锛堣繖閲岄渶瑕佹牴鎹€夋嫨鐨勬牸寮忓鍑哄埌鐩稿簲鐨勬枃浠讹級
            String exportedPath = exportAnimationFrames(context, format, outputPath, prefix);
            
            // 璁剧疆鏈€鍚庡鍑虹殑鏂囦欢璺緞
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_LAST_FILE_PATH_ID, exportedPath);
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * 瀵煎嚭鍔ㄧ敾甯у埌鏂囦欢
     */
    private String exportAnimationFrames(ExecutionContext context, OutputFormat format, String outputPath, String prefix) {
        // 杩欓噷鏄疄闄呯殑瀵煎嚭閫昏緫
        // 鏍规嵁涓嶅悓鐨勬牸寮忥紝瀵煎嚭鍒颁笉鍚岀被鍨嬬殑鏂囦欢
        
        // 鍦ㄥ疄闄呭疄鐜颁腑锛岃繖閲屽皢璋冪敤Minecraft API鏉ュ鍑虹浉搴旀牸寮?
        // 鐢变簬杩欐槸涓€涓ā鎷熷疄鐜帮紝鎴戜滑鍙繑鍥炲亣鎯崇殑鏂囦欢璺緞
        
        String baseFileName = prefix + "_" + System.currentTimeMillis();
        String fileExtension;
        
        switch (format) {
            case SCHEMATIC:
                fileExtension = ".schem";
                // 渚嬪锛歝ontext.exportToSchematic(frameCache, outputPath, baseFileName);
                break;
                
            case FUNCTION:
                fileExtension = ".mcfunction";
                // 渚嬪锛歝ontext.exportToFunction(frameCache, outputPath, baseFileName);
                break;
                
            case COMMAND_BLOCK:
                fileExtension = ".txt";
                // 渚嬪锛歝ontext.exportToCommandBlocks(frameCache, outputPath, baseFileName);
                break;
                
            case NBT:
                fileExtension = ".nbt";
                // 渚嬪锛歝ontext.exportToNBT(frameCache, outputPath, baseFileName);
                break;
                
            default:
                fileExtension = ".schem";
        }
        
        // 杩斿洖杈撳嚭鐩綍
        return outputPath + "/" + baseFileName + fileExtension;
    }
    
    /**
     * 鍏嬮殕鏂瑰潡瀵硅薄
     */
    private Object cloneBlock(Object block) {
        // 澶勭悊int[]鏍煎紡鐨勫潗鏍?
        if (block instanceof int[]) {
            int[] original = (int[]) block;
            int[] clone = new int[original.length];
            System.arraycopy(original, 0, clone, 0, original.length);
            return clone;
        }
        // 澶勭悊Map鏍煎紡鐨勬柟鍧楋紙濡侻inecraftBlock锛?
        else if (block instanceof Map) {
            @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
            Map<String, Object> original = (Map<String, Object>) block;
            return new HashMap<>(original);
        }
        // 鍏朵粬绫诲瀷鏃犳硶鍏嬮殕锛岀洿鎺ヨ繑鍥炲師瀵硅薄
        return block;
    }
} 
===FILE: C:\Users\navib\Desktop\development\NC\nodecraft\src\main\java\com\nodecraft\nodesystem\nodes\animation\output\CaptureFrameNode.java===
package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.animation.output;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;

import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Capture Frame Node: 鎹曡幏甯ц妭鐐?
 * 灏嗗姩鐢绘煇涓€甯х殑鏂瑰潡鍒楄〃杈撳嚭锛岀敤浜庤繘涓€姝ュ鐞嗘垨鐑樼剻
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "animation.output.capture_frame",
    displayName = "Capture Frame",
    description = "鎹曡幏鍔ㄧ敾鐗瑰畾甯х殑鏂瑰潡鍒楄〃",
    category = "animation.output"
)
public class CaptureFrameNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_ANIMATED_GEOMETRY_ID = "input_animated_geometry";
    private static final String INPUT_TRIGGER_ID = "input_trigger";
    private static final String INPUT_FRAME_NAME_ID = "input_frame_name";
    private static final String INPUT_AUTO_CAPTURE_ID = "input_auto_capture";
    private static final String INPUT_CAPTURE_INTERVAL_ID = "input_capture_interval";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_CAPTURED_BLOCKS_ID = "output_captured_blocks";
    private static final String OUTPUT_FRAME_INFO_ID = "output_frame_info";
    private static final String OUTPUT_CAPTURE_COUNT_ID = "output_capture_count";
    
    // 鎹曡幏璁℃暟鍣?
    private int captureCount = 0;
    
    // 涓婃鎹曡幏鏃堕棿
    private long lastCaptureTime = 0;
    
    // 涓婃瑙﹀彂鍣ㄧ姸鎬?
    private boolean lastTriggerState = false;
    
    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public CaptureFrameNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "animation.output.capture_frame");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_ANIMATED_GEOMETRY_ID, "Animated Geometry", "鍔ㄧ敾鍑犱綍浣?, NodeDataType.LIST, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_TRIGGER_ID, "Trigger", "瑙﹀彂鎹曡幏锛堣剦鍐蹭俊鍙凤級", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_FRAME_NAME_ID, "Frame Name", "甯у悕绉?, NodeDataType.STRING, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_AUTO_CAPTURE_ID, "Auto Capture", "鑷姩鎹曡幏妯″紡", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_CAPTURE_INTERVAL_ID, "Capture Interval", "鑷姩鎹曡幏闂撮殧锛堟绉掞級", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_CAPTURED_BLOCKS_ID, "Captured Blocks", "鎹曡幏鐨勬柟鍧?, NodeDataType.LIST, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_FRAME_INFO_ID, "Frame Info", "甯т俊鎭?, NodeDataType.ANY, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_CAPTURE_COUNT_ID, "Capture Count", "鎹曡幏璁℃暟", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
    }
    
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "鎹曡幏鍔ㄧ敾鐗瑰畾甯х殑鏂瑰潡鍒楄〃";
    }

    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object geometryObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_ANIMATED_GEOMETRY_ID);
        Boolean trigger = (Boolean) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_TRIGGER_ID, false);
        String frameName = (String) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_FRAME_NAME_ID, "frame");
        Boolean autoCapture = (Boolean) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_AUTO_CAPTURE_ID, false);
        Integer captureInterval = (Integer) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_CAPTURE_INTERVAL_ID, 1000);
        
        // 纭繚鎹曡幏闂撮殧鍦ㄥ悎鐞嗚寖鍥村唴
        captureInterval = Math.max(100, captureInterval);
        
        // 澶勭悊鎹曡幏閫昏緫
        processCapture(context, geometryObj, trigger, frameName, autoCapture, captureInterval);
        
        // 鏇存柊涓婃瑙﹀彂鍣ㄧ姸鎬?
        lastTriggerState = trigger;
    }
    
    /**
     * 澶勭悊鎹曡幏閫昏緫
     */
    private void processCapture(ExecutionContext context, Object geometryObj, boolean trigger, 
                              String frameName, boolean autoCapture, int captureInterval) {
        // 妫€鏌ユ槸鍚﹀簲璇ユ崟鑾?
        boolean shouldCapture = trigger && !lastTriggerState;
        
        // 妫€鏌ヨЕ鍙戝櫒锛堜笂鍗囨部瑙﹀彂锛?

        // 妫€鏌ヨ嚜鍔ㄦ崟鑾?
        if (autoCapture) {
            long currentTime = System.currentTimeMillis();
            if (currentTime - lastCaptureTime >= captureInterval) {
                shouldCapture = true;
                lastCaptureTime = currentTime;
            }
        }
        
        // 濡傛灉闇€瑕佹崟鑾凤紝骞朵笖鍑犱綍浣撴湁鏁?
        if (shouldCapture && geometryObj instanceof List) {
            // 鎹曡幏褰撳墠甯?
            @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
            List<Object> geometryList = (List<Object>) geometryObj;
            captureFrame(geometryList, frameName);
        }
        
        // 濮嬬粓杈撳嚭鎹曡幏璁℃暟
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_CAPTURE_COUNT_ID, captureCount);
    }
    
    /**
     * 鎹曡幏褰撳墠甯?
     */
    private void captureFrame(List<Object> geometry, String frameName) {
        // 澧炲姞鎹曡幏璁℃暟鍣?
        captureCount++;
        
        // 鍒涘缓甯у悕绉帮紙濡傛灉闇€瑕侊紝娣诲姞璁℃暟鍣ㄥ悗缂€锛?
        String finalFrameName = frameName;
        if (!finalFrameName.contains("%d")) {
            finalFrameName += "_%d";
        }
        finalFrameName = String.format(finalFrameName, captureCount);
        
        // 鍒涘缓鎹曡幏鐨勬柟鍧楀垪琛紙娣卞鍒讹級
        List<Object> capturedBlocks = new ArrayList<>();
        for (Object block : geometry) {
            capturedBlocks.add(cloneBlock(block));
        }
        
        // 鍒涘缓甯т俊鎭?
        java.util.Map<String, Object> frameInfo = new java.util.HashMap<>();
        frameInfo.put("name", finalFrameName);
        frameInfo.put("timestamp", System.currentTimeMillis());
        frameInfo.put("blockCount", capturedBlocks.size());
        frameInfo.put("captureId", captureCount);
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_CAPTURED_BLOCKS_ID, capturedBlocks);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_FRAME_INFO_ID, frameInfo);
    }
    
    /**
     * 鍏嬮殕鏂瑰潡瀵硅薄
     */
    private Object cloneBlock(Object block) {
        // 澶勭悊int[]鏍煎紡鐨勫潗鏍?
        if (block instanceof int[] original) {
            int[] clone = new int[original.length];
            System.arraycopy(original, 0, clone, 0, original.length);
            return clone;
        }
        // 澶勭悊Map鏍煎紡鐨勬柟鍧楋紙濡侻inecraftBlock锛?
        else if (block instanceof java.util.Map) {
            @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
            java.util.Map<String, Object> original = (java.util.Map<String, Object>) block;
            return new java.util.HashMap<>(original);
        }
        // 鍏朵粬绫诲瀷鏃犳硶鍏嬮殕锛岀洿鎺ヨ繑鍥炲師瀵硅薄
        return block;
    }
} 
===FILE: C:\Users\navib\Desktop\development\NC\nodecraft\src\main\java\com\nodecraft\nodesystem\nodes\animation\time\AnimationClockNode.java===
package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.animation.time;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Animation Clock: 鍔ㄧ敾鏃堕挓鑺傜偣锛屾帶鍒跺姩鐢荤殑鏃堕棿娴?
 * 鏍稿績鑺傜偣锛岃緭鍑哄綋鍓嶅姩鐢荤殑杩涘害锛堥€氬父鍦?鍒?涔嬮棿锛屼唬琛ㄤ粠寮€濮嬪埌缁撴潫鐨勬瘮渚嬶級
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "animation.time.animation_clock",
    displayName = "Animation Clock",
    description = "鎺у埗鍔ㄧ敾鐨勬椂闂存祦锛岃緭鍑哄綋鍓嶅姩鐢荤殑杩涘害",
    category = "animation.time"
)
public class AnimationClockNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_DURATION_ID = "input_duration";
    private static final String INPUT_LOOP_ID = "input_loop";
    private static final String INPUT_RESET_ID = "input_reset";
    private static final String INPUT_PAUSE_ID = "input_pause";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_CURRENT_TIME_ID = "output_current_time";
    private static final String OUTPUT_NORMALIZED_TIME_ID = "output_normalized_time";
    private static final String OUTPUT_CURRENT_FRAME_ID = "output_current_frame";
    private static final String OUTPUT_IS_PLAYING_ID = "output_is_playing";

    // --- 鐘舵€佸彉閲?---
    private double lastUpdateTime; // 涓婃鏇存柊鐨勬椂闂达紙姣锛?
    private double currentTime; // 褰撳墠鏃堕棿锛堢锛?
    private boolean isPlaying; // 鏄惁姝ｅ湪鎾斁
    private double frameRate = 20.0; // 榛樿甯х巼锛堟瘡绉掑抚鏁帮級

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public AnimationClockNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "animation.time.animation_clock");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_DURATION_ID, "Duration", "鍔ㄧ敾鎬绘椂闀匡紙绉掞級", NodeDataType.FLOAT, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_LOOP_ID, "Loop", "鏄惁寰幆鎾斁", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_RESET_ID, "Reset", "閲嶇疆鍔ㄧ敾锛堟帴鏀朵换鎰忎俊鍙疯Е鍙戯級", NodeDataType.ANY, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_PAUSE_ID, "Pause", "鏆傚仠/鎾斁鍒囨崲锛堟帴鏀朵换鎰忎俊鍙疯Е鍙戯級", NodeDataType.ANY, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_CURRENT_TIME_ID, "Current Time", "褰撳墠鏃堕棿锛堢锛?, NodeDataType.FLOAT, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_NORMALIZED_TIME_ID, "Normalized Time", "褰掍竴鍖栨椂闂达紙0-1锛?, NodeDataType.FLOAT, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_CURRENT_FRAME_ID, "Current Frame", "褰撳墠甯?, NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_IS_PLAYING_ID, "Is Playing", "鏄惁姝ｅ湪鎾斁", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));

        // 鍒濆鍖栫姸鎬?
        reset();
    }
    
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "鎺у埗鍔ㄧ敾鐨勬椂闂存祦锛岃緭鍑哄綋鍓嶅姩鐢荤殑杩涘害";
    }
    
    /**
     * 閲嶇疆鍔ㄧ敾鏃堕挓
     */
    private void reset() {
        currentTime = 0.0;
        lastUpdateTime = System.currentTimeMillis();
        isPlaying = true;
    }
    
    /**
     * 鍒囨崲鎾斁/鏆傚仠鐘舵€?
     */
    private void togglePlayPause() {
        isPlaying = !isPlaying;
        if (isPlaying) {
            // 閲嶆柊寮€濮嬭鏃讹紝閬垮厤鏆傚仠鏈熼棿鐨勬椂闂磋烦璺?
            lastUpdateTime = System.currentTimeMillis();
        }
    }

    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Float duration = (Float) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_DURATION_ID, 5.0f); // 榛樿5绉?
        Boolean loop = (Boolean) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_LOOP_ID, false); // 榛樿涓嶅惊鐜?
        
        // 妫€鏌eset淇″彿
        if (inputValues.containsKey(INPUT_RESET_ID) && inputValues.get(INPUT_RESET_ID) != null) {
            reset();
            // 娓呴櫎Reset淇″彿锛岄伩鍏嶉噸澶嶈Е鍙?
            inputValues.remove(INPUT_RESET_ID);
        }
        
        // 妫€鏌ause淇″彿
        if (inputValues.containsKey(INPUT_PAUSE_ID) && inputValues.get(INPUT_PAUSE_ID) != null) {
            togglePlayPause();
            // 娓呴櫎Pause淇″彿锛岄伩鍏嶉噸澶嶈Е鍙?
            inputValues.remove(INPUT_PAUSE_ID);
        }
        
        // 濡傛灉姝ｅ湪鎾斁锛屽垯鏇存柊鏃堕棿
        if (isPlaying) {
            // 璁＄畻鏃堕棿澧為噺
            double currentTimeMillis = System.currentTimeMillis();
            double deltaTime = (currentTimeMillis - lastUpdateTime) / 1000.0; // 杞崲涓虹
            lastUpdateTime = currentTimeMillis;
            
            // 鏇存柊褰撳墠鏃堕棿
            currentTime += deltaTime;
            
            // 澶勭悊寰幆
            if (currentTime > duration) {
                if (loop) {
                    // 寰幆鎾斁锛氬彇妯?
                    currentTime = currentTime % duration;
                } else {
                    // 闈炲惊鐜細鍋滃湪缁撴潫浣嶇疆骞跺仠姝㈡挱鏀?
                    currentTime = duration;
                    isPlaying = false;
                }
            }
        }
        
        // 璁＄畻褰掍竴鍖栨椂闂达紙0-1锛?
        double normalizedTime = (duration > 0) ? (currentTime / duration) : 0;
        // 闄愬埗鍦?-1鑼冨洿鍐?
        normalizedTime = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, normalizedTime));
        
        // 璁＄畻褰撳墠甯?
        int currentFrame = (int) Math.floor(currentTime * frameRate);
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_CURRENT_TIME_ID, (float) currentTime);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_NORMALIZED_TIME_ID, (float) normalizedTime);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_CURRENT_FRAME_ID, currentFrame);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_IS_PLAYING_ID, isPlaying);
        
        // 鏍囪鑺傜偣涓鸿剰锛岀‘淇濅笅涓€甯т細閲嶆柊璁＄畻
        if (isPlaying) {
            markDirty();
        }
    }

    /**
     * 璁剧疆甯х巼
     * @param frameRate 姣忕甯ф暟
     */
    public void setFrameRate(double frameRate) {
        if (frameRate > 0) {
            this.frameRate = frameRate;
        }
    }
} 
===FILE: C:\Users\navib\Desktop\development\NC\nodecraft\src\main\java\com\nodecraft\nodesystem\nodes\animation\time\DelayNode.java===
package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.animation.time;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import java.util.LinkedList;
import java.util.Queue;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Delay Node: 寤惰繜鑺傜偣
 * 寤惰繜鏁版嵁娴佺殑浼犻€掞紝灏嗚緭鍏ュ€煎湪鎸囧畾鏃堕棿鍚庤緭鍑?
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "animation.time.delay",
    displayName = "Delay",
    description = "寤惰繜鏁版嵁娴佺殑浼犻€掞紝灏嗚緭鍏ュ€煎湪鎸囧畾鏃堕棿鍚庤緭鍑?,
    category = "animation.time"
)
public class DelayNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_VALUE_ID = "input_value";
    private static final String INPUT_DELAY_DURATION_ID = "input_delay_duration";
    private static final String INPUT_TIME_ID = "input_time";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_VALUE_ID = "output_value";
    
    // --- 鐘舵€佸彉閲?---
    private final Queue<DelayedValue> delayQueue = new LinkedList<>();
    private double lastProcessedTime = 0.0;
    
    // --- 鍐呴儴绫伙細寤惰繜鍊?---
    private static class DelayedValue {
        final Object value;       // 瑕佸欢杩熺殑鍊?
        final double releaseTime; // 閲婃斁鏃堕棿
        
        DelayedValue(Object value, double releaseTime) {
            this.value = value;
            this.releaseTime = releaseTime;
        }
    }
    
    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public DelayNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "animation.time.delay");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_VALUE_ID, "Input", "瑕佸欢杩熺殑杈撳叆鍊?, NodeDataType.ANY, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_DELAY_DURATION_ID, "Delay Duration", "寤惰繜鏃堕暱锛堢锛?, NodeDataType.FLOAT, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_TIME_ID, "Time", "褰撳墠鏃堕棿锛堢锛夛紝閫氬父鏉ヨ嚜鏃堕挓", NodeDataType.FLOAT, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_VALUE_ID, "Output", "寤惰繜鍚庣殑杈撳嚭鍊?, NodeDataType.ANY, this));
    }
    
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "寤惰繜鏁版嵁娴佺殑浼犻€掞紝灏嗚緭鍏ュ€煎湪鎸囧畾鏃堕棿鍚庤緭鍑?;
    }

    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object inputValue = inputValues.get(INPUT_VALUE_ID);
        Float delayDuration = (Float) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_DELAY_DURATION_ID, 1.0f); // 榛樿寤惰繜1绉?
        Float currentTime = (Float) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_TIME_ID, 0.0f);
        
        // 纭繚寤惰繜鏃堕棿鏄鏁?
        delayDuration = Math.max(0.0f, delayDuration);
        
        // 濡傛灉鏃堕棿鍥為€€浜嗭紙渚嬪鍔ㄧ敾閲嶇疆锛夛紝鍒欐竻绌洪槦鍒?
        if (currentTime < lastProcessedTime) {
            delayQueue.clear();
        }
        lastProcessedTime = currentTime;
        
        // 濡傛灉鏈夋柊杈撳叆锛屽姞鍏ュ欢杩熼槦鍒?
        if (inputValue != null) {
            double releaseTime = currentTime + delayDuration;
            delayQueue.add(new DelayedValue(inputValue, releaseTime));
            // 娓呴櫎杈撳叆鍊硷紝闃叉閲嶅澶勭悊
            inputValues.remove(INPUT_VALUE_ID);
        }
        
        // 妫€鏌ラ槦鍒椾腑鏄惁鏈夐渶瑕侀噴鏀剧殑鍊?
        Object outputValue = null;
        
        // 绉婚櫎鎵€鏈夊凡杩囨湡鐨勫€硷紝淇濈暀鏈€鍚庝竴涓綔涓鸿緭鍑?
        while (!delayQueue.isEmpty() && delayQueue.peek().releaseTime <= currentTime) {
            outputValue = delayQueue.poll().value;
        }
        
        // 濡傛灉鏈夎杈撳嚭鐨勫€硷紝璁剧疆鍒拌緭鍑虹鍙?
        if (outputValue != null) {
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_VALUE_ID, outputValue);
        }
    }
} 
===FILE: C:\Users\navib\Desktop\development\NC\nodecraft\src\main\java\com\nodecraft\nodesystem\nodes\animation\time\GlobalClockNode.java===
package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.animation.time;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Global Clock: 鍏ㄥ眬鏃堕挓鑺傜偣
 * 浣滀负鍔ㄧ敾绯荤粺鐨勬牳蹇冩椂闂存簮锛岀敓鎴愬拰绠＄悊鍔ㄧ敾鐨勬椂闂存祦
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "animation.time.global_clock",
    displayName = "Global Clock",
    description = "鐢熸垚鍜岀鐞嗗姩鐢荤殑鏃堕棿娴侊紝浣滀负鏍稿績鍔ㄧ敾鏃堕棿婧?,
    category = "animation.time"
)
public class GlobalClockNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_DURATION_ID = "input_duration";
    private static final String INPUT_LOOP_MODE_ID = "input_loop_mode";
    private static final String INPUT_FRAMERATE_ID = "input_framerate";
    private static final String INPUT_PLAY_ID = "input_play";
    private static final String INPUT_PAUSE_ID = "input_pause";
    private static final String INPUT_STOP_ID = "input_stop";
    private static final String INPUT_RESET_ID = "input_reset";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_TIME_ID = "output_time";
    private static final String OUTPUT_NORMALIZED_TIME_ID = "output_normalized_time";
    private static final String OUTPUT_CURRENT_FRAME_ID = "output_current_frame";
    private static final String OUTPUT_IS_PLAYING_ID = "output_is_playing";
    private static final String OUTPUT_ON_START_ID = "output_on_start";
    private static final String OUTPUT_ON_END_ID = "output_on_end";

    // --- 寰幆妯″紡鏋氫妇 ---
    public enum LoopMode {
        ONCE(0, "Once", "鎾斁涓€娆″悗鍋滄"),
        LOOP(1, "Loop", "寰幆鎾斁"),
        PING_PONG(2, "PingPong", "鏉ュ洖鎾斁");
        
        private final int id;
        private final String name;
        private final String description;
        
        LoopMode(int id, String name, String description) {
            this.id = id;
            this.name = name;
            this.description = description;
        }
        
        public static LoopMode fromId(int id) {
            for (LoopMode mode : values()) {
                if (mode.id == id) {
                    return mode;
                }
            }
            return ONCE; // 榛樿涓€娆?
        }
    }

    // --- 鐘舵€佸彉閲?---
    private double lastUpdateTime; // 涓婃鏇存柊鐨勬椂闂达紙姣锛?
    private double currentTime; // 褰撳墠鏃堕棿锛堢锛?
    private boolean isPlaying; // 鏄惁姝ｅ湪鎾斁
    private boolean isForward; // 鏂瑰悜(鐢ㄤ簬PING_PONG妯″紡)
    private boolean wasStarted; // 鏄惁宸茬粡寮€濮嬭繃(鐢ㄤ簬瑙﹀彂寮€濮嬩簨浠?
    private boolean wasEnded; // 鏄惁宸茬粡缁撴潫杩?鐢ㄤ簬瑙﹀彂缁撴潫浜嬩欢)
    private double frameRate = 30.0; // 榛樿甯х巼锛堟瘡绉掑抚鏁帮級
    
    // 鍏ㄥ眬鏃堕挓瀹炰緥锛堝崟渚嬫ā寮忥級
    private static GlobalClockNode instance;

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public GlobalClockNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "animation.time.global_clock");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_DURATION_ID, "Duration", "鍔ㄧ敾鎬绘椂闀匡紙绉掞級", NodeDataType.FLOAT, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_LOOP_MODE_ID, "Loop Mode", "寰幆妯″紡 (0=Once, 1=Loop, 2=PingPong)", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_FRAMERATE_ID, "Framerate", "甯х巼锛堟瘡绉掑抚鏁帮級", NodeDataType.FLOAT, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_PLAY_ID, "Play", "鎾斁淇″彿", NodeDataType.ANY, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_PAUSE_ID, "Pause", "鏆傚仠淇″彿", NodeDataType.ANY, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_STOP_ID, "Stop", "鍋滄淇″彿", NodeDataType.ANY, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_RESET_ID, "Reset", "閲嶇疆淇″彿", NodeDataType.ANY, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_TIME_ID, "Time", "褰撳墠鏃堕棿锛堢锛?, NodeDataType.FLOAT, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_NORMALIZED_TIME_ID, "Normalized Time", "褰掍竴鍖栨椂闂达紙0-1锛?, NodeDataType.FLOAT, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_CURRENT_FRAME_ID, "Current Frame", "褰撳墠甯?, NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_IS_PLAYING_ID, "Is Playing", "鏄惁姝ｅ湪鎾斁", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_ON_START_ID, "On Start", "鍔ㄧ敾寮€濮嬫椂鍙戝嚭鑴夊啿", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_ON_END_ID, "On End", "鍔ㄧ敾缁撴潫鏃跺彂鍑鸿剦鍐?, NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));

        // 鍒濆鍖栫姸鎬?
        reset();
        
        // 璁剧疆涓哄叏灞€瀹炰緥
        instance = this;
    }
    
    /**
     * 鑾峰彇鍏ㄥ眬鏃堕挓瀹炰緥
     */
    public static GlobalClockNode getInstance() {
        return instance;
    }
    
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "鐢熸垚鍜岀鐞嗗姩鐢荤殑鏃堕棿娴侊紝浣滀负鏍稿績鍔ㄧ敾鏃堕棿婧?;
    }
    
    /**
     * 閲嶇疆鏃堕挓
     */
    private void reset() {
        currentTime = 0.0;
        lastUpdateTime = System.currentTimeMillis();
        isPlaying = false;
        isForward = true;
        wasStarted = false;
        wasEnded = false;
    }
    
    /**
     * 寮€濮嬫挱鏀?
     */
    private void play() {
        if (!isPlaying) {
            isPlaying = true;
            lastUpdateTime = System.currentTimeMillis();
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * 鏆傚仠鎾斁
     */
    private void pause() {
        isPlaying = false;
    }
    
    /**
     * 鍋滄鎾斁骞堕噸缃?
     */
    private void stop() {
        isPlaying = false;
        currentTime = 0.0;
        isForward = true;
        wasStarted = false;
        wasEnded = false;
    }

    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Float duration = (Float) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_DURATION_ID, 10.0f); // 榛樿10绉?
        Integer loopModeId = (Integer) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_LOOP_MODE_ID, 0); // 榛樿Once
        Float framerateInput = (Float) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_FRAMERATE_ID, 30.0f); // 榛樿30fps
        Object playSignal = inputValues.get(INPUT_PLAY_ID);
        Object pauseSignal = inputValues.get(INPUT_PAUSE_ID);
        Object stopSignal = inputValues.get(INPUT_STOP_ID);
        Object resetSignal = inputValues.get(INPUT_RESET_ID);
        
        // 鏇存柊甯х巼
        if (framerateInput != null && framerateInput > 0) {
            frameRate = framerateInput;
        }
        
        // 澶勭悊鎺у埗淇″彿
        if (playSignal != null) {
            play();
            inputValues.remove(INPUT_PLAY_ID); // 娓呴櫎淇″彿闃叉閲嶅瑙﹀彂
        }
        
        if (pauseSignal != null) {
            pause();
            inputValues.remove(INPUT_PAUSE_ID);
        }
        
        if (stopSignal != null) {
            stop();
            inputValues.remove(INPUT_STOP_ID);
        }
        
        if (resetSignal != null) {
            reset();
            inputValues.remove(INPUT_RESET_ID);
        }
        
        // 鑾峰彇寰幆妯″紡
        LoopMode loopMode = LoopMode.fromId(loopModeId);
        
        // 鍒濆鍖栦簨浠剁姸鎬?
        boolean onStart = false;
        boolean onEnd = false;
        
        // 濡傛灉姝ｅ湪鎾斁锛屽垯鏇存柊鏃堕棿
        if (isPlaying) {
            // 寮€濮嬩簨浠?
            if (!wasStarted && currentTime == 0) {
                onStart = true;
                wasStarted = true;
            }
            
            // 璁＄畻鏃堕棿澧為噺
            double currentTimeMillis = System.currentTimeMillis();
            double deltaTime = (currentTimeMillis - lastUpdateTime) / 1000.0; // 杞崲涓虹
            lastUpdateTime = currentTimeMillis;
            
            // 鏇存柊褰撳墠鏃堕棿
            if (isForward) {
                currentTime += deltaTime;
            } else {
                currentTime -= deltaTime;
            }
            
            // 澶勭悊寰幆閫昏緫
            switch (loopMode) {
                case ONCE:
                    if (currentTime >= duration) {
                        currentTime = duration;
                        isPlaying = false;
                        if (!wasEnded) {
                            onEnd = true;
                            wasEnded = true;
                        }
                    }
                    break;
                    
                case LOOP:
                    if (currentTime >= duration) {
                        // 寰幆锛氬洖鍒板紑濮?
                        currentTime = currentTime % duration;
                        onEnd = true;
                        // 寰幆妯″紡涓嬶紝涓嬩竴杞彲浠ュ啀娆¤Е鍙戝紑濮嬪拰缁撴潫浜嬩欢
                        wasStarted = false;
                    }
                    break;
                    
                case PING_PONG:
                    if (isForward && currentTime >= duration) {
                        // 杈惧埌鏈€澶у€硷紝寮€濮嬪弽鍚?
                        currentTime = duration;
                        isForward = false;
                        onEnd = true;
                    } else if (!isForward && currentTime <= 0) {
                        // 杈惧埌鏈€灏忓€硷紝寮€濮嬫鍚?
                        currentTime = 0;
                        isForward = true;
                        wasStarted = false; // 鍏佽鍐嶆瑙﹀彂寮€濮嬩簨浠?
                    }
                    break;
            }
        }
        
        // 璁＄畻褰掍竴鍖栨椂闂达紙0-1锛?
        double normalizedTime = (duration > 0) ? (currentTime / duration) : 0;
        // 闄愬埗鍦?-1鑼冨洿鍐?
        normalizedTime = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, normalizedTime));
        
        // 璁＄畻褰撳墠甯?
        int currentFrame = (int) Math.floor(currentTime * frameRate);
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_TIME_ID, (float) currentTime);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_NORMALIZED_TIME_ID, (float) normalizedTime);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_CURRENT_FRAME_ID, currentFrame);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_IS_PLAYING_ID, isPlaying);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_ON_START_ID, onStart);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_ON_END_ID, onEnd);
        
        // 鏍囪鑺傜偣涓鸿剰锛岀‘淇濅笅涓€甯т細閲嶆柊璁＄畻
        if (isPlaying) {
            markDirty();
        }
    }
}
