package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.animation.time;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.Comparator;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Keyframe Driver Node: 鍏抽敭甯ч┍鍔ㄥ櫒
 * 浠庝竴缁勬椂闂?鍊煎涓緭鍑烘彃鍊煎€硷紝瀹炵幇澶嶆潅鐨勫姩鐢绘洸绾?
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "animation.time.keyframe_driver",
    displayName = "Keyframe Driver",
    description = "浠庡叧閿抚搴忓垪璁＄畻鎻掑€煎€硷紝瀹炵幇鍔ㄧ敾鏇茬嚎",
    category = "animation.time"
)
public class KeyframeDriverNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_TIME_ID = "input_time";
    private static final String INPUT_NORMALIZED_TIME_ID = "input_normalized_time";
    private static final String INPUT_KEYFRAMES_ID = "input_keyframes";
    private static final String INPUT_INTERPOLATION_TYPE_ID = "input_interpolation_type";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_VALUE_ID = "output_value";
    private static final String OUTPUT_ACTIVE_KEYFRAME_INDEX_ID = "output_active_keyframe_index";
    private static final String OUTPUT_PROGRESS_ID = "output_progress";
    
    // --- 鎻掑€肩被鍨嬫灇涓?---
    public enum InterpolationType {
        LINEAR(0, "Linear", "绾挎€ф彃鍊?),
        STEP(1, "Step", "闃舵寮忔彃鍊硷紙鏃犺繃娓★級"),
        SMOOTH(2, "Smooth", "骞虫粦鎻掑€硷紙缂撳叆缂撳嚭锛?);
        
        private final int id;
        private final String name;
        private final String description;
        
        InterpolationType(int id, String name, String description) {
            this.id = id;
            this.name = name;
            this.description = description;
        }
        
        public static InterpolationType fromId(int id) {
            for (InterpolationType type : values()) {
                if (type.id == id) {
                    return type;
                }
            }
            return LINEAR; // 榛樿绾挎€ф彃鍊?
        }
    }
    
    // --- 鍏抽敭甯ф暟鎹被 ---
    private static class Keyframe {
        final float time;     // 鍏抽敭甯ф椂闂寸偣
        final Object value;   // 鍏抽敭甯у€?
        
        Keyframe(float time, Object value) {
            this.time = time;
            this.value = value;
        }
    }
    
    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public KeyframeDriverNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "animation.time.keyframe_driver");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_TIME_ID, "Time", "褰撳墠鏃堕棿锛堢锛?, NodeDataType.FLOAT, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_NORMALIZED_TIME_ID, "Normalized Time", "褰掍竴鍖栨椂闂达紙0-1锛?, NodeDataType.FLOAT, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_KEYFRAMES_ID, "Keyframes", "鍏抽敭甯у垪琛紝鏍煎紡涓篬{time:t1, value:v1}, ...]", NodeDataType.LIST, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_INTERPOLATION_TYPE_ID, "Interpolation Type", "鎻掑€肩被鍨?(0=绾挎€? 1=闃舵, 2=骞虫粦)", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_VALUE_ID, "Value", "褰撳墠鎻掑€艰绠楃粨鏋?, NodeDataType.ANY, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_ACTIVE_KEYFRAME_INDEX_ID, "Active Keyframe", "褰撳墠鎵€澶勫叧閿抚绱㈠紩", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_PROGRESS_ID, "Progress", "褰撳墠鍏抽敭甯ф鍐呯殑杩涘害锛?-1锛?, NodeDataType.FLOAT, this));
    }
    
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "浠庡叧閿抚搴忓垪璁＄畻鎻掑€煎€硷紝瀹炵幇鍔ㄧ敾鏇茬嚎";
    }

    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Float time = (Float) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_TIME_ID, 0.0f);
        Float normalizedTime = (Float) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_NORMALIZED_TIME_ID, null);
        Object keyframesObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_KEYFRAMES_ID);
        Integer interpolationTypeId = (Integer) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_INTERPOLATION_TYPE_ID, 0);
        
        // 濡傛灉鎻愪緵浜嗗綊涓€鍖栨椂闂达紝浼樺厛浣跨敤
        float currentTime = (normalizedTime != null) ? normalizedTime : time;
        
        // 纭繚鏃堕棿鍦ㄦ湁鏁堣寖鍥村唴
        currentTime = Math.max(0.0f, Math.min(1.0f, currentTime));
        
        // 鑾峰彇鎻掑€肩被鍨?
        InterpolationType interpolationType = InterpolationType.fromId(interpolationTypeId);
        
        // 瑙ｆ瀽鍏抽敭甯ф暟鎹?
        List<Keyframe> keyframes = parseKeyframes(keyframesObj);
        
        // 濡傛灉娌℃湁鍏抽敭甯э紝鍒欎笉鍋氫换浣曞鐞?
        if (keyframes.isEmpty()) {
            return;
        }
        
        // 濡傛灉鍙湁涓€涓叧閿抚锛岀洿鎺ヨ緭鍑鸿鍊?
        if (keyframes.size() == 1) {
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_VALUE_ID, keyframes.get(0).value);
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_ACTIVE_KEYFRAME_INDEX_ID, 0);
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_PROGRESS_ID, 1.0f);
            return;
        }
        
        // 鎵惧埌褰撳墠鏃堕棿鎵€澶勭殑鍏抽敭甯ф
        int activeKeyframeIndex = -1;
        Keyframe prevKeyframe = null;
        Keyframe nextKeyframe = null;
        
        for (int i = 0; i < keyframes.size() - 1; i++) {
            Keyframe k1 = keyframes.get(i);
            Keyframe k2 = keyframes.get(i + 1);
            
            if (currentTime >= k1.time && currentTime <= k2.time) {
                activeKeyframeIndex = i;
                prevKeyframe = k1;
                nextKeyframe = k2;
                break;
            }
        }
        
        // 濡傛灉娌℃壘鍒伴€傚悎鐨勬锛屽垯浣跨敤棣栧熬鍏抽敭甯?
        if (activeKeyframeIndex == -1) {
            if (currentTime < keyframes.get(0).time) {
                // 鏃堕棿鍦ㄧ涓€涓叧閿抚涔嬪墠
                outputValues.put(OUTPUT_VALUE_ID, keyframes.get(0).value);
                outputValues.put(OUTPUT_ACTIVE_KEYFRAME_INDEX_ID, 0);
                outputValues.put(OUTPUT_PROGRESS_ID, 0.0f);
            } else {
                // 鏃堕棿鍦ㄦ渶鍚庝竴涓叧閿抚涔嬪悗
                int lastIndex = keyframes.size() - 1;
                outputValues.put(OUTPUT_VALUE_ID, keyframes.get(lastIndex).value);
                outputValues.put(OUTPUT_ACTIVE_KEYFRAME_INDEX_ID, lastIndex);
                outputValues.put(OUTPUT_PROGRESS_ID, 1.0f);
            }
            return;
        }
        
        // 璁＄畻褰撳墠娈靛唴鐨勮繘搴?
        float segmentLength = nextKeyframe.time - prevKeyframe.time;
        float progress = 0.0f;
        if (segmentLength > 0) {
            progress = (currentTime - prevKeyframe.time) / segmentLength;
        }
        
        // 鏍规嵁鎻掑€肩被鍨嬭皟鏁磋繘搴?
        float adjustedProgress = progress;
        switch (interpolationType) {
            case STEP:
                // 闃舵寮忥細鍙湁鍒拌揪涓嬩竴涓叧閿抚鎵嶅彉鍖?
                adjustedProgress = (progress >= 1.0f) ? 1.0f : 0.0f;
                break;
                
            case SMOOTH:
                // 骞虫粦鎻掑€硷細浣跨敤缂撳叆缂撳嚭鏇茬嚎
                adjustedProgress = smoothStep(progress);
                break;
                
            case LINEAR:
            default:
                // 绾挎€ф彃鍊硷細涓嶈皟鏁?
                break;
        }
        
        // 鏍规嵁杩涘害璁＄畻鎻掑€肩粨鏋?
        Object result = interpolateValue(prevKeyframe.value, nextKeyframe.value, adjustedProgress);
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_VALUE_ID, result);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_ACTIVE_KEYFRAME_INDEX_ID, activeKeyframeIndex);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_PROGRESS_ID, progress);
    }
    
    /**
     * 瑙ｆ瀽鍏抽敭甯ф暟鎹?
     */
    private List<Keyframe> parseKeyframes(Object keyframesObj) {
        List<Keyframe> result = new ArrayList<>();
        
        // 鍒涘缓榛樿鍏抽敭甯э紙濡傛灉鏈彁渚涳級
        if (keyframesObj == null) {
            result.add(new Keyframe(0.0f, 0.0f));
            result.add(new Keyframe(1.0f, 1.0f));
            return result;
        }
        
        // 澶勭悊鍏抽敭甯у垪琛?
        if (keyframesObj instanceof List) {
            @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
            List<Object> keyframeList = (List<Object>) keyframesObj;
            
            for (Object item : keyframeList) {
                float time = 0.0f;
                Object value = null;
                
                // 澶勭悊鍏抽敭甯у璞?
                if (item instanceof Map) {
                    @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
                    Map<String, Object> keyframeMap = (Map<String, Object>) item;
                    
                    // 鑾峰彇鏃堕棿
                    Object timeObj = keyframeMap.get("time");
                    if (timeObj instanceof Number) {
                        time = ((Number) timeObj).floatValue();
                    }
                    
                    // 鑾峰彇鍊?
                    value = keyframeMap.get("value");
                }
                // 澶勭悊鏁扮粍鏍煎紡 [time, value]
                else if (item instanceof List) {
                    @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
                    List<Object> pair = (List<Object>) item;
                    if (pair.size() >= 2) {
                        if (pair.get(0) instanceof Number) {
                            time = ((Number) pair.get(0)).floatValue();
                        }
                        value = pair.get(1);
                    }
                }
                
                // 娣诲姞鏈夋晥鐨勫叧閿抚
                if (value != null) {
                    result.add(new Keyframe(time, value));
                }
            }
        }
        
        // 纭繚鍏抽敭甯ф寜鏃堕棿鎺掑簭
        result.sort(Comparator.comparing(k -> k.time));
        
        // 濡傛灉娌℃湁鍏抽敭甯э紝娣诲姞榛樿鍏抽敭甯?
        if (result.isEmpty()) {
            result.add(new Keyframe(0.0f, 0.0f));
            result.add(new Keyframe(1.0f, 1.0f));
        }
        
        return result;
    }
    
    /**
     * 骞虫粦姝ヨ繘鍑芥暟锛堢紦鍏ョ紦鍑猴級
     */
    private float smoothStep(float x) {
        // 浣跨敤3闃跺钩婊戝嚱鏁? x^2 * (3 - 2x)
        return x * x * (3 - 2 * x);
    }
    
    /**
     * 鎻掑€艰绠?
     */
    private Object interpolateValue(Object start, Object end, float progress) {
        // 鏁板€肩被鍨嬩箣闂寸殑鎻掑€?
        if (start instanceof Number && end instanceof Number) {
            float startVal = ((Number) start).floatValue();
            float endVal = ((Number) end).floatValue();
            return startVal + (endVal - startVal) * progress;
        }
        
        // 甯冨皵绫诲瀷涔嬮棿鐨勬彃鍊硷紙闃堝€间负0.5锛?
        if (start instanceof Boolean && end instanceof Boolean) {
            boolean startVal = (Boolean) start;
            boolean endVal = (Boolean) end;
            if (startVal == endVal) {
                return startVal;
            }
            return progress >= 0.5f ? endVal : startVal;
        }
        
        // 瀛楃涓蹭箣闂存棤娉曟彃鍊硷紝鐩存帴鏍规嵁杩涘害閫夋嫨
        if (start instanceof String && end instanceof String) {
            return progress >= 0.5f ? end : start;
        }
        
        // 瀵逛簬鍏朵粬绫诲瀷锛岀洿鎺ユ牴鎹繘搴﹂€夋嫨
        return progress >= 0.5f ? end : start;
    }
} 
===FILE: C:\Users\navib\Desktop\development\NC\nodecraft\src\main\java\com\nodecraft\nodesystem\nodes\animation\time\PulseGeneratorNode.java===
package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.animation.time;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Pulse Generator Node: 鑴夊啿鐢熸垚鍣?
 * 鍦ㄧ壒瀹氭椂闂寸偣鎴栭棿闅旂敓鎴愯剦鍐蹭俊鍙?
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "animation.time.pulse_generator",
    displayName = "Pulse Generator",
    description = "鍦ㄧ壒瀹氭椂闂寸偣鎴栭棿闅旂敓鎴愯剦鍐蹭俊鍙?,
    category = "animation.time"
)
public class PulseGeneratorNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_TIME_ID = "input_time";
    private static final String INPUT_TRIGGER_TIMES_ID = "input_trigger_times";
    private static final String INPUT_INTERVAL_ID = "input_interval";
    private static final String INPUT_PULSE_DURATION_ID = "input_pulse_duration";
    private static final String INPUT_MODE_ID = "input_mode";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_PULSE_ID = "output_pulse";
    private static final String OUTPUT_PULSE_COUNT_ID = "output_pulse_count";
    
    // --- 妯″紡鏋氫妇 ---
    public enum PulseMode {
        SPECIFIC_TIMES(0, "Specific Times", "鍦ㄦ寚瀹氭椂闂寸偣鐢熸垚鑴夊啿"),
        INTERVAL(1, "Interval", "鎸夊浐瀹氶棿闅旂敓鎴愯剦鍐?);
        
        private final int id;
        private final String name;
        private final String description;
        
        PulseMode(int id, String name, String description) {
            this.id = id;
            this.name = name;
            this.description = description;
        }
        
        public static PulseMode fromId(int id) {
            for (PulseMode mode : values()) {
                if (mode.id == id) {
                    return mode;
                }
            }
            return SPECIFIC_TIMES; // 榛樿
        }
    }
    
    // --- 鐘舵€佸彉閲?---
    private int pulseCount = 0; // 宸茬敓鎴愮殑鑴夊啿鏁伴噺
    private List<Float> lastTriggeredTimes = new ArrayList<>(); // 涓婃瑙﹀彂鐨勬椂闂寸偣鍒楄〃
    
    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public PulseGeneratorNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "animation.time.pulse_generator");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_TIME_ID, "Time", "褰撳墠鏃堕棿锛堢锛?, NodeDataType.FLOAT, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_TRIGGER_TIMES_ID, "Trigger Times", "瑙﹀彂鑴夊啿鐨勬椂闂寸偣鍒楄〃", NodeDataType.LIST, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_INTERVAL_ID, "Interval", "鑴夊啿闂撮殧锛堢锛?, NodeDataType.FLOAT, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_PULSE_DURATION_ID, "Pulse Duration", "鑴夊啿鎸佺画鏃堕棿锛堢锛?, NodeDataType.FLOAT, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_MODE_ID, "Mode", "妯″紡 (0=鐗瑰畾鏃堕棿鐐? 1=鍥哄畾闂撮殧)", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_PULSE_ID, "Pulse", "鑴夊啿淇″彿锛堣Е鍙戞椂涓簍rue锛?, NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_PULSE_COUNT_ID, "Pulse Count", "宸茬敓鎴愮殑鑴夊啿鏁伴噺", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
    }
    
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "鍦ㄧ壒瀹氭椂闂寸偣鎴栭棿闅旂敓鎴愯剦鍐蹭俊鍙?;
    }

    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Float currentTime = (Float) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_TIME_ID, 0.0f);
        Object triggerTimesObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_TRIGGER_TIMES_ID);
        Float interval = (Float) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_INTERVAL_ID, 1.0f); // 榛樿1绉掗棿闅?
        Float pulseDurationInput = (Float) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_PULSE_DURATION_ID, 0.1f); // 榛樿0.1绉掓寔缁椂闂?
        Integer modeId = (Integer) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_MODE_ID, 0); // 榛樿鐗瑰畾鏃堕棿鐐规ā寮?
        
        // 纭繚鍙傛暟鍚堟硶
        interval = Math.max(0.01f, interval); // 鏈€灏忛棿闅?.01绉?
        final float pulseDuration = Math.max(0.01f, Math.min(interval, pulseDurationInput)); // 鎸佺画鏃堕棿鑷冲皯0.01绉掞紝浣嗕笉瓒呰繃闂撮殧
        
        // 鑾峰彇妯″紡
        PulseMode mode = PulseMode.fromId(modeId);
        
        // 榛樿涓嶈緭鍑鸿剦鍐?
        boolean pulse = false;
        
        if (mode == PulseMode.SPECIFIC_TIMES) {
            // 鐗瑰畾鏃堕棿鐐规ā寮?
            List<Float> triggerTimes = new ArrayList<>();
            
            // 澶勭悊瑙﹀彂鏃堕棿鍒楄〃
            if (triggerTimesObj instanceof List) {
                @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
                List<Object> inputList = (List<Object>) triggerTimesObj;
                for (Object timeObj : inputList) {
                    if (timeObj instanceof Number) {
                        triggerTimes.add(((Number) timeObj).floatValue());
                    }
                }
            }
            
            // 濡傛灉娌℃湁鎻愪緵鏃堕棿鐐癸紝浣跨敤榛樿鍊?
            if (triggerTimes.isEmpty()) {
                triggerTimes.add(1.0f); // 榛樿鍦?绉掑瑙﹀彂
            }
            
            // 妫€鏌ユ槸鍚﹀埌杈捐Е鍙戞椂闂?
            for (Float triggerTime : triggerTimes) {
                if (currentTime >= triggerTime && 
                    currentTime <= triggerTime + pulseDuration &&
                    !lastTriggeredTimes.contains(triggerTime)) {
                    
                    // 瑙﹀彂鑴夊啿
                    pulse = true;
                    
                    // 濡傛灉鏄柊瑙﹀彂鐨勬椂闂寸偣锛屽鍔犺鏁?
                    if (!lastTriggeredTimes.contains(triggerTime)) {
                        pulseCount++;
                        lastTriggeredTimes.add(triggerTime);
                    }
                }
            }
            
            // 绉婚櫎宸茬粡杩囨湡鐨勮Е鍙戞椂闂达紙瓒呰繃鑴夊啿鎸佺画鏃堕棿锛?
            lastTriggeredTimes.removeIf(time -> currentTime > time + pulseDuration);
            
        } else if (mode == PulseMode.INTERVAL) {
            // 鍥哄畾闂撮殧妯″紡
            
            // 璁＄畻褰撳墠鎵€澶勭殑闂撮殧
            int currentInterval = (int) Math.floor(currentTime / interval);
            
            // 璁＄畻褰撳墠闂撮殧鍐呯殑鏃堕棿
            float timeInInterval = currentTime % interval;
            
            // 妫€鏌ユ槸鍚﹀湪鑴夊啿鎸佺画鏃堕棿鍐?
            pulse = timeInInterval <= pulseDuration;
            
            // 鏇存柊鑴夊啿璁℃暟锛堝彧鏈夊綋杩涘叆鏂伴棿闅斾笖鍦ㄨ剦鍐叉寔缁椂闂村唴鏃舵墠澧炲姞锛?
            if (pulse && currentInterval >= pulseCount) {
                pulseCount = currentInterval + 1;
            }
        }
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_PULSE_ID, pulse);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_PULSE_COUNT_ID, pulseCount);
    }
    
    /**
     * 閲嶇疆鑺傜偣鐘舵€?
     */
    public void reset() {
        pulseCount = 0;
        lastTriggeredTimes.clear();
    }
} 
===FILE: C:\Users\navib\Desktop\development\NC\nodecraft\src\main\java\com\nodecraft\nodesystem\nodes\animation\time\SequenceDriverNode.java===
package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.animation.time;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Sequence Driver: 搴忓垪椹卞姩鍣ㄨ妭鐐?
 * 鏍规嵁鏃堕棿鍥犲瓙锛屾寜椤哄簭婵€娲诲垪琛ㄤ腑鐨勪笉鍚岄」
 * 鐢ㄤ簬鍒涘缓搴忓垪鍔ㄧ敾鏁堟灉锛堝鏂瑰潡渚濇鍑虹幇锛?
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "animation.time.sequence_driver",
    displayName = "Sequence Driver",
    description = "鏍规嵁鏃堕棿鍥犲瓙锛屾寜椤哄簭婵€娲诲垪琛ㄤ腑鐨勪笉鍚岄」",
    category = "animation.time"
)
public class SequenceDriverNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_LIST_ID = "input_list";
    private static final String INPUT_TIME_ID = "input_time";
    private static final String INPUT_STEP_DURATION_ID = "input_step_duration";
    private static final String INPUT_OVERLAP_ID = "input_overlap";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_CURRENT_ITEM_ID = "output_current_item";
    private static final String OUTPUT_CURRENT_INDEX_ID = "output_current_index";
    private static final String OUTPUT_ACTIVE_ITEMS_ID = "output_active_items";
    private static final String OUTPUT_IS_ACTIVE_ID = "output_is_active";
    private static final String OUTPUT_PROGRESS_ID = "output_progress";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public SequenceDriverNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "animation.time.sequence_driver");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_LIST_ID, "List", "搴忓垪椤瑰垪琛?, NodeDataType.LIST, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_TIME_ID, "Time", "褰撳墠鏃堕棿锛?-1锛?, NodeDataType.FLOAT, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_STEP_DURATION_ID, "Step Duration", "姣忎釜姝ラ鐨勬寔缁椂闂达紙0-1涔嬮棿锛?, NodeDataType.FLOAT, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_OVERLAP_ID, "Overlap", "姝ラ閲嶅彔鍥犲瓙锛?=鏃犻噸鍙狅紝1=瀹屽叏閲嶅彔锛?, NodeDataType.FLOAT, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_CURRENT_ITEM_ID, "Current Item", "褰撳墠娲诲姩椤?, NodeDataType.ANY, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_CURRENT_INDEX_ID, "Current Index", "褰撳墠娲诲姩椤圭储寮?, NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_ACTIVE_ITEMS_ID, "Active Items", "鎵€鏈夊綋鍓嶆椿鍔ㄩ」鐨勫垪琛?, NodeDataType.LIST, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_IS_ACTIVE_ID, "Is Active", "搴忓垪鏄惁澶勪簬娲诲姩鐘舵€?, NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_PROGRESS_ID, "Progress", "褰撳墠椤圭殑杩涘害锛?-1锛?, NodeDataType.FLOAT, this));
    }
    
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "鏍规嵁鏃堕棿鍥犲瓙锛屾寜椤哄簭婵€娲诲垪琛ㄤ腑鐨勪笉鍚岄」";
    }

    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
        List<Object> itemList = (List<Object>) inputValues.get(INPUT_LIST_ID);
        Float time = (Float) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_TIME_ID, 0.0f);
        Float stepDuration = (Float) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_STEP_DURATION_ID, 0.2f);
        Float overlap = (Float) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_OVERLAP_ID, 0.0f);
        
        // 闄愬埗杈撳叆鍊艰寖鍥?
        time = Math.max(0f, Math.min(1f, time));
        stepDuration = Math.max(0.01f, Math.min(1f, stepDuration));
        overlap = Math.max(0f, Math.min(1f, overlap));
        
        // 榛樿杈撳嚭
        Object currentItem = null;
        int currentIndex = -1;
        List<Object> activeItems = new ArrayList<>();
        boolean isActive = false;
        float progress = 0.0f;
        
        // 濡傛灉鍒楄〃涓虹┖锛屽垯杈撳嚭榛樿鍊?
        if (itemList == null || itemList.isEmpty()) {
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_CURRENT_ITEM_ID, currentItem);
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_CURRENT_INDEX_ID, currentIndex);
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_ACTIVE_ITEMS_ID, activeItems);
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_IS_ACTIVE_ID, isActive);
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_PROGRESS_ID, progress);
            return;
        }
        
        // 璁＄畻姣忎釜椤圭洰鍦ㄦ椂闂寸嚎涓婄殑浣嶇疆
        int itemCount = itemList.size();
        
        // 濡傛灉stepDuration寰堝皬锛屽垯杩涜璋冩暣浠ョ‘淇濇墍鏈夐」閮借兘鍦ㄦ椂闂磋酱涓婃樉绀?
        if (stepDuration * itemCount < 1.0f) {
            stepDuration = 1.0f / itemCount;
        }
        
        // 鍩轰簬閲嶅彔璁＄畻鏈夋晥姝ラ鎸佺画鏃堕棿
        float effectiveStepDuration = stepDuration * (1.0f + overlap);
        
        // 璁＄畻褰撳墠娲诲姩鐨勯」
        for (int i = 0; i < itemCount; i++) {
            // 璁＄畻姝ら」鐨勫紑濮嬪拰缁撴潫鏃堕棿
            float startTime = i * stepDuration;
            float endTime = startTime + effectiveStepDuration;
            
            // 妫€鏌ラ」鐩槸鍚﹀浜庢椿鍔ㄧ姸鎬?
            if (time >= startTime && time <= endTime) {
                Object item = itemList.get(i);
                activeItems.add(item);
                
                // 鏇存柊褰撳墠椤癸紙浣跨敤鏈€鍚庝竴涓椿鍔ㄩ」锛?
                currentItem = item;
                currentIndex = i;
                isActive = true;
                
                // 璁＄畻姝ら」鐨勮繘搴?
                progress = Math.min(1.0f, (time - startTime) / effectiveStepDuration);
            }
        }
        
        // 濡傛灉娌℃湁浠讳綍娲诲姩椤癸紝浣嗘椂闂村ぇ浜?锛屽垯浣跨敤鏈€鍚庝竴椤?
        if (activeItems.isEmpty() && time > 0) {
            currentItem = itemList.get(itemList.size() - 1);
            currentIndex = itemList.size() - 1;
            activeItems.add(currentItem);
            isActive = time < 1.0f; // 鍙湁鍦ㄦ椂闂存湭缁撴潫鏃舵墠娲诲姩
            progress = 1.0f;
        }
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_CURRENT_ITEM_ID, currentItem);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_CURRENT_INDEX_ID, currentIndex);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_ACTIVE_ITEMS_ID, activeItems);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_IS_ACTIVE_ID, isActive);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_PROGRESS_ID, progress);
    }
} 
===FILE: C:\Users\navib\Desktop\development\NC\nodecraft\src\main\java\com\nodecraft\nodesystem\nodes\animation\time\TimelineSplitterNode.java===
package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.animation.time;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Timeline Splitter Node: 鏃堕棿绾垮垎鍓插櫒
 * 灏嗗姩鐢绘椂闂寸嚎鍒嗗壊鎴愬涓樁娈碉紝璁＄畻褰撳墠鎵€澶勯樁娈靛拰闃舵鍐呰繘搴?
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "animation.time.timeline_splitter",
    displayName = "Timeline Splitter",
    description = "灏嗗姩鐢绘椂闂寸嚎鍒嗗壊鎴愬涓樁娈碉紝杈撳嚭褰撳墠闃舵淇℃伅",
    category = "animation.time"
)
public class TimelineSplitterNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_NORMALIZED_TIME_ID = "input_normalized_time";
    private static final String INPUT_STAGE_POINTS_ID = "input_stage_points";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_ACTIVE_STAGE_ID = "output_active_stage";
    private static final String OUTPUT_STAGE_PROGRESS_ID = "output_stage_progress";
    private static final String OUTPUT_ON_STAGE_START_ID = "output_on_stage_start";
    
    // --- 鐘舵€佸彉閲?---
    private int lastActiveStage = -1; // 涓婁竴涓椿鍔ㄩ樁娈?
    
    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public TimelineSplitterNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "animation.time.timeline_splitter");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_NORMALIZED_TIME_ID, "Normalized Time", "褰掍竴鍖栨椂闂达紙0-1锛?, NodeDataType.FLOAT, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_STAGE_POINTS_ID, "Stage Points", "姣忎釜闃舵缁撴潫鐨勫綊涓€鍖栨椂闂寸偣鍒楄〃", NodeDataType.LIST, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_ACTIVE_STAGE_ID, "Active Stage", "褰撳墠娲诲姩闃舵绱㈠紩", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_STAGE_PROGRESS_ID, "Stage Progress", "褰撳墠闃舵鍐呯殑杩涘害锛?-1锛?, NodeDataType.FLOAT, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_ON_STAGE_START_ID, "On Stage Start", "闃舵寮€濮嬫椂鍙戝嚭鑴夊啿", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
    }
    
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "灏嗗姩鐢绘椂闂寸嚎鍒嗗壊鎴愬涓樁娈碉紝杈撳嚭褰撳墠闃舵淇℃伅";
    }

    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Float normalizedTime = (Float) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_NORMALIZED_TIME_ID, 0.0f);
        Object stagePointsObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_STAGE_POINTS_ID);
        
        // 纭繚褰掍竴鍖栨椂闂村湪0-1鑼冨洿鍐?
        normalizedTime = Math.max(0.0f, Math.min(1.0f, normalizedTime));
        
        // 榛樿闃舵鐐癸紙濡傛灉鏈彁渚涳級
        List<Float> stagePoints = new ArrayList<>();
        stagePoints.add(1.0f); // 榛樿鍙湁涓€涓樁娈碉紝缁撴潫鐐逛负1.0
        
        // 濡傛灉鎻愪緵浜嗛樁娈电偣锛屽垯浣跨敤鎻愪緵鐨勫€?
        if (stagePointsObj instanceof List) {
            @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
            List<Object> inputList = (List<Object>) stagePointsObj;
            if (!inputList.isEmpty()) {
                stagePoints.clear();
                
                // 杞崲骞堕獙璇佹瘡涓樁娈电偣
                for (Object pointObj : inputList) {
                    if (pointObj instanceof Number) {
                        float point = ((Number) pointObj).floatValue();
                        // 纭繚鐐瑰湪0-1鑼冨洿鍐?
                        point = Math.max(0.0f, Math.min(1.0f, point));
                        stagePoints.add(point);
                    }
                }
                
                // 纭繚鍒楄〃鏈夊簭锛堜粠灏忓埌澶э級
                stagePoints.sort(Float::compare);
                
                // 纭繚鏈€鍚庝竴涓偣鏄?.0
                if (stagePoints.isEmpty() || stagePoints.get(stagePoints.size() - 1) < 1.0f) {
                    stagePoints.add(1.0f);
                }
            }
        }
        
        // 璁＄畻褰撳墠娲诲姩闃舵
        int activeStage = 0;
        float prevPoint = 0.0f;
        
        for (int i = 0; i < stagePoints.size(); i++) {
            float point = stagePoints.get(i);
            if (normalizedTime <= point) {
                activeStage = i;
                break;
            }
            prevPoint = point;
        }
        
        // 璁＄畻褰撳墠闃舵鍐呯殑杩涘害
        float currentPoint = stagePoints.get(activeStage);
        float stageLength = currentPoint - prevPoint;
        float stageProgress = 0.0f;
        
        if (stageLength > 0) {
            stageProgress = (normalizedTime - prevPoint) / stageLength;
            // 纭繚杩涘害鍦?-1鑼冨洿鍐?
            stageProgress = Math.max(0.0f, Math.min(1.0f, stageProgress));
        }
        
        // 妫€娴嬮樁娈靛紑濮?
        boolean onStageStart = (activeStage != lastActiveStage);
        lastActiveStage = activeStage;
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_ACTIVE_STAGE_ID, activeStage);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_STAGE_PROGRESS_ID, stageProgress);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_ON_STAGE_START_ID, onStageStart);
    }
}

package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.animation.time;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Time Scale Node: 鏃堕棿缂╂斁鑺傜偣
 * 璋冩暣鏃堕棿娴侀€濈殑閫熷害锛屽彲瀹炵幇鎱㈡斁鎴栧揩鏀炬晥鏋?
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "animation.time.time_scale",
    displayName = "Time Scale",
    description = "璋冩暣鏃堕棿娴侀€濈殑閫熷害锛屽彲鐢ㄤ簬鎱㈡斁鎴栧揩鏀?,
    category = "animation.time"
)
public class TimeScaleNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_TIME_ID = "input_time";
    private static final String INPUT_SCALE_FACTOR_ID = "input_scale_factor";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_SCALED_TIME_ID = "output_scaled_time";
    
    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public TimeScaleNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "animation.time.time_scale");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_TIME_ID, "Time", "杈撳叆鏃堕棿锛堢锛?, NodeDataType.FLOAT, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_SCALE_FACTOR_ID, "Scale Factor", "鏃堕棿缂╂斁绯绘暟锛?1鎱㈡斁锛?1蹇斁锛?, NodeDataType.FLOAT, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_SCALED_TIME_ID, "Scaled Time", "缂╂斁鍚庣殑鏃堕棿锛堢锛?, NodeDataType.FLOAT, this));
    }
    
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "璋冩暣鏃堕棿娴侀€濈殑閫熷害锛屽彲鐢ㄤ簬鎱㈡斁鎴栧揩鏀?;
    }

    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Float time = (Float) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_TIME_ID, 0.0f);
        Float scaleFactor = (Float) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_SCALE_FACTOR_ID, 1.0f);
        
        // 闃叉缂╂斁鍥犲瓙涓洪浂鎴栬礋鏁?
        if (scaleFactor == null || scaleFactor <= 0) {
            scaleFactor = 1.0f; // 榛樿涓?锛屼笉缂╂斁
        }
        
        // 璁＄畻缂╂斁鍚庣殑鏃堕棿
        float scaledTime = time * scaleFactor;
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_SCALED_TIME_ID, scaledTime);
    }
} 
===FILE: C:\Users\navib\Desktop\development\NC\nodecraft\src\main\java\com\nodecraft\nodesystem\nodes\animation\transforms\AnimateBendNode.java===
package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.animation.transforms;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;

import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Animate Bend Node: 鍔ㄧ敾寮洸鑺傜偣
 * 娌跨壒瀹氬钩闈㈠集鏇插嚑浣曚綋
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "animation.transforms.animate_bend",
    displayName = "Animate Bend",
    description = "娌跨壒瀹氬钩闈㈠集鏇插嚑浣曚綋",
    category = "animation.transforms"
)
public class AnimateBendNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_GEOMETRY_ID = "input_geometry";
    private static final String INPUT_CENTER_ID = "input_center";
    private static final String INPUT_DIRECTION_ID = "input_direction";
    private static final String INPUT_UP_ID = "input_up";
    private static final String INPUT_START_ANGLE_ID = "input_start_angle";
    private static final String INPUT_END_ANGLE_ID = "input_end_angle";
    private static final String INPUT_FACTOR_ID = "input_factor";
    private static final String INPUT_RADIUS_ID = "input_radius";
    private static final String INPUT_BOUNDS_ID = "input_bounds";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_TRANSFORMED_GEOMETRY_ID = "output_transformed_geometry";
    
    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public AnimateBendNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "animation.transforms.animate_bend");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_GEOMETRY_ID, "Geometry", "闇€瑕佸彉鎹㈢殑鍑犱綍浣擄紙鍧愭爣鍒楄〃锛?, NodeDataType.LIST, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_CENTER_ID, "Center", "寮洸涓績鐐?, NodeDataType.VECTOR, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_DIRECTION_ID, "Direction", "寮洸鏂瑰悜", NodeDataType.VECTOR, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_UP_ID, "Up", "寮洸骞抽潰娉曠嚎", NodeDataType.VECTOR, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_START_ANGLE_ID, "Start Angle", "璧峰寮洸瑙掑害锛堝害锛?, NodeDataType.FLOAT, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_END_ANGLE_ID, "End Angle", "缁撴潫寮洸瑙掑害锛堝害锛?, NodeDataType.FLOAT, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_FACTOR_ID, "Factor", "鍔ㄧ敾杩涘害鍥犲瓙锛?-1锛?, NodeDataType.FLOAT, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_RADIUS_ID, "Radius", "寮洸鍗婂緞", NodeDataType.FLOAT, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_BOUNDS_ID, "Bounds", "寮洸杈圭晫锛堣秴鍑鸿竟鐣屼笉寮洸锛?, NodeDataType.FLOAT, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_TRANSFORMED_GEOMETRY_ID, "Transformed Geometry", "鍙樻崲鍚庣殑鍑犱綍浣?, NodeDataType.LIST, this));
    }
    
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "娌跨壒瀹氬钩闈㈠集鏇插嚑浣曚綋";
    }

    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object geometryObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_GEOMETRY_ID);
        float[] center = (float[]) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_CENTER_ID, new float[]{0.0f, 0.0f, 0.0f});
        float[] direction = (float[]) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_DIRECTION_ID, new float[]{1.0f, 0.0f, 0.0f}); // 榛樿X杞?
        float[] up = (float[]) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_UP_ID, new float[]{0.0f, 1.0f, 0.0f}); // 榛樿Y杞?
        Float startAngle = (Float) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_START_ANGLE_ID, 0.0f);
        Float endAngle = (Float) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_END_ANGLE_ID, 90.0f);
        Float factor = (Float) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_FACTOR_ID, 0.0f);
        Float radius = (Float) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_RADIUS_ID, 5.0f);
        Float bounds = (Float) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_BOUNDS_ID, 10.0f);
        
        // 纭繚鎻掑€煎洜瀛愬湪0-1鑼冨洿鍐?
        factor = Math.max(0.0f, Math.min(1.0f, factor));
        
        // 纭繚鍚戦噺鏈夋晥
        if (center.length < 3) center = new float[]{0.0f, 0.0f, 0.0f};
        if (direction.length < 3) direction = new float[]{1.0f, 0.0f, 0.0f};
        if (up.length < 3) up = new float[]{0.0f, 1.0f, 0.0f};
        
        // 纭繚寮洸鍗婂緞澶т簬0
        radius = Math.max(0.1f, radius);
        
        // 褰掍竴鍖栨柟鍚戝悜閲?
        normalizeVector(direction);
        normalizeVector(up);
        
        // 纭繚up鍜宒irection姝ｄ氦
        // 璁＄畻鍙夌Н寰楀埌绗笁涓浜よ酱
        float[] right = crossProduct(direction, up);
        normalizeVector(right);
        // 閲嶆柊璁＄畻up浠ョ‘淇濅笁涓酱瀹屽叏姝ｄ氦
        up = crossProduct(right, direction);
        normalizeVector(up);
        
        // 璁＄畻褰撳墠寮洸瑙掑害锛堝害锛?
        float currentAngle = startAngle + (endAngle - startAngle) * factor;
        
        // 灏嗚搴﹁浆鎹负寮у害
        float angleRadians = (float) Math.toRadians(currentAngle);
        
        // 鍙樻崲鍑犱綍浣?
        List<int[]> transformedGeometry = transformGeometry(geometryObj, center, direction, up, right, angleRadians, radius, bounds);
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_TRANSFORMED_GEOMETRY_ID, transformedGeometry);
    }
    
    /**
     * 鍙樻崲鍑犱綍浣?
     */
    @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
    private List<int[]> transformGeometry(Object geometryObj, float[] center, float[] direction, float[] up, float[] right, 
                                         float angle, float radius, float bounds) {
        List<int[]> result = new ArrayList<>();
        
        if (geometryObj instanceof List) {
            List<?> geometryList = (List<?>) geometryObj;
            
            for (Object coordObj : geometryList) {
                float[] coord = getCoordinateAsFloatArray(coordObj);
                if (coord != null) {
                    // 寮洸鍧愭爣
                    int[] transformedCoord = bendCoordinate(coord, center, direction, up, right, angle, radius, bounds);
                    result.add(transformedCoord);
                }
            }
        }
        
        return result;
    }
    
    /**
     * 寮洸鍗曚釜鍧愭爣
     */
    private int[] bendCoordinate(float[] coord, float[] center, float[] direction, float[] up, float[] right, 
                                float angle, float radius, float bounds) {
        // 姝ラ1: 璁＄畻鐐圭浉瀵逛簬涓績鐐圭殑浣嶇疆
        float[] relativePos = new float[3];
        for (int i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
            relativePos[i] = coord[i] - center[i];
        }
        
        // 姝ラ2: 灏嗙浉瀵逛綅缃浆鎹㈠埌寮洸鍧愭爣绯伙紙direction, up, right锛?
        float dirComponent = dotProduct(relativePos, direction);
        float upComponent = dotProduct(relativePos, up);
        float rightComponent = dotProduct(relativePos, right);
        
        // 姝ラ3: 妫€鏌ユ槸鍚﹀湪寮洸杈圭晫鍐?
        if (Math.abs(dirComponent) > bounds) {
            // 瓒呭嚭杈圭晫锛屼笉寮洸
            return new int[]{Math.round(coord[0]), Math.round(coord[1]), Math.round(coord[2])};
        }
        
        // 姝ラ4: 璁＄畻寮洸瑙掑害锛堝熀浜庢部鏂瑰悜杞寸殑浣嶇疆杩涜鎻掑€硷級
        float bendAngle = angle * (dirComponent / bounds);
        
        // 姝ラ5: 搴旂敤寮洸鍙樻崲
        // 棣栧厛锛岃绠楃偣鍦ㄥ集鏇插钩闈笂鐨勪綅缃?
        float distanceFromAxis = upComponent;
        
        // 璁＄畻寮洸鍚庣殑浣嶇疆锛堜娇鐢ㄦ瀬鍧愭爣鍙樻崲锛?
        float bendRadius = radius + distanceFromAxis;
        
        // 璁＄畻寮洸鍚庣殑鍧愭爣锛堝湪寮洸鍧愭爣绯讳腑锛?
        float bendDirComponent = (float) (Math.sin(bendAngle) * bendRadius);
        float bendUpComponent = (float) (Math.cos(bendAngle) * bendRadius - radius);
        
        // 姝ラ6: 灏嗗集鏇插悗鐨勫潗鏍囪浆鎹㈠洖涓栫晫鍧愭爣绯?
        float[] bentPos = new float[3];
        for (int i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
            bentPos[i] = center[i] + 
                         direction[i] * bendDirComponent + 
                         up[i] * bendUpComponent + 
                         right[i] * rightComponent;
        }
        
        // 姝ラ7: 杞崲涓烘暣鏁板潗鏍囧苟杩斿洖
        return new int[]{
            Math.round(bentPos[0]),
            Math.round(bentPos[1]),
            Math.round(bentPos[2])
        };
    }
    
    /**
     * 鍚戦噺鐐圭Н
     */
    private float dotProduct(float[] v1, float[] v2) {
        return v1[0] * v2[0] + v1[1] * v2[1] + v1[2] * v2[2];
    }
    
    /**
     * 鍚戦噺鍙夌Н
     */
    private float[] crossProduct(float[] v1, float[] v2) {
        return new float[]{
            v1[1] * v2[2] - v1[2] * v2[1],
            v1[2] * v2[0] - v1[0] * v2[2],
            v1[0] * v2[1] - v1[1] * v2[0]
        };
    }
    
    /**
     * 褰掍竴鍖栧悜閲?
     */
    private void normalizeVector(float[] v) {
        float length = (float) Math.sqrt(v[0] * v[0] + v[1] * v[1] + v[2] * v[2]);
        
        // 闃叉闄や互闆?
        if (length > 0.0001f) {
            v[0] /= length;
            v[1] /= length;
            v[2] /= length;
        } else {
            // 濡傛灉鍚戦噺闀垮害涓?锛岃缃负榛樿Y杞?
            v[0] = 0.0f;
            v[1] = 1.0f;
            v[2] = 0.0f;
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * 灏嗗潗鏍囧璞¤浆鎹负娴偣鏁扮粍
     */
    private float[] getCoordinateAsFloatArray(Object coordObj) {
        // 澶勭悊int[]鏍煎紡鐨勫潗鏍?
        if (coordObj instanceof int[]) {
            int[] coord = (int[]) coordObj;
            if (coord.length >= 3) {
                return new float[]{
                    (float) coord[0],
                    (float) coord[1],
                    (float) coord[2]
                };
            }
        }
        // 澶勭悊鍖呭惈x,y,z瀛楁鐨勫璞★紙濡侰oordinate绫伙級
        else if (coordObj instanceof Map) {
            try {
                @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
                Map<String, Object> coordMap = (Map<String, Object>) coordObj;
                
                if (coordMap.containsKey("x") && coordMap.containsKey("y") && coordMap.containsKey("z")) {
                    float x = ((Number) coordMap.get("x")).floatValue();
                    float y = ((Number) coordMap.get("y")).floatValue();
                    float z = ((Number) coordMap.get("z")).floatValue();
                    
                    return new float[]{x, y, z};
                }
            } catch (Exception e) {
                // 澶勭悊澶辫触锛岃繑鍥瀗ull
                return null;
            }
        }
        
        return null;
    }
} 
===FILE: C:\Users\navib\Desktop\development\NC\nodecraft\src\main\java\com\nodecraft\nodesystem\nodes\animation\transforms\AnimatePathNode.java===
package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.animation.transforms;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;

import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Animate Path Node: 鍔ㄧ敾璺緞鑺傜偣
 * 璁╁嚑浣曚綋娌跨潃鐗瑰畾璺緞绉诲姩
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "animation.transforms.animate_path",
    displayName = "Animate Path",
    description = "璁╁嚑浣曚綋娌跨壒瀹氳矾寰勭Щ鍔?,
    category = "animation.transforms"
)
public class AnimatePathNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_GEOMETRY_ID = "input_geometry";
    private static final String INPUT_PATH_POINTS_ID = "input_path_points";
    private static final String INPUT_FACTOR_ID = "input_factor";
    private static final String INPUT_LOOP_ID = "input_loop";
    private static final String INPUT_ORIENT_ID = "input_orient";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_TRANSFORMED_GEOMETRY_ID = "output_transformed_geometry";
    private static final String OUTPUT_CURRENT_POSITION_ID = "output_current_position";
    private static final String OUTPUT_CURRENT_DIRECTION_ID = "output_current_direction";
    
    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public AnimatePathNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "animation.transforms.animate_path");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_GEOMETRY_ID, "Geometry", "闇€瑕佸彉鎹㈢殑鍑犱綍浣擄紙鍧愭爣鍒楄〃锛?, NodeDataType.LIST, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_PATH_POINTS_ID, "Path Points", "璺緞鐐瑰垪琛紙Vector3鍒楄〃锛?, NodeDataType.LIST, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_FACTOR_ID, "Factor", "鍔ㄧ敾杩涘害鍥犲瓙锛?-1锛?, NodeDataType.FLOAT, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_LOOP_ID, "Loop", "鏄惁寰幆璺緞", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_ORIENT_ID, "Orient to Path", "鏄惁娌胯矾寰勬柟鍚戞棆杞嚑浣曚綋", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_TRANSFORMED_GEOMETRY_ID, "Transformed Geometry", "鍙樻崲鍚庣殑鍑犱綍浣?, NodeDataType.LIST, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_CURRENT_POSITION_ID, "Current Position", "褰撳墠浣嶇疆", NodeDataType.VECTOR, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_CURRENT_DIRECTION_ID, "Current Direction", "褰撳墠鏂瑰悜", NodeDataType.VECTOR, this));
    }
    
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "璁╁嚑浣曚綋娌跨壒瀹氳矾寰勭Щ鍔?;
    }

    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object geometryObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_GEOMETRY_ID);
        Object pathPointsObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_PATH_POINTS_ID);
        Float factor = (Float) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_FACTOR_ID, 0.0f);
        Boolean loop = (Boolean) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_LOOP_ID, false);
        Boolean orient = (Boolean) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_ORIENT_ID, false);
        
        // 纭繚鎻掑€煎洜瀛愬湪0-1鑼冨洿鍐?
        factor = Math.max(0.0f, Math.min(1.0f, factor));
        
        // 瑙ｆ瀽璺緞鐐?
        List<float[]> pathPoints = getPathPoints(pathPointsObj);
        
        // 濡傛灉璺緞鐐逛笉瓒筹紝鍒欑洿鎺ヨ繑鍥炲師濮嬪嚑浣曚綋
        if (pathPoints.size() < 2) {
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_TRANSFORMED_GEOMETRY_ID, geometryObj);
            if (pathPoints.size() == 1) {
                outputValues.put(OUTPUT_CURRENT_POSITION_ID, pathPoints.get(0));
                outputValues.put(OUTPUT_CURRENT_DIRECTION_ID, new float[]{0.0f, 0.0f, 1.0f}); // 榛樿鏈濆悜Z杞存鏂瑰悜
            }
            return;
        }
        
        // 璁＄畻褰撳墠璺緞浣嶇疆鍜屾柟鍚?
        PathPosition pathPosition = calculatePathPosition(pathPoints, factor, loop);
        float[] currentPosition = pathPosition.position;
        float[] currentDirection = pathPosition.direction;
        
        // 鍙樻崲鍑犱綍浣?
        List<int[]> transformedGeometry;
        if (orient) {
            // 娌胯矾寰勬柟鍚戞棆杞苟骞崇Щ鍑犱綍浣?
            transformedGeometry = transformGeometryWithOrientation(geometryObj, currentPosition, currentDirection);
        } else {
            // 浠呭钩绉诲嚑浣曚綋
            transformedGeometry = transformGeometry(geometryObj, currentPosition);
        }
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_TRANSFORMED_GEOMETRY_ID, transformedGeometry);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_CURRENT_POSITION_ID, currentPosition);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_CURRENT_DIRECTION_ID, currentDirection);
    }
    
    /**
     * 瑙ｆ瀽璺緞鐐瑰垪琛?
     */
    @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
    private List<float[]> getPathPoints(Object pathPointsObj) {
        List<float[]> result = new ArrayList<>();
        
        if (pathPointsObj instanceof List) {
            List<?> pointsList = (List<?>) pathPointsObj;
            
            for (Object pointObj : pointsList) {
                float[] point = null;
                
                // 澶勭悊涓嶅悓绫诲瀷鐨勭偣瀵硅薄
                if (pointObj instanceof float[]) {
                    float[] p = (float[]) pointObj;
                    if (p.length >= 3) {
                        point = new float[]{p[0], p[1], p[2]};
                    }
                } else if (pointObj instanceof int[]) {
                    int[] p = (int[]) pointObj;
                    if (p.length >= 3) {
                        point = new float[]{(float) p[0], (float) p[1], (float) p[2]};
                    }
                } else if (pointObj instanceof Map) {
                    try {
                        Map<String, Object> pointMap = (Map<String, Object>) pointObj;
                        if (pointMap.containsKey("x") && pointMap.containsKey("y") && pointMap.containsKey("z")) {
                            float x = ((Number) pointMap.get("x")).floatValue();
                            float y = ((Number) pointMap.get("y")).floatValue();
                            float z = ((Number) pointMap.get("z")).floatValue();
                            point = new float[]{x, y, z};
                        }
                    } catch (Exception e) {
                        // 澶勭悊澶辫触锛岃烦杩囪繖涓偣
                        continue;
                    }
                }
                
                if (point != null) {
                    result.add(point);
                }
            }
        }
        
        return result;
    }
    
    /**
     * 璺緞浣嶇疆淇℃伅
     */
    private static class PathPosition {
        public float[] position;
        public float[] direction;
        
        public PathPosition(float[] position, float[] direction) {
            this.position = position;
            this.direction = direction;
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * 璁＄畻璺緞涓婄殑褰撳墠浣嶇疆鍜屾柟鍚?
     */
    private PathPosition calculatePathPosition(List<float[]> pathPoints, float factor, boolean loop) {
        int numSegments = pathPoints.size() - 1;
        float totalLength = 0.0f;
        
        // 璁＄畻璺緞鎬婚暱搴?
        float[] segmentLengths = new float[numSegments];
        for (int i = 0; i < numSegments; i++) {
            float[] p1 = pathPoints.get(i);
            float[] p2 = pathPoints.get(i + 1);
            segmentLengths[i] = distance(p1, p2);
            totalLength += segmentLengths[i];
        }
        
        // 濡傛灉鎬婚暱搴︿负0锛岀洿鎺ヨ繑鍥炵涓€涓偣
        if (totalLength < 0.0001f) {
            float[] direction = {0.0f, 0.0f, 1.0f}; // 榛樿鏂瑰悜
            return new PathPosition(pathPoints.get(0), direction);
        }
        
        // 鏍规嵁factor璁＄畻鍦ㄨ矾寰勪笂鐨勪綅缃?
        float targetDistance = factor * totalLength;
        
        // 寰幆璺緞澶勭悊
        if (loop && factor >= 1.0f) {
            targetDistance = targetDistance % totalLength;
        }
        
        // 鎵惧埌瀵瑰簲鐨勮矾寰勬
        int segmentIndex = 0;
        float accumulatedDistance = 0.0f;
        
        while (segmentIndex < numSegments && accumulatedDistance + segmentLengths[segmentIndex] < targetDistance) {
            accumulatedDistance += segmentLengths[segmentIndex];
            segmentIndex++;
        }
        
        // 纭繚涓嶈秺鐣?
        if (segmentIndex >= numSegments) {
            segmentIndex = numSegments - 1;
            float[] direction = normalizeVector(
                subtractVectors(pathPoints.get(segmentIndex + 1), pathPoints.get(segmentIndex))
            );
            return new PathPosition(pathPoints.get(segmentIndex + 1), direction);
        }
        
        // 璁＄畻鍦ㄥ綋鍓嶆鐨勬彃鍊煎洜瀛?
        float segmentFactor = 0.0f;
        if (segmentLengths[segmentIndex] > 0.0001f) {
            segmentFactor = (targetDistance - accumulatedDistance) / segmentLengths[segmentIndex];
        }
        
        // 闄愬埗鍦?-1鑼冨洿鍐?
        segmentFactor = Math.max(0.0f, Math.min(1.0f, segmentFactor));
        
        // 璁＄畻褰撳墠浣嶇疆锛堢嚎鎬ф彃鍊硷級
        float[] p1 = pathPoints.get(segmentIndex);
        float[] p2 = pathPoints.get(segmentIndex + 1);
        float[] currentPosition = new float[3];
        for (int i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
            currentPosition[i] = p1[i] + (p2[i] - p1[i]) * segmentFactor;
        }
        
        // 璁＄畻褰撳墠鏂瑰悜
        float[] currentDirection = normalizeVector(subtractVectors(p2, p1));
        
        return new PathPosition(currentPosition, currentDirection);
    }
    
    /**
     * 璁＄畻涓ょ偣涔嬮棿鐨勮窛绂?
     */
    private float distance(float[] p1, float[] p2) {
        float dx = p2[0] - p1[0];
        float dy = p2[1] - p1[1];
        float dz = p2[2] - p1[2];
        return (float) Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy + dz * dz);
    }
    
    /**
     * 鍚戦噺鍑忔硶
     */
    private float[] subtractVectors(float[] v1, float[] v2) {
        return new float[]{
            v1[0] - v2[0],
            v1[1] - v2[1],
            v1[2] - v2[2]
        };
    }
    
    /**
     * 褰掍竴鍖栧悜閲?
     */
    private float[] normalizeVector(float[] v) {
        float length = (float) Math.sqrt(v[0] * v[0] + v[1] * v[1] + v[2] * v[2]);
        
        if (length > 0.0001f) {
            return new float[]{
                v[0] / length,
                v[1] / length,
                v[2] / length
            };
        } else {
            return new float[]{0.0f, 0.0f, 1.0f}; // 榛樿Z杞存鏂瑰悜
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * 浠呭钩绉诲嚑浣曚綋锛堜笉鏃嬭浆锛?
     */
    @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
    private List<int[]> transformGeometry(Object geometryObj, float[] position) {
        List<int[]> result = new ArrayList<>();
        
        if (geometryObj instanceof List) {
            List<?> geometryList = (List<?>) geometryObj;
            
            for (Object coordObj : geometryList) {
                float[] coord = getCoordinateAsFloatArray(coordObj);
                if (coord != null) {
                    // 骞崇Щ鍧愭爣
                    int[] transformedCoord = new int[]{
                        Math.round(coord[0] + position[0]),
                        Math.round(coord[1] + position[1]),
                        Math.round(coord[2] + position[2])
                    };
                    result.add(transformedCoord);
                }
            }
        }
        
        return result;
    }
    
    /**
     * 骞崇Щ骞舵棆杞嚑浣曚綋锛堜娇鍏舵湞鍚戣矾寰勬柟鍚戯級
     */
    @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
    private List<int[]> transformGeometryWithOrientation(Object geometryObj, float[] position, float[] direction) {
        List<int[]> result = new ArrayList<>();
        
        if (geometryObj instanceof List) {
            List<?> geometryList = (List<?>) geometryObj;
            
            // 璁＄畻浠嶼杞存鏂瑰悜(0,0,1)鍒板綋鍓嶆柟鍚戠殑鏃嬭浆
            float[] zAxis = {0.0f, 0.0f, 1.0f};
            float[] rotationAxis = crossProduct(zAxis, direction);
            float rotationAngle = (float) Math.acos(dotProduct(zAxis, direction));
            
            // 濡傛灉鏃嬭浆杞存帴杩戦浂鍚戦噺锛岃鏄庢柟鍚戝凡缁忔槸Z杞存鏂瑰悜鎴栬礋鏂瑰悜
            boolean needRotation = length(rotationAxis) > 0.0001f;
            if (needRotation) {
                normalizeVectorInPlace(rotationAxis);
            }
            
            for (Object coordObj : geometryList) {
                float[] coord = getCoordinateAsFloatArray(coordObj);
                if (coord != null) {
                    float[] transformedCoord = coord.clone();
                    
                    // 鍏堟棆杞?
                    if (needRotation) {
                        transformedCoord = rotatePointAroundAxis(transformedCoord, rotationAxis, rotationAngle);
                    }
                    
                    // 鍐嶅钩绉?
                    transformedCoord[0] += position[0];
                    transformedCoord[1] += position[1];
                    transformedCoord[2] += position[2];
                    
                    // 杞崲涓烘暣鏁板潗鏍?
                    int[] finalCoord = new int[]{
                        Math.round(transformedCoord[0]),
                        Math.round(transformedCoord[1]),
                        Math.round(transformedCoord[2])
                    };
                    
                    result.add(finalCoord);
                }
            }
        }
        
        return result;
    }
    
    /**
     * 鍚戦噺鐐圭Н
     */
    private float dotProduct(float[] v1, float[] v2) {
        return v1[0] * v2[0] + v1[1] * v2[1] + v1[2] * v2[2];
    }
    
    /**
     * 鍚戦噺鍙夌Н
     */
    private float[] crossProduct(float[] v1, float[] v2) {
        return new float[]{
            v1[1] * v2[2] - v1[2] * v2[1],
            v1[2] * v2[0] - v1[0] * v2[2],
            v1[0] * v2[1] - v1[1] * v2[0]
        };
    }
    
    /**
     * 鍚戦噺闀垮害
     */
    private float length(float[] v) {
        return (float) Math.sqrt(v[0] * v[0] + v[1] * v[1] + v[2] * v[2]);
    }
    
    /**
     * 鍘熷湴褰掍竴鍖栧悜閲?
     */
    private void normalizeVectorInPlace(float[] v) {
        float length = length(v);
        if (length > 0.0001f) {
            v[0] /= length;
            v[1] /= length;
            v[2] /= length;
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * 浣跨敤缃楀痉閲屾牸鏃嬭浆鍏紡鍥寸粫浠绘剰杞存棆杞偣
     */
    private float[] rotatePointAroundAxis(float[] point, float[] axis, float angle) {
        float[] rotated = new float[3];
        
        // 缃楀痉閲屾牸鏃嬭浆鍏紡: v_rot = v*cos(胃) + (k脳v)*sin(胃) + k*(k路v)*(1-cos(胃))
        float cosAngle = (float) Math.cos(angle);
        float sinAngle = (float) Math.sin(angle);
        
        // 璁＄畻 k路v (鐐圭Н)
        float dotProduct = dotProduct(axis, point);
        
        // 璁＄畻 k脳v (鍙夌Н)
        float[] crossProduct = crossProduct(axis, point);
        
        // 搴旂敤缃楀痉閲屾牸鏃嬭浆鍏紡
        for (int i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
            rotated[i] = point[i] * cosAngle + 
                          crossProduct[i] * sinAngle + 
                          axis[i] * dotProduct * (1 - cosAngle);
        }
        
        return rotated;
    }
    
    /**
     * 灏嗗潗鏍囧璞¤浆鎹负娴偣鏁扮粍
     */
    private float[] getCoordinateAsFloatArray(Object coordObj) {
        // 澶勭悊int[]鏍煎紡鐨勫潗鏍?
        if (coordObj instanceof int[]) {
            int[] coord = (int[]) coordObj;
            if (coord.length >= 3) {
                return new float[]{
                    (float) coord[0],
                    (float) coord[1],
                    (float) coord[2]
                };
            }
        }
        // 澶勭悊鍖呭惈x,y,z瀛楁鐨勫璞★紙濡侰oordinate绫伙級
        else if (coordObj instanceof Map) {
            try {
                @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
                Map<String, Object> coordMap = (Map<String, Object>) coordObj;
                
                if (coordMap.containsKey("x") && coordMap.containsKey("y") && coordMap.containsKey("z")) {
                    float x = ((Number) coordMap.get("x")).floatValue();
                    float y = ((Number) coordMap.get("y")).floatValue();
                    float z = ((Number) coordMap.get("z")).floatValue();
                    
                    return new float[]{x, y, z};
                }
            } catch (Exception e) {
                // 澶勭悊澶辫触锛岃繑鍥瀗ull
                return null;
            }
        }
        
        return null;
    }
}
