package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.animation.transforms;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.util.BlockPosList;

import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import org.joml.Vector3d;
import net.minecraft.util.math.BlockPos;
import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Animate Position: 浣嶇疆鍔ㄧ敾鑺傜偣
 * 浣挎柟鍧楅殢鏃堕棿绉诲姩锛屽彲鐢ㄤ簬鍒涘缓骞虫粦鐨勭Щ鍔ㄦ晥鏋?
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "animation.properties.animate_position",
    displayName = "Animate Position",
    description = "浣挎柟鍧楅殢鏃堕棿绉诲姩",
    category = "animation.properties"
)
public class AnimatePositionNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_COORDINATES_ID = "input_coordinates";
    private static final String INPUT_START_POSITION_ID = "input_start_position";
    private static final String INPUT_END_POSITION_ID = "input_end_position";
    private static final String INPUT_TIME_FACTOR_ID = "input_time_factor";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_ANIMATED_COORDINATES_ID = "output_animated_coordinates";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public AnimatePositionNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "animation.properties.animate_position");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_COORDINATES_ID, "Coordinates", "瑕佺Щ鍔ㄧ殑鏂瑰潡鍧愭爣鍒楄〃", NodeDataType.BLOCK_LIST, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_START_POSITION_ID, "Start Position", "璧峰浣嶇疆鍚戦噺", NodeDataType.VECTOR, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_END_POSITION_ID, "End Position", "缁撴潫浣嶇疆鍚戦噺", NodeDataType.VECTOR, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_TIME_FACTOR_ID, "Time Factor", "鏃堕棿鍥犲瓙 (0-1)", NodeDataType.FLOAT, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_ANIMATED_COORDINATES_ID, "Animated Coordinates", "闅忔椂闂村彉鍖栫殑鏂瑰潡鍧愭爣鍒楄〃", NodeDataType.BLOCK_LIST, this));
    }
    
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "浣挎柟鍧楅殢鏃堕棿绉诲姩";
    }

    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        BlockPosList coordinates = (BlockPosList) inputValues.get(INPUT_COORDINATES_ID);
        Vector3d startPosition = (Vector3d) inputValues.get(INPUT_START_POSITION_ID);
        Vector3d endPosition = (Vector3d) inputValues.get(INPUT_END_POSITION_ID);
        Float timeFactor = (Float) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_TIME_FACTOR_ID, 0.0f);
        
        // 纭繚鏃堕棿鍥犲瓙鍦╗0,1]鑼冨洿鍐?
        timeFactor = Math.max(0f, Math.min(1f, timeFactor));
        
        // 濡傛灉浠讳綍蹇呰杈撳叆涓簄ull锛屽垯杈撳嚭null
        if (coordinates == null || startPosition == null || endPosition == null) {
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_ANIMATED_COORDINATES_ID, null);
            return;
        }
        
        // 璁＄畻褰撳墠浣嶇疆鍚戦噺锛堟彃鍊硷級
        Vector3d currentPosition = lerpVector3d(startPosition, endPosition, timeFactor);
        
        // 璁＄畻浣嶇Щ鍚戦噺锛堜粠璧峰浣嶇疆鍒板綋鍓嶄綅缃級
        Vector3d displacement = new Vector3d(
            currentPosition.x - startPosition.x,
            currentPosition.y - startPosition.y,
            currentPosition.z - startPosition.z
        );
        
        // 搴旂敤浣嶇Щ鍒版瘡涓柟鍧楀潗鏍?
        List<BlockPos> originalCoordinates = coordinates.getPositions();
        List<BlockPos> animatedCoordinates = new ArrayList<>(originalCoordinates.size());
        
        for (BlockPos pos : originalCoordinates) {
            // 璁＄畻鏂颁綅缃紙鍔犱笂浣嶇Щ锛?
            BlockPos newPos = new BlockPos(
                (int) Math.round(pos.getX() + displacement.x),
                (int) Math.round(pos.getY() + displacement.y),
                (int) Math.round(pos.getZ() + displacement.z)
            );
            animatedCoordinates.add(newPos);
        }
        
        // 鍒涘缓鏂扮殑BlockPosList骞惰缃负杈撳嚭
        BlockPosList result = new BlockPosList(animatedCoordinates);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_ANIMATED_COORDINATES_ID, result);
    }
    
    /**
     * 3D鍚戦噺鐨勭嚎鎬ф彃鍊?
     * @param start 璧峰鍚戦噺
     * @param end 缁撴潫鍚戦噺
     * @param factor 鎻掑€煎洜瀛?(0-1)
     * @return 鎻掑€肩粨鏋?
     */
    private Vector3d lerpVector3d(Vector3d start, Vector3d end, float factor) {
        Vector3d result = new Vector3d();
        result.x = start.x + (end.x - start.x) * factor;
        result.y = start.y + (end.y - start.y) * factor;
        result.z = start.z + (end.z - start.z) * factor;
        return result;
    }
} 
===FILE: C:\Users\navib\Desktop\development\NC\nodecraft\src\main\java\com\nodecraft\nodesystem\nodes\animation\transforms\AnimateRotateNode.java===
package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.animation.transforms;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;

import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Animate Rotate Node: 鍔ㄧ敾鏃嬭浆鑺傜偣
 * 鍥寸粫杞村績鐐规棆杞嚑浣曚綋
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "animation.transforms.animate_rotate",
    displayName = "Animate Rotate",
    description = "鍥寸粫杞村績鐐规棆杞嚑浣曚綋",
    category = "animation.transforms"
)
public class AnimateRotateNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_GEOMETRY_ID = "input_geometry";
    private static final String INPUT_PIVOT_ID = "input_pivot";
    private static final String INPUT_AXIS_ID = "input_axis";
    private static final String INPUT_START_ANGLE_ID = "input_start_angle";
    private static final String INPUT_END_ANGLE_ID = "input_end_angle";
    private static final String INPUT_FACTOR_ID = "input_factor";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_TRANSFORMED_GEOMETRY_ID = "output_transformed_geometry";
    
    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public AnimateRotateNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "animation.transforms.animate_rotate");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_GEOMETRY_ID, "Geometry", "闇€瑕佸彉鎹㈢殑鍑犱綍浣擄紙鍧愭爣鍒楄〃锛?, NodeDataType.LIST, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_PIVOT_ID, "Pivot", "鏃嬭浆杞村績鐐?, NodeDataType.VECTOR, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_AXIS_ID, "Axis", "鏃嬭浆杞?, NodeDataType.VECTOR, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_START_ANGLE_ID, "Start Angle", "璧峰瑙掑害锛堝害锛?, NodeDataType.FLOAT, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_END_ANGLE_ID, "End Angle", "缁撴潫瑙掑害锛堝害锛?, NodeDataType.FLOAT, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_FACTOR_ID, "Factor", "鍔ㄧ敾杩涘害鍥犲瓙锛?-1锛?, NodeDataType.FLOAT, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_TRANSFORMED_GEOMETRY_ID, "Transformed Geometry", "鍙樻崲鍚庣殑鍑犱綍浣?, NodeDataType.LIST, this));
    }
    
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "鍥寸粫杞村績鐐规棆杞嚑浣曚綋";
    }

    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object geometryObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_GEOMETRY_ID);
        float[] pivot = (float[]) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_PIVOT_ID, new float[]{0.0f, 0.0f, 0.0f});
        float[] axis = (float[]) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_AXIS_ID, new float[]{0.0f, 1.0f, 0.0f}); // 榛樿Y杞?
        Float startAngle = (Float) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_START_ANGLE_ID, 0.0f);
        Float endAngle = (Float) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_END_ANGLE_ID, 360.0f);
        Float factor = (Float) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_FACTOR_ID, 0.0f);
        
        // 纭繚鎻掑€煎洜瀛愬湪0-1鑼冨洿鍐?
        factor = Math.max(0.0f, Math.min(1.0f, factor));
        
        // 纭繚鍚戦噺鏈夋晥
        if (pivot.length < 3) pivot = new float[]{0.0f, 0.0f, 0.0f};
        if (axis.length < 3) axis = new float[]{0.0f, 1.0f, 0.0f};
        
        // 褰掍竴鍖栨棆杞酱
        normalizeVector(axis);
        
        // 璁＄畻褰撳墠瑙掑害锛堝害锛?
        float currentAngle = startAngle + (endAngle - startAngle) * factor;
        
        // 灏嗚搴﹁浆鎹负寮у害
        float angleRadians = (float) Math.toRadians(currentAngle);
        
        // 鍙樻崲鍑犱綍浣?
        List<int[]> transformedGeometry = transformGeometry(geometryObj, pivot, axis, angleRadians);
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_TRANSFORMED_GEOMETRY_ID, transformedGeometry);
    }
    
    /**
     * 鍙樻崲鍑犱綍浣?
     * @param geometryObj 杈撳叆鍑犱綍浣擄紙鍧愭爣鍒楄〃锛?
     * @param pivot 鏃嬭浆杞村績鐐?
     * @param axis 鏃嬭浆杞?
     * @param angle 鏃嬭浆瑙掑害锛堝姬搴︼級
     * @return 鍙樻崲鍚庣殑鍑犱綍浣?
     */
    @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
    private List<int[]> transformGeometry(Object geometryObj, float[] pivot, float[] axis, float angle) {
        List<int[]> result = new ArrayList<>();
        
        // 纭繚鍑犱綍浣撴槸鏈夋晥鐨勫潗鏍囧垪琛?
        if (geometryObj instanceof List) {
            List<?> geometryList = (List<?>) geometryObj;
            
            for (Object coordObj : geometryList) {
                int[] transformedCoord = transformCoordinate(coordObj, pivot, axis, angle);
                if (transformedCoord != null) {
                    result.add(transformedCoord);
                }
            }
        }
        
        return result;
    }
    
    /**
     * 鍙樻崲鍗曚釜鍧愭爣
     * @param coordObj 鍧愭爣瀵硅薄
     * @param pivot 鏃嬭浆杞村績鐐?
     * @param axis 鏃嬭浆杞?
     * @param angle 鏃嬭浆瑙掑害锛堝姬搴︼級
     * @return 鍙樻崲鍚庣殑鍧愭爣
     */
    private int[] transformCoordinate(Object coordObj, float[] pivot, float[] axis, float angle) {
        float[] coord = getCoordinateAsFloatArray(coordObj);
        if (coord == null) return null;
        
        // 姝ラ1: 灏嗗潗鏍囩Щ鍔ㄥ埌杞村績鐐逛负鍘熺偣
        float[] translatedCoord = new float[3];
        for (int i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
            translatedCoord[i] = coord[i] - pivot[i];
        }
        
        // 姝ラ2: 搴旂敤鏃嬭浆锛堜娇鐢ㄧ綏寰烽噷鏍兼棆杞叕寮忥級
        float[] rotatedCoord = rotatePointAroundAxis(translatedCoord, axis, angle);
        
        // 姝ラ3: 灏嗗潗鏍囩Щ鍥炲師鏉ョ殑浣嶇疆
        for (int i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
            rotatedCoord[i] += pivot[i];
        }
        
        // 姝ラ4: 灏嗘诞鐐瑰潗鏍囪浆鎹负鏁存暟鍧愭爣锛堝洓鑸嶄簲鍏ワ級
        return new int[]{
            Math.round(rotatedCoord[0]),
            Math.round(rotatedCoord[1]),
            Math.round(rotatedCoord[2])
        };
    }
    
    /**
     * 灏嗗潗鏍囧璞¤浆鎹负娴偣鏁扮粍
     * @param coordObj 鍧愭爣瀵硅薄
     * @return 娴偣鏁扮粍[x, y, z]
     */
    private float[] getCoordinateAsFloatArray(Object coordObj) {
        // 澶勭悊int[]鏍煎紡鐨勫潗鏍?
        if (coordObj instanceof int[]) {
            int[] coord = (int[]) coordObj;
            if (coord.length >= 3) {
                return new float[]{
                    (float) coord[0],
                    (float) coord[1],
                    (float) coord[2]
                };
            }
        }
        // 澶勭悊鍖呭惈x,y,z瀛楁鐨勫璞★紙濡侰oordinate绫伙級
        else if (coordObj instanceof Map) {
            try {
                @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
                Map<String, Object> coordMap = (Map<String, Object>) coordObj;
                
                if (coordMap.containsKey("x") && coordMap.containsKey("y") && coordMap.containsKey("z")) {
                    float x = ((Number) coordMap.get("x")).floatValue();
                    float y = ((Number) coordMap.get("y")).floatValue();
                    float z = ((Number) coordMap.get("z")).floatValue();
                    
                    return new float[]{x, y, z};
                }
            } catch (Exception e) {
                // 澶勭悊澶辫触锛岃繑鍥瀗ull
                return null;
            }
        }
        
        return null;
    }
    
    /**
     * 褰掍竴鍖栧悜閲?
     * @param vector 鍚戦噺
     */
    private void normalizeVector(float[] vector) {
        float length = (float) Math.sqrt(
            vector[0] * vector[0] +
            vector[1] * vector[1] +
            vector[2] * vector[2]
        );
        
        // 闃叉闄や互闆?
        if (length > 0.0001f) {
            vector[0] /= length;
            vector[1] /= length;
            vector[2] /= length;
        } else {
            // 濡傛灉鍚戦噺闀垮害涓?锛岃缃负榛樿Y杞?
            vector[0] = 0.0f;
            vector[1] = 1.0f;
            vector[2] = 0.0f;
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * 浣跨敤缃楀痉閲屾牸鏃嬭浆鍏紡鍥寸粫浠绘剰杞存棆杞偣
     * @param point 瑕佹棆杞殑鐐?
     * @param axis 鏃嬭浆杞达紙宸插綊涓€鍖栵級
     * @param angle 鏃嬭浆瑙掑害锛堝姬搴︼級
     * @return 鏃嬭浆鍚庣殑鐐?
     */
    private float[] rotatePointAroundAxis(float[] point, float[] axis, float angle) {
        float[] rotated = new float[3];
        
        // 缃楀痉閲屾牸鏃嬭浆鍏紡: v_rot = v*cos(胃) + (k脳v)*sin(胃) + k*(k路v)*(1-cos(胃))
        float cosAngle = (float) Math.cos(angle);
        float sinAngle = (float) Math.sin(angle);
        
        // 璁＄畻 k路v (鐐圭Н)
        float dotProduct = 
            axis[0] * point[0] +
            axis[1] * point[1] +
            axis[2] * point[2];
        
        // 璁＄畻 k脳v (鍙夌Н)
        float[] crossProduct = new float[3];
        crossProduct[0] = axis[1] * point[2] - axis[2] * point[1];
        crossProduct[1] = axis[2] * point[0] - axis[0] * point[2];
        crossProduct[2] = axis[0] * point[1] - axis[1] * point[0];
        
        // 搴旂敤缃楀痉閲屾牸鏃嬭浆鍏紡
        for (int i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
            rotated[i] = point[i] * cosAngle + 
                          crossProduct[i] * sinAngle + 
                          axis[i] * dotProduct * (1 - cosAngle);
        }
        
        return rotated;
    }
} 
===FILE: C:\Users\navib\Desktop\development\NC\nodecraft\src\main\java\com\nodecraft\nodesystem\nodes\animation\transforms\AnimateRotationNode.java===
package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.animation.transforms;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.util.BlockPosList;

import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import org.joml.Vector3d;
import org.joml.Matrix4d;
import net.minecraft.util.math.BlockPos;
import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Animate Rotation: 鏃嬭浆鍔ㄧ敾鑺傜偣
 * 浣挎柟鍧楅殢鏃堕棿鍥寸粫鏌愪釜杞存棆杞?
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "animation.properties.animate_rotation",
    displayName = "Animate Rotation",
    description = "浣挎柟鍧楅殢鏃堕棿鍥寸粫鏌愪釜杞存棆杞?,
    category = "animation.properties"
)
public class AnimateRotationNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_COORDINATES_ID = "input_coordinates";
    private static final String INPUT_CENTER_ID = "input_center";
    private static final String INPUT_AXIS_ID = "input_axis";
    private static final String INPUT_START_ANGLE_ID = "input_start_angle";
    private static final String INPUT_END_ANGLE_ID = "input_end_angle";
    private static final String INPUT_TIME_FACTOR_ID = "input_time_factor";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_ROTATED_COORDINATES_ID = "output_rotated_coordinates";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public AnimateRotationNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "animation.properties.animate_rotation");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_COORDINATES_ID, "Coordinates", "瑕佹棆杞殑鏂瑰潡鍧愭爣鍒楄〃", NodeDataType.BLOCK_LIST, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_CENTER_ID, "Center", "鏃嬭浆涓績鐐?, NodeDataType.BLOCK_POS, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_AXIS_ID, "Axis", "鏃嬭浆杞村悜閲?, NodeDataType.VECTOR, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_START_ANGLE_ID, "Start Angle", "璧峰瑙掑害锛堝害锛?, NodeDataType.FLOAT, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_END_ANGLE_ID, "End Angle", "缁撴潫瑙掑害锛堝害锛?, NodeDataType.FLOAT, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_TIME_FACTOR_ID, "Time Factor", "鏃堕棿鍥犲瓙 (0-1)", NodeDataType.FLOAT, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_ROTATED_COORDINATES_ID, "Rotated Coordinates", "鏃嬭浆鍚庣殑鏂瑰潡鍧愭爣鍒楄〃", NodeDataType.BLOCK_LIST, this));
    }
    
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "浣挎柟鍧楅殢鏃堕棿鍥寸粫鏌愪釜杞存棆杞?;
    }

    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        BlockPosList coordinates = (BlockPosList) inputValues.get(INPUT_COORDINATES_ID);
        BlockPos center = (BlockPos) inputValues.get(INPUT_CENTER_ID);
        Vector3d axis = (Vector3d) inputValues.get(INPUT_AXIS_ID);
        Float startAngle = (Float) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_START_ANGLE_ID, 0.0f);
        Float endAngle = (Float) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_END_ANGLE_ID, 360.0f);
        Float timeFactor = (Float) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_TIME_FACTOR_ID, 0.0f);
        
        // 纭繚鏃堕棿鍥犲瓙鍦╗0,1]鑼冨洿鍐?
        timeFactor = Math.max(0f, Math.min(1f, timeFactor));
        
        // 濡傛灉浠讳綍蹇呰杈撳叆涓簄ull锛屽垯杈撳嚭null
        if (coordinates == null || center == null || axis == null) {
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_ROTATED_COORDINATES_ID, null);
            return;
        }
        
        // 鏍囧噯鍖栨棆杞酱
        Vector3d normalizedAxis = new Vector3d(axis);
        if (normalizedAxis.lengthSquared() > 0) {
            normalizedAxis.normalize();
        } else {
            normalizedAxis.set(0, 1, 0); // 榛樿浣跨敤Y杞?
        }
        
        // 璁＄畻褰撳墠瑙掑害锛堝害锛?
        float currentAngle = startAngle + (endAngle - startAngle) * timeFactor;
        
        // 杞崲涓哄姬搴?
        double angleRadians = Math.toRadians(currentAngle);
        
        // 鏋勫缓鏃嬭浆鐭╅樀
        Matrix4d rotationMatrix = new Matrix4d();
        rotationMatrix.identity();
        rotationMatrix.rotate(angleRadians, normalizedAxis);
        
        // 搴旂敤鏃嬭浆鍒版瘡涓柟鍧楀潗鏍?
        List<BlockPos> originalCoordinates = coordinates.getPositions();
        List<BlockPos> rotatedCoordinates = new ArrayList<>(originalCoordinates.size());
        
        Vector3d centerVec = new Vector3d(center.getX(), center.getY(), center.getZ());
        
        for (BlockPos pos : originalCoordinates) {
            // 灏嗘柟鍧楀潗鏍囪浆鎹负鐩稿浜庝腑蹇冪偣鐨勫悜閲?
            Vector3d relativePos = new Vector3d(
                pos.getX() - centerVec.x,
                pos.getY() - centerVec.y,
                pos.getZ() - centerVec.z
            );
            
            // 搴旂敤鏃嬭浆
            Vector3d rotatedPos = rotationMatrix.transformPosition(relativePos);
            
            // 灏嗘棆杞悗鐨勫悜閲忚浆鎹㈠洖鐩稿浜庝笘鐣岀殑鍧愭爣
            BlockPos newPos = new BlockPos(
                (int) Math.round(rotatedPos.x + centerVec.x),
                (int) Math.round(rotatedPos.y + centerVec.y),
                (int) Math.round(rotatedPos.z + centerVec.z)
            );
            
            rotatedCoordinates.add(newPos);
        }
        
        // 鍒涘缓鏂扮殑BlockPosList骞惰缃负杈撳嚭
        BlockPosList result = new BlockPosList(rotatedCoordinates);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_ROTATED_COORDINATES_ID, result);
    }
} 
===FILE: C:\Users\navib\Desktop\development\NC\nodecraft\src\main\java\com\nodecraft\nodesystem\nodes\animation\transforms\AnimateScaleNode.java===
package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.animation.transforms;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;

import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.HashMap;
import java.util.HashSet;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;
import java.util.Set;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Animate Scale Node: 鍔ㄧ敾缂╂斁鑺傜偣
 * 浠庤酱蹇冪偣缂╂斁鍑犱綍浣擄紝澶勭悊鏂瑰潡鐨勯噸鍙犲拰娑堝け
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "animation.transforms.animate_scale",
    displayName = "Animate Scale",
    description = "浠庤酱蹇冪偣缂╂斁鍑犱綍浣?,
    category = "animation.transforms"
)
public class AnimateScaleNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_GEOMETRY_ID = "input_geometry";
    private static final String INPUT_PIVOT_ID = "input_pivot";
    private static final String INPUT_START_SCALE_ID = "input_start_scale";
    private static final String INPUT_END_SCALE_ID = "input_end_scale";
    private static final String INPUT_FACTOR_ID = "input_factor";
    private static final String INPUT_UNIFORM_SCALE_ID = "input_uniform_scale";
    private static final String INPUT_SCALE_X_ID = "input_scale_x";
    private static final String INPUT_SCALE_Y_ID = "input_scale_y";
    private static final String INPUT_SCALE_Z_ID = "input_scale_z";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_TRANSFORMED_GEOMETRY_ID = "output_transformed_geometry";
    
    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public AnimateScaleNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "animation.transforms.animate_scale");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_GEOMETRY_ID, "Geometry", "闇€瑕佸彉鎹㈢殑鍑犱綍浣擄紙鍧愭爣鍒楄〃锛?, NodeDataType.LIST, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_PIVOT_ID, "Pivot", "缂╂斁杞村績鐐?, NodeDataType.VECTOR, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_START_SCALE_ID, "Start Scale", "璧峰缂╂斁姣斾緥", NodeDataType.FLOAT, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_END_SCALE_ID, "End Scale", "缁撴潫缂╂斁姣斾緥", NodeDataType.FLOAT, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_FACTOR_ID, "Factor", "鍔ㄧ敾杩涘害鍥犲瓙锛?-1锛?, NodeDataType.FLOAT, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_UNIFORM_SCALE_ID, "Uniform Scale", "鏄惁缁熶竴缂╂斁鎵€鏈夎酱", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_SCALE_X_ID, "Scale X", "X杞寸缉鏀炬瘮渚嬶紙浠呴潪缁熶竴缂╂斁鏃朵娇鐢級", NodeDataType.FLOAT, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_SCALE_Y_ID, "Scale Y", "Y杞寸缉鏀炬瘮渚嬶紙浠呴潪缁熶竴缂╂斁鏃朵娇鐢級", NodeDataType.FLOAT, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_SCALE_Z_ID, "Scale Z", "Z杞寸缉鏀炬瘮渚嬶紙浠呴潪缁熶竴缂╂斁鏃朵娇鐢級", NodeDataType.FLOAT, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_TRANSFORMED_GEOMETRY_ID, "Transformed Geometry", "鍙樻崲鍚庣殑鍑犱綍浣?, NodeDataType.LIST, this));
    }
    
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "浠庤酱蹇冪偣缂╂斁鍑犱綍浣?;
    }

    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object geometryObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_GEOMETRY_ID);
        float[] pivot = (float[]) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_PIVOT_ID, new float[]{0.0f, 0.0f, 0.0f});
        Float startScale = (Float) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_START_SCALE_ID, 1.0f);
        Float endScale = (Float) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_END_SCALE_ID, 2.0f);
        Float factor = (Float) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_FACTOR_ID, 0.0f);
        Boolean uniformScale = (Boolean) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_UNIFORM_SCALE_ID, true);
        
        // 纭繚鎻掑€煎洜瀛愬湪0-1鑼冨洿鍐?
        factor = Math.max(0.0f, Math.min(1.0f, factor));
        
        // 纭繚浣嶇疆鍚戦噺鏈夋晥
        if (pivot.length < 3) pivot = new float[]{0.0f, 0.0f, 0.0f};
        
        // 璁＄畻褰撳墠缂╂斁姣斾緥
        float currentScale = startScale + (endScale - startScale) * factor;
        
        // 闈炵粺涓€缂╂斁鏃剁殑鍚勮酱缂╂斁姣斾緥
        float[] scaleFactors = new float[3];
        if (uniformScale) {
            scaleFactors[0] = scaleFactors[1] = scaleFactors[2] = currentScale;
        } else {
            Float scaleX = (Float) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_SCALE_X_ID, 1.0f);
            Float scaleY = (Float) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_SCALE_Y_ID, 1.0f);
            Float scaleZ = (Float) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_SCALE_Z_ID, 1.0f);
            
            scaleFactors[0] = startScale + (scaleX - startScale) * factor;
            scaleFactors[1] = startScale + (scaleY - startScale) * factor;
            scaleFactors[2] = startScale + (scaleZ - startScale) * factor;
        }
        
        // 鍙樻崲鍑犱綍浣?
        List<int[]> transformedGeometry = transformGeometry(geometryObj, pivot, scaleFactors);
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_TRANSFORMED_GEOMETRY_ID, transformedGeometry);
    }
    
    /**
     * 鍙樻崲鍑犱綍浣?
     * @param geometryObj 杈撳叆鍑犱綍浣擄紙鍧愭爣鍒楄〃锛?
     * @param pivot 缂╂斁杞村績鐐?
     * @param scaleFactors 鍚勮酱缂╂斁姣斾緥[x,y,z]
     * @return 鍙樻崲鍚庣殑鍑犱綍浣?
     */
    @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
    private List<int[]> transformGeometry(Object geometryObj, float[] pivot, float[] scaleFactors) {
        // 浣跨敤Set瀛樺偍鍙樻崲鍚庣殑鍧愭爣锛岄槻姝㈤噸澶?
        Set<String> uniqueCoords = new HashSet<>();
        List<int[]> result = new ArrayList<>();
        
        // 纭繚鍑犱綍浣撴槸鏈夋晥鐨勫潗鏍囧垪琛?
        if (geometryObj instanceof List) {
            List<?> geometryList = (List<?>) geometryObj;
            
            // 棣栧厛鏀堕泦鎵€鏈夊師濮嬪潗鏍?
            List<float[]> originalCoords = new ArrayList<>();
            for (Object coordObj : geometryList) {
                float[] coord = getCoordinateAsFloatArray(coordObj);
                if (coord != null) {
                    originalCoords.add(coord);
                }
            }
            
            // 瀵规瘡涓潗鏍囧簲鐢ㄧ缉鏀惧彉鎹?
            for (float[] coord : originalCoords) {
                int[] scaledCoord = scaleCoordinate(coord, pivot, scaleFactors);
                
                // 浣跨敤瀛楃涓茶〃绀烘潵妫€鏌ラ噸澶?
                String coordKey = scaledCoord[0] + "," + scaledCoord[1] + "," + scaledCoord[2];
                if (!uniqueCoords.contains(coordKey)) {
                    uniqueCoords.add(coordKey);
                    result.add(scaledCoord);
                }
            }
            
            // 濡傛灉缂╂斁浣垮緱鏂瑰潡娑堝け锛堢缉灏忥級鎴栭噸鍙狅紙鏀惧ぇ锛夛紝闇€瑕佺壒娈婂鐞?
            handleVoxelScaling(originalCoords, pivot, scaleFactors, uniqueCoords, result);
        }
        
        return result;
    }
    
    /**
     * 澶勭悊浣撶礌鍖栫缉鏀剧殑鐗规畩鎯呭喌
     * 1. 缂╁皬鍙兘瀵艰嚧鏂瑰潡娑堝け
     * 2. 鏀惧ぇ鍙兘瀵艰嚧鏂瑰潡涔嬮棿鍑虹幇绌洪殭
     */
    private void handleVoxelScaling(List<float[]> originalCoords, float[] pivot, float[] scaleFactors, 
                                   Set<String> uniqueCoords, List<int[]> result) {
        // 鍒ゆ柇鏄斁澶ц繕鏄缉灏?
        boolean isEnlarging = scaleFactors[0] > 1.0f || scaleFactors[1] > 1.0f || scaleFactors[2] > 1.0f;
        
        if (isEnlarging) {
            // 澶勭悊鏀惧ぇ鏃跺彲鑳藉嚭鐜扮殑绌洪殭
            fillGaps(originalCoords, pivot, scaleFactors, uniqueCoords, result);
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * 濉厖鏀惧ぇ鏃跺彲鑳藉嚭鐜扮殑绌洪殭
     */
    private void fillGaps(List<float[]> originalCoords, float[] pivot, float[] scaleFactors, 
                         Set<String> uniqueCoords, List<int[]> result) {
        // 瀵绘壘鏈€澶х缉鏀惧洜瀛?
        float maxScale = Math.max(Math.max(scaleFactors[0], scaleFactors[1]), scaleFactors[2]);
        
        // 濡傛灉鏈€澶х缉鏀惧洜瀛愬皬浜?.5锛岄€氬父涓嶉渶瑕佸～鍏呯┖闅?
        if (maxScale < 1.5f) return;
        
        // 瀵逛簬姣忎竴瀵圭浉閭荤殑鍘熷鏂瑰潡锛屾鏌ュ畠浠箣闂存槸鍚︽湁绌洪殭
        for (int i = 0; i < originalCoords.size(); i++) {
            for (int j = i + 1; j < originalCoords.size(); j++) {
                float[] coordA = originalCoords.get(i);
                float[] coordB = originalCoords.get(j);
                
                // 妫€鏌ヤ袱涓柟鍧楁槸鍚︾浉閭伙紙鏇煎搱椤胯窛绂讳负1锛?
                int manhattanDistance = 
                    Math.abs(Math.round(coordA[0]) - Math.round(coordB[0])) +
                    Math.abs(Math.round(coordA[1]) - Math.round(coordB[1])) +
                    Math.abs(Math.round(coordA[2]) - Math.round(coordB[2]));
                
                if (manhattanDistance == 1) {
                    // 鐩搁偦鏂瑰潡锛屾鏌ュ畠浠缉鏀惧悗鏄惁鏈夌┖闅?
                    int[] scaledCoordA = scaleCoordinate(coordA, pivot, scaleFactors);
                    int[] scaledCoordB = scaleCoordinate(coordB, pivot, scaleFactors);
                    
                    // 璁＄畻缂╂斁鍚庣殑鏇煎搱椤胯窛绂?
                    int scaledDistance = 
                        Math.abs(scaledCoordA[0] - scaledCoordB[0]) +
                        Math.abs(scaledCoordA[1] - scaledCoordB[1]) +
                        Math.abs(scaledCoordA[2] - scaledCoordB[2]);
                    
                    // 濡傛灉缂╂斁鍚庤窛绂诲ぇ浜?锛岄渶瑕佸～鍏呯┖闅?
                    if (scaledDistance > 1) {
                        fillLine(scaledCoordA, scaledCoordB, uniqueCoords, result);
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * 鍦ㄤ袱鐐逛箣闂村～鍏呯嚎娈?
     */
    private void fillLine(int[] start, int[] end, Set<String> uniqueCoords, List<int[]> result) {
        // 纭畾姣忎釜杞寸殑鏂瑰悜鍜屾鏁?
        int dx = Integer.compare(end[0], start[0]);
        int dy = Integer.compare(end[1], start[1]);
        int dz = Integer.compare(end[2], start[2]);
        
        // 褰撳墠浣嶇疆
        int x = start[0];
        int y = start[1];
        int z = start[2];
        
        // 濉厖鐩寸嚎涓婄殑鎵€鏈夌偣
        while (x != end[0] || y != end[1] || z != end[2]) {
            // 浼樺厛绉诲姩璺濈杈冨ぇ鐨勮酱
            int distX = Math.abs(end[0] - x);
            int distY = Math.abs(end[1] - y);
            int distZ = Math.abs(end[2] - z);
            
            if (distX >= distY && distX >= distZ && x != end[0]) {
                x += dx;
            } else if (distY >= distX && distY >= distZ && y != end[1]) {
                y += dy;
            } else if (z != end[2]) {
                z += dz;
            }
            
            // 娣诲姞鏂扮偣锛堥伩鍏嶉噸澶嶏級
            String coordKey = x + "," + y + "," + z;
            if (!uniqueCoords.contains(coordKey)) {
                uniqueCoords.add(coordKey);
                result.add(new int[]{x, y, z});
            }
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * 缂╂斁鍗曚釜鍧愭爣
     * @param coord 鍘熷鍧愭爣[x,y,z]
     * @param pivot 缂╂斁杞村績鐐筟x,y,z]
     * @param scaleFactors 鍚勮酱缂╂斁姣斾緥[x,y,z]
     * @return 缂╂斁鍚庣殑鍧愭爣
     */
    private int[] scaleCoordinate(float[] coord, float[] pivot, float[] scaleFactors) {
        float[] scaled = new float[3];
        
        // 搴旂敤缂╂斁鍏紡: newPos = pivot + (pos - pivot) * scale
        for (int i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
            scaled[i] = pivot[i] + (coord[i] - pivot[i]) * scaleFactors[i];
        }
        
        // 灏嗘诞鐐瑰潗鏍囪浆鎹负鏁存暟鍧愭爣锛堝洓鑸嶄簲鍏ワ級
        return new int[]{
            Math.round(scaled[0]),
            Math.round(scaled[1]),
            Math.round(scaled[2])
        };
    }
    
    /**
     * 灏嗗潗鏍囧璞¤浆鎹负娴偣鏁扮粍
     * @param coordObj 鍧愭爣瀵硅薄
     * @return 娴偣鏁扮粍[x, y, z]
     */
    private float[] getCoordinateAsFloatArray(Object coordObj) {
        // 澶勭悊int[]鏍煎紡鐨勫潗鏍?
        if (coordObj instanceof int[]) {
            int[] coord = (int[]) coordObj;
            if (coord.length >= 3) {
                return new float[]{
                    (float) coord[0],
                    (float) coord[1],
                    (float) coord[2]
                };
            }
        }
        // 澶勭悊鍖呭惈x,y,z瀛楁鐨勫璞★紙濡侰oordinate绫伙級
        else if (coordObj instanceof Map) {
            try {
                @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
                Map<String, Object> coordMap = (Map<String, Object>) coordObj;
                
                if (coordMap.containsKey("x") && coordMap.containsKey("y") && coordMap.containsKey("z")) {
                    float x = ((Number) coordMap.get("x")).floatValue();
                    float y = ((Number) coordMap.get("y")).floatValue();
                    float z = ((Number) coordMap.get("z")).floatValue();
                    
                    return new float[]{x, y, z};
                }
            } catch (Exception e) {
                // 澶勭悊澶辫触锛岃繑鍥瀗ull
                return null;
            }
        }
        
        return null;
    }
} 
===FILE: C:\Users\navib\Desktop\development\NC\nodecraft\src\main\java\com\nodecraft\nodesystem\nodes\animation\transforms\AnimateTranslateNode.java===
package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.animation.transforms;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;

import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Animate Translate Node: 鍔ㄧ敾骞崇Щ鑺傜偣
 * 鍦ㄤ袱涓綅缃箣闂村钩绉诲嚑浣曚綋
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "animation.transforms.animate_translate",
    displayName = "Animate Translate",
    description = "鍦ㄤ袱涓綅缃箣闂村钩绉诲嚑浣曚綋",
    category = "animation.transforms"
)
public class AnimateTranslateNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_GEOMETRY_ID = "input_geometry";
    private static final String INPUT_START_POS_ID = "input_start_pos";
    private static final String INPUT_END_POS_ID = "input_end_pos";
    private static final String INPUT_FACTOR_ID = "input_factor";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_TRANSFORMED_GEOMETRY_ID = "output_transformed_geometry";
    
    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public AnimateTranslateNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "animation.transforms.animate_translate");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_GEOMETRY_ID, "Geometry", "闇€瑕佸彉鎹㈢殑鍑犱綍浣擄紙鍧愭爣鍒楄〃锛?, NodeDataType.LIST, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_START_POS_ID, "Start Position", "璧峰浣嶇疆", NodeDataType.VECTOR, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_END_POS_ID, "End Position", "缁撴潫浣嶇疆", NodeDataType.VECTOR, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_FACTOR_ID, "Factor", "鍔ㄧ敾杩涘害鍥犲瓙锛?-1锛?, NodeDataType.FLOAT, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_TRANSFORMED_GEOMETRY_ID, "Transformed Geometry", "鍙樻崲鍚庣殑鍑犱綍浣?, NodeDataType.LIST, this));
    }
    
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "鍦ㄤ袱涓綅缃箣闂村钩绉诲嚑浣曚綋";
    }

    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object geometryObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_GEOMETRY_ID);
        float[] startPos = (float[]) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_START_POS_ID, new float[]{0.0f, 0.0f, 0.0f});
        float[] endPos = (float[]) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_END_POS_ID, new float[]{0.0f, 0.0f, 0.0f});
        Float factor = (Float) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_FACTOR_ID, 0.0f);
        
        // 纭繚鎻掑€煎洜瀛愬湪0-1鑼冨洿鍐?
        factor = Math.max(0.0f, Math.min(1.0f, factor));
        
        // 纭繚浣嶇疆鍚戦噺鏈夋晥
        if (startPos.length < 3) startPos = new float[]{0.0f, 0.0f, 0.0f};
        if (endPos.length < 3) endPos = new float[]{0.0f, 0.0f, 0.0f};
        
        // 璁＄畻褰撳墠浣嶇疆
        float[] currentPos = new float[3];
        for (int i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
            currentPos[i] = startPos[i] + (endPos[i] - startPos[i]) * factor;
        }
        
        // 璁＄畻鍋忕Щ閲忥紙浠庡師鐐瑰紑濮嬶級
        float[] offset = currentPos;
        
        // 鍙樻崲鍑犱綍浣?
        List<int[]> transformedGeometry = transformGeometry(geometryObj, offset);
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_TRANSFORMED_GEOMETRY_ID, transformedGeometry);
    }
    
    /**
     * 鍙樻崲鍑犱綍浣?
     * @param geometryObj 杈撳叆鍑犱綍浣擄紙鍧愭爣鍒楄〃锛?
     * @param offset 鍋忕Щ閲?
     * @return 鍙樻崲鍚庣殑鍑犱綍浣?
     */
    @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
    private List<int[]> transformGeometry(Object geometryObj, float[] offset) {
        List<int[]> result = new ArrayList<>();
        
        // 纭繚鍑犱綍浣撴槸鏈夋晥鐨勫潗鏍囧垪琛?
        if (geometryObj instanceof List) {
            List<?> geometryList = (List<?>) geometryObj;
            
            for (Object coordObj : geometryList) {
                int[] transformedCoord = transformCoordinate(coordObj, offset);
                if (transformedCoord != null) {
                    result.add(transformedCoord);
                }
            }
        }
        
        return result;
    }
    
    /**
     * 鍙樻崲鍗曚釜鍧愭爣
     * @param coordObj 鍧愭爣瀵硅薄
     * @param offset 鍋忕Щ閲?
     * @return 鍙樻崲鍚庣殑鍧愭爣
     */
    private int[] transformCoordinate(Object coordObj, float[] offset) {
        // 澶勭悊int[]鏍煎紡鐨勫潗鏍?
        if (coordObj instanceof int[]) {
            int[] coord = (int[]) coordObj;
            if (coord.length >= 3) {
                return new int[]{
                    coord[0] + Math.round(offset[0]),
                    coord[1] + Math.round(offset[1]),
                    coord[2] + Math.round(offset[2])
                };
            }
        }
        // 澶勭悊鍖呭惈x,y,z瀛楁鐨勫璞★紙濡侰oordinate绫伙級
        else if (coordObj instanceof Map) {
            try {
                @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
                Map<String, Object> coordMap = (Map<String, Object>) coordObj;
                
                if (coordMap.containsKey("x") && coordMap.containsKey("y") && coordMap.containsKey("z")) {
                    int x = ((Number) coordMap.get("x")).intValue() + Math.round(offset[0]);
                    int y = ((Number) coordMap.get("y")).intValue() + Math.round(offset[1]);
                    int z = ((Number) coordMap.get("z")).intValue() + Math.round(offset[2]);
                    
                    return new int[]{x, y, z};
                }
            } catch (Exception e) {
                // 澶勭悊澶辫触锛岃繑鍥瀗ull
                return null;
            }
        }
        
        return null;
    }
} 
===FILE: C:\Users\navib\Desktop\development\NC\nodecraft\src\main\java\com\nodecraft\nodesystem\nodes\animation\transforms\AnimateTwistNode.java===
package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.animation.transforms;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;

import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Animate Twist Node: 鍔ㄧ敾鎵洸鑺傜偣
 * 娌胯酱绾挎壄鏇插嚑浣曚綋
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "animation.transforms.animate_twist",
    displayName = "Animate Twist",
    description = "娌胯酱绾挎壄鏇插嚑浣曚綋",
    category = "animation.transforms"
)
public class AnimateTwistNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_GEOMETRY_ID = "input_geometry";
    private static final String INPUT_AXIS_ID = "input_axis";
    private static final String INPUT_AXIS_ORIGIN_ID = "input_axis_origin";
    private static final String INPUT_START_ANGLE_ID = "input_start_angle";
    private static final String INPUT_END_ANGLE_ID = "input_end_angle";
    private static final String INPUT_FACTOR_ID = "input_factor";
    private static final String INPUT_FALLOFF_ID = "input_falloff";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_TRANSFORMED_GEOMETRY_ID = "output_transformed_geometry";
    
    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public AnimateTwistNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "animation.transforms.animate_twist");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_GEOMETRY_ID, "Geometry", "闇€瑕佸彉鎹㈢殑鍑犱綍浣擄紙鍧愭爣鍒楄〃锛?, NodeDataType.LIST, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_AXIS_ID, "Axis", "鎵洸杞存柟鍚?, NodeDataType.VECTOR, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_AXIS_ORIGIN_ID, "Axis Origin", "鎵洸杞磋捣鐐?, NodeDataType.VECTOR, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_START_ANGLE_ID, "Start Angle", "璧峰鎵洸瑙掑害锛堝害锛?, NodeDataType.FLOAT, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_END_ANGLE_ID, "End Angle", "缁撴潫鎵洸瑙掑害锛堝害锛?, NodeDataType.FLOAT, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_FACTOR_ID, "Factor", "鍔ㄧ敾杩涘害鍥犲瓙锛?-1锛?, NodeDataType.FLOAT, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_FALLOFF_ID, "Falloff", "鎵洸琛板噺鍥犲瓙锛堣窛绂昏酱瓒婅繙锛屾壄鏇茶秺灏忥級", NodeDataType.FLOAT, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_TRANSFORMED_GEOMETRY_ID, "Transformed Geometry", "鍙樻崲鍚庣殑鍑犱綍浣?, NodeDataType.LIST, this));
    }
    
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "娌胯酱绾挎壄鏇插嚑浣曚綋";
    }

    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object geometryObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_GEOMETRY_ID);
        float[] axis = (float[]) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_AXIS_ID, new float[]{0.0f, 1.0f, 0.0f}); // 榛樿Y杞?
        float[] axisOrigin = (float[]) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_AXIS_ORIGIN_ID, new float[]{0.0f, 0.0f, 0.0f});
        Float startAngle = (Float) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_START_ANGLE_ID, 0.0f);
        Float endAngle = (Float) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_END_ANGLE_ID, 90.0f);
        Float factor = (Float) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_FACTOR_ID, 0.0f);
        Float falloff = (Float) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_FALLOFF_ID, 0.0f);
        
        // 纭繚鎻掑€煎洜瀛愬湪0-1鑼冨洿鍐?
        factor = Math.max(0.0f, Math.min(1.0f, factor));
        
        // 纭繚鍚戦噺鏈夋晥
        if (axis.length < 3) axis = new float[]{0.0f, 1.0f, 0.0f};
        if (axisOrigin.length < 3) axisOrigin = new float[]{0.0f, 0.0f, 0.0f};
        
        // 褰掍竴鍖栨壄鏇茶酱
        normalizeVector(axis);
        
        // 璁＄畻褰撳墠鎵洸瑙掑害锛堝害锛?
        float currentAngle = startAngle + (endAngle - startAngle) * factor;
        
        // 灏嗚搴﹁浆鎹负寮у害
        float angleRadians = (float) Math.toRadians(currentAngle);
        
        // 鍙樻崲鍑犱綍浣?
        List<int[]> transformedGeometry = transformGeometry(geometryObj, axisOrigin, axis, angleRadians, falloff);
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_TRANSFORMED_GEOMETRY_ID, transformedGeometry);
    }
    
    /**
     * 鍙樻崲鍑犱綍浣?
     */
    @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
    private List<int[]> transformGeometry(Object geometryObj, float[] axisOrigin, float[] axis, float angle, float falloff) {
        List<int[]> result = new ArrayList<>();
        
        if (geometryObj instanceof List) {
            List<?> geometryList = (List<?>) geometryObj;
            
            for (Object coordObj : geometryList) {
                float[] coord = getCoordinateAsFloatArray(coordObj);
                if (coord != null) {
                    // 鎵洸鍧愭爣
                    int[] transformedCoord = twistCoordinate(coord, axisOrigin, axis, angle, falloff);
                    result.add(transformedCoord);
                }
            }
        }
        
        return result;
    }
    
    /**
     * 鎵洸鍗曚釜鍧愭爣
     */
    private int[] twistCoordinate(float[] coord, float[] axisOrigin, float[] axis, float angle, float falloff) {
        // 姝ラ1: 璁＄畻鐐瑰埌杞寸殑鎶曞奖鐐?
        float[] projection = projectPointOnLine(coord, axisOrigin, axis);
        
        // 姝ラ2: 璁＄畻浠庢姇褰辩偣鍒板疄闄呯偣鐨勫悜閲?
        float[] radialVector = new float[3];
        for (int i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
            radialVector[i] = coord[i] - projection[i];
        }
        
        // 姝ラ3: 璁＄畻寰勫悜鍚戦噺鐨勯暱搴︼紙璺濈杞寸殑璺濈锛?
        float radialDistance = length(radialVector);
        
        // 濡傛灉鐐瑰湪杞翠笂鎴栭潪甯告帴杩戣酱锛屽垯涓嶉渶瑕佹壄鏇?
        if (radialDistance < 0.0001f) {
            return new int[]{Math.round(coord[0]), Math.round(coord[1]), Math.round(coord[2])};
        }
        
        // 姝ラ4: 璁＄畻鎶曞奖鐐瑰埌杞村師鐐圭殑璺濈锛堟部杞寸殑浣嶇疆锛?
        float[] axisVector = new float[3];
        for (int i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
            axisVector[i] = projection[i] - axisOrigin[i];
        }
        float axisDistance = dotProduct(axisVector, axis);
        
        // 姝ラ5: 璁＄畻瀹為檯鎵洸瑙掑害锛堣€冭檻琛板噺鍜屾部杞寸殑浣嶇疆锛?
        float twistAmount = angle;
        
        // 鑰冭檻璺濈琛板噺锛堝彲閫夛級
        if (falloff > 0.0001f) {
            // 琛板噺鍏紡锛氫娇鐢ㄦ寚鏁拌“鍑忥紝璺濈瓒婅繙锛屾壄鏇叉晥鏋滆秺灏?
            twistAmount *= (float) Math.exp(-radialDistance / falloff);
        }
        
        // 鏍规嵁娌胯酱鐨勪綅缃皟鏁存壄鏇茶搴︼紙绾挎€ф彃鍊硷紝瓒婅繙鎵洸瓒婂ぇ锛?
        twistAmount *= Math.abs(axisDistance);
        
        // 姝ラ6: 褰掍竴鍖栧緞鍚戝悜閲忥紝浣滀负鏃嬭浆骞抽潰鐨勪竴閮ㄥ垎
        float[] radialDir = new float[3];
        for (int i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
            radialDir[i] = radialVector[i] / radialDistance;
        }
        
        // 姝ラ7: 璁＄畻鍨傜洿浜庤酱鍜屽緞鍚戝悜閲忕殑绗簩涓柟鍚戝悜閲忥紝褰㈡垚鏃嬭浆骞抽潰
        float[] tangentDir = crossProduct(axis, radialDir);
        normalizeVector(tangentDir);
        
        // 姝ラ8: 鍦ㄦ棆杞钩闈㈠唴鏃嬭浆寰勫悜鍚戦噺
        float cosAngle = (float) Math.cos(twistAmount);
        float sinAngle = (float) Math.sin(twistAmount);
        
        float[] twistedRadialVector = new float[3];
        for (int i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
            twistedRadialVector[i] = radialDistance * (radialDir[i] * cosAngle + tangentDir[i] * sinAngle);
        }
        
        // 姝ラ9: 浠庢姇褰辩偣娣诲姞鎵洸鍚庣殑寰勫悜鍚戦噺锛屽緱鍒版渶缁堢偣
        float[] twistedCoord = new float[3];
        for (int i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
            twistedCoord[i] = projection[i] + twistedRadialVector[i];
        }
        
        // 姝ラ10: 杞崲涓烘暣鏁板潗鏍囧苟杩斿洖
        return new int[]{
            Math.round(twistedCoord[0]),
            Math.round(twistedCoord[1]),
            Math.round(twistedCoord[2])
        };
    }
    
    /**
     * 璁＄畻鐐瑰埌鐩寸嚎鐨勬姇褰辩偣
     */
    private float[] projectPointOnLine(float[] point, float[] lineOrigin, float[] lineDirection) {
        // 璁＄畻浠庣洿绾垮師鐐瑰埌鐐圭殑鍚戦噺
        float[] toPoint = new float[3];
        for (int i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
            toPoint[i] = point[i] - lineOrigin[i];
        }
        
        // 璁＄畻鍚戦噺鍦ㄧ洿绾挎柟鍚戜笂鐨勬姇褰遍暱搴?
        float projectionLength = dotProduct(toPoint, lineDirection);
        
        // 璁＄畻鎶曞奖鐐?
        float[] projectionPoint = new float[3];
        for (int i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
            projectionPoint[i] = lineOrigin[i] + lineDirection[i] * projectionLength;
        }
        
        return projectionPoint;
    }
    
    /**
     * 鍚戦噺鐐圭Н
     */
    private float dotProduct(float[] v1, float[] v2) {
        return v1[0] * v2[0] + v1[1] * v2[1] + v1[2] * v2[2];
    }
    
    /**
     * 鍚戦噺鍙夌Н
     */
    private float[] crossProduct(float[] v1, float[] v2) {
        return new float[]{
            v1[1] * v2[2] - v1[2] * v2[1],
            v1[2] * v2[0] - v1[0] * v2[2],
            v1[0] * v2[1] - v1[1] * v2[0]
        };
    }
    
    /**
     * 鍚戦噺闀垮害
     */
    private float length(float[] v) {
        return (float) Math.sqrt(v[0] * v[0] + v[1] * v[1] + v[2] * v[2]);
    }
    
    /**
     * 褰掍竴鍖栧悜閲?
     */
    private void normalizeVector(float[] v) {
        float length = length(v);
        
        // 闃叉闄や互闆?
        if (length > 0.0001f) {
            v[0] /= length;
            v[1] /= length;
            v[2] /= length;
        } else {
            // 濡傛灉鍚戦噺闀垮害涓?锛岃缃负榛樿Y杞?
            v[0] = 0.0f;
            v[1] = 1.0f;
            v[2] = 0.0f;
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * 灏嗗潗鏍囧璞¤浆鎹负娴偣鏁扮粍
     */
    private float[] getCoordinateAsFloatArray(Object coordObj) {
        // 澶勭悊int[]鏍煎紡鐨勫潗鏍?
        if (coordObj instanceof int[]) {
            int[] coord = (int[]) coordObj;
            if (coord.length >= 3) {
                return new float[]{
                    (float) coord[0],
                    (float) coord[1],
                    (float) coord[2]
                };
            }
        }
        // 澶勭悊鍖呭惈x,y,z瀛楁鐨勫璞★紙濡侰oordinate绫伙級
        else if (coordObj instanceof Map) {
            try {
                @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
                Map<String, Object> coordMap = (Map<String, Object>) coordObj;
                
                if (coordMap.containsKey("x") && coordMap.containsKey("y") && coordMap.containsKey("z")) {
                    float x = ((Number) coordMap.get("x")).floatValue();
                    float y = ((Number) coordMap.get("y")).floatValue();
                    float z = ((Number) coordMap.get("z")).floatValue();
                    
                    return new float[]{x, y, z};
                }
            } catch (Exception e) {
                // 澶勭悊澶辫触锛岃繑鍥瀗ull
                return null;
            }
        }
        
        return null;
    }
} 
===FILE: C:\Users\navib\Desktop\development\NC\nodecraft\src\main\java\com\nodecraft\nodesystem\nodes\animation\transforms\AnimateVisibilityNode.java===
package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.animation.transforms;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.util.BlockPosList;

import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import net.minecraft.util.math.BlockPos;
import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.Collections;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Random;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Animate Visibility: 鍙鎬у姩鐢昏妭鐐?
 * 浣挎柟鍧楅€愭笎鍑虹幇鎴栨秷澶?
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "animation.properties.animate_visibility",
    displayName = "Animate Visibility",
    description = "浣挎柟鍧楅€愭笎鍑虹幇鎴栨秷澶?,
    category = "animation.properties"
)
public class AnimateVisibilityNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_TARGET_BLOCKS_ID = "input_target_blocks";
    private static final String INPUT_TIME_FACTOR_ID = "input_time_factor";
    private static final String INPUT_FADE_DURATION_ID = "input_fade_duration";
    private static final String INPUT_MODE_ID = "input_mode";
    private static final String INPUT_PATTERN_ID = "input_pattern";
    private static final String INPUT_SEED_ID = "input_seed";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_VISIBLE_BLOCKS_ID = "output_visible_blocks";
    private static final String OUTPUT_PROGRESS_ID = "output_progress";

    // --- 娣″叆娣″嚭妯″紡鏋氫妇 ---
    public enum VisibilityMode {
        APPEAR(0, "Appear", "浠庢棤鍒版湁"),
        DISAPPEAR(1, "Disappear", "浠庢湁鍒版棤");
        
        private final int id;
        private final String name;
        private final String description;
        
        VisibilityMode(int id, String name, String description) {
            this.id = id;
            this.name = name;
            this.description = description;
        }
        
        public static VisibilityMode fromId(int id) {
            return id == 1 ? DISAPPEAR : APPEAR;
        }
    }
    
    // --- 鍑虹幇妯″紡鏋氫妇 ---
    public enum AppearancePattern {
        RANDOM(0, "Random", "闅忔満椤哄簭"),
        BOTTOM_UP(1, "Bottom Up", "浠庝笅鍒颁笂"),
        TOP_DOWN(2, "Top Down", "浠庝笂鍒颁笅"),
        CENTER_OUT(3, "Center Out", "浠庝腑蹇冨悜澶?),
        OUTSIDE_IN(4, "Outside In", "浠庡鍚戜腑蹇?),
        LEFT_RIGHT(5, "Left to Right", "浠庡乏鍒板彸"),
        RIGHT_LEFT(6, "Right to Left", "浠庡彸鍒板乏"),
        FRONT_BACK(7, "Front to Back", "浠庡墠鍒板悗"),
        BACK_FRONT(8, "Back to Front", "浠庡悗鍒板墠");
        
        private final int id;
        private final String name;
        private final String description;
        
        AppearancePattern(int id, String name, String description) {
            this.id = id;
            this.name = name;
            this.description = description;
        }
        
        public static AppearancePattern fromId(int id) {
            for (AppearancePattern pattern : values()) {
                if (pattern.id == id) {
                    return pattern;
                }
            }
            return RANDOM;
        }
    }

    // --- 鐘舵€佸彉閲?---
    private Random random = new Random();
    private List<BlockPos> sortedBlocks = null;
    private UUID lastInputId = null;

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public AnimateVisibilityNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "animation.properties.animate_visibility");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_TARGET_BLOCKS_ID, "Target Blocks", "鐩爣鏂瑰潡鍧愭爣鍒楄〃", NodeDataType.BLOCK_LIST, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_TIME_FACTOR_ID, "Time Factor", "鏃堕棿鍥犲瓙 (0-1)", NodeDataType.FLOAT, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_FADE_DURATION_ID, "Fade Duration", "娣″叆娣″嚭鎸佺画鏃堕棿", NodeDataType.FLOAT, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_MODE_ID, "Mode", "妯″紡 (0=鍑虹幇, 1=娑堝け)", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_PATTERN_ID, "Pattern", "鍑虹幇/娑堝け妯″紡 (0-8)", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_SEED_ID, "Seed", "闅忔満绉嶅瓙", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_VISIBLE_BLOCKS_ID, "Visible Blocks", "褰撳墠鍙鐨勬柟鍧楀潗鏍囧垪琛?, NodeDataType.BLOCK_LIST, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_PROGRESS_ID, "Progress", "褰撳墠杩涘害 (0-1)", NodeDataType.FLOAT, this));
    }
    
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "浣挎柟鍧楅€愭笎鍑虹幇鎴栨秷澶?;
    }

    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        BlockPosList targetBlocks = (BlockPosList) inputValues.get(INPUT_TARGET_BLOCKS_ID);
        Float timeFactor = (Float) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_TIME_FACTOR_ID, 0.0f);
        Float fadeDuration = (Float) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_FADE_DURATION_ID, 1.0f);
        Integer modeId = (Integer) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_MODE_ID, 0);
        Integer patternId = (Integer) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_PATTERN_ID, 0);
        Integer seed = (Integer) inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_SEED_ID, 0);
        
        // 纭繚鏃堕棿鍥犲瓙鍦╗0,1]鑼冨洿鍐?
        timeFactor = Math.max(0f, Math.min(1f, timeFactor));
        
        // 纭繚娣″叆娣″嚭鎸佺画鏃堕棿涓烘鏁?
        fadeDuration = Math.max(0.01f, fadeDuration);
        
        // 鑾峰彇妯″紡鍜屾ā寮?
        VisibilityMode mode = VisibilityMode.fromId(modeId);
        AppearancePattern pattern = AppearancePattern.fromId(patternId);
        
        // 榛樿杈撳嚭
        BlockPosList visibleBlocks = null;
        float progress = 0.0f;
        
        // 濡傛灉鐩爣鍧椾负绌猴紝鍒欒緭鍑虹┖鍊?
        if (targetBlocks == null || targetBlocks.isEmpty()) {
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_VISIBLE_BLOCKS_ID, null);
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_PROGRESS_ID, progress);
            return;
        }
        
        // 妫€鏌ヨ緭鍏ユ槸鍚︽敼鍙橈紙閫氳繃姣旇緝UUID锛夛紝濡傛灉鏀瑰彉鍒欓噸鏂版帓搴?
        UUID currentInputId = UUID.nameUUIDFromBytes((targetBlocks.toString() + seed + patternId).getBytes());
        if (sortedBlocks == null || !currentInputId.equals(lastInputId)) {
            sortBlocks(targetBlocks.getPositions(), pattern, seed);
            lastInputId = currentInputId;
        }
        
        // 璁＄畻褰撳墠搴旇鏄剧ず澶氬皯涓柟鍧?
        int totalBlocks = sortedBlocks.size();
        int visibleCount = Math.round(totalBlocks * timeFactor);
        
        // 鏍规嵁妯″紡璋冩暣鍙鏁伴噺
        if (mode == VisibilityMode.DISAPPEAR) {
            visibleCount = totalBlocks - visibleCount;
        }
        
        // 鍒涘缓鍙鏂瑰潡鍒楄〃
        List<BlockPos> currentVisibleBlocks = new ArrayList<>();
        for (int i = 0; i < visibleCount; i++) {
            currentVisibleBlocks.add(sortedBlocks.get(i));
        }
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        visibleBlocks = new BlockPosList(currentVisibleBlocks);
        progress = (float) visibleCount / totalBlocks;
        if (mode == VisibilityMode.DISAPPEAR) {
            progress = 1 - progress;
        }
        
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_VISIBLE_BLOCKS_ID, visibleBlocks);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_PROGRESS_ID, progress);
    }
    
    /**
     * 鏍规嵁鎸囧畾妯″紡瀵规柟鍧楄繘琛屾帓搴?
     */
    private void sortBlocks(List<BlockPos> blocks, AppearancePattern pattern, int seed) {
        // 鍒涘缓宸ヤ綔鍓湰
        sortedBlocks = new ArrayList<>(blocks);
        
        // 璁＄畻涓績鐐癸紙鐢ㄤ簬鏌愪簺妯″紡锛?
        int minX = Integer.MAX_VALUE, minY = Integer.MAX_VALUE, minZ = Integer.MAX_VALUE;
        int maxX = Integer.MIN_VALUE, maxY = Integer.MIN_VALUE, maxZ = Integer.MIN_VALUE;
        
        for (BlockPos pos : blocks) {
            minX = Math.min(minX, pos.getX());
            minY = Math.min(minY, pos.getY());
            minZ = Math.min(minZ, pos.getZ());
            maxX = Math.max(maxX, pos.getX());
            maxY = Math.max(maxY, pos.getY());
            maxZ = Math.max(maxZ, pos.getZ());
        }
        
        int centerX = (minX + maxX) / 2;
        int centerY = (minY + maxY) / 2;
        int centerZ = (minZ + maxZ) / 2;
        BlockPos center = new BlockPos(centerX, centerY, centerZ);
        
        // 鏍规嵁妯″紡鎺掑簭
        switch (pattern) {
            case RANDOM:
                // 浣跨敤鍥哄畾绉嶅瓙杩涜闅忔満娲楃墝
                random.setSeed(seed);
                Collections.shuffle(sortedBlocks, random);
                break;
                
            case BOTTOM_UP:
                sortedBlocks.sort((a, b) -> a.getY() - b.getY());
                break;
                
            case TOP_DOWN:
                sortedBlocks.sort((a, b) -> b.getY() - a.getY());
                break;
                
            case CENTER_OUT:
                sortedBlocks.sort((a, b) -> {
                    double distA = getDistanceSquared(a, center);
                    double distB = getDistanceSquared(b, center);
                    return Double.compare(distA, distB);
                });
                break;
                
            case OUTSIDE_IN:
                sortedBlocks.sort((a, b) -> {
                    double distA = getDistanceSquared(a, center);
                    double distB = getDistanceSquared(b, center);
                    return Double.compare(distB, distA);
                });
                break;
                
            case LEFT_RIGHT:
                sortedBlocks.sort((a, b) -> a.getX() - b.getX());
                break;
                
            case RIGHT_LEFT:
                sortedBlocks.sort((a, b) -> b.getX() - a.getX());
                break;
                
            case FRONT_BACK:
                sortedBlocks.sort((a, b) -> a.getZ() - b.getZ());
                break;
                
            case BACK_FRONT:
                sortedBlocks.sort((a, b) -> b.getZ() - a.getZ());
                break;
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * 璁＄畻涓や釜鍧愭爣涔嬮棿鐨勮窛绂诲钩鏂?
     */
    private double getDistanceSquared(BlockPos a, BlockPos b) {
        int dx = a.getX() - b.getX();
        int dy = a.getY() - b.getY();
        int dz = a.getZ() - b.getZ();
        return dx * dx + dy * dy + dz * dz;
    }
}

package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.data.conversion;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.IPort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.datatypes.ColorData;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Color to Components 鑺傜偣锛屽皢棰滆壊鎷嗗垎涓篟GBA鍒嗛噺
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "data.conversion.color_to_components",
    displayName = "Color to Components",
    description = "Extracts the RGBA components from a color",
    category = "data.conversion"
)
public class ColorToComponentsNode extends BaseNode {
    
    // --- 鑺傜偣灞炴€?---
    private boolean outputFloatValues = true; // 鏄惁杈撳嚭娴偣鍊?(0.0-1.0) 杩樻槸鏁存暟鍊?(0-255)
    private String description; // 瀛樺偍鑺傜偣鎻忚堪
    
    // --- 杈撳叆/杈撳嚭绔彛ID ---
    private static final String INPUT_COLOR_ID = "input_color";
    private static final String OUTPUT_RED_ID = "output_red";
    private static final String OUTPUT_GREEN_ID = "output_green";
    private static final String OUTPUT_BLUE_ID = "output_blue";
    private static final String OUTPUT_ALPHA_ID = "output_alpha";
    
    /**
     * 鏋勯€犱竴涓柊鐨勯鑹插垎瑙ｈ妭鐐?
     */
    public ColorToComponentsNode() {
        // 璋冪敤鐖剁被鏋勯€犲嚱鏁帮紝浣跨敤UUID.randomUUID()鐢熸垚鏂扮殑ID
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "data.conversion.color_to_components");
        
        // 璁剧疆鑺傜偣鎻忚堪
        this.description = "Extracts the RGBA components from a color";
        
        // 鍒涘缓杈撳叆绔彛
        IPort colorInput = new BasePort(INPUT_COLOR_ID, "Color", 
                "The input color", NodeDataType.COLOR, this);
        addInputPort(colorInput);
        
        // 鍒涘缓杈撳嚭绔彛 - 浣跨敤DOUBLE绫诲瀷浠ユ敮鎸佹暣鏁板拰娴偣鍊艰緭鍑?
        IPort redOutput = new BasePort(OUTPUT_RED_ID, "Red", 
                "The red component", NodeDataType.DOUBLE, this);
        addOutputPort(redOutput);
        
        IPort greenOutput = new BasePort(OUTPUT_GREEN_ID, "Green", 
                "The green component", NodeDataType.DOUBLE, this);
        addOutputPort(greenOutput);
        
        IPort blueOutput = new BasePort(OUTPUT_BLUE_ID, "Blue", 
                "The blue component", NodeDataType.DOUBLE, this);
        addOutputPort(blueOutput);
        
        IPort alphaOutput = new BasePort(OUTPUT_ALPHA_ID, "Alpha", 
                "The alpha component", NodeDataType.DOUBLE, this);
        addOutputPort(alphaOutput);
    }
    
    /**
     * 瀹炵幇INode鎺ュ彛鐨刧etDescription鏂规硶
     * @return 鑺傜偣鎻忚堪
     */
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return this.description;
    }
    
    /**
     * 鑺傜偣鐨勮绠楅€昏緫
     * @param context 鎵ц涓婁笅鏂?
     */
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆
        Object colorObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_COLOR_ID);
        
        // 榛樿鍊硷紙榛戣壊锛屽畬鍏ㄤ笉閫忔槑锛?
        float red = 0, green = 0, blue = 0, alpha = 1;
        
        // 妫€鏌ヨ緭鍏ユ槸鍚︿负棰滆壊
        if (colorObj instanceof ColorData) {
            ColorData color = (ColorData) colorObj;
            red = color.r();
            green = color.g();
            blue = color.b();
            alpha = color.a();
        }
        
        // 鏍规嵁杈撳嚭绫诲瀷璁剧疆鍊?
        if (outputFloatValues) {
            // 娴偣鍊?(0.0-1.0)
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_RED_ID, red);
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_GREEN_ID, green);
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_BLUE_ID, blue);
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_ALPHA_ID, alpha);
        } else {
            // 鏁存暟鍊?(0-255)
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_RED_ID, Math.round(red * 255));
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_GREEN_ID, Math.round(green * 255));
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_BLUE_ID, Math.round(blue * 255));
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_ALPHA_ID, Math.round(alpha * 255));
        }
    }
    
    // --- Getters/Setters for Properties ---
    
    public boolean isOutputFloatValues() {
        return outputFloatValues;
    }
    
    public void setOutputFloatValues(boolean useFloat) {
        this.outputFloatValues = useFloat;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    // --- 鑺傜偣鐘舵€佸簭鍒楀寲 ---
    
    @Override
    public Object getNodeState() {
        java.util.Map<String, Object> state = new java.util.HashMap<>();
        state.put("outputFloatValues", isOutputFloatValues());
        return state;
    }
    
    @Override
    public void setNodeState(Object state) {
        if (state instanceof java.util.Map) {
            java.util.Map<?, ?> stateMap = (java.util.Map<?, ?>) state;
            
            if (stateMap.containsKey("outputFloatValues")) {
                Object useFloatObj = stateMap.get("outputFloatValues");
                if (useFloatObj instanceof Boolean) {
                    setOutputFloatValues((Boolean) useFloatObj);
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.data.conversion;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.IPort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.datatypes.ColorData;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Components to Color 鑺傜偣锛屼粠RGBA鍒嗛噺鏋勫缓棰滆壊
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "data.conversion.components_to_color",
    displayName = "Components to Color",
    description = "Creates a color from RGBA components",
    category = "data.conversion"
)
public class ComponentsToColorNode extends BaseNode {
    
    // --- 鑺傜偣灞炴€?---
    private boolean inputFloatValues = true; // 鏄惁鎺ュ彈娴偣鍊?(0.0-1.0) 杩樻槸鏁存暟鍊?(0-255)
    private String description; // 瀛樺偍鑺傜偣鎻忚堪
    
    // --- 杈撳叆/杈撳嚭绔彛ID ---
    private static final String INPUT_RED_ID = "input_red";
    private static final String INPUT_GREEN_ID = "input_green";
    private static final String INPUT_BLUE_ID = "input_blue";
    private static final String INPUT_ALPHA_ID = "input_alpha";
    private static final String OUTPUT_COLOR_ID = "output_color";
    
    /**
     * 鏋勯€犱竴涓柊鐨勯鑹插悎鎴愯妭鐐?
     */
    public ComponentsToColorNode() {
        // 璋冪敤鐖剁被鏋勯€犲嚱鏁帮紝浣跨敤UUID.randomUUID()鐢熸垚鏂扮殑ID
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "data.conversion.components_to_color");
        
        // 璁剧疆鑺傜偣鎻忚堪
        this.description = "Creates a color from RGBA components";
        
        // 鍒涘缓杈撳叆绔彛 - 浣跨敤DOUBLE绫诲瀷浠ユ敮鎸佹暣鏁板拰娴偣鍊艰緭鍏?
        IPort redInput = new BasePort(INPUT_RED_ID, "Red", 
                "The red component", NodeDataType.DOUBLE, this);
        addInputPort(redInput);
        
        IPort greenInput = new BasePort(INPUT_GREEN_ID, "Green", 
                "The green component", NodeDataType.DOUBLE, this);
        addInputPort(greenInput);
        
        IPort blueInput = new BasePort(INPUT_BLUE_ID, "Blue", 
                "The blue component", NodeDataType.DOUBLE, this);
        addInputPort(blueInput);
        
        IPort alphaInput = new BasePort(INPUT_ALPHA_ID, "Alpha", 
                "The alpha component (optional, defaults to 1.0)", NodeDataType.DOUBLE, this);
        addInputPort(alphaInput);
        
        // 鍒涘缓杈撳嚭绔彛
        IPort colorOutput = new BasePort(OUTPUT_COLOR_ID, "Color", 
                "The resulting color", NodeDataType.COLOR, this);
        addOutputPort(colorOutput);
    }
    
    /**
     * 瀹炵幇INode鎺ュ彛鐨刧etDescription鏂规硶
     * @return 鑺傜偣鎻忚堪
     */
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return this.description;
    }
    
    /**
     * 鑺傜偣鐨勮绠楅€昏緫
     * @param context 鎵ц涓婁笅鏂?
     */
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆
        Object redObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_RED_ID);
        Object greenObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_GREEN_ID);
        Object blueObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_BLUE_ID);
        Object alphaObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_ALPHA_ID);
        
        // 榛樿鍊?
        float red = 0f, green = 0f, blue = 0f, alpha = 1f;
        
        // 澶勭悊杈撳叆鍊?
        if (redObj instanceof Number) {
            red = ((Number) redObj).floatValue();
        }
        
        if (greenObj instanceof Number) {
            green = ((Number) greenObj).floatValue();
        }
        
        if (blueObj instanceof Number) {
            blue = ((Number) blueObj).floatValue();
        }
        
        if (alphaObj instanceof Number) {
            alpha = ((Number) alphaObj).floatValue();
        }
        
        // 濡傛灉杈撳叆鏄暣鏁板€?(0-255)锛岃浆鎹负娴偣鍊?(0.0-1.0)
        if (!inputFloatValues) {
            red /= 255f;
            green /= 255f;
            blue /= 255f;
            alpha /= 255f;
        }
        
        // 鍒涘缓棰滆壊瀵硅薄
        ColorData color = new ColorData(red, green, blue, alpha);
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_COLOR_ID, color);
    }
    
    // --- Getters/Setters for Properties ---
    
    public boolean isInputFloatValues() {
        return inputFloatValues;
    }
    
    public void setInputFloatValues(boolean useFloat) {
        this.inputFloatValues = useFloat;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    // --- 鑺傜偣鐘舵€佸簭鍒楀寲 ---
    
    @Override
    public Object getNodeState() {
        java.util.Map<String, Object> state = new java.util.HashMap<>();
        state.put("inputFloatValues", isInputFloatValues());
        return state;
    }
    
    @Override
    public void setNodeState(Object state) {
        if (state instanceof java.util.Map) {
            java.util.Map<?, ?> stateMap = (java.util.Map<?, ?>) state;
            
            if (stateMap.containsKey("inputFloatValues")) {
                Object useFloatObj = stateMap.get("inputFloatValues");
                if (useFloatObj instanceof Boolean) {
                    setInputFloatValues((Boolean) useFloatObj);
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.data.conversion;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.IPort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import net.minecraft.util.math.BlockPos;
import org.joml.Vector3d;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Coordinate to Vector 鑺傜偣锛屽皢鏁存暟鍧愭爣杞崲涓烘诞鐐瑰潗鏍?鍚戦噺
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "data.conversion.coordinate_to_vector",
    displayName = "Coordinate to Vector",
    description = "Converts integer block coordinates to floating-point vector",
    category = "data.conversion"
)
public class CoordinateToVectorNode extends BaseNode {
    
    // --- 鑺傜偣灞炴€?---
    private boolean addHalfBlock = false; // 鏄惁娣诲姞0.5鍋忕Щ锛堟柟鍧椾腑蹇冿級
    private String description; // 瀛樺偍鑺傜偣鎻忚堪
    
    // --- 杈撳叆/杈撳嚭绔彛ID ---
    private static final String INPUT_COORDINATE_ID = "input_coordinate";
    private static final String OUTPUT_VECTOR_ID = "output_vector";
    
    /**
     * 鏋勯€犱竴涓柊鐨勫潗鏍囪浆鍚戦噺鑺傜偣
     */
    public CoordinateToVectorNode() {
        // 璋冪敤鐖剁被鏋勯€犲嚱鏁帮紝浣跨敤UUID.randomUUID()鐢熸垚鏂扮殑ID
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "data.conversion.coordinate_to_vector");
        
        // 璁剧疆鑺傜偣鎻忚堪
        this.description = "Converts integer block coordinates to floating-point vector";
        
        // 鍒涘缓杈撳叆绔彛
        IPort coordinateInput = new BasePort(INPUT_COORDINATE_ID, "Coordinate", 
                "The block coordinates (integer)", NodeDataType.BLOCK_POS, this);
        addInputPort(coordinateInput);
        
        // 鍒涘缓杈撳嚭绔彛
        IPort vectorOutput = new BasePort(OUTPUT_VECTOR_ID, "Vector", 
                "The converted vector (float)", NodeDataType.VECTOR, this);
        addOutputPort(vectorOutput);
    }
    
    /**
     * 瀹炵幇INode鎺ュ彛鐨刧etDescription鏂规硶
     * @return 鑺傜偣鎻忚堪
     */
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return this.description;
    }
    
    /**
     * 鑺傜偣鐨勮绠楅€昏緫
     * @param context 鎵ц涓婁笅鏂?
     */
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆
        Object coordinateObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_COORDINATE_ID);
        
        // 榛樿鍚戦噺 (0,0,0)
        Vector3d vector = new Vector3d(0, 0, 0);
        
        // 妫€鏌ヨ緭鍏ユ槸鍚︿负鏂瑰潡鍧愭爣
        if (coordinateObj instanceof BlockPos) {
            BlockPos pos = (BlockPos) coordinateObj;
            double offset = addHalfBlock ? 0.5 : 0.0;
            vector = new Vector3d(
                pos.getX() + offset,
                pos.getY() + offset,
                pos.getZ() + offset
            );
        }
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_VECTOR_ID, vector);
    }
    
    // --- Getters/Setters for Properties ---
    
    public boolean isAddHalfBlock() {
        return addHalfBlock;
    }
    
    public void setAddHalfBlock(boolean addOffset) {
        this.addHalfBlock = addOffset;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    // --- 鑺傜偣鐘舵€佸簭鍒楀寲 ---
    
    @Override
    public Object getNodeState() {
        java.util.Map<String, Object> state = new java.util.HashMap<>();
        state.put("addHalfBlock", isAddHalfBlock());
        return state;
    }
    
    @Override
    public void setNodeState(Object state) {
        if (state instanceof java.util.Map) {
            java.util.Map<?, ?> stateMap = (java.util.Map<?, ?>) state;
            
            if (stateMap.containsKey("addHalfBlock")) {
                Object addOffsetObj = stateMap.get("addHalfBlock");
                if (addOffsetObj instanceof Boolean) {
                    setAddHalfBlock((Boolean) addOffsetObj);
                }
            }
        }
    }
} 
===FILE: C:\Users\navib\Desktop\development\NC\nodecraft\src\main\java\com\nodecraft\nodesystem\nodes\data\conversion\NumberToBooleanNode.java===
package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.data.conversion;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.IPort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Number to Boolean 鑺傜偣锛屽皢鏁板瓧杞崲涓哄竷灏斿€?
 * 0杞崲涓篺alse锛岄潪0杞崲涓簍rue
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "data.conversion.number_to_boolean",
    displayName = "Number to Boolean",
    description = "Converts a number to boolean (0 = false, non-zero = true)",
    category = "data.conversion"
)
public class NumberToBooleanNode extends BaseNode {
    
    // --- 灞炴€?---
    private boolean invertResult = false; // 鏄惁鍙嶈浆缁撴灉
    private String description; // 瀛樺偍鑺傜偣鎻忚堪
    
    // --- 杈撳叆/杈撳嚭绔彛ID ---
    private static final String INPUT_NUMBER_ID = "input_number";
    private static final String OUTPUT_BOOLEAN_ID = "output_boolean";
    
    /**
     * 鏋勯€犱竴涓柊鐨勬暟瀛楄浆甯冨皵鍊艰妭鐐?
     */
    public NumberToBooleanNode() {
        // 璋冪敤鐖剁被鏋勯€犲嚱鏁帮紝浣跨敤UUID.randomUUID()鐢熸垚鏂扮殑ID
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "data.conversion.number_to_boolean");
        
        // 璁剧疆鑺傜偣鎻忚堪
        this.description = "Converts a number to boolean (0 = false, non-zero = true)";
        
        // 鍒涘缓杈撳叆绔彛
        IPort numberInput = new BasePort(INPUT_NUMBER_ID, "Number", 
                "The input number", NodeDataType.DOUBLE, this);
        addInputPort(numberInput);
        
        // 鍒涘缓杈撳嚭绔彛
        IPort booleanOutput = new BasePort(OUTPUT_BOOLEAN_ID, "Boolean", 
                "The converted boolean value", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this);
        addOutputPort(booleanOutput);
    }
    
    /**
     * 瀹炵幇INode鎺ュ彛鐨刧etDescription鏂规硶
     * @return 鑺傜偣鎻忚堪
     */
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return this.description;
    }
    
    /**
     * 鑺傜偣鐨勮绠楅€昏緫
     * @param context 鎵ц涓婁笅鏂?
     */
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆
        Object numberObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_NUMBER_ID);
        
        // 榛樿杈撳嚭涓篺alse
        boolean result = false;
        
        // 妫€鏌ヨ緭鍏ユ槸鍚︿负鏁板瓧
        if (numberObj instanceof Number) {
            double number = ((Number) numberObj).doubleValue();
            // 濡傛灉鏁板瓧涓嶇瓑浜?锛屽垯涓簍rue
            result = number != 0;
        }
        
        // 濡傛灉璁剧疆浜嗗弽杞粨鏋滐紝鍒欏彇鍙?
        if (invertResult) {
            result = !result;
        }
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_BOOLEAN_ID, result);
    }
    
    // --- Getters/Setters for Properties ---
    
    public boolean isInvertResult() {
        return invertResult;
    }
    
    public void setInvertResult(boolean invert) {
        this.invertResult = invert;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    // --- 鑺傜偣鐘舵€佸簭鍒楀寲 ---
    
    @Override
    public Object getNodeState() {
        java.util.Map<String, Object> state = new java.util.HashMap<>();
        state.put("invertResult", isInvertResult());
        return state;
    }
    
    @Override
    public void setNodeState(Object state) {
        if (state instanceof java.util.Map) {
            java.util.Map<?, ?> stateMap = (java.util.Map<?, ?>) state;
            
            if (stateMap.containsKey("invertResult")) {
                Object invertObj = stateMap.get("invertResult");
                if (invertObj instanceof Boolean) {
                    setInvertResult((Boolean) invertObj);
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
