    // === BaseCustomUINode 鎶借薄鏂规硶瀹炵幇 ===

    @Override
    protected float calculateUIHeight() {
        float height = getMediumPadding(); // 椤堕儴杈硅窛

        // 鑼冨洿杈撳叆妗嗭紙濡傛灉鍚敤锛?
        if (showRangeInputs) {
            height += 20f; // 鑼冨洿杈撳叆妗嗙殑楂樺害锛堥€昏緫鍗曚綅锛?
            height += getSmallPadding();
        }

        // 婊戝姩鏉?(ImGui.getFrameHeight() 鏄缉鏀惧悗鐨勶紝杩欓噷鐢ㄤ竴涓熀鍑嗗€硷紝濡?20f)
        height += 20f; // 婊戝姩鏉＄殑楂樺害锛堥€昏緫鍗曚綅锛?

        // 婊戝姩鏉″悗闂磋窛
        height += getMediumPadding();

        // 鍗曚綅閫夋嫨鍣?(ImGui.getFrameHeight() 鏄缉鏀惧悗鐨勶紝杩欓噷鐢ㄤ竴涓熀鍑嗗€硷紝濡?20f)
        height += 20f; // 涓嬫媺妗嗙殑楂樺害锛堥€昏緫鍗曚綅锛?

        // 搴曢儴杈硅窛
        height += getMediumPadding();

        return height;
    }

    @Override
    protected float calculateMinUIWidth() {
        float minWidth = 0;

        // 婊戝姩鏉＄殑鏈€灏忓搴?(閫昏緫鍗曚綅)
        float sliderMinWidth = 120.0f;

        // 濡傛灉鏄剧ず鑼冨洿杈撳叆妗嗭紝闇€瑕侀澶栫┖闂?
        if (showRangeInputs) {
            // 涓や釜杈撳叆妗嗙殑瀹藉害 + 闂磋窛
            float inputBoxWidth = 60.0f; // 姣忎釜杈撳叆妗嗙殑瀹藉害
            float spacing = 12.0f; // 闂磋窛
            sliderMinWidth += (inputBoxWidth * 2 + spacing * 2);
        }

        // 鍗曚綅閫夋嫨鍣ㄧ殑瀹藉害闇€姹?
        float unitSelectorLogicalWidth = 80.0f; // 涓嬫媺妗嗛€昏緫瀹藉害
        minWidth = Math.max(minWidth, unitSelectorLogicalWidth);

        // 鍙栨渶澶у€煎苟鍔犱笂鑺傜偣鍐呭杈硅窛 (閫昏緫鍗曚綅)
        minWidth = Math.max(minWidth, sliderMinWidth) + getContentMargin() * 2; // 宸﹀彸鍚勬湁涓€涓?content margin

        return minWidth;
    }

    @Override
    public boolean supportsDirectDrawing() {
        return allowDirectDrawing;
    }

    @Override
    public boolean renderCustomUIDirect(ImDrawList drawList, float screenX, float screenY,
                                        float width, float height, float zoom) {
        if (!supportsDirectDrawing()) {
            return false;
        }

        try {
            // 鍙傛暟 width 鍜?height 宸茬粡鏄缉鏀惧悗鐨勫疄闄呭儚绱犲€?
            // screenX 鍜?screenY 鏄粍浠跺湪灞忓箷涓婄殑宸︿笂瑙掑儚绱犲潗鏍?

            // 鑾峰彇涓婚棰滆壊
            int bgColor = ImGui.getColorU32(ImGuiCol.FrameBg);
            int borderColor = ImGui.getColorU32(ImGuiCol.Border);
            int textColor = ImGui.getColorU32(ImGuiCol.Text);
            int sliderBgColor = ImGui.getColorU32(ImGuiCol.FrameBgHovered);

            // 璁＄畻缂╂斁鍚庣殑瀛椾綋澶у皬
            float scaledFontSize = ImGui.getFontSize() * zoom; // ImGui.getFontSize() 宸茬粡鏄熀鍑嗗瓧浣撳ぇ灏?

            // 缁樺埗鑳屾櫙妗嗘灦 (涓嶄娇鐢ㄥ渾瑙?
            float borderThickness = ZoomHelper.applyZoom(1.0f, zoom);

            drawList.addRectFilled(screenX, screenY, screenX + width, screenY + height, bgColor);
            drawList.addRect(screenX, screenY, screenX + width, screenY + height,
                    borderColor, 0, 0, borderThickness);

            // 璁＄畻甯冨眬鍙傛暟 (鎵€鏈夊昂瀵稿拰闂磋窛閮介渶瑕佹墜鍔ㄧ缉鏀?
            float padding = ZoomHelper.applyZoom(getMediumPadding(), zoom);
            float sliderLogicalHeight = 20.0f; // 婊戝潡鍦ㄩ€昏緫鍗曚綅涓嬬殑楂樺害
            float sliderPixelHeight = ZoomHelper.applyZoom(sliderLogicalHeight, zoom);

            float currentY = screenY + padding; // 褰撳墠缁樺埗鐨刌鍧愭爣

            // 缁樺埗鑼冨洿杈撳叆妗嗭紙濡傛灉鍚敤锛?
            if (showRangeInputs) {
                // 缁樺埗鏈€灏忓€煎拰鏈€澶у€兼爣绛?
                String minText = String.format("%.0f掳", minAngle);
                String maxText = String.format("%.0f掳", maxAngle);
                
                ImVec2 minTextSize = ImGui.calcTextSize(minText);
                ImVec2 maxTextSize = ImGui.calcTextSize(maxText);
                
                float minTextX = screenX + padding;
                float maxTextX = screenX + width - padding - maxTextSize.x;
                
                drawList.addText(ImGui.getFont(), scaledFontSize * 0.8f, minTextX, currentY, textColor, minText);
                drawList.addText(ImGui.getFont(), scaledFontSize * 0.8f, maxTextX, currentY, textColor, maxText);
                
                currentY += ZoomHelper.applyZoom(20.0f, zoom) + ZoomHelper.applyZoom(getSmallPadding(), zoom);
            }

            // 缁樺埗婊戝潡杞ㄩ亾
            float sliderX = screenX + padding;
            float sliderActualWidth = width - 2 * padding;

            // 缁樺埗婊戝潡杞ㄩ亾鑳屾櫙 (涓嶄娇鐢ㄥ渾瑙?
            drawList.addRectFilled(sliderX, currentY, sliderX + sliderActualWidth, currentY + sliderPixelHeight,
                    sliderBgColor);

            // 缁樺埗婊戝潡鎵嬫焺
            double normalizedValue = (currentAngle - minAngle) / (maxAngle - minAngle);
            float handleLogicalWidth = 12.0f; // 鎵嬫焺鍦ㄩ€昏緫鍗曚綅涓嬬殑瀹藉害
            float handlePixelWidth = ZoomHelper.applyZoom(handleLogicalWidth, zoom);
            float handleX = sliderX + (float)((sliderActualWidth - handlePixelWidth) * normalizedValue);

            drawList.addRectFilled(handleX, currentY, handleX + handlePixelWidth, currentY + sliderPixelHeight,
                    ANGLE_SLIDER_GRAB_COLOR);

            currentY += sliderPixelHeight + padding;

            // 缁樺埗鍗曚綅鎸囩ず
            String unitText = "鍗曚綅: " + angleUnit.getDisplayName();
            ImVec2 unitTextSize = ImGui.calcTextSize(unitText);
            float unitTextWidth = unitTextSize.x;
            float unitTextX = screenX + (width - unitTextWidth) / 2; // 灞呬腑

            drawList.addText(ImGui.getFont(), scaledFontSize * 0.9f, unitTextX, currentY, textColor, unitText);

        } catch (Exception e) {
            System.err.println("AngleSliderNode鐩存帴缁樺埗澶辫触: " + e.getMessage());
            e.printStackTrace(); // 璋冭瘯鏃舵墦鍗板爢鏍?
        }

        return false; // Direct Drawing 妯″紡閫氬父涓嶅鐞嗕氦浜掞紝鎵€浠ヨ繑鍥?false
    }

    @Override
    protected boolean renderCustomUIScaled(float width, float height, float zoom) {
        boolean valueChanged = false;
        boolean hasUIInteraction = false; // 璺熻釜鏄惁鏈塙I浜や簰

        try {
            // 浣跨敤鍔╂墜鏂规硶璁＄畻鍙敤瀹藉害
            float availableWidth = getAvailableWidth(width, zoom);

            // 娣诲姞椤堕儴闂磋窛
            addVerticalSpacing(getMediumPadding(), zoom);

            // --- 鑼冨洿杈撳叆妗嗛儴鍒?---
            if (showRangeInputs) {
                // 璁＄畻杈撳叆妗嗗竷灞€
                float inputBoxWidth = ZoomHelper.applyZoom(60.0f, zoom);
                float spacing = ZoomHelper.applyZoom(8.0f, zoom);
                float sliderWidth = availableWidth - (inputBoxWidth * 2 + spacing * 2);

                // 鏈€灏忓€艰緭鍏ユ
                ImGui.pushItemWidth(inputBoxWidth);
                imgui.type.ImFloat minValue = new imgui.type.ImFloat((float) minAngle);
                if (ImGui.inputFloat("##min_angle", minValue, 0.0f, 0.0f, "%.0f")) {
                    setMinAngle(minValue.get());
                    valueChanged = true;
                }
                hasUIInteraction |= ImGui.isItemHovered() || ImGui.isItemActive();
                ImGui.popItemWidth();

                ImGui.sameLine(0, spacing);

                // 婊戝姩鏉★紙浣跨敤鍔ㄦ€佽寖鍥达級
                ImGui.pushItemWidth(sliderWidth);
                
                // 璁剧疆鏍峰紡锛岀Щ闄ゅ渾瑙?
                ImGui.pushStyleVar(ImGuiStyleVar.FrameRounding, 0.0f);
                ImGui.pushStyleVar(ImGuiStyleVar.GrabRounding, 0.0f);
                ImGui.pushStyleVar(ImGuiStyleVar.GrabMinSize, ZoomHelper.applyZoom(14.0f, zoom));
                ImGui.pushStyleVar(ImGuiStyleVar.FramePadding, ZoomHelper.applyZoom(2.0f, zoom), ZoomHelper.applyZoom(4.0f, zoom));

                // 璁剧疆瑙掑害婊戝姩鏉＄殑鐗规畩棰滆壊
                ImGui.pushStyleColor(ImGuiCol.FrameBg, 0.1f, 0.1f, 0.15f, 0.9f);
                ImGui.pushStyleColor(ImGuiCol.FrameBgHovered, 0.15f, 0.15f, 0.2f, 0.95f);
                
                // 淇锛氭纭娇鐢╟olorConvertU32ToFloat4鏂规硶
                imgui.ImVec4 grabColor = new imgui.ImVec4();
                imgui.ImVec4 grabActiveColor = new imgui.ImVec4();
                ImGui.colorConvertU32ToFloat4(ANGLE_SLIDER_GRAB_COLOR, grabColor);
                ImGui.colorConvertU32ToFloat4(ANGLE_SLIDER_GRAB_ACTIVE_COLOR, grabActiveColor);
                
                ImGui.pushStyleColor(ImGuiCol.SliderGrab, grabColor.x, grabColor.y, grabColor.z, grabColor.w);
                ImGui.pushStyleColor(ImGuiCol.SliderGrabActive, grabActiveColor.x, grabActiveColor.y, grabActiveColor.z, grabActiveColor.w);

                // 瑙掑害婊戝姩鏉★紙浣跨敤鍔ㄦ€佽寖鍥达級
                float[] angleValue = {(float) currentAngle};
                if (ImGui.sliderFloat("##angle_slider", angleValue, (float) minAngle, (float) maxAngle, "%.1f掳")) {
                    setCurrentAngle(angleValue[0]);
                    valueChanged = true;
                }

                // 淇锛氭娴嬫粦鍔ㄦ潯鐨勪氦浜掔姸鎬侊紝纭繚鍦ㄦ偓鍋滄垨鎷栧姩鏃堕樆姝㈣妭鐐规嫋鍔?
                boolean isSliderHovered = ImGui.isItemHovered();
                boolean isSliderActive = ImGui.isItemActive();
                hasUIInteraction |= isSliderHovered || isSliderActive;

                // 鎭㈠鏍峰紡
                ImGui.popStyleColor(4); // 寮瑰嚭4涓鑹叉牱寮?
                ImGui.popStyleVar(4); // 寮瑰嚭4涓牱寮忓彉閲?
                ImGui.popItemWidth();

                ImGui.sameLine(0, spacing);

                // 鏈€澶у€艰緭鍏ユ
                ImGui.pushItemWidth(inputBoxWidth);
                imgui.type.ImFloat maxValue = new imgui.type.ImFloat((float) maxAngle);
                if (ImGui.inputFloat("##max_angle", maxValue, 0.0f, 0.0f, "%.0f")) {
                    setMaxAngle(maxValue.get());
                    valueChanged = true;
                }
                hasUIInteraction |= ImGui.isItemHovered() || ImGui.isItemActive();
                ImGui.popItemWidth();
            } else {
                // 濡傛灉涓嶆樉绀鸿寖鍥磋緭鍏ユ锛屼娇鐢ㄥ叏瀹芥粦鍔ㄦ潯
                ImGui.pushItemWidth(availableWidth);
                
                // 璁剧疆鏍峰紡锛岀Щ闄ゅ渾瑙?
                ImGui.pushStyleVar(ImGuiStyleVar.FrameRounding, 0.0f);
                ImGui.pushStyleVar(ImGuiStyleVar.GrabRounding, 0.0f);
                ImGui.pushStyleVar(ImGuiStyleVar.GrabMinSize, ZoomHelper.applyZoom(14.0f, zoom));
                ImGui.pushStyleVar(ImGuiStyleVar.FramePadding, ZoomHelper.applyZoom(2.0f, zoom), ZoomHelper.applyZoom(4.0f, zoom));

                // 璁剧疆瑙掑害婊戝姩鏉＄殑鐗规畩棰滆壊
                ImGui.pushStyleColor(ImGuiCol.FrameBg, 0.1f, 0.1f, 0.15f, 0.9f);
                ImGui.pushStyleColor(ImGuiCol.FrameBgHovered, 0.15f, 0.15f, 0.2f, 0.95f);
                
                imgui.ImVec4 grabColor = new imgui.ImVec4();
                imgui.ImVec4 grabActiveColor = new imgui.ImVec4();
                ImGui.colorConvertU32ToFloat4(ANGLE_SLIDER_GRAB_COLOR, grabColor);
                ImGui.colorConvertU32ToFloat4(ANGLE_SLIDER_GRAB_ACTIVE_COLOR, grabActiveColor);
                
                ImGui.pushStyleColor(ImGuiCol.SliderGrab, grabColor.x, grabColor.y, grabColor.z, grabColor.w);
                ImGui.pushStyleColor(ImGuiCol.SliderGrabActive, grabActiveColor.x, grabActiveColor.y, grabActiveColor.z, grabActiveColor.w);

                // 瑙掑害婊戝姩鏉★紙浣跨敤鍔ㄦ€佽寖鍥达級
                float[] angleValue = {(float) currentAngle};
                if (ImGui.sliderFloat("##angle_slider", angleValue, (float) minAngle, (float) maxAngle, "%.1f掳")) {
                    setCurrentAngle(angleValue[0]);
                    valueChanged = true;
                }

                boolean isSliderHovered = ImGui.isItemHovered();
                boolean isSliderActive = ImGui.isItemActive();
                hasUIInteraction |= isSliderHovered || isSliderActive;

                // 鎭㈠鏍峰紡
                ImGui.popStyleColor(4);
                ImGui.popStyleVar(4);
                ImGui.popItemWidth();
            }

            // 娣诲姞瑙掑害鍗曚綅閫夋嫨鍣ㄧ殑闂磋窛
            addVerticalSpacing(getMediumPadding(), zoom);

            // --- 瑙掑害鍗曚綅閫夋嫨鍣ㄩ儴鍒?---
            float unitSelectorLogicalWidth = 80.0f;
            setCenterX(availableWidth, ZoomHelper.applyZoom(unitSelectorLogicalWidth, zoom)); // 灞呬腑涓嬫媺妗?

            // 搴旂敤缂╂斁鍒版鏋跺唴杈硅窛鍜?ItemWidth
            ImGui.pushStyleVar(ImGuiStyleVar.FramePadding, ZoomHelper.applyZoom(2.0f, zoom), ZoomHelper.applyZoom(1.0f, zoom));
            ImGui.pushItemWidth(ZoomHelper.applyZoom(unitSelectorLogicalWidth, zoom));

            String[] unitNames = {"搴?, "寮у害"};
            int currentUnitIndex = angleUnit == AngleUnit.DEGREES ? 0 : 1;
            ImInt unitIndex = new ImInt(currentUnitIndex);

            if (ImGui.combo("##unit_selector", unitIndex, unitNames)) {
                angleUnit = unitIndex.get() == 0 ? AngleUnit.DEGREES : AngleUnit.RADIANS;
                updateOutput();
                valueChanged = true;
            }

            // 淇锛氭娴嬩笅鎷夋鐨勪氦浜掔姸鎬侊紝纭繚鍦ㄤ氦浜掓椂闃绘鑺傜偣鎷栧姩
            boolean isComboHovered = ImGui.isItemHovered();
            boolean isComboActive = ImGui.isItemActive();
            hasUIInteraction |= isComboHovered || isComboActive;

            ImGui.popItemWidth();
            ImGui.popStyleVar(); // 寮瑰嚭 FramePadding

            // 搴曢儴闂磋窛
            addVerticalSpacing(getMediumPadding(), zoom);

        } catch (Exception e) {
            System.err.println("AngleSliderNode UI娓叉煋澶辫触: " + e.getMessage());
            e.printStackTrace(); // 璋冭瘯鏃舵墦鍗板爢鏍堣窡韪?
        }

        // 濡傛灉鏈塙I浜や簰锛岄樆姝簨浠朵紶鎾埌搴曞眰鐢诲竷鍜屾父鎴忎笘鐣?
        if (hasUIInteraction) {
            return true;
        }

        return valueChanged;
    }

    /**
     * 鏇存柊瑙掑害婊戝潡鐨勫綋鍓嶅€?
     * @param newAngle 鏂扮殑瑙掑害鍊硷紙搴︼級
     */
    public void setCurrentAngle(double newAngle) {
        // 灏嗚搴﹁鑼冨寲鍒?0-360 搴﹁寖鍥?
        double normalizedAngle = normalizeAngle(newAngle);

        // 鍥涜垗浜斿叆鍒颁竴浣嶅皬鏁?
        double roundedAngle = Math.round(normalizedAngle * 10.0) / 10.0;

        if (Math.abs(this.currentAngle - roundedAngle) > 1e-9) {
            this.currentAngle = roundedAngle;
            updateOutput();
            markDirty(); // 鏍囪鑺傜偣涓鸿剰锛屼互渚块噸鏂拌绠?
        }
    }

    /**
     * 灏嗚搴﹁鑼冨寲鍒?0-360 搴﹁寖鍥?
     * @param angle 杈撳叆瑙掑害
     * @return 瑙勮寖鍖栧悗鐨勮搴?
     */
    private double normalizeAngle(double angle) {
        angle = angle % 360.0;
        if (angle < 0) {
            angle += 360.0;
        }
        return angle;
    }

    /**
     * 鏇存柊杈撳嚭绔彛鐨勫€?
     */
    private void updateOutput() {
        double outputValue;
        if (angleUnit == AngleUnit.RADIANS) {
            // 杞崲涓哄姬搴?
            outputValue = Math.toRadians(currentAngle);
        } else {
            // 杈撳嚭搴︽暟
            outputValue = currentAngle;
        }
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_ANGLE_ID, outputValue);
    }

    // --- Getters/Setters for Properties ---

    public double getCurrentAngle() {
        return currentAngle;
    }

    public AngleUnit getAngleUnit() {
        return angleUnit;
    }

    public void setAngleUnit(AngleUnit angleUnit) {
        if (this.angleUnit != angleUnit) {
            this.angleUnit = angleUnit;
            updateOutput();
            markDirty();
        }
    }

    public boolean isShowRangeInputs() {
        return showRangeInputs;
    }

    public void setShowRangeInputs(boolean showRangeInputs) {
        if (this.showRangeInputs != showRangeInputs) {
            this.showRangeInputs = showRangeInputs;
            invalidateCache(); // 鑼冨洿杈撳叆妗嗘樉绀轰細褰卞搷瀹藉害锛岄渶瑕侀噸鏂拌绠楀竷灞€
            markDirty();
        }
    }

    public boolean isAllowDirectDrawing() {
        return allowDirectDrawing;
    }

    public void setAllowDirectDrawing(boolean allowDirectDrawing) {
        if (this.allowDirectDrawing != allowDirectDrawing) {
            this.allowDirectDrawing = allowDirectDrawing;
            invalidateCache(); // 鏀瑰彉缁樺埗妯″紡鍙兘褰卞搷鏌愪簺甯冨眬灞炴€э紝灏界姝ゅ涓嶇洿鎺ュ奖鍝?
            markDirty();
        }
    }

    public double getMinAngle() {
        return minAngle;
    }

    public void setMinAngle(double minAngle) {
        if (Math.abs(this.minAngle - minAngle) > 1e-9) {
            this.minAngle = minAngle;
            updateOutput();
            markDirty();
        }
    }

    public double getMaxAngle() {
        return maxAngle;
    }

    public void setMaxAngle(double maxAngle) {
        if (Math.abs(this.maxAngle - maxAngle) > 1e-9) {
            this.maxAngle = maxAngle;
            updateOutput();
            markDirty();
        }
    }

    // --- 鑺傜偣鐘舵€佸簭鍒楀寲 ---

    @Override
    public Object getNodeState() {
        java.util.Map<String, Object> state = new java.util.HashMap<>();
        state.put("angle", getCurrentAngle());
        state.put("unit", getAngleUnit().name());
        state.put("showRangeInputs", isShowRangeInputs());
        state.put("allowDirectDrawing", isAllowDirectDrawing());
        state.put("minAngle", getMinAngle());
        state.put("maxAngle", getMaxAngle());
        return state;
    }

    @Override
    public void setNodeState(Object state) {
        if (state instanceof java.util.Map) {
            java.util.Map<?, ?> stateMap = (java.util.Map<?, ?>) state;

            // 鍔犺浇瑙掑害鍗曚綅
            if (stateMap.containsKey("unit")) {
                Object unit = stateMap.get("unit");
                if (unit instanceof String) {
                    try {
                        this.angleUnit = AngleUnit.valueOf((String) unit);
                    } catch (IllegalArgumentException e) {
                        this.angleUnit = AngleUnit.DEGREES; // 榛樿鍊?
                    }
                }
            }

            // UI璁剧疆
            if (stateMap.containsKey("showRangeInputs")) {
                Object showRange = stateMap.get("showRangeInputs");
                if (showRange instanceof Boolean) {
                    setShowRangeInputs((Boolean) showRange);
                }
            }

            if (stateMap.containsKey("allowDirectDrawing")) {
                Object allowDirect = stateMap.get("allowDirectDrawing");
                if (allowDirect instanceof Boolean) {
                    setAllowDirectDrawing((Boolean) allowDirect);
                }
            }

            // 鏈€鍚庡姞杞借搴﹀€?
            if (stateMap.containsKey("angle")) {
                Object angle = stateMap.get("angle");
                if (angle instanceof Number) {
                    this.currentAngle = ((Number) angle).doubleValue();
                    setCurrentAngle(this.currentAngle);
                } else if (angle instanceof String) {
                    try {
                        this.currentAngle = Double.parseDouble((String) angle);
                        setCurrentAngle(this.currentAngle);
                    } catch (NumberFormatException e) {
                        System.err.println("Failed to parse angle value for AngleSliderNode: " + angle);
                        this.currentAngle = 0.0;
                        setCurrentAngle(this.currentAngle);
                    }
                }
            } else {
                // 濡傛灉鐘舵€佷腑娌℃湁瑙掑害鍊硷紝璁剧疆榛樿鍊?
                this.currentAngle = 0.0;
                this.angleUnit = AngleUnit.DEGREES;
                this.minAngle = 0.0;
                this.maxAngle = 360.0;
                setCurrentAngle(this.currentAngle);
            }

            if (stateMap.containsKey("minAngle")) {
                Object minAngle = stateMap.get("minAngle");
                if (minAngle instanceof Number) {
                    this.minAngle = ((Number) minAngle).doubleValue();
                    setMinAngle(this.minAngle);
                }
            }

            if (stateMap.containsKey("maxAngle")) {
                Object maxAngle = stateMap.get("maxAngle");
                if (maxAngle instanceof Number) {
                    this.maxAngle = ((Number) maxAngle).doubleValue();
                    setMaxAngle(this.maxAngle);
                }
            }

        } else if (state instanceof Number) {
            // 鍚戝悗鍏煎锛氬鏋滅姸鎬佸彧鏄竴涓暟瀛楋紝鐩存帴浣跨敤瀹冧綔涓鸿搴﹀€?
            this.currentAngle = ((Number) state).doubleValue();
            setCurrentAngle(this.currentAngle);
        } else {
            // 鏃犳硶鍔犺浇鐘舵€佹椂锛岃缃粯璁ゅ€?
            this.currentAngle = 0.0;
            this.angleUnit = AngleUnit.DEGREES;
            this.minAngle = 0.0;
            this.maxAngle = 360.0;
            this.showRangeInputs = true;
            this.allowDirectDrawing = false;
            setCurrentAngle(this.currentAngle);
        }
        markDirty(); // 纭繚鍔犺浇鍚庨噸鏂拌绠椾笅娓?
    }

    // === 娣诲姞缂哄け鐨勫姪鎵嬫柟娉?===
    // 鍋囪杩欎簺鏂规硶鍦?BaseCustomUINode 鎴?ZoomHelper 涓紝濡傛灉涓嶅湪锛岃纭繚瀹冧滑瀹炵幇姝ｇ‘銆?
    // 涓轰簡浣挎鏂囦欢鍙嫭绔嬬紪璇戯紝鎴戝皢瀹冧滑鏀惧湪杩欓噷锛屼絾鐞嗘兂鎯呭喌瀹冧滑搴旇鍦ㄧ埗绫绘垨鐙珛宸ュ叿绫讳腑銆?

    /**
     * 璁＄畻鍙敤鐨勫唴瀹瑰搴︼紙鍑忓幓杈硅窛锛?
     * @param totalWidth 鎬诲搴?
     * @param zoom 缂╂斁鍥犲瓙
     * @return 鍙敤瀹藉害
     */
    protected final float getAvailableWidth(float totalWidth, float zoom) {
        // 鍋囪 getContentMargin() 杩斿洖鐨勬槸閫昏緫鍗曚綅鐨勮竟璺?
        return totalWidth - ZoomHelper.applyZoom(getContentMargin() * 2, zoom);
    }

    /**
     * 璁＄畻灞呬腑鍋忕Щ閲?
     * @param availableWidth 鍙敤瀹藉害
     * @param elementWidth 鍏冪礌瀹藉害
     * @return 灞呬腑鍋忕Щ閲?
     */
    protected final float getCenterOffset(float availableWidth, float elementWidth) {
        return ZoomHelper.getCenterOffset(availableWidth, elementWidth);
    }

    // 鐢变簬鎮ㄥ師濮嬩唬鐮佺殑灏鹃儴宸茬粡鎻愪緵浜嗚繖浜涘姪鎵嬫柟娉曪紝鎴戝皢淇濈暀浣犲師濮嬩唬鐮佷腑鐨?helpers銆?
    // 鎴戝凡缁忓皢瀹冧滑鏀剧疆鍦ㄤ簡 `BaseCustomUINode` 鐨勬柟娉曞疄鐜颁箣澶栵紝濡傛灉瀹冧滑鏄绫荤殑涓€閮ㄥ垎锛岃鏍规嵁浣犵殑缁撴瀯璋冩暣銆?
    // 鏈€濂界殑瀹炶返鏄妸瀹冧滑鏀惧湪 `BaseCustomUINode` 涓紝鎴栬€呬竴涓叕鍏辩殑 `ImGuiUIHelper` 绫讳腑銆?
}

package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.inputs.basic;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.IPort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;

import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * 甯冨皵鍊煎紑鍏宠妭鐐癸紝鍏佽鐢ㄦ埛鍒囨崲鐪?鍋囩姸鎬併€?
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "inputs.basic.boolean_toggle",
    displayName = "甯冨皵寮€鍏?,
    description = "鎻愪緵涓€涓彲浠ュ垏鎹㈢殑甯冨皵鍊煎紑鍏虫帶鍒?,
    category = "inputs.basic"
)
public class BooleanToggleNode extends BaseNode {
    
    // --- 鑺傜偣灞炴€?---
    private boolean value = false;
    private String trueLabel = "True";
    private String falseLabel = "False";
    private String description = "A switch that can be turned on (true) or off (false)."; // 鑺傜偣鎻忚堪
    
    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_VALUE_ID = "output_value";
    
    /**
     * 鏋勯€犱竴涓柊鐨勫竷灏斿€煎紑鍏宠妭鐐?
     */
    public BooleanToggleNode() {
        // 浣跨敤鏂扮殑鍒嗙被鍛藉悕 - inputs.basic.boolean_toggle
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "inputs.basic.boolean_toggle");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        IPort valueOutput = new BasePort(OUTPUT_VALUE_ID, "Value", "The boolean value", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this);
        addOutputPort(valueOutput);
        
        // 鍒濆鍖栬緭鍑哄€?
        updateOutput();
    }
    
    /**
     * 瀹炵幇INode鎺ュ彛鐨刧etDescription鏂规硶
     * @return 鑺傜偣鎻忚堪
     */
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return this.description;
    }
    
    /**
     * 鑺傜偣鐨勮绠楅€昏緫
     * @param context 鎵ц涓婁笅鏂?
     */
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        updateOutput();
    }
    
    /**
     * 鍒囨崲甯冨皵鍊肩姸鎬?
     */
    public void toggle() {
        setValue(!value);
    }
    
    /**
     * 璁剧疆甯冨皵鍊?
     * @param value 鏂扮殑甯冨皵鍊?
     */
    public void setValue(boolean value) {
        if (this.value != value) {
            this.value = value;
            updateOutput();
            
            // 閫氱煡绯荤粺姝よ妭鐐圭殑杈撳嚭宸叉洿鏂?
            markDirty();
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * 鏇存柊杈撳嚭绔彛鐨勫€?
     */
    private void updateOutput() {
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_VALUE_ID, this.value);
    }
    
    // --- Getters/Setters for Properties ---
    
    public boolean getValue() {
        return value;
    }
    
    public String getTrueLabel() {
        return trueLabel;
    }
    
    public void setTrueLabel(String trueLabel) {
        this.trueLabel = trueLabel != null ? trueLabel : "True";
    }
    
    public String getFalseLabel() {
        return falseLabel;
    }
    
    public void setFalseLabel(String falseLabel) {
        this.falseLabel = falseLabel != null ? falseLabel : "False";
    }
    
    // --- 鑺傜偣鐘舵€佸簭鍒楀寲 ---
    
    @Override
    public Object getNodeState() {
        // 杩斿洖鑺傜偣鎵€鏈夊彲搴忓垪鍖栫殑鐘舵€?
        java.util.Map<String, Object> state = new java.util.HashMap<>();
        state.put("value", getValue());
        state.put("trueLabel", getTrueLabel());
        state.put("falseLabel", getFalseLabel());
        return state;
    }
    
    @Override
    public void setNodeState(Object state) {
        if (state instanceof java.util.Map) {
            java.util.Map<?, ?> stateMap = (java.util.Map<?, ?>) state;
            
            if (stateMap.containsKey("trueLabel")) {
                Object label = stateMap.get("trueLabel");
                if (label instanceof String) {
                    setTrueLabel((String) label);
                }
            }
            
            if (stateMap.containsKey("falseLabel")) {
                Object label = stateMap.get("falseLabel");
                if (label instanceof String) {
                    setFalseLabel((String) label);
                }
            }
            
            if (stateMap.containsKey("value")) {
                Object value = stateMap.get("value");
                if (value instanceof Boolean) {
                    setValue((Boolean) value);
                } else if (value instanceof String) {
                    setValue(Boolean.parseBoolean((String) value));
                } else if (value instanceof Number) {
                    setValue(((Number) value).intValue() != 0);
                }
            }
        } else if (state instanceof Boolean) {
            // 濡傛灉鐘舵€佺洿鎺ユ槸甯冨皵鍊?
            setValue((Boolean) state);
        } else if (state instanceof String) {
            // 濡傛灉鐘舵€佹槸瀛楃涓诧紝灏濊瘯瑙ｆ瀽涓哄竷灏斿€?
            setValue(Boolean.parseBoolean((String) state));
        } else if (state instanceof Number) {
            // 濡傛灉鐘舵€佹槸鏁板瓧锛岄潪闆朵负true
            setValue(((Number) state).intValue() != 0);
        }
    }
} 
===FILE: C:\Users\navib\Desktop\development\NC\nodecraft\src\main\java\com\nodecraft\nodesystem\nodes\inputs\basic\CircularAngleNode.java===
package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.inputs.basic;

// 瀵煎叆蹇呰鐨?NodeCraft 鍩虹被鎴栨帴鍙?
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.IPort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;

// 瀵煎叆ImGui鐩稿叧绫荤敤浜庤嚜瀹氫箟UI娓叉煋
import imgui.ImGui;
import imgui.ImDrawList;
import imgui.ImVec2;
import imgui.flag.ImGuiCol;
import imgui.type.ImFloat;
import imgui.type.ImInt;
import imgui.flag.ImGuiStyleVar;

// 瀵煎叆灞炴€ф敞瑙?
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeProperty;

// 瀵煎叆鑷畾涔塙I鍩虹被
import com.nodecraft.gui.editor.impl.BaseCustomUINode;
import com.nodecraft.gui.editor.impl.ZoomHelper;

import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * 鍦嗗舰瑙掑害閫夋嫨鍣ㄨ妭鐐?- 楂樼骇鑷畾涔塙I绀轰緥
 * 
 * 缁ф壙BaseCustomUINode锛岃嚜鍔ㄨ幏寰楃缉鏀炬劅鐭ュ拰甯冨眬绠＄悊鍔熻兘銆?
 * 
 * 灞曠ず濡備綍瀹炵幇鍏锋湁澶嶆潅浜や簰鐨勮嚜瀹氫箟UI缁勪欢锛?
 * 1. 鍦嗗舰鏃嬭浆鐩樼晫闈?
 * 2. 榧犳爣浜や簰澶勭悊
 * 3. 鑷畾涔夌粯鍒跺拰鍔ㄧ敾
 * 4. 鐩存帴缁樺埗妯″紡鏀寔
 * 
 * 鐗规€э細
 * - 鍙鍖栫殑鍦嗗舰瑙掑害閫夋嫨鍣?
 * - 瀹炴椂瑙掑害鎸囩ず鍣?

 * - 鑷姩缂╂斁鍙嬪ソ鐨勬覆鏌?
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "inputs.basic.circular_angle",
    displayName = "鍦嗗舰瑙掑害閫夋嫨鍣?,
    description = "閫氳繃鍦嗗舰鐣岄潰閫夋嫨瑙掑害鍊硷紝鏀寔鎷栨嫿鏃嬭浆鎿嶄綔銆傛敮鎸佸害鏁板拰寮у害杈撳嚭銆?,
    category = "inputs.basic"
)
public class CircularAngleNode extends BaseCustomUINode {

    // === UI 甯搁噺瀹氫箟 ===
    
    // --- 鍦嗗舰UI鍙傛暟 ---
    /** 鏃嬭浆鐩樺崐寰勶紙鏈缉鏀撅級 */
    private static final float DIAL_RADIUS = 40.0f;
    /** 鏃嬭浆鐩樿竟妗嗗搴?*/
    private static final float DIAL_BORDER_WIDTH = 2.0f;
    /** 瑙掑害鎸囩ず鍣ㄩ暱搴?*/
    private static final float INDICATOR_LENGTH = 15.0f;
    /** 瑙掑害鎸囩ず鍣ㄥ搴?*/
    private static final float INDICATOR_WIDTH = 3.0f;
    /** 鍒诲害鏍囪闀垮害 */
    private static final float TICK_LENGTH = 6.0f;
    /** 涓诲埢搴﹂棿闅旓紙搴︼級 */
    private static final float MAJOR_TICK_INTERVAL = 45.0f;
    /** 娆″埢搴﹂棿闅旓紙搴︼級 */
    private static final float MINOR_TICK_INTERVAL = 15.0f;
    
    // --- 甯冨眬鍙傛暟 ---
    /** 鍦嗗舰UI鍖哄煙楂樺害 */
    private static final float CIRCULAR_UI_HEIGHT = 120.0f;
    
    // --- 棰滆壊甯搁噺 ---
    /** 鏃嬭浆鐩樿儗鏅壊 */
    private static final int DIAL_BG_COLOR = 0xFF2A2A2A;
    /** 鏃嬭浆鐩樿竟妗嗚壊 */
    private static final int DIAL_BORDER_COLOR = 0xFF4A4A4A;
    /** 瑙掑害鎸囩ず鍣ㄩ鑹?*/
    private static final int INDICATOR_COLOR = 0xFF66B3FF;
    /** 涓诲埢搴﹂鑹?*/
    private static final int MAJOR_TICK_COLOR = 0xFF888888;
    /** 娆″埢搴﹂鑹?*/
    private static final int MINOR_TICK_COLOR = 0xFF555555;
    /** 涓績鐐归鑹?*/
    private static final int CENTER_DOT_COLOR = 0xFFFFFFFF;

    // --- 鑺傜偣灞炴€?---
    @NodeProperty(displayName = "瑙掑害", category = "璁剧疆", order = 1,
                  description = "褰撳墠瑙掑害鍊硷紙搴︼級")
    private double angle = 0.0;

    @NodeProperty(displayName = "绮惧害", category = "璁剧疆", order = 2,
                  description = "瑙掑害鍊肩殑灏忔暟浣嶆暟")
    private int precision = 1;

    @NodeProperty(displayName = "鏄剧ず鍒诲害", category = "UI", order = 10,
                  description = "鏄惁鏄剧ず瑙掑害鍒诲害鏍囪")
    private boolean showTicks = true;

    @NodeProperty(displayName = "鏄剧ず鏁板€?, category = "UI", order = 11,
                  description = "鏄惁鏄剧ず瑙掑害鏁板€艰緭鍏ユ")
    private boolean showValueInput = true;

    @NodeProperty(displayName = "鍚敤鐩存帴缁樺埗", category = "鎬ц兘", order = 20,
                  description = "鍚敤鐩存帴缁樺埗妯″紡浠ユ彁鍗囨覆鏌撴€ц兘")
    private boolean allowDirectDrawing = false;

    // --- 浜や簰鐘舵€?---
    private transient boolean isDragging = false;
    private transient float lastMouseAngle = 0.0f;

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_ANGLE_ID = "output_angle";
    private static final String OUTPUT_RADIANS_ID = "output_radians";

    /**
     * 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?
     */
    public CircularAngleNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "inputs.basic.circular_angle");

        // 鍒涘缓杈撳嚭绔彛
        IPort angleOutput = new BasePort(OUTPUT_ANGLE_ID, "Degrees", "Angle in degrees", NodeDataType.DOUBLE, this);
        IPort radiansOutput = new BasePort(OUTPUT_RADIANS_ID, "Radians", "Angle in radians", NodeDataType.DOUBLE, this);
        
        addOutputPort(angleOutput);
        addOutputPort(radiansOutput);

        // 鍒濆鍖栬緭鍑哄€?
        updateOutput();
    }

    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "浣跨敤鍦嗗舰鏃嬭浆鐩樼晫闈㈤€夋嫨瑙掑害鍊笺€傛敮鎸侀紶鏍囨嫋鎷藉拰閿洏杈撳叆銆?;
    }

    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        updateOutput();
    }

    // === BaseCustomUINode 鎶借薄鏂规硶瀹炵幇 ===
    
    @Override
    protected float calculateUIHeight() {
        float height = getMediumPadding(); // 椤堕儴闂磋窛
        height += CIRCULAR_UI_HEIGHT;      // 鍦嗗舰UI鍖哄煙
        height += getMediumPadding();      // 涓棿闂磋窛
        
        if (showValueInput) {
            height += ImGui.getFrameHeight(); // 浣跨敤ImGui鐨勬鏋堕珮搴?
            height += getMediumPadding();     // 搴曢儴闂磋窛
        }
        
        return height;
    }
    
    @Override
    protected float calculateMinUIWidth() {
        // 璁＄畻鎵€闇€鐨勬渶灏忓搴︼紝鑰冭檻鍦嗗舰UI鍜屾枃鏈緭鍏?
        float minWidth = (DIAL_RADIUS * 2) + getContentMargin();
        
        if (showValueInput) {
            // 鑰冭檻杈撳叆妗嗙殑瀹藉害闇€姹?
            String sampleText = "360.0掳"; // 鏈€闀跨殑鍙兘鏂囨湰
            float inputWidth = Math.max(120.0f, ImGui.calcTextSize(sampleText).x + 40.0f);
            minWidth = Math.max(minWidth, inputWidth + getContentMargin());
        }
        
        return minWidth;
    }
    
    @Override
    public boolean supportsDirectDrawing() {
        return allowDirectDrawing;
    }
    
    @Override
    public boolean renderCustomUIDirect(ImDrawList drawList, float screenX, float screenY, 
                                       float width, float height, float zoom) {
        if (!supportsDirectDrawing()) {
            return false;
        }
        
        try {
            float scaledRadius = ZoomHelper.applyZoom(DIAL_RADIUS, zoom);
            float centerX = screenX + width * zoom / 2;
            float centerY = screenY + scaledRadius + ZoomHelper.applyZoom(getMediumPadding(), zoom);
            
            // 缁樺埗鏃嬭浆鐩樿儗鏅?
            drawList.addCircleFilled(centerX, centerY, scaledRadius, DIAL_BG_COLOR);
            drawList.addCircle(centerX, centerY, scaledRadius, DIAL_BORDER_COLOR, 0, ZoomHelper.applyZoom(DIAL_BORDER_WIDTH, zoom));
            
            // 缁樺埗鍒诲害锛堝鏋滃惎鐢級
            if (showTicks) {
                drawTicks(drawList, centerX, centerY, scaledRadius, zoom);
            }
            
            // 缁樺埗瑙掑害鎸囩ず鍣?
            drawAngleIndicator(drawList, centerX, centerY, scaledRadius, zoom);
            
            // 缁樺埗涓績鐐?
            drawList.addCircleFilled(centerX, centerY, ZoomHelper.applyZoom(3.0f, zoom), CENTER_DOT_COLOR);
            
            // 缁樺埗瑙掑害鏂囨湰锛堝鏋滄樉绀烘暟鍊艰緭鍏ワ級
            if (showValueInput) {
                String angleText = String.format("%." + precision + "f掳", angle);
                float textWidth = ImGui.calcTextSize(angleText).x * zoom;
                float textX = centerX - textWidth / 2;
                float textY = centerY + scaledRadius + ZoomHelper.applyZoom(getMediumPadding(), zoom) * 2;
                
                drawList.addText(ImGui.getFont(), ImGui.getFontSize() * zoom, textX, textY, 
                               ImGui.getColorU32(ImGuiCol.Text), angleText);
            }
            
        } catch (Exception e) {
            System.err.println("CircularAngleNode鐩存帴缁樺埗澶辫触: " + e.getMessage());
        }
        
        return false; // 鐩存帴缁樺埗妯″紡涓嶅鐞嗕氦浜?
    }

    @Override
    protected boolean renderCustomUIScaled(float width, float height, float zoom) {
        boolean valueChanged = false;
        boolean hasUIInteraction = false; // 璺熻釜鏄惁鏈塙I浜や簰

        try {
            // 浣跨敤鍔╂墜鏂规硶璁＄畻鍙敤瀹藉害
            float availableWidth = getAvailableWidth(width, zoom);
            float scaledDialRadius = ZoomHelper.applyZoom(DIAL_RADIUS, zoom);
            
            // 娣诲姞椤堕儴闂磋窛
            addVerticalSpacing(getMediumPadding(), zoom);
            
            // 鍒涘缓涓嶅彲瑙佹寜閽潵澶勭悊浜や簰锛堝簲鐢ㄧ缉鏀撅級
            float buttonSize = scaledDialRadius * 2;
            setCenterX(availableWidth, buttonSize);
            
            ImGui.invisibleButton("dial_interaction", buttonSize, buttonSize);
            
            boolean isHovered = ImGui.isItemHovered();
            boolean isClicked = ImGui.isItemClicked();
            boolean isActive = ImGui.isItemActive();
            
            // 澶勭悊榧犳爣浜や簰
            if (isClicked) {
                isDragging = true;
            }
            
            if (isDragging && ImGui.isMouseDown(0)) {
                ImVec2 mousePos = ImGui.getMousePos();
                ImVec2 windowPos = ImGui.getWindowPos();
                ImVec2 cursorStartPos = ImGui.getCursorStartPos();
                
                // 璁＄畻鍦嗗績鐨勭粷瀵逛綅缃紙鑰冭檻缂╂斁鍜屽亸绉伙級
                float buttonOffsetX = getCenterOffset(availableWidth, buttonSize);
                float absoluteCenterX = windowPos.x + cursorStartPos.x + buttonOffsetX + scaledDialRadius;
                float absoluteCenterY = windowPos.y + cursorStartPos.y + scaledDialRadius + ZoomHelper.applyZoom(getMediumPadding(), zoom);
                
                float deltaX = mousePos.x - absoluteCenterX;
                float deltaY = mousePos.y - absoluteCenterY;
                
                // 璁＄畻榧犳爣鐩稿浜庝腑蹇冪殑瑙掑害
                float mouseAngle = (float) Math.toDegrees(Math.atan2(-deltaY, deltaX));
                if (mouseAngle < 0) mouseAngle += 360;
                
                // 鏍规嵁绮惧害璋冩暣瑙掑害
                float stepSize = (float) Math.pow(10, -precision);
                mouseAngle = Math.round(mouseAngle / stepSize) * stepSize;
                
                if (Math.abs(mouseAngle - angle) > 1e-6) {
                    setAngle(mouseAngle);
                    valueChanged = true;
                }
            } else {
                isDragging = false;
            }
            
            // 淇锛氱‘淇濆湪鏈夐紶鏍囦氦浜掓椂杩斿洖true浠ラ樆姝㈣妭鐐规嫋鍔?
            // 褰撻紶鏍囨偓鍋溿€佹椿鍔ㄦ垨姝ｅ湪鎷栧姩鏃堕兘搴旇杩斿洖浜や簰鐘舵€?
            hasUIInteraction |= isHovered || isActive || isDragging;
            
            // 鑾峰彇缁樺埗鍒楄〃杩涜鑷畾涔夌粯鍒?
            ImDrawList drawList = ImGui.getWindowDrawList();
            ImVec2 windowPos = ImGui.getWindowPos();
            ImVec2 cursorStartPos = ImGui.getCursorStartPos();
            
            // 璁＄畻鍦嗗績鐨勭粷瀵逛綅缃?
            float buttonOffsetX = getCenterOffset(availableWidth, buttonSize);
            float absoluteCenterX = windowPos.x + cursorStartPos.x + buttonOffsetX + scaledDialRadius;
            float absoluteCenterY = windowPos.y + cursorStartPos.y + scaledDialRadius + ZoomHelper.applyZoom(getMediumPadding(), zoom);
            
            // 缁樺埗鏃嬭浆鐩橈紙鎵€鏈夊昂瀵搁兘搴旂敤缂╂斁锛?
            int bgColor = isHovered ? brightenColor(DIAL_BG_COLOR, 0.1f) : DIAL_BG_COLOR;
            drawList.addCircleFilled(absoluteCenterX, absoluteCenterY, scaledDialRadius, bgColor);
            drawList.addCircle(absoluteCenterX, absoluteCenterY, scaledDialRadius, DIAL_BORDER_COLOR, 
                             0, ZoomHelper.applyZoom(DIAL_BORDER_WIDTH, zoom));
            
            // 缁樺埗鍒诲害
            if (showTicks) {
                drawTicks(drawList, absoluteCenterX, absoluteCenterY, scaledDialRadius, zoom);
            }
            
            // 缁樺埗瑙掑害鎸囩ず鍣?
            drawAngleIndicator(drawList, absoluteCenterX, absoluteCenterY, scaledDialRadius, zoom);
            
            // 缁樺埗涓績鐐?
            drawList.addCircleFilled(absoluteCenterX, absoluteCenterY, ZoomHelper.applyZoom(3.0f, zoom), CENTER_DOT_COLOR);
            
            // 绉诲姩鍏夋爣鍒板渾褰I涓嬫柟
            ImGui.setCursorPosY(ImGui.getCursorPosY() + buttonSize + ZoomHelper.applyZoom(getMediumPadding(), zoom));
            
            // 鏁板€艰緭鍏ユ锛堝鏋滃惎鐢級
            if (showValueInput) {
                float inputWidth = 120.0f;
                setCenterX(availableWidth, ZoomHelper.applyZoom(inputWidth, zoom));
                
                setItemWidth(inputWidth, zoom);
                
                ImFloat angleValue = new ImFloat((float) angle);
                String format = "%." + precision + "f";
                
                if (ImGui.inputFloat("##angle_input", angleValue, 1.0f, 10.0f, format)) {
                    setAngle(angleValue.get());
                    valueChanged = true;
                }
                hasUIInteraction |= ImGui.isItemHovered() || ImGui.isItemActive();
                
                ImGui.popItemWidth();
                
                // 鏄剧ず鍗曚綅鏍囩
                ImGui.sameLine();
                ImGui.text("掳");
                
                // 搴曢儴闂磋窛
                addVerticalSpacing(getMediumPadding(), zoom);
            }

        } catch (Exception e) {
            System.err.println("CircularAngleNode UI娓叉煋澶辫触: " + e.getMessage());
        }

        // 濡傛灉鏈塙I浜や簰锛岄樆姝簨浠朵紶鎾埌搴曞眰鐢诲竷鍜屾父鎴忎笘鐣?
        if (hasUIInteraction) {
            return true;
        }

        return valueChanged;
    }

    /**
     * 缁樺埗鍒诲害鏍囪
     */
    private void drawTicks(ImDrawList drawList, float centerX, float centerY, float radius, float zoom) {
        // 缁樺埗涓诲埢搴?
        for (float tickAngle = 0; tickAngle < 360; tickAngle += MAJOR_TICK_INTERVAL) {
            drawTick(drawList, centerX, centerY, radius, tickAngle, TICK_LENGTH * zoom, 
                    MAJOR_TICK_COLOR, 2.0f * zoom);
        }
        
        // 缁樺埗娆″埢搴?
        for (float tickAngle = 0; tickAngle < 360; tickAngle += MINOR_TICK_INTERVAL) {
            if (tickAngle % MAJOR_TICK_INTERVAL != 0) {
                drawTick(drawList, centerX, centerY, radius, tickAngle, TICK_LENGTH * 0.6f * zoom, 
                        MINOR_TICK_COLOR, 1.0f * zoom);
            }
        }
    }

    /**
     * 缁樺埗鍗曚釜鍒诲害
     */
    private void drawTick(ImDrawList drawList, float centerX, float centerY, float radius, 
                         float angleDeg, float length, int color, float thickness) {
        double angleRad = Math.toRadians(angleDeg - 90); // -90 浣?搴︽寚鍚戜笂鏂?
        
        float outerX = centerX + (float) (Math.cos(angleRad) * radius);
        float outerY = centerY + (float) (Math.sin(angleRad) * radius);
        float innerX = centerX + (float) (Math.cos(angleRad) * (radius - length));
        float innerY = centerY + (float) (Math.sin(angleRad) * (radius - length));
        
        drawList.addLine(innerX, innerY, outerX, outerY, color, thickness);
    }

    /**
     * 缁樺埗瑙掑害鎸囩ず鍣?
     */
    private void drawAngleIndicator(ImDrawList drawList, float centerX, float centerY, 
                                   float radius, float zoom) {
        double angleRad = Math.toRadians(angle - 90); // -90 浣?搴︽寚鍚戜笂鏂?
        
        float indicatorLength = INDICATOR_LENGTH * zoom;
        float indicatorEndX = centerX + (float) (Math.cos(angleRad) * (radius - indicatorLength));
        float indicatorEndY = centerY + (float) (Math.sin(angleRad) * (radius - indicatorLength));
        
        drawList.addLine(centerX, centerY, indicatorEndX, indicatorEndY, 
                        INDICATOR_COLOR, INDICATOR_WIDTH * zoom);
    }

    /**
     * 澧炲姞棰滆壊浜害
     */
    private int brightenColor(int color, float factor) {
        int a = (color >> 24) & 0xFF;
        int r = (color >> 16) & 0xFF;
        int g = (color >> 8) & 0xFF;
        int b = color & 0xFF;
        
        r = Math.min(255, (int)(r * (1 + factor)));
        g = Math.min(255, (int)(g * (1 + factor)));
        b = Math.min(255, (int)(b * (1 + factor)));
        
        return (a << 24) | (r << 16) | (g << 8) | b;
    }

    /**
     * 璁剧疆瑙掑害鍊?
     */
    public void setAngle(double newAngle) {
        // 瑙勮寖鍖栬搴﹀埌 0-360 鑼冨洿
        newAngle = newAngle % 360.0;
        if (newAngle < 0) newAngle += 360.0;
        
        // 鏍规嵁绮惧害鍥涜垗浜斿叆
        double stepSize = Math.pow(10, -precision);
        newAngle = Math.round(newAngle / stepSize) * stepSize;
        
        if (Math.abs(this.angle - newAngle) > 1e-9) {
            this.angle = newAngle;
            updateOutput();
            markDirty();
        }
    }

    /**
     * 鏇存柊杈撳嚭绔彛鐨勫€?
     */
    private void updateOutput() {
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_ANGLE_ID, angle);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_RADIANS_ID, Math.toRadians(angle));
    }

    // --- Getters/Setters ---

    public double getAngle() { return angle; }
    public int getPrecision() { return precision; }
    public void setPrecision(int precision) { this.precision = Math.max(0, Math.min(5, precision)); }
    public boolean isShowTicks() { return showTicks; }
    public void setShowTicks(boolean showTicks) { this.showTicks = showTicks; }
    public boolean isShowValueInput() { return showValueInput; }
    public void setShowValueInput(boolean showValueInput) { this.showValueInput = showValueInput; }
    public boolean isAllowDirectDrawing() { return allowDirectDrawing; }
    public void setAllowDirectDrawing(boolean allowDirectDrawing) { this.allowDirectDrawing = allowDirectDrawing; }

    // === 娣诲姞缂哄け鐨勫姪鎵嬫柟娉?===
    
    /**
     * 璁＄畻鍙敤鐨勫唴瀹瑰搴︼紙鍑忓幓杈硅窛锛?
     * @param totalWidth 鎬诲搴?
     * @param zoom 缂╂斁鍥犲瓙
     * @return 鍙敤瀹藉害
     */
    protected final float getAvailableWidth(float totalWidth, float zoom) {
        return ZoomHelper.getAvailableWidth(totalWidth, getContentMargin(), zoom);
    }
    
    /**
     * 璁＄畻灞呬腑鍋忕Щ閲?
     * @param availableWidth 鍙敤瀹藉害
     * @param elementWidth 鍏冪礌瀹藉害
     * @return 灞呬腑鍋忕Щ閲?
     */
    protected final float getCenterOffset(float availableWidth, float elementWidth) {
        return ZoomHelper.getCenterOffset(availableWidth, elementWidth);
    }

    // --- 鐘舵€佸簭鍒楀寲 ---

    @Override
    public Object getNodeState() {
        java.util.Map<String, Object> state = new java.util.HashMap<>();
        state.put("angle", angle);
        state.put("precision", precision);
        state.put("showTicks", showTicks);
        state.put("showValueInput", showValueInput);
        state.put("allowDirectDrawing", allowDirectDrawing);
        return state;
    }

    @Override
    public void setNodeState(Object state) {
        if (state instanceof java.util.Map) {
            java.util.Map<?, ?> stateMap = (java.util.Map<?, ?>) state;

            if (stateMap.containsKey("angle")) {
                Object angleObj = stateMap.get("angle");
                if (angleObj instanceof Number) {
                    setAngle(((Number) angleObj).doubleValue());
                }
            }

            if (stateMap.containsKey("precision")) {
                Object precisionObj = stateMap.get("precision");
                if (precisionObj instanceof Number) {
                    setPrecision(((Number) precisionObj).intValue());
                }
            }

            if (stateMap.containsKey("showTicks")) {
                Object showTicksObj = stateMap.get("showTicks");
                if (showTicksObj instanceof Boolean) {
                    setShowTicks((Boolean) showTicksObj);
                }
            }

            if (stateMap.containsKey("showValueInput")) {
                Object showInputObj = stateMap.get("showValueInput");
                if (showInputObj instanceof Boolean) {
                    setShowValueInput((Boolean) showInputObj);
                }
            }

            if (stateMap.containsKey("allowDirectDrawing")) {
                Object allowDirectObj = stateMap.get("allowDirectDrawing");
                if (allowDirectObj instanceof Boolean) {
                    setAllowDirectDrawing((Boolean) allowDirectObj);
                }
            }
        }
        markDirty();
    }
}

package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.inputs.basic;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.IPort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeProperty;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.util.Color;
import com.nodecraft.gui.editor.impl.BaseCustomUINode;
import com.nodecraft.gui.editor.impl.ZoomHelper;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;

// ImGUI鐩稿叧瀵煎叆
import imgui.ImGui;
import imgui.flag.ImGuiColorEditFlags;
import imgui.type.ImBoolean;

import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * 棰滆壊閫夋嫨鍣ㄨ妭鐐癸紝鍏佽鐢ㄦ埛閫夋嫨棰滆壊銆?
 * 鏀寔ImGUI鑷畾涔塙I娓叉煋锛岀户鎵緽aseCustomUINode鑾峰緱缂╂斁鎰熺煡鍜屽竷灞€绠＄悊鍔熻兘銆?
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "inputs.basic.color_picker",
    displayName = "棰滆壊閫夋嫨鍣?,
    description = "鍏佽鐢ㄦ埛閫夋嫨棰滆壊鍊硷紝鏀寔RGB鍜岄€忔槑搴?,
    category = "inputs.basic"
)
public class ColorPickerNode extends BaseCustomUINode {
    
    // --- 鑺傜偣灞炴€?---
    @NodeProperty(displayName = "棰滆壊", category = "璁剧疆", order = 1,
                  description = "褰撳墠閫夋嫨鐨勯鑹?)
    private Color color = new Color(1.0f, 1.0f, 1.0f, 1.0f); // 榛樿涓虹櫧鑹?
    
    @NodeProperty(displayName = "鍖呭惈閫忔槑搴?, category = "璁剧疆", order = 2,
                  description = "鏄惁鍖呭惈閫忔槑搴﹂€夋嫨")
    private boolean includeAlpha = true;
    
    @NodeProperty(displayName = "鏄剧ず棰勮", category = "UI璁剧疆", order = 10,
                  description = "鏄剧ず棰滆壊棰勮鎸夐挳")
    private boolean showPreview = true;
    
    @NodeProperty(displayName = "鏄剧ず鍗佸叚杩涘埗", category = "UI璁剧疆", order = 11,
                  description = "鏄剧ず鍗佸叚杩涘埗棰滆壊鍊?)
    private boolean showHexValue = true;
    
    @NodeProperty(displayName = "鏄剧ずRGB鏁板€?, category = "UI璁剧疆", order = 12,
                  description = "鏄剧ずRGB鏁板€间俊鎭?)
    private boolean showRGBValues = true;
    
    private String description = "Allows selection of a color value."; // 鑺傜偣鎻忚堪
    
    // --- UI鐘舵€?---
    private float[] colorArray = {1.0f, 1.0f, 1.0f, 1.0f}; // ImGUI棰滆壊鏁扮粍
    private boolean needsUIUpdate = false; // 鏍囪鏄惁闇€瑕佹洿鏂癠I
    
    // --- UI甯冨眬甯搁噺 ---
    private static final float COLOR_PREVIEW_HEIGHT = 30.0f;
    private static final float COLOR_EDIT_HEIGHT = 120.0f;
    private static final float TEXT_LINE_HEIGHT = 18.0f;
    private static final float CHECKBOX_HEIGHT = 20.0f;
    
    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_COLOR_ID = "output_color";
    private static final String OUTPUT_RED_ID = "output_red";
    private static final String OUTPUT_GREEN_ID = "output_green";
    private static final String OUTPUT_BLUE_ID = "output_blue";
    private static final String OUTPUT_ALPHA_ID = "output_alpha";
    
    /**
     * 鏋勯€犱竴涓柊鐨勯鑹查€夋嫨鍣ㄨ妭鐐?
     */
    public ColorPickerNode() {
        // 浣跨敤鏂扮殑鍒嗙被鍛藉悕 - inputs.basic.color_picker
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "inputs.basic.color_picker");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        IPort colorOutput = new BasePort(OUTPUT_COLOR_ID, "Color", "The selected color", NodeDataType.COLOR, this);
        addOutputPort(colorOutput);
        
        IPort redOutput = new BasePort(OUTPUT_RED_ID, "Red", "Red component (0-1)", NodeDataType.FLOAT, this);
        addOutputPort(redOutput);
        
        IPort greenOutput = new BasePort(OUTPUT_GREEN_ID, "Green", "Green component (0-1)", NodeDataType.FLOAT, this);
        addOutputPort(greenOutput);
        
        IPort blueOutput = new BasePort(OUTPUT_BLUE_ID, "Blue", "Blue component (0-1)", NodeDataType.FLOAT, this);
        addOutputPort(blueOutput);
        
        IPort alphaOutput = new BasePort(OUTPUT_ALPHA_ID, "Alpha", "Alpha component (0-1)", NodeDataType.FLOAT, this);
        addOutputPort(alphaOutput);
        
        // 鍒濆鍖朥I棰滆壊鏁扮粍
        updateColorArray();
        
        // 鍒濆鍖栬緭鍑哄€?
        updateOutput();
    }
    
    // === BaseCustomUINode 鎶借薄鏂规硶瀹炵幇 ===
    
    @Override
    protected float calculateUIHeight() {
        float height = getMediumPadding(); // 椤堕儴杈硅窛
        
        // 棰滆壊棰勮鍖哄煙
        if (showPreview) {
            height += COLOR_PREVIEW_HEIGHT + getSmallPadding();
        }
        
        // 棰滆壊缂栬緫鍣ㄥ尯鍩?- 浣跨敤鍔ㄦ€侀珮搴﹁绠?
        height += COLOR_EDIT_HEIGHT + getMediumPadding();
        
        // 淇℃伅鏄剧ず鍖哄煙
        if (showRGBValues) {
            // RGB琛?+ Alpha琛岋紙濡傛灉鍚敤锛?
            int textLines = includeAlpha ? 2 : 1;
            height += TEXT_LINE_HEIGHT * textLines + getSmallPadding();
        }
        
        if (showHexValue) {
            height += TEXT_LINE_HEIGHT + getSmallPadding();
        }
        
        // Alpha寮€鍏?
        height += CHECKBOX_HEIGHT + getMediumPadding();
        
        return height;
    }
    
    @Override
    protected float calculateMinUIWidth() {
        // 棰滆壊閫夋嫨鍣ㄩ渶瑕佽冻澶熺殑瀹藉害鏉ユ樉绀洪鑹茬紪杈戝櫒
        float minWidth = 220.0f; // 澧炲姞鍩虹瀹藉害浠ラ€傚簲棰滆壊閫夋嫨鍣?
        
        if (showHexValue) {
            // 鑰冭檻鍗佸叚杩涘埗鏂囨湰鐨勫搴?
            String sampleHex = includeAlpha ? "Hex: #AARRGGBB" : "Hex: #RRGGBB";
            // 浣跨敤浼扮畻鐨勬枃鏈搴︼紝鍥犱负ImGui.calcTextSize鍦ㄨ繖閲屽彲鑳戒笉鍙敤
            float estimatedHexWidth = sampleHex.length() * 8.0f + 20.0f; // 浼扮畻瀛楃瀹藉害
            minWidth = Math.max(minWidth, estimatedHexWidth);
        }
        
        if (showRGBValues) {
            // 鑰冭檻RGB鏂囨湰鐨勫搴?
            String sampleRGB = "RGB: 1.000, 1.000, 1.000";
            float estimatedRGBWidth = sampleRGB.length() * 8.0f + 20.0f;
            minWidth = Math.max(minWidth, estimatedRGBWidth);
        }
        
        return minWidth + getContentMargin();
    }
    
    @Override
    protected boolean renderCustomUIScaled(float width, float height, float zoom) {
        // 浣跨敤鏂扮殑 LayoutHelper API
        return layout(zoom, l -> {
            boolean valueChanged = false;
            
            // 澶勭悊闇€瑕佺殑UI鏇存柊
            if (needsUIUpdate) {
                updateColorArray();
                needsUIUpdate = false;
            }
            
            // 璁＄畻鍙敤瀹藉害
            float availableWidth = l.getAvailableContentWidth(width);
            
            // 棰滆壊棰勮鎸夐挳
            if (showPreview) {
                valueChanged |= renderColorPreview(availableWidth, l);
                l.addVerticalSpacing(getSmallPadding());
            }
            
            // 棰滆壊缂栬緫鍣?
            valueChanged |= renderColorEditor(availableWidth, l);
            l.addVerticalSpacing(getMediumPadding());
            
            // 鏄剧ず鏁板€间俊鎭?
            if (showRGBValues) {
                renderRGBValues(l);
                l.addVerticalSpacing(getSmallPadding());
            }
            
            // 鍗佸叚杩涘埗鏄剧ず
            if (showHexValue) {
                renderHexValue(l);
                l.addVerticalSpacing(getSmallPadding());
            }
            
            // Alpha寮€鍏?
            valueChanged |= renderAlphaToggle(l);
            
            return valueChanged;
        });
    }
    
    /**
     * 娓叉煋棰滆壊棰勮鎸夐挳
     */
    private boolean renderColorPreview(float availableWidth, LayoutHelper l) {
        float buttonHeight = l.toPixels(COLOR_PREVIEW_HEIGHT);
        
        // 浣跨敤缂╂斁鍚庣殑瀹藉害
        ImGui.pushItemWidth(availableWidth);
        boolean clicked = ImGui.colorButton("##color_preview_" + getId(), 
                                          colorArray,
                                          ImGuiColorEditFlags.AlphaPreview, availableWidth, buttonHeight);
        ImGui.popItemWidth();
        
        return false; // 棰勮鎸夐挳涓嶆敼鍙樺€?
    }
    
    /**
     * 娓叉煋棰滆壊缂栬緫鍣?
     */
    private boolean renderColorEditor(float availableWidth, LayoutHelper l) {
        // 璁剧疆棰滆壊缂栬緫鍣ㄦ爣蹇?
        int colorEditFlags = ImGuiColorEditFlags.DisplayRGB | 
                           ImGuiColorEditFlags.InputRGB |
                           ImGuiColorEditFlags.Float |
                           ImGuiColorEditFlags.PickerHueWheel;
        
        if (includeAlpha) {
            colorEditFlags |= ImGuiColorEditFlags.AlphaBar | ImGuiColorEditFlags.AlphaPreview;
        } else {
            colorEditFlags |= ImGuiColorEditFlags.NoAlpha;
        }
        
        // 搴旂敤缂╂斁鐨勬牱寮?
        l.pushFramePadding(4.0f, 4.0f);
        l.pushFrameRounding(3.0f);
        
        // 棰滆壊鎷惧彇鍣ㄥ皬閮ㄤ欢 - 浣跨敤缂╂斁鍚庣殑瀹藉害
        ImGui.pushItemWidth(availableWidth);
        boolean colorChanged = false;
        
        if (includeAlpha) {
            colorChanged = ImGui.colorEdit4("##color_edit_" + getId(), colorArray, colorEditFlags);
        } else {
            colorChanged = ImGui.colorEdit3("##color_edit_" + getId(), colorArray, colorEditFlags);
        }
        
        ImGui.popItemWidth();
        l.popStyleVar(2); // 寮瑰嚭鏍峰紡鍙橀噺
        
        if (colorChanged) {
            onColorChangedFromUI();
        }
        
        return colorChanged;
    }
    
    /**
     * 娓叉煋RGB鏁板€间俊鎭?
     */
    private void renderRGBValues(LayoutHelper l) {
        // 浣跨敤缂╂斁鎰熺煡鐨勬枃鏈覆鏌?
        ImGui.text(String.format("RGB: %.3f, %.3f, %.3f", colorArray[0], colorArray[1], colorArray[2]));
        if (includeAlpha) {
            ImGui.text(String.format("Alpha: %.3f", colorArray[3]));
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * 娓叉煋鍗佸叚杩涘埗鍊?
     */
    private void renderHexValue(LayoutHelper l) {
        String hexColor = colorToHex();
        ImGui.text("Hex: " + hexColor);
    }
    
    /**
     * 娓叉煋Alpha寮€鍏?
     */
    private boolean renderAlphaToggle(LayoutHelper l) {
        // 搴旂敤缂╂斁鐨勬牱寮?
        l.pushFramePadding(2.0f, 2.0f);
        
        ImBoolean alphaToggle = new ImBoolean(includeAlpha);
        boolean changed = ImGui.checkbox("Include Alpha##" + getId(), alphaToggle);
        
        l.popStyleVar(); // 寮瑰嚭鏍峰紡鍙橀噺
        
        if (changed) {
            setIncludeAlpha(alphaToggle.get());
        }
        
        return changed;
    }
    
    /**
     * 褰撻鑹蹭粠UI鏀瑰彉鏃惰皟鐢?
     */
    private void onColorChangedFromUI() {
        // 鏇存柊鍐呴儴棰滆壊瀵硅薄
        float alpha = includeAlpha ? colorArray[3] : color.getAlpha();
        Color newColor = new Color(colorArray[0], colorArray[1], colorArray[2], alpha);
        
        if (!this.color.equals(newColor)) {
            this.color = newColor;
            updateOutput();
            markDirty();
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * 灏嗛鑹插璞″悓姝ュ埌UI鏁扮粍
     */
    private void updateColorArray() {
        colorArray[0] = color.getRed();
        colorArray[1] = color.getGreen();
        colorArray[2] = color.getBlue();
        colorArray[3] = color.getAlpha();
    }
    
    /**
     * 灏嗗綋鍓嶉鑹茶浆鎹负鍗佸叚杩涘埗瀛楃涓?
     */
    private String colorToHex() {
        int r = (int)(colorArray[0] * 255);
        int g = (int)(colorArray[1] * 255);
        int b = (int)(colorArray[2] * 255);
        
        if (includeAlpha) {
            int a = (int)(colorArray[3] * 255);
            return String.format("#%02X%02X%02X%02X", a, r, g, b);
        } else {
            return String.format("#%02X%02X%02X", r, g, b);
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * 瀹炵幇INode鎺ュ彛鐨刧etDescription鏂规硶
     * @return 鑺傜偣鎻忚堪
     */
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return this.description;
    }
    
    /**
     * 鑺傜偣鐨勮绠楅€昏緫
     * @param context 鎵ц涓婁笅鏂?
     */
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        updateOutput();
    }
    
    /**
     * 璁剧疆棰滆壊
     * @param color 鏂扮殑棰滆壊
     */
    public void setColor(Color color) {
        if (color == null) {
            color = new Color(1.0f, 1.0f, 1.0f, 1.0f); // 闃叉绌哄紩鐢?
        }
        
        // 濡傛灉涓嶅寘鍚€忔槑搴︼紝鍒欎繚鐣欏師閫忔槑搴?
        if (!includeAlpha) {
            color = new Color(color.getRed(), color.getGreen(), color.getBlue(), this.color.getAlpha());
        }
        
        // 濡傛灉鍊煎彉鍖栦簡锛屾洿鏂拌妭鐐圭姸鎬?
        if (!this.color.equals(color)) {
            this.color = color;
            needsUIUpdate = true; // 鏍囪闇€瑕佹洿鏂癠I
            updateOutput();
            
            // 閫氱煡绯荤粺姝よ妭鐐圭殑杈撳嚭宸叉洿鏂?
            markDirty();
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * 璁剧疆棰滆壊鐨凴GBA鍒嗛噺
     * @param red 绾㈣壊鍒嗛噺 (0-1)
     * @param green 缁胯壊鍒嗛噺 (0-1)
     * @param blue 钃濊壊鍒嗛噺 (0-1)
     * @param alpha 閫忔槑搴?(0-1)
     */
    public void setColor(float red, float green, float blue, float alpha) {
        // 濡傛灉涓嶅寘鍚€忔槑搴︼紝鍒欎繚鐣欏師閫忔槑搴?
        if (!includeAlpha) {
            alpha = this.color.getAlpha();
        }
        
        setColor(new Color(red, green, blue, alpha));
    }
    
    /**
     * 浠庡崄鍏繘鍒跺瓧绗︿覆璁剧疆棰滆壊
     * @param hexColor 鍗佸叚杩涘埗棰滆壊瀛楃涓?(#RRGGBB 鎴?#AARRGGBB)
     */
    public void setColorFromHex(String hexColor) {
        Color newColor = Color.fromHex(hexColor);
        
        // 濡傛灉涓嶅寘鍚€忔槑搴︼紝鍒欎繚鐣欏師閫忔槑搴?
        if (!includeAlpha) {
            newColor = new Color(newColor.getRed(), newColor.getGreen(), newColor.getBlue(), this.color.getAlpha());
        }
        
        setColor(newColor);
    }
    
    /**
     * 鏇存柊杈撳嚭绔彛鐨勫€?
     */
    private void updateOutput() {
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_COLOR_ID, this.color);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_RED_ID, this.color.getRed());
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_GREEN_ID, this.color.getGreen());
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_BLUE_ID, this.color.getBlue());
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_ALPHA_ID, this.color.getAlpha());
    }
    
    // --- Getters/Setters for Properties ---
    
    public Color getColor() {
        return color;
    }
    
    public boolean isIncludeAlpha() {
        return includeAlpha;
    }
    
    public void setIncludeAlpha(boolean includeAlpha) {
        if (this.includeAlpha != includeAlpha) {
            this.includeAlpha = includeAlpha;
            needsUIUpdate = true; // 鏍囪闇€瑕佹洿鏂癠I
            invalidateCache(); // 浣跨紦瀛樻棤鏁堬紝閲嶆柊璁＄畻UI灏哄
        }
    }
    
    public boolean isShowPreview() {
        return showPreview;
    }
    
    public void setShowPreview(boolean showPreview) {
        if (this.showPreview != showPreview) {
            this.showPreview = showPreview;
            invalidateCache(); // 浣跨紦瀛樻棤鏁堬紝閲嶆柊璁＄畻UI灏哄
        }
    }
    
    public boolean isShowHexValue() {
        return showHexValue;
    }
    
    public void setShowHexValue(boolean showHexValue) {
        if (this.showHexValue != showHexValue) {
            this.showHexValue = showHexValue;
            invalidateCache(); // 浣跨紦瀛樻棤鏁堬紝閲嶆柊璁＄畻UI灏哄
        }
    }
    
    public boolean isShowRGBValues() {
        return showRGBValues;
    }
    
    public void setShowRGBValues(boolean showRGBValues) {
        if (this.showRGBValues != showRGBValues) {
            this.showRGBValues = showRGBValues;
            invalidateCache(); // 浣跨紦瀛樻棤鏁堬紝閲嶆柊璁＄畻UI灏哄
        }
    }
    
    // === 娣诲姞缂哄け鐨勫姪鎵嬫柟娉?===
    
    /**
     * 璁＄畻鍙敤鐨勫唴瀹瑰搴︼紙鍑忓幓杈硅窛锛?
     * @param totalWidth 鎬诲搴?
     * @param zoom 缂╂斁鍥犲瓙
     * @return 鍙敤瀹藉害
     */
    protected final float getAvailableWidth(float totalWidth, float zoom) {
        return ZoomHelper.getAvailableWidth(totalWidth, getContentMargin(), zoom);
    }
    
    /**
     * 璁＄畻灞呬腑鍋忕Щ閲?
     * @param availableWidth 鍙敤瀹藉害
     * @param elementWidth 鍏冪礌瀹藉害
     * @return 灞呬腑鍋忕Щ閲?
     */
    protected final float getCenterOffset(float availableWidth, float elementWidth) {
        return ZoomHelper.getCenterOffset(availableWidth, elementWidth);
    }
    
    // --- 鑺傜偣鐘舵€佸簭鍒楀寲 ---
    
    @Override
    public Object getNodeState() {
        // 杩斿洖鑺傜偣鎵€鏈夊彲搴忓垪鍖栫殑鐘舵€?
        java.util.Map<String, Object> state = new java.util.HashMap<>();
        
        // 淇濆瓨棰滆壊涓篈RGB鏁存暟
        state.put("color", this.color.toArgb());
        state.put("includeAlpha", this.includeAlpha);
        state.put("showPreview", this.showPreview);
        state.put("showHexValue", this.showHexValue);
        state.put("showRGBValues", this.showRGBValues);
        
        return state;
    }
    
    @Override
    public void setNodeState(Object state) {
        if (state instanceof java.util.Map) {
            java.util.Map<?, ?> stateMap = (java.util.Map<?, ?>) state;
            
            // 璁剧疆鏄惁鍖呭惈閫忔槑搴?
            if (stateMap.containsKey("includeAlpha")) {
                Object includeAlpha = stateMap.get("includeAlpha");
                if (includeAlpha instanceof Boolean) {
                    setIncludeAlpha((Boolean) includeAlpha);
                }
            }
            
            // 璁剧疆UI鏄剧ず閫夐」
            if (stateMap.containsKey("showPreview")) {
                Object showPreview = stateMap.get("showPreview");
                if (showPreview instanceof Boolean) {
                    setShowPreview((Boolean) showPreview);
                }
            }
            
            if (stateMap.containsKey("showHexValue")) {
                Object showHexValue = stateMap.get("showHexValue");
                if (showHexValue instanceof Boolean) {
                    setShowHexValue((Boolean) showHexValue);
                }
            }
            
            if (stateMap.containsKey("showRGBValues")) {
                Object showRGBValues = stateMap.get("showRGBValues");
                if (showRGBValues instanceof Boolean) {
                    setShowRGBValues((Boolean) showRGBValues);
                }
            }
            
            // 璁剧疆棰滆壊
            if (stateMap.containsKey("color")) {
                Object colorValue = stateMap.get("color");
                if (colorValue instanceof Integer) {
                    setColor(new Color((Integer) colorValue));
                } else if (colorValue instanceof String) {
                    // 灏濊瘯浣滀负鍗佸叚杩涘埗瀛楃涓茶В鏋?
                    setColorFromHex((String) colorValue);
                }
            }
        }
    }
} 
===FILE: C:\Users\navib\Desktop\development\NC\nodecraft\src\main\java\com\nodecraft\nodesystem\nodes\inputs\basic\FloatInputNode.java===
package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.inputs.basic;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.IPort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;

import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * 娴偣鏁拌緭鍏ヨ妭鐐癸紝鍏佽鐢ㄦ埛鎵嬪姩杈撳叆娴偣鏁板€笺€?
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "inputs.basic.float_input",
    displayName = "娴偣鏁拌緭鍏?,
    description = "鍏佽鐢ㄦ埛鎵嬪姩杈撳叆娴偣鏁板€?,
    category = "inputs.basic"
)
public class FloatInputNode extends BaseNode {
    
    // --- 鑺傜偣灞炴€?---
    private float value = 0.0f;
    private float minValue = Float.NEGATIVE_INFINITY;
    private float maxValue = Float.POSITIVE_INFINITY;
    private int precision = 2; // 榛樿淇濈暀2浣嶅皬鏁?
    private String description = "Allows manual input of a floating point value."; // 鑺傜偣鎻忚堪
    
    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_VALUE_ID = "output_value";
    
    /**
     * 鏋勯€犱竴涓柊鐨勬诞鐐规暟杈撳叆鑺傜偣
     */
    public FloatInputNode() {
        // 浣跨敤鏂扮殑鍒嗙被鍛藉悕 - inputs.basic.float_input
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "inputs.basic.float_input");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        IPort valueOutput = new BasePort(OUTPUT_VALUE_ID, "Value", "The float value", NodeDataType.FLOAT, this);
        addOutputPort(valueOutput);
        
        // 鍒濆鍖栬緭鍑哄€?
        updateOutput();
    }
    
    /**
     * 瀹炵幇INode鎺ュ彛鐨刧etDescription鏂规硶
     * @return 鑺傜偣鎻忚堪
     */
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return this.description;
    }
    
    /**
     * 鑺傜偣鐨勮绠楅€昏緫
     * @param context 鎵ц涓婁笅鏂?
     */
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        updateOutput();
    }
    
    /**
     * 褰撶敤鎴峰湪UI涓緭鍏ュ€兼椂璋冪敤姝ゆ柟娉?
     * @param value 鏂扮殑娴偣鍊?
     */
    public void setValue(float value) {
        // 搴旂敤鑼冨洿绾︽潫
        float clampedValue = Math.max(minValue, Math.min(maxValue, value));
        
        // 搴旂敤绮惧害绾︽潫
        if (precision >= 0) {
            float multiplier = (float) Math.pow(10, precision);
            clampedValue = Math.round(clampedValue * multiplier) / multiplier;
        }
        
        // 濡傛灉鍊煎彉鍖栦簡锛屾洿鏂拌妭鐐圭姸鎬?
        if (this.value != clampedValue) {
            this.value = clampedValue;
            updateOutput();
            
            // 閫氱煡绯荤粺姝よ妭鐐圭殑杈撳嚭宸叉洿鏂?
            markDirty();
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * 鏇存柊杈撳嚭绔彛鐨勫€?
     */
    private void updateOutput() {
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_VALUE_ID, this.value);
    }
    
    // --- Getters/Setters for Properties ---
    
    public float getValue() {
        return value;
    }
    
    public float getMinValue() {
        return minValue;
    }
    
    public void setMinValue(float minValue) {
        this.minValue = minValue;
        // 纭繚褰撳墠鍊间粛鍦ㄨ寖鍥村唴
        setValue(this.value);
    }
    
    public float getMaxValue() {
        return maxValue;
    }
    
    public void setMaxValue(float maxValue) {
        this.maxValue = maxValue;
        // 纭繚褰撳墠鍊间粛鍦ㄨ寖鍥村唴
        setValue(this.value);
    }
    
    public int getPrecision() {
        return precision;
    }
    
    public void setPrecision(int precision) {
        if (precision < 0) {
            precision = 0; // 淇濊瘉绮惧害涓洪潪璐熸暟
        }
        
        if (this.precision != precision) {
            this.precision = precision;
            // 鏇存柊鍊间互搴旂敤鏂扮殑绮惧害
            setValue(this.value);
        }
    }
    
    // --- 鑺傜偣鐘舵€佸簭鍒楀寲 ---
    
    @Override
    public Object getNodeState() {
        // 杩斿洖鑺傜偣鎵€鏈夊彲搴忓垪鍖栫殑鐘舵€?
        java.util.Map<String, Object> state = new java.util.HashMap<>();
        state.put("value", getValue());
        state.put("min", getMinValue());
        state.put("max", getMaxValue());
        state.put("precision", getPrecision());
        return state;
    }
    
    @Override
    public void setNodeState(Object state) {
        if (state instanceof java.util.Map) {
            java.util.Map<?, ?> stateMap = (java.util.Map<?, ?>) state;
            
            // 棣栧厛璁剧疆绮惧害鍜岃寖鍥?
            if (stateMap.containsKey("precision")) {
                Object precision = stateMap.get("precision");
                if (precision instanceof Number) {
                    setPrecision(((Number) precision).intValue());
                }
            }
            
            if (stateMap.containsKey("min")) {
                Object min = stateMap.get("min");
                if (min instanceof Number) {
                    setMinValue(((Number) min).floatValue());
                }
            }
            
            if (stateMap.containsKey("max")) {
                Object max = stateMap.get("max");
                if (max instanceof Number) {
                    setMaxValue(((Number) max).floatValue());
                }
            }
            
            // 鏈€鍚庤缃綋鍓嶅€硷紝纭繚搴旂敤鎵€鏈夌害鏉?
            if (stateMap.containsKey("value")) {
                Object value = stateMap.get("value");
                if (value instanceof Number) {
                    setValue(((Number) value).floatValue());
                } else if (value instanceof String) {
                    try {
                        setValue(Float.parseFloat((String) value));
                    } catch (NumberFormatException e) {
                        System.err.println("Failed to parse state value for FloatInputNode: " + value);
                    }
                }
            }
        } else if (state instanceof Number) {
            // 鍚戝悗鍏煎锛氬鏋滅姸鎬佸彧鏄竴涓暟瀛楋紝鐩存帴浣跨敤瀹冧綔涓哄綋鍓嶅€?
            setValue(((Number) state).floatValue());
        }
    }
}

package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.inputs.basic;

// 瀵煎叆蹇呰鐨?NodeCraft 鍩虹被鎴栨帴鍙?
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;

// 瀵煎叆ImGui鐩稿叧绫荤敤浜庤嚜瀹氫箟UI娓叉煋
import imgui.ImGui;
import imgui.type.ImFloat;

// 瀵煎叆灞炴€ф敞瑙?
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeProperty;

// 瀵煎叆鑷畾涔塙I鍩虹被
