/**
 * 娴偣鏁版粦鍔ㄦ潯鑺傜偣 - 鐜颁唬鍖栧疄鐜?
 * 
 * 缁ф壙BaseCustomUINode锛岃嚜鍔ㄨ幏寰楃缉鏀炬劅鐭ュ拰甯冨眬绠＄悊鍔熻兘銆?
 * 
 * 鐗规€э細
 * - 鍙厤缃殑鏁板€艰寖鍥?
 * - 绮惧害鎺у埗锛堝皬鏁颁綅鏁帮級
 * - 缂╂斁鎰熺煡鐨刄I甯冨眬
 * - 鐜颁唬鍖朥I璁捐
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "inputs.basic.float_slider",
    displayName = "娴偣鏁版粦鍔ㄦ潯",
    description = "杈撳嚭涓€涓彲閫氳繃婊戝姩鏉¤皟鑺傜殑娴偣鏁?,
    category = "inputs.basic"
)
public class FloatSliderNode extends BaseCustomUINode {

    // --- 鑺傜偣灞炴€?---
    @NodeProperty(displayName = "鏈€灏忓€?, category = "鑼冨洿", order = 1,
                  description = "婊戝姩鏉＄殑鏈€灏忓€?)
    private double minValue = 0.0;

    @NodeProperty(displayName = "鏈€澶у€?, category = "鑼冨洿", order = 2,
                  description = "婊戝姩鏉＄殑鏈€澶у€?)
    private double maxValue = 100.0;

    @NodeProperty(displayName = "褰撳墠鍊?, category = "鑼冨洿", order = 3,
                  description = "婊戝姩鏉＄殑褰撳墠鍊?)
    private double currentValue = 50.0;

    @NodeProperty(displayName = "灏忔暟浣嶆暟", category = "绮惧害", order = 4,
                  description = "灏忔暟浣嶆暟 (0-9)锛屽悓鏃跺奖鍝嶆闀?)
    private int decimalPlaces = 2;

    @NodeProperty(displayName = "鏄剧ず鑼冨洿鏍囩", category = "UI璁剧疆", order = 10,
                  description = "鍦ㄦ粦鍔ㄦ潯鏃佹樉绀烘渶灏?鏈€澶у€兼爣绛?)
    private boolean showMinMaxLabels = true;

    @NodeProperty(displayName = "鏄剧ず鏁板€艰緭鍏?, category = "UI璁剧疆", order = 12,
                  description = "鏄剧ず鏁板€艰緭鍏ユ")
    private boolean showValueInput = true;

    @NodeProperty(displayName = "鏄剧ず璁剧疆闈㈡澘", category = "UI璁剧疆", order = 14,
                  description = "鏄剧ず鍙傛暟璁剧疆闈㈡澘")
    private boolean showSettingsPanel = false;

    // === 鍐呴儴瀛楁 ===
    private double step;
    private String formatString;

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_VALUE_ID = "output_value";

    /**
     * 鏋勯€犱竴涓柊鐨勬诞鐐规暟婊戝姩鏉¤妭鐐?
     */
    public FloatSliderNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "inputs.basic.float_slider");

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        IPort valueOutput = new BasePort(OUTPUT_VALUE_ID, "Value", "The selected float value", NodeDataType.DOUBLE, this);
        addOutputPort(valueOutput);

        // 鍒濆鍖栫簿搴︾浉鍏冲€煎拰杈撳嚭
        updatePrecisionDependentValues();
        updateOutput();
    }

    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "杈撳嚭涓€涓彲閫氳繃婊戝姩鏉¤皟鑺傜殑娴偣鏁般€?;
    }

    /**
     * 鑺傜偣鐨勮绠楅€昏緫
     * @param context 鎵ц涓婁笅鏂?
     */
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        updateOutput();
    }

    // === BaseCustomUINode 鎶借薄鏂规硶瀹炵幇 ===
    
    @Override
    protected float calculateUIHeight() {
        float height = getMediumPadding(); // 椤堕儴杈硅窛

        // 鏁板€艰緭鍏ユ锛堝鏋滃惎鐢級
        if (showValueInput) {
            height += ImGui.getTextLineHeight(); // 鏍囩
            height += getSmallPadding();
            height += ImGui.getFrameHeight(); // 杈撳叆妗?
            height += getMediumPadding();
        }

        // 婊戝姩鏉?
        height += ImGui.getFrameHeight();
        height += getMediumPadding();

        // 鑼冨洿鏍囩锛堝鏋滃惎鐢級
        if (showMinMaxLabels) {
            height += ImGui.getTextLineHeight();
            height += getSmallPadding();
        }

        // 璁剧疆闈㈡澘鍒囨崲鎸夐挳
        height += ImGui.getFrameHeight();
        height += getMediumPadding();

        // 璁剧疆闈㈡澘锛堝鏋滃睍寮€锛?
        if (showSettingsPanel) {
            height += 1.0f; // 鍒嗛殧绾?
            height += getMediumPadding();
            
            // 涓変釜璁剧疆椤癸細Min Value, Max Value, Decimal Places
            for (int i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
                height += ImGui.getTextLineHeight(); // 鏍囩
                height += getSmallPadding();
                height += ImGui.getFrameHeight(); // 杈撳叆妗?
                height += getSmallPadding();
            }
        }

        height += getLargePadding(); // 搴曢儴杈硅窛
        return height;
    }

    @Override
    protected float calculateMinUIWidth() {
        float minWidth = 0;

        // 婊戝姩鏉＄殑鏈€灏忓搴?
        float sliderMinWidth = 120.0f;

        // 濡傛灉鏄剧ず鑼冨洿鏍囩锛岄渶瑕侀澶栫┖闂?
        if (showMinMaxLabels) {
            String minText = String.format("鏈€灏? " + formatString, minValue);
            String maxText = String.format("鏈€澶? " + formatString, maxValue);
            float minTextWidth = ImGui.calcTextSize(minText).x;
            float maxTextWidth = ImGui.calcTextSize(maxText).x;
            float labelsWidth = Math.max(minTextWidth, maxTextWidth);
            minWidth = Math.max(minWidth, labelsWidth);
        }

        // 鏁板€艰緭鍏ユ鐨勫搴﹂渶姹?
        if (showValueInput) {
            float inputWidth = 100.0f;
            minWidth = Math.max(minWidth, inputWidth);
        }

        // 璁剧疆闈㈡澘鐨勫搴﹂渶姹?
        if (showSettingsPanel) {
            float settingsWidth = 150.0f;
            minWidth = Math.max(minWidth, settingsWidth);
        }

        // 鍙栨渶澶у€煎苟鍔犱笂鑺傜偣鍐呭杈硅窛
        minWidth = Math.max(minWidth, sliderMinWidth) + getContentMargin();

        return minWidth;
    }

    @Override
    protected boolean renderCustomUIScaled(float width, float height, float zoom) {
        // 浣跨敤鏂扮殑 LayoutHelper API
        return layout(zoom, l -> {
            boolean valueChanged = false;
            boolean hasUIInteraction = false; // 璺熻釜鏄惁鏈塙I浜や簰

            try {
                // 璁＄畻鍙敤瀹藉害
                float availableWidth = l.getAvailableContentWidth(width);

                // 娣诲姞椤堕儴闂磋窛
                l.addVerticalSpacing(getMediumPadding());

                // 鏁板€艰緭鍏ユ锛堝鏋滃惎鐢級
                if (showValueInput) {
                    boolean inputChanged = renderValueInput(availableWidth, l);
                    valueChanged |= inputChanged;
                    hasUIInteraction |= inputChanged || ImGui.isItemHovered() || ImGui.isItemActive();
                }

                // 婊戝姩鏉?
                boolean sliderChanged = renderSlider(availableWidth, l);
                valueChanged |= sliderChanged;
                hasUIInteraction |= sliderChanged; // renderSlider宸茬粡鍖呭惈浜嗕氦浜掓娴?

                // 鑼冨洿鏍囩锛堝鏋滃惎鐢級
                if (showMinMaxLabels) {
                    renderRangeLabels(availableWidth, l);
                }

                // 璁剧疆闈㈡澘鍒囨崲鎸夐挳
                boolean toggleChanged = renderSettingsToggle(availableWidth, l);
                valueChanged |= toggleChanged;
                hasUIInteraction |= toggleChanged || ImGui.isItemHovered() || ImGui.isItemActive();

                // 璁剧疆闈㈡澘锛堝鏋滃睍寮€锛?
                if (showSettingsPanel) {
                    boolean settingsChanged = renderSettingsPanel(availableWidth, l);
                    valueChanged |= settingsChanged;
                    hasUIInteraction |= settingsChanged;
                }

                // 搴曢儴闂磋窛
                l.addVerticalSpacing(getLargePadding());

            } catch (Exception e) {
                System.err.println("FloatSliderNode UI娓叉煋澶辫触: " + e.getMessage());
            }

            // 濡傛灉鏈塙I浜や簰锛岄樆姝簨浠朵紶鎾埌搴曞眰鐢诲竷鍜屾父鎴忎笘鐣?
            if (hasUIInteraction) {
                return true;
            }

            return valueChanged;
        });
    }

    /**
     * 娓叉煋鏁板€艰緭鍏ユ
     */
    private boolean renderValueInput(float availableWidth, LayoutHelper l) {
        // 鏍囩
        String valueText = String.format("鍊? " + formatString, currentValue);
        float textWidth = ImGui.calcTextSize(valueText).x;
        setCenterX(availableWidth, textWidth);

        ImGui.pushStyleColor(ImGuiCol.Text, 0.7f, 0.7f, 0.7f, 1.0f);
        ImGui.text(valueText);
        ImGui.popStyleColor();

        l.addVerticalSpacing(getSmallPadding());

        // 杈撳叆妗?
        float inputWidth = 100.0f;
        setCenterX(availableWidth, l.toPixels(inputWidth));

        l.pushFramePadding(2.0f, 1.0f);
        l.setItemWidth(inputWidth);

        ImFloat inputValue = new ImFloat((float) currentValue);
        boolean changed = ImGui.inputFloat("##value_input", inputValue, 0.0f, 0.0f, formatString);
        if (changed) {
            setCurrentValue(inputValue.get());
        }

        l.popItemWidth();
        l.popStyleVar();

        l.addVerticalSpacing(getMediumPadding());
        return changed;
    }

    /**
     * 娓叉煋婊戝姩鏉?
     */
    private boolean renderSlider(float availableWidth, LayoutHelper l) {
        float sliderWidth = availableWidth - l.toPixels(getMediumPadding() * 2);
        
        // 灞呬腑瀵归綈
        setCenterX(availableWidth, sliderWidth);

        // 璁剧疆鏍峰紡
        l.pushFrameRounding(3.0f);
        ImGui.pushStyleVar(imgui.flag.ImGuiStyleVar.GrabRounding, l.toPixels(3.0f));
        ImGui.pushStyleVar(imgui.flag.ImGuiStyleVar.GrabMinSize, l.toPixels(14.0f));
        l.pushFramePadding(2.0f, 4.0f);

        // 璁剧疆婊戝姩鏉￠鑹?
        ImGui.pushStyleColor(ImGuiCol.FrameBg, 0.12f, 0.12f, 0.12f, 1.0f);
        ImGui.pushStyleColor(ImGuiCol.FrameBgHovered, 0.16f, 0.16f, 0.16f, 1.0f);
        ImGui.pushStyleColor(ImGuiCol.SliderGrab, 0.4f, 0.6f, 0.8f, 1.0f);
        ImGui.pushStyleColor(ImGuiCol.SliderGrabActive, 0.5f, 0.7f, 0.9f, 1.0f);

        ImGui.pushItemWidth(sliderWidth);
        float[] floatValue = {(float) currentValue};
        boolean changed = ImGui.sliderFloat("##main_slider", floatValue, (float) minValue,
                (float) maxValue, formatString);
        if (changed) {
            setCurrentValue(floatValue[0]);
        }
        
        // 淇锛氭娴嬫粦鍔ㄦ潯鐨勪氦浜掔姸鎬侊紝纭繚鍦ㄦ偓鍋滄垨鎷栧姩鏃堕樆姝㈣妭鐐规嫋鍔?
        boolean isSliderHovered = ImGui.isItemHovered();
        boolean isSliderActive = ImGui.isItemActive();
        
        ImGui.popItemWidth();

        // 鎭㈠鏍峰紡
        ImGui.popStyleColor(4);
        ImGui.popStyleVar(4);

        l.addVerticalSpacing(getMediumPadding());
        
        // 淇锛氬鏋滄粦鍔ㄦ潯鏈変氦浜掔姸鎬侊紝杩斿洖true浠ラ樆姝㈣妭鐐规嫋鍔?
        return changed || isSliderHovered || isSliderActive;
    }

    /**
     * 娓叉煋鑼冨洿鏍囩
     */
    private void renderRangeLabels(float availableWidth, LayoutHelper l) {
        ImGui.pushStyleColor(ImGuiCol.Text, 0.6f, 0.6f, 0.6f, 1.0f);

        String minText = String.format("鏈€灏? " + formatString, minValue);
        String maxText = String.format("鏈€澶? " + formatString, maxValue);

        // 宸﹀榻愭渶灏忓€?
        float padding = l.toPixels(getMediumPadding());
        ImGui.setCursorPosX(ImGui.getCursorPosX() + padding);
        ImGui.text(minText);

        // 鍙冲榻愭渶澶у€?
        ImGui.sameLine();
        float maxTextWidth = ImGui.calcTextSize(maxText).x;
        float rightOffset = availableWidth - maxTextWidth - padding;
        ImGui.setCursorPosX(ImGui.getCursorPosX() + rightOffset - ImGui.getCursorPosX() + padding);
        ImGui.text(maxText);

        ImGui.popStyleColor();
        l.addVerticalSpacing(getSmallPadding());
    }

    /**
     * 娓叉煋璁剧疆闈㈡澘鍒囨崲鎸夐挳
     */
    private boolean renderSettingsToggle(float availableWidth, LayoutHelper l) {
        float buttonWidth = 120.0f;
        setCenterX(availableWidth, l.toPixels(buttonWidth));

        l.pushFramePadding(2.0f, 1.0f);
        l.setItemWidth(buttonWidth);

        String buttonText = showSettingsPanel ? "闅愯棌璁剧疆" : "鏄剧ず璁剧疆";
        boolean clicked = ImGui.button(buttonText);
        if (clicked) {
            showSettingsPanel = !showSettingsPanel;
        }

        l.popItemWidth();
        l.popStyleVar();

        l.addVerticalSpacing(getMediumPadding());
        return clicked;
    }

    /**
     * 娓叉煋璁剧疆闈㈡澘
     */
    private boolean renderSettingsPanel(float availableWidth, LayoutHelper l) {
        boolean valueChanged = false;

        // 鍒嗛殧绾?
        ImGui.separator();
        l.addVerticalSpacing(getMediumPadding());

        float inputWidth = 100.0f;

        // 鏈€灏忓€艰缃?
        ImGui.text("鏈€灏忓€?");
        l.addVerticalSpacing(getSmallPadding());
        setCenterX(availableWidth, l.toPixels(inputWidth));
        
        l.pushFramePadding(2.0f, 1.0f);
        l.setItemWidth(inputWidth);
        
        ImFloat minInput = new ImFloat((float) minValue);
        if (ImGui.inputFloat("##min_value", minInput, 0.0f, 0.0f, formatString)) {
            setMinValue(minInput.get());
            valueChanged = true;
        }
        l.popItemWidth();
        l.popStyleVar();
        l.addVerticalSpacing(getSmallPadding());

        // 鏈€澶у€艰缃?
        ImGui.text("鏈€澶у€?");
        l.addVerticalSpacing(getSmallPadding());
        setCenterX(availableWidth, l.toPixels(inputWidth));
        
        l.pushFramePadding(2.0f, 1.0f);
        l.setItemWidth(inputWidth);
        
        ImFloat maxInput = new ImFloat((float) maxValue);
        if (ImGui.inputFloat("##max_value", maxInput, 0.0f, 0.0f, formatString)) {
            setMaxValue(maxInput.get());
            valueChanged = true;
        }
        l.popItemWidth();
        l.popStyleVar();
        l.addVerticalSpacing(getSmallPadding());

        // 灏忔暟浣嶆暟璁剧疆
        ImGui.text("灏忔暟浣嶆暟:");
        l.addVerticalSpacing(getSmallPadding());
        setCenterX(availableWidth, l.toPixels(inputWidth));
        
        l.pushFramePadding(2.0f, 1.0f);
        l.setItemWidth(inputWidth);
        
        ImInt decimalInput = new ImInt(decimalPlaces);
        if (ImGui.inputInt("##decimal_places", decimalInput, 1, 1)) {
            setDecimalPlaces(decimalInput.get());
            valueChanged = true;
        }
        l.popItemWidth();
        l.popStyleVar();

        return valueChanged;
    }

    /**
     * 璁剧疆褰撳墠鍊?
     */
    public void setCurrentValue(double newValue) {
        // 搴旂敤鑼冨洿绾︽潫
        double clampedValue = Math.max(minValue, Math.min(maxValue, newValue));

        // 搴旂敤绮惧害绾︽潫
        if (decimalPlaces >= 0) {
            double multiplier = Math.pow(10, decimalPlaces);
            clampedValue = Math.round(clampedValue * multiplier) / multiplier;
        }

        if (Math.abs(this.currentValue - clampedValue) > 1e-9) {
            this.currentValue = clampedValue;
            updateOutput();
            markDirty();
        }
    }

    /**
     * 鏇存柊杈撳嚭绔彛鐨勫€?
     */
    private void updateOutput() {
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_VALUE_ID, currentValue);
    }

    /**
     * 鏇存柊绮惧害鐩稿叧鐨勫€?
     */
    private void updatePrecisionDependentValues() {
        step = Math.pow(10, -decimalPlaces);
        formatString = "%." + decimalPlaces + "f";
    }

    // --- Getters/Setters for Properties ---

    public double getMinValue() {
        return minValue;
    }

    public void setMinValue(double minValue) {
        this.minValue = minValue;
        // 纭繚褰撳墠鍊间粛鍦ㄨ寖鍥村唴
        setCurrentValue(this.currentValue);
    }

    public double getMaxValue() {
        return maxValue;
    }

    public void setMaxValue(double maxValue) {
        this.maxValue = maxValue;
        // 纭繚褰撳墠鍊间粛鍦ㄨ寖鍥村唴
        setCurrentValue(this.currentValue);
    }

    public double getCurrentValue() {
        return currentValue;
    }

    public int getDecimalPlaces() {
        return decimalPlaces;
    }

    public void setDecimalPlaces(int decimalPlaces) {
        this.decimalPlaces = Math.max(0, Math.min(9, decimalPlaces));
        updatePrecisionDependentValues();
        // 閲嶆柊搴旂敤绮惧害鍒板綋鍓嶅€?
        setCurrentValue(this.currentValue);
    }

    public boolean isShowMinMaxLabels() {
        return showMinMaxLabels;
    }

    public void setShowMinMaxLabels(boolean showMinMaxLabels) {
        this.showMinMaxLabels = showMinMaxLabels;
    }

    public boolean isShowValueInput() {
        return showValueInput;
    }

    public void setShowValueInput(boolean showValueInput) {
        this.showValueInput = showValueInput;
    }

    public boolean isShowSettingsPanel() {
        return showSettingsPanel;
    }

    public void setShowSettingsPanel(boolean showSettingsPanel) {
        this.showSettingsPanel = showSettingsPanel;
    }

    public double getStep() {
        return step;
    }

    public String getFormatString() {
        return formatString;
    }

    // --- 鑺傜偣鐘舵€佸簭鍒楀寲 ---

    @Override
    public Object getNodeState() {
        java.util.Map<String, Object> state = new java.util.HashMap<>();
        state.put("minValue", getMinValue());
        state.put("maxValue", getMaxValue());
        state.put("currentValue", getCurrentValue());
        state.put("decimalPlaces", getDecimalPlaces());
        state.put("showMinMaxLabels", isShowMinMaxLabels());
        state.put("showValueInput", isShowValueInput());
        state.put("showSettingsPanel", isShowSettingsPanel());
        return state;
    }

    @Override
    public void setNodeState(Object state) {
        if (state instanceof java.util.Map) {
            java.util.Map<?, ?> stateMap = (java.util.Map<?, ?>) state;

            // 棣栧厛璁剧疆绮惧害鍜岃寖鍥?
            if (stateMap.containsKey("decimalPlaces")) {
                Object decimalPlaces = stateMap.get("decimalPlaces");
                if (decimalPlaces instanceof Number) {
                    setDecimalPlaces(((Number) decimalPlaces).intValue());
                }
            }

            if (stateMap.containsKey("minValue")) {
                Object minValue = stateMap.get("minValue");
                if (minValue instanceof Number) {
                    setMinValue(((Number) minValue).doubleValue());
                }
            }

            if (stateMap.containsKey("maxValue")) {
                Object maxValue = stateMap.get("maxValue");
                if (maxValue instanceof Number) {
                    setMaxValue(((Number) maxValue).doubleValue());
                }
            }

            // UI璁剧疆
            if (stateMap.containsKey("showMinMaxLabels")) {
                Object showLabels = stateMap.get("showMinMaxLabels");
                if (showLabels instanceof Boolean) {
                    setShowMinMaxLabels((Boolean) showLabels);
                }
            }

            if (stateMap.containsKey("showValueInput")) {
                Object showInput = stateMap.get("showValueInput");
                if (showInput instanceof Boolean) {
                    setShowValueInput((Boolean) showInput);
                }
            }

            if (stateMap.containsKey("showSettingsPanel")) {
                Object showSettings = stateMap.get("showSettingsPanel");
                if (showSettings instanceof Boolean) {
                    setShowSettingsPanel((Boolean) showSettings);
                }
            }

            // 鏈€鍚庤缃綋鍓嶅€硷紝纭繚搴旂敤鎵€鏈夌害鏉?
            if (stateMap.containsKey("currentValue")) {
                Object currentValue = stateMap.get("currentValue");
                if (currentValue instanceof Number) {
                    setCurrentValue(((Number) currentValue).doubleValue());
                } else if (currentValue instanceof String) {
                    try {
                        setCurrentValue(Double.parseDouble((String) currentValue));
                    } catch (NumberFormatException e) {
                        setCurrentValue((minValue + maxValue) / 2.0);
                    }
                }
            } else {
                setCurrentValue((minValue + maxValue) / 2.0);
            }
        }
        markDirty();
    }

    // === 娣诲姞缂哄け鐨勫姪鎵嬫柟娉?===
    
    /**
     * 璁＄畻鍙敤鐨勫唴瀹瑰搴︼紙鍑忓幓杈硅窛锛?
     * @param totalWidth 鎬诲搴?
     * @param zoom 缂╂斁鍥犲瓙
     * @return 鍙敤瀹藉害
     */
    protected final float getAvailableWidth(float totalWidth, float zoom) {
        return ZoomHelper.getAvailableWidth(totalWidth, getContentMargin(), zoom);
    }

    /**
     * 璁＄畻灞呬腑鍋忕Щ閲?
     * @param availableWidth 鍙敤瀹藉害
     * @param elementWidth 鍏冪礌瀹藉害
     * @return 灞呬腑鍋忕Щ閲?
     */
    protected final float getCenterOffset(float availableWidth, float elementWidth) {
        return ZoomHelper.getCenterOffset(availableWidth, elementWidth);
    }
}

package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.inputs.basic;

// 瀵煎叆蹇呰鐨?NodeCraft 鍩虹被鎴栨帴鍙?
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.IPort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;

// 瀵煎叆ImGui鐩稿叧绫荤敤浜庤嚜瀹氫箟UI娓叉煋
import imgui.ImGui;
import imgui.type.ImInt;
import imgui.flag.ImGuiCol;

// 瀵煎叆灞炴€ф敞瑙?
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeProperty;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;

// 瀵煎叆鑷畾涔塙I鍩虹被
import com.nodecraft.gui.editor.impl.BaseCustomUINode;
import com.nodecraft.gui.editor.impl.ZoomHelper;

import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * 鏁存暟杈撳叆鑺傜偣 - 鐜颁唬鍖栧疄鐜?
 * 
 * 缁ф壙BaseCustomUINode锛岃嚜鍔ㄨ幏寰楃缉鏀炬劅鐭ュ拰甯冨眬绠＄悊鍔熻兘銆?
 * 
 * 鐗规€э細
 * - 鏁板€艰緭鍏ユ
 * - 鍙厤缃殑鏁板€艰寖鍥?
 * - 缂╂斁鎰熺煡鐨刄I甯冨眬
 * - 鐜颁唬鍖朥I璁捐
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "inputs.basic.integer_input",
    displayName = "鏁存暟杈撳叆",
    description = "鍏佽鎵嬪姩杈撳叆鏁存暟鍊肩殑鑺傜偣",
    category = "inputs.basic"
)
public class IntegerInputNode extends BaseCustomUINode {
    
    // --- 鑺傜偣灞炴€?---
    @NodeProperty(displayName = "褰撳墠鍊?, category = "鏁板€?, order = 1,
                  description = "褰撳墠鐨勬暣鏁板€?)
    private int value = 0;
    
    @NodeProperty(displayName = "鏈€灏忓€?, category = "鑼冨洿", order = 2,
                  description = "鍏佽鐨勬渶灏忔暣鏁板€?)
    private int minValue = Integer.MIN_VALUE;
    
    @NodeProperty(displayName = "鏈€澶у€?, category = "鑼冨洿", order = 3,
                  description = "鍏佽鐨勬渶澶ф暣鏁板€?)
    private int maxValue = Integer.MAX_VALUE;

    @NodeProperty(displayName = "鏄剧ず鑼冨洿", category = "UI璁剧疆", order = 10,
                  description = "鏄惁鏄剧ず鏁板€艰寖鍥翠俊鎭?)
    private boolean showRange = false;

    @NodeProperty(displayName = "鏄剧ず鏍囩", category = "UI璁剧疆", order = 11,
                  description = "鏄惁鏄剧ず鍊兼爣绛?)
    private boolean showLabel = true;
    
    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_VALUE_ID = "output_value";
    
    /**
     * 鏋勯€犱竴涓柊鐨勬暣鏁拌緭鍏ヨ妭鐐?
     */
    public IntegerInputNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "inputs.basic.integer_input");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        IPort valueOutput = new BasePort(OUTPUT_VALUE_ID, "Value", "The integer value", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this);
        addOutputPort(valueOutput);
        
        // 鍒濆鍖栬緭鍑哄€?
        updateOutput();
    }

    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "鍏佽鎵嬪姩杈撳叆鏁存暟鍊肩殑鑺傜偣銆?;
    }
    
    /**
     * 鑺傜偣鐨勮绠楅€昏緫
     * @param context 鎵ц涓婁笅鏂?
     */
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        updateOutput();
    }

    // === BaseCustomUINode 鎶借薄鏂规硶瀹炵幇 ===
    
    @Override
    protected float calculateUIHeight() {
        float height = getMediumPadding(); // 椤堕儴杈硅窛

        // 鏍囩锛堝鏋滃惎鐢級
        if (showLabel) {
            height += ImGui.getTextLineHeight();
            height += getSmallPadding();
        }

        // 杈撳叆妗?
        height += ImGui.getFrameHeight();
        height += getMediumPadding();

        // 鑼冨洿淇℃伅锛堝鏋滃惎鐢級
        if (showRange) {
            height += ImGui.getTextLineHeight();
            height += getSmallPadding();
        }

        height += getMediumPadding(); // 搴曢儴杈硅窛
        return height;
    }

    @Override
    protected float calculateMinUIWidth() {
        float minWidth = 120.0f; // 杈撳叆妗嗙殑鏈€灏忓搴?

        // 鑰冭檻鏍囩鐨勫搴?
        if (showLabel) {
            String labelText = "鍊? " + value;
            float labelWidth = ImGui.calcTextSize(labelText).x;
            minWidth = Math.max(minWidth, labelWidth);
        }

        // 鑰冭檻鑼冨洿淇℃伅鐨勫搴?
        if (showRange) {
            String rangeText = String.format("鑼冨洿: %d - %d", minValue, maxValue);
            float rangeWidth = ImGui.calcTextSize(rangeText).x;
            minWidth = Math.max(minWidth, rangeWidth);
        }

        return minWidth + getContentMargin();
    }

    @Override
    protected boolean renderCustomUIScaled(float width, float height, float zoom) {
        // 浣跨敤鏂扮殑 LayoutHelper API
        return layout(zoom, l -> {
            boolean valueChanged = false;

            try {
                // 璁＄畻鍙敤瀹藉害
                float availableWidth = l.getAvailableContentWidth(width);

                // 娣诲姞椤堕儴闂磋窛
                l.addVerticalSpacing(getMediumPadding());

                // 鏍囩锛堝鏋滃惎鐢級
                if (showLabel) {
                    String labelText = "鍊? " + value;
                    float textWidth = ImGui.calcTextSize(labelText).x;
                    setCenterX(availableWidth, textWidth);

                    ImGui.pushStyleColor(ImGuiCol.Text, 0.7f, 0.7f, 0.7f, 1.0f);
                    ImGui.text(labelText);
                    ImGui.popStyleColor();

                    l.addVerticalSpacing(getSmallPadding());
                }

                // 杈撳叆妗?
                float inputWidth = Math.min(120.0f, availableWidth - l.toPixels(20.0f));
                setCenterX(availableWidth, l.toPixels(inputWidth));

                l.pushFramePadding(4.0f, 2.0f);
                l.setItemWidth(inputWidth);

                ImInt inputValue = new ImInt(value);
                if (ImGui.inputInt("##value_input", inputValue, 1, 10)) {
                    setValue(inputValue.get());
                    valueChanged = true;
                }

                l.popItemWidth();
                l.popStyleVar();

                l.addVerticalSpacing(getMediumPadding());

                // 鑼冨洿淇℃伅锛堝鏋滃惎鐢級
                if (showRange) {
                    String rangeText;
                    if (minValue == Integer.MIN_VALUE && maxValue == Integer.MAX_VALUE) {
                        rangeText = "鑼冨洿: 鏃犻檺鍒?;
                    } else if (minValue == Integer.MIN_VALUE) {
                        rangeText = String.format("鏈€澶у€? %d", maxValue);
                    } else if (maxValue == Integer.MAX_VALUE) {
                        rangeText = String.format("鏈€灏忓€? %d", minValue);
                    } else {
                        rangeText = String.format("鑼冨洿: %d - %d", minValue, maxValue);
                    }
                    
                    float rangeTextWidth = ImGui.calcTextSize(rangeText).x;
                    setCenterX(availableWidth, rangeTextWidth);

                    ImGui.pushStyleColor(ImGuiCol.Text, 0.6f, 0.6f, 0.6f, 1.0f);
                    ImGui.text(rangeText);
                    ImGui.popStyleColor();

                    l.addVerticalSpacing(getSmallPadding());
                }

                // 搴曢儴闂磋窛
                l.addVerticalSpacing(getMediumPadding());

            } catch (Exception e) {
                System.err.println("IntegerInputNode UI娓叉煋澶辫触: " + e.getMessage());
            }

            return valueChanged;
        });
    }
    
    /**
     * 褰撶敤鎴峰湪UI涓緭鍏ュ€兼椂璋冪敤姝ゆ柟娉?
     * @param value 鏂扮殑鏁存暟鍊?
     */
    public void setValue(int value) {
        // 搴旂敤鑼冨洿绾︽潫
        int clampedValue = Math.max(minValue, Math.min(maxValue, value));
        
        // 濡傛灉鍊煎彉鍖栦簡锛屾洿鏂拌妭鐐圭姸鎬?
        if (this.value != clampedValue) {
            this.value = clampedValue;
            updateOutput();
            
            // 閫氱煡绯荤粺姝よ妭鐐圭殑杈撳嚭宸叉洿鏂?
            markDirty();
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * 鏇存柊杈撳嚭绔彛鐨勫€?
     */
    private void updateOutput() {
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_VALUE_ID, this.value);
    }
    
    // --- Getters/Setters for Properties ---
    
    public int getValue() {
        return value;
    }
    
    public int getMinValue() {
        return minValue;
    }
    
    public void setMinValue(int minValue) {
        this.minValue = minValue;
        // 纭繚褰撳墠鍊间粛鍦ㄨ寖鍥村唴
        setValue(this.value);
    }
    
    public int getMaxValue() {
        return maxValue;
    }
    
    public void setMaxValue(int maxValue) {
        this.maxValue = maxValue;
        // 纭繚褰撳墠鍊间粛鍦ㄨ寖鍥村唴
        setValue(this.value);
    }

    public boolean isShowRange() {
        return showRange;
    }

    public void setShowRange(boolean showRange) {
        this.showRange = showRange;
    }

    public boolean isShowLabel() {
        return showLabel;
    }

    public void setShowLabel(boolean showLabel) {
        this.showLabel = showLabel;
    }
    
    // --- 鑺傜偣鐘舵€佸簭鍒楀寲 ---
    
    @Override
    public Object getNodeState() {
        // 杩斿洖鑺傜偣鎵€鏈夊彲搴忓垪鍖栫殑鐘舵€?
        java.util.Map<String, Object> state = new java.util.HashMap<>();
        state.put("value", getValue());
        state.put("min", getMinValue());
        state.put("max", getMaxValue());
        state.put("showRange", isShowRange());
        state.put("showLabel", isShowLabel());
        return state;
    }
    
    @Override
    public void setNodeState(Object state) {
        if (state instanceof java.util.Map) {
            java.util.Map<?, ?> stateMap = (java.util.Map<?, ?>) state;
            
            // 棣栧厛璁剧疆鑼冨洿
            if (stateMap.containsKey("min")) {
                Object min = stateMap.get("min");
                if (min instanceof Number) {
                    setMinValue(((Number) min).intValue());
                }
            }
            
            if (stateMap.containsKey("max")) {
                Object max = stateMap.get("max");
                if (max instanceof Number) {
                    setMaxValue(((Number) max).intValue());
                }
            }

            // UI璁剧疆
            if (stateMap.containsKey("showRange")) {
                Object showRange = stateMap.get("showRange");
                if (showRange instanceof Boolean) {
                    setShowRange((Boolean) showRange);
                }
            }

            if (stateMap.containsKey("showLabel")) {
                Object showLabel = stateMap.get("showLabel");
                if (showLabel instanceof Boolean) {
                    setShowLabel((Boolean) showLabel);
                }
            }
            
            // 鏈€鍚庤缃綋鍓嶅€硷紝纭繚搴旂敤鎵€鏈夌害鏉?
            if (stateMap.containsKey("value")) {
                Object value = stateMap.get("value");
                if (value instanceof Number) {
                    setValue(((Number) value).intValue());
                } else if (value instanceof String) {
                    try {
                        setValue(Integer.parseInt((String) value));
                    } catch (NumberFormatException e) {
                        System.err.println("Failed to parse state value for IntegerInputNode: " + value);
                    }
                }
            }
        } else if (state instanceof Number) {
            // 鍚戝悗鍏煎锛氬鏋滅姸鎬佸彧鏄竴涓暟瀛楋紝鐩存帴浣跨敤瀹冧綔涓哄綋鍓嶅€?
            setValue(((Number) state).intValue());
        }
        markDirty();
    }

    // === 娣诲姞缂哄け鐨勫姪鎵嬫柟娉?===
    
    /**
     * 璁＄畻鍙敤鐨勫唴瀹瑰搴︼紙鍑忓幓杈硅窛锛?
     * @param totalWidth 鎬诲搴?
     * @param zoom 缂╂斁鍥犲瓙
     * @return 鍙敤瀹藉害
     */
    protected final float getAvailableWidth(float totalWidth, float zoom) {
        return ZoomHelper.getAvailableWidth(totalWidth, getContentMargin(), zoom);
    }

    /**
     * 璁＄畻灞呬腑鍋忕Щ閲?
     * @param availableWidth 鍙敤瀹藉害
     * @param elementWidth 鍏冪礌瀹藉害
     * @return 灞呬腑鍋忕Щ閲?
     */
    protected final float getCenterOffset(float availableWidth, float elementWidth) {
        return ZoomHelper.getCenterOffset(availableWidth, elementWidth);
    }
}

package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.inputs.basic;

import com.nodecraft.gui.editor.impl.BaseCustomUINode;
import com.nodecraft.gui.editor.impl.ZoomHelper;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeProperty;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import imgui.ImGui;
import imgui.flag.ImGuiCol;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;

import java.util.UUID;

@NodeInfo(
    id = "inputs.basic.integer_slider",
    displayName = "鏁存暟婊戝姩鏉?,
    description = "杈撳嚭涓€涓彲閫氳繃婊戝姩鏉¤皟鑺傜殑鏁存暟鍊?,
    category = "inputs.basic"
)
public class IntegerSliderNode extends BaseCustomUINode {
    // Node properties
    @NodeProperty(displayName = "Value", category = "Number", order = 1)
    private int value = 50;
    @NodeProperty(displayName = "Min", category = "Range", order = 2)
    private int min = 0;
    @NodeProperty(displayName = "Max", category = "Range", order = 13) // Updated order to make it fit with existing code, was 3
    private int max = 100;
    @NodeProperty(displayName = "Step", category = "Range", order = 14) // Updated order, was 4
    private int step = 1;
    @NodeProperty(displayName = "Compact Mode", category = "UI", order = 11)
    private boolean compact = false;

    // UI state
    private final int[] sliderValue = {50};

    private static final String OUTPUT_ID = "value";

    public IntegerSliderNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "inputs.basic.integer_slider");
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_ID, "Value", "Selected integer", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        sliderValue[0] = value;
        updateOutput();
    }

    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "A high-performance integer slider for selecting numeric values.";
    }

    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        updateOutput();
    }

    // === BaseCustomUINode 鎶借薄鏂规硶瀹炵幇 ===

    @Override
    protected float calculateUIHeight() {
        // Simple height calculation (unscaled logical units)
        // This height determines the *unscaled* base height for the node's UI
        // The actual scaled height will be calculateUIHeight() * zoom externally.
        // Needs to account for padding and content.
        float baseHeight = compact ? 20f : 40f; // Base height of the slider row
        if (!compact) {
            // Add space for the info text below the slider if not compact
            // Roughly add 2 * small padding + text line height (approx. 14-16 for default font)
            baseHeight += getSmallPadding() * 2 + ImGui.getFontSize(); // Use ImGui.getFontSize() for a more accurate scaled line height
        }
        return baseHeight + getMediumPadding() * 2; // Add top and bottom medium padding
    }

    @Override
    protected float calculateMinUIWidth() {
        return 180f; // 纭繚鏈夎冻澶熺殑瀹藉害瀹圭撼婊戝姩鏉″拰涓や晶鎸夐挳 (unscaled logical units)
    }

    @Override
    protected boolean renderCustomUIScaled(float width, float height, float zoom) {
        return layout(zoom, l -> {
            boolean changed = false;
            boolean hasUIInteraction = false; // 璺熻釜鏄惁鏈塙I浜や簰

            try {
                // 璁＄畻鍙敤瀹藉害
                float availableWidth = getAvailableWidth(width, zoom);

                // 娣诲姞椤堕儴闂磋窛
                l.addVerticalSpacing(getMediumPadding());

                // 璁剧疆鏍峰紡
                float padding = compact ? 2f : 4f;
                l.pushFramePadding(padding, padding);

                // 璁＄畻鎸夐挳灏哄
                float buttonHeight = ImGui.getFrameHeight();
                float buttonWidth = buttonHeight;

                // 娓叉煋宸︿晶鍑忓彿鎸夐挳
                ImGui.pushID("minus_btn");
                if (ImGui.button("-", buttonWidth, buttonHeight)) {
                    setValue(value - step);
                    changed = true;
                }
                hasUIInteraction |= ImGui.isItemHovered() || ImGui.isItemActive();
                ImGui.popID();

                ImGui.sameLine();

                // 璁＄畻婊戝姩鏉″搴?                float spacingX = ImGui.getStyle().getItemSpacingX();
                float sliderWidth = availableWidth - (buttonWidth * 2 + spacingX * 2);

                // 璁剧疆婊戝姩鏉″搴?                l.setItemWidth(sliderWidth / zoom);

                // 娓叉煋婊戝姩鏉?                sliderValue[0] = value;
                if (ImGui.sliderInt("##slider", sliderValue, min, max)) {
                    setValue(sliderValue[0]);
                    changed = true;
                }
                hasUIInteraction |= ImGui.isItemHovered() || ImGui.isItemActive();
                l.popItemWidth();
                ImGui.sameLine();

                // 娓叉煋鍙充晶鍔犲彿鎸夐挳
                ImGui.pushID("plus_btn");
                if (ImGui.button("+", buttonWidth, buttonHeight)) {
                    setValue(value + step);
                    changed = true;
                }
                hasUIInteraction |= ImGui.isItemHovered() || ImGui.isItemActive();
                ImGui.popID();

                // 濡傛灉涓嶆槸绱у噾妯″紡锛屾覆鏌撹缃俊鎭?                if (!compact) {
                    l.addVerticalSpacing(getSmallPadding());
                    String infoText = "Min: " + min + " Max: " + max + " Step: " + step;
                    float textWidth = ImGui.calcTextSize(infoText).x;
                    setCenterX(availableWidth, textWidth);

                    ImGui.pushStyleColor(ImGuiCol.Text, 0.7f, 0.7f, 0.7f, 1.0f);
                    ImGui.text(infoText);
                    ImGui.popStyleColor();
                }

                // 鎭㈠鏍峰紡
                l.popStyleVar();

                // 搴曢儴闂磋窛
                l.addVerticalSpacing(getMediumPadding());

            } catch (Exception e) {
                System.err.println("IntegerSliderNode UI娓叉煋澶辫触: " + e.getMessage());
            }

            // 濡傛灉鏈塙I浜や簰锛岄樆姝簨浠朵紶鎾埌搴曞眰鐢诲竷鍜屾父鎴忎笘鐣?            return hasUIInteraction || changed;
        });
    }

    public void setValue(int newValue) {
        newValue = Math.max(min, Math.min(max, newValue));
        if (value != newValue) {
            value = newValue;
            sliderValue[0] = newValue;
            updateOutput();
        }
    }

    private void updateOutput() {
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_ID, value);
    }

    // === Property Getters and Setters ===

    public int getValue() {
        return value;
    }

    public int getMin() {
        return min;
    }

    public void setMin(int min) {
        // Invalidate cache if properties affecting UI size are changed
        if (this.min != min) {
            this.min = min;
            if (value < min) {
                setValue(min);
            }
            invalidateCache(); // Min/Max changes might affect calculated width/height for display
        }
    }

    public int getMax() {
        return max;
    }

    public void setMax(int max) {
        // Invalidate cache if properties affecting UI size are changed
        if (this.max != max) {
            this.max = max;
            if (value > max) {
                setValue(max);
            }
            invalidateCache(); // Min/Max changes might affect calculated width/height for display
        }
    }

    public int getStep() {
        return step;
    }

    public void setStep(int step) {
        // Invalidate cache if properties affecting UI size are changed
        if (this.step != step) {
            this.step = Math.max(1, step); // 纭繚姝ラ暱鑷冲皯涓?
            invalidateCache(); // Step changes might affect calculated width/height for display (unlikely for this node)
        }
    }

    public boolean isCompact() {
        return compact;
    }

    public void setCompact(boolean compact) {
        // Invalidate cache if properties affecting UI size are changed
        if (this.compact != compact) {
            this.compact = compact;
            invalidateCache(); // Compact mode *definitely* affects height
        }
    }

    // === 娣诲姞缂哄け鐨勫姪鎵嬫柟娉?===

    /**
     * 璁＄畻鍙敤鐨勫唴瀹瑰搴︼紙鍑忓幓杈硅窛锛?     * @param totalWidth 鎬诲搴?     * @param zoom 缂╂斁鍥犲瓙
     * @return 鍙敤瀹藉害
     */
    protected final float getAvailableWidth(float totalWidth, float zoom) {
        // Assume getContentMargin() is a per-side margin.
        // For total available content width, subtract margin from both sides.
        // This is a common pattern for ImGui layouts.
        return totalWidth - ZoomHelper.applyZoom(getContentMargin() * 2, zoom);
    }

    /**
     * 璁＄畻灞呬腑鍋忕Щ閲?     * @param availableWidth 鍙敤瀹藉害
     * @param elementWidth 鍏冪礌瀹藉害
     * @return 灞呬腑鍋忕Щ閲?     */
    protected final float getCenterOffset(float availableWidth, float elementWidth) {
        return ZoomHelper.getCenterOffset(availableWidth, elementWidth);
    }
}

package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.inputs.basic;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.IPort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;

import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * 鏂囨湰杈撳叆鑺傜偣锛屽厑璁哥敤鎴疯緭鍏ュ崟琛屾垨澶氳鏂囨湰銆?
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "inputs.basic.text_input",
    displayName = "鏂囨湰杈撳叆",
    description = "鍏佽鐢ㄦ埛杈撳叆鍗曡鎴栧琛屾枃鏈?,
    category = "inputs.basic"
)
public class TextInputNode extends BaseNode {
    
    // --- 鑺傜偣灞炴€?---
    private String text = "";
    private boolean multiline = false;
    private int maxLength = 32767; // 榛樿鏈€澶ч暱搴?
    private String placeholder = "Enter text...";
    private String description = "Allows input of text (single or multiline)."; // 鑺傜偣鎻忚堪
    
    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_TEXT_ID = "output_text";
    
    /**
     * 鏋勯€犱竴涓柊鐨勬枃鏈緭鍏ヨ妭鐐?
     */
    public TextInputNode() {
        // 浣跨敤鏂扮殑鍒嗙被鍛藉悕 - inputs.basic.text_input
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "inputs.basic.text_input");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        IPort textOutput = new BasePort(OUTPUT_TEXT_ID, "Text", "The entered text", NodeDataType.STRING, this);
        addOutputPort(textOutput);
        
        // 鍒濆鍖栬緭鍑哄€?
        updateOutput();
    }
    
    /**
     * 瀹炵幇INode鎺ュ彛鐨刧etDescription鏂规硶
     * @return 鑺傜偣鎻忚堪
     */
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return this.description;
    }
    
    /**
     * 鑺傜偣鐨勮绠楅€昏緫
     * @param context 鎵ц涓婁笅鏂?
     */
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        updateOutput();
    }
    
    /**
     * 璁剧疆鏂囨湰鍐呭
     * @param text 鏂扮殑鏂囨湰鍊?
     */
    public void setText(String text) {
        String newText = text != null ? text : "";
        
        // 搴旂敤闀垮害闄愬埗
        if (newText.length() > maxLength) {
            newText = newText.substring(0, maxLength);
        }
        
        // 濡傛灉涓嶆槸澶氳妯″紡锛岀Щ闄ゆ崲琛岀
        if (!multiline) {
            newText = newText.replace("\n", " ").replace("\r", "");
        }
        
        // 濡傛灉鍊煎彉鍖栦簡锛屾洿鏂拌妭鐐圭姸鎬?
        if (!this.text.equals(newText)) {
            this.text = newText;
            updateOutput();
            
            // 閫氱煡绯荤粺姝よ妭鐐圭殑杈撳嚭宸叉洿鏂?
            markDirty();
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * 鏇存柊杈撳嚭绔彛鐨勫€?
     */
    private void updateOutput() {
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_TEXT_ID, this.text);
    }
    
    // --- Getters/Setters for Properties ---
    
    public String getText() {
        return text;
    }
    
    public boolean isMultiline() {
        return multiline;
    }
    
    public void setMultiline(boolean multiline) {
        if (this.multiline != multiline) {
            this.multiline = multiline;
            
            // 濡傛灉浠庡琛屽垏鎹㈠埌鍗曡锛岄渶瑕佺Щ闄ゆ崲琛岀
            if (!multiline) {
                setText(this.text); // 浼氳Е鍙戠Щ闄ゆ崲琛岀鐨勯€昏緫
            }
        }
    }
    
    public int getMaxLength() {
        return maxLength;
    }
    
    public void setMaxLength(int maxLength) {
        if (maxLength <= 0) {
            maxLength = 32767; // 闃叉璁剧疆鏃犳晥鍊?
        }
        
        this.maxLength = maxLength;
        
        // 濡傛灉褰撳墠鏂囨湰瓒呰繃鏂扮殑鏈€澶ч暱搴︼紝鎴柇鏂囨湰
        if (text.length() > maxLength) {
            setText(text); // 浼氳Е鍙戦暱搴﹂檺鍒剁殑閫昏緫
        }
    }
    
    public String getPlaceholder() {
        return placeholder;
    }
    
    public void setPlaceholder(String placeholder) {
        this.placeholder = placeholder != null ? placeholder : "Enter text...";
    }
    
    // --- 鑺傜偣鐘舵€佸簭鍒楀寲 ---
    
    @Override
    public Object getNodeState() {
        // 杩斿洖鑺傜偣鎵€鏈夊彲搴忓垪鍖栫殑鐘舵€?
        java.util.Map<String, Object> state = new java.util.HashMap<>();
        state.put("text", getText());
        state.put("multiline", isMultiline());
        state.put("maxLength", getMaxLength());
        state.put("placeholder", getPlaceholder());
        return state;
    }
    
    @Override
    public void setNodeState(Object state) {
        if (state instanceof java.util.Map) {
            java.util.Map<?, ?> stateMap = (java.util.Map<?, ?>) state;
            
            // 鍏堣缃睘鎬?
            if (stateMap.containsKey("multiline")) {
                Object multiline = stateMap.get("multiline");
                if (multiline instanceof Boolean) {
                    setMultiline((Boolean) multiline);
                }
            }
            
            if (stateMap.containsKey("maxLength")) {
                Object maxLength = stateMap.get("maxLength");
                if (maxLength instanceof Number) {
                    setMaxLength(((Number) maxLength).intValue());
                }
            }
            
            if (stateMap.containsKey("placeholder")) {
                Object placeholder = stateMap.get("placeholder");
                if (placeholder instanceof String) {
                    setPlaceholder((String) placeholder);
                }
            }
            
            // 鏈€鍚庤缃枃鏈紝纭繚搴旂敤鎵€鏈夌害鏉?
            if (stateMap.containsKey("text")) {
                Object text = stateMap.get("text");
                if (text instanceof String) {
                    setText((String) text);
                } else {
                    setText(String.valueOf(text));
                }
            }
        } else if (state instanceof String) {
            // 鍚戝悗鍏煎锛氬鏋滅姸鎬佺洿鎺ユ槸瀛楃涓诧紝鐩存帴浣跨敤瀹冧綔涓烘枃鏈?
            setText((String) state);
        } else if (state != null) {
            // 濡傛灉鏄叾浠栫被鍨嬶紝灏濊瘯杞崲涓哄瓧绗︿覆
            setText(String.valueOf(state));
        }
    }
}

package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.inputs.minecraft;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.IPort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.minecraft.PlayerAccessor;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;

import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * 鑾峰彇鐜╁褰撳墠浣嶇疆鐢熺墿缇ょ郴鐨勮妭鐐?
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "inputs.minecraft.biome_at_player",
    displayName = "鐜╁浣嶇疆鐢熺墿缇ょ郴",
    description = "鑾峰彇鐜╁褰撳墠浣嶇疆鐨勭敓鐗╃兢绯讳俊鎭?,
    category = "inputs.minecraft"
)
public class BiomeAtPlayerNode extends BaseNode {
    
    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_BIOME_ID = "output_biome_id";
    private static final String OUTPUT_IS_OCEAN_ID = "output_is_ocean";
    private static final String OUTPUT_IS_SNOWY_ID = "output_is_snowy";
    private static final String OUTPUT_IS_HOT_ID = "output_is_hot";
    private static final String OUTPUT_HAS_PRECIPITATION_ID = "output_has_precipitation";
    
    // --- 鑺傜偣灞炴€?---
    private String description = "Gets the biome at the player's current position."; // 鑺傜偣鎻忚堪
    
    /**
     * 鏋勯€犱竴涓柊鐨勭敓鐗╃兢绯昏妭鐐?
     */
    public BiomeAtPlayerNode() {
        // 浣跨敤鏂扮殑鍒嗙被鍛藉悕 - inputs.minecraft.biome_at_player
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "inputs.minecraft.biome_at_player");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        IPort biomeIdOutput = new BasePort(OUTPUT_BIOME_ID, "Biome ID", 
                "The identifier of the biome", NodeDataType.STRING, this);
        addOutputPort(biomeIdOutput);
        
        IPort isOceanOutput = new BasePort(OUTPUT_IS_OCEAN_ID, "Is Ocean", 
                "Whether the biome is an ocean", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this);
        addOutputPort(isOceanOutput);
        
        IPort isSnowyOutput = new BasePort(OUTPUT_IS_SNOWY_ID, "Is Snowy", 
                "Whether the biome is snowy", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this);
        addOutputPort(isSnowyOutput);
        
        IPort isHotOutput = new BasePort(OUTPUT_IS_HOT_ID, "Is Hot", 
                "Whether the biome is hot", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this);
        addOutputPort(isHotOutput);
        
        IPort hasPrecipitationOutput = new BasePort(OUTPUT_HAS_PRECIPITATION_ID, "Has Precipitation", 
                "Whether the biome has precipitation", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this);
        addOutputPort(hasPrecipitationOutput);
        
        // 璁剧疆榛樿杈撳嚭鍊?
        resetOutputs();
    }
    
    /**
     * 瀹炵幇INode鎺ュ彛鐨刧etDescription鏂规硶
     * @return 鑺傜偣鎻忚堪
     */
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return this.description;
    }
    
    /**
     * 鑺傜偣鐨勮绠楅€昏緫
     * @param context 鎵ц涓婁笅鏂?
     */
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        if (context == null) {
            resetOutputs();
            return;
        }
        
        // 鑾峰彇鐜╁鐢熺墿缇ょ郴
        PlayerAccessor playerAccessor = context.getPlayerAccessor();
        if (playerAccessor == null) {
            resetOutputs();
            return;
        }
        
        updateOutputs(playerAccessor);
    }
    
    /**
     * 鏇存柊杈撳嚭鍊?
     */
    private void updateOutputs(PlayerAccessor playerAccessor) {
        // 鑾峰彇鐢熺墿缇ょ郴ID
        String biomeId = playerAccessor.getPlayerBiome();
        
        // 杩欓噷鎴戜滑閫氳繃鍒嗘瀽biomeId瀛楃涓叉潵纭畾鐢熺墿缇ょ郴鐗规€?
        // 鍦ㄥ疄闄呭疄鐜颁腑锛屽彲鑳介渶瑕侀€氳繃Minecraft API鑾峰彇鏇磋缁嗙殑鐢熺墿缇ょ郴淇℃伅
        boolean isOcean = biomeId.contains("ocean");
        boolean isSnowy = biomeId.contains("snowy") || biomeId.contains("frozen") || biomeId.contains("ice");
        boolean isHot = biomeId.contains("desert") || biomeId.contains("savanna") || biomeId.contains("badlands") || biomeId.contains("jungle");
        boolean hasPrecipitation = !isHot && !biomeId.contains("desert"); // 澶у鏁扮敓鐗╃兢绯婚兘鏈夐檷姘达紝闄や簡娌欐紶绛?
        
        // 鏇存柊杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_BIOME_ID, biomeId);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_IS_OCEAN_ID, isOcean);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_IS_SNOWY_ID, isSnowy);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_IS_HOT_ID, isHot);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_HAS_PRECIPITATION_ID, hasPrecipitation);
    }
    
    /**
     * 閲嶇疆杈撳嚭绔彛鐨勫€间负榛樿鍊?
     */
    private void resetOutputs() {
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_BIOME_ID, "minecraft:plains");
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_IS_OCEAN_ID, false);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_IS_SNOWY_ID, false);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_IS_HOT_ID, false);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_HAS_PRECIPITATION_ID, true);
    }
    
    // 姝よ妭鐐规病鏈夐渶瑕佷繚瀛樼殑鐘舵€?
    @Override
    public Object getNodeState() {
        return null;
    }
    
    @Override
    public void setNodeState(Object state) {
        // 鏃犵姸鎬侀渶瑕佹仮澶?
    }
}

package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.inputs.minecraft;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.IPort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.minecraft.PlayerAccessor;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;

import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * 鑾峰彇娓告垙鍐呭綋鍓嶆椂闂寸殑鑺傜偣
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "inputs.minecraft.current_time",
    displayName = "褰撳墠鏃堕棿",
    description = "鑾峰彇褰撳墠娓告垙涓栫晫鐨勬椂闂翠俊鎭?,
    category = "inputs.minecraft"
)
public class CurrentTimeNode extends BaseNode {
    
    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_TIME_TICKS_ID = "output_time_ticks";
    private static final String OUTPUT_DAY_ID = "output_day";
    private static final String OUTPUT_DAY_TIME_ID = "output_day_time";
    private static final String OUTPUT_HOUR_ID = "output_hour";
    private static final String OUTPUT_MINUTE_ID = "output_minute";
    private static final String OUTPUT_IS_DAY_ID = "output_is_day";
    private static final String OUTPUT_IS_NIGHT_ID = "output_is_night";
    private static final String OUTPUT_IS_RAINING_ID = "output_is_raining";
    private static final String OUTPUT_IS_THUNDERING_ID = "output_is_thundering";
    
    // --- 鑺傜偣灞炴€?---
    private String description = "Gets the current time in the Minecraft world."; // 鑺傜偣鎻忚堪
    
    /**
     * 鏋勯€犱竴涓柊鐨勬父鎴忔椂闂磋妭鐐?
     */
    public CurrentTimeNode() {
        // 浣跨敤鏂扮殑鍒嗙被鍛藉悕 - inputs.minecraft.current_time
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "inputs.minecraft.current_time");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        IPort timeTicksOutput = new BasePort(OUTPUT_TIME_TICKS_ID, "Time (Ticks)", 
                "The current world time in ticks", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this);
        addOutputPort(timeTicksOutput);
        
        IPort dayOutput = new BasePort(OUTPUT_DAY_ID, "Day", 
                "The current world day", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this);
        addOutputPort(dayOutput);
        
        IPort dayTimeOutput = new BasePort(OUTPUT_DAY_TIME_ID, "Day Time", 
                "The time of day in ticks (0-24000)", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this);
        addOutputPort(dayTimeOutput);
        
        IPort hourOutput = new BasePort(OUTPUT_HOUR_ID, "Hour", 
                "The current hour (0-23)", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this);
        addOutputPort(hourOutput);
        
        IPort minuteOutput = new BasePort(OUTPUT_MINUTE_ID, "Minute", 
                "The current minute (0-59)", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this);
        addOutputPort(minuteOutput);
        
        IPort isDayOutput = new BasePort(OUTPUT_IS_DAY_ID, "Is Day", 
                "Whether it is currently daytime", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this);
        addOutputPort(isDayOutput);
        
        IPort isNightOutput = new BasePort(OUTPUT_IS_NIGHT_ID, "Is Night", 
                "Whether it is currently nighttime", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this);
        addOutputPort(isNightOutput);
        
        IPort isRainingOutput = new BasePort(OUTPUT_IS_RAINING_ID, "Is Raining", 
                "Whether it is currently raining", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this);
        addOutputPort(isRainingOutput);
        
        IPort isThunderingOutput = new BasePort(OUTPUT_IS_THUNDERING_ID, "Is Thundering", 
                "Whether it is currently thundering", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this);
        addOutputPort(isThunderingOutput);
        
        // 璁剧疆榛樿杈撳嚭鍊?
        resetOutputs();
    }
    
    /**
     * 瀹炵幇INode鎺ュ彛鐨刧etDescription鏂规硶
     * @return 鑺傜偣鎻忚堪
     */
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return this.description;
    }
    
    /**
     * 鑺傜偣鐨勮绠楅€昏緫
     * @param context 鎵ц涓婁笅鏂?
     */
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        if (context == null) {
            resetOutputs();
            return;
        }
        
        // 鑾峰彇涓栫晫鏃堕棿
        PlayerAccessor playerAccessor = context.getPlayerAccessor();
        if (playerAccessor == null) {
            resetOutputs();
            return;
        }
        
        updateOutputsFromAccessor(playerAccessor);
    }
    
    /**
     * 浠嶱layerAccessor鏇存柊杈撳嚭鍊?
     */
    private void updateOutputsFromAccessor(PlayerAccessor playerAccessor) {
        // 鑾峰彇涓栫晫鏃堕棿锛堝崟浣嶏細tick锛?
        long worldTimeTicks = playerAccessor.getWorldTime();
        int worldDay = playerAccessor.getWorldDay();
        
        // 璁＄畻涓€澶╀腑鐨勬椂闂达紙0-24000锛?
        int dayTime = (int)(worldTimeTicks % 24000);
        
        // 杞崲涓哄皬鏃跺拰鍒嗛挓
        // Minecraft涓紝鏃堕棿0瀵瑰簲鏃╀笂6鐐?
        // 6:00 = 0 ticks, 12:00 = 6000 ticks, 18:00 = 12000 ticks, 0:00 = 18000 ticks
        int adjustedTime = (dayTime + 6000) % 24000;
        int hour = adjustedTime / 1000;
        int minute = (int)((adjustedTime % 1000) / (1000.0f / 60.0f));
        
        // 妫€鏌ユ槸鍚︿负鐧藉ぉ锛堜粠鏃ュ嚭鍒版棩钀斤細0-12000锛?
        boolean isDay = playerAccessor.isDaytime();
        boolean isNight = !isDay;
        
        // 妫€鏌ュぉ姘?
        boolean isRaining = playerAccessor.isRaining();
        boolean isThundering = playerAccessor.isThundering();
        
        // 鏇存柊杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_TIME_TICKS_ID, worldTimeTicks);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_DAY_ID, worldDay);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_DAY_TIME_ID, dayTime);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_HOUR_ID, hour);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_MINUTE_ID, minute);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_IS_DAY_ID, isDay);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_IS_NIGHT_ID, isNight);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_IS_RAINING_ID, isRaining);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_IS_THUNDERING_ID, isThundering);
    }
    
    /**
     * 閲嶇疆杈撳嚭绔彛鐨勫€间负榛樿鍊?
     */
    private void resetOutputs() {
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_TIME_TICKS_ID, 0);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_DAY_ID, 0);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_DAY_TIME_ID, 0);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_HOUR_ID, 6); // 榛樿涓烘棭涓?鐐?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_MINUTE_ID, 0);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_IS_DAY_ID, true);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_IS_NIGHT_ID, false);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_IS_RAINING_ID, false);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_IS_THUNDERING_ID, false);
    }
    
    // 姝よ妭鐐规病鏈夐渶瑕佷繚瀛樼殑鐘舵€?
    @Override
    public Object getNodeState() {
        return null;
    }
    
    @Override
    public void setNodeState(Object state) {
        // 鏃犵姸鎬侀渶瑕佹仮澶?
    }
}

package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.inputs.minecraft;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.IPort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.minecraft.PlayerAccessor;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;

import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * 鑾峰彇鐜╁褰撳墠缁村害淇℃伅鐨勮妭鐐?
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "inputs.minecraft.dimension_info",
    displayName = "缁村害淇℃伅",
    description = "鑾峰彇鐜╁褰撳墠鎵€鍦ㄧ淮搴︾殑淇℃伅",
    category = "inputs.minecraft"
)
public class DimensionInfoNode extends BaseNode {
    
    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_DIMENSION_ID = "output_dimension_id";
    private static final String OUTPUT_IS_OVERWORLD_ID = "output_is_overworld";
    private static final String OUTPUT_IS_NETHER_ID = "output_is_nether";
    private static final String OUTPUT_IS_END_ID = "output_is_end";
    private static final String OUTPUT_HAS_SKYLIGHT_ID = "output_has_skylight";
    private static final String OUTPUT_HAS_CEILING_ID = "output_has_ceiling";
    
    // --- 鑺傜偣灞炴€?---
    private String description = "Gets information about the player's current dimension."; // 鑺傜偣鎻忚堪
    
    // 甯搁噺
    private static final String OVERWORLD_ID = "minecraft:overworld";
    private static final String NETHER_ID = "minecraft:the_nether";
    private static final String END_ID = "minecraft:the_end";
    
    /**
     * 鏋勯€犱竴涓柊鐨勭淮搴︿俊鎭妭鐐?
     */
    public DimensionInfoNode() {
        // 浣跨敤鏂扮殑鍒嗙被鍛藉悕 - inputs.minecraft.dimension_info
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "inputs.minecraft.dimension_info");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        IPort dimensionIdOutput = new BasePort(OUTPUT_DIMENSION_ID, "Dimension ID", 
                "The dimension identifier", NodeDataType.STRING, this);
        addOutputPort(dimensionIdOutput);
        
        IPort isOverworldOutput = new BasePort(OUTPUT_IS_OVERWORLD_ID, "Is Overworld", 
                "Whether the dimension is the overworld", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this);
        addOutputPort(isOverworldOutput);
        
        IPort isNetherOutput = new BasePort(OUTPUT_IS_NETHER_ID, "Is Nether", 
                "Whether the dimension is the nether", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this);
        addOutputPort(isNetherOutput);
        
        IPort isEndOutput = new BasePort(OUTPUT_IS_END_ID, "Is End", 
                "Whether the dimension is the end", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this);
        addOutputPort(isEndOutput);
        
        IPort hasSkylightOutput = new BasePort(OUTPUT_HAS_SKYLIGHT_ID, "Has Skylight", 
                "Whether the dimension has skylight", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this);
        addOutputPort(hasSkylightOutput);
        
        IPort hasCeilingOutput = new BasePort(OUTPUT_HAS_CEILING_ID, "Has Ceiling", 
                "Whether the dimension has a ceiling", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this);
        addOutputPort(hasCeilingOutput);
        
        // 璁剧疆榛樿杈撳嚭鍊?
        resetOutputs();
    }
    
    /**
     * 瀹炵幇INode鎺ュ彛鐨刧etDescription鏂规硶
     * @return 鑺傜偣鎻忚堪
     */
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return this.description;
    }
    
    /**
     * 鑺傜偣鐨勮绠楅€昏緫
     * @param context 鎵ц涓婁笅鏂?
     */
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        if (context == null) {
            resetOutputs();
            return;
        }
        
        // 鑾峰彇鐜╁缁村害
        PlayerAccessor playerAccessor = context.getPlayerAccessor();
        if (playerAccessor == null) {
            resetOutputs();
            return;
        }
        
        updateOutputs(playerAccessor);
    }
    
    /**
     * 鏇存柊杈撳嚭鍊?
     */
    private void updateOutputs(PlayerAccessor playerAccessor) {
        // 鑾峰彇缁村害ID
        String dimensionId = playerAccessor.getPlayerDimension();
        
        // 妫€鏌ユ槸鍝釜缁村害
        boolean isOverworld = OVERWORLD_ID.equals(dimensionId);
        boolean isNether = NETHER_ID.equals(dimensionId);
        boolean isEnd = END_ID.equals(dimensionId);
        
        // 缁村害鐗规€э紙鍦ㄥ疄闄呭疄鐜颁腑锛岃繖浜涘彲鑳介渶瑕侀€氳繃鍏朵粬API鑾峰彇锛?
        boolean hasSkylight = isOverworld || isEnd; // 涓讳笘鐣屽拰鏈湴鏈夊ぉ绌哄厜鐓?
        boolean hasCeiling = isNether; // 涓嬬晫鏈夊ぉ鑺辨澘
        
        // 鏇存柊杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_DIMENSION_ID, dimensionId);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_IS_OVERWORLD_ID, isOverworld);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_IS_NETHER_ID, isNether);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_IS_END_ID, isEnd);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_HAS_SKYLIGHT_ID, hasSkylight);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_HAS_CEILING_ID, hasCeiling);
    }
    
    /**
     * 閲嶇疆杈撳嚭绔彛鐨勫€间负榛樿鍊?
     */
    private void resetOutputs() {
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_DIMENSION_ID, OVERWORLD_ID);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_IS_OVERWORLD_ID, true);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_IS_NETHER_ID, false);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_IS_END_ID, false);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_HAS_SKYLIGHT_ID, true);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_HAS_CEILING_ID, false);
    }
    
    // 姝よ妭鐐规病鏈夐渶瑕佷繚瀛樼殑鐘舵€?
    @Override
    public Object getNodeState() {
        return null;
    }
    
    @Override
    public void setNodeState(Object state) {
        // 鏃犵姸鎬侀渶瑕佹仮澶?
    }
}

package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.inputs.minecraft;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.IPort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.util.Vector3;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.minecraft.PlayerAccessor;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;

import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * 鑾峰彇鐜╁瑙嗙嚎鏂瑰悜鍜岀瀯鍑嗕俊鎭殑鑺傜偣
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "inputs.minecraft.player_look_at",
    displayName = "鐜╁瑙嗙嚎",
    description = "鑾峰彇鐜╁瑙嗙嚎鏂瑰悜鍜岀瀯鍑嗙殑浣嶇疆淇℃伅",
    category = "inputs.minecraft"
)
public class PlayerLookAtNode extends BaseNode {
    
    // --- 鑺傜偣灞炴€?---
    private float maxDistance = 100.0f; // 鏈€澶у皠绾胯窛绂?
    private boolean includeEntities = true; // 鏄惁鍖呭惈瀹炰綋
    private boolean includeFluids = false; // 鏄惁鍖呭惈娴佷綋鏂瑰潡
    private String description = "Gets the block or entity the player is looking at."; // 鑺傜偣鎻忚堪
    
    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_HIT_POSITION_ID = "output_hit_position";
    private static final String OUTPUT_HIT_BLOCK_ID = "output_hit_block";
    private static final String OUTPUT_HIT_ENTITY_ID = "output_hit_entity";
    private static final String OUTPUT_HIT_DISTANCE_ID = "output_hit_distance";
    private static final String OUTPUT_HAS_HIT_ID = "output_has_hit";
    
    /**
     * 鏋勯€犱竴涓柊鐨勭帺瀹跺噯鏄熸寚鍚戣妭鐐?
     */
    public PlayerLookAtNode() {
        // 浣跨敤鏂扮殑鍒嗙被鍛藉悕 - inputs.minecraft.player_look_at
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "inputs.minecraft.player_look_at");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        IPort hitPositionOutput = new BasePort(OUTPUT_HIT_POSITION_ID, "Hit Position", 
                "The position of the raycast hit", NodeDataType.VECTOR, this);
        addOutputPort(hitPositionOutput);
        
        IPort hitBlockOutput = new BasePort(OUTPUT_HIT_BLOCK_ID, "Hit Block", 
                "The block that was hit", NodeDataType.BLOCK_INFO, this);
        addOutputPort(hitBlockOutput);
        
        IPort hitEntityOutput = new BasePort(OUTPUT_HIT_ENTITY_ID, "Hit Entity", 
                "The entity that was hit", NodeDataType.ENTITY_INFO, this);
        addOutputPort(hitEntityOutput);
        
        IPort hitDistanceOutput = new BasePort(OUTPUT_HIT_DISTANCE_ID, "Hit Distance", 
                "Distance to the hit", NodeDataType.FLOAT, this);
        addOutputPort(hitDistanceOutput);
        
        IPort hasHitOutput = new BasePort(OUTPUT_HAS_HIT_ID, "Has Hit", 
                "Whether something was hit", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this);
        addOutputPort(hasHitOutput);
        
        // 璁剧疆榛樿杈撳嚭鍊?
        resetOutputs();
    }
    
    /**
     * 瀹炵幇INode鎺ュ彛鐨刧etDescription鏂规硶
     * @return 鑺傜偣鎻忚堪
     */
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return this.description;
    }
    
    /**
     * 鑺傜偣鐨勮绠楅€昏緫
     * @param context 鎵ц涓婁笅鏂?
     */
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        if (context == null) {
            resetOutputs();
            return;
        }
        
        // 鑾峰彇鐜╁鍑嗘槦鎸囧悜
        PlayerAccessor playerAccessor = context.getPlayerAccessor();
        if (playerAccessor == null) {
            resetOutputs();
            return;
        }
        
        // 鎵ц灏勭嚎妫€娴?
        performRaycast(playerAccessor);
    }
    
    /**
     * 鎵ц灏勭嚎妫€娴?
     */
    private void performRaycast(PlayerAccessor playerAccessor) {
        // 鑾峰彇鐜╁鐪肩潧浣嶇疆鍜岃绾挎柟鍚?
        Vector3 eyePosition = playerAccessor.getPlayerEyePosition();
        Vector3 lookVector = playerAccessor.getPlayerLookVector();
        
        // 鍦ㄥ疄闄呭疄鐜颁腑锛岃繖閲屽簲璇ヨ皟鐢∕inecraft鐨勫皠绾挎娴嬮€昏緫
        // 渚嬪: RaycastResult result = world.raycast(eyePosition, lookVector, maxDistance, includeEntities, includeFluids);
        
        // 涓烘紨绀虹洰鐨勶紝杩欓噷鍋囪鎴戜滑鏈変竴涓皠绾挎娴嬬粨鏋?
        // 鍦ㄥ疄闄呬娇鐢ㄦ椂锛岄渶瑕佹牴鎹甅inecraft API瀹炵幇鍏蜂綋灏勭嚎妫€娴嬮€昏緫
        boolean hasHit = true; // 鍋囪鍑讳腑浜嗘煇鐗?
        Vector3 hitPosition = eyePosition.add(lookVector.scale(10.0f)); // 鍋囪鍑讳腑鐐?
        Object hitBlock = "minecraft:stone"; // 鍋囪鍑讳腑鐨勬柟鍧?
        Object hitEntity = null; // 鍋囪娌℃湁鍑讳腑瀹炰綋
        float hitDistance = 10.0f; // 鍋囪鍑讳腑璺濈
        
        // 鏇存柊杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_HAS_HIT_ID, hasHit);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_HIT_POSITION_ID, hitPosition);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_HIT_BLOCK_ID, hitBlock);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_HIT_ENTITY_ID, hitEntity);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_HIT_DISTANCE_ID, hitDistance);
    }
    
    /**
     * 閲嶇疆杈撳嚭绔彛鐨勫€间负榛樿鍊?
     */
    private void resetOutputs() {
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_HAS_HIT_ID, false);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_HIT_POSITION_ID, new Vector3(0, 0, 0));
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_HIT_BLOCK_ID, null);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_HIT_ENTITY_ID, null);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_HIT_DISTANCE_ID, 0.0f);
    }
    
    // --- Getters/Setters for Properties ---
    
    public float getMaxDistance() {
        return maxDistance;
    }
    
    public void setMaxDistance(float maxDistance) {
        if (maxDistance < 0) {
            maxDistance = 0;
        } else if (maxDistance > 1000) {
            maxDistance = 1000; // 璁剧疆鍚堢悊涓婇檺
        }
        
        if (this.maxDistance != maxDistance) {
            this.maxDistance = maxDistance;
            markDirty();
        }
    }
    
    public boolean isIncludeEntities() {
        return includeEntities;
    }
    
    public void setIncludeEntities(boolean includeEntities) {
        if (this.includeEntities != includeEntities) {
            this.includeEntities = includeEntities;
            markDirty();
        }
    }
    
    public boolean isIncludeFluids() {
        return includeFluids;
    }
    
    public void setIncludeFluids(boolean includeFluids) {
        if (this.includeFluids != includeFluids) {
            this.includeFluids = includeFluids;
            markDirty();
        }
    }
    
    // --- 鑺傜偣鐘舵€佸簭鍒楀寲 ---
    
    @Override
    public Object getNodeState() {
        java.util.Map<String, Object> state = new java.util.HashMap<>();
        state.put("maxDistance", getMaxDistance());
        state.put("includeEntities", isIncludeEntities());
        state.put("includeFluids", isIncludeFluids());
        return state;
    }
    
    @Override
    public void setNodeState(Object state) {
        if (state instanceof java.util.Map) {
            java.util.Map<?, ?> stateMap = (java.util.Map<?, ?>) state;
            
            if (stateMap.containsKey("maxDistance")) {
                Object maxDist = stateMap.get("maxDistance");
                if (maxDist instanceof Number) {
                    setMaxDistance(((Number) maxDist).floatValue());
                }
            }
            
            if (stateMap.containsKey("includeEntities")) {
                Object includeEnt = stateMap.get("includeEntities");
                if (includeEnt instanceof Boolean) {
                    setIncludeEntities((Boolean) includeEnt);
                }
            }
            
            if (stateMap.containsKey("includeFluids")) {
                Object includeFlu = stateMap.get("includeFluids");
                if (includeFlu instanceof Boolean) {
                    setIncludeFluids((Boolean) includeFlu);
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.inputs.minecraft;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.IPort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.util.Vector3;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.minecraft.PlayerAccessor;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;

import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * 鑾峰彇鐜╁褰撳墠浣嶇疆鐨勮妭鐐?
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "inputs.minecraft.player_position",
    displayName = "鐜╁浣嶇疆",
    description = "鑾峰彇鐜╁褰撳墠鐨勪綅缃潗鏍?,
    category = "inputs.minecraft"
)
public class PlayerPositionNode extends BaseNode {
    
    // --- 鑺傜偣灞炴€?---
    private boolean useEyePosition = false; // 鏄惁浣跨敤鐪肩潧浣嶇疆鑰岄潪鑴氬簳浣嶇疆
    private String description = "Gets the current player's position in the world."; // 鑺傜偣鎻忚堪
    
    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_POSITION_ID = "output_position";
    private static final String OUTPUT_X_ID = "output_x";
    private static final String OUTPUT_Y_ID = "output_y";
    private static final String OUTPUT_Z_ID = "output_z";
    
    /**
     * 鏋勯€犱竴涓柊鐨勭帺瀹朵綅缃妭鐐?
     */
    public PlayerPositionNode() {
        // 浣跨敤鏂扮殑鍒嗙被鍛藉悕 - inputs.minecraft.player_position
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "inputs.minecraft.player_position");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        IPort positionOutput = new BasePort(OUTPUT_POSITION_ID, "Position", "The player's position vector", NodeDataType.VECTOR, this);
        addOutputPort(positionOutput);
        
        IPort xOutput = new BasePort(OUTPUT_X_ID, "X", "X coordinate", NodeDataType.FLOAT, this);
        addOutputPort(xOutput);
        
        IPort yOutput = new BasePort(OUTPUT_Y_ID, "Y", "Y coordinate", NodeDataType.FLOAT, this);
        addOutputPort(yOutput);
        
        IPort zOutput = new BasePort(OUTPUT_Z_ID, "Z", "Z coordinate", NodeDataType.FLOAT, this);
        addOutputPort(zOutput);
    }
    
    /**
     * 瀹炵幇INode鎺ュ彛鐨刧etDescription鏂规硶
     * @return 鑺傜偣鎻忚堪
     */
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return this.description;
    }
    
    /**
     * 鑺傜偣鐨勮绠楅€昏緫
     * @param context 鎵ц涓婁笅鏂?
     */
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        if (context == null) {
            // 濡傛灉娌℃湁鎵ц涓婁笅鏂囷紝灏嗘墍鏈夎緭鍑鸿涓洪粯璁ゅ€?
            Vector3 defaultPosition = new Vector3(0, 0, 0);
            updateOutputs(defaultPosition);
            return;
        }
        
        // 鑾峰彇鐜╁浣嶇疆
        Vector3 playerPosition = getPlayerPosition(context);
        updateOutputs(playerPosition);
    }
    
    /**
     * 鑾峰彇鐜╁浣嶇疆
     */
    private Vector3 getPlayerPosition(ExecutionContext context) {
        PlayerAccessor playerAccessor = context.getPlayerAccessor();
        
        if (playerAccessor == null) {
            return new Vector3(0, 0, 0); // 榛樿浣嶇疆
        }
        
        // 鏍规嵁璁剧疆鑾峰彇鐪肩潧浣嶇疆鎴栬剼搴曚綅缃?
        if (useEyePosition) {
            return playerAccessor.getPlayerEyePosition();
        } else {
            return playerAccessor.getPlayerPosition();
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * 鏇存柊杈撳嚭绔彛鐨勫€?
     */
    private void updateOutputs(Vector3 position) {
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_POSITION_ID, position);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_X_ID, position.getX());
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_Y_ID, position.getY());
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_Z_ID, position.getZ());
    }
    
    // --- Getters/Setters for Properties ---
    
    public boolean isUseEyePosition() {
        return useEyePosition;
    }
    
    public void setUseEyePosition(boolean useEyePosition) {
        if (this.useEyePosition != useEyePosition) {
            this.useEyePosition = useEyePosition;
            // 鏍囪鑺傜偣闇€瑕侀噸鏂拌绠?
            markDirty();
        }
    }
    
    // --- 鑺傜偣鐘舵€佸簭鍒楀寲 ---
    
    @Override
    public Object getNodeState() {
        // 杩斿洖鑺傜偣鎵€鏈夊彲搴忓垪鍖栫殑鐘舵€?
        java.util.Map<String, Object> state = new java.util.HashMap<>();
        state.put("useEyePosition", isUseEyePosition());
        return state;
    }
    
    @Override
    public void setNodeState(Object state) {
        if (state instanceof java.util.Map) {
            java.util.Map<?, ?> stateMap = (java.util.Map<?, ?>) state;
            
            if (stateMap.containsKey("useEyePosition")) {
                Object useEyePos = stateMap.get("useEyePosition");
                if (useEyePos instanceof Boolean) {
                    setUseEyePosition((Boolean) useEyePos);
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

    id = "inputs.minecraft.selected_block",
    displayName = "閫夊畾鏂瑰潡",

public class SelectedBlockNode extends BaseCustomUINode implements IBlockPickerCallback {
    
    // --- 鑺傜偣璁剧疆锛堝奖鍝嶆嬀鍙栬涓猴級 ---
    private float maxDistance = 100.0f;

    private String inputValidationWarning = null;
