    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 ---
    private static final String INPUT_X_ID = "input_x";
    private static final String INPUT_Y_ID = "input_y";
    private static final String INPUT_Z_ID = "input_z";
    
    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 ---
    // 鏍稿績杈撳嚭
    private static final String OUTPUT_BLOCK_ID = "output_block_id";
    private static final String OUTPUT_BLOCK_NAME = "output_block_name";
    private static final String OUTPUT_POSITION = "output_position";
    private static final String OUTPUT_CENTER = "output_center";
    private static final String OUTPUT_BLOCK_STATE = "output_block_state";
    private static final String OUTPUT_HAS_BLOCK_ENTITY = "output_has_block_entity";
    
    // 鍧愭爣鍒嗛噺杈撳嚭
    private static final String OUTPUT_BLOCK_X_ID = "output_block_x";
    private static final String OUTPUT_BLOCK_Y_ID = "output_block_y";
    private static final String OUTPUT_BLOCK_Z_ID = "output_block_z";
    
    public SelectedBlockNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "inputs.minecraft.selected_block");
        
        // 鍒涘缓杈撳叆绔彛
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_X_ID, "X", 
                "鏂瑰潡鐨刋鍧愭爣锛堜粎鍦ㄦ湭鎷惧彇鏂瑰潡鏃跺彲鐢級", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_Y_ID, "Y", 
                "鏂瑰潡鐨刌鍧愭爣锛堜粎鍦ㄦ湭鎷惧彇鏂瑰潡鏃跺彲鐢級", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_Z_ID, "Z", 
                "鏂瑰潡鐨刏鍧愭爣锛堜粎鍦ㄦ湭鎷惧彇鏂瑰潡鏃跺彲鐢級", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        
        // 鍒涘缓杈撳嚭绔彛
        // 鏍稿績杈撳嚭绔彛
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_BLOCK_ID, "Block ID", 
                "鏈哄櫒鍙鐨勫敮涓€鏍囪瘑锛屽 minecraft:oak_planks", NodeDataType.STRING, this));
        
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_BLOCK_NAME, "Block Name", 
                "浜虹被鍙鐨勬樉绀哄悕绉帮紝濡?'姗℃湪妤兼'", NodeDataType.STRING, this));
        
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_POSITION, "Position", 
                "鏁存暟鍧愭爣锛岀敤浜庡畾浣嶅拰缃戞牸瀵归綈", NodeDataType.COORDINATE, this));
        
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_CENTER, "Center", 
                "鏂瑰潡鍑犱綍涓績锛岀敤浜庣簿纭殑闈炵綉鏍煎榻愭搷浣?, NodeDataType.VECTOR, this));
        
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_BLOCK_STATE, "Block State", 
                "鏂瑰潡鐨勫彉浣撳睘鎬э紝濡?{\"facing\": \"north\", \"waterlogged\": \"true\"}", NodeDataType.BLOCK_STATE_DATA, this));
        
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_HAS_BLOCK_ENTITY, "Has Block Entity", 
                "鏄惁鏈夐澶栨暟鎹紙绠卞瓙銆佺啍鐐夌瓑锛?, NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
        
        // 鍧愭爣鍒嗛噺杈撳嚭
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_BLOCK_X_ID, "Block X", 
                "鏂瑰潡鐨刋鍧愭爣", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_BLOCK_Y_ID, "Block Y", 
                "鏂瑰潡鐨刌鍧愭爣", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_BLOCK_Z_ID, "Block Z", 
                "鏂瑰潡鐨刏鍧愭爣", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        
        resetOutputs();
    }
    
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "鑾峰彇鏂瑰潡淇℃伅锛屾敮鎸佷氦浜掓嬀鍙栨垨鍧愭爣杈撳叆涓ょ鏂瑰紡銆?;
    }
    
    @Override
    public String getDisplayName() {
        return "Selected Block";
    }
    
    // === 鏍稿績鑺傜偣閫昏緫 ===
    
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 绌烘鏌?- 濡傛灉context涓簄ull锛岄噸缃緭鍑?        if (context == null) {
            resetOutputs();
            return;
        }
        
        // 鏇存柊杈撳叆绔彛鐨勫彲鐢ㄦ€?        updateInputPortAvailability();
        
        // 濡傛灉娌℃湁鎷惧彇鏂瑰潡锛屽皾璇曚粠杈撳叆绔彛鑾峰彇鍧愭爣
        if (!hasPickedBlock) {
            tryProcessInputCoordinates(context);
        }
        
        // 杈撳嚭褰撳墠鏂瑰潡鏁版嵁锛堟棤璁烘槸鎷惧彇鐨勮繕鏄粠杈撳叆鑾峰彇鐨勶級
        updateOutputsWithPickedBlock();
    }
    
    /**
     * 鏇存柊杈撳叆绔彛鐨勫彲鐢ㄦ€?     * 褰撳凡鎷惧彇鏂瑰潡鏃讹紝鏂紑鍧愭爣杈撳叆绔彛鐨勮繛鎺?     */
    private void updateInputPortAvailability() {
        try {
            if (hasPickedBlock) {
                // 濡傛灉宸叉嬀鍙栨柟鍧楋紝鏂紑杈撳叆绔彛鐨勮繛鎺?                IPort xPort = getInputPort(INPUT_X_ID);
                IPort yPort = getInputPort(INPUT_Y_ID);
                IPort zPort = getInputPort(INPUT_Z_ID);
                
                if (xPort != null && xPort.isConnected()) {
                    xPort.disconnect();
                }
                if (yPort != null && yPort.isConnected()) {
                    yPort.disconnect();
                }
                if (zPort != null && zPort.isConnected()) {
                    zPort.disconnect();
                }
            }
        } catch (Exception e) {
            NodeCraft.LOGGER.debug("鑺傜偣 {} 鏇存柊杈撳叆绔彛鍙敤鎬уけ璐? {}", getId(), e.getMessage());
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * 灏濊瘯浠庤緭鍏ョ鍙ｅ鐞嗗潗鏍?     * 浠呭湪鏈嬀鍙栨柟鍧楁椂鎵ц
     */
    private void tryProcessInputCoordinates(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        if (context == null) {
            return;
        }
        
        // 娓呴櫎涔嬪墠鐨勯獙璇佺姸鎬?        clearInputValidationState();
        
        try {
            // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍧愭爣
            Object xValue = getInputValue(INPUT_X_ID, 0);
            Object yValue = getInputValue(INPUT_Y_ID, 0);
            Object zValue = getInputValue(INPUT_Z_ID, 0);
            
            // 妫€鏌ユ槸鍚︽墍鏈夊潗鏍囬兘鏈夊€?            if (xValue instanceof Integer x && yValue instanceof Integer y && zValue instanceof Integer z) {
                // 楠岃瘉鍧愭爣鑼冨洿
                ValidationResult<Coordinate> rangeValidation = validateCoordinateRange(x, y, z);
                if (!rangeValidation.isValid()) {
                    inputValidationError = rangeValidation.getMessage();
                    clearInputBlockData();
                    return;
                }
                
                // 鍒涘缓鍧愭爣瀵硅薄
                Coordinate inputPosition = new Coordinate(x, y, z);
                
                // 楠岃瘉鍧愭爣鏄惁涓庡綋鍓嶄綅缃笉鍚岋紝閬垮厤閲嶅澶勭悊
                if (!inputPosition.equals(pickedBlockPosition)) {
                    // 浠庝笘鐣屼腑鑾峰彇璇ヤ綅缃殑鏂瑰潡淇℃伅
                    processBlockAtPosition(inputPosition);
                }
            } else {
                // 濡傛灉鍧愭爣涓嶅畬鏁达紝娓呴櫎褰撳墠鐨勮緭鍏ユ柟鍧楁暟鎹紙浣嗕繚鐣欐嬀鍙栫殑鏂瑰潡鏁版嵁锛?                if (pickedBlockPosition != null && !hasPickedBlock) {
                    clearInputBlockData();
                }
            }
        } catch (Exception e) {
            inputValidationError = "澶勭悊杈撳叆鍧愭爣鏃跺彂鐢熷紓甯? " + e.getMessage();
            NodeCraft.LOGGER.debug("鑺傜偣 {} 澶勭悊杈撳叆鍧愭爣澶辫触: {}", getId(), e.getMessage());
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * 澶勭悊鎸囧畾浣嶇疆鐨勬柟鍧?     * 浠庝笘鐣屼腑鑾峰彇鏂瑰潡淇℃伅
     */
    private void processBlockAtPosition(Coordinate position) {
        try {
            MinecraftClient client = MinecraftClient.getInstance();
            if (client == null || client.world == null) {
                inputValidationError = "涓栫晫鏈姞杞斤紝鏃犳硶鑾峰彇鏂瑰潡淇℃伅";
                NodeCraft.LOGGER.debug("鑺傜偣 {} 鏃犳硶澶勭悊浣嶇疆 {}: 涓栫晫鏈姞杞?, getId(), position);
                return;
            }
            
            BlockPos blockPos = new BlockPos(position.getX(), position.getY(), position.getZ());
            
            // 妫€鏌ュ尯鍧楁槸鍚﹀凡鍔犺浇
            try {
                if (client.world.getChunk(blockPos) == null) {
                    inputValidationError = "鐩爣鍖哄潡鏈姞杞斤紝璇风瓑寰呭尯鍧楀姞杞藉畬鎴?;
                    NodeCraft.LOGGER.debug("鑺傜偣 {} 鏃犳硶澶勭悊浣嶇疆 {}: 鍖哄潡鏈姞杞?, getId(), position);
                    return;
                }
            } catch (Exception e) {
                inputValidationError = "鐩爣鍖哄潡鏈姞杞斤紝璇风瓑寰呭尯鍧楀姞杞藉畬鎴?;
                NodeCraft.LOGGER.debug("鑺傜偣 {} 鏃犳硶澶勭悊浣嶇疆 {}: 鍖哄潡鏈姞杞?, getId(), position);
                return;
            }
            
            // 鑾峰彇鏂瑰潡鐘舵€?            BlockState blockState = client.world.getBlockState(blockPos);
            Block block = blockState.getBlock();
            
            if (block == null) {
                NodeCraft.LOGGER.debug("鑺傜偣 {} 浣嶇疆 {} 鐨勬柟鍧椾负null", getId(), position);
                return;
            }
            
            // 鑾峰彇鏂瑰潡ID
            String blockId = Registries.BLOCK.getId(block).toString();
            
            // 鍒涘缓鏂瑰潡鐘舵€佹暟鎹?            BlockStateData blockStateData = new BlockStateData();
            try {
                blockState.getProperties().forEach(property -> {
                    try {
                        String key = property.getName();
                        String value = blockState.get(property).toString();
                        blockStateData.put(key, value);
                    } catch (Exception e) {
                        // 蹇界暐鏃犳硶鑾峰彇鐨勫睘鎬?                    }
                });
            } catch (Exception e) {
                NodeCraft.LOGGER.debug("鑺傜偣 {} 鑾峰彇鏂瑰潡鐘舵€佸け璐?, getId(), e);
            }
            
            // 鏇存柊鏂瑰潡鏁版嵁锛堟爣璁颁负杈撳叆鏁版嵁锛屼笉鏄嬀鍙栨暟鎹級
            this.pickedBlockPosition = position;
            this.pickedBlockId = blockId;
            this.pickedBlockStateData = blockStateData;
            // 娉ㄦ剰锛氫笉璁剧疆 hasPickedBlock = true锛屽洜涓鸿繖鏄緭鍏ユ暟鎹?            
            // 瀹炴椂楠岃瘉鏂瑰潡鐘舵€佷竴鑷存€?            ValidationResult<BlockValidationData> blockValidation = validatePickedBlock(position, blockId, blockStateData);
            if (!blockValidation.isValid()) {
                hasInputValidationWarning = true;
                inputValidationWarning = blockValidation.getMessage();
                NodeCraft.LOGGER.debug("鑺傜偣 {} 杈撳叆鍧愭爣鏂瑰潡楠岃瘉璀﹀憡: {}", getId(), blockValidation.getMessage());
            }
            
            // 鏇存柊骞界伒鏂瑰潡棰勮
            updateGhostBlockPreview();
            
            NodeCraft.LOGGER.debug("鑺傜偣 {} 浠庤緭鍏ュ潗鏍囪幏鍙栨柟鍧? {} at {}", getId(), blockId, position);
            
        } catch (Exception e) {
            inputValidationError = "鑾峰彇鏂瑰潡淇℃伅鏃跺彂鐢熷紓甯? " + e.getMessage();
            NodeCraft.LOGGER.error("鑺傜偣 {} 澶勭悊浣嶇疆 {} 鐨勬柟鍧楀け璐? {}", getId(), position, e.getMessage(), e);
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * 娓呴櫎杈撳叆鏂瑰潡鏁版嵁
     * 浠呮竻闄ら€氳繃杈撳叆鍧愭爣鑾峰彇鐨勬暟鎹紝涓嶅奖鍝嶆嬀鍙栫殑鏁版嵁
     */
    private void clearInputBlockData() {
        if (!hasPickedBlock) {
            this.pickedBlockPosition = null;
            this.pickedBlockId = "minecraft:air";
            this.pickedBlockStateData = null;
            
            // 闅愯棌骞界伒鏂瑰潡棰勮
            hideGhostBlockPreview();
            
            NodeCraft.LOGGER.debug("鑺傜偣 {} 娓呴櫎杈撳叆鏂瑰潡鏁版嵁", getId());
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * 閫氳繃ID鏌ユ壘杈撳叆绔彛
     * @param portId 绔彛ID
     * @return 鎵惧埌鐨勭鍙ｏ紝濡傛灉鏈壘鍒板垯杩斿洖null
     */
    protected IPort getInputPort(String portId) {
        for (IPort port : inputPorts) {
            if (port.getId().equals(portId)) {
                return port;
            }
        }
        return null;
    }
    
    /**
     * 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊肩殑杈呭姪鏂规硶
     * @param portId 绔彛ID
     * @param defaultValue 榛樿鍊?     * @return 杈撳叆鍊兼垨榛樿鍊?     */
    @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
    private <T> T getInputValue(String portId, T defaultValue) {
        Object value = inputValues.get(portId);
        if (value != null) {
            try {
                return (T) value;
            } catch (ClassCastException e) {
                return defaultValue;
            }
        }
        return defaultValue;
    }
    
    /**
     * 妫€鏌ユ槸鍚︽湁杈撳叆鍧愭爣
     * @return 濡傛灉鏈夊畬鏁寸殑杈撳叆鍧愭爣杩斿洖true
     */
    private boolean hasInputCoordinates() {
        if (hasPickedBlock) {
            return false; // 濡傛灉宸叉嬀鍙栨柟鍧楋紝杈撳叆鍧愭爣鏃犳晥
        }
        
        Object xValue = getInputValue(INPUT_X_ID, null);
        Object yValue = getInputValue(INPUT_Y_ID, null);
        Object zValue = getInputValue(INPUT_Z_ID, null);
        
        return xValue instanceof Integer && yValue instanceof Integer && zValue instanceof Integer;
    }
    
    /**
     * 娓呴櫎杈撳叆楠岃瘉鐘舵€?     */
    private void clearInputValidationState() {
        inputValidationError = null;
        hasInputValidationWarning = false;
        inputValidationWarning = null;
    }
    
    /**
     * 楠岃瘉鍧愭爣鑼冨洿鏄惁鍦?Minecraft 涓栫晫鑼冨洿鍐?     * @param x X鍧愭爣
     * @param y Y鍧愭爣  
     * @param z Z鍧愭爣
     * @return 楠岃瘉缁撴灉
     */
    private ValidationResult<Coordinate> validateCoordinateRange(int x, int y, int z) {
        // Minecraft 涓栫晫鑼冨洿闄愬埗
        final int MIN_Y = -64;
        final int MAX_Y = 319;
        final int MAX_XZ = 30000000; // 卤30M
        final int MIN_XZ = -30000000;
        
        // 妫€鏌鍧愭爣鑼冨洿
        if (y < MIN_Y || y > MAX_Y) {
            return ValidationResult.failure(String.format("Y鍧愭爣瓒呭嚭涓栫晫鑼冨洿 (%d 鑷?%d): %d", MIN_Y, MAX_Y, y));
        }
        
        // 妫€鏌鍧愭爣鑼冨洿
        if (x < MIN_XZ || x > MAX_XZ) {
            return ValidationResult.failure(String.format("X鍧愭爣瓒呭嚭涓栫晫鑼冨洿 (卤%d): %d", MAX_XZ, x));
        }
        
        // 妫€鏌鍧愭爣鑼冨洿
        if (z < MIN_XZ || z > MAX_XZ) {
            return ValidationResult.failure(String.format("Z鍧愭爣瓒呭嚭涓栫晫鑼冨洿 (卤%d): %d", MAX_XZ, z));
        }
        
        return ValidationResult.success(new Coordinate(x, y, z));
    }
    
    private void updateOutputsWithPickedBlock() {
        // 鍩虹杈撳嚭
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_BLOCK_ID, pickedBlockId);
        
        // 鑾峰彇鏂瑰潡鍚嶇О
        String blockName = getBlockDisplayName(pickedBlockId);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_BLOCK_NAME, blockName);
        
        // 浣嶇疆鐩稿叧杈撳嚭
        if (pickedBlockPosition != null) {
            // 涓昏浣嶇疆杈撳嚭
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_POSITION, pickedBlockPosition);
            
            // 鏂瑰潡涓績鍧愭爣锛堟诞鐐规暟锛?            Vector3d center = new Vector3d(
                pickedBlockPosition.getX() + 0.5,
                pickedBlockPosition.getY() + 0.5,
                pickedBlockPosition.getZ() + 0.5
            );
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_CENTER, center);
            
            // 鍧愭爣鍒嗛噺
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_BLOCK_X_ID, pickedBlockPosition.getX());
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_BLOCK_Y_ID, pickedBlockPosition.getY());
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_BLOCK_Z_ID, pickedBlockPosition.getZ());
        } else {
            Coordinate defaultCoord = new Coordinate(0, 0, 0);
            Vector3d defaultCenter = new Vector3d(0.5, 0.5, 0.5);
            
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_POSITION, defaultCoord);
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_CENTER, defaultCenter);
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_BLOCK_X_ID, 0);
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_BLOCK_Y_ID, 0);
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_BLOCK_Z_ID, 0);
        }
        
        // 鏂瑰潡鐘舵€佹暟鎹?        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_BLOCK_STATE, pickedBlockStateData);
        
        // 鏂瑰潡瀹炰綋妫€鏌?        boolean hasBlockEntity = checkHasBlockEntity(pickedBlockId, pickedBlockPosition);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_HAS_BLOCK_ENTITY, hasBlockEntity);
    }
    
    private void resetOutputs() {
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_BLOCK_ID, "minecraft:air");
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_BLOCK_NAME, "绌烘皵");
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_POSITION, new Coordinate(0, 0, 0));
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_CENTER, new Vector3d(0.5, 0.5, 0.5));
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_BLOCK_STATE, null);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_HAS_BLOCK_ENTITY, false);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_BLOCK_X_ID, 0);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_BLOCK_Y_ID, 0);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_BLOCK_Z_ID, 0);
    }
    
    // === 鏁版嵁璁板綍鍜岄獙璇佺粨鏋?===
    

    
    /**
     * 鏂瑰潡楠岃瘉鏁版嵁璁板綍
     * 鍖呭惈瀹為檯鏂瑰潡ID鍜岄獙璇佺姸鎬?     */
    private record BlockValidationData(String actualBlockId, boolean stateMatches) {}
    
    /**
     * 楠岃瘉缁撴灉绫?- 浣跨敤娉涘瀷绠€鍖栧绉嶉獙璇佸満鏅?     * @param <T> 楠岃瘉鎴愬姛鏃舵惡甯︾殑鏁版嵁绫诲瀷
     */
    private static class ValidationResult<T> {
        private final boolean valid;
        private final String message;
        private final T data;
        
        private ValidationResult(boolean valid, String message, T data) {
            this.valid = valid;
            this.message = message;
            this.data = data;
        }
        
        public static <T> ValidationResult<T> success() {
            return new ValidationResult<>(true, null, null);
        }
        
        public static <T> ValidationResult<T> success(T data) {
            return new ValidationResult<>(true, null, data);
        }
        
        public static <T> ValidationResult<T> failure(String message) {
            return new ValidationResult<>(false, message, null);
        }
        
        public static <T> ValidationResult<T> warning(String message, T data) {
            return new ValidationResult<>(false, message, data);
        }
        
        public boolean isValid() {
            return valid;
        }
        
        public String getMessage() {
            return message;
        }
        
        public Optional<T> getData() {
            return Optional.ofNullable(data);
        }
        
        public boolean hasData() {
            return data != null;
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * 楠岃瘉 Minecraft 涓栫晫鐘舵€?     * 妫€鏌ュ鎴风銆佺帺瀹跺拰涓栫晫鏄惁鍙敤
     * 
     * @return ValidationResult<Void> 楠岃瘉缁撴灉
     */
    private ValidationResult<Void> validateWorldState() {
        try {
            MinecraftClient client = MinecraftClient.getInstance();
            if (client == null) {
                return ValidationResult.failure("Minecraft 瀹㈡埛绔湭鍒濆鍖?);
            }
            
            if (client.player == null) {
                return ValidationResult.failure("鐜╁鏈姞杞?);
            }
            
            ClientWorld world = client.world;
            if (world == null) {
                return ValidationResult.failure("涓栫晫鏈姞杞?);
            }
            
                    // 鍙€夛細妫€鏌ョ帺瀹舵墍鍦ㄥ尯鍧楁槸鍚﹀凡鍔犺浇
        BlockPos playerPos = client.player.getBlockPos();
        if (client.isInSingleplayer()) {
            try {
                // 浣跨敤 getChunk 鏇夸唬宸插純鐢ㄧ殑 isChunkLoaded
                // 濡傛灉鍖哄潡鏈姞杞斤紝getChunk 浼氳繑鍥?null 鎴栨姏鍑哄紓甯?                if (world.getChunk(playerPos) == null) {
                    return ValidationResult.failure("鐜╁鎵€鍦ㄥ尯鍧楁湭鍔犺浇");
                }
            } catch (Exception e) {
                return ValidationResult.failure("鐜╁鎵€鍦ㄥ尯鍧楁湭鍔犺浇");
            }
        }
            
            return ValidationResult.success();
            
        } catch (Exception e) {
            return ValidationResult.failure("涓栫晫鐘舵€佹鏌ュ紓甯? " + e.getMessage());
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * 楠岃瘉鎷惧彇鐨勬柟鍧楁槸鍚︿笌瀹㈡埛绔笘鐣岀姸鎬佷竴鑷?     * 杩欏浜庡浜烘父鎴忎腑鐨勭綉缁滃欢杩熷拰鐘舵€佸悓姝ラ棶棰樺緢閲嶈
     * 
     * @param position 鏂瑰潡浣嶇疆
     * @param expectedBlockId 鏈熸湜鐨勬柟鍧桰D
     * @param expectedBlockStateData 鏈熸湜鐨勬柟鍧楃姸鎬佹暟鎹?     * @return ValidationResult<BlockValidationData> 楠岃瘉缁撴灉
     */
    private ValidationResult<BlockValidationData> validatePickedBlock(Coordinate position, String expectedBlockId, 
                                                                    BlockStateData expectedBlockStateData) {
        try {
            MinecraftClient client = MinecraftClient.getInstance();
            ClientWorld world = client.world;
            
            // 濡傛灉涓栫晫鐘舵€佹棤鏁堬紝璺宠繃楠岃瘉
            if (world == null) {
                return ValidationResult.failure("涓栫晫鏈姞杞斤紝璺宠繃鏂瑰潡楠岃瘉");
            }
            
            BlockPos pos = new BlockPos(position.getX(), position.getY(), position.getZ());
            
                    // 妫€鏌ュ尯鍧楁槸鍚﹀凡鍔犺浇
        try {
            // 浣跨敤 getChunk 鏇夸唬宸插純鐢ㄧ殑 isChunkLoaded
            if (world.getChunk(pos) == null) {
                return ValidationResult.failure("鐩爣鍖哄潡鏈姞杞斤紝璺宠繃鏂瑰潡楠岃瘉");
            }
        } catch (Exception e) {
            return ValidationResult.failure("鐩爣鍖哄潡鏈姞杞斤紝璺宠繃鏂瑰潡楠岃瘉");
        }
            
            // 鑾峰彇涓栫晫涓殑瀹為檯鏂瑰潡鐘舵€?            BlockState actualBlockState = world.getBlockState(pos);
            String actualBlockId = Registries.BLOCK.getId(actualBlockState.getBlock()).toString();
            
            // 姣旇緝鏂瑰潡ID
            if (!actualBlockId.equals(expectedBlockId)) {
                String warningMessage = String.format(
                    "鎷惧彇鏂瑰潡 %s 涓庝笘鐣岀姸鎬?%s 涓嶄竴鑷?at (%d, %d, %d) - 鍙兘鐢辩綉缁滃欢杩熷紩璧?, 
                    expectedBlockId, actualBlockId, position.getX(), position.getY(), position.getZ());
                return ValidationResult.warning(warningMessage, new BlockValidationData(actualBlockId, false));
            }
            
            // 鍙€夛細姣旇緝鏂瑰潡鐘舵€佸睘鎬э紙鏇翠弗鏍肩殑楠岃瘉锛?            boolean stateMatches;
            if (expectedBlockStateData != null && !expectedBlockStateData.isEmpty()) {
                stateMatches = validateBlockStateProperties(actualBlockState, expectedBlockStateData);
                if (!stateMatches) {
                    String warningMessage = String.format(
                        "鏂瑰潡 %s 鐨勭姸鎬佸睘鎬т笉涓€鑷?at (%d, %d, %d) - 鍙兘鐢辩綉缁滃欢杩熷紩璧?, 
                        expectedBlockId, position.getX(), position.getY(), position.getZ());
                    return ValidationResult.warning(warningMessage, new BlockValidationData(actualBlockId, false));
                }
            }
            
            return ValidationResult.success(new BlockValidationData(actualBlockId, true));
            
        } catch (Exception e) {
            String warningMessage = "鏂瑰潡楠岃瘉寮傚父: " + e.getMessage();
            return ValidationResult.failure(warningMessage);
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * 楠岃瘉鏂瑰潡鐘舵€佸睘鎬ф槸鍚﹀尮閰?     * 
     * @param actualBlockState 涓栫晫涓殑瀹為檯鏂瑰潡鐘舵€?     * @param expectedBlockStateData 鏈熸湜鐨勬柟鍧楃姸鎬佹暟鎹?     * @return true 濡傛灉鐘舵€佸尮閰嶏紝false 鍚﹀垯
     */
    private boolean validateBlockStateProperties(BlockState actualBlockState, BlockStateData expectedBlockStateData) {
        try {
            // 妫€鏌ユ瘡涓湡鏈涚殑灞炴€ф槸鍚︿笌瀹為檯鐘舵€佸尮閰?            for (Map.Entry<String, String> entry : expectedBlockStateData.entrySet()) {
                String propertyName = entry.getKey();
                String expectedValue = entry.getValue();
                
                // 鏌ユ壘瀵瑰簲鐨勫睘鎬?                boolean propertyFound = false;
                for (var property : actualBlockState.getProperties()) {
                    if (property.getName().equals(propertyName)) {
                        String actualValue = actualBlockState.get(property).toString();
                        if (!actualValue.equals(expectedValue)) {
                            NodeCraft.LOGGER.debug("鏂瑰潡灞炴€?{} 涓嶅尮閰? 鏈熸湜 {}, 瀹為檯 {}", 
                                propertyName, expectedValue, actualValue);
                            return false;
                        }
                        propertyFound = true;
                        break;
                    }
                }
                
                if (!propertyFound) {
                    NodeCraft.LOGGER.debug("鏂瑰潡灞炴€?{} 鍦ㄥ疄闄呯姸鎬佷腑鏈壘鍒?, propertyName);
                    return false;
                }
            }
            
            return true;
            
        } catch (Exception e) {
            NodeCraft.LOGGER.debug("楠岃瘉鏂瑰潡鐘舵€佸睘鎬ф椂鍙戠敓寮傚父", e);
            return false;
        }
    }
    
        // === IBlockPickerCallback 瀹炵幇 ===
    
    @Override
    public void onBlockPicked(Coordinate position, String blockId, BlockStateData blockStateData) {
        // 棣栧厛妫€鏌?Minecraft 涓栫晫鐘舵€?        ValidationResult<Void> worldValidation = validateWorldState();
        if (!worldValidation.isValid()) {
            NodeCraft.LOGGER.warn("鑺傜偣 {} 鏃犳硶鎷惧彇鏂瑰潡: {}", getId(), worldValidation.getMessage());
            onPickingCancelled();
            return;
        }
        
        // 楠岃瘉鎷惧彇鐨勬柟鍧楁槸鍚︿笌瀹㈡埛绔笘鐣岀姸鎬佷竴鑷达紙鍙€変絾鎺ㄨ崘锛?        ValidationResult<BlockValidationData> blockValidation = validatePickedBlock(position, blockId, blockStateData);
        if (!blockValidation.isValid()) {
            NodeCraft.LOGGER.warn("鑺傜偣 {} 鏂瑰潡楠岃瘉澶辫触: {}", getId(), blockValidation.getMessage());
            // 娉ㄦ剰锛氳繖閲屼笉杩斿洖锛岃€屾槸缁х画浣跨敤浼犲叆鐨勬柟鍧椾俊鎭紝浣嗕細璁板綍璀﹀憡
            // 杩欐牱鍙互澶勭悊缃戠粶寤惰繜瀵艰嚧鐨勭姸鎬佷笉涓€鑷撮棶棰?        }
        

        
        // 澶栭儴浜や簰绠＄悊鍣ㄩ€氱煡鏂瑰潡琚嬀鍙?        this.pickedBlockPosition = position;
        this.pickedBlockId = blockId;
        this.pickedBlockStateData = blockStateData;
        this.hasPickedBlock = true;
        
        // 鏍囪鑺傜偣涓鸿剰锛岃Е鍙戦噸鏂拌绠?        markDirty();
        
        // 鏄剧ず閫夋嫨瑙嗚鍙嶉 - 缁胯壊鑴夊啿琛ㄧず鎴愬姛閫変腑
        // 妫€鏌ヨ妭鐐规槸鍚﹀湪娓告垙涓彲瑙?        boolean nodeVisible = isNodeVisibleInGame();
        NodeCraft.LOGGER.info("鑺傜偣 {} 鍙鎬х姸鎬? {}, 鍑嗗鏄剧ず閫夋嫨鍙嶉", getId(), nodeVisible);

        if (nodeVisible) {
            try {
                SelectionVisualFeedback.getInstance().showBlockSelection(
                    getId().toString(),
                    position,
                    SelectionVisualFeedback.SelectionState.SELECTED
                );
                NodeCraft.LOGGER.info("鑺傜偣 {} 閫夋嫨瑙嗚鍙嶉宸茶姹傛樉绀猴紝浣嶇疆: {}", getId(), position);
            } catch (Exception e) {
                NodeCraft.LOGGER.error("鑺傜偣 {} 鏄剧ず閫夋嫨瑙嗚鍙嶉澶辫触: {}", getId(), e.getMessage(), e);
            }
        } else {
            NodeCraft.LOGGER.info("鑺傜偣 {} 鍦ㄦ父鎴忎腑涓嶅彲瑙侊紝璺宠繃閫夋嫨瑙嗚鍙嶉", getId());
        }
        
        // 缁熶竴鏇存柊骞界伒鏂瑰潡棰勮
        updateGhostBlockPreview();
        
        NodeCraft.LOGGER.info("鑺傜偣 {} 鎺ユ敹鍒版嬀鍙栫殑鏂瑰潡: {} at {}", getId(), blockId, position);
        if (NodeCraft.LOGGER.isDebugEnabled()) {
            NodeCraft.LOGGER.debug("鑺傜偣 {} 鏂瑰潡鐘舵€佹暟鎹? {}", getId(), 
                (blockStateData != null ? blockStateData.toString() : "鏃?));
            blockValidation.getData().ifPresent(validationData -> NodeCraft.LOGGER.debug("鑺傜偣 {} 涓栫晫涓疄闄呮柟鍧? {}, 鐘舵€佸尮閰? {}",
                getId(), validationData.actualBlockId(), validationData.stateMatches()));
        }
    }
    
    @Override
    public void onPickingCancelled() {
        NodeCraft.LOGGER.debug("鑺傜偣 {} 鏂瑰潡鎷惧彇琚彇娑?, getId());
    }
    
    @Override
    public IBlockPickerCallback.BlockPickingConfig getPickingConfig() {
        IBlockPickerCallback.BlockPickingConfig config = new IBlockPickerCallback.BlockPickingConfig();
        config.setMaxDistance(maxDistance);
        config.setIncludeFluids(includeFluids);
        return config;
    }
    
    // === 鏂瑰潡绠＄悊鏂规硶 ===
    
    public void clearPickedBlock() {
        hasPickedBlock = false;
        pickedBlockPosition = null;
        pickedBlockId = "minecraft:air";
        pickedBlockStateData = null;
        
        // 娓呴櫎閫夋嫨瑙嗚鍙嶉
        SelectionVisualFeedback.getInstance().clearFeedback(getId().toString());
        
        // 闅愯棌骞界伒鏂瑰潡棰勮
        hideGhostBlockPreview();
        
        markDirty();
    }
    
    /**
     * 缁熶竴鐨勫菇鐏垫柟鍧楅瑙堟洿鏂版柟娉?     * 鏍规嵁褰撳墠鐘舵€佸喅瀹氭槸鍚︽樉绀洪瑙?     * 
     * 妫€鏌ヨ妭鐐圭殑娓告垙鍐呭彲瑙佹€х姸鎬侊細
     * - 濡傛灉鑺傜偣琚缃负 "Hide in Game"锛屽垯涓嶆樉绀轰换浣曢瑙?     * - 鍙湁褰撹妭鐐瑰湪娓告垙涓彲瑙佹椂锛屾墠鏍规嵁鍏朵粬鏉′欢鏄剧ず棰勮
     */
    private void updateGhostBlockPreview() {
        try {
            // 妫€鏌ヨ妭鐐规槸鍚﹀湪娓告垙涓彲瑙?            if (!isNodeVisibleInGame()) {
                hideGhostBlockPreview();
                return;
            }
            
            if (showGhostBlock && hasPickedBlock && pickedBlockPosition != null && pickedBlockId != null) {
                showGhostBlockPreview();
            } else {
                hideGhostBlockPreview();
            }
        } catch (NullPointerException | IllegalArgumentException e) {
            NodeCraft.LOGGER.error("鑺傜偣 {} 鏇存柊骞界伒鏂瑰潡棰勮澶辫触: {} - {}", getId(), 
                e.getClass().getSimpleName(), 
                e instanceof NullPointerException ? "妫€鏌reviewRenderer鎴栧潗鏍囨暟鎹? : "鍙兘鏄棤鏁堢殑鏂瑰潡ID鎴栧潗鏍?, e);
            currentGhostBlockPreviewId = null;
        } catch (Exception e) {
            NodeCraft.LOGGER.error("鑺傜偣 {} 鏇存柊骞界伒鏂瑰潡棰勮澶辫触: {} - {}", getId(), 
                e.getClass().getSimpleName(), e.getMessage(), e);
            currentGhostBlockPreviewId = null;
        }
    }
    
    private void showGhostBlockPreview() {
        if (pickedBlockPosition != null && pickedBlockId != null) {
            try {
                // 妫€鏌ヤ笘鐣岀姸鎬侊紝纭繚棰勮鍙互姝ｅ父鏄剧ず
                ValidationResult<Void> worldValidation = validateWorldState();
                if (!worldValidation.isValid()) {
                    NodeCraft.LOGGER.debug("鑺傜偣 {} 璺宠繃骞界伒鏂瑰潡棰勮: {}", getId(), worldValidation.getMessage());
                    return;
                }
                
                // 鍏堥殣钘忎箣鍓嶇殑棰勮
                hideGhostBlockPreview();
                
                // 鏄剧ず鏂扮殑棰勮
                currentGhostBlockPreviewId = PreviewRenderer.getInstance()
                        .showGhostBlock(getId().toString(), pickedBlockPosition, pickedBlockId, 0.5f);
                
                if (currentGhostBlockPreviewId != null) {
                    NodeCraft.LOGGER.debug("鑺傜偣 {} 骞界伒鏂瑰潡棰勮宸叉樉绀? {} at {}, 棰勮ID: {}", 
                        getId(), pickedBlockId, pickedBlockPosition, currentGhostBlockPreviewId);
                } else {
                    NodeCraft.LOGGER.warn("鑺傜偣 {} 骞界伒鏂瑰潡棰勮鍒涘缓澶辫触: {} at {}", 
                        getId(), pickedBlockId, pickedBlockPosition);
                }
            } catch (NullPointerException e) {
                NodeCraft.LOGGER.error("鑺傜偣 {} 鏄剧ず骞界伒鏂瑰潡棰勮澶辫触: 绌烘寚閽堝紓甯?- PreviewRenderer鎴栨柟鍧楁暟鎹负null", getId(), e);
                currentGhostBlockPreviewId = null;
            } catch (IllegalArgumentException e) {
                NodeCraft.LOGGER.error("鑺傜偣 {} 鏄剧ず骞界伒鏂瑰潡棰勮澶辫触: 鍙傛暟寮傚父 - 鏃犳晥鐨勬柟鍧桰D: {}", getId(), pickedBlockId, e);
                currentGhostBlockPreviewId = null;
            } catch (Exception e) {
                NodeCraft.LOGGER.error("鑺傜偣 {} 鏄剧ず骞界伒鏂瑰潡棰勮澶辫触: {} - {}", getId(), 
                    e.getClass().getSimpleName(), e.getMessage(), e);
                currentGhostBlockPreviewId = null;
            }
        }
    }
    
    private void hideGhostBlockPreview() {
        if (currentGhostBlockPreviewId != null) {
            try {
                PreviewRenderer.getInstance().hideGhostBlock(currentGhostBlockPreviewId);
                NodeCraft.LOGGER.debug("鑺傜偣 {} 骞界伒鏂瑰潡棰勮宸查殣钘? {}", getId(), currentGhostBlockPreviewId);
            } catch (NullPointerException e) {
                NodeCraft.LOGGER.error("鑺傜偣 {} 闅愯棌骞界伒鏂瑰潡棰勮澶辫触: 绌烘寚閽堝紓甯?- PreviewRenderer涓簄ull", getId(), e);
            } catch (IllegalArgumentException e) {
                NodeCraft.LOGGER.error("鑺傜偣 {} 闅愯棌骞界伒鏂瑰潡棰勮澶辫触: 鍙傛暟寮傚父 - 鏃犳晥鐨勯瑙圛D: {}", getId(), currentGhostBlockPreviewId, e);
            } catch (Exception e) {
                NodeCraft.LOGGER.error("鑺傜偣 {} 闅愯棌骞界伒鏂瑰潡棰勮澶辫触: {} - {}", getId(), 
                    e.getClass().getSimpleName(), e.getMessage(), e);
            } finally {
                // 鏃犺鏄惁鎴愬姛锛岄兘娓呯悊ID
                currentGhostBlockPreviewId = null;
            }
        }
    }
    
    // === BaseCustomUINode 瀹炵幇 ===
    
    @Override
    protected float calculateUIHeight() {
        // 璁＄畻鍩虹楂樺害锛屽寘鍚墍鏈夊彲鑳界殑UI鍏冪礌
        float baseHeight = 60f; // 鎷惧彇鎸夐挳鐨勫熀纭€楂樺害
        
        // 濡傛灉姝ｅ湪鎷惧彇锛屼负鐘舵€佹彁绀哄鍔犻珮搴?        NodeEditorInteractionManager interactionManager = NodeEditorInteractionManager.getInstance();
        if (interactionManager.isPendingBlockPick(getId().toString())) {
            baseHeight += 40f; // 绛夊緟鐘舵€佹彁绀?        }
        
        // 杈撳叆楠岃瘉閿欒/璀﹀憡鐨勯珮搴?        if (inputValidationError != null && !inputValidationError.isEmpty()) {
            baseHeight += 20f;
        }
        if (hasInputValidationWarning && inputValidationWarning != null && !inputValidationWarning.isEmpty()) {
            baseHeight += 20f;
        }
        
        // 鐘舵€佹樉绀哄尯鍩熺殑楂樺害锛堝彲鎶樺彔鏍囬 + 鍐呭锛?        if (hasPickedBlock || hasInputCoordinates()) {
            baseHeight += 25f; // 鍙姌鍙犳爣棰?            // 鍋囪灞曞紑鐘舵€侊紝涓哄唴瀹归鐣欑┖闂?            baseHeight += 120f; // 鏂瑰潡淇℃伅 + 娓呴櫎鎸夐挳
        } else {
            baseHeight += 20f; // "鏈€夋嫨鏂瑰潡"鎻愮ず
        }
        
        // 璁剧疆鍖哄煙鐨勯珮搴︼紙鍙姌鍙犳爣棰?+ 鍐呭锛?        baseHeight += 25f; // 璁剧疆鏍囬
        // 涓鸿缃唴瀹归鐣欑┖闂达紙鍋囪鍙兘灞曞紑锛?        baseHeight += 80f; // 杈撳叆绔彛鐘舵€?+ 澶嶉€夋 + 婊戝潡
        
        // 娣诲姞闂磋窛
        baseHeight += 20f; // 鍚勭灏忛棿璺濈殑鎬诲拰
        
        return baseHeight;
    }

    @Override
    protected float calculateMinUIWidth() {
        return 200f; // 鏈€灏忓搴?    }
    
    /**
     * 瑕嗗啓瀛椾綋缂╂斁璁＄畻锛屼娇鍏朵笌閫氱敤鑺傜偣鍏冪礌淇濇寔涓€鑷?     * 
     * 閫氱敤鑺傜偣鍏冪礌锛堟枃瀛椼€佽繛鎺ョ偣锛変娇鐢ㄧ洿鎺ョ殑绾挎€х缉鏀撅細baseFontSize * canvasZoom
     * 涓轰簡纭繚鑷畾涔塙I鍏冪礌涓庡畠浠悓姝ョ缉鏀撅紝鎴戜滑涔熶娇鐢ㄧ浉鍚岀殑绛栫暐
     * 
     * @param zoom 褰撳墠缂╂斁绾у埆
     * @return 涓庨€氱敤鑺傜偣鍏冪礌涓€鑷寸殑瀛椾綋缂╂斁鍥犲瓙
     */
    @Override
    protected float calculateImGuiFontScale(float zoom) {
        // 浣跨敤涓庨€氱敤鑺傜偣鍏冪礌瀹屽叏涓€鑷寸殑缂╂斁绛栫暐
        // 閫氱敤鍏冪礌浣跨敤锛歜aseFontSize * canvasZoom
        // 鎵€浠ユ垜浠殑瀛椾綋缂╂斁鍥犲瓙灏辨槸 zoom 鏈韩
        
        // 娣诲姞鍩烘湰鐨勫畨鍏ㄩ檺鍒讹紝闃叉鏋佺鍊?        float clampedZoom = Math.max(0.1f, Math.min(zoom, 10.0f));
        
        if (isLayoutDebugEnabled()) {
            NodeCraft.LOGGER.debug("[Font Scale Debug] Node {}: Using direct zoom scaling for consistency with general elements - zoom={:.3f}, fontScale={:.3f}", 
                                 getId(), zoom, clampedZoom);
        }
        
        return clampedZoom;
    }
    
    /**
     * 娓叉煋鑺傜偣鐨勮嚜瀹氫箟UI
     * 
     * 浣跨敤鍙姌鍙犳爣棰樺皢UI鍒嗕负涓変釜閫昏緫鍖哄煙锛?     * 1. 涓昏鎿嶄綔鍖?- 鎷惧彇鎸夐挳鍜岀姸鎬佹彁绀?     * 2. 鐘舵€佹樉绀哄尯 - 宸查€夋柟鍧椾俊鎭紙鍙姌鍙狅級
     * 3. 楂樼骇璁剧疆鍖?- 鎵€鏈夐厤缃€夐」锛堝彲鎶樺彔锛?     * 
     * 浼樺寲鐨勮緭鍏ヤ簨浠朵紶鎾帶鍒讹細
     * - 浣跨敤 ImGui.getIO().getWantCaptureMouse() 妫€娴嬮紶鏍囪緭鍏ユ崟鑾?     * - 浣跨敤 ImGui.getIO().getWantCaptureKeyboard() 妫€娴嬮敭鐩樿緭鍏ユ崟鑾?     * - 杩欐瘮鎵嬪姩璺熻釜UI浜や簰鏇寸簿纭紝鑳芥崟鑾锋墍鏈夌被鍨嬬殑杈撳叆浜嬩欢
     * - 鍖呮嫭婊戝潡鐨勯敭鐩樿緭鍏ャ€佸彸閿彍鍗曘€佹粴杞搷浣滅瓑
     * 
     * @param width 鑺傜偣瀹藉害
     * @param height 鑺傜偣楂樺害  
     * @param zoom 缂╂斁绾у埆
     * @return true 濡傛灉搴旇闃绘浜嬩欢浼犳挱鍒板簳灞傜郴缁燂紝false 鍚﹀垯
     */
    @Override
    protected boolean renderCustomUIScaled(float width, float height, float zoom) {
        boolean changed = false;
        
        // === 浣跨敤 Minecraft UI 涓婚绯荤粺 ===
        // 娉ㄦ剰锛氱缉鏀惧彉鎹㈢幇鍦ㄧ敱 CustomUIRenderer 缁熶竴澶勭悊锛岃繖閲屽彧闇€瑕佸簲鐢ㄤ富棰橀鑹?        try (MinecraftUITheme.MinecraftStyleScope themeScope = MinecraftUITheme.apply(1.0f)) {
            // 鐜板湪 width 宸茬粡鏄缉鏀惧悗鐨勫儚绱犲€硷紝鐩存帴浣跨敤
            float availableWidth = width - (2 * getMediumPadding());
            
            // 娣诲姞椤堕儴闂磋窛锛堣緝灏忥級
            addVerticalSpacing(getSmallPadding(), zoom);

            // === 1. 涓昏鎿嶄綔鍖?===
            NodeEditorInteractionManager interactionManager = NodeEditorInteractionManager.getInstance();
            boolean isCurrentlyPicking = interactionManager.isPendingBlockPick(getId().toString());
            
            String pickButtonText = isCurrentlyPicking ? "鍙栨秷鎷惧彇" : "鎷惧彇鏂瑰潡";
            float buttonHeight = ImGui.getFrameHeight();
            
            if (ImGui.button(pickButtonText + "##pickBlock", availableWidth, buttonHeight)) {
                if (isCurrentlyPicking) {
                    // 鍙栨秷褰撳墠鎷惧彇
                    interactionManager.cancelBlockPick();
                    NodeCraft.LOGGER.info("鑺傜偣 {} 鍙栨秷鏂瑰潡鎷惧彇", getId());
                } else {
                    // 纭繚缂栬緫妯″紡宸叉縺娲?                    if (!interactionManager.isInEditorMode()) {
                        interactionManager.enterEditorMode();
                        NodeCraft.LOGGER.debug("鑺傜偣 {} 婵€娲荤紪杈戞ā寮忎互鏀寔鏂瑰潡鎷惧彇", getId());
                    }
                    
                    // 璇锋眰鏂瑰潡鎷惧彇锛堜娇鐢ㄦ柊鐨凙PI锛?                    NodeCraft.LOGGER.info("鑺傜偣 {} 璇锋眰鏂瑰潡鎷惧彇 - 缂栬緫妯″紡:{} 浜や簰妯″紡:{}", 
                        getId(), interactionManager.isInEditorMode(), interactionManager.isInInteractionMode());
                    
                    interactionManager.requestBlockPick(getId().toString(), this);
                    NodeCraft.LOGGER.info("鑺傜偣 {} 鏂瑰潡鎷惧彇璇锋眰宸插彂閫?- 璇峰湪娓告垙涓乏閿偣鍑讳竴涓柟鍧?, getId());
                }
                changed = true;
            }

            // 鎷惧彇鐘舵€佹彁绀?            if (isCurrentlyPicking) {
                addVerticalSpacing(getSmallPadding(), zoom);
                ImGui.pushStyleColor(ImGuiCol.Text, 1.0f, 1.0f, 0.0f, 1.0f); // 榛勮壊
                ImGui.text("绛夊緟鎷惧彇涓?..");
                ImGui.text("鍦ㄦ父鎴忎腑宸﹂敭鐐瑰嚮鏂瑰潡");
                ImGui.popStyleColor();
            }

            // 鏄剧ず杈撳叆楠岃瘉閿欒锛堝鏋滄湁锛?            renderInputValidationErrors(zoom);

            // === 2. 鐘舵€佹樉绀哄尯 ===
            if (hasPickedBlock || hasInputCoordinates()) {
                // 榛樿灞曞紑鐘舵€佹樉绀哄尯
                String headerText = hasPickedBlock ? "宸查€夋柟鍧椾俊鎭?#info" : "杈撳叆鍧愭爣鏂瑰潡##info";
                if (ImGui.collapsingHeader(headerText, ImGuiTreeNodeFlags.DefaultOpen)) {
                    ImGui.indent(); // 缂╄繘鍐呭
                    addVerticalSpacing(getSmallPadding(), zoom);
                    
                    // 鏄剧ず鏁版嵁鏉ユ簮
                    if (hasPickedBlock) {
                        ImGui.textDisabled("鏉ユ簮:");
                        ImGui.sameLine();
                        ImGui.text("浜や簰鎷惧彇");
                    } else {
                        ImGui.textDisabled("鏉ユ簮:");
                        ImGui.sameLine();
                        ImGui.text("杈撳叆鍧愭爣");
                    }
                    
                    // 鏂瑰潡鍚嶇О鍜孖D锛堢揣鍑戝竷灞€锛?                    String blockName = getBlockDisplayName(pickedBlockId);
                    ImGui.textDisabled("鍚嶇О:");
                    ImGui.sameLine();
                    ImGui.text(blockName);
                    
                    ImGui.textDisabled("ID:");
                    ImGui.sameLine();
                    ImGui.text(pickedBlockId);
                    
                    // 浣嶇疆淇℃伅锛堝甫鎮仠鎻愮ず鏄剧ず涓績鐐癸級
                    if (pickedBlockPosition != null) {
                        ImGui.textDisabled("浣嶇疆:");
                        ImGui.sameLine();
                        ImGui.text(String.format("%d, %d, %d", 
                            pickedBlockPosition.getX(), 
                            pickedBlockPosition.getY(), 
                            pickedBlockPosition.getZ()));
                        
                        // 鎮仠鏃舵樉绀轰腑蹇冪偣鍧愭爣
                        if (ImGui.isItemHovered()) {
                            Vector3d center = new Vector3d(
                                pickedBlockPosition.getX() + 0.5,
                                pickedBlockPosition.getY() + 0.5,
                                pickedBlockPosition.getZ() + 0.5
                            );
                            ImGui.setTooltip(String.format("涓績鐐? %.2f, %.2f, %.2f", 
                                center.x, center.y, center.z));
                        }
                    }
                    
                    // 鏂瑰潡鐘舵€佸睘鎬э紙鍙睍寮€鐨勬爲褰㈢粨鏋勶級
                    if (pickedBlockStateData != null && !pickedBlockStateData.isEmpty()) {
                        ImGui.textDisabled("鐘舵€?");
                        ImGui.sameLine();
                        
                        // 浣跨敤鏍戝舰鑺傜偣灞曠ず灞炴€у垪琛?                        String stateLabel = "灞炴€?(" + pickedBlockStateData.size() + ")";
                        if (ImGui.treeNode(stateLabel + "##blockState")) {
                            for (Map.Entry<String, String> entry : pickedBlockStateData.entrySet()) {
                                ImGui.bulletText(entry.getKey() + ": " + entry.getValue());
                            }
                            ImGui.treePop();
                        }
                    }
                    
                    // 鏂瑰潡瀹炰綋淇℃伅
                    boolean hasBlockEntity = checkHasBlockEntity(pickedBlockId, pickedBlockPosition);
                    if (hasBlockEntity) {
                        ImGui.bulletText("鍖呭惈鏂瑰潡瀹炰綋");
                    }
                    
                    ImGui.unindent();
                    addVerticalSpacing(getSmallPadding(), zoom);
                    ImGui.separator(); // 鍒嗛殧绾?                    addVerticalSpacing(getSmallPadding(), zoom);
                    
                    // 娓呴櫎鎸夐挳锛堢孩鑹茶鍛婅壊锛?                    ImGui.pushStyleColor(ImGuiCol.Button, 0.8f, 0.2f, 0.2f, 1.0f); // 绾㈣壊鎸夐挳
                    ImGui.pushStyleColor(ImGuiCol.ButtonHovered, 0.9f, 0.3f, 0.3f, 1.0f); // 鎮仠鏃剁◢浜?                    ImGui.pushStyleColor(ImGuiCol.ButtonActive, 0.7f, 0.1f, 0.1f, 1.0f); // 鎸変笅鏃剁◢鏆?                    if (ImGui.button("娓呴櫎閫夋嫨##clearBlock", availableWidth, buttonHeight)) {
                        clearPickedBlock();
                        changed = true;
                    }
                    ImGui.popStyleColor(3); // 寮瑰嚭涓変釜棰滆壊鏍峰紡
                    
                    addVerticalSpacing(getSmallPadding(), zoom);
                }
            } else {
                ImGui.pushStyleColor(ImGuiCol.Text, 0.6f, 0.6f, 0.6f, 1.0f);
                ImGui.text("鏈€夋嫨鏂瑰潡");
                ImGui.popStyleColor();
            }

            // === 3. 楂樼骇璁剧疆鍖?===
            if (ImGui.collapsingHeader("璁剧疆##settings")) {
                addVerticalSpacing(getSmallPadding(), zoom);
                
                // 杈撳叆绔彛鐘舵€佽鏄?                if (hasPickedBlock) {
                    ImGui.pushStyleColor(ImGuiCol.Text, 0.8f, 0.6f, 0.2f, 1.0f); // 姗欒壊
                    ImGui.text("杈撳叆绔彛宸茬鐢紙宸叉嬀鍙栨柟鍧楋級");
                    ImGui.popStyleColor();
                } else {
                    ImGui.pushStyleColor(ImGuiCol.Text, 0.2f, 0.8f, 0.2f, 1.0f); // 缁胯壊
                    ImGui.text("杈撳叆绔彛鍙敤锛圶銆乊銆乑鍧愭爣锛?);
                    ImGui.popStyleColor();
                }
                addVerticalSpacing(getSmallPadding(), zoom);
                
                // 鏄剧ず骞界伒鏂瑰潡閫夐」
                if (ImGui.checkbox("鏄剧ず骞界伒鏂瑰潡##ghostBlock", showGhostBlock)) {
                    setShowGhostBlock(!showGhostBlock);
                    changed = true;
                }



                // 鍖呭惈娴佷綋閫夐」
                if (ImGui.checkbox("鍖呭惈娴佷綋##includeFluids", includeFluids)) {
                    setIncludeFluids(!includeFluids);
                    changed = true;
                }

                // 鏈€澶ц窛绂绘粦鍧?                ImGui.text("鏈€澶ц窛绂? " + String.format("%.1f", maxDistance));
                addVerticalSpacing(2, zoom);
                
                float[] distanceArray = {maxDistance};
                setItemWidth(availableWidth, zoom);
                if (ImGui.sliderFloat("##maxDistance", distanceArray, 1.0f, 300.0f)) {
                    setMaxDistance(distanceArray[0]);
                    changed = true;
                }
                ImGui.popItemWidth();
                
                addVerticalSpacing(getSmallPadding(), zoom);
            }

        } catch (NullPointerException e) {
            NodeCraft.LOGGER.error("鑺傜偣 {} UI娓叉煋澶辫触: 绌烘寚閽堝紓甯?- 鍙兘鐨勫師鍥? 鏈垵濮嬪寲鐨勭粍浠舵垨鏁版嵁", getId(), e);
            // 鍦ㄨ皟璇曟ā寮忎笅鎻愪緵鏇村涓婁笅鏂囦俊鎭?            if (NodeCraft.LOGGER.isDebugEnabled()) {
                NodeCraft.LOGGER.debug("鑺傜偣鐘舵€? hasPickedBlock={}, pickedBlockPosition={}, showGhostBlock={}", 
                    hasPickedBlock, pickedBlockPosition, showGhostBlock);
            }
        } catch (IllegalStateException e) {
            NodeCraft.LOGGER.error("鑺傜偣 {} UI娓叉煋澶辫触: 闈炴硶鐘舵€佸紓甯?- ImGui鍙兘鏈纭垵濮嬪寲", getId(), e);
        } catch (Exception e) {
            NodeCraft.LOGGER.error("鑺傜偣 {} UI娓叉煋澶辫触: {} - {}", getId(), 
                e.getClass().getSimpleName(), e.getMessage(), e);
        } // try-with-resources 浼氳嚜鍔ㄨ皟鐢?themeScope.close() 鏉ユ仮澶嶆牱寮?
        // 浣跨敤ImGui鐨勮緭鍏ユ崟鑾风姸鎬佹潵绮剧‘鎺у埗浜嬩欢浼犳挱
        // 杩欐瘮鎵嬪姩璺熻釜浜や簰鐘舵€佹洿鍙潬锛岃兘鎹曡幏鎵€鏈夌被鍨嬬殑杈撳叆锛堥紶鏍囥€侀敭鐩樸€佹粴杞瓑锛?        boolean wantCaptureMouse = ImGui.getIO().getWantCaptureMouse();
        boolean wantCaptureKeyboard = ImGui.getIO().getWantCaptureKeyboard();
        boolean shouldCaptureInput = wantCaptureMouse || wantCaptureKeyboard;
        
        if (shouldCaptureInput) {
            // ImGui姝ｅ湪澶勭悊杈撳叆锛岄樆姝簨浠朵紶鎾埌Minecraft涓栫晫
            // 鍙€夛細娣诲姞璋冭瘯鏃ュ織锛堝湪寮€鍙戦樁娈垫湁鐢級
            if (System.getProperty("nodecraft.debug.ui", "false").equals("true")) {
                NodeCraft.LOGGER.debug("鑺傜偣 {} 鎹曡幏杈撳叆 - 榧犳爣: {}, 閿洏: {}", 
                    getId().toString().substring(0, 8), wantCaptureMouse, wantCaptureKeyboard);
            }
            return true;
        }

        return changed;
    }
    
    // === 杈呭姪鏂规硶 ===
    
    /**
     * 娓叉煋杈撳叆楠岃瘉閿欒鍜岃鍛婁俊鎭?     * @param zoom 缂╂斁绾у埆
     */
    private void renderInputValidationErrors(float zoom) {
        // 鏄剧ず杈撳叆楠岃瘉閿欒
        if (inputValidationError != null && !inputValidationError.isEmpty()) {
            ImGui.pushStyleColor(ImGuiCol.Text, 1.0f, 0.3f, 0.3f, 1.0f); // 绾㈣壊
            ImGui.text("閿欒: " + inputValidationError);
            ImGui.popStyleColor();
            addVerticalSpacing(getSmallPadding(), zoom);
        }
        
        // 鏄剧ず杈撳叆楠岃瘉璀﹀憡
        if (hasInputValidationWarning && inputValidationWarning != null && !inputValidationWarning.isEmpty()) {
            ImGui.pushStyleColor(ImGuiCol.Text, 1.0f, 0.8f, 0.2f, 1.0f); // 姗欒壊
            ImGui.text("璀﹀憡: " + inputValidationWarning);
            ImGui.popStyleColor();
            addVerticalSpacing(getSmallPadding(), zoom);
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * 鑾峰彇鍙敤鐨刄I瀹藉害锛堜笌閫氱敤鑺傜偣鍏冪礌缂╂斁绛栫暐涓€鑷达級
     * 
     * 閫氱敤鑺傜偣鍏冪礌浣跨敤鐩存帴鐨勫儚绱犵缉鏀撅紝鎴戜滑涔熼噰鐢ㄧ浉鍚岀殑绛栫暐
     * 浠ョ‘淇濊嚜瀹氫箟UI涓庤妭鐐归潰鏉夸繚鎸佸畬缇庣殑姣斾緥鍏崇郴
     * 
     * @param width 浼犲叆鐨勫搴︼紙宸茬粡鏄€傚悎褰撳墠缂╂斁绾у埆鐨勫€硷級
     * @param zoom 褰撳墠缂╂斁绾у埆
     * @return 鎵ｉ櫎padding鍚庣殑鍙敤瀹藉害
     */
    protected final float getAvailableWidth(float width, float zoom) {
        // 浣跨敤涓庨€氱敤鑺傜偣鍏冪礌涓€鑷寸殑padding璁＄畻鏂瑰紡
        // 閫氱敤鑺傜偣浣跨敤锛歂odeRenderConstants.NODE_HORIZONTAL_PADDING * canvasZoom
        // 鎴戜滑涔熶娇鐢ㄧ浉鍚岀殑绛栫暐鏉ョ‘淇濅竴鑷存€?        
        // 浣跨敤鍥哄畾鐨勯€昏緫padding鍊硷紝鐒跺悗鐩存帴鐢▃oom缂╂斁
        float logicalPadding = 8.0f; // 涓?NodeRenderConstants.NODE_HORIZONTAL_PADDING 鐩镐技鐨勫€?        float scaledPadding = logicalPadding * zoom;
        float availableWidth = Math.max(0, width - (scaledPadding * 2)); // 宸﹀彸涓や晶padding
        
        if (isLayoutDebugEnabled()) {
            NodeCraft.LOGGER.debug("[Layout Debug] Node {}: getAvailableWidth (direct scaling) - inputWidth={}, zoom={}, logicalPadding={}, scaledPadding={}, availableWidth={}", 
                                 getId(), width, zoom, logicalPadding, scaledPadding, availableWidth);
        }
        
        return availableWidth;
    }
    
    // === 灞炴€ц闂櫒 ===
    
    /*
     * markDirty() 璋冪敤瑙勫垯锛?     * 
     * 1. 鏁版嵁鍙樻洿瑙勫垯锛?     *    - 浠讳綍褰卞搷鑺傜偣杈撳嚭鐨勬暟鎹彉鍖栭兘蹇呴』璋冪敤 markDirty()
     *    - 鍖呮嫭锛氭嬀鍙栫殑鏂瑰潡鏁版嵁銆侀厤缃弬鏁扮瓑
     * 
     * 2. 鐘舵€佸彉鏇磋鍒欙細
     *    - 浠讳綍褰卞搷鑺傜偣鐘舵€佺殑璁剧疆鍙樺寲閮藉簲璇ヨ皟鐢?markDirty()
     *    - 鍖呮嫭锛歮axDistance銆乮ncludeFluids銆乽seHandItem銆乻howGhostBlock
     *    - 纭繚鐘舵€佸簭鍒楀寲銆佸弽搴忓垪鍖栧拰涓嬫父鑺傜偣鏇存柊姝ｅ父宸ヤ綔
     * 
     * 3. 涓€鑷存€у師鍒欙細
     *    - 鎵€鏈塻etter鏂规硶淇濇寔涓€鑷寸殑markDirty()璋冪敤妯″紡
     *    - 閬垮厤閮ㄥ垎璁剧疆璋冪敤銆侀儴鍒嗚缃笉璋冪敤鐨勪笉涓€鑷存儏鍐?     * 
     * 4. 鎬ц兘鑰冭檻锛?     *    - markDirty()璋冪敤寮€閿€寰堝皬锛屼竴鑷存€ф瘮寰紭鍖栨洿閲嶈
     *    - 閬垮厤鍥犱负涓嶈皟鐢╩arkDirty()瀵艰嚧鐨勭姸鎬佸悓姝ラ棶棰?     */
    
    public float getMaxDistance() {
        return maxDistance;
    }
    
    public void setMaxDistance(float maxDistance) {
        if (maxDistance < 0) maxDistance = 0;
        if (maxDistance > 1000) maxDistance = 1000;
        
        if (this.maxDistance != maxDistance) {
            this.maxDistance = maxDistance;
            markDirty();
        }
    }
    
    public void setIncludeFluids(boolean includeFluids) {
        if (this.includeFluids != includeFluids) {
            this.includeFluids = includeFluids;
            markDirty();
        }
    }
    

    
    public boolean isShowGhostBlock() {
        return showGhostBlock;
    }
    
    public void setShowGhostBlock(boolean showGhostBlock) {
        if (this.showGhostBlock != showGhostBlock) {
            this.showGhostBlock = showGhostBlock;
            
            // 缁熶竴璋冪敤棰勮鏇存柊鏂规硶
            updateGhostBlockPreview();
            
            // 缁熶竴璋冪敤markDirty()纭繚鑺傜偣鐘舵€佸彉鍖栬姝ｇ‘璺熻釜
            // 铏界劧showGhostBlock涓昏褰卞搷UI鏄剧ず锛屼絾瀹冩槸鑺傜偣鐘舵€佺殑涓€閮ㄥ垎
            // 淇濇寔涓庡叾浠栬缃柟娉曠殑涓€鑷存€э紝纭繚鐘舵€佸簭鍒楀寲鍜屼笅娓告洿鏂版甯稿伐浣?            markDirty();
        }
    }
    
    // === 鐘舵€佸簭鍒楀寲 ===
    
    @Override
    public Object getNodeState() {
        Map<String, Object> state = new HashMap<>();
        
        try {
            // 鐩存帴淇濆瓨璁剧疆涓洪《绾у睘鎬э紝涓嶡NodeProperty鏈哄埗鍏煎
            state.put("maxDistance", maxDistance);
            state.put("includeFluids", includeFluids);
            state.put("showGhostBlock", showGhostBlock);
            
            // 淇濆瓨鎷惧彇鐨勬柟鍧椾俊鎭?            if (hasPickedBlock && pickedBlockPosition != null) {
                Map<String, Object> pickedBlock = new HashMap<>();
                
                // 纭繚鏂瑰潡ID涓嶄负null
                pickedBlock.put("blockId", pickedBlockId != null ? pickedBlockId : "minecraft:air");
                pickedBlock.put("x", pickedBlockPosition.getX());
                pickedBlock.put("y", pickedBlockPosition.getY());
                pickedBlock.put("z", pickedBlockPosition.getZ());
                
                // 鏄惧紡澶勭悊BlockStateData鐨勫簭鍒楀寲
                if (pickedBlockStateData != null && !pickedBlockStateData.isEmpty()) {
                    // 鍒涘缓涓€涓柊鐨凥ashMap鏉ョ‘淇濈被鍨嬪畨鍏?                    Map<String, String> stateDataCopy = new HashMap<>();
                    for (Map.Entry<String, String> entry : pickedBlockStateData.entrySet()) {
                        if (entry.getKey() != null && entry.getValue() != null) {
                            stateDataCopy.put(entry.getKey(), entry.getValue());
                        }
                    }
                    pickedBlock.put("blockStateData", stateDataCopy);
                } else {
                    // 鏄惧紡淇濆瓨绌烘槧灏勶紝纭繚搴忓垪鍖栦竴鑷存€?                    pickedBlock.put("blockStateData", new HashMap<String, String>());
                }
                
                state.put("pickedBlock", pickedBlock);
            }
            
            NodeCraft.LOGGER.debug("鑺傜偣 {} 鐘舵€佸簭鍒楀寲瀹屾垚锛屽寘鍚?{} 涓睘鎬?, getId(), state.size());
            
        } catch (Exception e) {
            NodeCraft.LOGGER.error("鑺傜偣 {} 鐘舵€佸簭鍒楀寲澶辫触", getId(), e);
            // 杩斿洖鍩烘湰鐘舵€侊紝纭繚涓嶄細瀹屽叏澶辫触
            Map<String, Object> fallbackState = new HashMap<>();
            fallbackState.put("maxDistance", 100.0f);
            fallbackState.put("includeFluids", false);
            fallbackState.put("useHandItem", false);
            fallbackState.put("showGhostBlock", true);
            return fallbackState;
        }
        
        return state;
    }
    
    /**
     * 鎭㈠鑺傜偣鐘舵€?     * 
     * 鍋ュ．鐨勭姸鎬佸弽搴忓垪鍖栧疄鐜帮細
     * - 涓ユ牸鐨勭被鍨嬫鏌ワ紝浣跨敤 Map<String, Object> 绫诲瀷
     * - 璇︾粏鐨勯敊璇棩蹇楀拰寮傚父澶勭悊
     * - 瀵规棤鏁堟暟鎹殑瀹归敊澶勭悊
     * - 纭繚鐘舵€佷竴鑷存€у拰棰勮鍚屾
     * 
     * @param state 瑕佹仮澶嶇殑鐘舵€佸璞?     */
    @Override
    public void setNodeState(Object state) {
        if (!(state instanceof Map)) {
            NodeCraft.LOGGER.warn("鑺傜偣 {} 鐘舵€佹仮澶嶅け璐? 鏃犳晥鐘舵€佺被鍨?{}, 鏈熸湜 Map", 
                getId(), state != null ? state.getClass().getSimpleName() : "null");
            return;
        }
        
        try {
            // 浣跨敤鏇翠弗鏍肩殑绫诲瀷妫€鏌?            @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
            Map<String, Object> stateMap = (Map<String, Object>) state;
            
            NodeCraft.LOGGER.debug("鑺傜偣 {} 寮€濮嬬姸鎬佹仮澶嶏紝鍖呭惈 {} 涓睘鎬?, getId(), stateMap.size());
            
            // 鎭㈠璁剧疆灞炴€э紝浣跨敤妯″紡鍖归厤锛圝ava 14+锛夋垨浼犵粺鏂瑰紡
            restoreFloatSetting(stateMap, "maxDistance", this::setMaxDistance, 1.0f, 1000.0f);
            restoreBooleanSetting(stateMap, "includeFluids", this::setIncludeFluids);
            
            // showGhostBlock 鐗规畩澶勭悊锛氱洿鎺ヨ缃瓧娈甸伩鍏嶈Е鍙戦瑙堟洿鏂?            if (stateMap.get("showGhostBlock") instanceof Boolean showGhost) {
                this.showGhostBlock = showGhost;
                NodeCraft.LOGGER.debug("鑺傜偣 {} 鎭㈠ showGhostBlock: {}", getId(), showGhost);
            }
            
            // 鎭㈠鎷惧彇鐨勬柟鍧椾俊鎭?            restorePickedBlockData(stateMap);
            
            // 鐘舵€佹仮澶嶅畬鎴愬悗锛岀粺涓€鏇存柊骞界伒鏂瑰潡棰勮
            updateGhostBlockPreview();
            
            markDirty(); // 纭繚鑺傜偣鐘舵€佹仮澶嶅悗鑳藉瑙﹀彂鏇存柊
            
            NodeCraft.LOGGER.debug("鑺傜偣 {} 鐘舵€佹仮澶嶅畬鎴?, getId());
            
        } catch (ClassCastException e) {
            NodeCraft.LOGGER.error("鑺傜偣 {} 鐘舵€佹仮澶嶅け璐? 绫诲瀷杞崲寮傚父 - 鐘舵€佹牸寮忎笉鍏煎", getId(), e);
        } catch (Exception e) {
            NodeCraft.LOGGER.error("鑺傜偣 {} 鐘舵€佹仮澶嶅け璐? 鏈煡寮傚父", getId(), e);
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * 鎭㈠娴偣鏁拌缃?     */
    private void restoreFloatSetting(Map<String, Object> stateMap, String key, 
                                   java.util.function.Consumer<Float> setter, float min, float max) {
        if (stateMap.get(key) instanceof Number number) {
            float value = number.floatValue();
            // 搴旂敤鑼冨洿闄愬埗
            value = Math.max(min, Math.min(max, value));
            setter.accept(value);
            NodeCraft.LOGGER.debug("鑺傜偣 {} 鎭㈠ {}: {}", getId(), key, value);
        } else if (stateMap.containsKey(key)) {
            NodeCraft.LOGGER.warn("鑺傜偣 {} 鎭㈠ {} 澶辫触: 鏃犳晥绫诲瀷 {}", 
                getId(), key, stateMap.get(key).getClass().getSimpleName());
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * 鎭㈠甯冨皵璁剧疆
     */
    private void restoreBooleanSetting(Map<String, Object> stateMap, String key, 
                                     java.util.function.Consumer<Boolean> setter) {
        if (stateMap.get(key) instanceof Boolean value) {
            setter.accept(value);
            NodeCraft.LOGGER.debug("鑺傜偣 {} 鎭㈠ {}: {}", getId(), key, value);
        } else if (stateMap.containsKey(key)) {
            NodeCraft.LOGGER.warn("鑺傜偣 {} 鎭㈠ {} 澶辫触: 鏃犳晥绫诲瀷 {}", 
                getId(), key, stateMap.get(key).getClass().getSimpleName());
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * 鎭㈠鎷惧彇鐨勬柟鍧楁暟鎹?     */
    private void restorePickedBlockData(Map<String, Object> stateMap) {
        if (!(stateMap.get("pickedBlock") instanceof Map pickedBlockObj)) {
            if (stateMap.containsKey("pickedBlock")) {
                NodeCraft.LOGGER.warn("鑺傜偣 {} 鎭㈠鎷惧彇鏂瑰潡鏁版嵁澶辫触: 鏃犳晥绫诲瀷 {}", 
                    getId(), stateMap.get("pickedBlock").getClass().getSimpleName());
            }
            return;
        }
        
        try {
            @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
            Map<String, Object> pickedBlockMap = (Map<String, Object>) pickedBlockObj;
            
            // 涓ユ牸楠岃瘉蹇呴渶瀛楁
            String blockId = validateAndGetString(pickedBlockMap, "blockId");
            Integer x = validateAndGetInteger(pickedBlockMap, "x");
            Integer y = validateAndGetInteger(pickedBlockMap, "y");
            Integer z = validateAndGetInteger(pickedBlockMap, "z");
            
            if (blockId == null || x == null || y == null || z == null) {
                NodeCraft.LOGGER.warn("鑺傜偣 {} 鎭㈠鎷惧彇鏂瑰潡鏁版嵁澶辫触: 缂哄皯蹇呴渶瀛楁 - blockId={}, x={}, y={}, z={}", 
                    getId(), blockId, x, y, z);
                return;
            }
            
            // 鎭㈠鍩烘湰鏂瑰潡淇℃伅
            this.pickedBlockId = blockId;
            this.pickedBlockPosition = new Coordinate(x, y, z);
            this.hasPickedBlock = true;
            
            // 鎭㈠鏂瑰潡鐘舵€佹暟鎹?            restoreBlockStateData(pickedBlockMap);
            
            NodeCraft.LOGGER.debug("鑺傜偣 {} 鎭㈠鎷惧彇鏂瑰潡鏁版嵁: {} at ({}, {}, {})", 
                getId(), blockId, x, y, z);
                
        } catch (ClassCastException e) {
            NodeCraft.LOGGER.error("鑺傜偣 {} 鎭㈠鎷惧彇鏂瑰潡鏁版嵁澶辫触: 绫诲瀷杞崲寮傚父", getId(), e);
        } catch (Exception e) {
            NodeCraft.LOGGER.error("鑺傜偣 {} 鎭㈠鎷惧彇鏂瑰潡鏁版嵁澶辫触: 鏈煡寮傚父", getId(), e);
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * 鎭㈠鏂瑰潡鐘舵€佹暟鎹?     */
    private void restoreBlockStateData(Map<String, Object> pickedBlockMap) {
        Object stateDataObj = pickedBlockMap.get("blockStateData");
        
        if (stateDataObj == null) {
            this.pickedBlockStateData = null;
            return;
        }
        
        if (!(stateDataObj instanceof Map stateDataMap)) {
            NodeCraft.LOGGER.warn("鑺傜偣 {} 鎭㈠鏂瑰潡鐘舵€佹暟鎹け璐? 鏃犳晥绫诲瀷 {}", 
                getId(), stateDataObj.getClass().getSimpleName());
            this.pickedBlockStateData = null;
            return;
        }
        
                 try {
            this.pickedBlockStateData = new BlockStateData();
            int validEntries = 0;
            int totalEntries = stateDataMap.size();
            
            for (Object entryObj : stateDataMap.entrySet()) {
                if (entryObj instanceof Map.Entry<?, ?> entry) {
                    if (entry.getKey() instanceof String key && entry.getValue() instanceof String value) {
                        this.pickedBlockStateData.put(key, value);
                        validEntries++;
                    } else {
                        NodeCraft.LOGGER.debug("鑺傜偣 {} 璺宠繃鏃犳晥鐨勭姸鎬佹暟鎹潯鐩? {} -> {}", 
                            getId(), entry.getKey(), entry.getValue());
                    }
                }
            }
            
            NodeCraft.LOGGER.debug("鑺傜偣 {} 鎭㈠鏂瑰潡鐘舵€佹暟鎹? {}/{} 涓湁鏁堟潯鐩?, 
                getId(), validEntries, totalEntries);
                
        } catch (Exception e) {
            NodeCraft.LOGGER.error("鑺傜偣 {} 鎭㈠鏂瑰潡鐘舵€佹暟鎹け璐?, getId(), e);
            this.pickedBlockStateData = null;
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * 楠岃瘉骞惰幏鍙栧瓧绗︿覆鍊?     */
    private String validateAndGetString(Map<String, Object> map, String key) {
        Object value = map.get(key);
        if (value instanceof String str && !str.trim().isEmpty()) {
            return str;
        }
        return null;
    }
    
    /**
     * 楠岃瘉骞惰幏鍙栨暣鏁板€?     */
    private Integer validateAndGetInteger(Map<String, Object> map, String key) {
        Object value = map.get(key);
        if (value instanceof Integer integer) {
            return integer;
        } else if (value instanceof Number number) {
            return number.intValue();
        }
        return null;
    }
    
    // === 棰勮鐘舵€佺鐞?===
    
    /**
     * 妫€鏌ヨ妭鐐规槸鍚﹀湪娓告垙涓彲瑙?     * 閫氳繃缂栬緫鍣ㄧ殑鍙鎬ц缃潵鎺у埗棰勮鏄剧ず
     *
     * @return true 濡傛灉鑺傜偣鍦ㄦ父鎴忎腑鍙锛宖alse 濡傛灉琚缃负 "Hide in Game"
     */
    private boolean isNodeVisibleInGame() {
        try {
            // 灏濊瘯鑾峰彇褰撳墠鐨勮妭鐐圭紪杈戝櫒瀹炰緥
            com.nodecraft.gui.editor.impl.ImGuiNodeEditor editor =
                com.nodecraft.gui.editor.impl.ImGuiNodeEditor.getInstance();

            if (editor != null) {
                // 妫€鏌ヨ妭鐐规槸鍚﹀湪缂栬緫鍣ㄤ腑琚爣璁颁负鍙
                boolean isVisible = editor.isNodeVisible(getId());
                NodeCraft.LOGGER.debug("鑺傜偣 {} 娓告垙鍐呭彲瑙佹€ф鏌? {}", getId(), isVisible);
                return isVisible;
            } else {
                // 濡傛灉鏃犳硶鑾峰彇缂栬緫鍣ㄥ疄渚嬶紝榛樿涓哄彲瑙?                NodeCraft.LOGGER.debug("鑺傜偣 {} 鏃犳硶鑾峰彇缂栬緫鍣ㄥ疄渚嬶紝榛樿涓哄彲瑙?, getId());
                return true;
            }
        } catch (Exception e) {
            // 濡傛灉妫€鏌ヨ繃绋嬩腑鍑虹幇寮傚父锛岄粯璁や负鍙锛岄伩鍏嶅奖鍝嶆甯稿姛鑳?            NodeCraft.LOGGER.warn("鑺傜偣 {} 妫€鏌ユ父鎴忓唴鍙鎬ф椂鍑虹幇寮傚父锛岄粯璁や负鍙: {}", getId(), e.getMessage());
            return true;
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * 寮哄埗鍒锋柊骞界伒鏂瑰潡棰勮鐘舵€?     * 澶栭儴绯荤粺鍙互璋冪敤姝ゆ柟娉曟潵纭繚棰勮鐘舵€佹纭?     * 
     * 娉ㄦ剰锛氭鏂规硶涓嶈皟鐢╩arkDirty()锛屽洜涓哄畠鍙槸鍒锋柊棰勮鏄剧ず锛?     * 涓嶆敼鍙樿妭鐐圭殑瀹為檯鐘舵€佹垨鏁版嵁
     */
    public void refreshGhostBlockPreview() {
        updateGhostBlockPreview();
    }
    
    /**
     * 褰撹妭鐐圭殑娓告垙鍐呭彲瑙佹€х姸鎬佸彂鐢熷彉鍖栨椂璋冪敤
     * 杩欎釜鏂规硶搴旇鐢辩紪杈戝櫒鍦ㄥ垏鎹?"Hide in Game" / "Show in Game" 鏃惰皟鐢?     * 
     * @param visible 鏂扮殑鍙鎬х姸鎬?     */
    public void onGameVisibilityChanged(boolean visible) {
        NodeCraft.LOGGER.debug("鑺傜偣 {} 娓告垙鍐呭彲瑙佹€у彉鏇翠负: {}", getId(), visible);
        
        if (visible) {
            // 鑺傜偣鍙樹负鍙锛屾洿鏂伴瑙堢姸鎬?            updateGhostBlockPreview();
            
            // 濡傛灉鏈夐€変腑鐨勬柟鍧楋紝閲嶆柊鏄剧ず閫夋嫨鍙嶉
            if (hasPickedBlock && pickedBlockPosition != null) {
                SelectionVisualFeedback.getInstance().showBlockSelection(
                    getId().toString(), 
                    pickedBlockPosition, 
                    SelectionVisualFeedback.SelectionState.SELECTED
                );
            }
        } else {
            // 鑺傜偣鍙樹负涓嶅彲瑙侊紝闅愯棌鎵€鏈夐瑙?            hideGhostBlockPreview();
            SelectionVisualFeedback.getInstance().clearFeedback(getId().toString());
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * 楠岃瘉棰勮鐘舵€佺殑涓€鑷存€?     * 鐢ㄤ簬璋冭瘯鍜岀‘淇濋瑙堢姸鎬佹纭?     */
    private void validatePreviewState() {
        boolean isVisibleInGame = isNodeVisibleInGame();
        boolean shouldShowPreview = isVisibleInGame && showGhostBlock && hasPickedBlock && pickedBlockPosition != null && pickedBlockId != null;
        boolean hasActivePreview = currentGhostBlockPreviewId != null;
        
        if (shouldShowPreview != hasActivePreview) {
            NodeCraft.LOGGER.warn("鑺傜偣 {} 棰勮鐘舵€佷笉涓€鑷?- 搴旇鏄剧ず: {}, 瀹為檯鏈夐瑙? {}", 
                getId(), shouldShowPreview, hasActivePreview);
            if (NodeCraft.LOGGER.isDebugEnabled()) {
                NodeCraft.LOGGER.debug("鑺傜偣 {} 鐘舵€佽鎯? isVisibleInGame={}, showGhostBlock={}, hasPickedBlock={}, position={}, blockId={}, previewId={}", 
                    getId(), isVisibleInGame, showGhostBlock, hasPickedBlock, pickedBlockPosition, pickedBlockId, currentGhostBlockPreviewId);
            }
            
            // 灏濊瘯淇鐘舵€佷笉涓€鑷?            updateGhostBlockPreview();
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * 鑾峰彇鑺傜偣棰勮鐘舵€佺殑璇︾粏淇℃伅锛堢敤浜庤皟璇曪級
     * 鍖呭惈娓告垙鍐呭彲瑙佹€х姸鎬?     */
    public String getPreviewStateInfo() {
        boolean isVisibleInGame = isNodeVisibleInGame();
        return String.format("SelectedBlockNode[%s] 棰勮鐘舵€? isVisibleInGame=%s, showGhostBlock=%s, hasPickedBlock=%s, " +
                "position=%s, blockId=%s, previewId=%s", 
                getId().toString().substring(0, 8), 
                isVisibleInGame, showGhostBlock, hasPickedBlock, pickedBlockPosition, pickedBlockId, currentGhostBlockPreviewId);
    }
    
    // === 鏂板鐨勮緟鍔╂柟娉?===
    
    /**
     * 鑾峰彇鏂瑰潡鐨勬樉绀哄悕绉?     * 
     * @param blockId 鏂瑰潡ID
     * @return 浜虹被鍙鐨勬柟鍧楀悕绉?     */
    private String getBlockDisplayName(String blockId) {
        if (blockId == null || blockId.isEmpty()) {
            return "鏈煡鏂瑰潡";
        }
        
        try {
            MinecraftClient client = MinecraftClient.getInstance();
            if (client == null) {
                return getDefaultBlockName(blockId);
            }
            
                         // 灏濊瘯浠庢敞鍐岃〃鑾峰彇鏂瑰潡
             Identifier identifier = Identifier.tryParse(blockId);
             if (identifier == null) {
                 return getDefaultBlockName(blockId);
             }
             Block block = Registries.BLOCK.get(identifier);
            
            if (block != Blocks.AIR) {
                // 鑾峰彇鏂瑰潡鐨勭炕璇戞枃鏈?                Text displayName = block.getName();
                if (displayName != null) {
                    return displayName.getString();
                }
            }
            
            return getDefaultBlockName(blockId);
            
        } catch (Exception e) {
            NodeCraft.LOGGER.debug("鑺傜偣 {} 鑾峰彇鏂瑰潡鏄剧ず鍚嶇О澶辫触: {}", getId(), e.getMessage());
            return getDefaultBlockName(blockId);
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * 鑾峰彇榛樿鐨勬柟鍧楀悕绉帮紙褰撴棤娉曚粠娓告垙鑾峰彇鏃讹級
     */
    private String getDefaultBlockName(String blockId) {
        if (blockId == null) return "鏈煡鏂瑰潡";
        
        // 绠€鍗曠殑鍚嶇О杞崲锛氬幓鎺夊懡鍚嶇┖闂达紝灏嗕笅鍒掔嚎鏇挎崲涓虹┖鏍硷紝棣栧瓧姣嶅ぇ鍐?        String name = blockId;
        if (name.contains(":")) {
            name = name.substring(name.indexOf(":") + 1);
        }
        
        name = name.replace("_", " ");
        if (!name.isEmpty()) {
            name = name.substring(0, 1).toUpperCase() + name.substring(1);
        }
        
        return name;
    }
    

    
    /**
     * 妫€鏌ユ柟鍧楁槸鍚︽湁鏂瑰潡瀹炰綋
     * 浣跨敤 Minecraft 鐨?BlockState.hasBlockEntity() 鏂规硶锛?00% 鍑嗙‘涓旀棤闇€鎵嬪姩缁存姢鍒楄〃
     * 
     * @param blockId 鏂瑰潡ID
     * @param position 鏂瑰潡浣嶇疆
     * @return 鏄惁鏈夋柟鍧楀疄浣?     */
    private boolean checkHasBlockEntity(String blockId, Coordinate position) {
        if (blockId == null || blockId.isEmpty()) {
            return false;
        }
        
        try {
            MinecraftClient client = MinecraftClient.getInstance();
            if (client == null) {
                return false;
            }
            
            BlockState blockState;
            
            // 浼樺厛浠庝笘鐣屼腑鑾峰彇瀹為檯鐨勬柟鍧楃姸鎬侊紙濡傛灉鏈変綅缃俊鎭級
            if (position != null && client.world != null) {
                BlockPos blockPos = new BlockPos(position.getX(), position.getY(), position.getZ());
                blockState = client.world.getBlockState(blockPos);
            } else {
                // 鍚﹀垯浠庢柟鍧桰D鑾峰彇榛樿鐘舵€?                Identifier identifier = Identifier.tryParse(blockId);
                if (identifier == null) {
                    return false;
                }
                
                Block block = Registries.BLOCK.get(identifier);
                if (block == Blocks.AIR) {
                    return false;
                }
                
                blockState = block.getDefaultState();
            }
            
            // 浣跨敤 Minecraft 鍐呯疆鐨勬柟娉曟鏌ユ槸鍚︽湁鏂瑰潡瀹炰綋
            return blockState.hasBlockEntity();
            
        } catch (Exception e) {
            NodeCraft.LOGGER.debug("鑺傜偣 {} 妫€鏌ユ柟鍧楀疄浣撳け璐? {}", getId(), e.getMessage());
            return false;
        }
    }
    


    // === 鑺傜偣鐢熷懡鍛ㄦ湡绠＄悊 ===
    
    /**
     * 鑺傜偣琚垹闄ゆ椂鐨勬竻鐞嗘柟娉?     * 搴旇鐢盢odeCraft妗嗘灦鍦ㄥ垹闄よ妭鐐规椂璋冪敤
     */
    public void onNodeRemoved() {
        // 娓呯悊閫夋嫨瑙嗚鍙嶉
        SelectionVisualFeedback.getInstance().clearFeedback(getId().toString());
        
        // 娓呯悊骞界伒鏂瑰潡棰勮
        hideGhostBlockPreview();
        
        // 濡傛灉褰撳墠鑺傜偣姝ｅ湪浜や簰妯″紡涓紝鍙栨秷鎷惧彇
        NodeEditorInteractionManager interactionManager = NodeEditorInteractionManager.getInstance();
        if (interactionManager.isCurrentInteractionNode(getId().toString())) {
            interactionManager.cancelBlockPick();
        }
        
        // 闃插尽鎬ф竻鐞嗭細纭繚娓呯悊鎺変换浣曞彲鑳藉洜涓洪€昏緫閿欒鑰屾畫鐣欑殑棰勮
        // 娉ㄦ剰锛氱悊璁轰笂 hideGhostBlockPreview() 宸茬粡澶勭悊浜嗘湰鑺傜偣鐨勫敮涓€棰勮锛?        // 浣嗚繖涓皟鐢ㄦ彁渚涢澶栫殑瀹夊叏淇濋殰锛岄槻姝㈤瑙堟畫鐣欏奖鍝嶇敤鎴蜂綋楠?        try {
            PreviewRenderer.getInstance().removeAllPreviewsByNodeId(getId().toString());
        } catch (Exception e) {
            // 鍗充娇娓呯悊澶辫触涔熶笉搴旇褰卞搷鑺傜偣鍒犻櫎杩囩▼
            NodeCraft.LOGGER.debug("鑺傜偣 {} 娓呯悊娈嬬暀棰勮鏃跺彂鐢熷紓甯革紙鍙拷鐣ワ級", getId(), e);
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * 鑺傜偣琚€変腑鏃惰皟鐢?     * 鍙互鐢ㄤ簬鏄剧ず棰勮
     */
    public void onNodeSelected() {
        // 楠岃瘉棰勮鐘舵€佷竴鑷存€?        validatePreviewState();
        
        // 缁熶竴璋冪敤棰勮鏇存柊鏂规硶锛岀‘淇濋€変腑鏃堕瑙堢姸鎬佹纭?        updateGhostBlockPreview();
    }
}
