package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.inputs.sources;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.IPort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;

import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * 鍒楄〃鍒涘缓鑺傜偣锛屽皢澶氫釜杈撳叆椤规墦鍖呮垚涓€涓狶ist
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "inputs.sources.create_list",
    displayName = "鍒涘缓鍒楄〃",
    description = "灏嗗涓緭鍏ラ」鎵撳寘鎴愪竴涓垪琛?,
    category = "inputs.sources"
)
public class CreateListNode extends BaseNode {
    
    // --- 鑺傜偣灞炴€?---
    private int inputCount = 3; // 榛樿杈撳叆绔彛鏁伴噺
    private boolean allowDifferentTypes = true; // 鏄惁鍏佽涓嶅悓绫诲瀷鐨勮緭鍏?
    
    // --- 杈撳叆/杈撳嚭绔彛ID ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_LIST_ID = "output_list";
    
    /**
     * 鏋勯€犱竴涓柊鐨勫垪琛ㄥ垱寤鸿妭鐐?
     */
    public CreateListNode() {
        // 浣跨敤鏂扮殑鍒嗙被鍛藉悕 - inputs.sources.create_list
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "inputs.sources.create_list");
        
        // 鍒涘缓鍔ㄦ€佽緭鍏ョ鍙?
        rebuildInputPorts();
        
        // 鍒涘缓杈撳嚭绔彛
        IPort listOutput = new BasePort(OUTPUT_LIST_ID, "List", 
                "The resulting list containing all input items", NodeDataType.LIST, this);
        addOutputPort(listOutput);
    }
    
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "Creates a list from multiple input items";
    }
    
    @Override
    public String getDisplayName() {
        return "Create List";
    }
    
    /**
     * 鏍规嵁褰撳墠璁剧疆鐨勮緭鍏ユ暟閲忓垱寤鸿緭鍏ョ鍙?
     */
    private void rebuildInputPorts() {
        // 娓呴櫎鎵€鏈夌幇鏈夌殑杈撳叆绔彛
        inputPorts.clear();
        
        // 鍒涘缓鏂扮殑杈撳叆绔彛
        for (int i = 0; i < inputCount; i++) {
            String portId = "input_" + i;
            IPort inputPort = new BasePort(portId, "Item " + (i + 1), 
                    "Item to add to the list", NodeDataType.ANY, this);
            addInputPort(inputPort);
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * 鑺傜偣鐨勮绠楅€昏緫
     * @param context 鎵ц涓婁笅鏂?
     */
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        List<Object> resultList = new ArrayList<>();
        
        // 鏀堕泦鎵€鏈夐潪绌鸿緭鍏?
        for (int i = 0; i < inputCount; i++) {
            String portId = "input_" + i;
            Object value = inputValues.get(portId);
            
            if (value != null) {
                resultList.add(value);
            }
        }
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_LIST_ID, resultList);
    }
    
    /**
     * 娣诲姞涓€涓緭鍏ョ鍙?
     */
    public void addInputPort() {
        inputCount++;
        rebuildInputPorts();
        markDirty();
    }
    
    /**
     * 绉婚櫎涓€涓緭鍏ョ鍙?
     * @return 鏄惁鎴愬姛绉婚櫎
     */
    public boolean removeInputPort() {
        if (inputCount > 1) {
            inputCount--;
            rebuildInputPorts();
            markDirty();
            return true;
        }
        return false;
    }
    
    // --- Getters/Setters for Properties ---
    
    public int getInputCount() {
        return inputCount;
    }
    
    public void setInputCount(int count) {
        if (count > 0 && count != inputCount) {
            inputCount = count;
            rebuildInputPorts();
            markDirty();
        }
    }
    
    public boolean isAllowDifferentTypes() {
        return allowDifferentTypes;
    }
    
    public void setAllowDifferentTypes(boolean allow) {
        this.allowDifferentTypes = allow;
        // 杩欎釜灞炴€т笉褰卞搷杈撳嚭锛屽彧褰卞搷杈撳叆楠岃瘉锛屾墍浠ヤ笉闇€瑕乵arkDirty()
    }
    
    // --- 鑺傜偣鐘舵€佸簭鍒楀寲 ---
    
    @Override
    public Object getNodeState() {
        java.util.Map<String, Object> state = new java.util.HashMap<>();
        state.put("inputCount", getInputCount());
        state.put("allowDifferentTypes", isAllowDifferentTypes());
        return state;
    }
    
    @Override
    public void setNodeState(Object state) {
        if (state instanceof java.util.Map) {
            java.util.Map<?, ?> stateMap = (java.util.Map<?, ?>) state;
            
            // 璇诲彇灞炴€?
            if (stateMap.containsKey("allowDifferentTypes")) {
                Object allowDiff = stateMap.get("allowDifferentTypes");
                if (allowDiff instanceof Boolean) {
                    setAllowDifferentTypes((Boolean) allowDiff);
                }
            }
            
            // 鏈€鍚庤缃緭鍏ョ鍙ｆ暟閲忥紝鍥犱负杩欎細瑙﹀彂绔彛閲嶅缓
            if (stateMap.containsKey("inputCount")) {
                Object count = stateMap.get("inputCount");
                if (count instanceof Integer) {
                    setInputCount((Integer) count);
                }
            }
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * 鏍囪鑺傜偣闇€瑕侀噸鏂拌绠?
     */
    public void markDirty() {
        // 鏈繛鎺ュ埌鍥炬墽琛岄€昏緫锛岄鐣欏疄鐜?
    }
}

package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.inputs.sources;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.IPort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;

import java.io.File;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import java.nio.file.Paths;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * 鏂囦欢璺緞鑺傜偣锛岀敤浜庤緭鍏ユ枃浠惰矾寰?
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "inputs.sources.file_path",
    displayName = "鏂囦欢璺緞",
    description = "鐢ㄤ簬杈撳叆鏂囦欢鎴栫洰褰曡矾寰?,
    category = "inputs.sources"
)
public class FilePathNode extends BaseNode {
    
    // --- 鑺傜偣灞炴€?---
    private String filePath = ""; // 鏂囦欢璺緞
    private boolean mustExist = false; // 鏂囦欢鏄惁蹇呴』瀛樺湪
    private String fileFilter = "*.*"; // 鏂囦欢杩囨护鍣?
    private boolean isDirectory = false; // 鏄惁涓虹洰褰?
    
    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛ID ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_PATH_ID = "output_path";
    private static final String OUTPUT_EXISTS_ID = "output_exists";
    private static final String OUTPUT_FILENAME_ID = "output_filename";
    private static final String OUTPUT_EXTENSION_ID = "output_extension";
    private static final String OUTPUT_DIRECTORY_ID = "output_directory";
    
    /**
     * 鏋勯€犱竴涓柊鐨勬枃浠惰矾寰勮妭鐐?
     */
    public FilePathNode() {
        // 浣跨敤鏂扮殑鍒嗙被鍛藉悕 - inputs.sources.file_path
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "inputs.sources.file_path");
        
        // 鍒涘缓杈撳嚭绔彛
        IPort pathOutput = new BasePort(OUTPUT_PATH_ID, "Path", 
                "The full file or directory path", NodeDataType.FILE_PATH, this);
        addOutputPort(pathOutput);
        
        IPort existsOutput = new BasePort(OUTPUT_EXISTS_ID, "Exists", 
                "Whether the file or directory exists", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this);
        addOutputPort(existsOutput);
        
        IPort filenameOutput = new BasePort(OUTPUT_FILENAME_ID, "Filename", 
                "The filename without extension", NodeDataType.STRING, this);
        addOutputPort(filenameOutput);
        
        IPort extensionOutput = new BasePort(OUTPUT_EXTENSION_ID, "Extension", 
                "The file extension", NodeDataType.STRING, this);
        addOutputPort(extensionOutput);
        
        IPort directoryOutput = new BasePort(OUTPUT_DIRECTORY_ID, "Directory", 
                "The directory containing the file", NodeDataType.STRING, this);
        addOutputPort(directoryOutput);
    }
    
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "Input a file or directory path";
    }
    
    @Override
    public String getDisplayName() {
        return "File Path";
    }
    
    /**
     * 鑺傜偣鐨勮绠楅€昏緫
     * @param context 鎵ц涓婁笅鏂?
     */
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 濡傛灉璺緞涓虹┖锛屽垯鎵€鏈夎緭鍑虹疆绌烘垨缃粯璁ゅ€?
        if (filePath == null || filePath.isEmpty()) {
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_PATH_ID, "");
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_EXISTS_ID, false);
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_FILENAME_ID, "");
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_EXTENSION_ID, "");
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_DIRECTORY_ID, "");
            return;
        }
        
        // 澶勭悊鏂囦欢璺緞
        File file = new File(filePath);
        boolean exists = file.exists();
        
        // 鑾峰彇鏂囦欢鍚嶅拰鎵╁睍鍚?
        String filename = "";
        String extension = "";
        String directory = "";
        
        try {
            Path path = Paths.get(filePath);
            Path fileName = path.getFileName();
            Path parent = path.getParent();
            
            if (fileName != null) {
                String fileNameStr = fileName.toString();
                int lastDotIndex = fileNameStr.lastIndexOf('.');
                
                if (lastDotIndex > 0) {
                    filename = fileNameStr.substring(0, lastDotIndex);
                    extension = fileNameStr.substring(lastDotIndex + 1);
                } else {
                    filename = fileNameStr;
                }
            }
            
            if (parent != null) {
                directory = parent.toString();
            }
        } catch (Exception e) {
            // 濡傛灉鍑虹幇寮傚父锛屼繚鎸侀粯璁ょ┖鍊?
        }
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_PATH_ID, filePath);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_EXISTS_ID, exists);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_FILENAME_ID, filename);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_EXTENSION_ID, extension);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_DIRECTORY_ID, directory);
    }
    
    /**
     * 鎵撳紑鏂囦欢閫夋嫨瀵硅瘽妗?
     * 娉ㄦ剰锛氬疄闄呭疄鐜板簲璇ョ敱UI灞傝礋璐ｈ皟鐢ㄦ鏂规硶
     * @return 鏄惁閫夋嫨浜嗘枃浠?
     */
    public boolean browseForFile() {
        // 杩欓噷浠呮槸涓€涓崰浣嶇鏂规硶
        // 瀹為檯鐨勬枃浠舵祻瑙堝姛鑳藉簲璇ョ敱UI灞傚疄鐜?
        // 骞跺湪閫夋嫨鏂囦欢鍚庤皟鐢╯etFilePath鏂规硶
        return false;
    }
    
    /**
     * 璁剧疆鏂囦欢璺緞
     * @param path 鏂囦欢璺緞
     */
    public void setFilePath(String path) {
        if (path == null) {
            path = "";
        }
        
        if (!this.filePath.equals(path)) {
            this.filePath = path;
            markDirty();
        }
    }
    
    // --- Getters/Setters for Properties ---
    
    public String getFilePath() {
        return filePath;
    }
    
    public boolean isMustExist() {
        return mustExist;
    }
    
    public void setMustExist(boolean mustExist) {
        this.mustExist = mustExist;
    }
    
    public String getFileFilter() {
        return fileFilter;
    }
    
    public void setFileFilter(String fileFilter) {
        if (fileFilter == null || fileFilter.isEmpty()) {
            fileFilter = "*.*";
        }
        this.fileFilter = fileFilter;
    }
    
    public boolean isDirectory() {
        return isDirectory;
    }
    
    public void setDirectory(boolean directory) {
        this.isDirectory = directory;
    }
    
    /**
     * 妫€鏌ユ枃浠舵槸鍚﹀瓨鍦?
     * @return 鏂囦欢鏄惁瀛樺湪
     */
    public boolean fileExists() {
        if (filePath == null || filePath.isEmpty()) {
            return false;
        }
        return new File(filePath).exists();
    }
    
    // --- 鑺傜偣鐘舵€佸簭鍒楀寲 ---
    
    @Override
    public Object getNodeState() {
        java.util.Map<String, Object> state = new java.util.HashMap<>();
        state.put("filePath", getFilePath());
        state.put("mustExist", isMustExist());
        state.put("fileFilter", getFileFilter());
        state.put("isDirectory", isDirectory());
        return state;
    }
    
    @Override
    public void setNodeState(Object state) {
        if (state instanceof java.util.Map) {
            java.util.Map<?, ?> stateMap = (java.util.Map<?, ?>) state;
            
            if (stateMap.containsKey("mustExist")) {
                Object must = stateMap.get("mustExist");
                if (must instanceof Boolean) {
                    setMustExist((Boolean) must);
                }
            }
            
            if (stateMap.containsKey("fileFilter")) {
                Object filter = stateMap.get("fileFilter");
                if (filter instanceof String) {
                    setFileFilter((String) filter);
                }
            }
            
            if (stateMap.containsKey("isDirectory")) {
                Object dir = stateMap.get("isDirectory");
                if (dir instanceof Boolean) {
                    setDirectory((Boolean) dir);
                }
            }
            
            // 鏈€鍚庤缃枃浠惰矾寰勶紝鍥犱负杩欎細瑙﹀彂markDirty
            if (stateMap.containsKey("filePath")) {
                Object path = stateMap.get("filePath");
                if (path instanceof String) {
                    setFilePath((String) path);
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.inputs.sources;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.IPort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;

import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.Arrays;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * 鏂囨湰闈㈡澘鑺傜偣锛岀敤浜庢墜鍔ㄨ緭鍏ユ枃鏈垪琛ㄦ垨鏄剧ず鏁版嵁
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "inputs.sources.text_panel",
    displayName = "鏂囨湰闈㈡澘",
    description = "鐢ㄤ簬鎵嬪姩杈撳叆鏂囨湰鍒楄〃鎴栨樉绀烘暟鎹?,
    category = "inputs.sources"
)
public class TextPanelNode extends BaseNode {
    
    // --- 鑺傜偣灞炴€?---
    private String text = ""; // 鏂囨湰鍐呭
    private boolean isMultiline = true; // 鏄惁涓哄琛屾枃鏈?
    private boolean splitLines = true; // 鏄惁灏嗘枃鏈垎鍓蹭负鍒楄〃
    private boolean readOnly = false; // 鏄惁涓哄彧璇绘ā寮?
    private String delimiter = "\n"; // 鍒嗛殧绗?
    
    // --- 杈撳叆/杈撳嚭绔彛ID ---
    private static final String INPUT_TEXT_ID = "input_text";
    private static final String OUTPUT_TEXT_ID = "output_text";
    private static final String OUTPUT_LINES_ID = "output_lines";
    private static final String OUTPUT_LINE_COUNT_ID = "output_line_count";
    
    /**
     * 鏋勯€犱竴涓柊鐨勬枃鏈潰鏉胯妭鐐?
     */
    public TextPanelNode() {
        // 浣跨敤鏂扮殑鍒嗙被鍛藉悕 - inputs.sources.text_panel
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "inputs.sources.text_panel");
        
        // 鍒涘缓杈撳叆绔彛
        IPort textInput = new BasePort(INPUT_TEXT_ID, "Text Input", 
                "Optional text input to display", NodeDataType.STRING, this);
        addInputPort(textInput);
        
        // 鍒涘缓杈撳嚭绔彛
        IPort textOutput = new BasePort(OUTPUT_TEXT_ID, "Text", 
                "The text content as a single string", NodeDataType.STRING, this);
        addOutputPort(textOutput);
        
        IPort linesOutput = new BasePort(OUTPUT_LINES_ID, "Lines", 
                "The text content as a list of strings (lines)", NodeDataType.LIST, this);
        addOutputPort(linesOutput);
        
        IPort lineCountOutput = new BasePort(OUTPUT_LINE_COUNT_ID, "Line Count", 
                "The number of lines in the text", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this);
        addOutputPort(lineCountOutput);
    }
    
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "For manually entering text or displaying data";
    }
    
    @Override
    public String getDisplayName() {
        return "Text Panel";
    }
    
    /**
     * 鑺傜偣鐨勮绠楅€昏緫
     * @param context 鎵ц涓婁笅鏂?
     */
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 濡傛灉鏈夎緭鍏ヨ繛鎺ワ紝鍒欎紭鍏堜娇鐢ㄨ緭鍏ュ€?
        String textValue = text;
        Object inputText = inputValues.get(INPUT_TEXT_ID);
        if (inputText != null) {
            textValue = inputText.toString();
        }
        
        // 璁＄畻琛屾暟鍜岃鍒楄〃
        List<String> lines;
        if (splitLines) {
            lines = new ArrayList<>(Arrays.asList(textValue.split(delimiter)));
        } else {
            lines = new ArrayList<>();
            if (!textValue.isEmpty()) {
                lines.add(textValue);
            }
        }
        
        int lineCount = lines.size();
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_TEXT_ID, textValue);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_LINES_ID, lines);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_LINE_COUNT_ID, lineCount);
    }
    
    /**
     * 璁剧疆鏂囨湰鍐呭
     * @param text 鏂囨湰鍐呭
     */
    public void setText(String text) {
        if (text == null) {
            text = "";
        }
        
        if (!this.text.equals(text)) {
            this.text = text;
            markDirty();
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * 娣诲姞鏂囨湰
     * @param additionalText 瑕佹坊鍔犵殑鏂囨湰
     */
    public void appendText(String additionalText) {
        if (additionalText != null && !additionalText.isEmpty()) {
            setText(this.text + additionalText);
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * 娓呴櫎鏂囨湰
     */
    public void clearText() {
        setText("");
    }
    
    // --- Getters/Setters for Properties ---
    
    public String getText() {
        return text;
    }
    
    public boolean isMultiline() {
        return isMultiline;
    }
    
    public void setMultiline(boolean multiline) {
        this.isMultiline = multiline;
    }
    
    public boolean isSplitLines() {
        return splitLines;
    }
    
    public void setSplitLines(boolean splitLines) {
        if (this.splitLines != splitLines) {
            this.splitLines = splitLines;
            markDirty();
        }
    }
    
    public boolean isReadOnly() {
        return readOnly;
    }
    
    public void setReadOnly(boolean readOnly) {
        this.readOnly = readOnly;
    }
    
    public String getDelimiter() {
        return delimiter;
    }
    
    public void setDelimiter(String delimiter) {
        if (delimiter == null || delimiter.isEmpty()) {
            delimiter = "\n";
        }
        
        if (!this.delimiter.equals(delimiter)) {
            this.delimiter = delimiter;
            markDirty();
        }
    }
    
    // --- 鑺傜偣鐘舵€佸簭鍒楀寲 ---
    
    @Override
    public Object getNodeState() {
        java.util.Map<String, Object> state = new java.util.HashMap<>();
        state.put("text", getText());
        state.put("isMultiline", isMultiline());
        state.put("splitLines", isSplitLines());
        state.put("readOnly", isReadOnly());
        state.put("delimiter", getDelimiter());
        return state;
    }
    
    @Override
    public void setNodeState(Object state) {
        if (state instanceof java.util.Map) {
            java.util.Map<?, ?> stateMap = (java.util.Map<?, ?>) state;
            
            if (stateMap.containsKey("isMultiline")) {
                Object multiline = stateMap.get("isMultiline");
                if (multiline instanceof Boolean) {
                    setMultiline((Boolean) multiline);
                }
            }
            
            if (stateMap.containsKey("splitLines")) {
                Object split = stateMap.get("splitLines");
                if (split instanceof Boolean) {
                    setSplitLines((Boolean) split);
                }
            }
            
            if (stateMap.containsKey("readOnly")) {
                Object ro = stateMap.get("readOnly");
                if (ro instanceof Boolean) {
                    setReadOnly((Boolean) ro);
                }
            }
            
            if (stateMap.containsKey("delimiter")) {
                Object delim = stateMap.get("delimiter");
                if (delim instanceof String) {
                    setDelimiter((String) delim);
                }
            }
            
            // 鏈€鍚庤缃枃鏈紝鍥犱负杩欎細瑙﹀彂markDirty
            if (stateMap.containsKey("text")) {
                Object txt = stateMap.get("text");
                if (txt instanceof String) {
                    setText((String) txt);
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.math.basic;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Absolute Node: Computes the absolute value of a number (|A|).
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "math.basic.absolute",
    displayName = "缁濆鍊?(Abs)",
    description = "璁＄畻杈撳叆鏁板瓧鐨勭粷瀵瑰€?|Value|",
    category = "math.basic"
)
public class AbsoluteNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_VALUE_ID = "input_value";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_ABSOLUTE_ID = "output_absolute";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public AbsoluteNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "math.basic.absolute");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_VALUE_ID, "Value", "Input number", NodeDataType.ANY, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?(杈撳嚭绫诲瀷涓庤緭鍏ュ尮閰嶆垨鎻愬崌涓?DOUBLE)
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_ABSOLUTE_ID, "Absolute", "Result |Value|", NodeDataType.DOUBLE, this));
    }
    
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "Outputs the absolute value of the input number.";
    }
    
    @Override
    public String getDisplayName() {
        return "Absolute (Abs)";
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object val = inputValues.get(INPUT_VALUE_ID);

        // 妫€鏌ヨ緭鍏ユ槸鍚︿负鏁板瓧
        if (val instanceof Number) {
            double number = ((Number) val).doubleValue();
            double result = Math.abs(number);
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_ABSOLUTE_ID, result);
        } else {
            // 濡傛灉杈撳叆鏃犳晥
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_ABSOLUTE_ID, Double.NaN);
        }
    }

    // --- Getters/Setters (涓嶉渶瑕? ---

    // --- (鍙?搴忓垪鍖?(涓嶉渶瑕? ---
}

package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.math.basic;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import java.util.UUID;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.INode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;

/**
 * Addition Node: Adds two numbers (A + B).
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "math.basic.addition",
    displayName = "Addition (+)",
    description = "涓や釜鏁扮殑鍔犳硶杩愮畻",
    category = "math.basic"
)
public class AdditionNode extends BaseNode implements INode {

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_A_ID = "input_a";
    private static final String INPUT_B_ID = "input_b";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_SUM_ID = "output_sum";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public AdditionNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "math.basic.addition");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?(鍏佽 ANY 鏁板瓧绫诲瀷)
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_A_ID, "A", "First number", NodeDataType.ANY, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_B_ID, "B", "Second number", NodeDataType.ANY, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?(缁撴灉閫氬父涓?DOUBLE)
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_SUM_ID, "Sum", "Result of A + B", NodeDataType.DOUBLE, this));
    }
    
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "Outputs the sum of A and B.";
    }
    
    @Override
    public String getDisplayName() {
        return "Addition (+)";
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object valA = inputValues.get(INPUT_A_ID);
        Object valB = inputValues.get(INPUT_B_ID);

        // 妫€鏌ヨ緭鍏ユ槸鍚︿负鏁板瓧
        if (valA instanceof Number && valB instanceof Number) {
            // 灏嗚緭鍏ヨ浆鎹负 double 杩涜璁＄畻
            double a = ((Number) valA).doubleValue();
            double b = ((Number) valB).doubleValue();
            double sum = a + b;
            
            // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_SUM_ID, sum);
        } else {
            // 濡傛灉杈撳叆鏃犳晥锛屽彲浠ヨ缃粯璁ゅ€笺€侀敊璇姸鎬佹垨 null
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_SUM_ID, 0.0); // 鎴栬€?null
        }
    }

    // --- Getters/Setters (涓嶉渶瑕? ---

    // --- (鍙?搴忓垪鍖?(涓嶉渶瑕? ---
}

/**
 * Ceiling Node: 瀵规暟鍊艰繘琛屽悜涓婂彇鏁达紙鍙栦笉灏忎簬x鐨勬渶灏忔暣鏁帮級
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "math.basic.ceiling",
    displayName = "鍚戜笂鍙栨暣 (Ceiling)",
    description = "瀵规暟鍊艰繘琛屽悜涓婂彇鏁达紙鍙栦笉灏忎簬x鐨勬渶灏忔暣鏁帮級",

public class CeilingNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public CeilingNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "math.basic.ceiling");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_VALUE_ID, "Value", "Value to ceiling", NodeDataType.DOUBLE, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_CEILING_ID, "Ceiling", "The ceiling value", NodeDataType.DOUBLE, this));
    }
    
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "Rounds a value up to the nearest integer";
    }
    
    @Override
    public String getDisplayName() {
        return "Ceiling";
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆
        Object valueObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_VALUE_ID);
        
        // 榛樿鍊?
        double value = 0.0;
        
        // 瑙ｆ瀽杈撳叆
        if (valueObj instanceof Number) {
            value = ((Number) valueObj).doubleValue();
        }
        
        // 鍚戜笂鍙栨暣
        double result = Math.ceil(value);
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_CEILING_ID, result);
    }

    // --- Getters/Setters (涓嶉渶瑕? ---

===FILE: C:\Users\navib\Desktop\development\NC\nodecraft\src\main\java\com\nodecraft\nodesystem\nodes\math\basic\ClampNode.java===
package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.math.basic;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import java.util.UUID;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;

/**
 * Clamp Node: 灏嗘暟鍊奸檺鍒跺湪鎸囧畾鐨勬渶灏忓€煎拰鏈€澶у€间箣闂?
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "math.basic.clamp",
    displayName = "闄愬埗鍊?,
    description = "灏嗘暟鍊奸檺鍒跺湪鎸囧畾鐨勬渶灏忓€煎拰鏈€澶у€间箣闂?,
    category = "math.basic"
)
public class ClampNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 鑺傜偣灞炴€?---
    private double defaultMin = 0.0;
    private double defaultMax = 1.0;

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_VALUE_ID = "input_value";
    private static final String INPUT_MIN_ID = "input_min";
    private static final String INPUT_MAX_ID = "input_max";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_RESULT_ID = "output_result";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public ClampNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "math.basic.clamp");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_VALUE_ID, "Value", "Value to clamp", NodeDataType.DOUBLE, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_MIN_ID, "Min", "Minimum allowed value", NodeDataType.DOUBLE, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_MAX_ID, "Max", "Maximum allowed value", NodeDataType.DOUBLE, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_RESULT_ID, "Result", "The clamped value", NodeDataType.DOUBLE, this));
    }
    
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "Restricts a value to specified minimum and maximum values";
    }
    
    @Override
    public String getDisplayName() {
        return "Clamp";
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆
        Object valueObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_VALUE_ID);
        Object minObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_MIN_ID);
        Object maxObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_MAX_ID);
        
        // 榛樿鍊?
        double value = 0.0;
        double min = defaultMin;
        double max = defaultMax;
        
        // 瑙ｆ瀽杈撳叆
        if (valueObj instanceof Number) {
            value = ((Number) valueObj).doubleValue();
        }
        
        if (minObj instanceof Number) {
            min = ((Number) minObj).doubleValue();
        }
        
        if (maxObj instanceof Number) {
            max = ((Number) maxObj).doubleValue();
        }
        
        // 纭繚鏈€灏忓€间笉澶т簬鏈€澶у€?
        if (min > max) {
            double temp = min;
            min = max;
            max = temp;
        }
        
        // 灏嗗€奸檺鍒跺湪 min 鍜?max 涔嬮棿
        double result = Math.max(min, Math.min(max, value));
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_RESULT_ID, result);
    }
    
    // --- Getters/Setters for Properties ---
    
    public double getDefaultMin() {
        return defaultMin;
    }
    
    public void setDefaultMin(double min) {
        this.defaultMin = min;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    public double getDefaultMax() {
        return defaultMax;
    }
    
    public void setDefaultMax(double max) {
        this.defaultMax = max;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    // --- 鑺傜偣鐘舵€佸簭鍒楀寲 ---
    
    @Override
    public Object getNodeState() {
        java.util.Map<String, Object> state = new java.util.HashMap<>();
        state.put("defaultMin", getDefaultMin());
        state.put("defaultMax", getDefaultMax());
        return state;
    }
    
    @Override
    public void setNodeState(Object state) {
        if (state instanceof java.util.Map) {
            java.util.Map<?, ?> stateMap = (java.util.Map<?, ?>) state;
            
            if (stateMap.containsKey("defaultMin")) {
                Object minObj = stateMap.get("defaultMin");
                if (minObj instanceof Number) {
                    setDefaultMin(((Number) minObj).doubleValue());
                }
            }
            
            if (stateMap.containsKey("defaultMax")) {
                Object maxObj = stateMap.get("defaultMax");
                if (maxObj instanceof Number) {
                    setDefaultMax(((Number) maxObj).doubleValue());
                }
            }
        }
    }
} 
===FILE: C:\Users\navib\Desktop\development\NC\nodecraft\src\main\java\com\nodecraft\nodesystem\nodes\math\basic\DivisionNode.java===
package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.math.basic;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Division Node: Divides A by B (A / B).
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "math.basic.division",
    displayName = "闄ゆ硶 (/)",
    description = "鎵ц闄ゆ硶杩愮畻锛岃绠桝 / B鐨勭粨鏋?,
    category = "math.basic"
)
public class DivisionNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_A_ID = "input_a"; // Dividend
    private static final String INPUT_B_ID = "input_b"; // Divisor

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_QUOTIENT_ID = "output_quotient";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public DivisionNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "math.basic.division");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_A_ID, "A", "Dividend", NodeDataType.ANY, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_B_ID, "B", "Divisor", NodeDataType.ANY, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_QUOTIENT_ID, "Quotient", "Result of A / B", NodeDataType.DOUBLE, this));
    }
    
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "Outputs the result of A / B.";
    }
    
    @Override
    public String getDisplayName() {
        return "Division (/)";
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object valA = inputValues.get(INPUT_A_ID);
        Object valB = inputValues.get(INPUT_B_ID);

        // 妫€鏌ヨ緭鍏ユ槸鍚︿负鏁板瓧
        if (valA instanceof Number && valB instanceof Number) {
            double a = ((Number) valA).doubleValue();
            double b = ((Number) valB).doubleValue();

            // 妫€鏌ラ櫎闆?
            if (Math.abs(b) < 1e-10) { // 浣跨敤涓€涓皬鐨勯槇鍊兼瘮杈冩诞鐐规暟鏄惁鎺ヨ繎闆?
                // 闄ら浂閿欒澶勭悊锛氬彲浠ヨ緭鍑?NaN, Infinity, 0, 鎴?null
                outputValues.put(OUTPUT_QUOTIENT_ID, Double.NaN); // 杈撳嚭 NaN 琛ㄧず鏃犳晥缁撴灉
            } else {
                double quotient = a / b;
                outputValues.put(OUTPUT_QUOTIENT_ID, quotient);
            }
        } else {
            // 濡傛灉杈撳叆鏃犳晥
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_QUOTIENT_ID, Double.NaN); // 杈撳嚭 NaN
        }
    }

    // --- Getters/Setters (涓嶉渶瑕? ---

    // --- (鍙?搴忓垪鍖?(涓嶉渶瑕? ---
}

package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.math.basic;

/**
 * Floor Node: 瀵规暟鍊艰繘琛屽悜涓嬪彇鏁达紙鍙栦笉澶т簬x鐨勬渶澶ф暣鏁帮級

@NodeInfo(
    id = "math.basic.floor",
    displayName = "鍚戜笅鍙栨暣 (Floor)",
    description = "瀵规暟鍊艰繘琛屽悜涓嬪彇鏁达紙鍙栦笉澶т簬x鐨勬渶澶ф暣鏁帮級",

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_VALUE_ID = "input_value";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_VALUE_ID, "Value", "Value to floor", NodeDataType.DOUBLE, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_FLOORED_ID, "Floored", "The floored value", NodeDataType.DOUBLE, this));
    }
    
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "Rounds a value down to the nearest integer";
    }
    
    @Override
    public String getDisplayName() {
        return "Floor";
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    @Override

    // --- (鍙?搴忓垪鍖?(涓嶉渶瑕? ---

===FILE: C:\Users\navib\Desktop\development\NC\nodecraft\src\main\java\com\nodecraft\nodesystem\nodes\math\basic\LogarithmNode.java===
package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.math.basic;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Logarithm Node: Computes the logarithm of A with base B (logB(A)).
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "math.basic.logarithm",
    displayName = "瀵规暟鍑芥暟 (Log)",
    description = "璁＄畻浠ユ寚瀹氬簳鏁扮殑瀵规暟鍊?logB(A)",
    category = "math.basic"
)
public class LogarithmNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_NUMBER_ID = "input_number"; // A
    private static final String INPUT_BASE_ID = "input_base";     // B

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_LOGARITHM_ID = "output_logarithm";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public LogarithmNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "math.basic.logarithm");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_NUMBER_ID, "Number", "The number (A)", NodeDataType.ANY, this));
        // 榛樿搴曟暟涓?e (鑷劧瀵规暟)
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_BASE_ID, "Base", "The base (B), defaults to e", NodeDataType.ANY, this)); 

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_LOGARITHM_ID, "Logarithm", "Result of logB(A)", NodeDataType.DOUBLE, this));
    }
    
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "Outputs the logarithm of Number with the specified Base.";
    }
    
    @Override
    public String getDisplayName() {
        return "Logarithm (log)";
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object valNumber = inputValues.get(INPUT_NUMBER_ID);
        Object valBase = inputValues.getOrDefault(INPUT_BASE_ID, Math.E); // Default base is e

        // 妫€鏌ヨ緭鍏ユ槸鍚︿负鏁板瓧
        if (valNumber instanceof Number && valBase instanceof Number) {
            double number = ((Number) valNumber).doubleValue();
            double base = ((Number) valBase).doubleValue();

            // 妫€鏌ユ棤鏁堣緭鍏?
            // number > 0, base > 0, base != 1
            if (number <= 0 || base <= 0 || Math.abs(base - 1.0) < 1e-10) {
                outputValues.put(OUTPUT_LOGARITHM_ID, Double.NaN);
            } else {
                // 浣跨敤鎹㈠簳鍏紡: logB(A) = ln(A) / ln(B)
                double result = Math.log(number) / Math.log(base);
                outputValues.put(OUTPUT_LOGARITHM_ID, result);
            }
        } else {
            // 濡傛灉杈撳叆鏃犳晥
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_LOGARITHM_ID, Double.NaN);
        }
    }

    // --- Getters/Setters (涓嶉渶瑕? ---

    // --- (鍙?搴忓垪鍖?(涓嶉渶瑕? ---
} 
===FILE: C:\Users\navib\Desktop\development\NC\nodecraft\src\main\java\com\nodecraft\nodesystem\nodes\math\basic\MathRangeNode.java===
package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.math.basic;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.Collections;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Range Node: Generates a sequence of numbers within a domain [Start, End] using a Step value.
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "math.basic.range",
    displayName = "鏁板€艰寖鍥?,
    description = "鍦ㄦ寚瀹氳寖鍥村唴鐢熸垚鏁板瓧搴忓垪",
    category = "math.basic"
)
public class MathRangeNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_START_ID = "input_start";
    private static final String INPUT_END_ID = "input_end";
    private static final String INPUT_STEP_ID = "input_step";
    private String description; // 瀛樺偍鑺傜偣鎻忚堪

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_NUMBERS_ID = "output_numbers";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public MathRangeNode() {
        // 璋冪敤鐖剁被鏋勯€犲嚱鏁帮紝浣跨敤UUID.randomUUID()鐢熸垚鏂扮殑ID
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "math.basic.range");
        
        // 璁剧疆鑺傜偣鎻忚堪
        this.description = "Generates a sequence of numbers from Start to End with Step.";
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?(榛樿 Start=0, End=10, Step=1)
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_START_ID, "Start", "The starting number of the range", NodeDataType.ANY, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_END_ID, "End", "The ending number of the range", NodeDataType.ANY, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_STEP_ID, "Step", "The step size between numbers", NodeDataType.ANY, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_NUMBERS_ID, "Numbers", "The generated list of numbers", NodeDataType.ANY, this)); // Output: List<Double>
    }
    
    /**
     * 瀹炵幇INode鎺ュ彛鐨刧etDescription鏂规硶
     * @return 鑺傜偣鎻忚堪
     */
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return this.description;
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊硷紝鎻愪緵榛樿鍊?
        double start = getValueAsDouble(inputValues.get(INPUT_START_ID), 0.0);
        double end = getValueAsDouble(inputValues.get(INPUT_END_ID), 10.0);
        double step = getValueAsDouble(inputValues.get(INPUT_STEP_ID), 1.0);

        List<Double> numbers = new ArrayList<>();
        
        // 妫€鏌ユ棤鏁堢殑 step 鍊间互闃叉鏃犻檺寰幆
        if (Math.abs(step) < 1e-10) {
             // Step is too close to zero. Return empty list or just the start value?
             // Let's return just the start value if start <= end (or start >= end if step was negative initially).
             if (start <= end) { // Assuming default positive direction
                 numbers.add(start);
             }
             outputValues.put(OUTPUT_NUMBERS_ID, numbers);
             return;
        }

        // 鏍规嵁 step 鐨勭鍙风‘瀹氬惊鐜柟鍚?
        if (step > 0) {
            if (start <= end) {
                 // 浣跨敤娴偣鏁版瘮杈冩椂澧炲姞涓€鐐瑰宸紝閬垮厤绮惧害闂瀵艰嚧鏈€鍚庝竴涓暟涓㈠け
                for (double current = start; current <= end + step * 0.001; current += step) {
                    numbers.add(current);
                }
            } // else: start > end with positive step, result is empty list
        } else { // step < 0
            if (start >= end) {
                 // 浣跨敤娴偣鏁版瘮杈冩椂澧炲姞涓€鐐瑰宸?
                for (double current = start; current >= end + step * 0.001; current += step) {
                    numbers.add(current);
                }
            } // else: start < end with negative step, result is empty list
        }
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?(杈撳嚭涓嶅彲鍙樺垪琛ㄦ垨鍓湰)
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_NUMBERS_ID, Collections.unmodifiableList(numbers));
    }
    
    /**
     * Helper method to safely convert an input object to double.
     */
    private double getValueAsDouble(Object value, double defaultValue) {
        if (value instanceof Number) {
            return ((Number) value).doubleValue();
        }
        return defaultValue;
    }

    // --- Getters/Setters (涓嶉渶瑕? ---

    // --- (鍙?搴忓垪鍖?(涓嶉渶瑕? ---
} 
===FILE: C:\Users\navib\Desktop\development\NC\nodecraft\src\main\java\com\nodecraft\nodesystem\nodes\math\basic\MathSeriesNode.java===
package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.math.basic;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.Collections;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Series Node: Generates an arithmetic series (Start, Start + Step, Start + 2*Step, ...).
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "math.basic.series",
    displayName = "鏁板搴忓垪",
    description = "鐢熸垚绛夊樊鏁板垪锛堣捣濮嬪€硷紝璧峰鍊?姝ラ暱锛岃捣濮嬪€?2*姝ラ暱锛?..锛?,
    category = "math.basic"
)
public class MathSeriesNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_START_ID = "input_start";
    private static final String INPUT_STEP_ID = "input_step";
    private static final String INPUT_COUNT_ID = "input_count";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_SERIES_ID = "output_series";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public MathSeriesNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "math.basic.series");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?(榛樿 Start=0, Step=1, Count=10)
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_START_ID, "Start", "The first number in the series", NodeDataType.ANY, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_STEP_ID, "Step", "The increment between numbers", NodeDataType.ANY, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_COUNT_ID, "Count", "The total number of items in the series", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_SERIES_ID, "Series", "The generated list of numbers", NodeDataType.ANY, this)); // Output: List<Double>
    }
    
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "Generates an arithmetic series with Start, Step, and Count.";
    }
    
    @Override
    public String getDisplayName() {
        return "Series";
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        double start = getValueAsDouble(inputValues.get(INPUT_START_ID), 0.0);
        double step = getValueAsDouble(inputValues.get(INPUT_STEP_ID), 1.0);
        int count = getValueAsInt(inputValues.get(INPUT_COUNT_ID), 10);

        List<Double> series = new ArrayList<>();

        // 妫€鏌?count 鏄惁鏈夋晥
        if (count <= 0) {
             outputValues.put(OUTPUT_SERIES_ID, Collections.emptyList());
             return;
        }
        
        double current = start;
        for (int i = 0; i < count; i++) {
            series.add(current);
            current += step;
        }
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_SERIES_ID, Collections.unmodifiableList(series));
    }
    
    /** Helper method to safely convert an input object to double. */
    private double getValueAsDouble(Object value, double defaultValue) {
        if (value instanceof Number) {
            return ((Number) value).doubleValue();
        }
        return defaultValue;
    }
    
    /** Helper method to safely convert an input object to int. */
    private int getValueAsInt(Object value, int defaultValue) {
        if (value instanceof Number) {
            // Round double/float inputs, clamp to int range if necessary
            double doubleVal = ((Number) value).doubleValue();
            if (doubleVal >= Integer.MIN_VALUE && doubleVal <= Integer.MAX_VALUE) {
                 return (int) Math.round(doubleVal);
            }
        }
        // Handle potential NumberFormatException if value is String?
        // For now, only handle Number types.
        return defaultValue;
    }

    // --- Getters/Setters (涓嶉渶瑕? ---

    // --- (鍙?搴忓垪鍖?(涓嶉渶瑕? ---
}

package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.math.basic;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;

/**
 * Max Node: 璁＄畻涓や釜鏁板€间腑鐨勬渶澶у€?
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "math.basic.max",
    displayName = "鏈€澶у€?(Max)",
    description = "璁＄畻涓や釜鏁板€间腑鐨勬渶澶у€?,
    category = "math.basic"
)
public class MaxNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_A_ID = "input_a";
    private static final String INPUT_B_ID = "input_b";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_MAX_ID = "output_max";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public MaxNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "math.basic.max");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_A_ID, "A", "First value", NodeDataType.DOUBLE, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_B_ID, "B", "Second value", NodeDataType.DOUBLE, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_MAX_ID, "Max", "The maximum value", NodeDataType.DOUBLE, this));
    }
    
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "Outputs the maximum of two values";
    }
    
    @Override
    public String getDisplayName() {
        return "Max";
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆
        Object aObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_A_ID);
        Object bObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_B_ID);
        
        // 榛樿鍊?
        double a = 0.0;
        double b = 0.0;
        
        // 瑙ｆ瀽杈撳叆
        if (aObj instanceof Number) {
            a = ((Number) aObj).doubleValue();
        }
        
        if (bObj instanceof Number) {
            b = ((Number) bObj).doubleValue();
        }
        
        // 璁＄畻鏈€澶у€?
        double max = Math.max(a, b);
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_MAX_ID, max);
    }
}

package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.math.basic;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Modulus Node: Computes the remainder of A divided by B (A % B).
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "math.basic.modulus",
    displayName = "鍙栨ā杩愮畻 (%)",
    description = "璁＄畻A闄や互B鐨勪綑鏁?(A % B)",
    category = "math.basic"
)
public class ModulusNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_A_ID = "input_a"; // Dividend
    private static final String INPUT_B_ID = "input_b"; // Divisor

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_REMAINDER_ID = "output_remainder";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public ModulusNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "math.basic.modulus");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_A_ID, "A", "Dividend", NodeDataType.ANY, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_B_ID, "B", "Divisor", NodeDataType.ANY, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_REMAINDER_ID, "Remainder", "Result of A % B", NodeDataType.DOUBLE, this));
    }
    
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "Outputs the remainder of A / B.";
    }
    
    @Override
    public String getDisplayName() {
        return "Modulus (%)";
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object valA = inputValues.get(INPUT_A_ID);
        Object valB = inputValues.get(INPUT_B_ID);

        // 妫€鏌ヨ緭鍏ユ槸鍚︿负鏁板瓧
        if (valA instanceof Number && valB instanceof Number) {
            double a = ((Number) valA).doubleValue();
            double b = ((Number) valB).doubleValue();

            // 妫€鏌ラ櫎闆?
            if (Math.abs(b) < 1e-10) {
                // 闄ら浂閿欒澶勭悊
                outputValues.put(OUTPUT_REMAINDER_ID, Double.NaN);
            } else {
                double remainder = a % b;
                outputValues.put(OUTPUT_REMAINDER_ID, remainder);
            }
        } else {
            // 濡傛灉杈撳叆鏃犳晥
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_REMAINDER_ID, Double.NaN);
        }
    }

    // --- Getters/Setters (涓嶉渶瑕? ---

    // --- (鍙?搴忓垪鍖?(涓嶉渶瑕? ---
} 
===FILE: C:\Users\navib\Desktop\development\NC\nodecraft\src\main\java\com\nodecraft\nodesystem\nodes\math\basic\MultiplicationNode.java===
package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.math.basic;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Multiplication Node: Multiplies two numbers (A * B).
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "math.basic.multiplication",
    displayName = "涔樻硶 (*)",
    description = "鎵ц涔樻硶杩愮畻锛岃绠桝 * B鐨勭粨鏋?,
    category = "math.basic"
)
public class MultiplicationNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_A_ID = "input_a";
    private static final String INPUT_B_ID = "input_b";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_PRODUCT_ID = "output_product";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public MultiplicationNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "math.basic.multiplication");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_A_ID, "A", "Factor A", NodeDataType.ANY, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_B_ID, "B", "Factor B", NodeDataType.ANY, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_PRODUCT_ID, "Product", "Result of A * B", NodeDataType.DOUBLE, this));
    }
    
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "Outputs the product of A and B.";
    }
    
    @Override
    public String getDisplayName() {
        return "Multiplication (*)";
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object valA = inputValues.get(INPUT_A_ID);
        Object valB = inputValues.get(INPUT_B_ID);

        // 妫€鏌ヨ緭鍏ユ槸鍚︿负鏁板瓧
        if (valA instanceof Number && valB instanceof Number) {
            // 灏嗚緭鍏ヨ浆鎹负 double 杩涜璁＄畻
            double a = ((Number) valA).doubleValue();
            double b = ((Number) valB).doubleValue();
            double product = a * b;
            
            // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_PRODUCT_ID, product);
        } else {
            // 濡傛灉杈撳叆鏃犳晥
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_PRODUCT_ID, 0.0); // 鎴栬€?null
        }
    }

    // --- Getters/Setters (涓嶉渶瑕? ---

    // --- (鍙?搴忓垪鍖?(涓嶉渶瑕? ---
} 
===FILE: C:\Users\navib\Desktop\development\NC\nodecraft\src\main\java\com\nodecraft\nodesystem\nodes\math\basic\PowerNode.java===
package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.math.basic;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Power Node: Computes A raised to the power of B (A ^ B).
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "math.basic.power",
    displayName = "骞傝繍绠?(^)",
    description = "璁＄畻搴曟暟鐨勬寚鏁版骞傦紝杈撳嚭A鐨凚娆℃柟",
    category = "math.basic"
)
public class PowerNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_BASE_ID = "input_base"; // A
    private static final String INPUT_EXPONENT_ID = "input_exponent"; // B

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_POWER_ID = "output_power";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public PowerNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "math.basic.power");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_BASE_ID, "Base", "The base value (A)", NodeDataType.ANY, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_EXPONENT_ID, "Exponent", "The exponent value (B)", NodeDataType.ANY, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_POWER_ID, "Power", "Result of A ^ B", NodeDataType.DOUBLE, this));
    }
    
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "Outputs the result of Base raised to the Exponent.";
    }
    
    @Override
    public String getDisplayName() {
        return "Power (^)";
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object valBase = inputValues.get(INPUT_BASE_ID);
        Object valExponent = inputValues.get(INPUT_EXPONENT_ID);

        // 妫€鏌ヨ緭鍏ユ槸鍚︿负鏁板瓧
        if (valBase instanceof Number && valExponent instanceof Number) {
            double base = ((Number) valBase).doubleValue();
            double exponent = ((Number) valExponent).doubleValue();
            
            double result = Math.pow(base, exponent);
            
            // Math.pow 澶勭悊浜嗕竴浜涜竟缂樻儏鍐?(e.g., 0^0 returns 1), 浣嗗彲鑳借繑鍥?NaN 鎴?Infinity
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_POWER_ID, result);
        } else {
            // 濡傛灉杈撳叆鏃犳晥
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_POWER_ID, Double.NaN);
        }
    }

    // --- Getters/Setters (涓嶉渶瑕? ---

    // --- (鍙?搴忓垪鍖?(涓嶉渶瑕? ---
} 
===FILE: C:\Users\navib\Desktop\development\NC\nodecraft\src\main\java\com\nodecraft\nodesystem\nodes\math\basic\RemapNode.java===
package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.math.basic;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.IPort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import java.util.Map;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Remap Node: 灏嗘暟鍊间粠杈撳叆鑼冨洿鏄犲皠鍒拌緭鍑鸿寖鍥?
 * 渚嬪: 灏?[0-100] 鑼冨洿鍐呯殑75鏄犲皠鍒?[0-1] 鑼冨洿 = 0.75
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "math.basic.remap",
    displayName = "鏁板€奸噸鏄犲皠",
    description = "灏嗘暟鍊间粠杈撳叆鑼冨洿鏄犲皠鍒拌緭鍑鸿寖鍥?,
    category = "math.basic"
)
public class RemapNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_VALUE_ID = "input_value";
    private static final String INPUT_IN_MIN_ID = "input_in_min";
    private static final String INPUT_IN_MAX_ID = "input_in_max";
    private static final String INPUT_OUT_MIN_ID = "input_out_min";
    private static final String INPUT_OUT_MAX_ID = "input_out_max";
    private static final String INPUT_CLAMP_ID = "input_clamp"; // 鍙€夊竷灏斿€? 鏄惁灏嗙粨鏋滈檺鍒跺湪杈撳嚭鑼冨洿鍐?

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_RESULT_ID = "output_result";

    // --- 榛樿鍊?---
    private double defaultInMin = 0.0;
    private double defaultInMax = 1.0;
    private double defaultOutMin = 0.0;
    private double defaultOutMax = 1.0;
    private boolean defaultClamp = true;

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public RemapNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "math.operators.remap");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_VALUE_ID, "Value", "Value to remap", NodeDataType.DOUBLE, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_IN_MIN_ID, "In Min", "Input range minimum", NodeDataType.DOUBLE, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_IN_MAX_ID, "In Max", "Input range maximum", NodeDataType.DOUBLE, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_OUT_MIN_ID, "Out Min", "Output range minimum", NodeDataType.DOUBLE, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_OUT_MAX_ID, "Out Max", "Output range maximum", NodeDataType.DOUBLE, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_CLAMP_ID, "Clamp", "Clamp result to output range", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_RESULT_ID, "Result", "The remapped value", NodeDataType.DOUBLE, this));
    }

    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "Maps a value from an input range to an output range";
    }
    
    @Override
    public String getDisplayName() {
        return "Remap";
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆
        Object valueObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_VALUE_ID);
        Object inMinObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_IN_MIN_ID);
        Object inMaxObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_IN_MAX_ID);
        Object outMinObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_OUT_MIN_ID);
        Object outMaxObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_OUT_MAX_ID);
        Object clampObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_CLAMP_ID);
        
        // 榛樿鍊?
        double value = 0.0;
        double inMin = defaultInMin;
        double inMax = defaultInMax;
        double outMin = defaultOutMin;
        double outMax = defaultOutMax;
        boolean clamp = defaultClamp;
        
        // 瑙ｆ瀽杈撳叆
        if (valueObj instanceof Number) {
            value = ((Number) valueObj).doubleValue();
        }
        
        if (inMinObj instanceof Number) {
            inMin = ((Number) inMinObj).doubleValue();
        }
        
        if (inMaxObj instanceof Number) {
            inMax = ((Number) inMaxObj).doubleValue();
        }
        
        if (outMinObj instanceof Number) {
            outMin = ((Number) outMinObj).doubleValue();
        }
        
        if (outMaxObj instanceof Number) {
            outMax = ((Number) outMaxObj).doubleValue();
        }
        
        if (clampObj instanceof Boolean) {
            clamp = (Boolean) clampObj;
        }
        
        // 璁＄畻鏄犲皠鐨勫€?
        double result;
        
        // 妫€鏌ヨ緭鍏ヨ寖鍥存槸鍚︿负闆跺搴?(閬垮厤闄や互闆?
        if (Math.abs(inMax - inMin) < 1e-10) {
            // 濡傛灉杈撳叆鑼冨洿涓洪浂瀹藉害锛岀洿鎺ヨ繑鍥炶緭鍑鸿寖鍥寸殑涓棿鍊?
            result = (outMin + outMax) / 2.0;
        } else {
            // 鏍囧噯鏄犲皠鍏紡: 
            // result = outMin + (value - inMin) * (outMax - outMin) / (inMax - inMin)
            double normalizedValue = (value - inMin) / (inMax - inMin);
            result = outMin + normalizedValue * (outMax - outMin);
        }
        
        // 濡傞渶瑕? 灏嗙粨鏋滈檺鍒跺湪杈撳嚭鑼冨洿鍐?
        if (clamp) {
            double minOut = Math.min(outMin, outMax);
            double maxOut = Math.max(outMin, outMax);
            result = Math.max(minOut, Math.min(maxOut, result));
        }
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_RESULT_ID, result);
    }
    
    // --- Getters/Setters for Properties ---
    
    public double getDefaultInMin() {
        return defaultInMin;
    }
    
    public void setDefaultInMin(double value) {
        this.defaultInMin = value;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    public double getDefaultInMax() {
        return defaultInMax;
    }
    
    public void setDefaultInMax(double value) {
        this.defaultInMax = value;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    public double getDefaultOutMin() {
        return defaultOutMin;
    }
    
    public void setDefaultOutMin(double value) {
        this.defaultOutMin = value;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    public double getDefaultOutMax() {
        return defaultOutMax;
    }
    
    public void setDefaultOutMax(double value) {
        this.defaultOutMax = value;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    public boolean getDefaultClamp() {
        return defaultClamp;
    }
    
    public void setDefaultClamp(boolean value) {
        this.defaultClamp = value;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    // --- 鑺傜偣鐘舵€佸簭鍒楀寲 ---
    
    @Override
    public Object getNodeState() {
        java.util.Map<String, Object> state = new java.util.HashMap<>();
        state.put("defaultInMin", getDefaultInMin());
        state.put("defaultInMax", getDefaultInMax());
        state.put("defaultOutMin", getDefaultOutMin());
        state.put("defaultOutMax", getDefaultOutMax());
        state.put("defaultClamp", getDefaultClamp());
        return state;
    }
    
    @Override
    public void setNodeState(Object state) {
        if (state instanceof java.util.Map) {
            java.util.Map<?, ?> stateMap = (java.util.Map<?, ?>) state;
            
            if (stateMap.containsKey("defaultInMin")) {
                Object obj = stateMap.get("defaultInMin");
                if (obj instanceof Number) {
                    setDefaultInMin(((Number) obj).doubleValue());
                }
            }
            
            if (stateMap.containsKey("defaultInMax")) {
                Object obj = stateMap.get("defaultInMax");
                if (obj instanceof Number) {
                    setDefaultInMax(((Number) obj).doubleValue());
                }
            }
            
            if (stateMap.containsKey("defaultOutMin")) {
                Object obj = stateMap.get("defaultOutMin");
                if (obj instanceof Number) {
                    setDefaultOutMin(((Number) obj).doubleValue());
                }
            }
            
            if (stateMap.containsKey("defaultOutMax")) {
                Object obj = stateMap.get("defaultOutMax");
                if (obj instanceof Number) {
                    setDefaultOutMax(((Number) obj).doubleValue());
                }
            }
            
            if (stateMap.containsKey("defaultClamp")) {
                Object obj = stateMap.get("defaultClamp");
                if (obj instanceof Boolean) {
                    setDefaultClamp((Boolean) obj);
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "math.basic.round",
    displayName = "鍥涜垗浜斿叆 (Round)",
    description = "灏嗘暟鍊煎洓鑸嶄簲鍏ュ埌鏈€鎺ヨ繎鐨勬暣鏁?,
    category = "math.basic"

public class RoundNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public RoundNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "math.basic.round");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?

        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_ROUNDED_ID, "Rounded", "The rounded value", NodeDataType.DOUBLE, this));
    }

    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "Rounds a value to the nearest integer";
    }
    
    @Override
    public String getDisplayName() {
        return "Round";
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---

    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆

        // 鍥涜垗浜斿叆鍒版渶鎺ヨ繎鐨勬暣鏁?

        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_ROUNDED_ID, result);
    }

    // --- Getters/Setters (涓嶉渶瑕? ---

    // --- (鍙?搴忓垪鍖?(涓嶉渶瑕? ---

package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.math.basic;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Subtraction Node: Subtracts B from A (A - B).
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "math.basic.subtraction",
    displayName = "鍑忔硶 (-)",
    description = "鎵ц鍑忔硶杩愮畻锛岃绠桝 - B鐨勭粨鏋?,
    category = "math.basic"
)
public class SubtractionNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_A_ID = "input_a"; // Minuend
    private static final String INPUT_B_ID = "input_b"; // Subtrahend

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_DIFFERENCE_ID = "output_difference";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public SubtractionNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "math.basic.subtraction");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_A_ID, "A", "Minuend", NodeDataType.ANY, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_B_ID, "B", "Subtrahend", NodeDataType.ANY, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_DIFFERENCE_ID, "Difference", "Result of A - B", NodeDataType.DOUBLE, this));
    }
    
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "Outputs the result of A - B.";
    }
    
    @Override
    public String getDisplayName() {
        return "Subtraction (-)";
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object valA = inputValues.get(INPUT_A_ID);
        Object valB = inputValues.get(INPUT_B_ID);

        // 妫€鏌ヨ緭鍏ユ槸鍚︿负鏁板瓧
        if (valA instanceof Number && valB instanceof Number) {
            // 灏嗚緭鍏ヨ浆鎹负 double 杩涜璁＄畻
            double a = ((Number) valA).doubleValue();
            double b = ((Number) valB).doubleValue();
            double difference = a - b;
            
            // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_DIFFERENCE_ID, difference);
        } else {
            // 濡傛灉杈撳叆鏃犳晥
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_DIFFERENCE_ID, 0.0); // 鎴栬€?null
        }
    }

    // --- Getters/Setters (涓嶉渶瑕? ---

    // --- (鍙?搴忓垪鍖?(涓嶉渶瑕? ---
}

package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.math.logic;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * AND Node: 鎵ц閫昏緫涓庢搷浣?(A && B)
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "math.logic.and",
    displayName = "閫昏緫涓?(AND)",
    description = "鎵ц閫昏緫涓庢搷浣滐紝褰揂鍜孊閮戒负true鏃惰緭鍑簍rue锛屽惁鍒欒緭鍑篺alse",
    category = "math.logic"
)
public class AndNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_A_ID = "input_a";
    private static final String INPUT_B_ID = "input_b";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_RESULT_ID = "output_result";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public AndNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "math.logic.and");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_A_ID, "A", "杈撳叆鍊糀", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_B_ID, "B", "杈撳叆鍊糂", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_RESULT_ID, "Result", "缁撴灉 (A && B)", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
    }
    
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "鎵ц閫昏緫涓庢搷浣滐紝褰揂鍜孊閮戒负true鏃惰緭鍑簍rue锛屽惁鍒欒緭鍑篺alse";
    }
    
    @Override
    public String getDisplayName() {
        return "AND";
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object valA = inputValues.get(INPUT_A_ID);
        Object valB = inputValues.get(INPUT_B_ID);

        // 榛樿缁撴灉涓篺alse
        boolean result = false;

        // 妫€鏌ヨ緭鍏ュ苟鎵ц閫昏緫涓庢搷浣?
        if (valA instanceof Boolean && valB instanceof Boolean) {
            result = (Boolean) valA && (Boolean) valB;
        } else {
            // 灏濊瘯杞崲闈炲竷灏旂被鍨嬭緭鍏?
            try {
                boolean boolA = valA != null && Boolean.parseBoolean(valA.toString());
                boolean boolB = valB != null && Boolean.parseBoolean(valB.toString());
                result = boolA && boolB;
            } catch (Exception e) {
                // 杞崲澶辫触锛屼繚鎸侀粯璁ょ殑false缁撴灉
            }
        }
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_RESULT_ID, result);
    }
}

package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.math.logic;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import java.util.Objects;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Equals Node: 姣旇緝涓や釜鍊兼槸鍚︾浉绛?(A == B)
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "math.logic.equals",
    displayName = "鐩哥瓑姣旇緝 (==)",
    description = "姣旇緝涓や釜杈撳叆鍊兼槸鍚︾浉绛?,
    category = "math.logic"
)
public class EqualsNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_A_ID = "input_a";
    private static final String INPUT_B_ID = "input_b";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_RESULT_ID = "output_result";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public EqualsNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "math.logic.equals");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?(鍏佽浠绘剰绫诲瀷)
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_A_ID, "A", "杈撳叆鍊糀", NodeDataType.ANY, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_B_ID, "B", "杈撳叆鍊糂", NodeDataType.ANY, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_RESULT_ID, "Result", "姣旇緝缁撴灉 (A == B)", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
    }
    
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "姣旇緝涓や釜杈撳叆鍊兼槸鍚︾浉绛?;
    }
    
    @Override
    public String getDisplayName() {
        return "Equals (==)";
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object valA = inputValues.get(INPUT_A_ID);
        Object valB = inputValues.get(INPUT_B_ID);

        // 璁＄畻缁撴灉
        boolean result = false;
        
        // 澶勭悊null鎯呭喌
        if (valA == null && valB == null) {
            result = true;
        } else if (valA == null || valB == null) {
            result = false;
        }
        // 澶勭悊鏁板€兼瘮杈冿紙澶勭悊涓嶅悓鏁板瓧绫诲瀷鐨勬瘮杈冿級
        else if (valA instanceof Number && valB instanceof Number) {
            double numA = ((Number) valA).doubleValue();
            double numB = ((Number) valB).doubleValue();
            // 浣跨敤涓€涓緢灏忕殑璇樊鑼冨洿杩涜娴偣鏁版瘮杈?
            result = Math.abs(numA - numB) < 1e-10;
        }
        // 澶勭悊瀛楃涓叉瘮杈?
        else if (valA instanceof String || valB instanceof String) {
            result = Objects.toString(valA, "").equals(Objects.toString(valB, ""));
        }
        // 鍏朵粬绫诲瀷浣跨敤equals鏂规硶
        else {
            result = Objects.equals(valA, valB);
        }
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_RESULT_ID, result);
    }
}

package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.math.logic;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * GreaterThan Node: 姣旇緝绗竴涓€兼槸鍚﹀ぇ浜庣浜屼釜鍊?(A > B)
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "math.logic.greater_than",
    displayName = "澶т簬姣旇緝 (>)",
    description = "姣旇緝绗竴涓€兼槸鍚﹀ぇ浜庣浜屼釜鍊?,
    category = "math.logic"
)
public class GreaterThanNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_A_ID = "input_a";
    private static final String INPUT_B_ID = "input_b";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_RESULT_ID = "output_result";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public GreaterThanNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "math.logic.greater_than");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?(鍏佽浠讳綍鍙瘮杈冪殑绫诲瀷锛屼絾涓昏鐢ㄤ簬鏁板瓧)
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_A_ID, "A", "杈撳叆鍊糀", NodeDataType.ANY, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_B_ID, "B", "杈撳叆鍊糂", NodeDataType.ANY, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_RESULT_ID, "Result", "姣旇緝缁撴灉 (A > B)", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
    }
    
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "姣旇緝绗竴涓€兼槸鍚﹀ぇ浜庣浜屼釜鍊?;
    }
    
    @Override
    public String getDisplayName() {
        return "Greater Than (>)";
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object valA = inputValues.get(INPUT_A_ID);
        Object valB = inputValues.get(INPUT_B_ID);

        // 榛樿缁撴灉涓篺alse
        boolean result = false;

        // 澶勭悊鏁板瓧姣旇緝
        if (valA instanceof Number && valB instanceof Number) {
            double numA = ((Number) valA).doubleValue();
            double numB = ((Number) valB).doubleValue();
            result = numA > numB;
        } 
        // 澶勭悊瀛楃涓叉瘮杈?(瀛楀吀搴?
        else if (valA instanceof String && valB instanceof String) {
            result = ((String) valA).compareTo((String) valB) > 0;
        }
        // 澶勭悊瀛楃涓庢暟瀛楃殑姣旇緝 (灏濊瘯杞崲)
        else if (valA instanceof String && valB instanceof Number) {
            try {
                double numA = Double.parseDouble((String) valA);
                double numB = ((Number) valB).doubleValue();
                result = numA > numB;
            } catch (NumberFormatException e) {
                // 濡傛灉瀛楃涓蹭笉鑳借浆鎹负鏁板瓧锛岀粨鏋滀负false
            }
        }
        else if (valA instanceof Number && valB instanceof String) {
            try {
                double numA = ((Number) valA).doubleValue();
                double numB = Double.parseDouble((String) valB);
                result = numA > numB;
            } catch (NumberFormatException e) {
                // 濡傛灉瀛楃涓蹭笉鑳借浆鎹负鏁板瓧锛岀粨鏋滀负false
            }
        }
        // 瀵逛簬涓嶅彲姣旇緝鐨勭被鍨嬶紝淇濇寔榛樿鐨刦alse缁撴灉
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_RESULT_ID, result);
    }
}

@NodeInfo(
    id = "math.logic.greater_than_or_equal",
    displayName = "澶т簬绛変簬",
    description = "姣旇緝绗竴涓€兼槸鍚﹀ぇ浜庣瓑浜庣浜屼釜鍊?(A >= B)",
    category = "math.logic"

public class GreaterThanOrEqualNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_A_ID = "input_a";
    private static final String INPUT_B_ID = "input_b";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_RESULT_ID = "output_result";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public GreaterThanOrEqualNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "logic.greater_than_or_equal");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?(鍏佽浠讳綍鍙瘮杈冪殑绫诲瀷锛屼絾涓昏鐢ㄤ簬鏁板瓧)

        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_B_ID, "B", "杈撳叆鍊糂", NodeDataType.ANY, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_RESULT_ID, "Result", "姣旇緝缁撴灉 (A >= B)", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
    }

    // 娣诲姞 getDescription 鏂规硶
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "姣旇緝绗竴涓€兼槸鍚﹀ぇ浜庣瓑浜庣浜屼釜鍊?;
    }

    // 娣诲姞 getDisplayName 鏂规硶
    @Override
    public String getDisplayName() {
        return "Greater Than or Equal (>=)";
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object valA = inputValues.get(INPUT_A_ID);
        Object valB = inputValues.get(INPUT_B_ID);

        // 榛樿缁撴灉涓篺alse
        boolean result = false;

        // 澶勭悊鏁板瓧姣旇緝
        if (valA instanceof Number && valB instanceof Number) {
            double numA = ((Number) valA).doubleValue();
            double numB = ((Number) valB).doubleValue();
            result = numA >= numB;
        } 
        // 澶勭悊瀛楃涓叉瘮杈?(瀛楀吀搴?
        else if (valA instanceof String && valB instanceof String) {
            int comparison = ((String) valA).compareTo((String) valB);
            result = comparison >= 0;
        }
        // 澶勭悊瀛楃涓庢暟瀛楃殑姣旇緝 (灏濊瘯杞崲)
        else if (valA instanceof String && valB instanceof Number) {
            try {
                double numA = Double.parseDouble((String) valA);
                double numB = ((Number) valB).doubleValue();
                result = numA >= numB;
            } catch (NumberFormatException e) {
                // 濡傛灉瀛楃涓蹭笉鑳借浆鎹负鏁板瓧锛岀粨鏋滀负false
            }
        }
        else if (valA instanceof Number && valB instanceof String) {
            try {
                double numA = ((Number) valA).doubleValue();
                double numB = Double.parseDouble((String) valB);
                result = numA >= numB;
            } catch (NumberFormatException e) {
                // 濡傛灉瀛楃涓蹭笉鑳借浆鎹负鏁板瓧锛岀粨鏋滀负false
            }
        }
        // 瀵逛簬涓嶅彲姣旇緝鐨勭被鍨嬶紝淇濇寔榛樿鐨刦alse缁撴灉
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_RESULT_ID, result);
    }
}
