package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.math.logic;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * If Node: 鏍规嵁鏉′欢閫夋嫨杈撳嚭true鍒嗘敮鎴杅alse鍒嗘敮鐨勫€?
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "math.logic.if",
    displayName = "鏉′欢閫夋嫨",
    description = "鏍规嵁鏉′欢閫夋嫨杈撳嚭true鍒嗘敮鎴杅alse鍒嗘敮鐨勫€?,
    category = "math.logic"
)
public class IfNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_CONDITION_ID = "input_condition";
    private static final String INPUT_TRUE_VALUE_ID = "input_true_value";
    private static final String INPUT_FALSE_VALUE_ID = "input_false_value";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_RESULT_ID = "output_result";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public IfNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "logic.if");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_CONDITION_ID, "Condition", "鏉′欢 (甯冨皵鍊?", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_TRUE_VALUE_ID, "True Value", "鏉′欢涓簍rue鏃剁殑杈撳嚭鍊?, NodeDataType.ANY, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_FALSE_VALUE_ID, "False Value", "鏉′欢涓篺alse鏃剁殑杈撳嚭鍊?, NodeDataType.ANY, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_RESULT_ID, "Result", "鏍规嵁鏉′欢閫夋嫨鐨勮緭鍑哄€?, NodeDataType.ANY, this));
    }

    // 娣诲姞 getDescription 鏂规硶
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "鏍规嵁鏉′欢閫夋嫨杈撳嚭true鍒嗘敮鎴杅alse鍒嗘敮鐨勫€?;
    }

    // 娣诲姞 getDisplayName 鏂规硶
    @Override
    public String getDisplayName() {
        return "If / Gate";
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇鏉′欢杈撳叆鍊?
        Object conditionValue = inputValues.get(INPUT_CONDITION_ID);
        
        // 榛樿鏉′欢涓篺alse
        boolean condition = false;
        
        // 鍒ゆ柇鏉′欢鏄惁涓簍rue
        if (conditionValue instanceof Boolean) {
            condition = (Boolean) conditionValue;
        } else if (conditionValue != null) {
            // 灏濊瘯杞崲闈炲竷灏旂被鍨?
            try {
                condition = Boolean.parseBoolean(conditionValue.toString());
            } catch (Exception e) {
                // 杞崲澶辫触锛屼繚鎸侀粯璁ょ殑false
            }
        }
        
        // 鏍规嵁鏉′欢閫夋嫨杈撳嚭鍊?
        Object result;
        if (condition) {
            result = inputValues.get(INPUT_TRUE_VALUE_ID);
        } else {
            result = inputValues.get(INPUT_FALSE_VALUE_ID);
        }
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_RESULT_ID, result);
    }
}

package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.math.logic;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * LessThan Node: 姣旇緝绗竴涓€兼槸鍚﹀皬浜庣浜屼釜鍊?(A < B)
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "math.logic.less_than",
    displayName = "灏忎簬姣旇緝 (<)",
    description = "姣旇緝绗竴涓€兼槸鍚﹀皬浜庣浜屼釜鍊?,
    category = "math.logic"
)
public class LessThanNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_A_ID = "input_a";
    private static final String INPUT_B_ID = "input_b";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_RESULT_ID = "output_result";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public LessThanNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "math.logic.less_than");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?(鍏佽浠讳綍鍙瘮杈冪殑绫诲瀷锛屼絾涓昏鐢ㄤ簬鏁板瓧)
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_A_ID, "A", "杈撳叆鍊糀", NodeDataType.ANY, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_B_ID, "B", "杈撳叆鍊糂", NodeDataType.ANY, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_RESULT_ID, "Result", "姣旇緝缁撴灉 (A < B)", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
    }

    // 娣诲姞 getDescription 鏂规硶
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "姣旇緝绗竴涓€兼槸鍚﹀皬浜庣浜屼釜鍊?;
    }

    // 娣诲姞 getDisplayName 鏂规硶
    @Override
    public String getDisplayName() {
        return "Less Than (<)";
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object valA = inputValues.get(INPUT_A_ID);
        Object valB = inputValues.get(INPUT_B_ID);

        // 榛樿缁撴灉涓篺alse
        boolean result = false;

        // 澶勭悊鏁板瓧姣旇緝
        if (valA instanceof Number && valB instanceof Number) {
            double numA = ((Number) valA).doubleValue();
            double numB = ((Number) valB).doubleValue();
            result = numA < numB;
        } 
        // 澶勭悊瀛楃涓叉瘮杈?(瀛楀吀搴?
        else if (valA instanceof String && valB instanceof String) {
            result = ((String) valA).compareTo((String) valB) < 0;
        }
        // 澶勭悊瀛楃涓庢暟瀛楃殑姣旇緝 (灏濊瘯杞崲)
        else if (valA instanceof String && valB instanceof Number) {
            try {
                double numA = Double.parseDouble((String) valA);
                double numB = ((Number) valB).doubleValue();
                result = numA < numB;
            } catch (NumberFormatException e) {
                // 濡傛灉瀛楃涓蹭笉鑳借浆鎹负鏁板瓧锛岀粨鏋滀负false
            }
        }
        else if (valA instanceof Number && valB instanceof String) {
            try {
                double numA = ((Number) valA).doubleValue();
                double numB = Double.parseDouble((String) valB);
                result = numA < numB;
            } catch (NumberFormatException e) {
                // 濡傛灉瀛楃涓蹭笉鑳借浆鎹负鏁板瓧锛岀粨鏋滀负false
            }
        }
        // 瀵逛簬涓嶅彲姣旇緝鐨勭被鍨嬶紝淇濇寔榛樿鐨刦alse缁撴灉
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_RESULT_ID, result);
    }
}

package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.math.logic;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * LessThanOrEqual Node: 姣旇緝绗竴涓€兼槸鍚﹀皬浜庣瓑浜庣浜屼釜鍊?(A <= B)
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "math.logic.less_than_or_equal",
    displayName = "灏忎簬绛変簬",
    description = "姣旇緝绗竴涓€兼槸鍚﹀皬浜庣瓑浜庣浜屼釜鍊?(A <= B)",
    category = "math.logic"
)
public class LessThanOrEqualNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_A_ID = "input_a";
    private static final String INPUT_B_ID = "input_b";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_RESULT_ID = "output_result";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public LessThanOrEqualNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "logic.less_than_or_equal");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?(鍏佽浠讳綍鍙瘮杈冪殑绫诲瀷锛屼絾涓昏鐢ㄤ簬鏁板瓧)
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_A_ID, "A", "杈撳叆鍊糀", NodeDataType.ANY, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_B_ID, "B", "杈撳叆鍊糂", NodeDataType.ANY, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_RESULT_ID, "Result", "姣旇緝缁撴灉 (A <= B)", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
    }

    // 娣诲姞 getDescription 鏂规硶
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "姣旇緝绗竴涓€兼槸鍚﹀皬浜庣瓑浜庣浜屼釜鍊?;
    }

    // 娣诲姞 getDisplayName 鏂规硶
    @Override
    public String getDisplayName() {
        return "Less Than or Equal (<=)";
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object valA = inputValues.get(INPUT_A_ID);
        Object valB = inputValues.get(INPUT_B_ID);

        // 榛樿缁撴灉涓篺alse
        boolean result = false;

        // 澶勭悊鏁板瓧姣旇緝
        if (valA instanceof Number && valB instanceof Number) {
            double numA = ((Number) valA).doubleValue();
            double numB = ((Number) valB).doubleValue();
            result = numA <= numB;
        } 
        // 澶勭悊瀛楃涓叉瘮杈?(瀛楀吀搴?
        else if (valA instanceof String && valB instanceof String) {
            int comparison = ((String) valA).compareTo((String) valB);
            result = comparison <= 0;
        }
        // 澶勭悊瀛楃涓庢暟瀛楃殑姣旇緝 (灏濊瘯杞崲)
        else if (valA instanceof String && valB instanceof Number) {
            try {
                double numA = Double.parseDouble((String) valA);
                double numB = ((Number) valB).doubleValue();
                result = numA <= numB;
            } catch (NumberFormatException e) {
                // 濡傛灉瀛楃涓蹭笉鑳借浆鎹负鏁板瓧锛岀粨鏋滀负false
            }
        }
        else if (valA instanceof Number && valB instanceof String) {
            try {
                double numA = ((Number) valA).doubleValue();
                double numB = Double.parseDouble((String) valB);
                result = numA <= numB;
            } catch (NumberFormatException e) {
                // 濡傛灉瀛楃涓蹭笉鑳借浆鎹负鏁板瓧锛岀粨鏋滀负false
            }
        }
        // 瀵逛簬涓嶅彲姣旇緝鐨勭被鍨嬶紝淇濇寔榛樿鐨刦alse缁撴灉
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_RESULT_ID, result);
    }
}

package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.math.logic;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import java.util.Objects;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * NotEquals Node: 姣旇緝涓や釜鍊兼槸鍚︿笉鐩哥瓑 (A != B)
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "math.logic.not_equals",
    displayName = "涓嶇瓑姣旇緝 (!=)",
    description = "姣旇緝涓や釜杈撳叆鍊兼槸鍚︿笉鐩哥瓑",
    category = "math.logic"
)
public class NotEqualsNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_A_ID = "input_a";
    private static final String INPUT_B_ID = "input_b";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_RESULT_ID = "output_result";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public NotEqualsNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "math.logic.not_equals");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?(鍏佽浠绘剰绫诲瀷)
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_A_ID, "A", "杈撳叆鍊糀", NodeDataType.ANY, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_B_ID, "B", "杈撳叆鍊糂", NodeDataType.ANY, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_RESULT_ID, "Result", "姣旇緝缁撴灉 (A != B)", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
    }

    // 娣诲姞 getDescription 鏂规硶
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "姣旇緝涓や釜杈撳叆鍊兼槸鍚︿笉鐩哥瓑";
    }

    // 娣诲姞 getDisplayName 鏂规硶
    @Override
    public String getDisplayName() {
        return "Not Equals (!=)";
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object valA = inputValues.get(INPUT_A_ID);
        Object valB = inputValues.get(INPUT_B_ID);

        // 璁＄畻缁撴灉
        boolean result = true;  // 榛樿涓嶇浉绛?
        
        // 澶勭悊null鎯呭喌
        if (valA == null && valB == null) {
            result = false;  // 涓や釜null琚涓虹浉绛夛紝鎵€浠ヤ笉鐩哥瓑鐨勭粨鏋滄槸false
        } else if (valA == null || valB == null) {
            result = true;  // 涓€涓猲ull鍜屼竴涓潪null鎬绘槸涓嶇浉绛?
        }
        // 澶勭悊鏁板€兼瘮杈冿紙澶勭悊涓嶅悓鏁板瓧绫诲瀷鐨勬瘮杈冿級
        else if (valA instanceof Number && valB instanceof Number) {
            double numA = ((Number) valA).doubleValue();
            double numB = ((Number) valB).doubleValue();
            // 浣跨敤涓€涓緢灏忕殑璇樊鑼冨洿杩涜娴偣鏁版瘮杈?
            result = Math.abs(numA - numB) >= 1e-10;
        }
        // 澶勭悊瀛楃涓叉瘮杈?
        else if (valA instanceof String || valB instanceof String) {
            result = !Objects.toString(valA, "").equals(Objects.toString(valB, ""));
        }
        // 鍏朵粬绫诲瀷浣跨敤equals鏂规硶
        else {
            result = !Objects.equals(valA, valB);
        }
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_RESULT_ID, result);
    }
}

package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.math.logic;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * NOT Node: 鎵ц閫昏緫闈炴搷浣?(!A)
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "math.logic.not",
    displayName = "閫昏緫闈?(NOT)",
    description = "鎵ц閫昏緫闈炴搷浣滐紝瀵硅緭鍏ュ€煎彇鍙?,
    category = "math.logic"
)
public class NotNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_VALUE_ID = "input_value";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_RESULT_ID = "output_result";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public NotNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "math.logic.not");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_VALUE_ID, "Value", "杈撳叆鍊?, NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_RESULT_ID, "Result", "缁撴灉 (!Value)", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
    }

    // 娣诲姞 getDescription 鏂规硶
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "鎵ц閫昏緫闈炴搷浣滐紝瀵硅緭鍏ュ€煎彇鍙?;
    }

    // 娣诲姞 getDisplayName 鏂规硶
    @Override
    public String getDisplayName() {
        return "NOT";
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object val = inputValues.get(INPUT_VALUE_ID);

        // 榛樿缁撴灉涓簍rue (杈撳叆涓簄ull鎴杅alse鏃?
        boolean result = true;

        // 妫€鏌ヨ緭鍏ュ苟鎵ц閫昏緫闈炴搷浣?
        if (val instanceof Boolean) {
            result = !(Boolean) val;
        } else {
            // 灏濊瘯杞崲闈炲竷灏旂被鍨嬭緭鍏?
            try {
                if (val != null) {
                    boolean boolVal = Boolean.parseBoolean(val.toString());
                    result = !boolVal;
                }
            } catch (Exception e) {
                // 杞崲澶辫触锛屼繚鎸侀粯璁ょ殑true缁撴灉
            }
        }
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_RESULT_ID, result);
    }
}

package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.math.logic;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * OR Node: 鎵ц閫昏緫鎴栨搷浣?(A || B)
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "math.logic.or",
    displayName = "閫昏緫鎴?(OR)",
    description = "鎵ц閫昏緫鎴栨搷浣滐紝褰揂鎴朆鑷冲皯鏈変竴涓负true鏃惰緭鍑簍rue锛屽惁鍒欒緭鍑篺alse",
    category = "math.logic"
)
public class OrNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_A_ID = "input_a";
    private static final String INPUT_B_ID = "input_b";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_RESULT_ID = "output_result";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public OrNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "math.logic.or");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_A_ID, "A", "杈撳叆鍊糀", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_B_ID, "B", "杈撳叆鍊糂", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_RESULT_ID, "Result", "缁撴灉 (A || B)", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
    }

    // 娣诲姞 getDescription 鏂规硶
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "鎵ц閫昏緫鎴栨搷浣滐紝褰揂鎴朆鑷冲皯鏈変竴涓负true鏃惰緭鍑簍rue锛屽惁鍒欒緭鍑篺alse";
    }

    // 娣诲姞 getDisplayName 鏂规硶
    @Override
    public String getDisplayName() {
        return "OR";
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object valA = inputValues.get(INPUT_A_ID);
        Object valB = inputValues.get(INPUT_B_ID);

        // 榛樿缁撴灉涓篺alse
        boolean result = false;

        // 妫€鏌ヨ緭鍏ュ苟鎵ц閫昏緫鎴栨搷浣?
        if (valA instanceof Boolean && valB instanceof Boolean) {
            result = (Boolean) valA || (Boolean) valB;
        } else {
            // 灏濊瘯杞崲闈炲竷灏旂被鍨嬭緭鍏?
            try {
                boolean boolA = valA != null && Boolean.parseBoolean(valA.toString());
                boolean boolB = valB != null && Boolean.parseBoolean(valB.toString());
                result = boolA || boolB;
            } catch (Exception e) {
                // 杞崲澶辫触锛屼繚鎸侀粯璁ょ殑false缁撴灉
            }
        }
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_RESULT_ID, result);
    }
}
===FILE: C:\Users\navib\Desktop\development\NC\nodecraft\src\main\java\com\nodecraft\nodesystem\nodes\math\logic\SelectItemNode.java===
package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.math.logic;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * SelectItem Node: 鏍规嵁绱㈠紩鎴栨潯浠朵粠澶氫釜杈撳叆涓€夋嫨涓€涓?
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "math.logic.select_item",
    displayName = "閫夋嫨椤圭洰",
    description = "鏍规嵁绱㈠紩鎴栨潯浠朵粠澶氫釜杈撳叆涓€夋嫨涓€涓?,
    category = "math.logic"
)
public class SelectItemNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_INDEX_ID = "input_index";
    private static final String INPUT_ITEM_0_ID = "input_item_0";
    private static final String INPUT_ITEM_1_ID = "input_item_1";
    private static final String INPUT_ITEM_2_ID = "input_item_2";
    private static final String INPUT_ITEM_3_ID = "input_item_3";
    private static final String INPUT_DEFAULT_ID = "input_default";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_RESULT_ID = "output_result";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public SelectItemNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "logic.select_item");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_INDEX_ID, "Index", "閫夋嫨绱㈠紩 (0-3) 鎴栧竷灏旀潯浠?, NodeDataType.ANY, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_ITEM_0_ID, "Item 0", "绱㈠紩涓?鐨勯」鐩?, NodeDataType.ANY, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_ITEM_1_ID, "Item 1", "绱㈠紩涓?鐨勯」鐩?, NodeDataType.ANY, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_ITEM_2_ID, "Item 2", "绱㈠紩涓?鐨勯」鐩?, NodeDataType.ANY, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_ITEM_3_ID, "Item 3", "绱㈠紩涓?鐨勯」鐩?, NodeDataType.ANY, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_DEFAULT_ID, "Default", "绱㈠紩鏃犳晥鏃剁殑榛樿鍊?, NodeDataType.ANY, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_RESULT_ID, "Result", "閫夋嫨鐨勯」鐩?, NodeDataType.ANY, this));
    }

    // 娣诲姞 getDescription 鏂规硶
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "鏍规嵁绱㈠紩鎴栨潯浠朵粠澶氫釜杈撳叆涓€夋嫨涓€涓?;
    }

    // 娣诲姞 getDisplayName 鏂规硶
    @Override
    public String getDisplayName() {
        return "Select Item";
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇绱㈠紩/鏉′欢杈撳叆鍊?
        Object indexValue = inputValues.get(INPUT_INDEX_ID);
        
        // 鍑嗗缁撴灉锛岄粯璁や负榛樿鍊?
        Object result = inputValues.get(INPUT_DEFAULT_ID);
        
        // 澶勭悊绱㈠紩閫夋嫨
        if (indexValue instanceof Number) {
            int index = ((Number) indexValue).intValue();
            
            switch (index) {
                case 0:
                    result = inputValues.get(INPUT_ITEM_0_ID);
                    break;
                case 1:
                    result = inputValues.get(INPUT_ITEM_1_ID);
                    break;
                case 2:
                    result = inputValues.get(INPUT_ITEM_2_ID);
                    break;
                case 3:
                    result = inputValues.get(INPUT_ITEM_3_ID);
                    break;
                default:
                    // 绱㈠紩瓒呭嚭鑼冨洿锛屼娇鐢ㄩ粯璁ゅ€?
                    break;
            }
        } 
        // 澶勭悊甯冨皵鏉′欢閫夋嫨 (true 閫夋嫨 Item 0锛宖alse 閫夋嫨 Item 1)
        else if (indexValue instanceof Boolean) {
            boolean condition = (Boolean) indexValue;
            result = condition ? inputValues.get(INPUT_ITEM_0_ID) : inputValues.get(INPUT_ITEM_1_ID);
        }
        // 澶勭悊瀛楃涓茬储寮?(灏濊瘯瑙ｆ瀽涓烘暟瀛?
        else if (indexValue instanceof String) {
            try {
                int index = Integer.parseInt((String) indexValue);
                
                switch (index) {
                    case 0:
                        result = inputValues.get(INPUT_ITEM_0_ID);
                        break;
                    case 1:
                        result = inputValues.get(INPUT_ITEM_1_ID);
                        break;
                    case 2:
                        result = inputValues.get(INPUT_ITEM_2_ID);
                        break;
                    case 3:
                        result = inputValues.get(INPUT_ITEM_3_ID);
                        break;
                    default:
                        // 绱㈠紩瓒呭嚭鑼冨洿锛屼娇鐢ㄩ粯璁ゅ€?
                        break;
                }
            } catch (NumberFormatException e) {
                // 鏃犳硶瑙ｆ瀽涓烘暟瀛楋紝灏濊瘯瑙ｆ瀽涓哄竷灏斿€?
                if ("true".equalsIgnoreCase((String) indexValue)) {
                    result = inputValues.get(INPUT_ITEM_0_ID);
                } else if ("false".equalsIgnoreCase((String) indexValue)) {
                    result = inputValues.get(INPUT_ITEM_1_ID);
                }
                // 鍚﹀垯浣跨敤榛樿鍊?
            }
        }
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_RESULT_ID, result);
    }
}
===FILE: C:\Users\navib\Desktop\development\NC\nodecraft\src\main\java\com\nodecraft\nodesystem\nodes\math\logic\XorNode.java===
package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.math.logic;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * XOR Node: 鎵ц閫昏緫寮傛垨鎿嶄綔 (A ^ B)
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "math.logic.xor",
    displayName = "寮傛垨",
    description = "鎵ц閫昏緫寮傛垨鎿嶄綔锛屽綋涓斾粎褰揂鍜孊涓湁涓€涓负true鏃惰緭鍑簍rue",
    category = "math.logic"
)
public class XorNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_A_ID = "input_a";
    private static final String INPUT_B_ID = "input_b";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_RESULT_ID = "output_result";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public XorNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "logic.xor");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_A_ID, "A", "杈撳叆鍊糀", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_B_ID, "B", "杈撳叆鍊糂", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_RESULT_ID, "Result", "缁撴灉 (A ^ B)", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
    }

    // 娣诲姞 getDescription 鏂规硶
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "鎵ц閫昏緫寮傛垨鎿嶄綔锛屽綋涓斾粎褰揂鍜孊涓湁涓€涓负true鏃惰緭鍑簍rue";
    }

    // 娣诲姞 getDisplayName 鏂规硶
    @Override
    public String getDisplayName() {
        return "XOR";
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object valA = inputValues.get(INPUT_A_ID);
        Object valB = inputValues.get(INPUT_B_ID);

        // 榛樿缁撴灉涓篺alse
        boolean result = false;

        // 妫€鏌ヨ緭鍏ュ苟鎵ц閫昏緫寮傛垨鎿嶄綔
        if (valA instanceof Boolean && valB instanceof Boolean) {
            boolean boolA = (Boolean) valA;
            boolean boolB = (Boolean) valB;
            result = boolA ^ boolB;  // 寮傛垨杩愮畻绗?^
        } else {
            // 灏濊瘯杞崲闈炲竷灏旂被鍨嬭緭鍏?
            try {
                boolean boolA = valA != null && Boolean.parseBoolean(valA.toString());
                boolean boolB = valB != null && Boolean.parseBoolean(valB.toString());
                result = boolA ^ boolB;
            } catch (Exception e) {
                // 杞崲澶辫触锛屼繚鎸侀粯璁ょ殑false缁撴灉
            }
        }
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_RESULT_ID, result);
    }
} 
===FILE: C:\Users\navib\Desktop\development\NC\nodecraft\src\main\java\com\nodecraft\nodesystem\nodes\math\randomness\NoiseNode.java===
package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.math.randomness;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import java.util.Random;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Noise Node: 鐢熸垚Perlin鎴朣implex鍣０鍊硷紝鐢ㄤ簬鐢熸垚鑷劧褰㈢姸銆佸湴褰㈡垨鏈夋満妯″紡
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "math.randomness.noise",
    displayName = "鍣０鐢熸垚鍣?,
    description = "鐢熸垚Perlin鎴朣implex鍣０鍊硷紝鐢ㄤ簬鐢熸垚鑷劧褰㈢姸銆佸湴褰㈡垨鏈夋満妯″紡",
    category = "math.randomness"
)
public class NoiseNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 鍣０绫诲瀷鏋氫妇 ---
    private enum NoiseType {
        PERLIN,
        SIMPLEX
    }

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_X_ID = "input_x";
    private static final String INPUT_Y_ID = "input_y";
    private static final String INPUT_Z_ID = "input_z";
    private static final String INPUT_SCALE_ID = "input_scale";
    private static final String INPUT_OCTAVES_ID = "input_octaves";
    private static final String INPUT_PERSISTENCE_ID = "input_persistence";
    private static final String INPUT_LACUNARITY_ID = "input_lacunarity";
    private static final String INPUT_SEED_ID = "input_seed";
    private static final String INPUT_NOISE_TYPE_ID = "input_noise_type";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_NOISE_VALUE_ID = "output_noise_value";
    private static final String OUTPUT_NOISE_COLOR_ID = "output_noise_color";

    // 鍣０鐢熸垚鍣ㄧ浉鍏?
    private Random random = new Random();
    private long currentSeed = 0;
    private PerlinNoise perlinNoise;
    private SimplexNoise simplexNoise;

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public NoiseNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "math.randomness.noise");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_X_ID, "X", "X鍧愭爣", NodeDataType.DOUBLE, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_Y_ID, "Y", "Y鍧愭爣", NodeDataType.DOUBLE, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_Z_ID, "Z", "Z鍧愭爣 (鍙€?", NodeDataType.DOUBLE, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_SCALE_ID, "Scale", "鍣０缂╂斁锛堣緝澶х殑鍊?鏇村钩婊戯級", NodeDataType.DOUBLE, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_OCTAVES_ID, "Octaves", "鍙犲姞鐨勫櫔澹板眰鏁帮紙鏇村=鏇村缁嗚妭锛?, NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_PERSISTENCE_ID, "Persistence", "姣忎釜鍏害涓嬮檷鐨勫己搴?, NodeDataType.DOUBLE, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_LACUNARITY_ID, "Lacunarity", "姣忎釜鍏害鐨勯鐜囧鍔?, NodeDataType.DOUBLE, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_SEED_ID, "Seed", "鍣０绉嶅瓙", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_NOISE_TYPE_ID, "NoiseType", "鍣０绫诲瀷 (0=Perlin, 1=Simplex)", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_NOISE_VALUE_ID, "Value", "鍣０鍊?(-1鍒?)", NodeDataType.DOUBLE, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_NOISE_COLOR_ID, "Color", "鍣０鍊煎搴旂殑棰滆壊", NodeDataType.COLOR, this));
        
        // 鍒濆鍖栭粯璁ゅ櫔澹扮敓鎴愬櫒
        initializeNoiseGenerators(0);
    }

    // 瀹炵幇 getDescription 鏂规硶
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "鐢熸垚鍣０鍊硷紝鐢ㄤ簬鏈夋満褰㈢姸鍜屽湴褰?;
    }

    // 瀹炵幇 getDisplayName 鏂规硶
    @Override
    public String getDisplayName() {
        return "Noise (Perlin/Simplex)";
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        double x = getValueAsDouble(inputValues.get(INPUT_X_ID), 0.0);
        double y = getValueAsDouble(inputValues.get(INPUT_Y_ID), 0.0);
        double z = getValueAsDouble(inputValues.get(INPUT_Z_ID), 0.0);
        double scale = getValueAsDouble(inputValues.get(INPUT_SCALE_ID), 0.01);
        int octaves = getValueAsInt(inputValues.get(INPUT_OCTAVES_ID), 4);
        double persistence = getValueAsDouble(inputValues.get(INPUT_PERSISTENCE_ID), 0.5);
        double lacunarity = getValueAsDouble(inputValues.get(INPUT_LACUNARITY_ID), 2.0);
        long seed = getValueAsLong(inputValues.get(INPUT_SEED_ID), 0);
        int noiseTypeInt = getValueAsInt(inputValues.get(INPUT_NOISE_TYPE_ID), 0);
        
        NoiseType noiseType = (noiseTypeInt == 1) ? NoiseType.SIMPLEX : NoiseType.PERLIN;
        
        // 楠岃瘉鍜岄檺鍒惰緭鍏ュ€?
        scale = Math.max(0.0001, scale); // 闃叉闄や互闆舵垨鏋佸皬鍊?
        octaves = Math.max(1, Math.min(octaves, 16)); // 闄愬埗鍏害鏁伴噺
        persistence = Math.max(0.0, Math.min(persistence, 1.0));
        lacunarity = Math.max(1.0, lacunarity);
        
        // 濡傛灉绉嶅瓙鏀瑰彉浜嗭紝閲嶆柊鍒濆鍖栧櫔澹扮敓鎴愬櫒
        if (seed != currentSeed) {
            initializeNoiseGenerators(seed);
        }
        
        // 璁＄畻鍣０鍊?
        double noiseValue;
        if (noiseType == NoiseType.PERLIN) {
            noiseValue = perlinNoise.noise(x * scale, y * scale, z * scale, octaves, persistence, lacunarity);
        } else {
            noiseValue = simplexNoise.noise(x * scale, y * scale, z * scale, octaves, persistence, lacunarity);
        }
        
        // 灏嗗€奸檺鍒跺湪-1鍒?鐨勮寖鍥村唴
        noiseValue = Math.max(-1.0, Math.min(noiseValue, 1.0));
        
        // 璁剧疆鍣０鍊艰緭鍑?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_NOISE_VALUE_ID, noiseValue);
        
        // 鐢熸垚瀵瑰簲鐨勯鑹诧紙鐏板害锛屽皢-1鍒?鏄犲皠鍒?鍒?鑼冨洿锛?
        float normalizedValue = (float) ((noiseValue + 1.0) / 2.0);
        
        // 鍒涘缓棰滆壊鍊硷紙杩欓噷浣跨敤鐏板害锛屼絾鍙互閫氳繃HSV鏉ュ垱寤烘洿涓板瘜鐨勯鑹叉槧灏勶級
        int r = (int) (normalizedValue * 255);
        int g = (int) (normalizedValue * 255);
        int b = (int) (normalizedValue * 255);
        int color = (r << 16) | (g << 8) | b;
        
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_NOISE_COLOR_ID, color);
    }
    
    // 鍒濆鍖栧櫔澹扮敓鎴愬櫒
    private void initializeNoiseGenerators(long seed) {
        currentSeed = seed;
        random.setSeed(seed);
        perlinNoise = new PerlinNoise(seed);
        simplexNoise = new SimplexNoise(seed);
    }
    
    /** Perlin鍣０瀹炵幇 */
    private class PerlinNoise {
        private int[] permutation;
        private static final int SIZE = 256;
        
        public PerlinNoise(long seed) {
            Random random = new Random(seed);
            permutation = new int[SIZE * 2];
            
            // 濉厖鍩烘湰鎺掑垪
            for (int i = 0; i < SIZE; i++) {
                permutation[i] = i;
            }
            
            // 鎵撲贡鎺掑垪
            for (int i = 0; i < SIZE; i++) {
                int j = random.nextInt(SIZE);
                int temp = permutation[i];
                permutation[i] = permutation[j];
                permutation[j] = temp;
            }
            
            // 澶嶅埗鎺掑垪浠ラ伩鍏嶆孩鍑?
            for (int i = 0; i < SIZE; i++) {
                permutation[SIZE + i] = permutation[i];
            }
        }
        
        // 鐢熸垚鍒嗗舰鍣０
        public double noise(double x, double y, double z, int octaves, double persistence, double lacunarity) {
            double total = 0;
            double frequency = 1;
            double amplitude = 1;
            double maxValue = 0;
            
            for (int i = 0; i < octaves; i++) {
                total += noise(x * frequency, y * frequency, z * frequency) * amplitude;
                maxValue += amplitude;
                amplitude *= persistence;
                frequency *= lacunarity;
            }
            
            return (total / maxValue);
        }
        
        // 鍩虹Perlin鍣０
        private double noise(double x, double y, double z) {
            // 鎵惧埌鍗曚綅绔嬫柟浣擄紝鍖呭惈杩欎釜鐐?
            int X = (int) Math.floor(x) & 255;
            int Y = (int) Math.floor(y) & 255;
            int Z = (int) Math.floor(z) & 255;
            
            // 鐩稿绔嬫柟浣撳師鐐圭殑xyz
            x -= Math.floor(x);
            y -= Math.floor(y);
            z -= Math.floor(z);
            
            // 璁＄畻娣″嚭鏇茬嚎
            double u = fade(x);
            double v = fade(y);
            double w = fade(z);
            
            // 鍝堝笇鍧愭爣
            int A = permutation[X] + Y;
            int AA = permutation[A] + Z;
            int AB = permutation[A + 1] + Z;
            int B = permutation[X + 1] + Y;
            int BA = permutation[B] + Z;
            int BB = permutation[B + 1] + Z;
            
            // 娣峰悎缁撴灉
            return lerp(w, lerp(v, lerp(u, grad(permutation[AA], x, y, z),
                                       grad(permutation[BA], x - 1, y, z)),
                              lerp(u, grad(permutation[AB], x, y - 1, z),
                                 grad(permutation[BB], x - 1, y - 1, z))),
                     lerp(v, lerp(u, grad(permutation[AA + 1], x, y, z - 1),
                               grad(permutation[BA + 1], x - 1, y, z - 1)),
                        lerp(u, grad(permutation[AB + 1], x, y - 1, z - 1),
                           grad(permutation[BB + 1], x - 1, y - 1, z - 1))));
        }
        
        private double fade(double t) {
            return t * t * t * (t * (t * 6 - 15) + 10);
        }
        
        private double lerp(double t, double a, double b) {
            return a + t * (b - a);
        }
        
        private double grad(int hash, double x, double y, double z) {
            // 杞崲涓?浣嶄负涓€涓柟鍚戝悜閲?
            int h = hash & 15;
            double u = h < 8 ? x : y;
            double v = h < 4 ? y : (h == 12 || h == 14 ? x : z);
            return ((h & 1) == 0 ? u : -u) + ((h & 2) == 0 ? v : -v);
        }
    }
    
    /** Simplex鍣０瀹炵幇 */
    private class SimplexNoise {
        private int[] perm = new int[512];
        private static final double F3 = 1.0 / 3.0;
        private static final double G3 = 1.0 / 6.0;
        
        public SimplexNoise(long seed) {
            Random random = new Random(seed);
            for (int i = 0; i < 256; i++) {
                perm[i] = i;
            }
            
            for (int i = 0; i < 256; i++) {
                int j = random.nextInt(256);
                int temp = perm[i];
                perm[i] = perm[j];
                perm[j] = temp;
            }
            
            for (int i = 0; i < 256; i++) {
                perm[i + 256] = perm[i];
            }
        }
        
        // 鐢熸垚鍒嗗舰鍣０
        public double noise(double x, double y, double z, int octaves, double persistence, double lacunarity) {
            double total = 0;
            double frequency = 1;
            double amplitude = 1;
            double maxValue = 0;
            
            for (int i = 0; i < octaves; i++) {
                total += noise(x * frequency, y * frequency, z * frequency) * amplitude;
                maxValue += amplitude;
                amplitude *= persistence;
                frequency *= lacunarity;
            }
            
            return (total / maxValue);
        }
        
        // 鍩虹Simplex鍣０
        private double noise(double xin, double yin, double zin) {
            double n0, n1, n2, n3; // 鍥涗釜鍗曠函褰㈣鐐圭殑鍣０璐＄尞
            
            // 灏嗚緭鍏ョ偣鏄犲皠鍒板崟绾舰绌洪棿
            double s = (xin + yin + zin) * F3;
            int i = fastfloor(xin + s);
            int j = fastfloor(yin + s);
            int k = fastfloor(zin + s);
            
            double t = (i + j + k) * G3;
            double X0 = i - t;
            double Y0 = j - t;
            double Z0 = k - t;
            double x0 = xin - X0;
            double y0 = yin - Y0;
            double z0 = zin - Z0;
            
            // 纭畾鍖呭惈鐐圭殑鍗曠函褰?
            int i1, j1, k1; // 绗簩涓鐐圭殑鍋忕Щ閲?
            int i2, j2, k2; // 绗笁涓鐐圭殑鍋忕Щ閲?
            
            if (x0 >= y0) {
                if (y0 >= z0) { i1=1; j1=0; k1=0; i2=1; j2=1; k2=0; } // X Y Z 椤哄簭
                else if (x0 >= z0) { i1=1; j1=0; k1=0; i2=1; j2=0; k2=1; } // X Z Y 椤哄簭
                else { i1=0; j1=0; k1=1; i2=1; j2=0; k2=1; } // Z X Y 椤哄簭
            } else {
                if (y0 < z0) { i1=0; j1=0; k1=1; i2=0; j2=1; k2=1; } // Z Y X 椤哄簭
                else if (x0 < z0) { i1=0; j1=1; k1=0; i2=0; j2=1; k2=1; } // Y Z X 椤哄簭
                else { i1=0; j1=1; k1=0; i2=1; j2=1; k2=0; } // Y X Z 椤哄簭
            }
            
            // 鐩稿浜庡叾浠栦笁涓鐐圭殑鍧愭爣
            double x1 = x0 - i1 + G3;
            double y1 = y0 - j1 + G3;
            double z1 = z0 - k1 + G3;
            double x2 = x0 - i2 + 2.0 * G3;
            double y2 = y0 - j2 + 2.0 * G3;
            double z2 = z0 - k2 + 2.0 * G3;
            double x3 = x0 - 1.0 + 3.0 * G3;
            double y3 = y0 - 1.0 + 3.0 * G3;
            double z3 = z0 - 1.0 + 3.0 * G3;
            
            // 鍝堝笇鍧愭爣
            int ii = i & 255;
            int jj = j & 255;
            int kk = k & 255;
            
            // 璁＄畻姣忎釜瑙掔偣鐨勮础鐚?
            double t0 = 0.6 - x0*x0 - y0*y0 - z0*z0;
            if (t0 < 0) n0 = 0.0;
            else {
                t0 *= t0;
                n0 = t0 * t0 * grad(perm[ii+perm[jj+perm[kk]]], x0, y0, z0);
            }
            
            double t1 = 0.6 - x1*x1 - y1*y1 - z1*z1;
            if (t1 < 0) n1 = 0.0;
            else {
                t1 *= t1;
                n1 = t1 * t1 * grad(perm[ii+i1+perm[jj+j1+perm[kk+k1]]], x1, y1, z1);
            }
            
            double t2 = 0.6 - x2*x2 - y2*y2 - z2*z2;
            if (t2 < 0) n2 = 0.0;
            else {
                t2 *= t2;
                n2 = t2 * t2 * grad(perm[ii+i2+perm[jj+j2+perm[kk+k2]]], x2, y2, z2);
            }
            
            double t3 = 0.6 - x3*x3 - y3*y3 - z3*z3;
            if (t3 < 0) n3 = 0.0;
            else {
                t3 *= t3;
                n3 = t3 * t3 * grad(perm[ii+1+perm[jj+1+perm[kk+1]]], x3, y3, z3);
            }
            
            // 灏嗗洓涓櫔澹板€肩缉鏀惧埌-1鍒?涔嬮棿
            return 32.0 * (n0 + n1 + n2 + n3);
        }
        
        private int fastfloor(double x) {
            return x > 0 ? (int) x : (int) x - 1;
        }
        
        private double grad(int hash, double x, double y, double z) {
            int h = hash & 15;
            double u = h < 8 ? x : y;
            double v = h < 4 ? y : (h == 12 || h == 14 ? x : z);
            return ((h & 1) == 0 ? u : -u) + ((h & 2) == 0 ? v : -v);
        }
    }
    
    /** Helper method to safely convert an input object to double. */
    private double getValueAsDouble(Object value, double defaultValue) {
        if (value instanceof Number) {
            return ((Number) value).doubleValue();
        }
        return defaultValue;
    }
    
    /** Helper method to safely convert an input object to int. */
    private int getValueAsInt(Object value, int defaultValue) {
        if (value instanceof Number) {
            return ((Number) value).intValue();
        }
        return defaultValue;
    }
    
    /** Helper method to safely convert an input object to long. */
    private long getValueAsLong(Object value, long defaultValue) {
        if (value instanceof Number) {
            return ((Number) value).longValue();
        }
        return defaultValue;
    }
} 
===FILE: C:\Users\navib\Desktop\development\NC\nodecraft\src\main\java\com\nodecraft\nodesystem\nodes\math\randomness\RandomListItemNode.java===
package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.math.randomness;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.Collections;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Random;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Random List Item Node: 浠庡垪琛ㄤ腑闅忔満閫夋嫨涓€涓垨澶氫釜椤圭洰
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "math.randomness.random_list_item",
    displayName = "闅忔満鍒楄〃椤?,
    description = "浠庡垪琛ㄤ腑闅忔満閫夋嫨涓€涓垨澶氫釜椤圭洰",
    category = "math.randomness"
)
public class RandomListItemNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_LIST_ID = "input_list";
    private static final String INPUT_COUNT_ID = "input_count";
    private static final String INPUT_ALLOW_DUPLICATES_ID = "input_allow_duplicates";
    private static final String INPUT_SEED_ID = "input_seed";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_ITEM_ID = "output_item";
    private static final String OUTPUT_ITEMS_ID = "output_items";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public RandomListItemNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "math.randomness.random_list_item");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_LIST_ID, "List", "杈撳叆鍒楄〃锛堝彲浠ユ槸浠讳綍瀵硅薄鍒楄〃锛?, NodeDataType.ANY, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_COUNT_ID, "Count", "瑕侀€夋嫨鐨勯」鐩暟閲?(榛樿=1)", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_ALLOW_DUPLICATES_ID, "Allow Duplicates", "鏄惁鍏佽閲嶅閫夋嫨鍚屼竴椤圭洰", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_SEED_ID, "Seed", "闅忔満鐢熸垚鍣ㄧ殑绉嶅瓙锛堝彲閫夛級", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_ITEM_ID, "Item", "闅忔満閫夋嫨鐨勫崟涓」鐩紙褰揅ount=1鏃讹級", NodeDataType.ANY, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_ITEMS_ID, "Items", "闅忔満閫夋嫨鐨勫涓」鐩紙鍒楄〃锛?, NodeDataType.ANY, this));
    }

    // 娣诲姞 getDescription 鏂规硶
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "浠庡垪琛ㄤ腑闅忔満閫夋嫨涓€涓垨澶氫釜椤圭洰";
    }

    // 娣诲姞 getDisplayName 鏂规硶
    @Override
    public String getDisplayName() {
        return "Random List Item";
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object listValue = inputValues.get(INPUT_LIST_ID);
        int count = getValueAsInt(inputValues.get(INPUT_COUNT_ID), 1);
        boolean allowDuplicates = getValueAsBoolean(inputValues.get(INPUT_ALLOW_DUPLICATES_ID), false);
        Object seedValue = inputValues.get(INPUT_SEED_ID);
        
        // 妫€鏌ュ垪琛ㄨ緭鍏?
        if (!(listValue instanceof List)) {
            // 澶勭悊闈炲垪琛ㄨ緭鍏?
            if (listValue == null) {
                // 濡傛灉涓簄ull锛岃缃┖杈撳嚭
                outputValues.put(OUTPUT_ITEM_ID, null);
                outputValues.put(OUTPUT_ITEMS_ID, Collections.emptyList());
                return;
            } else {
                // 灏嗗崟涓」鐩浆鎹负鍙湁涓€涓厓绱犵殑鍒楄〃
                List<Object> singleItemList = new ArrayList<>(1);
                singleItemList.add(listValue);
                listValue = singleItemList;
            }
        }
        
        // 杞崲涓哄垪琛?
        @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
        List<Object> inputList = (List<Object>) listValue;
        
        // 濡傛灉鍒楄〃涓虹┖锛屾彁鏃╄繑鍥?
        if (inputList.isEmpty()) {
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_ITEM_ID, null);
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_ITEMS_ID, Collections.emptyList());
            return;
        }
        
        // 纭繚count鍊兼湁鏁堬紙涓嶈兘涓鸿礋鏁颁笖涓嶈兘瓒呰繃鍒楄〃澶у皬锛岄櫎闈炲厑璁搁噸澶嶏級
        count = Math.max(0, count);
        if (!allowDuplicates && count > inputList.size()) {
            count = inputList.size();
        }
        
        // 鍒涘缓闅忔満鏁扮敓鎴愬櫒
        Random random;
        if (seedValue instanceof Number) {
            random = new Random(((Number) seedValue).longValue());
        } else {
            random = new Random();
        }
        
        // 缁撴灉瀛樺偍
        Object singleItem = null;
        List<Object> selectedItems = new ArrayList<>(count);
        
        // 閫夋嫨椤圭洰
        if (allowDuplicates) {
            // 鍏佽閲嶅锛氱畝鍗曢殢鏈洪€夋嫨count娆?
            for (int i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                int randomIndex = random.nextInt(inputList.size());
                Object selectedItem = inputList.get(randomIndex);
                selectedItems.add(selectedItem);
                
                // 濡傛灉鏄涓€涓€夋嫨鐨勯」鐩紝淇濆瓨涓哄崟椤硅緭鍑?
                if (i == 0) {
                    singleItem = selectedItem;
                }
            }
        } else {
            // 涓嶅厑璁搁噸澶嶏細鍒涘缓鍒楄〃鐨勫壇鏈苟鎵撲贡椤哄簭
            List<Object> shuffledList = new ArrayList<>(inputList);
            Collections.shuffle(shuffledList, random);
            
            // 閫夋嫨鍓峜ount涓」鐩?
            for (int i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                Object selectedItem = shuffledList.get(i);
                selectedItems.add(selectedItem);
                
                // 濡傛灉鏄涓€涓€夋嫨鐨勯」鐩紝淇濆瓨涓哄崟椤硅緭鍑?
                if (i == 0) {
                    singleItem = selectedItem;
                }
            }
        }
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_ITEM_ID, singleItem);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_ITEMS_ID, Collections.unmodifiableList(selectedItems));
    }
    
    /** Helper method to safely convert an input object to int. */
    private int getValueAsInt(Object value, int defaultValue) {
        if (value instanceof Number) {
            return ((Number) value).intValue();
        }
        return defaultValue;
    }
    
    /** Helper method to safely convert an input object to boolean. */
    private boolean getValueAsBoolean(Object value, boolean defaultValue) {
        if (value instanceof Boolean) {
            return (Boolean) value;
        } else if (value instanceof String) {
            return Boolean.parseBoolean((String) value);
        } else if (value instanceof Number) {
            return ((Number) value).intValue() != 0;
        }
        return defaultValue;
    }
}

package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.math.randomness;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.Collections;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Random; // 瀵煎叆 Random
import java.util.UUID; // 娣诲姞瀵煎叆

/**
 * Random Number Node: Generates random numbers within a specified range.
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "math.randomness.random_number",
    displayName = "闅忔満鏁?,
    description = "鍦ㄦ寚瀹氳寖鍥村唴鐢熸垚闅忔満鏁?,
    category = "math.randomness"
)
public class RandomNumberNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_COUNT_ID = "input_count";
    private static final String INPUT_MIN_ID = "input_min";
    private static final String INPUT_MAX_ID = "input_max";
    private static final String INPUT_SEED_ID = "input_seed";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    // 鏍规嵁 Count 杈撳嚭鍗曚釜鏁板瓧鎴栧垪琛?
    private static final String OUTPUT_RANDOM_ID = "output_random"; 

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public RandomNumberNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "math.randomness.random_number"); // 淇敼鏋勯€犲嚱鏁拌皟鐢?
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?(榛樿 Count=1, Min=0, Max=1, Seed=None)
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_COUNT_ID, "Count", "Number of random values to generate", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_MIN_ID, "Min", "Minimum random value (inclusive)", NodeDataType.ANY, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_MAX_ID, "Max", "Maximum random value (exclusive)", NodeDataType.ANY, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_SEED_ID, "Seed", "Optional seed for the random generator", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?(绫诲瀷涓?ANY锛屽洜涓哄彲鑳芥槸 Double 鎴?List<Double>)
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_RANDOM_ID, "Random", "The generated random number(s)", NodeDataType.ANY, this));
    }

    // 娣诲姞 getDescription 鏂规硶
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "Generates random numbers with optional Count, Min, Max, and Seed.";
    }

    // 娣诲姞 getDisplayName 鏂规硶
    @Override
    public String getDisplayName() {
        return "Random Number";
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) { // 淇敼涓?public
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        int count = getValueAsInt(inputValues.get(INPUT_COUNT_ID), 1);
        double min = getValueAsDouble(inputValues.get(INPUT_MIN_ID), 0.0);
        double max = getValueAsDouble(inputValues.get(INPUT_MAX_ID), 1.0);
        Object seedVal = inputValues.get(INPUT_SEED_ID);

        // 纭繚 min <= max
        if (min > max) {
            double temp = min;
            min = max;
            max = temp;
        }
        
        // 鍒涘缓 Random 瀹炰緥
        Random random;
        if (seedVal instanceof Number) {
            random = new Random(((Number) seedVal).longValue());
        } else {
            // 濡傛灉娌℃湁鎻愪緵绉嶅瓙锛屾瘡娆℃墽琛屼娇鐢ㄦ柊鐨?Random 瀹炰緥浠ヨ幏寰椾笉鍚岀粨鏋?
            // 鎴栬€呭彲浠ヤ粠 ExecutionContext 鑾峰彇涓€涓叏灞€/绋冲畾鐨勭瀛愶紵
            random = new Random(); 
        }

        // 鐢熸垚闅忔満鏁?
        if (count <= 0) {
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_RANDOM_ID, Collections.emptyList());
        } else if (count == 1) {
            double randomNumber = min + random.nextDouble() * (max - min);
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_RANDOM_ID, randomNumber);
        } else {
            List<Double> randomNumbers = new ArrayList<>(count);
            for (int i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                double randomNumber = min + random.nextDouble() * (max - min);
                randomNumbers.add(randomNumber);
            }
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_RANDOM_ID, Collections.unmodifiableList(randomNumbers));
        }
    }
    
    /** Helper method to safely convert an input object to double. */
    private double getValueAsDouble(Object value, double defaultValue) {
        if (value instanceof Number) {
            return ((Number) value).doubleValue();
        }
        return defaultValue;
    }
    
    /** Helper method to safely convert an input object to int. */
    private int getValueAsInt(Object value, int defaultValue) {
        if (value instanceof Number) {
            double doubleVal = ((Number) value).doubleValue();
            if (doubleVal >= Integer.MIN_VALUE && doubleVal <= Integer.MAX_VALUE) {
                 return (int) Math.round(doubleVal);
            }
        }
        return defaultValue;
    }

    // --- Getters/Setters (涓嶉渶瑕? ---

    // --- (鍙?搴忓垪鍖?(涓嶉渶瑕? ---
}

package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.math.randomness;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import net.minecraft.util.math.Vec3d;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.Collections;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Random; // 瀵煎叆 Random
import java.util.UUID; // 娣诲姞瀵煎叆

/**
 * Random Vector Node: Generates random vectors within a specified bounding box.
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "math.randomness.random_vector",
    displayName = "闅忔満鍚戦噺",
    description = "鍦ㄦ寚瀹氳竟鐣屾鍐呯敓鎴愰殢鏈哄悜閲?,
    category = "math.randomness"
)
public class RandomVectorNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_COUNT_ID = "input_count";
    private static final String INPUT_MIN_CORNER_ID = "input_min_corner";
    private static final String INPUT_MAX_CORNER_ID = "input_max_corner";
    private static final String INPUT_SEED_ID = "input_seed";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    // 鏍规嵁 Count 杈撳嚭鍗曚釜鍚戦噺鎴栧垪琛?
    private static final String OUTPUT_RANDOM_ID = "output_random_vector"; 

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public RandomVectorNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "math.randomness.random_vector"); // 淇敼鏋勯€犲嚱鏁拌皟鐢?
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_COUNT_ID, "Count", "Number of random vectors", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_MIN_CORNER_ID, "Min Corner", "Minimum corner of the bounding box", NodeDataType.VECTOR, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_MAX_CORNER_ID, "Max Corner", "Maximum corner of the bounding box", NodeDataType.VECTOR, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_SEED_ID, "Seed", "Optional random seed", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?(绫诲瀷涓?ANY锛屽洜涓哄彲鑳芥槸 Vec3d 鎴?List<Vec3d>)
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_RANDOM_ID, "Random", "The generated random vector(s)", NodeDataType.ANY, this));
    }

    // 娣诲姞 getDescription 鏂规硶
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "Generates random vectors within a bounding box.";
    }

    // 娣诲姞 getDisplayName 鏂规硶
    @Override
    public String getDisplayName() {
        return "Random Vector";
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) { // 淇敼涓?public
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        int count = getValueAsInt(inputValues.get(INPUT_COUNT_ID), 1);
        Vec3d minCorner = getValueAsVec3d(inputValues.get(INPUT_MIN_CORNER_ID), Vec3d.ZERO);
        Vec3d maxCorner = getValueAsVec3d(inputValues.get(INPUT_MAX_CORNER_ID), new Vec3d(1, 1, 1));
        Object seedVal = inputValues.get(INPUT_SEED_ID);

        // 纭繚 min <= max for each component
        double minX = Math.min(minCorner.x, maxCorner.x);
        double minY = Math.min(minCorner.y, maxCorner.y);
        double minZ = Math.min(minCorner.z, maxCorner.z);
        double maxX = Math.max(minCorner.x, maxCorner.x);
        double maxY = Math.max(minCorner.y, maxCorner.y);
        double maxZ = Math.max(minCorner.z, maxCorner.z);
        
        // 鍒涘缓 Random 瀹炰緥
        Random random;
        if (seedVal instanceof Number) {
            random = new Random(((Number) seedVal).longValue());
        } else {
            random = new Random(); 
        }

        // 鐢熸垚闅忔満鍚戦噺
        if (count <= 0) {
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_RANDOM_ID, Collections.emptyList());
        } else if (count == 1) {
            double randomX = minX + random.nextDouble() * (maxX - minX);
            double randomY = minY + random.nextDouble() * (maxY - minY);
            double randomZ = minZ + random.nextDouble() * (maxZ - minZ);
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_RANDOM_ID, new Vec3d(randomX, randomY, randomZ));
        } else {
            List<Vec3d> randomVectors = new ArrayList<>(count);
            for (int i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                double randomX = minX + random.nextDouble() * (maxX - minX);
                double randomY = minY + random.nextDouble() * (maxY - minY);
                double randomZ = minZ + random.nextDouble() * (maxZ - minZ);
                randomVectors.add(new Vec3d(randomX, randomY, randomZ));
            }
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_RANDOM_ID, Collections.unmodifiableList(randomVectors));
        }
    }
    
    /** Helper method to safely convert an input object to int. */
    private int getValueAsInt(Object value, int defaultValue) {
        if (value instanceof Number) {
            double doubleVal = ((Number) value).doubleValue();
            if (doubleVal >= Integer.MIN_VALUE && doubleVal <= Integer.MAX_VALUE) {
                 return (int) Math.round(doubleVal);
            }
        }
        return defaultValue;
    }
    
    /** Helper method to safely convert an input object to Vec3d. */
    private Vec3d getValueAsVec3d(Object value, Vec3d defaultValue) {
        if (value instanceof Vec3d) {
            return (Vec3d) value;
        }
        return defaultValue;
    }

    // --- Getters/Setters (涓嶉渶瑕? ---

    // --- (鍙?搴忓垪鍖?(涓嶉渶瑕? ---
} 
===FILE: C:\Users\navib\Desktop\development\NC\nodecraft\src\main\java\com\nodecraft\nodesystem\nodes\math\trigonometry\ArcCosNode.java===
package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.math.trigonometry;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * ArcCos Node: Computes the arc cosine of a value (result in radians).
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "math.trigonometry.arccos",
    displayName = "鍙嶄綑寮﹀嚱鏁?(ArcCos)",
    description = "璁＄畻杈撳叆鍊肩殑鍙嶄綑寮﹀€硷紙缁撴灉浠ュ姬搴︿负鍗曚綅锛?,
    category = "math.trigonometry"
)
public class ArcCosNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_VALUE_ID = "input_value"; // Range [-1, 1]

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_ANGLE_ID = "output_angle_rad";
    
    private String description = "璁＄畻杈撳叆鍊肩殑鍙嶄綑寮﹀€硷紙缁撴灉浠ュ姬搴︿负鍗曚綅锛?;

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public ArcCosNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "math.trigonometry.arccos");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_VALUE_ID, "Value", "Input value [-1, 1]", NodeDataType.ANY, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_ANGLE_ID, "Angle (rad)", "Result acos(Value)", NodeDataType.DOUBLE, this));
    }

    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return this.description;
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object val = inputValues.get(INPUT_VALUE_ID);

        // 妫€鏌ヨ緭鍏ユ槸鍚︿负鏁板瓧
        if (val instanceof Number) {
            double value = ((Number) val).doubleValue();
            
            // Math.acos 杈撳叆鑼冨洿鏄?[-1, 1], 瓒呭嚭鑼冨洿杩斿洖 NaN
            double result = Math.acos(value);
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_ANGLE_ID, result); // result is NaN if value is outside [-1, 1]
        } else {
            // 濡傛灉杈撳叆鏃犳晥
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_ANGLE_ID, Double.NaN);
        }
    }

    // --- Getters/Setters (涓嶉渶瑕? ---

    // --- (鍙?搴忓垪鍖?(涓嶉渶瑕? ---
}

/**
 * ArcTan Node: Computes the arc tangent of a value (result in radians).
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "math.trigonometry.arctan",
    displayName = "鍙嶆鍒囧嚱鏁?(ArcTan)",
    description = "璁＄畻杈撳叆鍊肩殑鍙嶆鍒囧€硷紙缁撴灉浠ュ姬搴︿负鍗曚綅锛?,
    category = "math.trigonometry"
)
public class ArcTanNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_VALUE_ID = "input_value";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_ANGLE_ID = "output_angle_rad";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public ArcTanNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "math.trigonometry.arctan");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_VALUE_ID, "Value", "Input value", NodeDataType.ANY, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_ANGLE_ID, "Angle (rad)", "Result atan(Value)", NodeDataType.DOUBLE, this));
    }

    // 娣诲姞 getDescription 鏂规硶
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "Outputs the arc tangent of the input value (in radians).";
    }

    // 娣诲姞 getDisplayName 鏂规硶
    @Override
    public String getDisplayName() {
        return "Arc Tangent (Atan)";
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object val = inputValues.get(INPUT_VALUE_ID);

        // 妫€鏌ヨ緭鍏ユ槸鍚︿负鏁板瓧
        if (val instanceof Number) {
            double value = ((Number) val).doubleValue();
            double result = Math.atan(value);
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_ANGLE_ID, result);
        } else {
            // 濡傛灉杈撳叆鏃犳晥
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_ANGLE_ID, Double.NaN);
        }
    }

    // --- Getters/Setters (涓嶉渶瑕? ---

/**
 * Cosine Node: Computes the cosine of an angle (in radians).
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "math.trigonometry.cosine",
    displayName = "浣欏鸡鍑芥暟 (Cos)",
    description = "璁＄畻瑙掑害鐨勪綑寮﹀€硷紙杈撳叆涓哄姬搴︼級",
    category = "math.trigonometry"

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_COSINE_ID = "output_cosine";

        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_COSINE_ID, "Cosine", "Result cos(Angle)", NodeDataType.DOUBLE, this));
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object val = inputValues.get(INPUT_ANGLE_ID);

        // 妫€鏌ヨ緭鍏ユ槸鍚︿负鏁板瓧
        if (val instanceof Number) {
            double angleRad = ((Number) val).doubleValue();

            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_COSINE_ID, result);
        } else {
            // 濡傛灉杈撳叆鏃犳晥
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_COSINE_ID, Double.NaN);
        }
    }

    // --- Getters/Setters (涓嶉渶瑕? ---

package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.math.trigonometry;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * DegreesToRadians Node: Converts an angle from degrees to radians.
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "math.trigonometry.degrees_to_radians",
    displayName = "瑙掑害杞姬搴?,
    description = "灏嗚搴︿粠搴︽暟杞崲涓哄姬搴?,
    category = "math.trigonometry"
)
public class DegreesToRadiansNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_DEGREES_ID = "input_degrees";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_RADIANS_ID = "output_radians";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public DegreesToRadiansNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "math.trigonometry.deg2rad");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_DEGREES_ID, "Degrees", "Angle in degrees", NodeDataType.ANY, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_RADIANS_ID, "Radians", "Angle in radians", NodeDataType.DOUBLE, this));
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object val = inputValues.get(INPUT_DEGREES_ID);

        // 妫€鏌ヨ緭鍏ユ槸鍚︿负鏁板瓧
        if (val instanceof Number) {
            double degrees = ((Number) val).doubleValue();
            double radians = Math.toRadians(degrees);
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_RADIANS_ID, radians);
        } else {
            // 濡傛灉杈撳叆鏃犳晥
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_RADIANS_ID, Double.NaN);
        }
    }

    // --- Getters/Setters (涓嶉渶瑕? ---

    // --- (鍙?搴忓垪鍖?(涓嶉渶瑕? ---

    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "Converts an angle from degrees to radians.";
    }

    @Override
    public String getDisplayName() {
        return "Degrees to Radians";
    }
}

package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.math.trigonometry;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Pi Node: Outputs the constant value of Pi.
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "math.trigonometry.pi",
    displayName = "鍦嗗懆鐜?,
    description = "杈撳嚭鏁板甯告暟蟺鐨勫€?,
    category = "math.trigonometry"
)
public class PiNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 (鏃? ---

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_PI_ID = "output_pi";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public PiNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "math.trigonometry.pi");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_PI_ID, "Pi", "The value of Pi", NodeDataType.DOUBLE, this));
        
        // 鍦ㄦ瀯閫犲嚱鏁颁腑鐩存帴璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊硷紝鍥犱负瀹冩案杩滀笉鍙?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_PI_ID, Math.PI);
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 甯搁噺鑺傜偣锛宲rocessNode 涓虹┖锛屽€煎湪鏋勯€犲嚱鏁颁腑璁剧疆
        // 纭繚鍊间粛鐒跺瓨鍦?(铏界劧涓嶅お鍙兘琚竻闄?
        if (!outputValues.containsKey(OUTPUT_PI_ID)) {
             outputValues.put(OUTPUT_PI_ID, Math.PI);
        }
    }

    // --- Getters/Setters (涓嶉渶瑕? ---

    // --- (鍙?搴忓垪鍖?(涓嶉渶瑕? ---

    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "Outputs the mathematical constant Pi.";
    }

    @Override
    public String getDisplayName() {
        return "Pi (蟺)";
    }
}

/**
 * Tangent Node: Computes the tangent of an angle (in radians).
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "math.trigonometry.tangent",
    displayName = "姝ｅ垏鍑芥暟 (Tan)",
    description = "璁＄畻瑙掑害鐨勬鍒囧€硷紙杈撳叆涓哄姬搴︼級",
    category = "math.trigonometry"

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_ANGLE_ID = "input_angle_rad";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_TANGENT_ID = "output_tangent";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public TangentNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "math.trigonometry.tangent");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_ANGLE_ID, "Angle (rad)", "Input angle in radians", NodeDataType.ANY, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_TANGENT_ID, "Tangent", "Result tan(Angle)", NodeDataType.DOUBLE, this));
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object val = inputValues.get(INPUT_ANGLE_ID);

        // 妫€鏌ヨ緭鍏ユ槸鍚︿负鏁板瓧
        if (val instanceof Number) {
            double angleRad = ((Number) val).doubleValue();
            
            // 铏界劧 Math.tan() 浼氬鐞嗘帴杩?pi/2 + k*pi 鐨勬儏鍐碉紙杩斿洖澶х殑姝?璐熷€硷級锛?
            // 浣嗙悊璁轰笂鏄棤绌峰ぇ銆傛牴鎹渶瑕佸彲浠ユ坊鍔犳鏌ユ垨淇濇寔 Math.tan() 鐨勮涓恒€?
            double result = Math.tan(angleRad);
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_TANGENT_ID, result);
        } else {
            // 濡傛灉杈撳叆鏃犳晥
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_TANGENT_ID, Double.NaN);
        }
    }

    // --- Getters/Setters (涓嶉渶瑕? ---

    // --- (鍙?搴忓垪鍖?(涓嶉渶瑕? ---

    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "Outputs the tangent of the input angle (in radians).";
    }

    @Override
    public String getDisplayName() {
        return "Tangent (Tan)";
    }
}

package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.math.vector;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import net.minecraft.util.math.BlockPos;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Construct Coordinate Node: 浠庝笁涓暣鏁版瀯寤烘柟鍧楀潗鏍?
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "math.vector.construct_coordinate",
    displayName = "鏋勫缓鍧愭爣",
    description = "浠嶺銆乊銆乑鍒嗛噺鏋勫缓鍧愭爣",
    category = "math.vector"
)
public class ConstructCoordinateNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_X_ID = "input_x";
    private static final String INPUT_Y_ID = "input_y";
    private static final String INPUT_Z_ID = "input_z";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_COORDINATE_ID = "output_coordinate";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public ConstructCoordinateNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "math.vector.construct_coordinate");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?(鎺ュ彈浠讳綍鏁板€肩被鍨嬶紝浣嗕細杞崲涓烘暣鏁?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_X_ID, "X", "X coordinate (integer)", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_Y_ID, "Y", "Y coordinate (integer)", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_Z_ID, "Z", "Z coordinate (integer)", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_COORDINATE_ID, "Coordinate", "Block position (integer coordinates)", NodeDataType.BLOCK_POS, this));
    }

    // 娣诲姞 getDescription 鏂规硶
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "Creates a block position from X, Y, Z integer components";
    }

    // 娣诲姞 getDisplayName 鏂规硶
    @Override
    public String getDisplayName() {
        return "Construct Coordinate";
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊煎苟杞崲涓烘暣鏁?
        int x = getValueAsInt(inputValues.get(INPUT_X_ID), 0);
        int y = getValueAsInt(inputValues.get(INPUT_Y_ID), 0);
        int z = getValueAsInt(inputValues.get(INPUT_Z_ID), 0);
        
        // 鍒涘缓BlockPos锛堟柟鍧楀潗鏍囷級
        BlockPos coordinate = new BlockPos(x, y, z);
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_COORDINATE_ID, coordinate);
    }
    
    /**
     * 灏嗚緭鍏ュ€煎畨鍏ㄥ湴杞崲涓烘暣鏁?
     * @param value 杈撳叆鍊?
     * @param defaultValue 榛樿鍊?
     * @return 鏁存暟鍊?
     */
    private int getValueAsInt(Object value, int defaultValue) {
        if (value instanceof Number) {
            // 灏嗘暟鍊艰垗鍏ヤ负鏈€鎺ヨ繎鐨勬暣鏁?
            return (int) Math.round(((Number) value).doubleValue());
        }
        return defaultValue;
    }
}

package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.math.vector;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import net.minecraft.util.math.Vec3d;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Construct Vector Node: Creates a vector from X, Y, and Z components.
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "math.vector.construct",
    displayName = "鏋勯€犲悜閲?,
    description = "浠嶺銆乊銆乑鍒嗛噺鍒涘缓鍚戦噺",
    category = "math.vector"
)
public class ConstructVectorNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_X_ID = "input_x";
    private static final String INPUT_Y_ID = "input_y";
    private static final String INPUT_Z_ID = "input_z";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_VECTOR_ID = "output_vector";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public ConstructVectorNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "math.vector.construct");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?(鍏佽 ANY 鏁板瓧绫诲瀷锛岄粯璁ゅ€间负 0)
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_X_ID, "X", "X component", NodeDataType.ANY, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_Y_ID, "Y", "Y component", NodeDataType.ANY, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_Z_ID, "Z", "Z component", NodeDataType.ANY, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_VECTOR_ID, "Vector", "Resulting vector", NodeDataType.VECTOR, this));
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊硷紝濡傛灉杈撳叆鏃犳晥鎴栨湭杩炴帴锛屽垯榛樿涓?0.0
        double x = getValueAsDouble(inputValues.get(INPUT_X_ID), 0.0);
        double y = getValueAsDouble(inputValues.get(INPUT_Y_ID), 0.0);
        double z = getValueAsDouble(inputValues.get(INPUT_Z_ID), 0.0);
        
        // 鍒涘缓 Vec3d
        Vec3d result = new Vec3d(x, y, z);
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_VECTOR_ID, result);
    }
    
    /**
     * Helper method to safely convert an input object to double.
     * @param value The input object.
     * @param defaultValue The value to return if conversion fails.
     * @return The double value or the default value.
     */
    private double getValueAsDouble(Object value, double defaultValue) {
        if (value instanceof Number) {
            return ((Number) value).doubleValue();
        }
        return defaultValue;
    }

    // --- Getters/Setters (涓嶉渶瑕? ---

    // --- (鍙?搴忓垪鍖?(涓嶉渶瑕? ---

    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "Creates a vector from X, Y, Z components.";
    }

    @Override
    public String getDisplayName() {
        return "Construct Vector";
    }
}

package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.math.vector;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import net.minecraft.util.math.Vec3d;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Cross Product Node: Computes the cross product of two vectors (A x B).
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "math.vector.cross_product",
    displayName = "鍙夌Н",
    description = "璁＄畻涓や釜鍚戦噺鐨勫弶绉紙A 脳 B锛?,
    category = "math.vector"
)
public class CrossProductNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_A_ID = "input_vector_a";
    private static final String INPUT_B_ID = "input_vector_b";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_CROSS_PRODUCT_ID = "output_cross_product";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public CrossProductNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "math.vector.cross_product");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_A_ID, "Vector A", "First vector", NodeDataType.VECTOR, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_B_ID, "Vector B", "Second vector", NodeDataType.VECTOR, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_CROSS_PRODUCT_ID, "Cross Product", "Result A x B", NodeDataType.VECTOR, this));
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object valA = inputValues.get(INPUT_A_ID);
        Object valB = inputValues.get(INPUT_B_ID);

        // 妫€鏌ヨ緭鍏ユ槸鍚︿负 Vec3d
        if (valA instanceof Vec3d && valB instanceof Vec3d) {
            Vec3d a = (Vec3d) valA;
            Vec3d b = (Vec3d) valB;
            
            Vec3d crossProduct = a.crossProduct(b);
            
            // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_CROSS_PRODUCT_ID, crossProduct);
        } else {
            // 濡傛灉杈撳叆鏃犳晥
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_CROSS_PRODUCT_ID, Vec3d.ZERO); // 鎴栬€?null
        }
    }

    // --- Getters/Setters (涓嶉渶瑕? ---

    // --- (鍙?搴忓垪鍖?(涓嶉渶瑕? ---

    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "Outputs the cross product of vectors A and B.";
    }

    @Override
    public String getDisplayName() {
        return "Cross Product (x)";
    }
}

/**
 * Deconstruct Coordinate Node: 灏嗘柟鍧楀潗鏍囧垎瑙ｄ负X銆乊銆乑鏁存暟鍊?
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "math.vector.deconstruct_coordinate",
    displayName = "鍒嗚В鍧愭爣",
    description = "灏嗗潗鏍囧垎瑙ｄ负X銆乊銆乑鍒嗛噺",
    category = "math.vector"
)
public class DeconstructCoordinateNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_COORDINATE_ID = "input_coordinate";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---

    private static final String OUTPUT_Y_ID = "output_y";
    private static final String OUTPUT_Z_ID = "output_z";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public DeconstructCoordinateNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "math.vector.deconstruct_coordinate");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_COORDINATE_ID, "Coordinate", "Block position (integer coordinates)", NodeDataType.BLOCK_POS, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_X_ID, "X", "X coordinate (integer)", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_Y_ID, "Y", "Y coordinate (integer)", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_Z_ID, "Z", "Z coordinate (integer)", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
    }

    // 娣诲姞 getDescription 鏂规硶
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "Extracts X, Y, Z integer components from a block position";
    }

    // 娣诲姞 getDisplayName 鏂规硶
    @Override
    public String getDisplayName() {
        return "Deconstruct Coordinate";
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object coordinate = inputValues.get(INPUT_COORDINATE_ID);
        
        // 妫€鏌ヨ緭鍏ユ槸鍚︿负BlockPos
        if (coordinate instanceof BlockPos) {
            BlockPos pos = (BlockPos) coordinate;
            
            // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_X_ID, pos.getX());
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_Y_ID, pos.getY());
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_Z_ID, pos.getZ());
        } else {
            // 濡傛灉杈撳叆鏃犳晥锛岃緭鍑洪粯璁ゅ€?
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_X_ID, 0);
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_Y_ID, 0);
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_Z_ID, 0);
        }
    }
}

/**
 * Deconstruct Vector Node: Outputs the X, Y, and Z components of a vector.
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "math.vector.deconstruct",
    displayName = "瑙ｆ瀯鍚戦噺",
    description = "杈撳嚭鍚戦噺鐨刋銆乊銆乑鍒嗛噺",

    private static final String OUTPUT_Y_ID = "output_y";
    private static final String OUTPUT_Z_ID = "output_z";

        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "math.vector.deconstruct");

        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_Y_ID, "Y", "Y component", NodeDataType.DOUBLE, this));

        return "Deconstruct Vector";
    }

            Vec3d vector = (Vec3d) val;
            
            // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_X_ID, vector.getX());
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_Y_ID, vector.getY());
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_Z_ID, vector.getZ());

            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_Y_ID, 0.0);
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_Z_ID, 0.0);

    }
