package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.math.vector;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import net.minecraft.util.math.Vec3d;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Distance Node: 璁＄畻涓や釜鐐逛箣闂寸殑璺濈
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "math.vector.distance",
    displayName = "璺濈",
    description = "璁＄畻涓や釜鐐逛箣闂寸殑璺濈",
    category = "math.vector"
)
public class DistanceNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_A_ID = "input_point_a";
    private static final String INPUT_B_ID = "input_point_b";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_DISTANCE_ID = "output_distance";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public DistanceNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "math.vector.distance");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_A_ID, "Point A", "First point", NodeDataType.VECTOR, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_B_ID, "Point B", "Second point", NodeDataType.VECTOR, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_DISTANCE_ID, "Distance", "Distance between A and B", NodeDataType.DOUBLE, this));
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object valA = inputValues.get(INPUT_A_ID);
        Object valB = inputValues.get(INPUT_B_ID);

        // 妫€鏌ヨ緭鍏ユ槸鍚︿负 Vec3d
        if (valA instanceof Vec3d && valB instanceof Vec3d) {
            Vec3d a = (Vec3d) valA;
            Vec3d b = (Vec3d) valB;
            
            double distance = a.distanceTo(b);
            
            // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_DISTANCE_ID, distance);
        } else {
            // 濡傛灉杈撳叆鏃犳晥
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_DISTANCE_ID, 0.0); // 鎴栬€?NaN
        }
    }

    // --- Getters/Setters (涓嶉渶瑕? ---

    // --- (鍙?搴忓垪鍖?(涓嶉渶瑕? ---

    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "Outputs the distance between point A and point B.";
    }

    @Override
    public String getDisplayName() {
        return "Distance";
    }
}

package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.math.vector;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import net.minecraft.util.math.Vec3d;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Dot Product Node: Computes the dot product of two vectors (A 路 B).
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "math.vector.dot_product",
    displayName = "鐐圭Н",
    description = "璁＄畻涓や釜鍚戦噺鐨勭偣绉紙A 路 B锛?,
    category = "math.vector"
)
public class DotProductNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 鑺傜偣灞炴€?---
    private String description = "璁＄畻涓や釜鍚戦噺鐨勭偣绉紙A 路 B锛?;

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_A_ID = "input_vector_a";
    private static final String INPUT_B_ID = "input_vector_b";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_DOT_PRODUCT_ID = "output_dot_product";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public DotProductNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "math.vector.dot_product");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_A_ID, "Vector A", "First vector", NodeDataType.VECTOR, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_B_ID, "Vector B", "Second vector", NodeDataType.VECTOR, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_DOT_PRODUCT_ID, "Dot Product", "Result A 路 B", NodeDataType.DOUBLE, this));
    }

    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return this.description;
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object valA = inputValues.get(INPUT_A_ID);
        Object valB = inputValues.get(INPUT_B_ID);

        // 妫€鏌ヨ緭鍏ユ槸鍚︿负 Vec3d
        if (valA instanceof Vec3d && valB instanceof Vec3d) {
            Vec3d a = (Vec3d) valA;
            Vec3d b = (Vec3d) valB;
            
            double dotProduct = a.dotProduct(b);
            
            // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_DOT_PRODUCT_ID, dotProduct);
        } else {
            // 濡傛灉杈撳叆鏃犳晥
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_DOT_PRODUCT_ID, 0.0); // 鎴栬€?NaN
        }
    }

    // --- Getters/Setters (涓嶉渶瑕? ---

    // --- (鍙?搴忓垪鍖?(涓嶉渶瑕? ---
}

package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.math.vector;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import net.minecraft.util.math.Vec3d;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Midpoint Node: 璁＄畻涓や釜鍚戦噺鐐逛箣闂寸殑涓偣
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "math.vector.midpoint",
    displayName = "涓偣",
    description = "璁＄畻涓や釜鍚戦噺鐐逛箣闂寸殑涓偣",
    category = "math.vector"
)
public class MidpointNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 鑺傜偣灞炴€?---
    private String description = "璁＄畻涓や釜鍚戦噺鐐逛箣闂寸殑涓偣";

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_A_ID = "input_point_a";
    private static final String INPUT_B_ID = "input_point_b";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_MIDPOINT_ID = "output_midpoint";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public MidpointNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "math.vector.midpoint");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_A_ID, "Point A", "First point", NodeDataType.VECTOR, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_B_ID, "Point B", "Second point", NodeDataType.VECTOR, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_MIDPOINT_ID, "Midpoint", "The midpoint between A and B", NodeDataType.VECTOR, this));
    }

    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return this.description;
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object valA = inputValues.get(INPUT_A_ID);
        Object valB = inputValues.get(INPUT_B_ID);

        // 妫€鏌ヨ緭鍏ユ槸鍚︿负 Vec3d
        if (valA instanceof Vec3d && valB instanceof Vec3d) {
            Vec3d a = (Vec3d) valA;
            Vec3d b = (Vec3d) valB;
            
            // 璁＄畻涓偣
            Vec3d midpoint = new Vec3d(
                (a.x + b.x) / 2.0,
                (a.y + b.y) / 2.0,
                (a.z + b.z) / 2.0
            );
            
            // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_MIDPOINT_ID, midpoint);
        } else {
            // 濡傛灉杈撳叆鏃犳晥锛岃緭鍑洪浂鍚戦噺
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_MIDPOINT_ID, Vec3d.ZERO);
        }
    }
}

package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.math.vector;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import net.minecraft.util.math.Vec3d;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Normalize Vector Node: Normalizes a vector to unit length.
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "math.vector.normalize",
    displayName = "鍚戦噺褰掍竴鍖?,
    description = "灏嗗悜閲忓綊涓€鍖栦负鍗曚綅闀垮害",
    category = "math.vector"
)
public class NormalizeVectorNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_VECTOR_ID = "input_vector";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_NORMALIZED_ID = "output_normalized_vector";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public NormalizeVectorNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "math.vector.normalize");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_VECTOR_ID, "Vector", "Input vector", NodeDataType.VECTOR, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_NORMALIZED_ID, "Normalized", "Normalized vector", NodeDataType.VECTOR, this));
    }

    // 娣诲姞 getDescription 鏂规硶
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "Outputs the normalized (unit length) version of the input vector.";
    }

    // 娣诲姞 getDisplayName 鏂规硶
    @Override
    public String getDisplayName() {
        return "Normalize Vector";
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object val = inputValues.get(INPUT_VECTOR_ID);

        // 妫€鏌ヨ緭鍏ユ槸鍚︿负 Vec3d
        if (val instanceof Vec3d) {
            Vec3d vector = (Vec3d) val;
            
            // Vec3d.normalize() 澶勭悊闆跺悜閲忥紙杩斿洖闆跺悜閲忥級
            Vec3d normalized = vector.normalize();
            
            // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_NORMALIZED_ID, normalized);
        } else {
            // 濡傛灉杈撳叆鏃犳晥
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_NORMALIZED_ID, Vec3d.ZERO); // 鎴栬€?null
        }
    }

    // --- Getters/Setters (涓嶉渶瑕? ---

    // --- (鍙?搴忓垪鍖?(涓嶉渶瑕? ---
} 
===FILE: C:\Users\navib\Desktop\development\NC\nodecraft\src\main\java\com\nodecraft\nodesystem\nodes\math\vector\RotateVectorNode.java===
package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.math.vector;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import net.minecraft.util.math.Vec3d;
// 浣跨敤 JOML 鐨?Quaternionf 鍜?Vector3f 杩涜鏃嬭浆璁＄畻
import org.joml.Quaternionf;
import org.joml.Vector3f;
import org.joml.AxisAngle4f;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Rotate Vector Node: Rotates a vector around an axis by a given angle.
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "math.vector.rotate",
    displayName = "鏃嬭浆鍚戦噺",
    description = "缁曟寚瀹氳酱鏃嬭浆鍚戦噺",
    category = "math.vector"
)
public class RotateVectorNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_VECTOR_ID = "input_vector";
    private static final String INPUT_AXIS_ID = "input_axis";
    private static final String INPUT_ANGLE_ID = "input_angle_rad"; // Angle in radians

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_ROTATED_VECTOR_ID = "output_rotated_vector";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public RotateVectorNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "math.vector.rotate");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_VECTOR_ID, "Vector", "Vector to rotate", NodeDataType.VECTOR, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_AXIS_ID, "Axis", "Axis of rotation (will be normalized)", NodeDataType.VECTOR, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_ANGLE_ID, "Angle (rad)", "Angle of rotation in radians", NodeDataType.ANY, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_ROTATED_VECTOR_ID, "Rotated Vector", "Resulting rotated vector", NodeDataType.VECTOR, this));
    }

    // 娣诲姞 getDescription 鏂规硶
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "Rotates a vector around an axis by an angle (radians).";
    }

    // 娣诲姞 getDisplayName 鏂规硶
    @Override
    public String getDisplayName() {
        return "Rotate Vector";
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object valVector = inputValues.get(INPUT_VECTOR_ID);
        Object valAxis = inputValues.get(INPUT_AXIS_ID);
        Object valAngle = inputValues.get(INPUT_ANGLE_ID);

        // 妫€鏌ヨ緭鍏ョ被鍨?
        if (valVector instanceof Vec3d && valAxis instanceof Vec3d && valAngle instanceof Number) {
            Vec3d vector = (Vec3d) valVector;
            Vec3d axis = (Vec3d) valAxis;
            double angleRad = ((Number) valAngle).doubleValue();
            
            // 妫€鏌ヨ酱鍚戦噺鏄惁涓洪浂鍚戦噺
            if (axis.lengthSquared() < 1e-10) {
                 // 濡傛灉杞存槸闆跺悜閲忥紝鏃嬭浆鏃犳晥锛岀洿鎺ヨ緭鍑哄師鍚戦噺
                 outputValues.put(OUTPUT_ROTATED_VECTOR_ID, vector);
                 return;
            }
            
            // 褰掍竴鍖栬酱鍚戦噺
            Vec3d normalizedAxis = axis.normalize();
            
            // 浣跨敤 JOML 杩涜鏃嬭浆
            // 1. 灏?Vec3d 杞崲涓?Vector3f
            Vector3f vecToRotate = new Vector3f((float)vector.x, (float)vector.y, (float)vector.z);
            Vector3f rotationAxis = new Vector3f((float)normalizedAxis.x, (float)normalizedAxis.y, (float)normalizedAxis.z);
            
            // 2. 鍒涘缓鏃嬭浆鍥涘厓鏁?
            // Quaternionf rotation = new Quaternionf().rotateAxis((float)angleRad, rotationAxis);
            // 鎴栬€呬娇鐢?AxisAngle4f
            AxisAngle4f axisAngle = new AxisAngle4f((float)angleRad, rotationAxis);
            Quaternionf rotation = new Quaternionf(axisAngle);
            
            // 3. 搴旂敤鏃嬭浆
            Vector3f rotatedVec = rotation.transform(vecToRotate);
            
            // 4. 灏嗙粨鏋滆浆鍥?Vec3d
            Vec3d result = new Vec3d(rotatedVec.x, rotatedVec.y, rotatedVec.z);
            
            // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_ROTATED_VECTOR_ID, result);
            
        } else {
            // 濡傛灉杈撳叆鏃犳晥锛岃緭鍑洪浂鍚戦噺鎴栬緭鍏ュ悜閲?
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_ROTATED_VECTOR_ID, valVector instanceof Vec3d ? (Vec3d)valVector : Vec3d.ZERO);
        }
    }

    // --- Getters/Setters (涓嶉渶瑕? ---

    // --- (鍙?搴忓垪鍖?(涓嶉渶瑕? ---
}

package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.math.vector;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import net.minecraft.util.math.Vec3d;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Vector Addition Node: Adds two vectors (A + B).
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "math.vector.addition",
    displayName = "鍚戦噺鍔犳硶 (+)",
    description = "璁＄畻涓や釜鍚戦噺鐨勫拰锛岃緭鍑篈 + B",
    category = "math.vector"
)
public class VectorAdditionNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_A_ID = "input_vector_a";
    private static final String INPUT_B_ID = "input_vector_b";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_SUM_ID = "output_vector_sum";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public VectorAdditionNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "math.vector.addition");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_A_ID, "Vector A", "First vector", NodeDataType.VECTOR, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_B_ID, "Vector B", "Second vector", NodeDataType.VECTOR, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_SUM_ID, "Sum Vector", "Result A + B", NodeDataType.VECTOR, this));
    }

    // 娣诲姞 getDescription 鏂规硶
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "Outputs the vector sum of A and B.";
    }

    // 娣诲姞 getDisplayName 鏂规硶
    @Override
    public String getDisplayName() {
        return "Vector Addition (+)";
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object valA = inputValues.get(INPUT_A_ID);
        Object valB = inputValues.get(INPUT_B_ID);

        // 妫€鏌ヨ緭鍏ユ槸鍚︿负 Vec3d
        if (valA instanceof Vec3d && valB instanceof Vec3d) {
            Vec3d a = (Vec3d) valA;
            Vec3d b = (Vec3d) valB;
            
            Vec3d sum = a.add(b);
            
            // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_SUM_ID, sum);
        } else {
            // 濡傛灉杈撳叆鏃犳晥
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_SUM_ID, Vec3d.ZERO); // 鎴栬€?null
        }
    }

    // --- Getters/Setters (涓嶉渶瑕? ---

    // --- (鍙?搴忓垪鍖?(涓嶉渶瑕? ---
}

package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.math.vector;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import net.minecraft.util.math.Vec3d;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import java.util.UUID;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;

/**
 * Vector Length Node: Computes the length (magnitude) of a vector.
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "math.vector.length",
    displayName = "鍚戦噺闀垮害",
    description = "璁＄畻鍚戦噺鐨勯暱搴︼紙妯￠暱锛?,
    category = "math.vector"
)
public class VectorLengthNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_VECTOR_ID = "input_vector";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_LENGTH_ID = "output_length";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public VectorLengthNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "math.vector.length");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_VECTOR_ID, "Vector", "Input vector", NodeDataType.VECTOR, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_LENGTH_ID, "Length", "Length of the vector", NodeDataType.DOUBLE, this));
    }

    // 娣诲姞 getDescription 鏂规硶
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "Outputs the length (magnitude) of the input vector.";
    }

    // 娣诲姞 getDisplayName 鏂规硶
    @Override
    public String getDisplayName() {
        return "Vector Length";
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object val = inputValues.get(INPUT_VECTOR_ID);

        // 妫€鏌ヨ緭鍏ユ槸鍚︿负 Vec3d
        if (val instanceof Vec3d) {
            Vec3d vector = (Vec3d) val;
            
            double length = vector.length();
            
            // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_LENGTH_ID, length);
        } else {
            // 濡傛灉杈撳叆鏃犳晥
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_LENGTH_ID, 0.0); // 闀垮害涓?0 鎴?NaN
        }
    }

    // --- Getters/Setters (涓嶉渶瑕? ---

    // --- (鍙?搴忓垪鍖?(涓嶉渶瑕? ---

package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.math.vector;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import net.minecraft.util.math.Vec3d;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Vector Scalar Divide Node: 鍚戦噺闄や互鏍囬噺 (Vector / Scalar)
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "math.vector.scalar_divide",
    displayName = "鍚戦噺鏍囬噺闄ゆ硶",
    description = "鍚戦噺闄や互鏍囬噺 (Vector / Scalar)",
    category = "math.vector"
)
public class VectorScalarDivideNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_VECTOR_ID = "input_vector";
    private static final String INPUT_SCALAR_ID = "input_scalar"; // Divisor

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_QUOTIENT_ID = "output_vector_quotient";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public VectorScalarDivideNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "math.vector.scalar_divide");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_VECTOR_ID, "Vector", "Input vector (Dividend)", NodeDataType.VECTOR, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_SCALAR_ID, "Scalar", "Scalar value (Divisor)", NodeDataType.ANY, this)); 

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_QUOTIENT_ID, "Scaled Vector", "Result V / s", NodeDataType.VECTOR, this));
    }

    // 娣诲姞 getDescription 鏂规硶
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "Outputs the vector divided by the scalar.";
    }

    // 娣诲姞 getDisplayName 鏂规硶
    @Override
    public String getDisplayName() {
        return "Vector Scale (/)";
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object valVector = inputValues.get(INPUT_VECTOR_ID);
        Object valScalar = inputValues.get(INPUT_SCALAR_ID);

        // 妫€鏌ヨ緭鍏ョ被鍨?
        if (valVector instanceof Vec3d && valScalar instanceof Number) {
            Vec3d vector = (Vec3d) valVector;
            double scalar = ((Number) valScalar).doubleValue();
            
            // 妫€鏌ラ櫎闆?
             if (Math.abs(scalar) < 1e-10) {
                 // 闄ら浂锛氬彲浠ヨ繑鍥炲師鍚戦噺銆侀浂鍚戦噺鎴栨爣璁伴敊璇?(渚嬪杈撳嚭 null 鎴?NaN 鍚戦噺锛烿ec3d 娌℃湁 NaN)
                 // 杩斿洖闆跺悜閲忓彲鑳芥槸瀹夊叏鐨勯粯璁よ涓?
                 outputValues.put(OUTPUT_QUOTIENT_ID, Vec3d.ZERO); 
             } else {
                 // Vec3d 娌℃湁 divide 鏂规硶锛岄渶瑕佺敤涔樻硶瀹炵幇
                 Vec3d quotient = vector.multiply(1.0 / scalar);
                 outputValues.put(OUTPUT_QUOTIENT_ID, quotient);
             }
        } else {
            // 濡傛灉杈撳叆鏃犳晥
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_QUOTIENT_ID, Vec3d.ZERO); // 鎴栬€?null
        }
    }

    // --- Getters/Setters (涓嶉渶瑕? ---

    // --- (鍙?搴忓垪鍖?(涓嶉渶瑕? ---
} 
===FILE: C:\Users\navib\Desktop\development\NC\nodecraft\src\main\java\com\nodecraft\nodesystem\nodes\math\vector\VectorScalarMultiplyNode.java===
package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.math.vector;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import net.minecraft.util.math.Vec3d;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Vector Scalar Multiply Node: 鍚戦噺涓庢爣閲忕浉涔?(Vector * Scalar)
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "math.vector.scalar_multiply",
    displayName = "鍚戦噺鏍囬噺涔樻硶",
    description = "鍚戦噺涓庢爣閲忕浉涔?(Vector * Scalar)",
    category = "math.vector"
)
public class VectorScalarMultiplyNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_VECTOR_ID = "input_vector";
    private static final String INPUT_SCALAR_ID = "input_scalar";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_PRODUCT_ID = "output_vector_product";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public VectorScalarMultiplyNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "math.vector.scalar_multiply");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_VECTOR_ID, "Vector", "Input vector", NodeDataType.VECTOR, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_SCALAR_ID, "Scalar", "Scalar value", NodeDataType.ANY, this)); // Allow any number type

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_PRODUCT_ID, "Scaled Vector", "Result V * s", NodeDataType.VECTOR, this));
    }

    // 娣诲姞 getDescription 鏂规硶
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "Outputs the vector multiplied by the scalar.";
    }

    // 娣诲姞 getDisplayName 鏂规硶
    @Override
    public String getDisplayName() {
        return "Vector Scale (*)";
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object valVector = inputValues.get(INPUT_VECTOR_ID);
        Object valScalar = inputValues.get(INPUT_SCALAR_ID);

        // 妫€鏌ヨ緭鍏ョ被鍨?
        if (valVector instanceof Vec3d && valScalar instanceof Number) {
            Vec3d vector = (Vec3d) valVector;
            double scalar = ((Number) valScalar).doubleValue();
            
            Vec3d product = vector.multiply(scalar);
            
            // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_PRODUCT_ID, product);
        } else {
            // 濡傛灉杈撳叆鏃犳晥
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_PRODUCT_ID, Vec3d.ZERO); // 鎴栬€?null
        }
    }

    // --- Getters/Setters (涓嶉渶瑕? ---

    // --- (鍙?搴忓垪鍖?(涓嶉渶瑕? ---
}

package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.math.vector;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import net.minecraft.util.math.Vec3d;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import java.util.UUID;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;

/**
 * Vector Subtraction Node: Subtracts vector B from vector A (A - B).
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "math.vector.subtraction",
    displayName = "鍚戦噺鍑忔硶 (-)",
    description = "璁＄畻涓や釜鍚戦噺鐨勫樊锛岃緭鍑篈 - B",
    category = "math.vector"
)
public class VectorSubtractionNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_A_ID = "input_vector_a"; // Minuend
    private static final String INPUT_B_ID = "input_vector_b"; // Subtrahend

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_DIFFERENCE_ID = "output_vector_difference";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public VectorSubtractionNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "math.vector.subtraction");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_A_ID, "Vector A", "Minuend vector", NodeDataType.VECTOR, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_B_ID, "Vector B", "Subtrahend vector", NodeDataType.VECTOR, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_DIFFERENCE_ID, "Difference Vector", "Result A - B", NodeDataType.VECTOR, this));
    }

    // 娣诲姞 getDescription 鏂规硶
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "Outputs the vector difference A - B.";
    }

    // 娣诲姞 getDisplayName 鏂规硶
    @Override
    public String getDisplayName() {
        return "Vector Subtraction (-)";
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object valA = inputValues.get(INPUT_A_ID);
        Object valB = inputValues.get(INPUT_B_ID);

        // 妫€鏌ヨ緭鍏ユ槸鍚︿负 Vec3d
        if (valA instanceof Vec3d && valB instanceof Vec3d) {
            Vec3d a = (Vec3d) valA;
            Vec3d b = (Vec3d) valB;
            
            Vec3d difference = a.subtract(b);
            
            // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_DIFFERENCE_ID, difference);
        } else {
            // 濡傛灉杈撳叆鏃犳晥
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_DIFFERENCE_ID, Vec3d.ZERO); // 鎴栬€?null
        }
    }

    // --- Getters/Setters (涓嶉渶瑕? ---

    // --- (鍙?搴忓垪鍖?(涓嶉渶瑕? ---
} 
===FILE: C:\Users\navib\Desktop\development\NC\nodecraft\src\main\java\com\nodecraft\nodesystem\nodes\spatial\analysis\BoundingBoxNode.java===
package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.spatial.analysis;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.datatypes.RegionData;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.util.BlockPosList;

import net.minecraft.util.math.BlockPos;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Bounding Box 鑺傜偣: 璁＄畻 Coordinate 鍒楄〃鎴?Region 鐨勮酱瀵归綈鍖呭洿鐩?
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "spatial.analysis.bounding_box",
    displayName = "鍖呭洿鐩?,
    description = "璁＄畻鍧愭爣鍒楄〃鎴栧尯鍩熺殑杞村榻愬寘鍥寸洅",
    category = "spatial.analysis"
)
public class BoundingBoxNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 鑺傜偣灞炴€?---
    private String description = "璁＄畻鍧愭爣鍒楄〃鎴栧尯鍩熺殑杞村榻愬寘鍥寸洅";

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_COORDINATES_ID = "input_coordinates";
    private static final String INPUT_REGION_ID = "input_region";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_BOUNDING_BOX_ID = "output_bounding_box";
    private static final String OUTPUT_MIN_CORNER_ID = "output_min_corner";
    private static final String OUTPUT_MAX_CORNER_ID = "output_max_corner";
    private static final String OUTPUT_SIZE_X_ID = "output_size_x";
    private static final String OUTPUT_SIZE_Y_ID = "output_size_y";
    private static final String OUTPUT_SIZE_Z_ID = "output_size_z";
    private static final String OUTPUT_VOLUME_ID = "output_volume";
    private static final String OUTPUT_CENTER_ID = "output_center";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public BoundingBoxNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "spatial.analysis.bounding_box");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_COORDINATES_ID, "Coordinates", 
                "瑕佽绠楀寘鍥寸洅鐨勫潗鏍囧垪琛?, NodeDataType.BLOCK_LIST, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_REGION_ID, "Region", 
                "瑕佽绠楀寘鍥寸洅鐨勫尯鍩?, NodeDataType.REGION, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_BOUNDING_BOX_ID, "Bounding Box", 
                "璁＄畻鍑虹殑鍖呭洿鐩掞紙鍖哄煙锛?, NodeDataType.REGION, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_MIN_CORNER_ID, "Min Corner", 
                "鍖呭洿鐩掔殑鏈€灏忚鍧愭爣", NodeDataType.BLOCK_POS, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_MAX_CORNER_ID, "Max Corner", 
                "鍖呭洿鐩掔殑鏈€澶ц鍧愭爣", NodeDataType.BLOCK_POS, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_SIZE_X_ID, "Size X", 
                "鍖呭洿鐩掔殑X杞村昂瀵?, NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_SIZE_Y_ID, "Size Y", 
                "鍖呭洿鐩掔殑Y杞村昂瀵?, NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_SIZE_Z_ID, "Size Z", 
                "鍖呭洿鐩掔殑Z杞村昂瀵?, NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_VOLUME_ID, "Volume", 
                "鍖呭洿鐩掔殑浣撶Н锛堟柟鍧楁暟锛?, NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_CENTER_ID, "Center", 
                "鍖呭洿鐩掔殑涓績鐐?, NodeDataType.BLOCK_POS, this));
    }

    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return this.description;
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object coordinatesObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_COORDINATES_ID);
        Object regionObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_REGION_ID);
        
        // 鐢ㄤ簬瀛樺偍鏈€灏忓拰鏈€澶ц鍧愭爣
        BlockPos minCorner = null;
        BlockPos maxCorner = null;
        
        // 棣栧厛妫€鏌ユ槸鍚︽湁鍧愭爣鍒楄〃杈撳叆
        if (coordinatesObj instanceof BlockPosList) {
            BlockPosList coordinates = (BlockPosList) coordinatesObj;
            
            // 濡傛灉鍧愭爣鍒楄〃涓嶄负绌猴紝璁＄畻鍏跺寘鍥寸洅
            if (!coordinates.isEmpty()) {
                minCorner = calculateMinCorner(coordinates);
                maxCorner = calculateMaxCorner(coordinates);
            }
        }
        
        // 濡傛灉娌℃湁浠庡潗鏍囧垪琛ㄨ绠楀嚭鍖呭洿鐩掞紝灏濊瘯浠庡尯鍩熻緭鍏ヨ幏鍙?
        if (minCorner == null && regionObj instanceof RegionData) {
            RegionData region = (RegionData) regionObj;
            
            // 浠庡尯鍩熷璞¤幏鍙栨渶灏忔渶澶ц钀?
            if (region.isComplete()) {
                minCorner = region.getMinCorner();
                maxCorner = region.getMaxCorner();
            }
        }
        
        // 濡傛灉鎴愬姛鑾峰彇浜嗗寘鍥寸洅鐨勮钀藉潗鏍囷紝璁＄畻骞惰缃緭鍑?
        if (minCorner != null && maxCorner != null) {
            // 鍒涘缓鍖呭洿鐩掑尯鍩?
            RegionData boundingBox = new RegionData(minCorner, maxCorner);
            
            // 璁＄畻灏哄
            int sizeX = maxCorner.getX() - minCorner.getX() + 1;
            int sizeY = maxCorner.getY() - minCorner.getY() + 1;
            int sizeZ = maxCorner.getZ() - minCorner.getZ() + 1;
            
            // 璁＄畻浣撶Н
            int volume = sizeX * sizeY * sizeZ;
            
            // 璁＄畻涓績鐐癸紙鍙兘涓嶆槸鏁存暟鐐癸級
            BlockPos center = new BlockPos(
                minCorner.getX() + sizeX / 2,
                minCorner.getY() + sizeY / 2,
                minCorner.getZ() + sizeZ / 2
            );
            
            // 璁剧疆鎵€鏈夎緭鍑哄€?
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_BOUNDING_BOX_ID, boundingBox);
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_MIN_CORNER_ID, minCorner);
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_MAX_CORNER_ID, maxCorner);
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_SIZE_X_ID, sizeX);
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_SIZE_Y_ID, sizeY);
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_SIZE_Z_ID, sizeZ);
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_VOLUME_ID, volume);
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_CENTER_ID, center);
        } else {
            // 濡傛灉娌℃湁鏈夋晥杈撳叆锛屾竻闄ゆ墍鏈夎緭鍑?
            outputValues.clear();
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * 璁＄畻鍧愭爣鍒楄〃鐨勬渶灏忚鍧愭爣
     * @param coordinates 鍧愭爣鍒楄〃
     * @return 鏈€灏忚鍧愭爣
     */
    private BlockPos calculateMinCorner(BlockPosList coordinates) {
        // 鍒濆鍖栨渶灏忓潗鏍囦负绗竴涓潗鏍?
        BlockPos firstPos = coordinates.getPositions().get(0);
        int minX = firstPos.getX();
        int minY = firstPos.getY();
        int minZ = firstPos.getZ();
        
        // 閬嶅巻鎵€鏈夊潗鏍囷紝鎵惧埌姣忎釜杞翠笂鐨勬渶灏忓€?
        for (BlockPos pos : coordinates) {
            minX = Math.min(minX, pos.getX());
            minY = Math.min(minY, pos.getY());
            minZ = Math.min(minZ, pos.getZ());
        }
        
        return new BlockPos(minX, minY, minZ);
    }
    
    /**
     * 璁＄畻鍧愭爣鍒楄〃鐨勬渶澶ц鍧愭爣
     * @param coordinates 鍧愭爣鍒楄〃
     * @return 鏈€澶ц鍧愭爣
     */
    private BlockPos calculateMaxCorner(BlockPosList coordinates) {
        // 鍒濆鍖栨渶澶у潗鏍囦负绗竴涓潗鏍?
        BlockPos firstPos = coordinates.getPositions().get(0);
        int maxX = firstPos.getX();
        int maxY = firstPos.getY();
        int maxZ = firstPos.getZ();
        
        // 閬嶅巻鎵€鏈夊潗鏍囷紝鎵惧埌姣忎釜杞翠笂鐨勬渶澶у€?
        for (BlockPos pos : coordinates) {
            maxX = Math.max(maxX, pos.getX());
            maxY = Math.max(maxY, pos.getY());
            maxZ = Math.max(maxZ, pos.getZ());
        }
        
        return new BlockPos(maxX, maxY, maxZ);
    }
} 
===FILE: C:\Users\navib\Desktop\development\NC\nodecraft\src\main\java\com\nodecraft\nodesystem\nodes\spatial\analysis\ClosestPointNode.java===
package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.spatial.analysis;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.util.BlockPosList;

import net.minecraft.util.math.BlockPos;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Closest Point 鑺傜偣: 鍦ㄤ竴涓?Coordinate 鍒楄〃涓壘鍒拌窛绂诲彟涓€涓偣鏈€杩戠殑鐐?
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "spatial.analysis.closest_point",
    displayName = "鏈€杩戠偣",
    description = "鍦ㄥ潗鏍囧垪琛ㄤ腑鎵惧埌璺濈鎸囧畾鐐规渶杩戠殑鐐?,
    category = "spatial.analysis"
)
public class ClosestPointNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 鑺傜偣灞炴€?---
    private String description = "鍦ㄥ潗鏍囧垪琛ㄤ腑鎵惧埌璺濈鎸囧畾鐐规渶杩戠殑鐐?;

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_POINT_ID = "input_point";
    private static final String INPUT_COORDINATES_ID = "input_coordinates";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_CLOSEST_POINT_ID = "output_closest_point";
    private static final String OUTPUT_DISTANCE_ID = "output_distance";
    private static final String OUTPUT_INDEX_ID = "output_index";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public ClosestPointNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "spatial.analysis.closest_point");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_POINT_ID, "Point", 
                "鍙傝€冪偣", NodeDataType.BLOCK_POS, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_COORDINATES_ID, "Coordinates", 
                "鍧愭爣鍒楄〃", NodeDataType.BLOCK_LIST, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_CLOSEST_POINT_ID, "Closest Point", 
                "鏈€杩戠殑鐐?, NodeDataType.BLOCK_POS, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_DISTANCE_ID, "Distance", 
                "鏈€杩戠偣鍒板弬鑰冪偣鐨勮窛绂?, NodeDataType.DOUBLE, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_INDEX_ID, "Index", 
                "鏈€杩戠偣鍦ㄥ潗鏍囧垪琛ㄤ腑鐨勭储寮?, NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
    }

    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return this.description;
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object pointObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_POINT_ID);
        Object coordinatesObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_COORDINATES_ID);
        
        // 妫€鏌ヨ緭鍏ユ槸鍚﹀悎娉?
        if (pointObj instanceof BlockPos && coordinatesObj instanceof BlockPosList) {
            BlockPos referencePoint = (BlockPos) pointObj;
            BlockPosList coordinates = (BlockPosList) coordinatesObj;
            
            // 濡傛灉鍧愭爣鍒楄〃涓嶄负绌猴紝鏌ユ壘鏈€杩戠偣
            if (!coordinates.isEmpty()) {
                // 鍒濆鍖栨渶灏忚窛绂讳负鏈€澶у€?
                double minDistanceSquared = Double.MAX_VALUE;
                BlockPos closestPoint = null;
                int closestIndex = -1;
                
                // 閬嶅巻鎵€鏈夊潗鏍囷紝瀵绘壘璺濈鏈€灏忕殑鐐?
                int index = 0;
                for (BlockPos pos : coordinates) {
                    double distanceSquared = calculateDistanceSquared(referencePoint, pos);
                    if (distanceSquared < minDistanceSquared) {
                        minDistanceSquared = distanceSquared;
                        closestPoint = pos;
                        closestIndex = index;
                    }
                    index++;
                }
                
                // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
                if (closestPoint != null) {
                    outputValues.put(OUTPUT_CLOSEST_POINT_ID, closestPoint);
                    outputValues.put(OUTPUT_DISTANCE_ID, Math.sqrt(minDistanceSquared));
                    outputValues.put(OUTPUT_INDEX_ID, closestIndex);
                    return;
                }
            }
        }
        
        // 濡傛灉娌℃湁鏈夋晥杈撳叆鎴栨壘涓嶅埌鏈€杩戠偣锛屾竻闄ゆ墍鏈夎緭鍑?
        outputValues.clear();
    }
    
    /**
     * 璁＄畻涓ょ偣涔嬮棿鐨勮窛绂诲钩鏂?
     * @param p1 绗竴涓偣
     * @param p2 绗簩涓偣
     * @return 璺濈骞虫柟
     */
    private double calculateDistanceSquared(BlockPos p1, BlockPos p2) {
        double dx = p1.getX() - p2.getX();
        double dy = p1.getY() - p2.getY();
        double dz = p1.getZ() - p2.getZ();
        return dx * dx + dy * dy + dz * dz;
    }
} 
===FILE: C:\Users\navib\Desktop\development\NC\nodecraft\src\main\java\com\nodecraft\nodesystem\nodes\spatial\analysis\GetPointsInRegionNode.java===
package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.spatial.analysis;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.datatypes.RegionData;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.util.BlockPosList;

import net.minecraft.util.math.BlockPos;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Get Points in Region 鑺傜偣: 浠庝竴涓?Region 鑾峰彇鍏跺寘鍚殑鎵€鏈?Coordinate
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "spatial.analysis.get_points_in_region",
    displayName = "鑾峰彇鍖哄煙鍐呯偣",
    description = "鑾峰彇鍖哄煙鍐呯殑鎵€鏈夊潗鏍囩偣",
    category = "spatial.analysis"
)
public class GetPointsInRegionNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 鑺傜偣灞炴€?---
    private String description = "鑾峰彇鍖哄煙鍐呯殑鎵€鏈夊潗鏍囩偣";
    private boolean filterFromCoordinates = false; // 榛樿涓嶄粠鍧愭爣鍒楄〃绛涢€?

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_REGION_ID = "input_region";
    private static final String INPUT_COORDINATES_ID = "input_coordinates";
    private static final String INPUT_MAX_POINTS_ID = "input_max_points";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_POINTS_ID = "output_points";
    private static final String OUTPUT_COUNT_ID = "output_count";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public GetPointsInRegionNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "spatial.analysis.get_points_in_region");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_REGION_ID, "Region", 
                "瑕佽幏鍙栫偣鐨勫尯鍩?, NodeDataType.REGION, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_COORDINATES_ID, "Coordinates", 
                "锛堝彲閫夛級鐢ㄤ簬绛涢€夌殑鍧愭爣鍒楄〃", NodeDataType.BLOCK_LIST, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_MAX_POINTS_ID, "Max Points", 
                "鏈€澶ц繑鍥炵偣鏁帮紙0琛ㄧず鏃犻檺鍒讹級", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_POINTS_ID, "Points", 
                "鍖哄煙鍐呯殑鍧愭爣鐐?, NodeDataType.BLOCK_LIST, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_COUNT_ID, "Count", 
                "鍧愭爣鐐规暟閲?, NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
    }

    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return this.description;
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object regionObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_REGION_ID);
        Object coordinatesObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_COORDINATES_ID);
        Object maxPointsObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_MAX_POINTS_ID);
        
        // 榛樿绌虹殑鍧愭爣鍒楄〃
        BlockPosList result = new BlockPosList();
        
        // 妫€鏌ュ尯鍩熻緭鍏ユ槸鍚﹀悎娉?
        if (regionObj instanceof RegionData) {
            RegionData region = (RegionData) regionObj;
            
            // 纭繚鍖哄煙瀹屾暣
            if (region.isComplete()) {
                // 鑾峰彇鏈€澶х偣鏁帮紙0琛ㄧず鏃犻檺鍒讹級
                int maxPoints = (maxPointsObj instanceof Number) 
                    ? ((Number) maxPointsObj).intValue() 
                    : 0;
                maxPoints = Math.max(0, maxPoints); // 纭繚闈炶礋
                
                if (filterFromCoordinates && coordinatesObj instanceof BlockPosList) {
                    // 浠庡潗鏍囧垪琛ㄤ腑绛涢€夊尯鍩熷唴鐨勭偣
                    BlockPosList coordinates = (BlockPosList) coordinatesObj;
                    filterPointsInRegion(coordinates, region, maxPoints, result);
                } else {
                    // 鑾峰彇鍖哄煙鍐呯殑鎵€鏈夌偣
                    generatePointsInRegion(region, maxPoints, result);
                }
            }
        }
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_POINTS_ID, result);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_COUNT_ID, result.size());
    }
    
    /**
     * 浠庡潗鏍囧垪琛ㄤ腑绛涢€夊嚭鍖哄煙鍐呯殑鐐?
     * @param coordinates 鍧愭爣鍒楄〃
     * @param region 鍖哄煙
     * @param maxPoints 鏈€澶х偣鏁帮紙0琛ㄧず鏃犻檺鍒讹級
     * @param result 缁撴灉鍒楄〃
     */
    private void filterPointsInRegion(BlockPosList coordinates, RegionData region, 
                                     int maxPoints, BlockPosList result) {
        // 鑾峰彇鍖哄煙鐨勬渶灏忔渶澶у潗鏍?
        BlockPos minCorner = region.getMinCorner();
        BlockPos maxCorner = region.getMaxCorner();
        
        // 閬嶅巻鍧愭爣鍒楄〃
        for (BlockPos pos : coordinates) {
            // 妫€鏌ョ偣鏄惁鍦ㄥ尯鍩熷唴
            if (isPointInRegion(pos, minCorner, maxCorner)) {
                // 娣诲姞鍒扮粨鏋滃垪琛?
                result.add(pos);
                
                // 濡傛灉杈惧埌鏈€澶х偣鏁帮紝鍋滄娣诲姞
                if (maxPoints > 0 && result.size() >= maxPoints) {
                    break;
                }
            }
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * 鐢熸垚鍖哄煙鍐呯殑鎵€鏈夌偣
     * @param region 鍖哄煙
     * @param maxPoints 鏈€澶х偣鏁帮紙0琛ㄧず鏃犻檺鍒讹級
     * @param result 缁撴灉鍒楄〃
     */
    private void generatePointsInRegion(RegionData region, int maxPoints, BlockPosList result) {
        // 鑾峰彇鍖哄煙鐨勬渶灏忔渶澶у潗鏍?
        BlockPos minCorner = region.getMinCorner();
        BlockPos maxCorner = region.getMaxCorner();
        
        // 璁＄畻鍖哄煙灏哄
        int sizeX = maxCorner.getX() - minCorner.getX() + 1;
        int sizeY = maxCorner.getY() - minCorner.getY() + 1;
        int sizeZ = maxCorner.getZ() - minCorner.getZ() + 1;
        
        // 璁＄畻鎬荤偣鏁?
        long totalPoints = (long) sizeX * sizeY * sizeZ;
        
        // 濡傛灉闇€瑕侀檺鍒剁偣鏁颁笖鎬荤偣鏁板緢澶э紝浣跨敤閲囨牱绛栫暐
        if (maxPoints > 0 && totalPoints > maxPoints && totalPoints > 1000000) {
            // 澶у尯鍩熼噰鏍风瓥鐣?
            sampleLargeRegion(minCorner, maxCorner, maxPoints, result);
        } else {
            // 鐩存帴閬嶅巻鎵€鏈夌偣
            for (BlockPos pos : region.getAllBlocks()) {
                result.add(pos);
                
                // 濡傛灉杈惧埌鏈€澶х偣鏁帮紝鍋滄娣诲姞
                if (maxPoints > 0 && result.size() >= maxPoints) {
                    break;
                }
            }
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * 瀵瑰ぇ鍖哄煙杩涜閲囨牱
     * @param minCorner 鏈€灏忚鍧愭爣
     * @param maxCorner 鏈€澶ц鍧愭爣
     * @param maxPoints 鏈€澶х偣鏁?
     * @param result 缁撴灉鍒楄〃
     */
    private void sampleLargeRegion(BlockPos minCorner, BlockPos maxCorner, 
                                  int maxPoints, BlockPosList result) {
        // 璁＄畻鍖哄煙灏哄
        int sizeX = maxCorner.getX() - minCorner.getX() + 1;
        int sizeY = maxCorner.getY() - minCorner.getY() + 1;
        int sizeZ = maxCorner.getZ() - minCorner.getZ() + 1;
        
        // 璁＄畻鎬荤偣鏁?
        long totalPoints = (long) sizeX * sizeY * sizeZ;
        
        // 璁＄畻閲囨牱姝ラ暱锛堢‘淇濆潎鍖€鍒嗗竷锛?
        double stepFactor = Math.cbrt((double) totalPoints / maxPoints);
        int stepX = Math.max(1, (int) Math.ceil(stepFactor));
        int stepY = Math.max(1, (int) Math.ceil(stepFactor));
        int stepZ = Math.max(1, (int) Math.ceil(stepFactor));
        
        // 閲囨牱鍖哄煙
        for (int x = minCorner.getX(); x <= maxCorner.getX(); x += stepX) {
            for (int y = minCorner.getY(); y <= maxCorner.getY(); y += stepY) {
                for (int z = minCorner.getZ(); z <= maxCorner.getZ(); z += stepZ) {
                    result.add(new BlockPos(x, y, z));
                    
                    // 濡傛灉杈惧埌鏈€澶х偣鏁帮紝鍋滄娣诲姞
                    if (result.size() >= maxPoints) {
                        return;
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * 妫€鏌ョ偣鏄惁鍦ㄥ尯鍩熷唴
     * @param pos 闇€瑕佹鏌ョ殑鐐?
     * @param minCorner 鍖哄煙鏈€灏忚鍧愭爣
     * @param maxCorner 鍖哄煙鏈€澶ц鍧愭爣
     * @return 濡傛灉鐐瑰湪鍖哄煙鍐呰繑鍥瀟rue
     */
    private boolean isPointInRegion(BlockPos pos, BlockPos minCorner, BlockPos maxCorner) {
        return pos.getX() >= minCorner.getX() && pos.getX() <= maxCorner.getX()
            && pos.getY() >= minCorner.getY() && pos.getY() <= maxCorner.getY()
            && pos.getZ() >= minCorner.getZ() && pos.getZ() <= maxCorner.getZ();
    }
    
    // --- Getters/Setters for Properties ---
    
    public boolean isFilterFromCoordinates() {
        return filterFromCoordinates;
    }
    
    public void setFilterFromCoordinates(boolean filterFromCoordinates) {
        this.filterFromCoordinates = filterFromCoordinates;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    // --- 鑺傜偣鐘舵€佸簭鍒楀寲 ---
    
    @Override
    public Object getNodeState() {
        java.util.Map<String, Object> state = new java.util.HashMap<>();
        state.put("filterFromCoordinates", filterFromCoordinates);
        return state;
    }
    
    @Override
    public void setNodeState(Object state) {
        if (state instanceof java.util.Map) {
            java.util.Map<?, ?> stateMap = (java.util.Map<?, ?>) state;
            
            if (stateMap.containsKey("filterFromCoordinates")) {
                Object filterObj = stateMap.get("filterFromCoordinates");
                if (filterObj instanceof Boolean) {
                    setFilterFromCoordinates((Boolean) filterObj);
                }
            }
        }
    }
} 
===FILE: C:\Users\navib\Desktop\development\NC\nodecraft\src\main\java\com\nodecraft\nodesystem\nodes\spatial\analysis\IsPointInRegionNode.java===
package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.spatial.analysis;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.datatypes.RegionData;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import net.minecraft.util.math.BlockPos;
import net.minecraft.util.math.Box;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Is Point in Region 鑺傜偣: 妫€鏌ョ偣鏄惁鍦ㄥ尯鍩熷唴
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "spatial.analysis.is_point_in_region",
    displayName = "鐐瑰湪鍖哄煙鍐?,
    description = "妫€鏌ョ偣鏄惁鍦ㄦ寚瀹氬尯鍩熷唴",
    category = "spatial.analysis"
)
public class IsPointInRegionNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 鑺傜偣灞炴€?---
    private String description = "妫€鏌ョ偣鏄惁鍦ㄥ尯鍩熷唴";

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_POINT_ID = "input_point";
    private static final String INPUT_REGION_ID = "input_region";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_IS_INSIDE_ID = "output_is_inside";
    private static final String OUTPUT_DISTANCE_ID = "output_distance";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public IsPointInRegionNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "spatial.analysis.is_point_in_region");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_POINT_ID, "Point", 
                "瑕佹鏌ョ殑鐐?, NodeDataType.BLOCK_POS, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_REGION_ID, "Region", 
                "妫€鏌ュ尯鍩?, NodeDataType.REGION, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_IS_INSIDE_ID, "Is Inside", 
                "鐐规槸鍚﹀湪鍖哄煙鍐?, NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_DISTANCE_ID, "Distance", 
                "鐐瑰埌鍖哄煙杈圭晫鐨勮窛绂伙紙璐熷€艰〃绀哄湪鍖哄煙鍐咃級", NodeDataType.DOUBLE, this));
    }

    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return this.description;
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object pointObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_POINT_ID);
        Object regionObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_REGION_ID);
        
        // 榛樿杈撳嚭鍊?
        boolean isInside = false;
        double distance = Double.POSITIVE_INFINITY;
        
        // 妫€鏌ヨ緭鍏ユ槸鍚﹀悎娉?
        if (pointObj instanceof BlockPos && regionObj instanceof RegionData) {
            BlockPos point = (BlockPos) pointObj;
            RegionData region = (RegionData) regionObj;
            
            // 纭繚鍖哄煙瀹屾暣
            if (region.isComplete()) {
                // 鑾峰彇鍖哄煙鐨勫寘鍥寸洅
                Box box = region.toBox();
                
                // 灏嗘柟鍧楀潗鏍囪浆鎹负涓績鐐瑰潗鏍囷紙杩欐牱鍙互姝ｇ‘璁＄畻璺濈锛?
                double pointX = point.getX() + 0.5;
                double pointY = point.getY() + 0.5;
                double pointZ = point.getZ() + 0.5;
                
                // 妫€鏌ョ偣鏄惁鍦ㄥ寘鍥寸洅鍐?
                isInside = box.contains(pointX, pointY, pointZ);
                
                // 璁＄畻鐐瑰埌鍖呭洿鐩掔殑璺濈锛堣礋鍊艰〃绀哄湪鍐呴儴锛?
                distance = calculateDistanceToBox(pointX, pointY, pointZ, box);
            }
        }
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_IS_INSIDE_ID, isInside);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_DISTANCE_ID, distance);
    }
    
    /**
     * 璁＄畻鐐瑰埌鍖呭洿鐩掔殑璺濈
     * @param x 鐐圭殑X鍧愭爣
     * @param y 鐐圭殑Y鍧愭爣
     * @param z 鐐圭殑Z鍧愭爣
     * @param box 鍖呭洿鐩?
     * @return 璺濈锛堣礋鍊艰〃绀哄湪鍐呴儴锛?
     */
    private double calculateDistanceToBox(double x, double y, double z, Box box) {
        double dx = Math.max(box.minX - x, Math.max(0, x - box.maxX));
        double dy = Math.max(box.minY - y, Math.max(0, y - box.maxY));
        double dz = Math.max(box.minZ - z, Math.max(0, z - box.maxZ));
        
        if (dx == 0 && dy == 0 && dz == 0) {
            // 鐐瑰湪鍖呭洿鐩掑唴锛岃绠楀埌鏈€杩戦潰鐨勮窛绂伙紙璐熷€硷級
            double dxMin = x - box.minX;
            double dxMax = box.maxX - x;
            double dyMin = y - box.minY;
            double dyMax = box.maxY - y;
            double dzMin = z - box.minZ;
            double dzMax = box.maxZ - z;
            
            // 鎵惧埌鏈€灏忚窛绂伙紙鍒版渶杩戦潰鐨勮窛绂伙級
            double minDistance = Math.min(
                Math.min(dxMin, dxMax),
                Math.min(Math.min(dyMin, dyMax), Math.min(dzMin, dzMax))
            );
            
            return -minDistance; // 杩斿洖璐熷€艰〃绀哄湪鍐呴儴
        } else {
            // 鐐瑰湪鍖呭洿鐩掑锛岃绠楁鍑犻噷寰楄窛绂?
            return Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy + dz * dz);
        }
    }
} 
===FILE: C:\Users\navib\Desktop\development\NC\nodecraft\src\main\java\com\nodecraft\nodesystem\nodes\spatial\arrays\GridArrayNode.java===
package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.spatial.arrays;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.util.BlockPosList;

import net.minecraft.util.math.BlockPos;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import org.joml.Vector3d;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Grid Array 鑺傜偣: 鍦ㄥ钩闈㈡垨涓夌淮缃戞牸涓婇噸澶岰oordinate鍒楄〃
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "spatial.arrays.grid_array",
    displayName = "缃戞牸闃靛垪",
    description = "鍦ㄥ钩闈㈡垨涓夌淮缃戞牸涓婇噸澶嶅潗鏍囧垪琛?,
    category = "spatial.arrays"
)
public class GridArrayNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 鑺傜偣灞炴€?---
    private String description = "鍦ㄥ钩闈㈡垨涓夌淮缃戞牸涓婇噸澶嶅潗鏍囧垪琛?;
    public enum GridType {
        GRID_2D,  // 2D骞抽潰缃戞牸
        GRID_3D   // 3D绌洪棿缃戞牸
    }
    
    private GridType gridType = GridType.GRID_2D; // 榛樿涓?D缃戞牸
    private boolean includeOriginal = true; // 榛樿鍖呭惈鍘熷鍧愭爣

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_COORDINATES_ID = "input_coordinates";
    private static final String INPUT_X_DIRECTION_ID = "input_x_direction";
    private static final String INPUT_X_DISTANCE_ID = "input_x_distance";
    private static final String INPUT_X_COUNT_ID = "input_x_count";
    private static final String INPUT_Y_DIRECTION_ID = "input_y_direction";
    private static final String INPUT_Y_DISTANCE_ID = "input_y_distance";
    private static final String INPUT_Y_COUNT_ID = "input_y_count";
    private static final String INPUT_Z_DIRECTION_ID = "input_z_direction";
    private static final String INPUT_Z_DISTANCE_ID = "input_z_distance";
    private static final String INPUT_Z_COUNT_ID = "input_z_count";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_GRID_COORDINATES_ID = "output_grid_coordinates";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public GridArrayNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "spatial.arrays.grid_array");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_COORDINATES_ID, "Coordinates", 
                "The coordinates to repeat in a grid", NodeDataType.BLOCK_LIST, this));
        
        // X杞村弬鏁?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_X_DIRECTION_ID, "X Direction", 
                "Direction vector for X axis of the grid", NodeDataType.VECTOR, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_X_DISTANCE_ID, "X Distance", 
                "Distance between instances along X axis", NodeDataType.DOUBLE, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_X_COUNT_ID, "X Count", 
                "Number of repetitions along X axis", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        
        // Y杞村弬鏁?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_Y_DIRECTION_ID, "Y Direction", 
                "Direction vector for Y axis of the grid", NodeDataType.VECTOR, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_Y_DISTANCE_ID, "Y Distance", 
                "Distance between instances along Y axis", NodeDataType.DOUBLE, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_Y_COUNT_ID, "Y Count", 
                "Number of repetitions along Y axis", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        
        // Z杞村弬鏁?(浠呯敤浜?D缃戞牸)
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_Z_DIRECTION_ID, "Z Direction", 
                "Direction vector for Z axis (3D grid only)", NodeDataType.VECTOR, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_Z_DISTANCE_ID, "Z Distance", 
                "Distance between instances along Z axis (3D grid only)", NodeDataType.DOUBLE, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_Z_COUNT_ID, "Z Count", 
                "Number of repetitions along Z axis (3D grid only)", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_GRID_COORDINATES_ID, "Grid Coordinates", 
                "The resulting grid array of coordinates", NodeDataType.BLOCK_LIST, this));
    }

    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return this.description;
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object coordinatesObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_COORDINATES_ID);
        
        // 榛樿绌虹殑鍧愭爣鍒楄〃
        BlockPosList result = new BlockPosList();
        
        // 妫€鏌ヨ緭鍏ユ槸鍚︿负鏂瑰潡鍧愭爣鍒楄〃
        if (coordinatesObj instanceof BlockPosList) {
            BlockPosList coordinates = (BlockPosList) coordinatesObj;
            
            // 濡傛灉杈撳叆鍧愭爣鍒楄〃涓虹┖锛岀洿鎺ヨ繑鍥炵┖缁撴灉
            if (coordinates.isEmpty()) {
                outputValues.put(OUTPUT_GRID_COORDINATES_ID, result);
                return;
            }
            
            // 鑾峰彇X杞村弬鏁?
            Vector3d xDirection = getVectorInput(INPUT_X_DIRECTION_ID, new Vector3d(1, 0, 0));
            double xDistance = getDoubleInput(INPUT_X_DISTANCE_ID, 1.0);
            int xCount = getIntInput(INPUT_X_COUNT_ID, 1);
            
            // 鑾峰彇Y杞村弬鏁?
            Vector3d yDirection = getVectorInput(INPUT_Y_DIRECTION_ID, new Vector3d(0, 1, 0));
            double yDistance = getDoubleInput(INPUT_Y_DISTANCE_ID, 1.0);
            int yCount = getIntInput(INPUT_Y_COUNT_ID, 1);
            
            // 瀵逛簬3D缃戞牸锛岃幏鍙朲杞村弬鏁?
            Vector3d zDirection = getVectorInput(INPUT_Z_DIRECTION_ID, new Vector3d(0, 0, 1));
            double zDistance = getDoubleInput(INPUT_Z_DISTANCE_ID, 1.0);
            int zCount = getIntInput(INPUT_Z_COUNT_ID, 1);
            
            // 纭繚鍙傛暟鍚堟硶
            xDirection = validateVector(xDirection);
            yDirection = validateVector(yDirection);
            zDirection = validateVector(zDirection);
            
            xDistance = Math.max(0.1, xDistance);
            yDistance = Math.max(0.1, yDistance);
            zDistance = Math.max(0.1, zDistance);
            
            xCount = Math.max(0, xCount);
            yCount = Math.max(0, yCount);
            zCount = Math.max(0, zCount);
            
            // 鍒涘缓缃戞牸闃靛垪
            if (gridType == GridType.GRID_3D) {
                // 3D缃戞牸
                create3DGridArray(coordinates, 
                                 xDirection, xDistance, xCount,
                                 yDirection, yDistance, yCount,
                                 zDirection, zDistance, zCount,
                                 includeOriginal, result);
            } else {
                // 2D缃戞牸
                create2DGridArray(coordinates, 
                                 xDirection, xDistance, xCount,
                                 yDirection, yDistance, yCount,
                                 includeOriginal, result);
            }
        }
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_GRID_COORDINATES_ID, result);
    }
    
    /**
     * 鍒涘缓2D缃戞牸闃靛垪
     */
    private void create2DGridArray(BlockPosList sourceCoords,
                                Vector3d xDir, double xDist, int xCount,
                                Vector3d yDir, double yDist, int yCount,
                                boolean includeOriginal, BlockPosList result) {
        // 鍒涘缓X鍜孻鏂瑰悜鐨勪綅绉诲悜閲?
        Vector3d xDisplacement = new Vector3d(xDir).mul(xDist);
        Vector3d yDisplacement = new Vector3d(yDir).mul(yDist);
        
        // 鐢熸垚缃戞牸
        for (int y = 0; y <= yCount; y++) {
            // 璁＄畻Y浣嶇Щ
            Vector3d yOffset = new Vector3d(yDisplacement).mul(y);
            
            for (int x = 0; x <= xCount; x++) {
                // 濡傛灉鏄師鐐逛笖涓嶅寘鍚師濮嬪潗鏍囷紝鍒欒烦杩?
                if (x == 0 && y == 0 && !includeOriginal) {
                    continue;
                }
                
                // 璁＄畻X浣嶇Щ
                Vector3d xOffset = new Vector3d(xDisplacement).mul(x);
                
                // 璁＄畻鎬讳綅绉?
                Vector3d totalOffset = new Vector3d(xOffset).add(yOffset);
                
                // 瀵规簮鍧愭爣鍒楄〃涓殑姣忎釜鍧愭爣搴旂敤浣嶇Щ
                for (BlockPos pos : sourceCoords) {
                    BlockPos newPos = new BlockPos(
                        (int) Math.round(pos.getX() + totalOffset.x),
                        (int) Math.round(pos.getY() + totalOffset.y),
                        (int) Math.round(pos.getZ() + totalOffset.z)
                    );
                    
                    // 娣诲姞鍒扮粨鏋滃垪琛?
                    result.add(newPos);
                }
            }
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * 鍒涘缓3D缃戞牸闃靛垪
     */
    private void create3DGridArray(BlockPosList sourceCoords,
                                Vector3d xDir, double xDist, int xCount,
                                Vector3d yDir, double yDist, int yCount,
                                Vector3d zDir, double zDist, int zCount,
                                boolean includeOriginal, BlockPosList result) {
        // 鍒涘缓X銆乊鍜孼鏂瑰悜鐨勪綅绉诲悜閲?
        Vector3d xDisplacement = new Vector3d(xDir).mul(xDist);
        Vector3d yDisplacement = new Vector3d(yDir).mul(yDist);
        Vector3d zDisplacement = new Vector3d(zDir).mul(zDist);
        
        // 鐢熸垚3D缃戞牸
        for (int z = 0; z <= zCount; z++) {
            // 璁＄畻Z浣嶇Щ
            Vector3d zOffset = new Vector3d(zDisplacement).mul(z);
            
            for (int y = 0; y <= yCount; y++) {
                // 璁＄畻Y浣嶇Щ
                Vector3d yOffset = new Vector3d(yDisplacement).mul(y);
                
                for (int x = 0; x <= xCount; x++) {
                    // 濡傛灉鏄師鐐逛笖涓嶅寘鍚師濮嬪潗鏍囷紝鍒欒烦杩?
                    if (x == 0 && y == 0 && z == 0 && !includeOriginal) {
                        continue;
                    }
                    
                    // 璁＄畻X浣嶇Щ
                    Vector3d xOffset = new Vector3d(xDisplacement).mul(x);
                    
                    // 璁＄畻鎬讳綅绉?
                    Vector3d totalOffset = new Vector3d(xOffset).add(yOffset).add(zOffset);
                    
                    // 瀵规簮鍧愭爣鍒楄〃涓殑姣忎釜鍧愭爣搴旂敤浣嶇Щ
                    for (BlockPos pos : sourceCoords) {
                        BlockPos newPos = new BlockPos(
                            (int) Math.round(pos.getX() + totalOffset.x),
                            (int) Math.round(pos.getY() + totalOffset.y),
                            (int) Math.round(pos.getZ() + totalOffset.z)
                        );
                        
                        // 娣诲姞鍒扮粨鏋滃垪琛?
                        result.add(newPos);
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * 鑾峰彇鍚戦噺杈撳叆
     */
    private Vector3d getVectorInput(String portId, Vector3d defaultValue) {
        Object inputObj = inputValues.get(portId);
        if (inputObj instanceof Vector3d) {
            return (Vector3d) inputObj;
        }
        return defaultValue;
    }
    
    /**
     * 鑾峰彇鍙岀簿搴︽诞鐐规暟杈撳叆
     */
    private double getDoubleInput(String portId, double defaultValue) {
        Object inputObj = inputValues.get(portId);
        if (inputObj instanceof Number) {
            return ((Number) inputObj).doubleValue();
        }
        return defaultValue;
    }
    
    /**
     * 鑾峰彇鏁存暟杈撳叆
     */
    private int getIntInput(String portId, int defaultValue) {
        Object inputObj = inputValues.get(portId);
        if (inputObj instanceof Number) {
            return ((Number) inputObj).intValue();
        }
        return defaultValue;
    }
    
    /**
     * 楠岃瘉鍚戦噺锛岀‘淇濅笉鏄浂鍚戦噺
     */
    private Vector3d validateVector(Vector3d vector) {
        if (vector.length() < 0.0001) {
            // 濡傛灉鏄浂鍚戦噺锛岃繑鍥為粯璁ゅ悜閲?
            switch (vector.hashCode() % 3) {
                case 0:
                    return new Vector3d(1, 0, 0);
                case 1:
                    return new Vector3d(0, 1, 0);
                default:
                    return new Vector3d(0, 0, 1);
            }
        }
        // 鏍囧噯鍖栧悜閲?
        return vector.normalize();
    }
    
    // --- Getters/Setters for Properties ---
    
    public GridType getGridType() {
        return gridType;
    }
    
    public void setGridType(GridType gridType) {
        this.gridType = gridType;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    public boolean isIncludeOriginal() {
        return includeOriginal;
    }
    
    public void setIncludeOriginal(boolean includeOriginal) {
        this.includeOriginal = includeOriginal;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    // --- 鑺傜偣鐘舵€佸簭鍒楀寲 ---
    
    @Override
    public Object getNodeState() {
        java.util.Map<String, Object> state = new java.util.HashMap<>();
        state.put("gridType", gridType.name());
        state.put("includeOriginal", includeOriginal);
        return state;
    }
    
    @Override
    public void setNodeState(Object state) {
        if (state instanceof java.util.Map) {
            java.util.Map<?, ?> stateMap = (java.util.Map<?, ?>) state;
            
            if (stateMap.containsKey("gridType")) {
                Object gridTypeObj = stateMap.get("gridType");
                if (gridTypeObj instanceof String) {
                    try {
                        setGridType(GridType.valueOf((String) gridTypeObj));
                    } catch (IllegalArgumentException e) {
                        // 蹇界暐鏃犳晥鐨勬灇涓惧€?
                    }
                }
            }
            
            if (stateMap.containsKey("includeOriginal")) {
                Object includeOriginalObj = stateMap.get("includeOriginal");
                if (includeOriginalObj instanceof Boolean) {
                    setIncludeOriginal((Boolean) includeOriginalObj);
                }
            }
        }
    }
} 
===FILE: C:\Users\navib\Desktop\development\NC\nodecraft\src\main\java\com\nodecraft\nodesystem\nodes\spatial\arrays\LinearArrayNode.java===
package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.spatial.arrays;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.util.BlockPosList;

import net.minecraft.util.math.BlockPos;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import org.joml.Vector3d;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Linear Array 鑺傜偣: 灏咰oordinate鍒楄〃娌跨洿绾挎柟鍚戦噸澶?
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "spatial.arrays.linear_array",
    displayName = "绾挎€ч樀鍒?,
    description = "灏嗗潗鏍囧垪琛ㄦ部鐩寸嚎鏂瑰悜閲嶅鎺掑垪",
    category = "spatial.arrays"
)
public class LinearArrayNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 鑺傜偣灞炴€?---
    private String description = "灏嗗潗鏍囧垪琛ㄦ部鐩寸嚎鏂瑰悜閲嶅";
    private boolean useDirection = true; // 榛樿浣跨敤鏂瑰悜鍚戦噺鍜岃窛绂?
    private boolean includeOriginal = true; // 榛樿鍖呭惈鍘熷鍧愭爣

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_COORDINATES_ID = "input_coordinates";
    private static final String INPUT_DIRECTION_ID = "input_direction";
    private static final String INPUT_DISTANCE_ID = "input_distance";
    private static final String INPUT_COUNT_ID = "input_count";
    private static final String INPUT_END_POINT_ID = "input_end_point";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_ARRAY_COORDINATES_ID = "output_array_coordinates";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public LinearArrayNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "spatial.arrays.linear_array");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_COORDINATES_ID, "Coordinates", 
                "The coordinates to repeat", NodeDataType.BLOCK_LIST, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_DIRECTION_ID, "Direction", 
                "Direction vector for the array", NodeDataType.VECTOR, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_DISTANCE_ID, "Distance", 
                "Distance between repeated instances", NodeDataType.DOUBLE, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_COUNT_ID, "Count", 
                "Number of repetitions to create", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_END_POINT_ID, "End Point", 
                "Alternative: end point for the array (if not using direction)", NodeDataType.BLOCK_POS, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_ARRAY_COORDINATES_ID, "Array Coordinates", 
                "The resulting array of coordinates", NodeDataType.BLOCK_LIST, this));
    }

    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return this.description;
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object coordinatesObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_COORDINATES_ID);
        Object directionObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_DIRECTION_ID);
        Object distanceObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_DISTANCE_ID);
        Object countObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_COUNT_ID);
        Object endPointObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_END_POINT_ID);
        
        // 榛樿绌虹殑鍧愭爣鍒楄〃
        BlockPosList result = new BlockPosList();
        
        // 妫€鏌ヨ緭鍏ユ槸鍚︿负鏂瑰潡鍧愭爣鍒楄〃
        if (coordinatesObj instanceof BlockPosList) {
            BlockPosList coordinates = (BlockPosList) coordinatesObj;
            
            // 濡傛灉杈撳叆鍧愭爣鍒楄〃涓虹┖锛岀洿鎺ヨ繑鍥炵┖缁撴灉
            if (coordinates.isEmpty()) {
                outputValues.put(OUTPUT_ARRAY_COORDINATES_ID, result);
                return;
            }
            
            // 榛樿鍙傛暟
            Vector3d direction = new Vector3d(1, 0, 0); // 榛樿X杞存柟鍚?
            double distance = 1.0; // 榛樿璺濈1涓柟鍧?
            int count = 1; // 榛樿澶嶅埗1娆★紙鎬诲叡2涓疄渚嬶紝鍖呮嫭鍘熷瀹炰緥锛?
            
            // 璁＄畻鏂瑰悜鍜岃窛绂?
            if (useDirection && directionObj instanceof Vector3d && 
                distanceObj instanceof Number && countObj instanceof Number) {
                // 浣跨敤鏂瑰悜鍚戦噺鍜岃窛绂?
                direction = (Vector3d) directionObj;
                distance = ((Number) distanceObj).doubleValue();
                count = ((Number) countObj).intValue();
                
                // 纭繚鍚堢悊鐨勫弬鏁?
                if (direction.length() < 0.0001) {
                    direction = new Vector3d(1, 0, 0); // 闃叉闆跺悜閲?
                } else {
                    direction.normalize(); // 鏍囧噯鍖栨柟鍚戝悜閲?
                }
                
                distance = Math.max(0.1, distance); // 纭繚璺濈涓烘
                count = Math.max(1, count); // 纭繚鑷冲皯澶嶅埗涓€娆?
                
                // 鍒涘缓绾挎€ч樀鍒?
                createLinearArray(coordinates, direction, distance, count, includeOriginal, result);
            } 
            else if (!useDirection && endPointObj instanceof BlockPos && countObj instanceof Number) {
                // 浣跨敤缁堢偣鍜岃鏁?
                BlockPos endPoint = (BlockPos) endPointObj;
                count = ((Number) countObj).intValue();
                
                // 璁＄畻闃靛垪鏂瑰悜鍚戦噺锛堜粠绗竴涓潗鏍囧埌缁堢偣锛?
                BlockPos firstPos = coordinates.getPositions().get(0);
                Vector3d startVec = new Vector3d(firstPos.getX(), firstPos.getY(), firstPos.getZ());
                Vector3d endVec = new Vector3d(endPoint.getX(), endPoint.getY(), endPoint.getZ());
                
                // 璁＄畻鏂瑰悜鍜岃窛绂?
                Vector3d diff = new Vector3d(endVec).sub(startVec);
                double totalDistance = diff.length();
                
                // 濡傛灉鎬昏窛绂诲お灏忥紝鐩存帴杩斿洖鍘熷鍧愭爣
                if (totalDistance < 0.0001 || count < 1) {
                    if (includeOriginal) {
                        result.addAll(coordinates.getPositions());
                    }
                    outputValues.put(OUTPUT_ARRAY_COORDINATES_ID, result);
                    return;
                }
                
                // 璁＄畻鏍囧噯鍖栨柟鍚戝拰鍗曚綅璺濈
                direction = diff.normalize();
                distance = totalDistance / count;
                
                // 鍒涘缓绾挎€ч樀鍒?
                createLinearArray(coordinates, direction, distance, count, includeOriginal, result);
            }
            else {
                // 杈撳叆涓嶅畬鏁达紝浣嗕粛鐒跺彲鑳戒娇鐢ㄩ粯璁ゅ€煎垱寤洪樀鍒?
                if (countObj instanceof Number) {
                    count = ((Number) countObj).intValue();
                    count = Math.max(1, count);
                }
                
                // 浣跨敤榛樿鍙傛暟鍒涘缓绾挎€ч樀鍒?
                createLinearArray(coordinates, direction, distance, count, includeOriginal, result);
            }
        }
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_ARRAY_COORDINATES_ID, result);
    }
    
    /**
     * 鍒涘缓绾挎€ч樀鍒?
     * @param sourceCoords 婧愬潗鏍囧垪琛?
     * @param direction 鏂瑰悜鍚戦噺
     * @param distance 璺濈
     * @param count 閲嶅娆℃暟
     * @param includeOriginal 鏄惁鍖呭惈鍘熷鍧愭爣
     * @param result 缁撴灉鍧愭爣鍒楄〃
     */
    private void createLinearArray(BlockPosList sourceCoords, Vector3d direction, 
                                double distance, int count, boolean includeOriginal,
                                BlockPosList result) {
        // 灏嗗師濮嬪潗鏍囨坊鍔犲埌缁撴灉涓紙濡傛灉闇€瑕侊級
        if (includeOriginal) {
            result.addAll(sourceCoords.getPositions());
        }
        
        // 璁＄畻瀹為檯鐨勪綅绉诲悜閲忥紙鏂瑰悜 * 璺濈锛?
        Vector3d displacement = new Vector3d(direction).mul(distance);
        
        // 瀵逛簬姣忎釜瀹炰緥锛屽皢婧愬潗鏍囧钩绉荤浉搴旂殑璺濈
        for (int i = 1; i <= count; i++) {
            // 璁＄畻褰撳墠瀹炰緥鐨勪綅绉?
            Vector3d currentDisplacement = new Vector3d(displacement).mul(i);
            
            // 娣诲姞骞崇Щ鍚庣殑姣忎釜鍧愭爣
            for (BlockPos pos : sourceCoords) {
                // 璁＄畻鏂板潗鏍?
                BlockPos newPos = new BlockPos(
                    (int) Math.round(pos.getX() + currentDisplacement.x),
                    (int) Math.round(pos.getY() + currentDisplacement.y),
                    (int) Math.round(pos.getZ() + currentDisplacement.z)
                );
                
                // 娣诲姞鍒扮粨鏋滃垪琛?
                result.add(newPos);
            }
        }
    }
    
    // --- Getters/Setters for Properties ---
    
    public boolean isUseDirection() {
        return useDirection;
    }
    
    public void setUseDirection(boolean useDirection) {
        this.useDirection = useDirection;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    public boolean isIncludeOriginal() {
        return includeOriginal;
    }
    
    public void setIncludeOriginal(boolean includeOriginal) {
        this.includeOriginal = includeOriginal;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    // --- 鑺傜偣鐘舵€佸簭鍒楀寲 ---
    
    @Override
    public Object getNodeState() {
        java.util.Map<String, Object> state = new java.util.HashMap<>();
        state.put("useDirection", useDirection);
        state.put("includeOriginal", includeOriginal);
        return state;
    }
    
    @Override
    public void setNodeState(Object state) {
        if (state instanceof java.util.Map) {
            java.util.Map<?, ?> stateMap = (java.util.Map<?, ?>) state;
            
            if (stateMap.containsKey("useDirection")) {
                Object useDirectionObj = stateMap.get("useDirection");
                if (useDirectionObj instanceof Boolean) {
                    setUseDirection((Boolean) useDirectionObj);
                }
            }
            
            if (stateMap.containsKey("includeOriginal")) {
                Object includeOriginalObj = stateMap.get("includeOriginal");
                if (includeOriginalObj instanceof Boolean) {
                    setIncludeOriginal((Boolean) includeOriginalObj);
                }
            }
        }
    }
} 
===FILE: C:\Users\navib\Desktop\development\NC\nodecraft\src\main\java\com\nodecraft\nodesystem\nodes\spatial\arrays\PolarArrayNode.java===
package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.spatial.arrays;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.util.BlockPosList;

import net.minecraft.util.math.BlockPos;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import org.joml.AxisAngle4d;
import org.joml.Matrix4d;
import org.joml.Quaterniond;
import org.joml.Vector3d;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Polar Array 鑺傜偣: 灏咰oordinate鍒楄〃缁曚腑蹇冪偣閲嶅鏃嬭浆
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "spatial.arrays.polar_array",
    displayName = "鏋佸潗鏍囬樀鍒?,
    description = "灏嗗潗鏍囧垪琛ㄧ粫涓績鐐归噸澶嶆棆杞帓鍒?,
    category = "spatial.arrays"
)
public class PolarArrayNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 鑺傜偣灞炴€?---
    private boolean includeOriginal = true; // 榛樿鍖呭惈鍘熷鍧愭爣

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_COORDINATES_ID = "input_coordinates";
    private static final String INPUT_CENTER_ID = "input_center";
    private static final String INPUT_AXIS_ID = "input_axis";
    private static final String INPUT_COUNT_ID = "input_count";
    private static final String INPUT_TOTAL_ANGLE_ID = "input_total_angle";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_ARRAY_COORDINATES_ID = "output_array_coordinates";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public PolarArrayNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "spatial.arrays.polar_array");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_COORDINATES_ID, "Coordinates", 
                "The coordinates to rotate in a circular pattern", NodeDataType.BLOCK_LIST, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_CENTER_ID, "Center", 
                "Center point of rotation", NodeDataType.BLOCK_POS, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_AXIS_ID, "Axis", 
                "Axis of rotation", NodeDataType.VECTOR, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_COUNT_ID, "Count", 
                "Number of copies to create", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_TOTAL_ANGLE_ID, "Total Angle", 
                "Total angle to distribute copies (degrees)", NodeDataType.DOUBLE, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_ARRAY_COORDINATES_ID, "Array Coordinates", 
                "The resulting polar array of coordinates", NodeDataType.BLOCK_LIST, this));
    }

    // 娣诲姞 getDescription 鏂规硶
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "Creates a circular pattern by rotating coordinates around a center point";
    }

    // 娣诲姞 getDisplayName 鏂规硶
    @Override
    public String getDisplayName() {
        return "Polar Array";
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object coordinatesObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_COORDINATES_ID);
        Object centerObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_CENTER_ID);
        Object axisObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_AXIS_ID);
        Object countObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_COUNT_ID);
        Object totalAngleObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_TOTAL_ANGLE_ID);
        
        // 榛樿绌虹殑鍧愭爣鍒楄〃
        BlockPosList result = new BlockPosList();
        
        // 妫€鏌ヨ緭鍏ユ槸鍚﹀悎娉?
        if (coordinatesObj instanceof BlockPosList && 
            centerObj instanceof BlockPos && 
            axisObj instanceof Vector3d && 
            countObj instanceof Number && 
            totalAngleObj instanceof Number) {
            
            BlockPosList coordinates = (BlockPosList) coordinatesObj;
            BlockPos centerPos = (BlockPos) centerObj;
            Vector3d axis = (Vector3d) axisObj;
            int count = ((Number) countObj).intValue();
