            case XZ: // XZ骞抽潰 (鍥哄畾Y鍧愭爣)
            default:
                // 姘村钩杈?
                for (int dx = -halfWidth; dx <= halfWidth; dx++) {
                    result.add(new BlockPos(x + dx, y, z - halfHeight)); // 搴曡竟
                    result.add(new BlockPos(x + dx, y, z + halfHeight)); // 椤惰竟
                }
                // 鍨傜洿杈?(閬垮厤閲嶅瑙掔偣)
                for (int dz = -halfHeight + 1; dz < halfHeight; dz++) {
                    result.add(new BlockPos(x - halfWidth, y, z + dz)); // 宸﹁竟
                    result.add(new BlockPos(x + halfWidth, y, z + dz)); // 鍙宠竟
                }
                break;
        }
    }
    
    // --- Getters/Setters for Properties ---
    
    public boolean isFillRectangle() {
        return fillRectangle;
    }
    
    public void setFillRectangle(boolean fillRectangle) {
        this.fillRectangle = fillRectangle;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    public Plane getPlane() {
        return plane;
    }
    
    public void setPlane(Plane plane) {
        this.plane = plane;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    // --- 鑺傜偣鐘舵€佸簭鍒楀寲 ---
    
    @Override
    public Object getNodeState() {
        java.util.Map<String, Object> state = new java.util.HashMap<>();
        state.put("fillRectangle", fillRectangle);
        state.put("plane", plane.name());
        return state;
    }
    
    @Override
    public void setNodeState(Object state) {
        if (state instanceof java.util.Map) {
            java.util.Map<?, ?> stateMap = (java.util.Map<?, ?>) state;
            
            if (stateMap.containsKey("fillRectangle")) {
                Object fillObj = stateMap.get("fillRectangle");
                if (fillObj instanceof Boolean) {
                    setFillRectangle((Boolean) fillObj);
                }
            }
            
            if (stateMap.containsKey("plane")) {
                Object planeObj = stateMap.get("plane");
                if (planeObj instanceof String) {
                    try {
                        setPlane(Plane.valueOf((String) planeObj));
                    } catch (IllegalArgumentException e) {
                        // 蹇界暐鏃犳晥鐨勬灇涓惧€?
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.spatial.generators;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.registry.NodeRegistry;
import com.nodecraft.gui.node.NodeInfo;

/**
 * 娉ㄥ唽绌洪棿褰㈢姸鐢熸垚鍣ㄧ浉鍏宠妭鐐?
 */
public class SpatialGeneratorNodes {
    
    /**
     * 娉ㄥ唽鎵€鏈夌┖闂村舰鐘剁敓鎴愬櫒鐩稿叧鑺傜偣
     */
    public static void registerNodes() {
        NodeRegistry registry = NodeRegistry.getInstance();
        
        // 娉ㄥ唽绌洪棿褰㈢姸鐢熸垚鍣ㄨ妭鐐?
        registry.registerNode(new NodeInfo("spatial.generators.lineblocks", "Line Blocks", "", "spatial.generators", LineBlocksNode.class));
        registry.registerNode(new NodeInfo("spatial.generators.rectangleblocks", "Rectangle Blocks", "", "spatial.generators", RectangleBlocksNode.class));
        registry.registerNode(new NodeInfo("spatial.generators.boxblocks", "Box Blocks", "", "spatial.generators", BoxBlocksNode.class));
        registry.registerNode(new NodeInfo("spatial.generators.circlesphereblocks", "Circle Sphere Blocks", "", "spatial.generators", CircleSphereBlocksNode.class));
        registry.registerNode(new NodeInfo("spatial.generators.cylinderblocks", "Cylinder Blocks", "", "spatial.generators", CylinderBlocksNode.class));
        registry.registerNode(new NodeInfo("spatial.generators.polylineblocks", "Polyline Blocks", "", "spatial.generators", PolylineBlocksNode.class));
        registry.registerNode(new NodeInfo("spatial.generators.curveblocks", "Curve Blocks", "", "spatial.generators", CurveBlocksNode.class));
    }
} 
===FILE: C:\Users\navib\Desktop\development\NC\nodecraft\src\main\java\com\nodecraft\nodesystem\nodes\spatial\points\MirrorCoordinatesNode.java===
package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.spatial.points;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.datatypes.PlaneData;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.util.BlockPosList;

import net.minecraft.util.math.BlockPos;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import org.joml.Vector3d;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Mirror Coordinates 鑺傜偣: 闀滃儚鍧愭爣鍒楄〃
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "spatial.points.mirror_coordinates",
    displayName = "鍧愭爣闀滃儚",
    description = "娌挎寚瀹氬钩闈㈤暅鍍忓潗鏍囧垪琛?,
    category = "spatial.points"
)
public class MirrorCoordinatesNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 鑺傜偣灞炴€?---
    public enum MirrorPlane {
        XY, YZ, XZ, CUSTOM
    }
    
    private MirrorPlane mirrorPlane = MirrorPlane.XZ; // 榛樿浣跨敤XZ骞抽潰(鍦板钩闈?

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_COORDINATES_ID = "input_coordinates";
    private static final String INPUT_PLANE_ID = "input_plane";
    private static final String INPUT_POINT_ID = "input_point";
    private static final String INPUT_NORMAL_ID = "input_normal";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_COORDINATES_ID = "output_coordinates";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public MirrorCoordinatesNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "spatial.points.mirror_coordinates");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_COORDINATES_ID, "Coordinates", 
                "The coordinates to mirror", NodeDataType.BLOCK_LIST, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_PLANE_ID, "Plane", 
                "Mirror plane (optional)", NodeDataType.PLANE, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_POINT_ID, "Point", 
                "Point on mirror plane", NodeDataType.BLOCK_POS, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_NORMAL_ID, "Normal", 
                "Normal vector of mirror plane", NodeDataType.VECTOR, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_COORDINATES_ID, "Coordinates", 
                "Mirrored coordinates", NodeDataType.BLOCK_LIST, this));
    }

    // 娣诲姞 getDescription 鏂规硶
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "Mirrors a list of coordinates across a plane";
    }

    // 娣诲姞 getDisplayName 鏂规硶
    @Override
    public String getDisplayName() {
        return "Mirror Coordinates";
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object coordinatesObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_COORDINATES_ID);
        Object planeObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_PLANE_ID);
        Object pointObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_POINT_ID);
        Object normalObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_NORMAL_ID);
        
        // 榛樿绌虹殑鍧愭爣鍒楄〃
        BlockPosList result = new BlockPosList();
        
        // 妫€鏌ュ潗鏍囧垪琛ㄨ緭鍏ユ槸鍚﹀悎娉?
        if (!(coordinatesObj instanceof BlockPosList)) {
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_COORDINATES_ID, result);
            return;
        }
        
        BlockPosList coordinates = (BlockPosList) coordinatesObj;
        
        // 纭畾闀滃儚骞抽潰
        PlaneData mirrorPlaneData = null;
        
        // 棣栭€夛細濡傛灉鎻愪緵浜哖laneData瀵硅薄锛岀洿鎺ヤ娇鐢?
        if (planeObj instanceof PlaneData) {
            mirrorPlaneData = (PlaneData) planeObj;
        } 
        // 娆￠€夛細濡傛灉鎻愪緵浜嗙偣鍜屾硶绾匡紝鍒涘缓骞抽潰
        else if (pointObj instanceof BlockPos && normalObj instanceof Vector3d) {
            BlockPos point = (BlockPos) pointObj;
            Vector3d normal = ((Vector3d) normalObj).normalize(); // 鏍囧噯鍖栨硶绾垮悜閲?
            Vector3d pointVec = new Vector3d(point.getX(), point.getY(), point.getZ());
            mirrorPlaneData = new PlaneData(pointVec, normal);
        } 
        // 鏈€鍚庯細鏍规嵁棰勮鐨刴irrorPlane鍒涘缓涓€涓粯璁ゅ钩闈?
        else {
            // 鍒涘缓涓€涓粯璁ょ殑闀滃儚骞抽潰锛屽熀浜庢灇涓惧€?
            Vector3d origin = new Vector3d(0, 0, 0);
            Vector3d normal;
            
            switch (mirrorPlane) {
                case XY:
                    normal = new Vector3d(0, 0, 1); // Z杞翠负娉曠嚎
                    break;
                case YZ:
                    normal = new Vector3d(1, 0, 0); // X杞翠负娉曠嚎
                    break;
                case XZ:
                default:
                    normal = new Vector3d(0, 1, 0); // Y杞翠负娉曠嚎
                    break;
            }
            
            mirrorPlaneData = new PlaneData(origin, normal);
        }
        
        // 搴旂敤闀滃儚鍙樻崲
        for (BlockPos pos : coordinates) {
            // 杞崲涓哄弻绮惧害鍚戦噺
            Vector3d posVec = new Vector3d(pos.getX(), pos.getY(), pos.getZ());
            
            // 鍦ㄥ钩闈笂杩涜闀滃儚鎶曞奖
            Vector3d mirroredVec = mirrorPoint(posVec, mirrorPlaneData);
            
            // 杞崲鍥濨lockPos锛堝洓鑸嶄簲鍏ュ埌鏈€鎺ヨ繎鐨勬暣鏁帮級
            BlockPos mirroredPos = new BlockPos(
                (int) Math.round(mirroredVec.x),
                (int) Math.round(mirroredVec.y),
                (int) Math.round(mirroredVec.z)
            );
            
            // 娣诲姞鍒扮粨鏋滃垪琛?
            result.add(mirroredPos);
        }
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_COORDINATES_ID, result);
    }
    
    /**
     * 鍦ㄥ钩闈笂闀滃儚涓€涓偣
     * @param point 瑕侀暅鍍忕殑鐐?
     * @param plane 闀滃儚骞抽潰
     * @return 闀滃儚鍚庣殑鐐?
     */
    private Vector3d mirrorPoint(Vector3d point, PlaneData plane) {
        // 鑾峰彇骞抽潰娉曠嚎
        Vector3d normal = plane.getNormal();
        
        // 鑾峰彇骞抽潰涓婄殑涓€涓偣
        Vector3d planePoint = plane.getPoint();
        
        // 璁＄畻鐐瑰埌骞抽潰鐨勬湁绗﹀彿璺濈
        double distance = plane.signedDistanceTo(point);
        
        // 娌挎硶绾挎柟鍚戝钩绉讳袱鍊嶇殑璺濈
        Vector3d displacement = new Vector3d(normal).mul(2 * distance);
        
        // 浠庡師鐐瑰噺鍘讳綅绉诲緱鍒伴暅鍍忕偣
        Vector3d result = new Vector3d(point).sub(displacement);
        
        return result;
    }
    
    // --- Getters/Setters for Properties ---
    
    public MirrorPlane getMirrorPlane() {
        return mirrorPlane;
    }
    
    public void setMirrorPlane(MirrorPlane plane) {
        this.mirrorPlane = plane;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    // --- 鑺傜偣鐘舵€佸簭鍒楀寲 ---
    
    @Override
    public Object getNodeState() {
        java.util.Map<String, Object> state = new java.util.HashMap<>();
        state.put("mirrorPlane", mirrorPlane.name());
        return state;
    }
    
    @Override
    public void setNodeState(Object state) {
        if (state instanceof java.util.Map) {
            java.util.Map<?, ?> stateMap = (java.util.Map<?, ?>) state;
            
            if (stateMap.containsKey("mirrorPlane")) {
                Object planeObj = stateMap.get("mirrorPlane");
                if (planeObj instanceof String) {
                    try {
                        setMirrorPlane(MirrorPlane.valueOf((String) planeObj));
                    } catch (IllegalArgumentException e) {
                        // 蹇界暐鏃犳晥鐨勬灇涓惧€?
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
} 
===FILE: C:\Users\navib\Desktop\development\NC\nodecraft\src\main\java\com\nodecraft\nodesystem\nodes\spatial\points\OffsetCoordinatesNode.java===
package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.spatial.points;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.util.BlockPosList;

import net.minecraft.util.math.BlockPos;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import org.joml.Vector3d;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Offset Coordinates 鑺傜偣: 瀵瑰潗鏍囧垪琛ㄥ簲鐢ㄥ亸绉?
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "spatial.points.offset_coordinates",
    displayName = "鍧愭爣鍋忕Щ",
    description = "瀵瑰潗鏍囧垪琛ㄤ腑鐨勬瘡涓潗鏍囧簲鐢ㄥ亸绉婚噺",
    category = "spatial.points"
)
public class OffsetCoordinatesNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_COORDINATES_ID = "input_coordinates";
    private static final String INPUT_OFFSET_VECTOR_ID = "input_offset_vector";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_COORDINATES_ID = "output_coordinates";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public OffsetCoordinatesNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "spatial.points.offset_coordinates");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_COORDINATES_ID, "Coordinates", 
                "The coordinates to offset", NodeDataType.BLOCK_LIST, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_OFFSET_VECTOR_ID, "Offset Vector", 
                "Vector to translate by", NodeDataType.VECTOR, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_COORDINATES_ID, "Coordinates", 
                "Offset coordinates", NodeDataType.BLOCK_LIST, this));
    }

    // 娣诲姞 getDescription 鏂规硶
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "Translates a list of coordinates by a vector";
    }

    // 娣诲姞 getDisplayName 鏂规硶
    @Override
    public String getDisplayName() {
        return "Offset Coordinates";
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object coordinatesObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_COORDINATES_ID);
        Object offsetObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_OFFSET_VECTOR_ID);
        
        // 榛樿绌虹殑鍧愭爣鍒楄〃
        BlockPosList result = new BlockPosList();
        
        // 妫€鏌ヨ緭鍏ユ槸鍚︿负鏂瑰潡鍧愭爣鍒楄〃
        if (coordinatesObj instanceof BlockPosList && offsetObj instanceof Vector3d) {
            BlockPosList coordinates = (BlockPosList) coordinatesObj;
            Vector3d offset = (Vector3d) offsetObj;
            
            // 鑾峰彇鏁存暟鍋忕Щ閲忥紙鍥涜垗浜斿叆鍒版渶鎺ヨ繎鐨勬暣鏁帮級
            int offsetX = (int) Math.round(offset.x);
            int offsetY = (int) Math.round(offset.y);
            int offsetZ = (int) Math.round(offset.z);
            
            // 涓烘瘡涓潗鏍囧簲鐢ㄥ亸绉?
            for (BlockPos pos : coordinates) {
                BlockPos offsetPos = new BlockPos(
                    pos.getX() + offsetX,
                    pos.getY() + offsetY,
                    pos.getZ() + offsetZ
                );
                result.add(offsetPos);
            }
        }
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_COORDINATES_ID, result);
    }
}

package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.spatial.points;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.util.BlockPosList;

import net.minecraft.util.math.BlockPos;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import org.joml.Vector3d;

import java.util.Random;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Randomize Coordinates 鑺傜偣: 闅忔満鍖栧潗鏍囧垪琛?
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "spatial.points.randomize_coordinates",
    displayName = "鍧愭爣闅忔満鍖?,
    description = "瀵瑰潗鏍囧垪琛ㄤ腑鐨勬瘡涓潗鏍囨坊鍔犻殢鏈哄亸绉?,
    category = "spatial.points"
)
public class RandomizeCoordinatesNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 鑺傜偣灞炴€?---
    private boolean useUniformRange = true; // 榛樿浣跨敤缁熶竴鑼冨洿
    private boolean useSeed = false; // 榛樿涓嶄娇鐢ㄧ瀛?
    private long seed = 0; // 榛樿绉嶅瓙鍊?

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_COORDINATES_ID = "input_coordinates";
    private static final String INPUT_MIN_RANGE_ID = "input_min_range";
    private static final String INPUT_MAX_RANGE_ID = "input_max_range";
    private static final String INPUT_RANGE_VECTOR_ID = "input_range_vector";
    private static final String INPUT_SEED_ID = "input_seed";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_COORDINATES_ID = "output_coordinates";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public RandomizeCoordinatesNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "spatial.points.randomize_coordinates");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_COORDINATES_ID, "Coordinates", 
                "The coordinates to randomize", NodeDataType.BLOCK_LIST, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_MIN_RANGE_ID, "Min Range", 
                "Minimum random offset (uniform)", NodeDataType.DOUBLE, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_MAX_RANGE_ID, "Max Range", 
                "Maximum random offset (uniform)", NodeDataType.DOUBLE, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_RANGE_VECTOR_ID, "Range Vector", 
                "Maximum random offset vector (XYZ)", NodeDataType.VECTOR, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_SEED_ID, "Seed", 
                "Random seed (optional)", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_COORDINATES_ID, "Coordinates", 
                "Randomized coordinates", NodeDataType.BLOCK_LIST, this));
    }

    // 娣诲姞 getDescription 鏂规硶
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "Applies random offset to a list of coordinates within a given range";
    }

    // 娣诲姞 getDisplayName 鏂规硶
    @Override
    public String getDisplayName() {
        return "Randomize Coordinates";
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object coordinatesObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_COORDINATES_ID);
        Object minRangeObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_MIN_RANGE_ID);
        Object maxRangeObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_MAX_RANGE_ID);
        Object rangeVectorObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_RANGE_VECTOR_ID);
        Object seedObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_SEED_ID);
        
        // 榛樿绌虹殑鍧愭爣鍒楄〃
        BlockPosList result = new BlockPosList();
        
        // 妫€鏌ュ熀鏈緭鍏ユ槸鍚﹀悎娉?
        if (!(coordinatesObj instanceof BlockPosList)) {
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_COORDINATES_ID, result);
            return;
        }
        
        BlockPosList coordinates = (BlockPosList) coordinatesObj;
        
        // 纭畾闅忔満鑼冨洿
        double minRange = 0.0;
        double maxRange = 1.0;
        Vector3d rangeVector = new Vector3d(1, 1, 1);
        
        // 纭畾闅忔満绉嶅瓙
        long randomSeed = this.seed;
        if (useSeed && seedObj instanceof Number) {
            randomSeed = ((Number) seedObj).longValue();
        } else if (!useSeed && seedObj instanceof Number) {
            // 濡傛灉鎻愪緵浜嗙瀛愪絾娌℃湁鍚敤绉嶅瓙璁剧疆锛屽垯鑷姩鍚敤
            randomSeed = ((Number) seedObj).longValue();
            useSeed = true;
        }
        
        // 鍒涘缓闅忔満鏁扮敓鎴愬櫒
        Random random;
        if (useSeed) {
            random = new Random(randomSeed);
        } else {
            random = new Random();
        }
        
        // 纭畾浣跨敤鐨勮寖鍥寸被鍨?
        if (useUniformRange) {
            // 浣跨敤缁熶竴鑼冨洿
            if (minRangeObj instanceof Number) {
                minRange = ((Number) minRangeObj).doubleValue();
            }
            if (maxRangeObj instanceof Number) {
                maxRange = ((Number) maxRangeObj).doubleValue();
            }
            // 纭繚鏈€灏忓€?=鏈€澶у€?
            if (minRange > maxRange) {
                double temp = minRange;
                minRange = maxRange;
                maxRange = temp;
            }
        } else if (rangeVectorObj instanceof Vector3d) {
            // 浣跨敤鍚戦噺鑼冨洿
            rangeVector = (Vector3d) rangeVectorObj;
            // 纭繚鑼冨洿鍚戦噺鍚勫垎閲忎负姝ｅ€?
            rangeVector.x = Math.abs(rangeVector.x);
            rangeVector.y = Math.abs(rangeVector.y);
            rangeVector.z = Math.abs(rangeVector.z);
        }
        
        // 搴旂敤闅忔満鍋忕Щ鍒版瘡涓潗鏍?
        for (BlockPos pos : coordinates) {
            // 璁＄畻闅忔満鍋忕Щ
            int offsetX, offsetY, offsetZ;
            
            if (useUniformRange) {
                // 鍦ㄦ渶灏忚寖鍥村拰鏈€澶ц寖鍥翠箣闂寸敓鎴愰殢鏈哄€?
                double range = maxRange - minRange;
                offsetX = (int) Math.round(minRange + random.nextDouble() * range);
                if (random.nextBoolean()) offsetX = -offsetX; // 50%姒傜巼涓鸿礋鍊?
                
                offsetY = (int) Math.round(minRange + random.nextDouble() * range);
                if (random.nextBoolean()) offsetY = -offsetY; // 50%姒傜巼涓鸿礋鍊?
                
                offsetZ = (int) Math.round(minRange + random.nextDouble() * range);
                if (random.nextBoolean()) offsetZ = -offsetZ; // 50%姒傜巼涓鸿礋鍊?
            } else {
                // 浣跨敤鍚戦噺鑼冨洿鐢熸垚闅忔満鍊?
                offsetX = (int) Math.round((random.nextDouble() * 2 - 1) * rangeVector.x);
                offsetY = (int) Math.round((random.nextDouble() * 2 - 1) * rangeVector.y);
                offsetZ = (int) Math.round((random.nextDouble() * 2 - 1) * rangeVector.z);
            }
            
            // 搴旂敤鍋忕Щ
            BlockPos randomizedPos = new BlockPos(
                pos.getX() + offsetX,
                pos.getY() + offsetY,
                pos.getZ() + offsetZ
            );
            
            // 娣诲姞鍒扮粨鏋滃垪琛?
            result.add(randomizedPos);
        }
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_COORDINATES_ID, result);
    }
    
    // --- Getters/Setters for Properties ---
    
    public boolean isUseUniformRange() {
        return useUniformRange;
    }
    
    public void setUseUniformRange(boolean useUniformRange) {
        this.useUniformRange = useUniformRange;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    public boolean isUseSeed() {
        return useSeed;
    }
    
    public void setUseSeed(boolean useSeed) {
        this.useSeed = useSeed;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    public long getSeed() {
        return seed;
    }
    
    public void setSeed(long seed) {
        this.seed = seed;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    // --- 鑺傜偣鐘舵€佸簭鍒楀寲 ---
    
    @Override
    public Object getNodeState() {
        java.util.Map<String, Object> state = new java.util.HashMap<>();
        state.put("useUniformRange", useUniformRange);
        state.put("useSeed", useSeed);
        state.put("seed", seed);
        return state;
    }
    
    @Override
    public void setNodeState(Object state) {
        if (state instanceof java.util.Map) {
            java.util.Map<?, ?> stateMap = (java.util.Map<?, ?>) state;
            
            if (stateMap.containsKey("useUniformRange")) {
                Object useUniformObj = stateMap.get("useUniformRange");
                if (useUniformObj instanceof Boolean) {
                    setUseUniformRange((Boolean) useUniformObj);
                }
            }
            
            if (stateMap.containsKey("useSeed")) {
                Object useSeedObj = stateMap.get("useSeed");
                if (useSeedObj instanceof Boolean) {
                    setUseSeed((Boolean) useSeedObj);
                }
            }
            
            if (stateMap.containsKey("seed")) {
                Object seedObj = stateMap.get("seed");
                if (seedObj instanceof Number) {
                    setSeed(((Number) seedObj).longValue());
                }
            }
        }
    }
} 
===FILE: C:\Users\navib\Desktop\development\NC\nodecraft\src\main\java\com\nodecraft\nodesystem\nodes\spatial\points\RotateCoordinatesNode.java===
package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.spatial.points;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.util.BlockPosList;

import net.minecraft.util.math.BlockPos;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import org.joml.AxisAngle4d;
import org.joml.Matrix4d;
import org.joml.Quaterniond;
import org.joml.Vector3d;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Rotate Coordinates 鑺傜偣: 鏃嬭浆鍧愭爣鍒楄〃
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "spatial.points.rotate_coordinates",
    displayName = "鍧愭爣鏃嬭浆",
    description = "缁曟寚瀹氳酱鍜屼腑蹇冪偣鏃嬭浆鍧愭爣鍒楄〃",
    category = "spatial.points"
)
public class RotateCoordinatesNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 鑺傜偣灞炴€?---
    public enum RotationAxis {
        X_AXIS, Y_AXIS, Z_AXIS, CUSTOM
    }
    
    private RotationAxis rotationAxis = RotationAxis.Y_AXIS; // 榛樿缁昚杞存棆杞?

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_COORDINATES_ID = "input_coordinates";
    private static final String INPUT_CENTER_ID = "input_center";
    private static final String INPUT_AXIS_ID = "input_axis";
    private static final String INPUT_ANGLE_ID = "input_angle";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_COORDINATES_ID = "output_coordinates";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public RotateCoordinatesNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "spatial.points.rotate_coordinates");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_COORDINATES_ID, "Coordinates", 
                "The coordinates to rotate", NodeDataType.BLOCK_LIST, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_CENTER_ID, "Center", 
                "Rotation center point", NodeDataType.BLOCK_POS, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_AXIS_ID, "Axis", 
                "Rotation axis vector", NodeDataType.VECTOR, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_ANGLE_ID, "Angle", 
                "Rotation angle in degrees", NodeDataType.DOUBLE, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_COORDINATES_ID, "Coordinates", 
                "Rotated coordinates", NodeDataType.BLOCK_LIST, this));
    }

    // 娣诲姞 getDescription 鏂规硶
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "Rotates a list of coordinates around a point and axis";
    }

    // 娣诲姞 getDisplayName 鏂规硶
    @Override
    public String getDisplayName() {
        return "Rotate Coordinates";
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object coordinatesObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_COORDINATES_ID);
        Object centerObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_CENTER_ID);
        Object axisObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_AXIS_ID);
        Object angleObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_ANGLE_ID);
        
        // 榛樿绌虹殑鍧愭爣鍒楄〃
        BlockPosList result = new BlockPosList();
        
        // 妫€鏌ヨ緭鍏ユ槸鍚﹀悎娉?
        if (coordinatesObj instanceof BlockPosList && 
            centerObj instanceof BlockPos && 
            axisObj instanceof Vector3d && 
            angleObj instanceof Number) {
            
            BlockPosList coordinates = (BlockPosList) coordinatesObj;
            BlockPos centerPos = (BlockPos) centerObj;
            Vector3d axis = ((Vector3d) axisObj).normalize(); // 鏍囧噯鍖栬酱鍚戦噺
            double angleDegrees = ((Number) angleObj).doubleValue();
            double angleRadians = Math.toRadians(angleDegrees);
            
            // 鍒涘缓涓績鐐瑰悜閲?
            Vector3d center = new Vector3d(centerPos.getX(), centerPos.getY(), centerPos.getZ());
            
            // 鍒涘缓鍙樻崲鐭╅樀
            Matrix4d rotationMatrix = new Matrix4d();
            
            // 鍒涘缓鏃嬭浆鍥涘厓鏁?
            Quaterniond rotation = new Quaterniond(new AxisAngle4d(angleRadians, axis.x, axis.y, axis.z));
            
            // 鏋勫缓鍙樻崲鐭╅樀锛氬钩绉诲埌鍘熺偣 -> 鏃嬭浆 -> 骞崇Щ鍥炲幓
            rotationMatrix.translate(-center.x, -center.y, -center.z)  // 骞崇Щ鍒板師鐐?
                          .rotate(rotation)                           // 搴旂敤鏃嬭浆
                          .translate(center.x, center.y, center.z);   // 骞崇Щ鍥炲師浣嶇疆
            
            // 灏嗘瘡涓潗鏍囧簲鐢ㄦ棆杞彉鎹?
            for (BlockPos pos : coordinates) {
                // 杞崲涓哄弻绮惧害鍚戦噺杩涜鍙樻崲
                Vector3d posVec = new Vector3d(pos.getX(), pos.getY(), pos.getZ());
                
                // 搴旂敤鍙樻崲
                Vector3d transformedVec = posVec.mulPosition(rotationMatrix);
                
                // 杞崲鍥濨lockPos锛堝洓鑸嶄簲鍏ュ埌鏈€鎺ヨ繎鐨勬暣鏁帮級
                BlockPos rotatedPos = new BlockPos(
                    (int) Math.round(transformedVec.x),
                    (int) Math.round(transformedVec.y),
                    (int) Math.round(transformedVec.z)
                );
                
                // 娣诲姞鍒扮粨鏋滃垪琛?
                result.add(rotatedPos);
            }
        }
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_COORDINATES_ID, result);
    }
    
    // --- Getters/Setters for Properties ---
    
    public RotationAxis getRotationAxis() {
        return rotationAxis;
    }
    
    public void setRotationAxis(RotationAxis axis) {
        this.rotationAxis = axis;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    // --- 鑺傜偣鐘舵€佸簭鍒楀寲 ---
    
    @Override
    public Object getNodeState() {
        java.util.Map<String, Object> state = new java.util.HashMap<>();
        state.put("rotationAxis", rotationAxis.name());
        return state;
    }
    
    @Override
    public void setNodeState(Object state) {
        if (state instanceof java.util.Map) {
            java.util.Map<?, ?> stateMap = (java.util.Map<?, ?>) state;
            
            if (stateMap.containsKey("rotationAxis")) {
                Object axisObj = stateMap.get("rotationAxis");
                if (axisObj instanceof String) {
                    try {
                        setRotationAxis(RotationAxis.valueOf((String) axisObj));
                    } catch (IllegalArgumentException e) {
                        // 蹇界暐鏃犳晥鐨勬灇涓惧€?
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
} 
===FILE: C:\Users\navib\Desktop\development\NC\nodecraft\src\main\java\com\nodecraft\nodesystem\nodes\spatial\points\ScaleCoordinatesNode.java===
package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.spatial.points;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.util.BlockPosList;

import net.minecraft.util.math.BlockPos;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import org.joml.Vector3d;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Scale Coordinates 鑺傜偣: 缂╂斁鍧愭爣鍒楄〃
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "spatial.points.scale_coordinates",
    displayName = "鍧愭爣缂╂斁",
    description = "浠ユ寚瀹氫腑蹇冪偣涓哄熀鍑嗙缉鏀惧潗鏍囧垪琛?,
    category = "spatial.points"
)
public class ScaleCoordinatesNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_COORDINATES_ID = "input_coordinates";
    private static final String INPUT_CENTER_ID = "input_center";
    private static final String INPUT_SCALE_FACTOR_ID = "input_scale_factor";
    private static final String INPUT_SCALE_VECTOR_ID = "input_scale_vector";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_COORDINATES_ID = "output_coordinates";

    // --- 鑺傜偣灞炴€?---
    private boolean useUniformScaling = true; // 榛樿浣跨敤缁熶竴缂╂斁

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public ScaleCoordinatesNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "spatial.points.scale_coordinates");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_COORDINATES_ID, "Coordinates", 
                "The coordinates to scale", NodeDataType.BLOCK_LIST, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_CENTER_ID, "Center", 
                "Scaling center point", NodeDataType.BLOCK_POS, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_SCALE_FACTOR_ID, "Scale Factor", 
                "Uniform scaling factor", NodeDataType.DOUBLE, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_SCALE_VECTOR_ID, "Scale Vector", 
                "Non-uniform scaling vector (XYZ)", NodeDataType.VECTOR, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_COORDINATES_ID, "Coordinates", 
                "Scaled coordinates", NodeDataType.BLOCK_LIST, this));
    }

    // 娣诲姞 getDescription 鏂规硶
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "Scales a list of coordinates relative to a center point";
    }

    // 娣诲姞 getDisplayName 鏂规硶
    @Override
    public String getDisplayName() {
        return "Scale Coordinates";
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object coordinatesObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_COORDINATES_ID);
        Object centerObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_CENTER_ID);
        Object scaleFactorObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_SCALE_FACTOR_ID);
        Object scaleVectorObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_SCALE_VECTOR_ID);
        
        // 榛樿绌虹殑鍧愭爣鍒楄〃
        BlockPosList result = new BlockPosList();
        
        // 妫€鏌ュ熀鏈緭鍏ユ槸鍚﹀悎娉?
        if (coordinatesObj instanceof BlockPosList && centerObj instanceof BlockPos) {
            BlockPosList coordinates = (BlockPosList) coordinatesObj;
            BlockPos centerPos = (BlockPos) centerObj;
            
            // 鍒涘缓涓績鐐瑰悜閲?
            Vector3d center = new Vector3d(centerPos.getX(), centerPos.getY(), centerPos.getZ());
            
            // 鍒ゆ柇浣跨敤缁熶竴缂╂斁杩樻槸闈炵粺涓€缂╂斁
            Vector3d scale;
            if (useUniformScaling && scaleFactorObj instanceof Number) {
                // 缁熶竴缂╂斁 - 浣跨敤鍗曚竴缂╂斁鍥犲瓙
                double factor = ((Number) scaleFactorObj).doubleValue();
                scale = new Vector3d(factor, factor, factor);
            } else if (scaleVectorObj instanceof Vector3d) {
                // 闈炵粺涓€缂╂斁 - 浣跨敤缂╂斁鍚戦噺
                scale = (Vector3d) scaleVectorObj;
            } else {
                // 鏈彁渚涙湁鏁堢殑缂╂斁鍥犲瓙锛屼娇鐢ㄩ粯璁ゅ€?锛堜笉缂╂斁锛?
                scale = new Vector3d(1, 1, 1);
            }
            
            // 搴旂敤缂╂斁鍙樻崲鍒版瘡涓潗鏍?
            for (BlockPos pos : coordinates) {
                // 杞崲涓哄弻绮惧害鍚戦噺
                Vector3d posVec = new Vector3d(pos.getX(), pos.getY(), pos.getZ());
                
                // 骞崇Щ鍒板師鐐?
                posVec.sub(center);
                
                // 搴旂敤缂╂斁
                posVec.mul(scale);
                
                // 骞崇Щ鍥炲師浣嶇疆
                posVec.add(center);
                
                // 杞崲鍥濨lockPos锛堝洓鑸嶄簲鍏ュ埌鏈€鎺ヨ繎鐨勬暣鏁帮級
                BlockPos scaledPos = new BlockPos(
                    (int) Math.round(posVec.x),
                    (int) Math.round(posVec.y),
                    (int) Math.round(posVec.z)
                );
                
                // 娣诲姞鍒扮粨鏋滃垪琛?
                result.add(scaledPos);
            }
        }
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_COORDINATES_ID, result);
    }
    
    // --- Getters/Setters for Properties ---
    
    public boolean isUseUniformScaling() {
        return useUniformScaling;
    }
    
    public void setUseUniformScaling(boolean useUniformScaling) {
        this.useUniformScaling = useUniformScaling;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    // --- 鑺傜偣鐘舵€佸簭鍒楀寲 ---
    
    @Override
    public Object getNodeState() {
        java.util.Map<String, Object> state = new java.util.HashMap<>();
        state.put("useUniformScaling", useUniformScaling);
        return state;
    }
    
    @Override
    public void setNodeState(Object state) {
        if (state instanceof java.util.Map) {
            java.util.Map<?, ?> stateMap = (java.util.Map<?, ?>) state;
            
            if (stateMap.containsKey("useUniformScaling")) {
                Object useUniformObj = stateMap.get("useUniformScaling");
                if (useUniformObj instanceof Boolean) {
                    setUseUniformScaling((Boolean) useUniformObj);
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

     * 娉ㄥ唽鎵€鏈夌┖闂村潗鏍囩偣鐩稿叧鑺傜偣

        // 娉ㄥ唽鍧愭爣鎿嶄綔鑺傜偣

package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.spatial.voxel;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.util.BlockPosList;

import net.minecraft.util.math.BlockPos;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;

import java.util.HashSet;
import java.util.Set;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Difference (Coords) 鑺傜偣: 璁＄畻涓や釜 Coordinate 鍒楄〃鐨勫樊闆?
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "spatial.voxel.difference_coords",
    displayName = "鍧愭爣宸泦",
    description = "璁＄畻涓や釜鍧愭爣鍒楄〃鐨勫樊闆嗭紝杩斿洖绗竴涓垪琛ㄤ腑涓嶅湪绗簩涓垪琛ㄤ腑鐨勫潗鏍?,
    category = "spatial.voxel"
)
public class DifferenceCoordsNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_COORDS_A_ID = "input_coords_a";
    private static final String INPUT_COORDS_B_ID = "input_coords_b";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_DIFFERENCE_ID = "output_difference";
    private static final String OUTPUT_COUNT_ID = "output_count";
    private static final String OUTPUT_REMOVED_COUNT_ID = "output_removed_count";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public DifferenceCoordsNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "spatial.voxel.difference_coords");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_COORDS_A_ID, "Coordinates A", 
                "鍩虹鍧愭爣鍒楄〃", NodeDataType.BLOCK_LIST, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_COORDS_B_ID, "Coordinates B", 
                "瑕佺Щ闄ょ殑鍧愭爣鍒楄〃", NodeDataType.BLOCK_LIST, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_DIFFERENCE_ID, "Difference", 
                "宸泦缁撴灉鍒楄〃", NodeDataType.BLOCK_LIST, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_COUNT_ID, "Count", 
                "缁撴灉鍧愭爣鏁伴噺", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_REMOVED_COUNT_ID, "Removed Count", 
                "琚Щ闄ょ殑鍧愭爣鏁伴噺", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
    }

    // 娣诲姞 getDescription 鏂规硶
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "浠庣涓€涓潗鏍囧垪琛ㄤ腑绉婚櫎绗簩涓垪琛ㄤ腑鐨勭偣";
    }

    // 娣诲姞 getDisplayName 鏂规硶
    @Override
    public String getDisplayName() {
        return "Difference (Coords)";
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object coordsAObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_COORDS_A_ID);
        Object coordsBObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_COORDS_B_ID);
        
        // 鍒涘缓缁撴灉鍒楄〃鍜岃鏁板櫒
        BlockPosList resultList = new BlockPosList();
        int removedCount = 0;
        
        // 妫€鏌ヨ緭鍏ユ槸鍚︿负鍧愭爣鍒楄〃
        if (coordsAObj instanceof BlockPosList) {
            BlockPosList coordsA = (BlockPosList) coordsAObj;
            
            // 濡傛灉娌℃湁绗簩涓垪琛紝缁撴灉灏辨槸绗竴涓垪琛ㄧ殑鍓湰
            if (!(coordsBObj instanceof BlockPosList)) {
                resultList.addAll(coordsA.getPositions());
            } else {
                // 灏咮鍒楄〃杞崲涓篐ashSet浠ヤ究蹇€熸煡鎵?
                BlockPosList coordsB = (BlockPosList) coordsBObj;
                Set<BlockPos> subtractSet = new HashSet<>();
                
                for (BlockPos pos : coordsB) {
                    subtractSet.add(pos.toImmutable());
                }
                
                // 璁＄畻宸泦
                int originalSize = coordsA.size();
                for (BlockPos pos : coordsA) {
                    if (!subtractSet.contains(pos)) {
                        resultList.add(pos);
                    }
                }
                
                // 璁＄畻绉婚櫎鐨勬暟閲?
                removedCount = originalSize - resultList.size();
            }
        }
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_DIFFERENCE_ID, resultList);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_COUNT_ID, resultList.size());
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_REMOVED_COUNT_ID, removedCount);
    }
}

package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.spatial.voxel;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.util.BlockPosList;

import net.minecraft.util.math.BlockPos;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;

import java.util.HashSet;
import java.util.Set;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Intersection (Coords) 鑺傜偣: 璁＄畻涓や釜 Coordinate 鍒楄〃鐨勪氦闆?
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "spatial.voxel.intersection_coords",
    displayName = "鍧愭爣浜ら泦",
    description = "璁＄畻涓や釜鍧愭爣鍒楄〃鐨勪氦闆嗭紝杩斿洖鍏卞悓鐨勫潗鏍?,
    category = "spatial.voxel"
)
public class IntersectionCoordsNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_COORDS_A_ID = "input_coords_a";
    private static final String INPUT_COORDS_B_ID = "input_coords_b";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_INTERSECTION_ID = "output_intersection";
    private static final String OUTPUT_COUNT_ID = "output_count";
    private static final String OUTPUT_OVERLAP_RATIO_ID = "output_overlap_ratio";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public IntersectionCoordsNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "spatial.voxel.intersection_coords");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_COORDS_A_ID, "Coordinates A", 
                "绗竴涓潗鏍囧垪琛?, NodeDataType.BLOCK_LIST, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_COORDS_B_ID, "Coordinates B", 
                "绗簩涓潗鏍囧垪琛?, NodeDataType.BLOCK_LIST, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_INTERSECTION_ID, "Intersection", 
                "浜ら泦缁撴灉鍒楄〃", NodeDataType.BLOCK_LIST, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_COUNT_ID, "Count", 
                "浜ら泦鍧愭爣鏁伴噺", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_OVERLAP_RATIO_ID, "Overlap Ratio", 
                "浜ら泦鍗燗鍒楄〃鐨勬瘮渚?0-1)", NodeDataType.DOUBLE, this));
    }

    // 娣诲姞 getDescription 鏂规硶
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "鑾峰彇涓や釜鍧愭爣鍒楄〃鐨勪氦闆?;
    }

    // 娣诲姞 getDisplayName 鏂规硶
    @Override
    public String getDisplayName() {
        return "Intersection (Coords)";
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object coordsAObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_COORDS_A_ID);
        Object coordsBObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_COORDS_B_ID);
        
        // 鍒涘缓缁撴灉鍒楄〃
        BlockPosList resultList = new BlockPosList();
        double overlapRatio = 0.0;
        
        // 妫€鏌ヨ緭鍏ユ槸鍚︿负鍧愭爣鍒楄〃
        if (coordsAObj instanceof BlockPosList && coordsBObj instanceof BlockPosList) {
            BlockPosList coordsA = (BlockPosList) coordsAObj;
            BlockPosList coordsB = (BlockPosList) coordsBObj;
            
            // 濡傛灉涓や釜鍒楄〃閮戒笉涓虹┖锛岃绠椾氦闆?
            if (!coordsA.isEmpty() && !coordsB.isEmpty()) {
                // 閫夋嫨杈冨皬鐨勫垪琛ㄨ繘琛岃凯浠ｏ紝杈冨ぇ鐨勫垪琛ㄧ敤浜庨泦鍚堟煡璇?
                BlockPosList smallerList, largerList;
                if (coordsA.size() <= coordsB.size()) {
                    smallerList = coordsA;
                    largerList = coordsB;
                } else {
                    smallerList = coordsB;
                    largerList = coordsA;
                }
                
                // 灏嗚緝澶х殑鍒楄〃杞崲涓篐ashSet浠ヤ究蹇€熸煡鎵?
                Set<BlockPos> largerSet = new HashSet<>();
                for (BlockPos pos : largerList) {
                    largerSet.add(pos.toImmutable());
                }
                
                // 璁＄畻浜ら泦
                for (BlockPos pos : smallerList) {
                    if (largerSet.contains(pos)) {
                        resultList.add(pos);
                    }
                }
                
                // 璁＄畻閲嶅彔姣斾緥
                if (!coordsA.isEmpty()) {
                    overlapRatio = (double) resultList.size() / coordsA.size();
                }
            }
        }
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_INTERSECTION_ID, resultList);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_COUNT_ID, resultList.size());
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_OVERLAP_RATIO_ID, overlapRatio);
    }
}

package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.spatial.voxel;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.util.BlockPosList;

import net.minecraft.util.math.BlockPos;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;

import java.util.HashSet;
import java.util.Set;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Union (Coords) 鑺傜偣: 鍚堝苟涓や釜 Coordinate 鍒楄〃
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "spatial.voxel.union_coords",
    displayName = "鍧愭爣鍚堝苟",
    description = "鍚堝苟涓や釜鍧愭爣鍒楄〃锛屽幓闄ら噸澶嶉」",
    category = "spatial.voxel"
)
public class UnionCoordsNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_COORDS_A_ID = "input_coords_a";
    private static final String INPUT_COORDS_B_ID = "input_coords_b";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_UNION_ID = "output_union";
    private static final String OUTPUT_COUNT_ID = "output_count";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public UnionCoordsNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "spatial.voxel.union_coords");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_COORDS_A_ID, "Coordinates A", 
                "绗竴涓潗鏍囧垪琛?, NodeDataType.BLOCK_LIST, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_COORDS_B_ID, "Coordinates B", 
                "绗簩涓潗鏍囧垪琛?, NodeDataType.BLOCK_LIST, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_UNION_ID, "Union", 
                "鍚堝苟鍚庣殑鍧愭爣鍒楄〃", NodeDataType.BLOCK_LIST, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_COUNT_ID, "Count", 
                "鍚堝苟鍚庣殑鍧愭爣鏁伴噺", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
    }

    // 娣诲姞 getDescription 鏂规硶
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "鍚堝苟涓や釜鍧愭爣鍒楄〃";
    }

    // 娣诲姞 getDisplayName 鏂规硶
    @Override
    public String getDisplayName() {
        return "Union (Coords)";
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object coordsAObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_COORDS_A_ID);
        Object coordsBObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_COORDS_B_ID);
        
        // 鍒涘缓缁撴灉鍒楄〃
        BlockPosList resultList = new BlockPosList();
        
        // 妫€鏌ヨ緭鍏ユ槸鍚︿负鍧愭爣鍒楄〃
        if (coordsAObj instanceof BlockPosList || coordsBObj instanceof BlockPosList) {
            // 浣跨敤HashSet鏉ョ‘淇濅笉閲嶅
            Set<BlockPos> unionSet = new HashSet<>();
            
            // 澶勭悊绗竴涓潗鏍囧垪琛?
            if (coordsAObj instanceof BlockPosList) {
                BlockPosList coordsA = (BlockPosList) coordsAObj;
                for (BlockPos pos : coordsA) {
                    unionSet.add(pos.toImmutable());
                }
            }
            
            // 澶勭悊绗簩涓潗鏍囧垪琛?
            if (coordsBObj instanceof BlockPosList) {
                BlockPosList coordsB = (BlockPosList) coordsBObj;
                for (BlockPos pos : coordsB) {
                    unionSet.add(pos.toImmutable());
                }
            }
            
            // 灏嗙粨鏋滈泦鍚堣浆鎹负鍒楄〃
            for (BlockPos pos : unionSet) {
                resultList.add(pos);
            }
        }
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_UNION_ID, resultList);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_COUNT_ID, resultList.size());
    }
} 
===FILE: C:\Users\navib\Desktop\development\NC\nodecraft\src\main\java\com\nodecraft\nodesystem\nodes\utilities\advanced\EvalExpressionNode.java===
package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.utilities.advanced;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;

import javax.script.ScriptEngine;
import javax.script.ScriptEngineManager;
import javax.script.ScriptException;
import javax.script.Bindings;
import java.util.HashMap;
import java.util.Map;
import java.util.regex.Matcher;
import java.util.regex.Pattern;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Eval Expression 鑺傜偣: 璁＄畻鏁板琛ㄨ揪寮?
 * 鏀寔鍙橀噺鏇挎崲鍜屽鏉傜殑鏁板杩愮畻
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "utilities.advanced.eval_expression",
    displayName = "琛ㄨ揪寮忚绠?,
    description = "璁＄畻鏁板琛ㄨ揪寮忥紝鏀寔鍙橀噺鏇挎崲",
    category = "utilities.advanced"
)
public class EvalExpressionNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 鑺傜偣灞炴€?---
    private String expression = "a + b * 2"; // 榛樿琛ㄨ揪寮?
    private boolean autoEvaluate = false; // 杈撳叆鍙樺寲鏃惰嚜鍔ㄨ绠?
    private String description = "璁＄畻琛ㄨ揪寮忓瓧绗︿覆锛屾牴鎹彁渚涚殑鍙橀噺璁＄畻缁撴灉";
    
    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_EXPRESSION_ID = "input_expression";
    private static final String INPUT_VARIABLES_ID = "input_variables";
    private static final String INPUT_EVALUATE_ID = "input_evaluate";
    
    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_RESULT_ID = "output_result";
    private static final String OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID = "output_success";
    private static final String OUTPUT_ERROR_ID = "output_error";
    
    // --- 鑴氭湰寮曟搸 ---
    private transient ScriptEngineManager engineManager;
    private transient ScriptEngine jsEngine;
    
    // --- 涓婃杈撳叆 ---
    private transient Map<String, Object> lastInputs = new HashMap<>();
    
    /**
     * 鏋勯€犺〃杈惧紡姹傚€艰妭鐐?
     */
    public EvalExpressionNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "utilities.advanced.eval_expression");
        
        // 鍒涘缓鑴氭湰寮曟搸绠＄悊鍣?
        engineManager = new ScriptEngineManager();
        
        // 鍒涘缓JavaScript寮曟搸锛堢敤浜庤〃杈惧紡姹傚€硷級
        jsEngine = engineManager.getEngineByName("nashorn");
        if (jsEngine == null) {
            jsEngine = engineManager.getEngineByName("JavaScript");
        }
        
        // 鍒涘缓杈撳叆绔彛
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_EXPRESSION_ID, "Expression", 
                "瑕佽绠楃殑琛ㄨ揪寮?, NodeDataType.STRING, this));
        
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_VARIABLES_ID, "Variables", 
                "琛ㄨ揪寮忎腑浣跨敤鐨勫彉閲廙ap", NodeDataType.ANY, this));
        
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_EVALUATE_ID, "Evaluate", 
                "瑙﹀彂琛ㄨ揪寮忚绠?, NodeDataType.ANY, this));
        
        // 鍒涘缓杈撳嚭绔彛
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_RESULT_ID, "Result", 
                "琛ㄨ揪寮忚绠楃粨鏋?, NodeDataType.ANY, this));
        
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID, "Success", 
                "琛ㄨ揪寮忔槸鍚︽垚鍔熻绠?, NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
        
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_ERROR_ID, "Error", 
                "璁＄畻閿欒淇℃伅", NodeDataType.STRING, this));
    }
    
    /**
     * 鑺傜偣鐨勮绠楅€昏緫
     */
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鍒濆鍖栬緭鍑哄€?
        Object result = null;
        boolean success = false;
        String errorMessage = "";
        
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆
        Object expressionObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_EXPRESSION_ID);
        Object variablesObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_VARIABLES_ID);
        Object evaluateObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_EVALUATE_ID);
        
        // 鑾峰彇琛ㄨ揪寮忓瓧绗︿覆
        String expressionToEval = this.expression;
        if (expressionObj instanceof String && !((String) expressionObj).isEmpty()) {
            expressionToEval = (String) expressionObj;
        }
        
        // 妫€鏌ユ槸鍚﹂渶瑕佽绠楄〃杈惧紡
        boolean shouldEvaluate = evaluateObj != null;
        
        // 濡傛灉璁剧疆浜嗚嚜鍔ㄨ绠楋紝妫€鏌ヨ緭鍏ユ槸鍚﹀彉鍖?
        if (autoEvaluate && !shouldEvaluate) {
            Map<String, Object> currentInputs = new HashMap<>(inputValues);
            if (!currentInputs.equals(lastInputs)) {
                shouldEvaluate = true;
                // 淇濆瓨褰撳墠杈撳叆浠ヤ究姣旇緝
                lastInputs = new HashMap<>(currentInputs);
            }
        }
        
        if (shouldEvaluate && !expressionToEval.isEmpty()) {
            // 鑾峰彇鍙橀噺Map
            Map<String, Object> variables = new HashMap<>();
            
            // 濡傛灉鎻愪緵浜嗗彉閲忥紝涓旀槸Map绫诲瀷锛屽垯浣跨敤瀹?
            if (variablesObj instanceof Map) {
                @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
                Map<Object, Object> varMap = (Map<Object, Object>) variablesObj;
                for (Map.Entry<Object, Object> entry : varMap.entrySet()) {
                    if (entry.getKey() != null) {
                        variables.put(entry.getKey().toString(), entry.getValue());
                    }
                }
            }
            
            // 浠庤緭鍏ヤ腑鑾峰彇鍏朵粬鍙橀噺
            for (Map.Entry<String, Object> entry : inputValues.entrySet()) {
                String key = entry.getKey();
                if (!key.equals(INPUT_EXPRESSION_ID) && 
                    !key.equals(INPUT_VARIABLES_ID) && 
                    !key.equals(INPUT_EVALUATE_ID)) {
                    variables.put(key, entry.getValue());
                }
            }
            
            // 灏濊瘯浣跨敤JavaScript寮曟搸璁＄畻琛ㄨ揪寮?
            if (jsEngine != null) {
                try {
                    // 鍒涘缓缁戝畾
                    Bindings bindings = jsEngine.createBindings();
                    
                    // 灏嗗彉閲忔坊鍔犲埌缁戝畾
                    for (Map.Entry<String, Object> entry : variables.entrySet()) {
                        bindings.put(entry.getKey(), entry.getValue());
                    }
                    
                    // 璁＄畻琛ㄨ揪寮?
                    result = jsEngine.eval(expressionToEval, bindings);
                    success = true;
                } catch (ScriptException e) {
                    errorMessage = "琛ㄨ揪寮忚绠楅敊璇? " + e.getMessage();
                } catch (Exception e) {
                    errorMessage = "璁＄畻琛ㄨ揪寮忔椂鍙戠敓閿欒: " + e.getMessage();
                }
            } else {
                // 鑴氭湰寮曟搸涓嶅彲鐢ㄦ椂锛屼娇鐢ㄧ畝鍗曠畻鏈В鏋愬櫒
                try {
                    // 鎻愬彇琛ㄨ揪寮忎腑鐨勫彉閲忓苟鏇挎崲涓哄疄闄呭€?
                    String preparedExpression = expressionToEval;
                    
                    // 鎵惧嚭琛ㄨ揪寮忎腑鐨勬墍鏈夊彉閲忓悕绉?
                    Pattern variablePattern = Pattern.compile("[a-zA-Z_][a-zA-Z0-9_]*");
                    Matcher matcher = variablePattern.matcher(expressionToEval);
                    
                    while (matcher.find()) {
                        String varName = matcher.group();
                        if (variables.containsKey(varName)) {
                            Object value = variables.get(varName);
                            // 鏇挎崲鍙橀噺鍚嶄负鍏跺€?
                            if (value instanceof Number) {
                                preparedExpression = preparedExpression.replace(
                                    varName, value.toString());
                            } else if (value instanceof String) {
                                preparedExpression = preparedExpression.replace(
                                    varName, "\"" + value.toString() + "\"");
                            }
                            // 鍏朵粬绫诲瀷鏆備笉鏀寔
                        }
                    }
                    
                    // 璁＄畻绠€鍗曠畻鏈〃杈惧紡锛堥潪甯稿熀纭€鐨勫疄鐜帮紝鍙敮鎸佺畝鍗曠畻鏈級
                    result = evaluateSimpleExpression(preparedExpression);
                    success = true;
                } catch (Exception e) {
                    errorMessage = "绠€鍗曡〃杈惧紡璁＄畻閿欒: " + e.getMessage();
                }
            }
        }
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_RESULT_ID, result);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID, success);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_ERROR_ID, errorMessage);
    }
    
    /**
     * 绠€鍗曡〃杈惧紡姹傚€硷紙闈炲父鍩虹锛屼粎鏀寔绠€鍗曠畻鏈級
     * 娉ㄦ剰锛氳繖鏄竴涓潪甯哥畝鍖栫殑瀹炵幇锛屽彧鑳藉鐞嗗熀鏈殑绠楁湳琛ㄨ揪寮?
     */
    private Object evaluateSimpleExpression(String expr) {
        // 鍙槸涓€涓潪甯哥畝鍗曠殑瀹炵幇绀轰緥锛屽疄闄呬笂搴旇浣跨敤涓€涓畬鏁寸殑琛ㄨ揪寮忚В鏋愬櫒
        try {
            return Double.parseDouble(expr);
        } catch (NumberFormatException e) {
            // 涓嶆槸绠€鍗曟暟瀛楋紝灏濊瘯鍔犲噺涔橀櫎
            if (expr.contains("+")) {
                String[] parts = expr.split("\\+", 2);
                return (Double) evaluateSimpleExpression(parts[0]) + 
                       (Double) evaluateSimpleExpression(parts[1]);
            } else if (expr.contains("-")) {
                String[] parts = expr.split("-", 2);
                return (Double) evaluateSimpleExpression(parts[0]) - 
                       (Double) evaluateSimpleExpression(parts[1]);
            } else if (expr.contains("*")) {
                String[] parts = expr.split("\\*", 2);
                return (Double) evaluateSimpleExpression(parts[0]) * 
                       (Double) evaluateSimpleExpression(parts[1]);
            } else if (expr.contains("/")) {
                String[] parts = expr.split("/", 2);
                return (Double) evaluateSimpleExpression(parts[0]) / 
                       (Double) evaluateSimpleExpression(parts[1]);
            }
        }
        
        // 濡傛灉鏃犳硶璁＄畻锛岃繑鍥炲師濮嬭〃杈惧紡
        return expr;
    }
    
    // --- Getters/Setters for Properties ---
    
    public String getExpression() {
        return expression;
    }
    
    public void setExpression(String expression) {
        this.expression = expression;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    public boolean isAutoEvaluate() {
        return autoEvaluate;
    }
    
    public void setAutoEvaluate(boolean autoEvaluate) {
        this.autoEvaluate = autoEvaluate;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    /**
     * 淇濆瓨鑺傜偣鐘舵€?
     */
    @Override
    public @Nullable Object getNodeState() {
        Object[] state = new Object[2];
        state[0] = expression;
        state[1] = autoEvaluate;
        return state;
    }
    
    /**
     * 鎭㈠鑺傜偣鐘舵€?
     */
    @Override
    public void setNodeState(@Nullable Object state) {
        if (state instanceof Object[]) {
            Object[] objState = (Object[]) state;
            if (objState.length >= 2) {
                if (objState[0] instanceof String) {
                    expression = (String) objState[0];
                }
                if (objState[1] instanceof Boolean) {
                    autoEvaluate = (Boolean) objState[1];
                }
            }
        }
    }

    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return this.description;
    }
} 
===FILE: C:\Users\navib\Desktop\development\NC\nodecraft\src\main\java\com\nodecraft\nodesystem\nodes\utilities\advanced\FilterByAttributeNode.java===
package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.utilities.advanced;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.util.BlockPosList;

import net.minecraft.util.math.BlockPos;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;

import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.HashMap;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;
import java.util.UUID;
import java.util.function.Predicate;

/**
 * Filter by Attribute 鑺傜偣: 鏍规嵁灞炴€у€艰繃婊ゅ潗鏍囨垨鏂瑰潡鍒楄〃
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "utilities.advanced.filter_by_attribute",
    displayName = "鎸夊睘鎬ц繃婊?,
    description = "鏍规嵁灞炴€у€艰繃婊ゅ潗鏍囨垨鏂瑰潡鍒楄〃",
    category = "utilities.advanced"
)
public class FilterByAttributeNode extends BaseNode {
    
    // --- 鑺傜偣灞炴€?---
    private String attributeName = "attribute"; // 灞炴€у悕绉?
    private String filterType = "equals"; // 杩囨护绫诲瀷
    private String filterValue = "true"; // 杩囨护鍊?
    private boolean invertFilter = false; // 鏄惁鍙嶈浆杩囨护
    private String description = "鏍规嵁灞炴€у€艰繃婊ゅ潗鏍囨垨鏂瑰潡鍒楄〃";
    
    // --- 杩囨护绫诲瀷甯搁噺 ---
    private static final String FILTER_TYPE_EQUALS = "equals";         // 绛変簬
    private static final String FILTER_TYPE_NOT_EQUALS = "notEquals";  // 涓嶇瓑浜?
    private static final String FILTER_TYPE_CONTAINS = "contains";     // 鍖呭惈
    private static final String FILTER_TYPE_STARTS_WITH = "startsWith";// 寮€澶翠负
    private static final String FILTER_TYPE_ENDS_WITH = "endsWith";    // 缁撳熬涓?
    private static final String FILTER_TYPE_GREATER_THAN = "greaterThan"; // 澶т簬
    private static final String FILTER_TYPE_LESS_THAN = "lessThan";    // 灏忎簬
    private static final String FILTER_TYPE_EXISTS = "exists";         // 瀛樺湪
    
    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_COORDINATES_ID = "input_coordinates";
    private static final String INPUT_ATTRIBUTE_MAP_ID = "input_attribute_map";
    private static final String INPUT_ATTRIBUTE_NAME_ID = "input_attribute_name";
    private static final String INPUT_FILTER_TYPE_ID = "input_filter_type";
    private static final String INPUT_FILTER_VALUE_ID = "input_filter_value";
    private static final String INPUT_INVERT_FILTER_ID = "input_invert_filter";
    
    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_FILTERED_ID = "output_filtered";
    private static final String OUTPUT_REJECTED_ID = "output_rejected";
    private static final String OUTPUT_COUNT_ID = "output_count";
    
    /**
     * 鏋勯€犲睘鎬ц繃婊よ妭鐐?
     */
    public FilterByAttributeNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "utilities.advanced.filter_by_attribute");
        
        // 鍒涘缓杈撳叆绔彛
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_COORDINATES_ID, "Coordinates", 
                "瑕佽繃婊ょ殑鍧愭爣鎴栨柟鍧楀垪琛?, NodeDataType.BLOCK_LIST, this));
        
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_ATTRIBUTE_MAP_ID, "Attribute Map", 
                "灞炴€ф槧灏勶紙閫氬父鏉ヨ嚜Set Attribute鑺傜偣锛?, NodeDataType.ANY, this));
        
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_ATTRIBUTE_NAME_ID, "Attribute Name", 
                "瑕佽繃婊ょ殑灞炴€у悕绉?, NodeDataType.STRING, this));
        
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_FILTER_TYPE_ID, "Filter Type", 
                "杩囨护鏉′欢绫诲瀷 (equals, notEquals绛?", NodeDataType.STRING, this));
        
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_FILTER_VALUE_ID, "Filter Value", 
                "杩囨护鏉′欢鍊?, NodeDataType.ANY, this));
        
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_INVERT_FILTER_ID, "Invert Filter", 
                "鏄惁鍙嶈浆杩囨护缁撴灉", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
        
        // 鍒涘缓杈撳嚭绔彛
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_FILTERED_ID, "Filtered", 
                "绗﹀悎杩囨护鏉′欢鐨勫潗鏍囧垪琛?, NodeDataType.BLOCK_LIST, this));
        
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_REJECTED_ID, "Rejected", 
                "涓嶇鍚堣繃婊ゆ潯浠剁殑鍧愭爣鍒楄〃", NodeDataType.BLOCK_LIST, this));
        
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_COUNT_ID, "Count", 
                "绗﹀悎杩囨护鏉′欢鐨勫潗鏍囨暟閲?, NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
    }
    
    /**
     * 鑺傜偣鐨勮绠楅€昏緫
     */
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鍒濆鍖栬緭鍑哄€?
        BlockPosList filteredPositions = new BlockPosList();
        BlockPosList rejectedPositions = new BlockPosList();
        int count = 0;
        
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object coordinatesObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_COORDINATES_ID);
        Object attributeMapObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_ATTRIBUTE_MAP_ID);
        Object attributeNameObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_ATTRIBUTE_NAME_ID);
        Object filterTypeObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_FILTER_TYPE_ID);
        Object filterValueObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_FILTER_VALUE_ID);
        Object invertFilterObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_INVERT_FILTER_ID);
        
        // 鑾峰彇灞炴€у悕绉?
        String attrName = this.attributeName;
        if (attributeNameObj instanceof String && !((String) attributeNameObj).isEmpty()) {
            attrName = (String) attributeNameObj;
        }
        
        // 鑾峰彇杩囨护绫诲瀷
        String filterTypeToUse = this.filterType;
        if (filterTypeObj instanceof String && !((String) filterTypeObj).isEmpty()) {
            filterTypeToUse = (String) filterTypeObj;
        }
        
        // 鑾峰彇杩囨护鍊?
        Object filterValueToUse = filterValueObj != null ? filterValueObj : this.filterValue;
        
        // 鑾峰彇鏄惁鍙嶈浆杩囨护
        boolean invertFilterToUse = this.invertFilter;
        if (invertFilterObj instanceof Boolean) {
            invertFilterToUse = (Boolean) invertFilterObj;
        }
        
        // 瑙ｆ瀽灞炴€ф槧灏?
        Map<BlockPos, Object> attributeMap = new HashMap<>();
        if (attributeMapObj instanceof Map) {
            @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
            Map<String, Object> attrMaps = (Map<String, Object>) attributeMapObj;
            
            // 鏌ユ壘鎸囧畾鍚嶇О鐨勫睘鎬ф槧灏?
            Object attrMapForName = attrMaps.get(attrName);
            if (attrMapForName instanceof Map) {
                @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
                Map<Object, Object> posToValueMap = (Map<Object, Object>) attrMapForName;
                
                // 浠嶰bject鏄犲皠杞崲涓築lockPos鏄犲皠
                for (Map.Entry<Object, Object> entry : posToValueMap.entrySet()) {
                    if (entry.getKey() instanceof BlockPos) {
                        attributeMap.put((BlockPos) entry.getKey(), entry.getValue());
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        // 鍒涘缓杩囨护璋撹瘝
        Predicate<Object> filterPredicate = createFilterPredicate(filterTypeToUse, filterValueToUse);
        
        // 澶勭悊鍧愭爣鍒楄〃锛岃繃婊ゆ瘡涓潗鏍?
        List<BlockPos> positions = new ArrayList<>();
        
        // 浠庡悇绉嶈緭鍏ョ被鍨嬫敹闆咮lockPos
        if (coordinatesObj instanceof BlockPosList) {
            BlockPosList coordinates = (BlockPosList) coordinatesObj;
            for (BlockPos pos : coordinates) {
                positions.add(pos);
            }
        } else if (coordinatesObj instanceof List) {
            @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
            List<Object> coordList = (List<Object>) coordinatesObj;
            
            for (Object obj : coordList) {
                if (obj instanceof BlockPos) {
                    positions.add((BlockPos) obj);
                }
            }
        }
        
        // 澶勭悊鏀堕泦鍒扮殑浣嶇疆
        for (BlockPos pos : positions) {
            boolean matches = false;
            
            // 妫€鏌ヨ浣嶇疆鏄惁鏈夊睘鎬у€?
            if (attributeMap.containsKey(pos)) {
                Object value = attributeMap.get(pos);
                matches = filterPredicate.test(value);
                
                // 濡傛灉闇€瑕佸弽杞繃婊ょ粨鏋?
                if (invertFilterToUse) {
                    matches = !matches;
                }
            } else if (FILTER_TYPE_EXISTS.equals(filterTypeToUse)) {
                // 鐗规畩鎯呭喌锛氭鏌ュ睘鎬ф槸鍚﹀瓨鍦?
                matches = false; // 灞炴€т笉瀛樺湪
                
                // 濡傛灉闇€瑕佸弽杞繃婊ょ粨鏋?
                if (invertFilterToUse) {
                    matches = !matches;
                }
            }
            
            // 鏍规嵁杩囨护缁撴灉娣诲姞鍒扮浉搴斿垪琛?
            if (matches) {
                filteredPositions.add(pos);
                count++;
            } else {
                rejectedPositions.add(pos);
            }
        }
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_FILTERED_ID, filteredPositions);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_REJECTED_ID, rejectedPositions);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_COUNT_ID, count);
    }
    
    /**
     * 鍒涘缓杩囨护璋撹瘝
     * @param filterType 杩囨护绫诲瀷
     * @param filterValue 杩囨护鍊?
     * @return 鐢ㄤ簬杩囨护鐨勮皳璇?
     */
    private Predicate<Object> createFilterPredicate(String filterType, Object filterValue) {
        switch (filterType) {
            case FILTER_TYPE_EQUALS:
                return value -> {
                    if (value == null) return filterValue == null;
                    return value.equals(filterValue);
                };
                
            case FILTER_TYPE_NOT_EQUALS:
                return value -> {
                    if (value == null) return filterValue != null;
                    return !value.equals(filterValue);
                };
                
            case FILTER_TYPE_CONTAINS:
                return value -> {
                    if (value == null) return false;
                    return value.toString().contains(filterValue != null ? filterValue.toString() : "");
                };
                
            case FILTER_TYPE_STARTS_WITH:
                return value -> {
                    if (value == null) return false;
                    return value.toString().startsWith(filterValue != null ? filterValue.toString() : "");
                };
                
            case FILTER_TYPE_ENDS_WITH:
                return value -> {
                    if (value == null) return false;
                    return value.toString().endsWith(filterValue != null ? filterValue.toString() : "");
                };
                
            case FILTER_TYPE_GREATER_THAN:
                return value -> {
                    if (value instanceof Number && filterValue instanceof Number) {
                        return ((Number) value).doubleValue() > ((Number) filterValue).doubleValue();
                    }
                    return false;
                };
                
            case FILTER_TYPE_LESS_THAN:
                return value -> {
                    if (value instanceof Number && filterValue instanceof Number) {
                        return ((Number) value).doubleValue() < ((Number) filterValue).doubleValue();
                    }
                    return false;
                };
                
            case FILTER_TYPE_EXISTS:
                return value -> true; // 鍙灞炴€у瓨鍦ㄥ氨杩斿洖true
                
            default:
                // 榛樿浣跨敤equals
                return value -> {
                    if (value == null) return filterValue == null;
                    return value.equals(filterValue);
                };
        }
    }
    
    // --- Getters/Setters for Properties ---
    
    public String getAttributeName() {
        return attributeName;
    }
    
    public void setAttributeName(String attributeName) {
        this.attributeName = attributeName;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    public String getFilterType() {
        return filterType;
    }
    
    public void setFilterType(String filterType) {
        this.filterType = filterType;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    public String getFilterValue() {
        return filterValue;
    }
    
    public void setFilterValue(String filterValue) {
        this.filterValue = filterValue;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    public boolean isInvertFilter() {
        return invertFilter;
    }
    
    public void setInvertFilter(boolean invertFilter) {
        this.invertFilter = invertFilter;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    /**
     * 淇濆瓨鑺傜偣鐘舵€?
     */
    @Override
    public @Nullable Object getNodeState() {
        Object[] state = new Object[4];
        state[0] = attributeName;
        state[1] = filterType;
        state[2] = filterValue;
        state[3] = invertFilter;
        return state;
    }
    
    /**
     * 鎭㈠鑺傜偣鐘舵€?
     */
    @Override
    public void setNodeState(@Nullable Object state) {
        if (state instanceof Object[]) {
            Object[] objState = (Object[]) state;
            if (objState.length >= 4) {
                if (objState[0] instanceof String) {
                    attributeName = (String) objState[0];
                }
                if (objState[1] instanceof String) {
                    filterType = (String) objState[1];
                }
                if (objState[2] instanceof String) {
                    filterValue = (String) objState[2];
                }
                if (objState[3] instanceof Boolean) {
                    invertFilter = (Boolean) objState[3];
                }
            }
        }
    }

    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return this.description;
    }
}

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;

 * 鏀寔宓屽灞炴€ц闂拰绫诲瀷杞崲

@NodeInfo(
    id = "utilities.advanced.get_attribute",
    displayName = "鑾峰彇灞炴€?,
    description = "浠庡璞′腑鑾峰彇鎸囧畾灞炴€х殑鍊?,
    category = "utilities.advanced"

public class GetAttributeNode extends BaseNode {
    
    // --- 鑺傜偣灞炴€?---
    private String attributeName = "attribute"; // 灞炴€у悕绉?
    private Object defaultValue = null; // 榛樿鍊?
    private String description = "鑾峰彇鍧愭爣鎴栨柟鍧楀垪琛ㄧ殑灞炴€у€?;
    
    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_COORDINATES_ID = "input_coordinates";
    private static final String INPUT_ATTRIBUTE_MAP_ID = "input_attribute_map";
    private static final String INPUT_ATTRIBUTE_NAME_ID = "input_attribute_name";
    private static final String INPUT_DEFAULT_VALUE_ID = "input_default_value";
    
    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_VALUES_ID = "output_values";
    private static final String OUTPUT_VALUE_MAP_ID = "output_value_map";
    private static final String OUTPUT_HAS_ATTRIBUTE_ID = "output_has_attribute";
    
    /**
     * 鏋勯€犺幏鍙栧睘鎬ц妭鐐?
     */
    public GetAttributeNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "utilities.advanced.get_attribute");
        
        // 鍒涘缓杈撳叆绔彛
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_COORDINATES_ID, "Coordinates",

        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_ATTRIBUTE_MAP_ID, "Attribute Map", 
                "灞炴€ф槧灏勶紙閫氬父鏉ヨ嚜Set Attribute鑺傜偣锛?, NodeDataType.ANY, this));
        
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_ATTRIBUTE_NAME_ID, "Attribute Name", 
                "瑕佽幏鍙栫殑灞炴€у悕绉?, NodeDataType.STRING, this));
        
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_DEFAULT_VALUE_ID, "Default Value", 
                "鏈壘鍒板睘鎬ф椂鐨勯粯璁ゅ€?, NodeDataType.ANY, this));
        
        // 鍒涘缓杈撳嚭绔彛
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_VALUES_ID, "Values", 
                "鑾峰彇鐨勫睘鎬у€煎垪琛?, NodeDataType.LIST, this));
        
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_VALUE_MAP_ID, "Value Map", 
                "鍧愭爣鍒板睘鎬у€肩殑鏄犲皠", NodeDataType.ANY, this));
        
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_HAS_ATTRIBUTE_ID, "Has Attribute", 
                "姣忎釜鍧愭爣鏄惁鍖呭惈鎸囧畾灞炴€?, NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
    }
    
    /**
     * 鑺傜偣鐨勮绠楅€昏緫
     */
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鍒濆鍖栬緭鍑哄€?
        List<Object> attributeValues = new ArrayList<>();
        Map<BlockPos, Object> valueMap = new HashMap<>();
        boolean hasAttribute = false;
        
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object coordinatesObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_COORDINATES_ID);
        Object attributeMapObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_ATTRIBUTE_MAP_ID);
        Object attributeNameObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_ATTRIBUTE_NAME_ID);
        Object defaultValueObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_DEFAULT_VALUE_ID);
        
        // 鑾峰彇灞炴€у悕绉?
        String attrName = this.attributeName;
        if (attributeNameObj instanceof String && !((String) attributeNameObj).isEmpty()) {
            attrName = (String) attributeNameObj;
        }
        
        // 鑾峰彇榛樿鍊?
        Object defValue = defaultValueObj != null ? defaultValueObj : this.defaultValue;
        
        // 瑙ｆ瀽灞炴€ф槧灏?
        Map<BlockPos, Object> attributeMap = new HashMap<>();
        if (attributeMapObj instanceof Map) {
            @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
            Map<String, Object> attrMaps = (Map<String, Object>) attributeMapObj;
            
            // 鏌ユ壘鎸囧畾鍚嶇О鐨勫睘鎬ф槧灏?
            Object attrMapForName = attrMaps.get(attrName);
            if (attrMapForName instanceof Map) {
                @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
                Map<Object, Object> posToValueMap = (Map<Object, Object>) attrMapForName;
                
                // 浠嶰bject鏄犲皠杞崲涓築lockPos鏄犲皠
                for (Map.Entry<Object, Object> entry : posToValueMap.entrySet()) {
                    if (entry.getKey() instanceof BlockPos) {
                        attributeMap.put((BlockPos) entry.getKey(), entry.getValue());
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        // 澶勭悊鍧愭爣鍒楄〃锛岃幏鍙栨瘡涓潗鏍囩殑灞炴€у€?
        List<BlockPos> positions = new ArrayList<>();
        
        // 浠庡悇绉嶈緭鍏ョ被鍨嬫敹闆咮lockPos
        if (coordinatesObj instanceof BlockPosList) {
            BlockPosList coordinates = (BlockPosList) coordinatesObj;
            for (BlockPos pos : coordinates) {
                positions.add(pos);
            }
        } else if (coordinatesObj instanceof List) {
            @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
            List<Object> coordList = (List<Object>) coordinatesObj;
            
            for (Object obj : coordList) {
                if (obj instanceof BlockPos) {
                    positions.add((BlockPos) obj);
                }
            }
        }
        
        // 澶勭悊鏀堕泦鍒扮殑浣嶇疆
        for (BlockPos pos : positions) {
            // 妫€鏌ヨ浣嶇疆鏄惁鏈夊睘鎬у€?
            if (attributeMap.containsKey(pos)) {
                Object value = attributeMap.get(pos);
                attributeValues.add(value);
                valueMap.put(pos, value);
                hasAttribute = true;
            } else {
                // 浣跨敤榛樿鍊?
                attributeValues.add(defValue);
                valueMap.put(pos, defValue);
            }
        }
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_VALUES_ID, attributeValues);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_VALUE_MAP_ID, valueMap);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_HAS_ATTRIBUTE_ID, hasAttribute);
    }
    
    // --- Getters/Setters for Properties ---
    
    public String getAttributeName() {
        return attributeName;
    }
    
    public void setAttributeName(String attributeName) {
        this.attributeName = attributeName;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    /**
     * 淇濆瓨鑺傜偣鐘舵€?
     */
    @Override
    public @Nullable Object getNodeState() {
        Object[] state = new Object[1];
        state[0] = attributeName;
        return state;
    }
    
    /**
     * 鎭㈠鑺傜偣鐘舵€?
     */
    @Override
    public void setNodeState(@Nullable Object state) {
        if (state instanceof Object[]) {
            Object[] objState = (Object[]) state;
            if (objState.length >= 1 && objState[0] instanceof String) {
                attributeName = (String) objState[0];
            }
        }
    }

    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return this.description;
    }
}
