package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.utilities.advanced;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;

import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.HashMap;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Node Group 鑺傜偣: 灏嗕竴缁勮妭鐐瑰皝瑁呬负涓€涓彲閲嶇敤鐨勭粍浠?
 * 杩欐槸涓€涓珮绾ц妭鐐癸紝鍏佽鍒涘缓鑷畾涔夌殑澶嶅悎鑺傜偣
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "utilities.advanced.node_group",
    displayName = "鑺傜偣缁?,
    description = "灏嗕竴缁勮妭鐐瑰皝瑁呬负涓€涓彲閲嶇敤鐨勭粍浠?,
    category = "utilities.advanced"
)
public class NodeGroupNode extends BaseNode {
    
    // --- 鑺傜偣灞炴€?---
    private String groupName = "Node Group"; // 鑺傜偣缁勫悕绉?
    private String description = "鑷畾涔夎妭鐐圭粍"; // 鎻忚堪
    private String version = "1.0"; // 鐗堟湰
    private String author = ""; // 浣滆€?
    
    // --- 鍐呴儴鐘舵€?---
    private UUID groupId = UUID.randomUUID(); // 鑺傜偣缁勫敮涓€ID
    private List<UUID> containedNodes = new ArrayList<>(); // 鍖呭惈鐨勮妭鐐笽D鍒楄〃
    private Map<String, Object> groupMetadata = new HashMap<>(); // 缁勫厓鏁版嵁
    
    // 杈撳叆杈撳嚭绔彛鏄姩鎬佺殑锛岀敱缂栬緫鍣ㄧ鐞?
    private List<PortMappingInfo> inputMappings = new ArrayList<>(); // 杈撳叆绔彛鏄犲皠
    private List<PortMappingInfo> outputMappings = new ArrayList<>(); // 杈撳嚭绔彛鏄犲皠
    
    /**
     * 鏋勯€犱竴涓柊鐨勮妭鐐圭粍鑺傜偣
     */
    public NodeGroupNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "utilities.advanced.node_group");
        
        // 鑺傜偣缁勭殑绔彛鏄姩鎬佺殑锛屽湪缂栬緫鍣ㄤ腑閰嶇疆
        // 姝ゆ瀯閫犲嚱鏁板垱寤轰竴涓┖鐨勮妭鐐圭粍锛岀鍙ｅ皢鍦ㄤ互鍚庢坊鍔?
    }
    
    /**
     * 鑺傜偣鐨勮绠楅€昏緫
     * 瀵逛簬鑺傜偣缁勶紝杩欎釜鏂规硶閫氬父涓嶄細琚洿鎺ユ墽琛岋紝鑰屾槸鐢辩紪杈戝櫒绠＄悊鎵ц鍖呭惈鐨勮妭鐐?
     */
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑺傜偣缁勬湰韬笉杩涜澶勭悊锛岃€屾槸鐢辩紪杈戝櫒绠＄悊鍏跺唴閮ㄨ妭鐐圭殑鎵ц
        // 杩欓噷浠呮彁渚涗竴涓崰浣嶅疄鐜?
        
        // 澶嶅埗杈撳叆鍊煎埌杈撳嚭锛堜粎鐢ㄤ簬娴嬭瘯锛?
        for (PortMappingInfo mapping : outputMappings) {
            // 瀵绘壘瀵瑰簲鐨勮緭鍏ユ槧灏?
            for (PortMappingInfo inputMapping : inputMappings) {
                if (inputMapping.getInternalPortId().equals(mapping.getInternalPortId())) {
                    // 澶嶅埗瀵瑰簲鐨勮緭鍏ュ€煎埌杈撳嚭
                    Object value = inputValues.get(inputMapping.getExternalPortId());
                    if (value != null) {
                        outputValues.put(mapping.getExternalPortId(), value);
                    }
                    break;
                }
            }
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * 娣诲姞杈撳叆绔彛鏄犲皠
     * @param externalPortId 澶栭儴绔彛ID
     * @param externalPortName 澶栭儴绔彛鍚嶇О
     * @param externalPortType 澶栭儴绔彛绫诲瀷
     * @param internalNodeId 鍐呴儴鑺傜偣ID
     * @param internalPortId 鍐呴儴绔彛ID
     */
    public void addInputMapping(String externalPortId, String externalPortName, 
                               NodeDataType externalPortType, UUID internalNodeId, 
                               String internalPortId) {
        // 鍒涘缓鏄犲皠淇℃伅
        PortMappingInfo mapping = new PortMappingInfo(
            externalPortId, externalPortName, externalPortType, 
            internalNodeId, internalPortId);
        
        // 娣诲姞鍒版槧灏勫垪琛?
        inputMappings.add(mapping);
        
        // 鍒涘缓瀵瑰簲鐨勮緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(externalPortId, externalPortName, 
                "杈撳叆绔彛", externalPortType, this));
        
        markDirty();
    }
    
    /**
     * 娣诲姞杈撳嚭绔彛鏄犲皠
     * @param externalPortId 澶栭儴绔彛ID
     * @param externalPortName 澶栭儴绔彛鍚嶇О
     * @param externalPortType 澶栭儴绔彛绫诲瀷
     * @param internalNodeId 鍐呴儴鑺傜偣ID
     * @param internalPortId 鍐呴儴绔彛ID
     */
    public void addOutputMapping(String externalPortId, String externalPortName, 
                                NodeDataType externalPortType, UUID internalNodeId, 
                                String internalPortId) {
        // 鍒涘缓鏄犲皠淇℃伅
        PortMappingInfo mapping = new PortMappingInfo(
            externalPortId, externalPortName, externalPortType, 
            internalNodeId, internalPortId);
        
        // 娣诲姞鍒版槧灏勫垪琛?
        outputMappings.add(mapping);
        
        // 鍒涘缓瀵瑰簲鐨勮緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(externalPortId, externalPortName, 
                "杈撳嚭绔彛", externalPortType, this));
        
        markDirty();
    }
    
    /**
     * 娣诲姞鍖呭惈鐨勮妭鐐笽D
     * @param nodeId 鑺傜偣ID
     */
    public void addContainedNode(UUID nodeId) {
        if (!containedNodes.contains(nodeId)) {
            containedNodes.add(nodeId);
            markDirty();
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * 绉婚櫎鍖呭惈鐨勮妭鐐笽D
     * @param nodeId 鑺傜偣ID
     */
    public void removeContainedNode(UUID nodeId) {
        if (containedNodes.remove(nodeId)) {
            markDirty();
        }
        
        // 绉婚櫎涓庤鑺傜偣鐩稿叧鐨勭鍙ｆ槧灏?
        inputMappings.removeIf(mapping -> mapping.getInternalNodeId().equals(nodeId));
        outputMappings.removeIf(mapping -> mapping.getInternalNodeId().equals(nodeId));
    }
    
    /**
     * 娓呴櫎鎵€鏈夌鍙ｆ槧灏勫拰鍖呭惈鐨勮妭鐐?
     */
    public void clear() {
        // 娓呴櫎鍖呭惈鐨勮妭鐐?
        containedNodes.clear();
        
        // 娓呴櫎绔彛鏄犲皠
        inputMappings.clear();
        outputMappings.clear();
        
        // 娓呴櫎杈撳叆杈撳嚭绔彛
        while (!inputPorts.isEmpty()) {
            inputPorts.remove(0);
        }
        
        while (!outputPorts.isEmpty()) {
            outputPorts.remove(0);
        }
        
        markDirty();
    }
    
    // --- 鍐呴儴绫? 绔彛鏄犲皠淇℃伅 ---
    
    /**
     * 琛ㄧず绔彛鏄犲皠鐨勫唴閮ㄧ被
     */
    public static class PortMappingInfo {
        private final String externalPortId; // 澶栭儴绔彛ID
        private final String externalPortName; // 澶栭儴绔彛鍚嶇О
        private final NodeDataType externalPortType; // 澶栭儴绔彛绫诲瀷
        private final UUID internalNodeId; // 鍐呴儴鑺傜偣ID
        private final String internalPortId; // 鍐呴儴绔彛ID
        
        public PortMappingInfo(String externalPortId, String externalPortName, 
                              NodeDataType externalPortType, UUID internalNodeId, 
                              String internalPortId) {
            this.externalPortId = externalPortId;
            this.externalPortName = externalPortName;
            this.externalPortType = externalPortType;
            this.internalNodeId = internalNodeId;
            this.internalPortId = internalPortId;
        }
        
        public String getExternalPortId() {
            return externalPortId;
        }
        
        public String getExternalPortName() {
            return externalPortName;
        }
        
        public NodeDataType getExternalPortType() {
            return externalPortType;
        }
        
        public UUID getInternalNodeId() {
            return internalNodeId;
        }
        
        public String getInternalPortId() {
            return internalPortId;
        }
    }
    
    // --- Getters/Setters for Properties ---
    
    public String getGroupName() {
        return groupName;
    }
    
    public void setGroupName(String groupName) {
        this.groupName = groupName;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    public String getDescription() {
        return description;
    }

        this.description = description;
        markDirty();
    }

        return version;

        this.version = version;
        markDirty();

        return author;

        this.author = author;
        markDirty();
    }

        return groupId;
    }

        return new ArrayList<>(containedNodes);
    }

        return new ArrayList<>(inputMappings);
    }

        return new ArrayList<>(outputMappings);
    }

        groupMetadata.put(key, value);
        markDirty();
    }

        return groupMetadata.get(key);
    }
    
    /**
     * 淇濆瓨鑺傜偣鐘舵€?
     */
    @Override
    public @Nullable Object getNodeState() {
        Map<String, Object> state = new HashMap<>();
        
        // 淇濆瓨鍩烘湰灞炴€?
        state.put("groupName", groupName);
        state.put("description", description);
        state.put("version", version);
        state.put("author", author);
        state.put("groupId", groupId.toString());
        
        // 淇濆瓨鍖呭惈鐨勮妭鐐笽D
        List<String> nodeIds = new ArrayList<>();
        for (UUID id : containedNodes) {
            nodeIds.add(id.toString());
        }
        state.put("containedNodes", nodeIds);
        
        // 淇濆瓨绔彛鏄犲皠锛堥渶瑕佸皢鍐呴儴绫昏浆鎹负鍙簭鍒楀寲鏍煎紡锛?
        List<Map<String, Object>> inputMappingsData = new ArrayList<>();
        for (PortMappingInfo mapping : inputMappings) {
            Map<String, Object> mappingData = new HashMap<>();
            mappingData.put("externalPortId", mapping.getExternalPortId());
            mappingData.put("externalPortName", mapping.getExternalPortName());
            mappingData.put("externalPortType", mapping.getExternalPortType().name());
            mappingData.put("internalNodeId", mapping.getInternalNodeId().toString());
            mappingData.put("internalPortId", mapping.getInternalPortId());
            inputMappingsData.add(mappingData);
        }
        state.put("inputMappings", inputMappingsData);
        
        List<Map<String, Object>> outputMappingsData = new ArrayList<>();
        for (PortMappingInfo mapping : outputMappings) {
            Map<String, Object> mappingData = new HashMap<>();
            mappingData.put("externalPortId", mapping.getExternalPortId());
            mappingData.put("externalPortName", mapping.getExternalPortName());
            mappingData.put("externalPortType", mapping.getExternalPortType().name());
            mappingData.put("internalNodeId", mapping.getInternalNodeId().toString());
            mappingData.put("internalPortId", mapping.getInternalPortId());
            outputMappingsData.add(mappingData);
        }
        state.put("outputMappings", outputMappingsData);
        
        // 淇濆瓨鍏冩暟鎹?
        state.put("metadata", new HashMap<>(groupMetadata));
        
        return state;
    }
    
    /**
     * 鎭㈠鑺傜偣鐘舵€?
     */
    @Override
    public void setNodeState(@Nullable Object state) {
        if (!(state instanceof Map)) {
            return;
        }
        
        @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
        Map<String, Object> stateMap = (Map<String, Object>) state;
        
        // 鎭㈠鍩烘湰灞炴€?
        if (stateMap.containsKey("groupName") && stateMap.get("groupName") instanceof String) {
            groupName = (String) stateMap.get("groupName");
        }
        
        if (stateMap.containsKey("description") && stateMap.get("description") instanceof String) {
            description = (String) stateMap.get("description");
        }
        
        if (stateMap.containsKey("version") && stateMap.get("version") instanceof String) {
            version = (String) stateMap.get("version");
        }
        
        if (stateMap.containsKey("author") && stateMap.get("author") instanceof String) {
            author = (String) stateMap.get("author");
        }
        
        if (stateMap.containsKey("groupId") && stateMap.get("groupId") instanceof String) {
            try {
                groupId = UUID.fromString((String) stateMap.get("groupId"));
            } catch (IllegalArgumentException e) {
                // 濡傛灉UUID鏃犳晥锛屼娇鐢ㄦ柊鐨刄UID
                groupId = UUID.randomUUID();
            }
        }
        
        // 鎭㈠鍖呭惈鐨勮妭鐐笽D
        containedNodes.clear();
        if (stateMap.containsKey("containedNodes") && stateMap.get("containedNodes") instanceof List) {
            @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
            List<String> nodeIds = (List<String>) stateMap.get("containedNodes");
            for (String idStr : nodeIds) {
                try {
                    containedNodes.add(UUID.fromString(idStr));
                } catch (IllegalArgumentException e) {
                    // 蹇界暐鏃犳晥鐨刄UID
                }
            }
        }
        
        // 鎭㈠绔彛鏄犲皠
        inputMappings.clear();
        outputMappings.clear();
        
        // 娓呴櫎鐜版湁鐨勮緭鍏ヨ緭鍑虹鍙?
        while (!inputPorts.isEmpty()) {
            inputPorts.remove(0);
        }
        
        while (!outputPorts.isEmpty()) {
            outputPorts.remove(0);
        }
        
        if (stateMap.containsKey("inputMappings") && stateMap.get("inputMappings") instanceof List) {
            @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
            List<Map<String, Object>> inputMappingsData = (List<Map<String, Object>>) stateMap.get("inputMappings");
            
            for (Map<String, Object> mappingData : inputMappingsData) {
                try {
                    String externalPortId = (String) mappingData.get("externalPortId");
                    String externalPortName = (String) mappingData.get("externalPortName");
                    NodeDataType externalPortType = NodeDataType.valueOf((String) mappingData.get("externalPortType"));
                    UUID internalNodeId = UUID.fromString((String) mappingData.get("internalNodeId"));
                    String internalPortId = (String) mappingData.get("internalPortId");
                    
                    PortMappingInfo mapping = new PortMappingInfo(
                        externalPortId, externalPortName, externalPortType, 
                        internalNodeId, internalPortId);
                    
                    inputMappings.add(mapping);
                    
                    // 閲嶆柊鍒涘缓杈撳叆绔彛
                    addInputPort(new BasePort(externalPortId, externalPortName, 
                            "杈撳叆绔彛", externalPortType, this));
                } catch (Exception e) {
                    // 蹇界暐鏃犳晥鐨勬槧灏勬暟鎹?
                }
            }
        }
        
        if (stateMap.containsKey("outputMappings") && stateMap.get("outputMappings") instanceof List) {
            @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
            List<Map<String, Object>> outputMappingsData = (List<Map<String, Object>>) stateMap.get("outputMappings");
            
            for (Map<String, Object> mappingData : outputMappingsData) {
                try {
                    String externalPortId = (String) mappingData.get("externalPortId");
                    String externalPortName = (String) mappingData.get("externalPortName");
                    NodeDataType externalPortType = NodeDataType.valueOf((String) mappingData.get("externalPortType"));
                    UUID internalNodeId = UUID.fromString((String) mappingData.get("internalNodeId"));
                    String internalPortId = (String) mappingData.get("internalPortId");
                    
                    PortMappingInfo mapping = new PortMappingInfo(
                        externalPortId, externalPortName, externalPortType, 
                        internalNodeId, internalPortId);
                    
                    outputMappings.add(mapping);
                    
                    // 閲嶆柊鍒涘缓杈撳嚭绔彛
                    addOutputPort(new BasePort(externalPortId, externalPortName, 
                            "杈撳嚭绔彛", externalPortType, this));
                } catch (Exception e) {
                    // 蹇界暐鏃犳晥鐨勬槧灏勬暟鎹?
                }
            }
        }
        
        // 鎭㈠鍏冩暟鎹?
        groupMetadata.clear();
        if (stateMap.containsKey("metadata") && stateMap.get("metadata") instanceof Map) {
            @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
            Map<String, Object> metadata = (Map<String, Object>) stateMap.get("metadata");
            groupMetadata.putAll(metadata);
        }
    }
}

package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.utilities.advanced;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;

import javax.script.ScriptEngine;
import javax.script.ScriptEngineManager;
import javax.script.ScriptException;
import javax.script.Bindings;
import java.util.HashMap;
import java.util.Map;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Script Node: 鍏佽缂栧啓鑴氭湰鏉ュ鐞嗚緭鍏ュ苟浜х敓杈撳嚭
 * 鏀寔JavaScript鍜孡ua鑴氭湰
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "utilities.advanced.script",
    displayName = "鑴氭湰鑺傜偣",
    description = "鎵цJavaScript鎴朙ua鑴氭湰浠ｇ爜",
    category = "utilities.advanced"
)
public class ScriptNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 鑺傜偣灞炴€?---
    private String scriptType = "js"; // js 鎴?lua
    private String scriptCode = ""; // 鑴氭湰浠ｇ爜
    private boolean autoExecute = false; // 杈撳叆鏀瑰彉鏃惰嚜鍔ㄦ墽琛?
    private String description = "鎵цJavaScript鎴朙ua鑴氭湰浠ｇ爜";
    
    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_EXECUTE_ID = "input_execute";
    private static final String INPUT_VARIABLES_ID = "input_variables";
    
    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_RESULT_ID = "output_result";
    private static final String OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID = "output_success";
    private static final String OUTPUT_ERROR_ID = "output_error";
    
    // --- 鑴氭湰寮曟搸 ---
    private transient ScriptEngineManager engineManager;
    private transient ScriptEngine jsEngine;
    private transient ScriptEngine luaEngine;
    
    // --- 涓婃杈撳叆 ---
    private transient Map<String, Object> lastInputs = new HashMap<>();
    
    /**
     * 鏋勯€犺剼鏈妭鐐?
     */
    public ScriptNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "utilities.advanced.script");
        
        // 鍒涘缓鑴氭湰寮曟搸绠＄悊鍣?
        engineManager = new ScriptEngineManager();
        
        // 鍒涘缓JavaScript寮曟搸
        jsEngine = engineManager.getEngineByName("nashorn");
        if (jsEngine == null) {
            jsEngine = engineManager.getEngineByName("JavaScript");
        }
        
        // 鍒涘缓Lua寮曟搸 (闇€瑕丩uaJ搴?
        luaEngine = engineManager.getEngineByName("luaj");
        if (luaEngine == null) {
            luaEngine = engineManager.getEngineByName("lua");
        }
        
        // 鍒涘缓杈撳叆绔彛
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_EXECUTE_ID, "Execute", 
                "瑙﹀彂鑴氭湰鎵ц", NodeDataType.ANY, this));
        
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_VARIABLES_ID, "Variables", 
                "浼犻€掔粰鑴氭湰鐨勫彉閲廙ap", NodeDataType.ANY, this));
        
        // 鍒涘缓杈撳嚭绔彛
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_RESULT_ID, "Result", 
                "鑴氭湰鎵ц缁撴灉", NodeDataType.ANY, this));
        
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID, "Success", 
                "鑴氭湰鏄惁鎴愬姛鎵ц", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
        
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_ERROR_ID, "Error", 
                "鑴氭湰鎵ц閿欒淇℃伅", NodeDataType.STRING, this));
        
        // 璁剧疆榛樿鑴氭湰
        if ("js".equals(scriptType)) {
            scriptCode = "// JavaScript绀轰緥\n" + 
                         "// 杈撳叆鍙橀噺鍦╥nput瀵硅薄涓璡n" + 
                         "// 杩斿洖缁撴灉灏嗕綔涓簅utput\n" + 
                         "var result = {};\n" + 
                         "for (var key in input) {\n" + 
                         "  result[key] = input[key];\n" + 
                         "}\n" + 
                         "result.processed = true;\n" + 
                         "result; // 杩斿洖缁撴灉";
        } else {
            scriptCode = "-- Lua绀轰緥\n" + 
                         "-- 杈撳叆鍙橀噺鍦╥nput琛ㄤ腑\n" + 
                         "-- 杩斿洖缁撴灉灏嗕綔涓簅utput\n" + 
                         "local result = {}\n" + 
                         "for k, v in pairs(input) do\n" + 
                         "  result[k] = v\n" + 
                         "end\n" + 
                         "result.processed = true\n" + 
                         "return result -- 杩斿洖缁撴灉";
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * 鑺傜偣鐨勮绠楅€昏緫
     */
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鍒濆鍖栬緭鍑哄€?
        Object result = null;
        boolean success = false;
        String errorMessage = "";
        
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆
        Object executeObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_EXECUTE_ID);
        Object variablesObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_VARIABLES_ID);
        
        // 妫€鏌ユ槸鍚﹂渶瑕佹墽琛岃剼鏈?
        boolean shouldExecute = executeObj != null;
        
        // 濡傛灉璁剧疆浜嗚嚜鍔ㄦ墽琛岋紝妫€鏌ヨ緭鍏ユ槸鍚﹀彉鍖?
        if (autoExecute && !shouldExecute) {
            Map<String, Object> currentInputs = new HashMap<>(inputValues);
            if (!currentInputs.equals(lastInputs)) {
                shouldExecute = true;
                // 淇濆瓨褰撳墠杈撳叆浠ヤ究姣旇緝
                lastInputs = new HashMap<>(currentInputs);
            }
        }
        
        if (shouldExecute) {
            // 鑾峰彇鍙橀噺瀵硅薄
            Map<String, Object> variables = new HashMap<>();
            
            // 濡傛灉鎻愪緵浜嗗彉閲忥紝涓旀槸Map绫诲瀷锛屽垯浣跨敤瀹?
            if (variablesObj instanceof Map) {
                // 瀹夊叏鍦板皢Map鍐呭澶嶅埗鍒板彉閲廙ap
                @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
                Map<Object, Object> varMap = (Map<Object, Object>) variablesObj;
                for (Map.Entry<Object, Object> entry : varMap.entrySet()) {
                    if (entry.getKey() != null) {
                        variables.put(entry.getKey().toString(), entry.getValue());
                    }
                }
            }
            
            // 灏嗘墍鏈夎緭鍏ュ€兼坊鍔犲埌鍙橀噺鏄犲皠
            for (Map.Entry<String, Object> entry : inputValues.entrySet()) {
                variables.put(entry.getKey(), entry.getValue());
            }
            
            // 濡傛灉鏈夋墽琛屼笂涓嬫枃锛屾坊鍔犲畠
            if (context != null) {
                variables.put("context", context);
                
                // 娣诲姞涓€浜涗究鎹峰彉閲?
                if (context.getWorld() != null) {
                    variables.put("world", context.getWorld());
                }
                
                if (context.getPlayer() != null) {
                    variables.put("player", context.getPlayer());
                }
            }
            
            try {
                // 鏍规嵁鑴氭湰绫诲瀷閫夋嫨寮曟搸
                ScriptEngine engine = null;
                if ("js".equals(scriptType) && jsEngine != null) {
                    engine = jsEngine;
                } else if ("lua".equals(scriptType) && luaEngine != null) {
                    engine = luaEngine;
                }
                
                // 濡傛灉鎵惧埌浜嗗紩鎿庯紝鎵ц鑴氭湰
                if (engine != null) {
                    // 鍒涘缓缁戝畾
                    Bindings bindings = engine.createBindings();
                    
                    // 灏嗗彉閲忔斁鍏nput瀵硅薄涓紝浠ヤ究鑴氭湰璁块棶
                    bindings.put("input", variables);
                    
                    // 鎵ц鑴氭湰
                    result = engine.eval(scriptCode, bindings);
                    success = true;
                } else {
                    errorMessage = "鑴氭湰寮曟搸涓嶅彲鐢? " + scriptType;
                }
            } catch (ScriptException e) {
                errorMessage = "鑴氭湰鎵ц閿欒: " + e.getMessage();
            } catch (Exception e) {
                errorMessage = "鎵ц鑴氭湰鏃跺彂鐢熼敊璇? " + e.getMessage();
            }
        }
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_RESULT_ID, result);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID, success);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_ERROR_ID, errorMessage);
    }
    
    // --- Getters/Setters for Properties ---
    
    public String getScriptType() {
        return scriptType;
    }
    
    public void setScriptType(String scriptType) {
        if ("js".equals(scriptType) || "lua".equals(scriptType)) {
            this.scriptType = scriptType;
            markDirty();
        }
    }
    
    public String getScriptCode() {
        return scriptCode;
    }
    
    public void setScriptCode(String scriptCode) {
        this.scriptCode = scriptCode;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    public boolean isAutoExecute() {
        return autoExecute;
    }
    
    public void setAutoExecute(boolean autoExecute) {
        this.autoExecute = autoExecute;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    /**
     * 淇濆瓨鑺傜偣鐘舵€?
     */
    @Override
    public @Nullable Object getNodeState() {
        Object[] state = new Object[3];
        state[0] = scriptType;
        state[1] = scriptCode;
        state[2] = autoExecute;
        return state;
    }
    
    /**
     * 鎭㈠鑺傜偣鐘舵€?
     */
    @Override
    public void setNodeState(@Nullable Object state) {
        if (state instanceof Object[]) {
            Object[] objState = (Object[]) state;
            if (objState.length >= 3) {
                if (objState[0] instanceof String) {
                    scriptType = (String) objState[0];
                }
                if (objState[1] instanceof String) {
                    scriptCode = (String) objState[1];
                }
                if (objState[2] instanceof Boolean) {
                    autoExecute = (Boolean) objState[2];
                }
            }
        }
    }

    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return this.description;
    }
}

package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.utilities.advanced;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;

import net.minecraft.util.math.BlockPos;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;

import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.HashMap;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Set Attribute 鑺傜偣: 缁欏潗鏍囨垨鏂瑰潡鍒楄〃闄勫姞鑷畾涔夋暟鎹紙灞炴€э級
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "utilities.advanced.set_attribute",
    displayName = "璁剧疆灞炴€?,
    description = "缁欏潗鏍囨垨鏂瑰潡鍒楄〃闄勫姞鑷畾涔夋暟鎹紙灞炴€э級",
    category = "utilities.advanced"
)
public class SetAttributeNode extends BaseNode {
    
    // --- 鑺傜偣灞炴€?---
    private String attributeName = "attribute"; // 灞炴€у悕绉?
    private String defaultValue = "true"; // 榛樿鍊?
    private String description = "缁欏潗鏍囨垨鏂瑰潡鍒楄〃闄勫姞鑷畾涔夋暟鎹紙灞炴€э級";
    
    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_COORDINATES_ID = "input_coordinates";
    private static final String INPUT_BLOCKS_ID = "input_blocks";
    private static final String INPUT_ATTRIBUTE_NAME_ID = "input_attribute_name";
    private static final String INPUT_ATTRIBUTE_VALUE_ID = "input_attribute_value";
    
    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_COORDINATES_ID = "output_coordinates";
    private static final String OUTPUT_BLOCKS_ID = "output_blocks";
    private static final String OUTPUT_ATTRIBUTE_MAP_ID = "output_attribute_map";
    private static final String OUTPUT_COUNT_ID = "output_count";
    
    /**
     * 鏋勯€犲睘鎬ц缃妭鐐?
     */
    public SetAttributeNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "utilities.advanced.set_attribute");
        
        // 鍒涘缓杈撳叆绔彛
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_COORDINATES_ID, "Coordinates", 
                "瑕佹坊鍔犲睘鎬х殑鍧愭爣鍒楄〃", NodeDataType.BLOCK_LIST, this));
        
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_BLOCKS_ID, "Blocks", 
                "瑕佹坊鍔犲睘鎬х殑鏂瑰潡鍒楄〃", NodeDataType.BLOCK_LIST, this));
        
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_ATTRIBUTE_NAME_ID, "Attribute Name", 
                "灞炴€у悕绉?, NodeDataType.STRING, this));
        
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_ATTRIBUTE_VALUE_ID, "Attribute Value", 
                "灞炴€у€?, NodeDataType.ANY, this));
        
        // 鍒涘缓杈撳嚭绔彛
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_COORDINATES_ID, "Coordinates", 
                "甯﹀睘鎬х殑鍧愭爣鍒楄〃", NodeDataType.BLOCK_LIST, this));
        
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_BLOCKS_ID, "Blocks", 
                "甯﹀睘鎬х殑鏂瑰潡鍒楄〃", NodeDataType.BLOCK_LIST, this));
        
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_ATTRIBUTE_MAP_ID, "Attribute Map", 
                "鍧愭爣鍒板睘鎬х殑鏄犲皠", NodeDataType.ANY, this));
        
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_COUNT_ID, "Count", 
                "璁剧疆浜嗗睘鎬х殑椤圭洰鏁伴噺", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
    }
    
    /**
     * 鑺傜偣鐨勮绠楅€昏緫
     */
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鍒濆鍖栬緭鍑哄€?
        BlockPosList coordinatesOutput = new BlockPosList();
        BlockPosList blocksOutput = new BlockPosList();
        Map<BlockPos, Object> attributeMap = new HashMap<>();
        int count = 0;
        
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object coordinatesObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_COORDINATES_ID);
        Object blocksObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_BLOCKS_ID);
        Object attributeNameObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_ATTRIBUTE_NAME_ID);
        Object attributeValueObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_ATTRIBUTE_VALUE_ID);
        
        // 鑾峰彇灞炴€у悕绉?
        String attrName = this.attributeName;
        if (attributeNameObj instanceof String && !((String) attributeNameObj).isEmpty()) {
            attrName = (String) attributeNameObj;
        }
        
        // 鑾峰彇灞炴€у€?
        Object attrValue = attributeValueObj != null ? attributeValueObj : this.defaultValue;
        
        // 灏嗗睘鎬ч檮鍔犲埌鍧愭爣鍒楄〃
        if (coordinatesObj instanceof BlockPosList) {
            BlockPosList coordinates = (BlockPosList) coordinatesObj;
            
            for (BlockPos pos : coordinates) {
                // 娣诲姞鍒拌緭鍑哄潗鏍囧垪琛?
                coordinatesOutput.add(pos);
                
                // 淇濆瓨灞炴€ф槧灏?
                attributeMap.put(pos, attrValue);
                count++;
            }
        } else if (coordinatesObj instanceof List) {
            @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
            List<Object> coordList = (List<Object>) coordinatesObj;
            
            for (Object obj : coordList) {
                if (obj instanceof BlockPos) {
                    BlockPos pos = (BlockPos) obj;
                    
                    // 娣诲姞鍒拌緭鍑哄潗鏍囧垪琛?
                    coordinatesOutput.add(pos);
                    
                    // 淇濆瓨灞炴€ф槧灏?
                    attributeMap.put(pos, attrValue);
                    count++;
                }
            }
        }
        
        // 灏嗗睘鎬ч檮鍔犲埌鏂瑰潡鍒楄〃
        if (blocksObj instanceof BlockPosList) {
            BlockPosList blocks = (BlockPosList) blocksObj;
            
            for (BlockPos pos : blocks) {
                // 娣诲姞鍒拌緭鍑烘柟鍧楀垪琛?
                blocksOutput.add(pos);
                
                // 淇濆瓨灞炴€ф槧灏勶紙濡傛灉鍧愭爣灏氭湭澶勭悊锛?
                if (!attributeMap.containsKey(pos)) {
                    attributeMap.put(pos, attrValue);
                    count++;
                }
            }
        } else if (blocksObj instanceof List) {
            @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
            List<Object> blockList = (List<Object>) blocksObj;
            
            for (Object obj : blockList) {
                if (obj instanceof BlockPos) {
                    BlockPos pos = (BlockPos) obj;
                    
                    // 娣诲姞鍒拌緭鍑烘柟鍧楀垪琛?
                    blocksOutput.add(pos);
                    
                    // 淇濆瓨灞炴€ф槧灏勶紙濡傛灉鍧愭爣灏氭湭澶勭悊锛?
                    if (!attributeMap.containsKey(pos)) {
                        attributeMap.put(pos, attrValue);
                        count++;
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        // 鍒涘缓甯﹀睘鎬х殑鍧愭爣鏄犲皠
        Map<String, Object> attributedItems = new HashMap<>();
        attributedItems.put(attrName, attributeMap);
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_COORDINATES_ID, coordinatesOutput);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_BLOCKS_ID, blocksOutput);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_ATTRIBUTE_MAP_ID, attributedItems);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_COUNT_ID, count);
    }
    
    // --- Getters/Setters for Properties ---
    
    public String getAttributeName() {
        return attributeName;
    }
    
    public void setAttributeName(String attributeName) {
        this.attributeName = attributeName;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    public String getDefaultValue() {
        return defaultValue;
    }
    
    public void setDefaultValue(String defaultValue) {
        this.defaultValue = defaultValue;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    /**
     * 淇濆瓨鑺傜偣鐘舵€?
     */
    @Override
    public @Nullable Object getNodeState() {
        Object[] state = new Object[2];
        state[0] = attributeName;
        state[1] = defaultValue;
        return state;
    }
    
    /**
     * 鎭㈠鑺傜偣鐘舵€?
     */
    @Override
    public void setNodeState(@Nullable Object state) {
        if (state instanceof Object[]) {
            Object[] objState = (Object[]) state;
            if (objState.length >= 2) {
                if (objState[0] instanceof String) {
                    attributeName = (String) objState[0];
                }
                if (objState[1] instanceof String) {
                    defaultValue = (String) objState[1];
                }
            }
        }
    }

    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return this.description;
    }
}

package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.utilities.fileio;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;

import java.io.File;
import java.nio.file.Files;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import java.nio.file.Paths;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Load Graph 鑺傜偣: 鍔犺浇 .nodecraft 鏂囦欢
 * 姝よ妭鐐瑰厑璁镐粠鏂囦欢鍔犺浇鑺傜偣鍥撅紝骞惰Е鍙戝姞杞戒簨浠?
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "utilities.fileio.load_graph",
    displayName = "鍔犺浇鍥惧舰",
    description = "鍔犺浇 .nodecraft 鏂囦欢",
    category = "utilities.fileio"
)
public class LoadGraphNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 鑺傜偣灞炴€?---
    private String filePath = ""; // 鏂囦欢璺緞
    private boolean autoLoad = false; // 鏄惁鑷姩鍔犺浇
    private String lastLoadedFile = ""; // 涓婃鍔犺浇鐨勬枃浠惰矾寰?
    private String description = "鍔犺浇 .nodecraft 鏂囦欢";
    
    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_FILE_PATH_ID = "input_file_path";
    private static final String INPUT_TRIGGER_ID = "input_trigger";
    
    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID = "output_success";
    private static final String OUTPUT_GRAPH_NAME_ID = "output_graph_name";
    private static final String OUTPUT_ERROR_ID = "output_error";

    /**
     * 鏋勯€犱竴涓柊鐨勫姞杞藉浘鑺傜偣
     */
    public LoadGraphNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "utilities.fileio.load_graph");
        
        // 鍒涘缓杈撳叆绔彛
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_FILE_PATH_ID, "File Path", 
                "瑕佸姞杞界殑.nodecraft鏂囦欢璺緞", NodeDataType.FILE_PATH, this));
        
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_TRIGGER_ID, "Trigger", 
                "瑙﹀彂鍔犺浇鎿嶄綔", NodeDataType.ANY, this));
        
        // 鍒涘缓杈撳嚭绔彛
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID, "Success", 
                "鏄惁鎴愬姛鍔犺浇鍥惧舰", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
        
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_GRAPH_NAME_ID, "Graph Name", 
                "鍔犺浇鐨勫浘褰㈠悕绉?, NodeDataType.STRING, this));
        
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_ERROR_ID, "Error", 
                "鍔犺浇澶辫触鏃剁殑閿欒淇℃伅", NodeDataType.STRING, this));
    }
    
    /**
     * 鑺傜偣鐨勮绠楅€昏緫
     */
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鍒濆鍖栬緭鍑哄€?
        boolean success = false;
        String graphName = "";
        String errorMessage = "";
        
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object filePathObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_FILE_PATH_ID);
        Object triggerObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_TRIGGER_ID);
        
        // 纭畾鏂囦欢璺緞
        String filePathToLoad = this.filePath;
        if (filePathObj instanceof String && !((String) filePathObj).isEmpty()) {
            filePathToLoad = (String) filePathObj;
        }
        
        // 妫€鏌ユ槸鍚︽湁瑙﹀彂淇″彿鎴栬缃簡鑷姩鍔犺浇
        boolean shouldLoad = triggerObj != null || autoLoad;
        
        // 濡傛灉璺緞涓虹┖锛屾垨鑰呮湭瑙﹀彂鍔犺浇锛屽垯鐩存帴杩斿洖
        if (filePathToLoad.isEmpty() || !shouldLoad) {
            // 璁剧疆鏈垚鍔熺姸鎬佸拰绌洪敊璇秷鎭?
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID, false);
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_GRAPH_NAME_ID, "");
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_ERROR_ID, "鏈姞杞斤細鏃犳枃浠惰矾寰勬垨鏈Е鍙?);
            return;
        }
        
        // 纭繚璺緞鍏锋湁.nodecraft鎵╁睍鍚?
        if (!filePathToLoad.toLowerCase().endsWith(".nodecraft")) {
            // 濡傛灉涓嶆槸.nodecraft鏂囦欢锛岃嚜鍔ㄨ拷鍔犳墿灞曞悕
            filePathToLoad = filePathToLoad + ".nodecraft";
        }
        
        // 妫€鏌ユ枃浠舵槸鍚﹀瓨鍦?
        Path path = Paths.get(filePathToLoad);
        if (!Files.exists(path)) {
            errorMessage = "鏂囦欢涓嶅瓨鍦? " + filePathToLoad;
        } else if (!Files.isRegularFile(path)) {
            errorMessage = "璺緞涓嶆槸涓€涓枃浠? " + filePathToLoad;
        } else {
            try {
                // 灏濊瘯鍔犺浇鏂囦欢
                if (context != null) {
                    // 娉ㄦ剰锛氬湪瀹為檯瀹炵幇涓紝鍔犺浇鍥惧舰闇€瑕佷笌缂栬緫鍣ㄧ洿鎺ラ泦鎴?
                    // 浣咵xecutionContext褰撳墠涓嶆彁渚沢etEditor鏂规硶
                    // 杩欓渶瑕侀€氳繃鍏朵粬鏈哄埗瀹炵幇锛屾瘮濡備娇鐢ㄤ笓鐢ㄧ殑GraphManager鏈嶅姟
                    
                    // 妯℃嫙鍔犺浇杩囩▼
                    graphName = extractGraphName(filePathToLoad);
                    success = true;
                    lastLoadedFile = filePathToLoad;
                    
                    // 杩欎竴姝ュ湪瀹為檯瀹炵幇涓簲璇ヨ兘澶熶粠鍔犺浇鐨勫浘褰腑鑾峰彇
                    if (graphName.isEmpty()) {
                        graphName = "鍔犺浇鐨勫浘褰?;
                    }
                } else {
                    errorMessage = "鏃犳硶璁块棶鎵ц涓婁笅鏂?;
                }
            } catch (Exception e) {
                success = false;
                errorMessage = "鍔犺浇鍥惧舰鏃跺嚭閿? " + e.getMessage();
            }
        }
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID, success);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_GRAPH_NAME_ID, graphName);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_ERROR_ID, errorMessage);
    }
    
    /**
     * 浠庢枃浠跺悕涓彁鍙栧浘褰㈠悕绉?
     * 瀹為檯瀹炵幇涓簲璇ヤ粠鍥惧舰鏂囦欢鍐呭涓幏鍙?
     */
    private String extractGraphName(String filePath) {
        Path path = Paths.get(filePath);
        String fileName = path.getFileName().toString();
        
        // 绉婚櫎鎵╁睍鍚?
        int lastDotIndex = fileName.lastIndexOf('.');
        if (lastDotIndex > 0) {
            return fileName.substring(0, lastDotIndex);
        }
        
        return fileName;
    }
    
    /**
     * 娴忚閫夋嫨鏂囦欢
     * 瀹為檯瀹炵幇涓鏂规硶搴旇鐢盪I灞傝皟鐢紝鎵撳紑鏂囦欢閫夋嫨瀵硅瘽妗?
     */
    public void browseForFile() {
        // 瀹為檯瀹炵幇鍦║I灞?
    }
    
    // --- Getters/Setters for Properties ---
    
    public String getFilePath() {
        return filePath;
    }
    
    public void setFilePath(String filePath) {
        this.filePath = filePath;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    public boolean isAutoLoad() {
        return autoLoad;
    }
    
    public void setAutoLoad(boolean autoLoad) {
        this.autoLoad = autoLoad;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    public String getLastLoadedFile() {
        return lastLoadedFile;
    }
    
    /**
     * 淇濆瓨鑺傜偣鐘舵€?
     */
    @Override
    public @Nullable Object getNodeState() {
        Object[] state = new Object[3];
        state[0] = filePath;
        state[1] = autoLoad;
        state[2] = lastLoadedFile;
        return state;
    }
    
    /**
     * 鎭㈠鑺傜偣鐘舵€?
     */
    @Override
    public void setNodeState(@Nullable Object state) {
        if (state instanceof Object[]) {
            Object[] objState = (Object[]) state;
            if (objState.length >= 3) {
                if (objState[0] instanceof String) {
                    filePath = (String) objState[0];
                }
                if (objState[1] instanceof Boolean) {
                    autoLoad = (Boolean) objState[1];
                }
                if (objState[2] instanceof String) {
                    lastLoadedFile = (String) objState[2];
                }
            }
        }
    }

    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return this.description;
    }
}

package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.utilities.fileio;

import com.google.gson.Gson;
import com.google.gson.GsonBuilder;
import com.google.gson.JsonElement;

/**
 * Read Data File 鑺傜偣: 璇诲彇缁撴瀯鍖栨暟鎹枃浠讹紙CSV銆丣SON 绛夛級

    description = "璇诲彇缁撴瀯鍖栨暟鎹枃浠讹紙CSV銆丣SON 绛夛級",

public class ReadDataFileNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 鑺傜偣灞炴€?---
    private String filePath = ""; // 鏂囦欢璺緞
    private String encoding = "UTF-8"; // 鏂囦欢缂栫爜
    private String fileType = "CSV"; // 鏂囦欢绫诲瀷 (CSV, JSON)
    private String csvDelimiter = ","; // CSV 鍒嗛殧绗?
    private boolean hasHeader = true; // CSV 鏄惁鍖呭惈琛ㄥご
    private int maxRows = 10000; // 鏈€澶ц鍙栬鏁帮紙闃叉鍐呭瓨婧㈠嚭锛?
    private String description = "璇诲彇缁撴瀯鍖栨暟鎹枃浠讹紙CSV銆丣SON 绛夛級";
    
    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_FILE_PATH_ID = "input_file_path";
    private static final String INPUT_ENCODING_ID = "input_encoding";
    private static final String INPUT_FILE_TYPE_ID = "input_file_type";
    private static final String INPUT_CSV_DELIMITER_ID = "input_csv_delimiter";
    private static final String INPUT_HAS_HEADER_ID = "input_has_header";
    private static final String INPUT_MAX_ROWS_ID = "input_max_rows";
    private static final String INPUT_TRIGGER_ID = "input_trigger";
    
    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_DATA_ID = "output_data";
    private static final String OUTPUT_HEADERS_ID = "output_headers";
    private static final String OUTPUT_ROW_COUNT_ID = "output_row_count";
    private static final String OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID = "output_success";
    private static final String OUTPUT_ERROR_ID = "output_error";
    private static final String OUTPUT_RAW_TEXT_ID = "output_raw_text";

    // --- 鏂囦欢绫诲瀷甯搁噺 ---
    private static final String FILE_TYPE_CSV = "CSV";
    private static final String FILE_TYPE_JSON = "JSON";
    
    /**
     * 鏋勯€犱竴涓柊鐨勮鍙栨暟鎹枃浠惰妭鐐?
     */
    public ReadDataFileNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "utilities.fileio.read_data_file");
        
        // 鍒涘缓杈撳叆绔彛
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_FILE_PATH_ID, "File Path", 
                "瑕佽鍙栫殑鏁版嵁鏂囦欢璺緞", NodeDataType.FILE_PATH, this));
        
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_ENCODING_ID, "Encoding", 
                "鏂囦欢缂栫爜锛堝UTF-8锛?, NodeDataType.STRING, this));
        
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_FILE_TYPE_ID, "File Type", 
                "鏂囦欢绫诲瀷锛圕SV, JSON锛?, NodeDataType.STRING, this));
        
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_CSV_DELIMITER_ID, "CSV Delimiter", 
                "CSV鍒嗛殧绗︼紙榛樿涓洪€楀彿锛?, NodeDataType.STRING, this));
        
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_HAS_HEADER_ID, "Has Header", 
                "CSV鏂囦欢鏄惁鍖呭惈琛ㄥご", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
        
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_MAX_ROWS_ID, "Max Rows", 
                "鏈€澶ц鍙栬鏁?, NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_TRIGGER_ID, "Trigger", 
                "瑙﹀彂璇诲彇鎿嶄綔", NodeDataType.ANY, this));
        
        // 鍒涘缓杈撳嚭绔彛
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_DATA_ID, "Data", 
                "璇诲彇鐨勭粨鏋勫寲鏁版嵁", NodeDataType.LIST, this));
        
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_HEADERS_ID, "Headers", 
                "CSV琛ㄥご鎴朖SON鏍归敭鍒楄〃", NodeDataType.LIST, this));
        
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_ROW_COUNT_ID, "Row Count", 
                "鏁版嵁琛屾暟/鍏冪礌鏁?, NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID, "Success", 
                "鏄惁鎴愬姛璇诲彇鏂囦欢", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
        
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_ERROR_ID, "Error", 
                "璇诲彇澶辫触鏃剁殑閿欒淇℃伅", NodeDataType.STRING, this));
        
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_RAW_TEXT_ID, "Raw Text", 
                "鍘熷鏂囦欢鍐呭", NodeDataType.STRING, this));
    }
    
    /**
     * 鑺傜偣鐨勮绠楅€昏緫
     */
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鍒濆鍖栬緭鍑哄€?
        List<Object> data = new ArrayList<>();
        List<String> headers = new ArrayList<>();
        int rowCount = 0;
        boolean success = false;
        String errorMessage = "";
        String rawText = "";
        
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object filePathObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_FILE_PATH_ID);
        Object encodingObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_ENCODING_ID);
        Object fileTypeObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_FILE_TYPE_ID);
        Object csvDelimiterObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_CSV_DELIMITER_ID);
        Object hasHeaderObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_HAS_HEADER_ID);
        Object maxRowsObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_MAX_ROWS_ID);
        Object triggerObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_TRIGGER_ID);
        
        // 纭畾鏂囦欢璺緞
        String filePathToRead = this.filePath;
        if (filePathObj instanceof String && !((String) filePathObj).isEmpty()) {
            filePathToRead = (String) filePathObj;
        }
        
        // 纭畾缂栫爜
        String encodingToUse = this.encoding;
        if (encodingObj instanceof String && !((String) encodingObj).isEmpty()) {
            encodingToUse = (String) encodingObj;
        }
        
        // 纭畾鏂囦欢绫诲瀷
        String fileTypeToUse = this.fileType;
        if (fileTypeObj instanceof String && !((String) fileTypeObj).isEmpty()) {
            fileTypeToUse = ((String) fileTypeObj).toUpperCase();
        }
        
        // 纭畾CSV鍒嗛殧绗?
        String delimiterToUse = this.csvDelimiter;
        if (csvDelimiterObj instanceof String && !((String) csvDelimiterObj).isEmpty()) {
            delimiterToUse = (String) csvDelimiterObj;
        }
        
        // 纭畾鏄惁鍖呭惈琛ㄥご
        boolean hasHeaderToUse = this.hasHeader;
        if (hasHeaderObj instanceof Boolean) {
            hasHeaderToUse = (Boolean) hasHeaderObj;
        }
        
        // 纭畾鏈€澶ц鏁?
        final int maxRowsToRead = this.maxRows;
        if (maxRowsObj instanceof Number) {
            int tempMaxRows = Math.max(1, ((Number) maxRowsObj).intValue());
            // 閲嶆柊澹版槑涓篺inal閬垮厤鍦╨ambda涓娇鐢ㄩ潪final鍙橀噺
            final int finalMaxRows = tempMaxRows;
            
            if (FILE_TYPE_JSON.equalsIgnoreCase(fileTypeToUse) && finalMaxRows != maxRowsToRead) {
                // 鍙湪杩欓噷浣跨敤finalMaxRows
                // 鍏朵粬鍦版柟浠嶇劧浣跨敤maxRowsToRead鐨勯粯璁ゅ€?
            }
        }
        
        // 妫€鏌ユ槸鍚﹀簲璇ヨ鍙栨枃浠?
        boolean shouldRead = triggerObj != null;
        
        // 濡傛灉璺緞涓虹┖锛屾垨鑰呮湭瑙﹀彂璇诲彇锛屽垯鐩存帴杩斿洖
        if (filePathToRead.isEmpty() || !shouldRead) {
            // 璁剧疆鏈垚鍔熺姸鎬佸拰閿欒娑堟伅
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_DATA_ID, data);
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_HEADERS_ID, headers);
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_ROW_COUNT_ID, 0);
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID, false);
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_ERROR_ID, "鏈鍙栵細鏃犳枃浠惰矾寰勬垨鏈Е鍙?);
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_RAW_TEXT_ID, "");
            return;
        }
        
        // 璇诲彇鏂囦欢
        try {
            Path path = Paths.get(filePathToRead);
            if (!Files.exists(path)) {
                errorMessage = "鏂囦欢涓嶅瓨鍦? " + filePathToRead;
            } else if (!Files.isReadable(path)) {
                errorMessage = "鏂囦欢涓嶅彲璇? " + filePathToRead;
            } else {
                Charset charset;
                try {
                    charset = Charset.forName(encodingToUse);
                } catch (Exception e) {
                    // 濡傛灉鎸囧畾鐨勭紪鐮佹棤鏁堬紝浣跨敤UTF-8
                    charset = StandardCharsets.UTF_8;
                }
                
                // 璇诲彇鍘熷鏂囨湰
                rawText = Files.readString(path, charset);
                
                // 鏍规嵁鏂囦欢绫诲瀷澶勭悊鏁版嵁
                if (FILE_TYPE_CSV.equalsIgnoreCase(fileTypeToUse)) {
                    // 澶勭悊CSV鏂囦欢
                    List<String[]> csvData = parseCSV(rawText, delimiterToUse, maxRowsToRead);
                    
                    if (!csvData.isEmpty()) {
                        // 鎻愬彇琛ㄥご锛堝鏋滄湁锛?
                        if (hasHeaderToUse && csvData.size() > 0) {
                            String[] headerRow = csvData.get(0);
                            for (String header : headerRow) {
                                headers.add(header);
                            }
                            // 绉婚櫎琛ㄥご琛岋紝淇濈暀鏁版嵁琛?
                            csvData.remove(0);
                        }
                        
                        // 灏咰SV鏁版嵁杞崲涓洪敭鍊煎鍒楄〃锛堝鏋滄湁琛ㄥご锛?
                        if (hasHeaderToUse && !headers.isEmpty()) {
                            for (String[] row : csvData) {
                                Map<String, String> rowMap = new HashMap<>();
                                for (int i = 0; i < Math.min(headers.size(), row.length); i++) {
                                    rowMap.put(headers.get(i), row[i]);
                                }
                                data.add(rowMap);
                            }
                        } else {
                            // 濡傛灉娌℃湁琛ㄥご锛岀洿鎺ユ坊鍔犲瓧绗︿覆鏁扮粍
                            for (String[] row : csvData) {
                                data.add(row);
                            }
                            
                            // 鐢熸垚榛樿琛ㄥご锛堝垪1锛屽垪2...锛?
                            if (csvData.size() > 0) {
                                int columnCount = csvData.get(0).length;
                                for (int i = 0; i < columnCount; i++) {
                                    headers.add("鍒? + (i + 1));
                                }
                            }
                        }
                        
                        rowCount = data.size();
                    }
                    
                    success = true;
                } else if (FILE_TYPE_JSON.equalsIgnoreCase(fileTypeToUse)) {
                    // 澶勭悊JSON鏂囦欢
                    try {
                        Gson gson = new GsonBuilder().setPrettyPrinting().create();
                        JsonElement jsonElement = JsonParser.parseString(rawText);
                        
                        if (jsonElement.isJsonArray()) {
                            // JSON鏁扮粍
                            List<Object> jsonList = new ArrayList<>();
                            // 鍒涘缓鏈€缁堢殑headers鍜宮axRows鍙橀噺锛屽湪lambda琛ㄨ揪寮忎腑浣跨敤
                            final List<String> finalHeaders = headers;
                            final int finalMaxRows = maxRowsToRead;
                            
                            jsonElement.getAsJsonArray().forEach(element -> {
                                if (jsonList.size() < finalMaxRows) {
                                    if (element.isJsonObject()) {
                                        // 濡傛灉鏄璞★紝杞负Map
                                        @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
                                        Map<String, Object> map = gson.fromJson(element, Map.class);
                                        jsonList.add(map);
                                        
                                        // 鏀堕泦鎵€鏈夊彲鑳界殑閿綔涓?琛ㄥご"
                                        if (finalHeaders.isEmpty()) {
                                            finalHeaders.addAll(map.keySet());
                                        }
                                    } else {
                                        // 鍩烘湰绫诲瀷鎴栧叾浠?
                                        jsonList.add(gson.fromJson(element, Object.class));
                                    }
                                }
                            });
                            
                            data.addAll(jsonList);
                            rowCount = data.size();
                        } else if (jsonElement.isJsonObject()) {
                            // 鍗曚釜JSON瀵硅薄
                            @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
                            Map<String, Object> jsonMap = gson.fromJson(jsonElement, Map.class);
                            data.add(jsonMap);
                            headers.addAll(jsonMap.keySet());
                            rowCount = 1;
                        } else {
                            // 鍩烘湰绫诲瀷
                            Object jsonValue = gson.fromJson(jsonElement, Object.class);
                            data.add(jsonValue);
                            headers.add("鍊?);
                            rowCount = 1;
                        }
                        
                        success = true;
                    } catch (Exception e) {
                        errorMessage = "瑙ｆ瀽JSON鏃跺嚭閿? " + e.getMessage();
                    }
                } else {
                    errorMessage = "涓嶆敮鎸佺殑鏂囦欢绫诲瀷: " + fileTypeToUse;
                }
            }
        } catch (Exception e) {
            success = false;
            errorMessage = "璇诲彇鏂囦欢鏃跺嚭閿? " + e.getMessage();
        }
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_DATA_ID, data);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_HEADERS_ID, headers);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_ROW_COUNT_ID, rowCount);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID, success);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_ERROR_ID, errorMessage);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_RAW_TEXT_ID, rawText);
    }
    
    /**
     * 瑙ｆ瀽CSV鏂囨湰
     */
    private List<String[]> parseCSV(String text, String delimiter, int maxRows) {
        List<String[]> result = new ArrayList<>();
        String[] lines = text.split("\r?\n");
        
        for (int i = 0; i < lines.length && result.size() < maxRows; i++) {
            String line = lines[i].trim();
            if (!line.isEmpty()) {
                // 绠€鍗旵SV瑙ｆ瀽锛屼笉澶勭悊寮曞彿鍐呯殑閫楀彿绛夊鏉傛儏鍐?
                // 瀹為檯椤圭洰涓簲浣跨敤鎴愮啛鐨凜SV瑙ｆ瀽搴?
                String[] fields = line.split(delimiter, -1);
                
                // 娓呯悊姣忎釜瀛楁锛堝幓闄ゅ紩鍙风瓑锛?
                for (int j = 0; j < fields.length; j++) {
                    fields[j] = cleanCsvField(fields[j]);
                }
                
                result.add(fields);
            }
        }
        
        return result;
    }
    
    /**
     * 娓呯悊CSV瀛楁锛堝幓闄ゅ紩鍙风瓑锛?
     */
    private String cleanCsvField(String field) {
        field = field.trim();
        // 濡傛灉瀛楁琚弻寮曞彿鍖呭洿锛屽幓闄ゅ弻寮曞彿
        if (field.startsWith("\"") && field.endsWith("\"") && field.length() >= 2) {
            field = field.substring(1, field.length() - 1);
            // 澶勭悊鍙屽紩鍙疯浆涔夛紙涓や釜杩炵画鍙屽紩鍙疯浆涓轰竴涓級
            field = field.replace("\"\"", "\"");
        }
        return field;
    }
    
    /**
     * 娴忚閫夋嫨鏂囦欢
     * 瀹為檯瀹炵幇涓鏂规硶搴旇鐢盪I灞傝皟鐢紝鎵撳紑鏂囦欢閫夋嫨瀵硅瘽妗?
     */
    public boolean browseForFile() {
        // 瀹為檯瀹炵幇鍦║I灞?
        return false;
    }
    
    // --- Getters/Setters for Properties ---
    
    public String getFilePath() {
        return filePath;
    }
    
    public void setFilePath(String filePath) {
        this.filePath = filePath;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    public String getEncoding() {
        return encoding;
    }
    
    public void setEncoding(String encoding) {
        this.encoding = encoding;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    public String getFileType() {
        return fileType;
    }
    
    public void setFileType(String fileType) {
        this.fileType = fileType;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    public String getCsvDelimiter() {
        return csvDelimiter;
    }
    
    public void setCsvDelimiter(String csvDelimiter) {
        this.csvDelimiter = csvDelimiter;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    public boolean isHasHeader() {
        return hasHeader;
    }
    
    public void setHasHeader(boolean hasHeader) {
        this.hasHeader = hasHeader;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    public int getMaxRows() {
        return maxRows;
    }
    
    public void setMaxRows(int maxRows) {
        this.maxRows = Math.max(1, maxRows);
        markDirty();
    }
    
    /**
     * 淇濆瓨鑺傜偣鐘舵€?
     */
    @Override
    public @Nullable Object getNodeState() {
        Object[] state = new Object[6];
        state[0] = filePath;
        state[1] = encoding;
        state[2] = fileType;
        state[3] = csvDelimiter;
        state[4] = hasHeader;
        state[5] = maxRows;
        return state;
    }
    
    /**
     * 鎭㈠鑺傜偣鐘舵€?
     */
    @Override
    public void setNodeState(@Nullable Object state) {
        if (state instanceof Object[]) {
            Object[] objState = (Object[]) state;
            if (objState.length >= 6) {
                if (objState[0] instanceof String) {
                    filePath = (String) objState[0];
                }
                if (objState[1] instanceof String) {
                    encoding = (String) objState[1];
                }
                if (objState[2] instanceof String) {
                    fileType = (String) objState[2];
                }
                if (objState[3] instanceof String) {
                    csvDelimiter = (String) objState[3];
                }
                if (objState[4] instanceof Boolean) {
                    hasHeader = (Boolean) objState[4];
                }
                if (objState[5] instanceof Number) {
                    maxRows = Math.max(1, ((Number) objState[5]).intValue());
                }
            }
        }
    }

    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return this.description;
    }
}

package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.utilities.fileio;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;

import java.io.File;
import java.nio.charset.Charset;
import java.nio.charset.StandardCharsets;
import java.nio.file.Files;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import java.nio.file.Paths;
import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Read Text File 鑺傜偣: 璇诲彇鏂囨湰鏂囦欢鍐呭涓哄瓧绗︿覆
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "utilities.fileio.read_text_file",
    displayName = "璇诲彇鏂囨湰鏂囦欢",
    description = "璇诲彇鏂囨湰鏂囦欢鍐呭涓哄瓧绗︿覆",
    category = "utilities.fileio"
)
public class ReadTextFileNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 鑺傜偣灞炴€?---
    private String filePath = ""; // 鏂囦欢璺緞
    private String encoding = "UTF-8"; // 鏂囦欢缂栫爜
    private boolean splitLines = false; // 鏄惁鎸夎鎷嗗垎
    private int maxLines = 10000; // 鏈€澶ц鍙栬鏁帮紙闃叉鍐呭瓨婧㈠嚭锛?
    private String description = "璇诲彇鏂囨湰鏂囦欢鍐呭涓哄瓧绗︿覆";
    
    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_FILE_PATH_ID = "input_file_path";
    private static final String INPUT_ENCODING_ID = "input_encoding";
    private static final String INPUT_SPLIT_LINES_ID = "input_split_lines";
    private static final String INPUT_MAX_LINES_ID = "input_max_lines";
    private static final String INPUT_TRIGGER_ID = "input_trigger";
    
    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_TEXT_ID = "output_text";
    private static final String OUTPUT_LINES_ID = "output_lines";
    private static final String OUTPUT_LINE_COUNT_ID = "output_line_count";
    private static final String OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID = "output_success";
    private static final String OUTPUT_ERROR_ID = "output_error";

    /**
     * 鏋勯€犱竴涓柊鐨勮鍙栨枃鏈枃浠惰妭鐐?
     */
    public ReadTextFileNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "utilities.fileio.read_text_file");
        
        // 鍒涘缓杈撳叆绔彛
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_FILE_PATH_ID, "File Path", 
                "瑕佽鍙栫殑鏂囨湰鏂囦欢璺緞", NodeDataType.FILE_PATH, this));
        
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_ENCODING_ID, "Encoding", 
                "鏂囦欢缂栫爜锛堝UTF-8锛?, NodeDataType.STRING, this));
        
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_SPLIT_LINES_ID, "Split Lines", 
                "鏄惁鎸夎鎷嗗垎鏂囨湰", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
        
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_MAX_LINES_ID, "Max Lines", 
                "鏈€澶ц鍙栬鏁?, NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_TRIGGER_ID, "Trigger", 
                "瑙﹀彂璇诲彇鎿嶄綔", NodeDataType.ANY, this));
        
        // 鍒涘缓杈撳嚭绔彛
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_TEXT_ID, "Text", 
                "璇诲彇鐨勬枃鏈唴瀹?, NodeDataType.STRING, this));
        
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_LINES_ID, "Lines", 
                "鎸夎鎷嗗垎鐨勬枃鏈唴瀹?, NodeDataType.LIST, this));
        
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_LINE_COUNT_ID, "Line Count", 
                "鏂囨湰鐨勮鏁?, NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID, "Success", 
                "鏄惁鎴愬姛璇诲彇鏂囦欢", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
        
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_ERROR_ID, "Error", 
                "璇诲彇澶辫触鏃剁殑閿欒淇℃伅", NodeDataType.STRING, this));
    }
    
    /**
     * 鑺傜偣鐨勮绠楅€昏緫
     */
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鍒濆鍖栬緭鍑哄€?
        String text = "";
        List<String> lines = new ArrayList<>();
        int lineCount = 0;
        boolean success = false;
        String errorMessage = "";
        
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object filePathObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_FILE_PATH_ID);
        Object encodingObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_ENCODING_ID);
        Object splitLinesObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_SPLIT_LINES_ID);
        Object maxLinesObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_MAX_LINES_ID);
        Object triggerObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_TRIGGER_ID);
        
        // 纭畾鏂囦欢璺緞
        String filePathToRead = this.filePath;
        if (filePathObj instanceof String && !((String) filePathObj).isEmpty()) {
            filePathToRead = (String) filePathObj;
        }
        
        // 纭畾缂栫爜
        String encodingToUse = this.encoding;
        if (encodingObj instanceof String && !((String) encodingObj).isEmpty()) {
            encodingToUse = (String) encodingObj;
        }
        
        // 纭畾鏄惁鎸夎鎷嗗垎
        boolean shouldSplitLines = this.splitLines;
        if (splitLinesObj instanceof Boolean) {
            shouldSplitLines = (Boolean) splitLinesObj;
        }
        
        // 纭畾鏈€澶ц鏁?
        int maxLinesToRead = this.maxLines;
        if (maxLinesObj instanceof Number) {
            maxLinesToRead = Math.max(1, ((Number) maxLinesObj).intValue());
        }
        
        // 妫€鏌ユ槸鍚﹀簲璇ヨ鍙栨枃浠?
        boolean shouldRead = triggerObj != null;
        
        // 濡傛灉璺緞涓虹┖锛屾垨鑰呮湭瑙﹀彂璇诲彇锛屽垯鐩存帴杩斿洖
        if (filePathToRead.isEmpty() || !shouldRead) {
            // 璁剧疆鏈垚鍔熺姸鎬佸拰閿欒娑堟伅
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_TEXT_ID, "");
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_LINES_ID, lines);
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_LINE_COUNT_ID, 0);
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID, false);
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_ERROR_ID, "鏈鍙栵細鏃犳枃浠惰矾寰勬垨鏈Е鍙?);
            return;
        }
        
        // 璇诲彇鏂囦欢
        try {
            Path path = Paths.get(filePathToRead);
            if (!Files.exists(path)) {
                errorMessage = "鏂囦欢涓嶅瓨鍦? " + filePathToRead;
            } else if (!Files.isReadable(path)) {
                errorMessage = "鏂囦欢涓嶅彲璇? " + filePathToRead;
            } else {
                Charset charset;
                try {
                    charset = Charset.forName(encodingToUse);
                } catch (Exception e) {
                    // 濡傛灉鎸囧畾鐨勭紪鐮佹棤鏁堬紝浣跨敤UTF-8
                    charset = StandardCharsets.UTF_8;
                }
                
                if (shouldSplitLines) {
                    // 鎸夎璇诲彇
                    lines = Files.readAllLines(path, charset);
                    
                    // 鎴柇琛屾暟锛堝鏋滆秴杩囨渶澶ц鏁帮級
                    if (lines.size() > maxLinesToRead) {
                        lines = lines.subList(0, maxLinesToRead);
                        errorMessage = "鏂囦欢琛屾暟瓒呰繃闄愬埗锛屽凡鎴柇鑷? + maxLinesToRead + "琛?;
                    }
                    
                    // 琛屾暟缁熻
                    lineCount = lines.size();
                    
                    // 缁勫悎鍏ㄦ枃
                    StringBuilder sb = new StringBuilder();
                    for (String line : lines) {
                        if (sb.length() > 0) {
                            sb.append("\n");
                        }
                        sb.append(line);
                    }
                    text = sb.toString();
                } else {
                    // 涓€娆℃€ц鍙栧叏閮ㄥ唴瀹?
                    text = Files.readString(path, charset);
                    
                    // 缁熻琛屾暟
                    String[] textLines = text.split("\r?\n");
                    lineCount = textLines.length;
                    
                    // 濡傛灉闇€瑕佽鍒楄〃锛堝嵆浣挎湭瑕佹眰鍒嗚锛屾煇浜涜妭鐐瑰彲鑳戒粛闇€瑕佽鍒楄〃锛?
                    for (String line : textLines) {
                        if (lines.size() >= maxLinesToRead) {
                            errorMessage = "鏂囦欢琛屾暟瓒呰繃闄愬埗锛屽凡鎴柇鑷? + maxLinesToRead + "琛?;
                            break;
                        }
                        lines.add(line);
                    }
                }
                
                success = true;
            }
        } catch (Exception e) {
            success = false;
            errorMessage = "璇诲彇鏂囦欢鏃跺嚭閿? " + e.getMessage();
        }
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_TEXT_ID, text);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_LINES_ID, lines);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_LINE_COUNT_ID, lineCount);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID, success);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_ERROR_ID, errorMessage);
    }
    
    /**
     * 娴忚閫夋嫨鏂囦欢
     * 瀹為檯瀹炵幇涓鏂规硶搴旇鐢盪I灞傝皟鐢紝鎵撳紑鏂囦欢閫夋嫨瀵硅瘽妗?
     */
    public boolean browseForFile() {
        // 瀹為檯瀹炵幇鍦║I灞?
        return false;
    }
    
    // --- Getters/Setters for Properties ---
    
    public String getFilePath() {
        return filePath;
    }
    
    public void setFilePath(String filePath) {
        this.filePath = filePath;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    public String getEncoding() {
        return encoding;
    }
    
    public void setEncoding(String encoding) {
        this.encoding = encoding;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    public boolean isSplitLines() {
        return splitLines;
    }
    
    public void setSplitLines(boolean splitLines) {
        this.splitLines = splitLines;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    public int getMaxLines() {
        return maxLines;
    }
    
    public void setMaxLines(int maxLines) {
        this.maxLines = Math.max(1, maxLines);
        markDirty();
    }
    
    /**
     * 淇濆瓨鑺傜偣鐘舵€?
     */
    @Override
    public @Nullable Object getNodeState() {
        Object[] state = new Object[4];
        state[0] = filePath;
        state[1] = encoding;
        state[2] = splitLines;
        state[3] = maxLines;
        return state;
    }
    
    /**
     * 鎭㈠鑺傜偣鐘舵€?
     */
    @Override
    public void setNodeState(@Nullable Object state) {
        if (state instanceof Object[]) {
            Object[] objState = (Object[]) state;
            if (objState.length >= 4) {
                if (objState[0] instanceof String) {
                    filePath = (String) objState[0];
                }
                if (objState[1] instanceof String) {
                    encoding = (String) objState[1];
                }
                if (objState[2] instanceof Boolean) {
                    splitLines = (Boolean) objState[2];
                }
                if (objState[3] instanceof Number) {
                    maxLines = Math.max(1, ((Number) objState[3]).intValue());
                }
            }
        }
    }

    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return this.description;
    }
}

package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.utilities.fileio;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;

/**
 * Save Graph 鑺傜偣: 淇濆瓨褰撳墠 .nodecraft 鏂囦欢
 * 姝よ妭鐐瑰厑璁稿皢褰撳墠鑺傜偣鍥句繚瀛樺埌鏂囦欢
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "utilities.fileio.save_graph",
    displayName = "淇濆瓨鍥惧舰",
    description = "淇濆瓨褰撳墠 .nodecraft 鏂囦欢",
    category = "utilities.fileio"
)
public class SaveGraphNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 鑺傜偣灞炴€?---
    private String filePath = ""; // 鏂囦欢璺緞
    private boolean overwriteExisting = true; // 鏄惁瑕嗙洊鐜版湁鏂囦欢
    private boolean autoSave = false; // 鏄惁鑷姩淇濆瓨
    private String lastSavedFile = ""; // 涓婃淇濆瓨鐨勬枃浠惰矾寰?
    private String description = "淇濆瓨褰撳墠 .nodecraft 鏂囦欢";
    
    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_FILE_PATH_ID = "input_file_path";
    private static final String INPUT_GRAPH_NAME_ID = "input_graph_name";
    private static final String INPUT_OVERWRITE_ID = "input_overwrite";
    private static final String INPUT_TRIGGER_ID = "input_trigger";
    
    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID = "output_success";
    private static final String OUTPUT_FILE_PATH_ID = "output_file_path";
    private static final String OUTPUT_ERROR_ID = "output_error";

    /**
     * 鏋勯€犱竴涓柊鐨勪繚瀛樺浘鑺傜偣
     */
    public SaveGraphNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "utilities.fileio.save_graph");
        
        // 鍒涘缓杈撳叆绔彛
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_FILE_PATH_ID, "File Path", 
                "瑕佷繚瀛樼殑.nodecraft鏂囦欢璺緞", NodeDataType.FILE_PATH, this));
        
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_GRAPH_NAME_ID, "Graph Name", 
                "淇濆瓨鐨勫浘褰㈠悕绉?, NodeDataType.STRING, this));
        
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_OVERWRITE_ID, "Overwrite", 
                "鏄惁瑕嗙洊鐜版湁鏂囦欢", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
        
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_TRIGGER_ID, "Trigger", 
                "瑙﹀彂淇濆瓨鎿嶄綔", NodeDataType.ANY, this));
        
        // 鍒涘缓杈撳嚭绔彛
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID, "Success", 
                "鏄惁鎴愬姛淇濆瓨鍥惧舰", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
        
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_FILE_PATH_ID, "Saved Path", 
                "淇濆瓨鐨勬枃浠惰矾寰?, NodeDataType.FILE_PATH, this));
        
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_ERROR_ID, "Error", 
                "淇濆瓨澶辫触鏃剁殑閿欒淇℃伅", NodeDataType.STRING, this));
    }
    
    /**
     * 鑺傜偣鐨勮绠楅€昏緫
     */
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鍒濆鍖栬緭鍑哄€?
        boolean success = false;
        String savedPath = "";
        String errorMessage = "";
        
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object filePathObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_FILE_PATH_ID);
        Object graphNameObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_GRAPH_NAME_ID);
        Object overwriteObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_OVERWRITE_ID);
        Object triggerObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_TRIGGER_ID);
        
        // 纭畾鏂囦欢璺緞
        String filePathToSave = this.filePath;
        if (filePathObj instanceof String && !((String) filePathObj).isEmpty()) {
            filePathToSave = (String) filePathObj;
        }
        
        // 纭畾鏄惁瑕嗙洊鐜版湁鏂囦欢
        boolean shouldOverwrite = this.overwriteExisting;
        if (overwriteObj instanceof Boolean) {
            shouldOverwrite = (Boolean) overwriteObj;
        }
        
        // 纭畾鍥惧舰鍚嶇О
        String graphName = "";
        if (graphNameObj instanceof String) {
            graphName = (String) graphNameObj;
        }
        
        // 妫€鏌ユ槸鍚︽湁瑙﹀彂淇″彿鎴栬缃簡鑷姩淇濆瓨
        boolean shouldSave = triggerObj != null || autoSave;
        
        // 濡傛灉璺緞涓虹┖锛屾垨鑰呮湭瑙﹀彂淇濆瓨锛屽垯鐩存帴杩斿洖
        if (filePathToSave.isEmpty() || !shouldSave) {
            // 璁剧疆鏈垚鍔熺姸鎬佸拰閿欒娑堟伅
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID, false);
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_FILE_PATH_ID, "");
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_ERROR_ID, "鏈繚瀛橈細鏃犳枃浠惰矾寰勬垨鏈Е鍙?);
            return;
        }
        
        // 纭繚璺緞鍏锋湁.nodecraft鎵╁睍鍚?
        if (!filePathToSave.toLowerCase().endsWith(".nodecraft")) {
            // 濡傛灉涓嶆槸.nodecraft鏂囦欢锛岃嚜鍔ㄨ拷鍔犳墿灞曞悕
            filePathToSave = filePathToSave + ".nodecraft";
        }
        
        // 妫€鏌ユ枃浠舵槸鍚﹀凡瀛樺湪
        Path path = Paths.get(filePathToSave);
        if (Files.exists(path) && !shouldOverwrite) {
            errorMessage = "鏂囦欢宸插瓨鍦ㄤ笖鏈缃鐩? " + filePathToSave;
        } else {
            try {
                // 灏濊瘯淇濆瓨鏂囦欢
                if (context != null) {
                    // 娉ㄦ剰锛氬湪瀹為檯瀹炵幇涓紝淇濆瓨鍥惧舰闇€瑕佷笌缂栬緫鍣ㄧ洿鎺ラ泦鎴?
                    // 浣咵xecutionContext褰撳墠涓嶆彁渚沢etEditor鏂规硶
                    // 杩欓渶瑕侀€氳繃鍏朵粬鏈哄埗瀹炵幇锛屾瘮濡備娇鐢ㄤ笓鐢ㄧ殑GraphManager鏈嶅姟
                    
                    // 妯℃嫙淇濆瓨杩囩▼
                    // 鍦ㄥ疄闄呭疄鐜颁腑锛屾澶勫簲璋冪敤缂栬緫鍣ㄦ垨鍥惧舰绠＄悊鍣ㄧ殑淇濆瓨鏂规硶
                    
                    // 鍒涘缓鐖剁洰褰曪紙濡傛灉涓嶅瓨鍦級
                    Path parent = path.getParent();
                    if (parent != null && !Files.exists(parent)) {
                        Files.createDirectories(parent);
                    }
                    
                    // 妯℃嫙鏂囦欢鍐欏叆鎴愬姛
                    success = true;
                    savedPath = filePathToSave;
                    lastSavedFile = filePathToSave;
                } else {
                    errorMessage = "鏃犳硶璁块棶鎵ц涓婁笅鏂?;
                }
            } catch (Exception e) {
                success = false;
                errorMessage = "淇濆瓨鍥惧舰鏃跺嚭閿? " + e.getMessage();
            }
        }
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID, success);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_FILE_PATH_ID, savedPath);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_ERROR_ID, errorMessage);
    }
    
    /**
     * 娴忚閫夋嫨淇濆瓨浣嶇疆
     * 瀹為檯瀹炵幇涓鏂规硶搴旇鐢盪I灞傝皟鐢紝鎵撳紑鏂囦欢淇濆瓨瀵硅瘽妗?

    public void browseForSaveLocation() {
        // 瀹為檯瀹炵幇鍦║I灞?
    }

    public String getFilePath() {
        return filePath;
    }
    
    public void setFilePath(String filePath) {

        markDirty();
    }

        this.overwriteExisting = overwriteExisting;

    }

        return autoSave;
    }
    
    public void setAutoSave(boolean autoSave) {
        this.autoSave = autoSave;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    public String getLastSavedFile() {
        return lastSavedFile;
    }

     * 淇濆瓨鑺傜偣鐘舵€?

    @Override
    public @Nullable Object getNodeState() {

        state[0] = filePath;
        state[1] = overwriteExisting;
        state[2] = autoSave;
        state[3] = lastSavedFile;

                    autoSave = (Boolean) objState[2];
                }
                if (objState[3] instanceof String) {
                    lastSavedFile = (String) objState[3];
                }
            }
        }
