package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.utilities.fileio;

import com.google.gson.Gson;
import com.google.gson.GsonBuilder;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;

import java.nio.charset.Charset;
import java.nio.charset.StandardCharsets;
import java.nio.file.Files;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import java.nio.file.Paths;
import java.nio.file.StandardOpenOption;
import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Write Data File 鑺傜偣: 灏嗘暟鎹啓鍏ョ粨鏋勫寲鏂囦欢锛圝SON銆丆SV绛夛級
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "utilities.fileio.write_data_file",
    displayName = "鍐欏叆鏁版嵁鏂囦欢",
    description = "灏嗘暟鎹啓鍏ョ粨鏋勫寲鏂囦欢锛圝SON銆丆SV绛夛級",
    category = "utilities.fileio"
)
public class WriteDataFileNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 鑺傜偣灞炴€?---
    private String filePath = ""; // 鏂囦欢璺緞
    private String encoding = "UTF-8"; // 鏂囦欢缂栫爜
    private String fileType = "CSV"; // 鏂囦欢绫诲瀷 (CSV, JSON)
    private String csvDelimiter = ","; // CSV 鍒嗛殧绗?
    private boolean includeHeader = true; // 鏄惁鍖呭惈CSV琛ㄥご
    private boolean appendMode = false; // 鏄惁杩藉姞妯″紡
    private boolean prettyJson = true; // 鏄惁鏍煎紡鍖朖SON
    private boolean createDirectory = true; // 鏄惁鍒涘缓鐩綍
    private String description = "灏嗙粨鏋勫寲鏁版嵁鍐欏叆鏂囦欢锛圕SV銆丣SON 绛夛級";
    
    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_FILE_PATH_ID = "input_file_path";
    private static final String INPUT_DATA_ID = "input_data";
    private static final String INPUT_HEADERS_ID = "input_headers";
    private static final String INPUT_ENCODING_ID = "input_encoding";
    private static final String INPUT_FILE_TYPE_ID = "input_file_type";
    private static final String INPUT_CSV_DELIMITER_ID = "input_csv_delimiter";
    private static final String INPUT_APPEND_ID = "input_append";
    private static final String INPUT_TRIGGER_ID = "input_trigger";
    
    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID = "output_success";
    private static final String OUTPUT_BYTES_WRITTEN_ID = "output_bytes_written";
    private static final String OUTPUT_FILE_PATH_ID = "output_file_path";
    private static final String OUTPUT_ERROR_ID = "output_error";

    // --- 鏂囦欢绫诲瀷甯搁噺 ---
    private static final String FILE_TYPE_CSV = "CSV";
    private static final String FILE_TYPE_JSON = "JSON";
    
    /**
     * 鏋勯€犱竴涓柊鐨勫啓鍏ユ暟鎹枃浠惰妭鐐?
     */
    public WriteDataFileNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "utilities.fileio.write_data_file");
        
        // 鍒涘缓杈撳叆绔彛
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_FILE_PATH_ID, "File Path", 
                "瑕佸啓鍏ョ殑鏁版嵁鏂囦欢璺緞", NodeDataType.FILE_PATH, this));
        
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_DATA_ID, "Data", 
                "瑕佸啓鍏ョ殑缁撴瀯鍖栨暟鎹紙鍒楄〃鎴栧璞★級", NodeDataType.ANY, this));
        
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_HEADERS_ID, "Headers", 
                "CSV琛ㄥご鎴栬鍖呭惈鐨凧SON瀛楁锛堝彲閫夛級", NodeDataType.LIST, this));
        
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_ENCODING_ID, "Encoding", 
                "鏂囦欢缂栫爜锛堝UTF-8锛?, NodeDataType.STRING, this));
        
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_FILE_TYPE_ID, "File Type", 
                "鏂囦欢绫诲瀷锛圕SV, JSON锛?, NodeDataType.STRING, this));
        
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_CSV_DELIMITER_ID, "CSV Delimiter", 
                "CSV鍒嗛殧绗︼紙榛樿涓洪€楀彿锛?, NodeDataType.STRING, this));
        
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_APPEND_ID, "Append", 
                "鏄惁杩藉姞鍒扮幇鏈夋枃浠?, NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
        
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_TRIGGER_ID, "Trigger", 
                "瑙﹀彂鍐欏叆鎿嶄綔", NodeDataType.ANY, this));
        
        // 鍒涘缓杈撳嚭绔彛
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID, "Success", 
                "鏄惁鎴愬姛鍐欏叆鏂囦欢", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
        
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_BYTES_WRITTEN_ID, "Bytes Written", 
                "鍐欏叆鐨勫瓧鑺傛暟", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_FILE_PATH_ID, "File Path", 
                "鍐欏叆鐨勬枃浠惰矾寰?, NodeDataType.FILE_PATH, this));
        
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_ERROR_ID, "Error", 
                "鍐欏叆澶辫触鏃剁殑閿欒淇℃伅", NodeDataType.STRING, this));
    }
    
    /**
     * 鑺傜偣鐨勮绠楅€昏緫
     */
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鍒濆鍖栬緭鍑哄€?
        boolean success = false;
        long bytesWritten = 0;
        String savedPath = "";
        String errorMessage = "";
        
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object filePathObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_FILE_PATH_ID);
        Object dataObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_DATA_ID);
        Object headersObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_HEADERS_ID);
        Object encodingObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_ENCODING_ID);
        Object fileTypeObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_FILE_TYPE_ID);
        Object csvDelimiterObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_CSV_DELIMITER_ID);
        Object appendObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_APPEND_ID);
        Object triggerObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_TRIGGER_ID);
        
        // 纭畾鏂囦欢璺緞
        String filePathToWrite = this.filePath;
        if (filePathObj instanceof String && !((String) filePathObj).isEmpty()) {
            filePathToWrite = (String) filePathObj;
        }
        
        // 纭畾缂栫爜
        String encodingToUse = this.encoding;
        if (encodingObj instanceof String && !((String) encodingObj).isEmpty()) {
            encodingToUse = (String) encodingObj;
        }
        
        // 纭畾鏂囦欢绫诲瀷
        String fileTypeToUse = this.fileType;
        if (fileTypeObj instanceof String && !((String) fileTypeObj).isEmpty()) {
            fileTypeToUse = ((String) fileTypeObj).toUpperCase();
        }
        
        // 纭畾CSV鍒嗛殧绗?
        String delimiterToUse = this.csvDelimiter;
        if (csvDelimiterObj instanceof String && !((String) csvDelimiterObj).isEmpty()) {
            delimiterToUse = (String) csvDelimiterObj;
        }
        
        // 纭畾鏄惁杩藉姞妯″紡
        boolean shouldAppend = this.appendMode;
        if (appendObj instanceof Boolean) {
            shouldAppend = (Boolean) appendObj;
        }
        
        // 妫€鏌ユ槸鍚﹀簲璇ュ啓鍏ユ枃浠?
        boolean shouldWrite = triggerObj != null && dataObj != null;
        
        // 濡傛灉璺緞涓虹┖锛屾垨鑰呮湭瑙﹀彂鍐欏叆锛屽垯鐩存帴杩斿洖
        if (filePathToWrite.isEmpty() || !shouldWrite) {
            // 璁剧疆鏈垚鍔熺姸鎬佸拰閿欒娑堟伅
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID, false);
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_BYTES_WRITTEN_ID, 0);
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_FILE_PATH_ID, "");
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_ERROR_ID, "鏈啓鍏ワ細鏃犳枃浠惰矾寰勩€佹棤鏁版嵁鎴栨湭瑙﹀彂");
            return;
        }
        
        // 鎻愬彇琛ㄥご
        List<String> headers = new ArrayList<>();
        if (headersObj instanceof List) {
            List<?> headersList = (List<?>) headersObj;
            for (Object header : headersList) {
                headers.add(header != null ? header.toString() : "");
            }
        }
        
        try {
            Path path = Paths.get(filePathToWrite);
            Path parent = path.getParent();
            
            // 濡傛灉闇€瑕侊紝鍒涘缓鐖剁洰褰?
            if (parent != null && !Files.exists(parent) && createDirectory) {
                Files.createDirectories(parent);
            }
            
            // 纭畾瀛楃闆?
            Charset charset;
            try {
                charset = Charset.forName(encodingToUse);
            } catch (Exception e) {
                // 濡傛灉鎸囧畾鐨勭紪鐮佹棤鏁堬紝浣跨敤UTF-8
                charset = StandardCharsets.UTF_8;
            }
            
            // 鏍规嵁鏂囦欢绫诲瀷澶勭悊鏁版嵁
            String contentToWrite = "";
            
            if (FILE_TYPE_CSV.equalsIgnoreCase(fileTypeToUse)) {
                // 杞崲涓篊SV鏍煎紡
                contentToWrite = convertToCSV(dataObj, headers, delimiterToUse, includeHeader);
            } else if (FILE_TYPE_JSON.equalsIgnoreCase(fileTypeToUse)) {
                // 杞崲涓篔SON鏍煎紡
                contentToWrite = convertToJSON(dataObj, prettyJson);
            } else {
                errorMessage = "涓嶆敮鎸佺殑鏂囦欢绫诲瀷: " + fileTypeToUse;
                outputValues.put(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID, false);
                outputValues.put(OUTPUT_BYTES_WRITTEN_ID, 0);
                outputValues.put(OUTPUT_FILE_PATH_ID, "");
                outputValues.put(OUTPUT_ERROR_ID, errorMessage);
                return;
            }
            
            // 鍐欏叆鏂囦欢
            if (shouldAppend && Files.exists(path)) {
                // 杩藉姞妯″紡
                bytesWritten = Files.write(path, contentToWrite.getBytes(charset), 
                        StandardOpenOption.APPEND, StandardOpenOption.CREATE).toFile().length();
            } else {
                // 瑕嗙洊妯″紡
                bytesWritten = Files.write(path, contentToWrite.getBytes(charset)).toFile().length();
            }
            
            success = true;
            savedPath = filePathToWrite;
        } catch (Exception e) {
            success = false;
            errorMessage = "鍐欏叆鏂囦欢鏃跺嚭閿? " + e.getMessage();
        }
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID, success);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_BYTES_WRITTEN_ID, (int)bytesWritten);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_FILE_PATH_ID, savedPath);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_ERROR_ID, errorMessage);
    }
    
    /**
     * 灏嗘暟鎹浆鎹负CSV鏍煎紡
     */
    private String convertToCSV(Object data, List<String> headers, String delimiter, boolean includeHeader) {
        StringBuilder sb = new StringBuilder();
        
        // 濡傛灉鏁版嵁鏄垪琛?
        if (data instanceof List) {
            List<?> dataList = (List<?>) data;
            
            // 娣诲姞琛ㄥご
            if (includeHeader && !headers.isEmpty()) {
                for (int i = 0; i < headers.size(); i++) {
                    if (i > 0) {
                        sb.append(delimiter);
                    }
                    sb.append(escapeCSV(headers.get(i), delimiter));
                }
                sb.append("\n");
            }
            
            // 娣诲姞鏁版嵁琛?
            for (Object row : dataList) {
                if (row instanceof Map) {
                    // 濡傛灉琛屾槸Map锛屼娇鐢ㄨ〃澶磋幏鍙栧€?
                    Map<?, ?> rowMap = (Map<?, ?>) row;
                    if (!headers.isEmpty()) {
                        // 浣跨敤鎸囧畾鐨勮〃澶撮『搴?
                        for (int i = 0; i < headers.size(); i++) {
                            if (i > 0) {
                                sb.append(delimiter);
                            }
                            Object value = rowMap.get(headers.get(i));
                            sb.append(escapeCSV(value != null ? value.toString() : "", delimiter));
                        }
                    } else {
                        // 濡傛灉娌℃湁琛ㄥご锛屼娇鐢╩ap鐨勫€?
                        boolean first = true;
                        for (Object value : rowMap.values()) {
                            if (!first) {
                                sb.append(delimiter);
                            }
                            sb.append(escapeCSV(value != null ? value.toString() : "", delimiter));
                            first = false;
                        }
                    }
                } else if (row instanceof List) {
                    // 濡傛灉琛屾槸List锛岀洿鎺ヤ娇鐢ㄥ垪琛ㄥ€?
                    List<?> rowList = (List<?>) row;
                    for (int i = 0; i < rowList.size(); i++) {
                        if (i > 0) {
                            sb.append(delimiter);
                        }
                        Object value = rowList.get(i);
                        sb.append(escapeCSV(value != null ? value.toString() : "", delimiter));
                    }
                } else if (row instanceof Object[]) {
                    // 濡傛灉琛屾槸鏁扮粍锛岀洿鎺ヤ娇鐢ㄦ暟缁勫€?
                    Object[] rowArray = (Object[]) row;
                    for (int i = 0; i < rowArray.length; i++) {
                        if (i > 0) {
                            sb.append(delimiter);
                        }
                        Object value = rowArray[i];
                        sb.append(escapeCSV(value != null ? value.toString() : "", delimiter));
                    }
                } else {
                    // 绠€鍗曞€硷紝浣滀负鍗曞垪
                    sb.append(escapeCSV(row != null ? row.toString() : "", delimiter));
                }
                sb.append("\n");
            }
        } else if (data instanceof Map) {
            // 鍗曚釜瀵硅薄Map
            Map<?, ?> dataMap = (Map<?, ?>) data;
            
            // 娣诲姞琛ㄥご锛堥敭锛?
            if (includeHeader) {
                boolean first = true;
                
                // 浣跨敤鎸囧畾鐨勮〃澶撮『搴忥紙濡傛灉鏈夛級
                if (!headers.isEmpty()) {
                    for (String header : headers) {
                        if (!first) {
                            sb.append(delimiter);
                        }
                        sb.append(escapeCSV(header, delimiter));
                        first = false;
                    }
                } else {
                    // 鍚﹀垯浣跨敤Map鐨勯敭
                    for (Object key : dataMap.keySet()) {
                        if (!first) {
                            sb.append(delimiter);
                        }
                        sb.append(escapeCSV(key != null ? key.toString() : "", delimiter));
                        first = false;
                    }
                }
                sb.append("\n");
            }
            
            // 娣诲姞鏁版嵁琛?
            boolean first = true;
            if (!headers.isEmpty()) {
                // 浣跨敤鎸囧畾鐨勮〃澶撮『搴?
                for (String header : headers) {
                    if (!first) {
                        sb.append(delimiter);
                    }
                    Object value = dataMap.get(header);
                    sb.append(escapeCSV(value != null ? value.toString() : "", delimiter));
                    first = false;
                }
            } else {
                // 鍚﹀垯浣跨敤Map鐨勫€?
                for (Object value : dataMap.values()) {
                    if (!first) {
                        sb.append(delimiter);
                    }
                    sb.append(escapeCSV(value != null ? value.toString() : "", delimiter));
                    first = false;
                }
            }
            sb.append("\n");
        } else {
            // 鍗曚釜绠€鍗曞€?
            sb.append(escapeCSV(data != null ? data.toString() : "", delimiter));
        }
        
        return sb.toString();
    }
    
    /**
     * 杞箟CSV瀛楁
     */
    private String escapeCSV(String value, String delimiter) {
        boolean needsQuotes = value.contains(delimiter) || value.contains("\"") || value.contains("\n");
        
        if (needsQuotes) {
            // 鏇挎崲鍙屽紩鍙蜂负涓や釜鍙屽紩鍙凤紙CSV杞箟瑙勫垯锛?
            value = value.replace("\"", "\"\"");
            // 鐢ㄥ弻寮曞彿鍖呭洿鏁翠釜瀛楁
            return "\"" + value + "\"";
        }
        
        return value;
    }
    
    /**
     * 灏嗘暟鎹浆鎹负JSON鏍煎紡
     */
    private String convertToJSON(Object data, boolean pretty) {
        Gson gson;
        if (pretty) {
            gson = new GsonBuilder().setPrettyPrinting().create();
        } else {
            gson = new Gson();
        }
        
        return gson.toJson(data);
    }
    
    /**
     * 娴忚閫夋嫨淇濆瓨浣嶇疆
     * 瀹為檯瀹炵幇涓鏂规硶搴旇鐢盪I灞傝皟鐢紝鎵撳紑鏂囦欢淇濆瓨瀵硅瘽妗?
     */
    public boolean browseForSaveLocation() {
        // 瀹為檯瀹炵幇鍦║I灞?
        return false;
    }
    
    // --- Getters/Setters for Properties ---
    
    public String getFilePath() {
        return filePath;
    }
    
    public void setFilePath(String filePath) {
        this.filePath = filePath;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    public String getEncoding() {
        return encoding;
    }
    
    public void setEncoding(String encoding) {
        this.encoding = encoding;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    public String getFileType() {
        return fileType;
    }
    
    public void setFileType(String fileType) {
        this.fileType = fileType;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    public String getCsvDelimiter() {
        return csvDelimiter;
    }
    
    public void setCsvDelimiter(String csvDelimiter) {
        this.csvDelimiter = csvDelimiter;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    public boolean isIncludeHeader() {
        return includeHeader;
    }
    
    public void setIncludeHeader(boolean includeHeader) {
        this.includeHeader = includeHeader;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    public boolean isAppendMode() {
        return appendMode;
    }
    
    public void setAppendMode(boolean appendMode) {
        this.appendMode = appendMode;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    public boolean isPrettyJson() {
        return prettyJson;
    }
    
    public void setPrettyJson(boolean prettyJson) {
        this.prettyJson = prettyJson;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    public boolean isCreateDirectory() {
        return createDirectory;
    }
    
    public void setCreateDirectory(boolean createDirectory) {
        this.createDirectory = createDirectory;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    /**
     * 淇濆瓨鑺傜偣鐘舵€?
     */
    @Override
    public @Nullable Object getNodeState() {
        Object[] state = new Object[8];
        state[0] = filePath;
        state[1] = encoding;
        state[2] = fileType;
        state[3] = csvDelimiter;
        state[4] = includeHeader;
        state[5] = appendMode;
        state[6] = prettyJson;
        state[7] = createDirectory;
        return state;
    }
    
    /**
     * 鎭㈠鑺傜偣鐘舵€?
     */
    @Override
    public void setNodeState(@Nullable Object state) {
        if (state instanceof Object[]) {
            Object[] objState = (Object[]) state;
            if (objState.length >= 8) {
                if (objState[0] instanceof String) {
                    filePath = (String) objState[0];
                }
                if (objState[1] instanceof String) {
                    encoding = (String) objState[1];
                }
                if (objState[2] instanceof String) {
                    fileType = (String) objState[2];
                }
                if (objState[3] instanceof String) {
                    csvDelimiter = (String) objState[3];
                }
                if (objState[4] instanceof Boolean) {
                    includeHeader = (Boolean) objState[4];
                }
                if (objState[5] instanceof Boolean) {
                    appendMode = (Boolean) objState[5];
                }
                if (objState[6] instanceof Boolean) {
                    prettyJson = (Boolean) objState[6];
                }
                if (objState[7] instanceof Boolean) {
                    createDirectory = (Boolean) objState[7];
                }
            }
        }
    }

    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return this.description;
    }

package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.utilities.fileio;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;

import java.io.File;
import java.nio.charset.Charset;
import java.nio.charset.StandardCharsets;
import java.nio.file.Files;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import java.nio.file.Paths;
import java.nio.file.StandardOpenOption;
import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Write Text File 鑺傜偣: 灏嗗瓧绗︿覆鍐欏叆鏂囨湰鏂囦欢
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "utilities.fileio.write_text_file",
    displayName = "鍐欏叆鏂囨湰鏂囦欢",
    description = "灏嗗瓧绗︿覆鍐欏叆鏂囨湰鏂囦欢",
    category = "utilities.fileio"
)
public class WriteTextFileNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 鑺傜偣灞炴€?---
    private String filePath = ""; // 鏂囦欢璺緞
    private String encoding = "UTF-8"; // 鏂囦欢缂栫爜
    private boolean appendMode = false; // 鏄惁杩藉姞妯″紡
    private boolean createDirectory = true; // 鏄惁鍒涘缓鐩綍
    private String description = "灏嗗瓧绗︿覆鍐欏叆鏂囨湰鏂囦欢";
    
    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_FILE_PATH_ID = "input_file_path";
    private static final String INPUT_TEXT_ID = "input_text";
    private static final String INPUT_LINES_ID = "input_lines";
    private static final String INPUT_ENCODING_ID = "input_encoding";
    private static final String INPUT_APPEND_ID = "input_append";
    private static final String INPUT_TRIGGER_ID = "input_trigger";
    
    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID = "output_success";
    private static final String OUTPUT_BYTES_WRITTEN_ID = "output_bytes_written";
    private static final String OUTPUT_FILE_PATH_ID = "output_file_path";
    private static final String OUTPUT_ERROR_ID = "output_error";

    /**
     * 鏋勯€犱竴涓柊鐨勫啓鍏ユ枃鏈枃浠惰妭鐐?
     */
    public WriteTextFileNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "utilities.fileio.write_text_file");
        
        // 鍒涘缓杈撳叆绔彛
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_FILE_PATH_ID, "File Path", 
                "瑕佸啓鍏ョ殑鏂囨湰鏂囦欢璺緞", NodeDataType.FILE_PATH, this));
        
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_TEXT_ID, "Text", 
                "瑕佸啓鍏ョ殑鏂囨湰鍐呭", NodeDataType.STRING, this));
        
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_LINES_ID, "Lines", 
                "瑕佸啓鍏ョ殑鏂囨湰琛屽垪琛紙浼樺厛浜嶵ext锛?, NodeDataType.LIST, this));
        
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_ENCODING_ID, "Encoding", 
                "鏂囦欢缂栫爜锛堝UTF-8锛?, NodeDataType.STRING, this));
        
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_APPEND_ID, "Append", 
                "鏄惁杩藉姞鍒扮幇鏈夋枃浠?, NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
        
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_TRIGGER_ID, "Trigger", 
                "瑙﹀彂鍐欏叆鎿嶄綔", NodeDataType.ANY, this));
        
        // 鍒涘缓杈撳嚭绔彛
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID, "Success", 
                "鏄惁鎴愬姛鍐欏叆鏂囦欢", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
        
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_BYTES_WRITTEN_ID, "Bytes Written", 
                "鍐欏叆鐨勫瓧鑺傛暟", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_FILE_PATH_ID, "File Path", 
                "鍐欏叆鐨勬枃浠惰矾寰?, NodeDataType.FILE_PATH, this));
        
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_ERROR_ID, "Error", 
                "鍐欏叆澶辫触鏃剁殑閿欒淇℃伅", NodeDataType.STRING, this));
    }
    
    /**
     * 鑺傜偣鐨勮绠楅€昏緫
     */
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鍒濆鍖栬緭鍑哄€?
        boolean success = false;
        long bytesWritten = 0;
        String savedPath = "";
        String errorMessage = "";
        
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object filePathObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_FILE_PATH_ID);
        Object textObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_TEXT_ID);
        Object linesObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_LINES_ID);
        Object encodingObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_ENCODING_ID);
        Object appendObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_APPEND_ID);
        Object triggerObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_TRIGGER_ID);
        
        // 纭畾鏂囦欢璺緞
        String filePathToWrite = this.filePath;
        if (filePathObj instanceof String && !((String) filePathObj).isEmpty()) {
            filePathToWrite = (String) filePathObj;
        }
        
        // 纭畾缂栫爜
        String encodingToUse = this.encoding;
        if (encodingObj instanceof String && !((String) encodingObj).isEmpty()) {
            encodingToUse = (String) encodingObj;
        }
        
        // 纭畾鏄惁杩藉姞妯″紡
        boolean shouldAppend = this.appendMode;
        if (appendObj instanceof Boolean) {
            shouldAppend = (Boolean) appendObj;
        }
        
        // 纭畾瑕佸啓鍏ョ殑鏂囨湰
        String textToWrite = "";
        if (linesObj instanceof List) {
            // 浣跨敤鍒楄〃浼樺厛浜庡崟涓枃鏈?
            List<?> linesList = (List<?>) linesObj;
            StringBuilder sb = new StringBuilder();
            for (Object lineObj : linesList) {
                if (sb.length() > 0) {
                    sb.append("\n");
                }
                sb.append(lineObj != null ? lineObj.toString() : "");
            }
            textToWrite = sb.toString();
        } else if (textObj instanceof String) {
            textToWrite = (String) textObj;
        }
        
        // 妫€鏌ユ槸鍚﹀簲璇ュ啓鍏ユ枃浠?
        boolean shouldWrite = triggerObj != null;
        
        // 濡傛灉璺緞涓虹┖锛屾垨鑰呮湭瑙﹀彂鍐欏叆锛屽垯鐩存帴杩斿洖
        if (filePathToWrite.isEmpty() || !shouldWrite) {
            // 璁剧疆鏈垚鍔熺姸鎬佸拰閿欒娑堟伅
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID, false);
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_BYTES_WRITTEN_ID, 0);
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_FILE_PATH_ID, "");
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_ERROR_ID, "鏈啓鍏ワ細鏃犳枃浠惰矾寰勬垨鏈Е鍙?);
            return;
        }
        
        // 鍐欏叆鏂囦欢
        try {
            Path path = Paths.get(filePathToWrite);
            Path parent = path.getParent();
            
            // 濡傛灉闇€瑕侊紝鍒涘缓鐖剁洰褰?
            if (parent != null && !Files.exists(parent) && createDirectory) {
                Files.createDirectories(parent);
            }
            
            // 纭畾瀛楃闆?
            Charset charset;
            try {
                charset = Charset.forName(encodingToUse);
            } catch (Exception e) {
                // 濡傛灉鎸囧畾鐨勭紪鐮佹棤鏁堬紝浣跨敤UTF-8
                charset = StandardCharsets.UTF_8;
            }
            
            // 鍐欏叆鏂囦欢
            if (shouldAppend && Files.exists(path)) {
                // 杩藉姞妯″紡
                bytesWritten = Files.write(path, textToWrite.getBytes(charset), 
                        StandardOpenOption.APPEND, StandardOpenOption.CREATE).toFile().length();
            } else {
                // 瑕嗙洊妯″紡
                bytesWritten = Files.write(path, textToWrite.getBytes(charset)).toFile().length();
            }
            
            success = true;
            savedPath = filePathToWrite;
        } catch (Exception e) {
            success = false;
            errorMessage = "鍐欏叆鏂囦欢鏃跺嚭閿? " + e.getMessage();
        }
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID, success);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_BYTES_WRITTEN_ID, bytesWritten);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_FILE_PATH_ID, savedPath);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_ERROR_ID, errorMessage);
    }
    
    /**
     * 娴忚閫夋嫨淇濆瓨浣嶇疆
     * 瀹為檯瀹炵幇涓鏂规硶搴旇鐢盪I灞傝皟鐢紝鎵撳紑鏂囦欢淇濆瓨瀵硅瘽妗?
     */
    public boolean browseForSaveLocation() {
        // 瀹為檯瀹炵幇鍦║I灞?
        return false;
    }
    
    // --- Getters/Setters for Properties ---
    
    public String getFilePath() {
        return filePath;
    }
    
    public void setFilePath(String filePath) {
        this.filePath = filePath;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    public String getEncoding() {
        return encoding;
    }
    
    public void setEncoding(String encoding) {
        this.encoding = encoding;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    public boolean isAppendMode() {
        return appendMode;
    }
    
    public void setAppendMode(boolean appendMode) {
        this.appendMode = appendMode;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    public boolean isCreateDirectory() {
        return createDirectory;
    }
    
    public void setCreateDirectory(boolean createDirectory) {
        this.createDirectory = createDirectory;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    /**
     * 淇濆瓨鑺傜偣鐘舵€?
     */
    @Override
    public @Nullable Object getNodeState() {
        Object[] state = new Object[4];
        state[0] = filePath;
        state[1] = encoding;
        state[2] = appendMode;
        state[3] = createDirectory;
        return state;
    }
    
    /**
     * 鎭㈠鑺傜偣鐘舵€?
     */
    @Override
    public void setNodeState(@Nullable Object state) {
        if (state instanceof Object[]) {
            Object[] objState = (Object[]) state;
            if (objState.length >= 4) {
                if (objState[0] instanceof String) {
                    filePath = (String) objState[0];
                }
                if (objState[1] instanceof String) {
                    encoding = (String) objState[1];
                }
                if (objState[2] instanceof Boolean) {
                    appendMode = (Boolean) objState[2];
                }
                if (objState[3] instanceof Boolean) {
                    createDirectory = (Boolean) objState[3];
                }
            }
        }
    }

    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return this.description;
    }
}

package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.utilities.organization;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;

import java.util.List;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Align Nodes 鑺傜偣: 瀵归綈閫変腑鐨勮妭鐐?
 * 杩欐槸涓€涓壒娈婄殑鑺傜偣锛屼富瑕佷綔鐢ㄤ簬缂栬緫鍣║I灞傞潰锛屽閫変腑鑺傜偣鐨勪綅缃繘琛岃皟鏁?
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "utilities.organization.align_nodes",
    displayName = "鑺傜偣瀵归綈",
    description = "瀵归綈閫変腑鐨勮妭鐐?,
    category = "utilities.organization"
)
public class AlignNodesNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 鑺傜偣灞炴€?---
    private AlignmentType alignmentType = AlignmentType.HORIZONTAL_CENTER; // 瀵归綈绫诲瀷
    private boolean distributeEvenly = false; // 鏄惁鍧囧寑鍒嗗竷
    private double spacing = 10.0; // 鑺傜偣闂磋窛锛堝潎鍖€鍒嗗竷鏃朵娇鐢級
    private String description = "瀵归綈閫変腑鐨勮妭鐐?;
    
    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_NODES_ID = "input_nodes";
    private static final String INPUT_ALIGNMENT_TYPE_ID = "input_alignment_type";
    private static final String INPUT_DISTRIBUTE_ID = "input_distribute";
    private static final String INPUT_SPACING_ID = "input_spacing";
    private static final String INPUT_TRIGGER_ID = "input_trigger";
    
    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID = "output_success";
    private static final String OUTPUT_NODES_ID = "output_nodes";
    
    /**
     * 瀵归綈绫诲瀷鏋氫妇
     */
    public enum AlignmentType {
        HORIZONTAL_LEFT("宸﹀榻?, "姘村钩宸﹀榻?),
        HORIZONTAL_CENTER("姘村钩灞呬腑", "姘村钩涓績瀵归綈"),
        HORIZONTAL_RIGHT("鍙冲榻?, "姘村钩鍙冲榻?),
        VERTICAL_TOP("椤堕儴瀵归綈", "鍨傜洿椤堕儴瀵归綈"),
        VERTICAL_CENTER("鍨傜洿灞呬腑", "鍨傜洿涓績瀵归綈"),
        VERTICAL_BOTTOM("搴曢儴瀵归綈", "鍨傜洿搴曢儴瀵归綈"),
        GRID("缃戞牸瀵归綈", "鎸夌綉鏍煎榻?),
        COMPACT("绱у噾鎺掑垪", "绱у噾鎺掑垪鑺傜偣");
        
        private final String displayName;
        private final String description;
        
        AlignmentType(String displayName, String description) {
            this.displayName = displayName;
            this.description = description;
        }
        
        public String getDisplayName() {
            return displayName;
        }
        
        public String getDescription() {
            return description;
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * 鏋勯€犱竴涓柊鐨勫榻愯妭鐐硅妭鐐?
     */
    public AlignNodesNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "utilities.organization.align_nodes");
        
        // 鍒涘缓杈撳叆绔彛
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_NODES_ID, "Nodes", 
                "瑕佸榻愮殑鑺傜偣鍒楄〃", NodeDataType.LIST, this));
        
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_ALIGNMENT_TYPE_ID, "Alignment Type", 
                "瀵归綈绫诲瀷", NodeDataType.STRING, this));
        
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_DISTRIBUTE_ID, "Distribute Evenly", 
                "鏄惁鍧囧寑鍒嗗竷", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
        
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_SPACING_ID, "Spacing", 
                "鑺傜偣闂磋窛", NodeDataType.DOUBLE, this));
        
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_TRIGGER_ID, "Trigger", 
                "瑙﹀彂瀵归綈鎿嶄綔", NodeDataType.ANY, this));
        
        // 鍒涘缓杈撳嚭绔彛
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID, "Success", 
                "鏄惁鎴愬姛鎵ц瀵归綈鎿嶄綔", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
        
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_NODES_ID, "Aligned Nodes", 
                "宸插榻愮殑鑺傜偣鍒楄〃", NodeDataType.LIST, this));
    }
    
    /**
     * 鑺傜偣鐨勮绠楅€昏緫
     * 瀵逛簬AlignNodes鑺傜偣锛屾牳蹇冮€昏緫娑夊強瀵硅妭鐐逛綅缃殑璋冩暣
     */
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        boolean success = false;
        
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object nodesObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_NODES_ID);
        Object alignmentTypeObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_ALIGNMENT_TYPE_ID);
        Object distributeObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_DISTRIBUTE_ID);
        Object spacingObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_SPACING_ID);
        Object triggerObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_TRIGGER_ID); // 浠呬綔涓鸿Е鍙戝櫒
        
        // 鍙湁鍦ㄦ湁瑙﹀彂淇″彿涓旀湁鏁堣妭鐐瑰垪琛ㄧ殑鎯呭喌涓嬫墠鎵ц瀵归綈
        if (triggerObj != null && nodesObj instanceof List && !((List<?>) nodesObj).isEmpty()) {
            List<?> nodeList = (List<?>) nodesObj;
            
            // 纭畾瀵归綈绫诲瀷
            AlignmentType alignmentType = this.alignmentType;
            if (alignmentTypeObj instanceof String) {
                try {
                    alignmentType = AlignmentType.valueOf((String) alignmentTypeObj);
                } catch (IllegalArgumentException ignored) {
                    // 浣跨敤榛樿鍊?
                }
            }
            
            // 纭畾鏄惁鍧囧寑鍒嗗竷
            boolean distributeEvenly = this.distributeEvenly;
            if (distributeObj instanceof Boolean) {
                distributeEvenly = (Boolean) distributeObj;
            }
            
            // 纭畾鑺傜偣闂磋窛
            double spacing = this.spacing;
            if (spacingObj instanceof Number) {
                spacing = ((Number) spacingObj).doubleValue();
            }
            
            // 鎵ц鑺傜偣瀵归綈
            // 娉ㄦ剰锛氬疄闄呯殑瀵归綈鎿嶄綔搴旇鐢盓ditor瀹炵幇锛屽洜涓烘秹鍙婅妭鐐逛綅缃殑鍙樻洿
            // 杩欓噷鍙槸妯℃嫙瀵归綈鎿嶄綔鐨勯€昏緫娴佺▼
            success = performAlignment(nodeList, alignmentType, distributeEvenly, spacing, context);
        }
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID, success);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_NODES_ID, nodesObj); // 灏嗚緭鍏ヨ妭鐐瑰垪琛ㄧ洿鎺ヤ紶閫掑埌杈撳嚭
    }
    
    /**
     * 鎵ц瀵归綈鎿嶄綔
     * 娉ㄦ剰锛氭鏂规硶鍦ㄥ疄闄呭疄鐜颁腑闇€瑕佷笌缂栬緫鍣ㄧ揣瀵嗛泦鎴?
     */
    private boolean performAlignment(List<?> nodeList, AlignmentType alignmentType, 
                                    boolean distributeEvenly, double spacing, 
                                    @Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 姝ゅ鐨勫疄鐜版槸涓€涓ず渚嬶紝瀹為檯鐨勫榻愰€昏緫闇€瑕佷緷璧栫紪杈戝櫒鐜
        // 渚嬪锛岃幏鍙栬妭鐐圭殑瀹為檯浣嶇疆鍜屽昂瀵镐俊鎭紝浠ュ強鏇存柊瀹冧滑鐨勪綅缃?
        
        if (context == null) {
            return false;
        }
        
        // 鎻愬彇鏈夋晥鐨勮妭鐐笽D
        List<UUID> validNodeIds = nodeList.stream()
                .filter(obj -> obj instanceof UUID)
                .map(obj -> (UUID) obj)
                .toList();
        
        if (validNodeIds.isEmpty()) {
            return false;
        }
        
        // 鍦ㄨ繖閲岃皟鐢ㄧ紪杈戝櫒鐨勫榻愬姛鑳?
        // context.getEditor().alignNodes(validNodeIds, alignmentType, distributeEvenly, spacing);
        
        // 鐢变簬姝ゅ鏃犳硶璁块棶瀹為檯鐨勭紪杈戝櫒锛屾墍浠ュ彧杩斿洖涓€涓垚鍔熸爣蹇?
        return true;
    }
    
    // --- Getters/Setters for Properties ---
    
    public AlignmentType getAlignmentType() {
        return alignmentType;
    }
    
    public void setAlignmentType(AlignmentType alignmentType) {
        this.alignmentType = alignmentType;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    public boolean isDistributeEvenly() {
        return distributeEvenly;
    }
    
    public void setDistributeEvenly(boolean distributeEvenly) {
        this.distributeEvenly = distributeEvenly;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    public double getSpacing() {
        return spacing;
    }
    
    public void setSpacing(double spacing) {
        this.spacing = Math.max(0, spacing);
        markDirty();
    }
    
    /**
     * 淇濆瓨鑺傜偣鐘舵€?
     */
    @Override
    public @Nullable Object getNodeState() {
        Object[] state = new Object[3];
        state[0] = alignmentType.name();
        state[1] = distributeEvenly;
        state[2] = spacing;
        return state;
    }
    
    /**
     * 鎭㈠鑺傜偣鐘舵€?
     */
    @Override
    public void setNodeState(@Nullable Object state) {
        if (state instanceof Object[]) {
            Object[] objState = (Object[]) state;
            if (objState.length >= 3) {
                if (objState[0] instanceof String) {
                    try {
                        alignmentType = AlignmentType.valueOf((String) objState[0]);
                    } catch (IllegalArgumentException e) {
                        alignmentType = AlignmentType.HORIZONTAL_CENTER; // 榛樿鍊?
                    }
                }
                if (objState[1] instanceof Boolean) {
                    distributeEvenly = (Boolean) objState[1];
                }
                if (objState[2] instanceof Number) {
                    spacing = ((Number) objState[2]).doubleValue();
                }
            }
        }
    }

    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return this.description;
    }
}

package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.utilities.organization;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Comment 鑺傜偣: 鍦ㄧ敾甯冧笂娣诲姞鏂囨湰娉ㄩ噴
 * 姝よ妭鐐逛笉澶勭悊浠讳綍鏁版嵁锛屼粎鎻愪緵UI绾у埆鐨勬敞閲婂姛鑳?
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "utilities.organization.comment",
    displayName = "娉ㄩ噴鑺傜偣",
    description = "鍦ㄧ敾甯冧笂娣诲姞鏂囨湰娉ㄩ噴",
    category = "utilities.organization"
)
public class CommentNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 鑺傜偣灞炴€?---
    private String commentText = "鍦ㄦ澶勬坊鍔犳敞閲?; // 娉ㄩ噴鏂囨湰
    private String textColor = "#000000"; // 鏂囨湰棰滆壊
    private String backgroundColor = "#FFEB3B"; // 鑳屾櫙棰滆壊
    private float fontSize = 14.0f; // 瀛椾綋澶у皬
    private boolean isBold = false; // 鏄惁鍔犵矖
    private boolean isItalic = false; // 鏄惁鍊炬枩
    private CommentStyle style = CommentStyle.STICKY_NOTE; // 娉ㄩ噴鏍峰紡
    private String description = "鍦ㄧ敾甯冧笂娣诲姞鏂囨湰娉ㄩ噴";
    
    // --- 灏哄灞炴€?---
    private double width = 200.0;
    private double height = 120.0;
    
    /**
     * 娉ㄩ噴鏍峰紡鏋氫妇
     */
    public enum CommentStyle {
        STICKY_NOTE("渚跨", "绫讳技渚垮埄璐寸殑鏍峰紡"),
        BOX("鏂规", "甯﹁竟妗嗙殑鏂规"),

        state[7] = width;
        state[8] = height;
        return state;

    @Override
    public void setNodeState(@Nullable Object state) {
        if (state instanceof Object[]) {
            Object[] objState = (Object[]) state;
            if (objState.length >= 9) {
                if (objState[0] instanceof String) {
                    commentText = (String) objState[0];
                }
                if (objState[1] instanceof String) {
                    textColor = (String) objState[1];
                }
                if (objState[2] instanceof String) {
                    backgroundColor = (String) objState[2];
                }
                if (objState[3] instanceof Number) {
                    fontSize = ((Number) objState[3]).floatValue();
                }
                if (objState[4] instanceof Boolean) {
                    isBold = (Boolean) objState[4];
                }
                if (objState[5] instanceof Boolean) {
                    isItalic = (Boolean) objState[5];
                }
                if (objState[6] instanceof String) {
                    try {
                        style = CommentStyle.valueOf((String) objState[6]);
                    } catch (IllegalArgumentException e) {
                        style = CommentStyle.STICKY_NOTE; // 榛樿鏍峰紡
                    }
                }
                if (objState[7] instanceof Number) {
                    width = ((Number) objState[7]).doubleValue();
                }
                if (objState[8] instanceof Number) {
                    height = ((Number) objState[8]).doubleValue();
                }
            }
        }
    }

    private double height = 200.0;

     */

        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "utilities.organization.group");
        
        // 鍙€夌殑杈撳叆杈撳嚭绔彛锛堥粯璁や笉娣诲姞锛屽彲閫氳繃UI娣诲姞锛?
        // 杩欎簺绔彛涓昏鐢ㄤ簬鍦ㄧ粍鎶樺彔鏃朵繚鎸佽繛鎺ュ叧绯?
    }
    
    /**
     * 閫氳繃ID鏌ユ壘杈撳叆绔彛
     * @param portId 绔彛ID
     * @return 鎵惧埌鐨勭鍙ｏ紝濡傛灉鏈壘鍒板垯杩斿洖null
     */
    protected IPort getInputPort(String portId) {
        for (IPort port : inputPorts) {
            if (port.getId().equals(portId)) {
                return port;
            }
        }
        return null;
    }
    
    /**
     * 閫氳繃ID鏌ユ壘杈撳嚭绔彛
     * @param portId 绔彛ID
     * @return 鎵惧埌鐨勭鍙ｏ紝濡傛灉鏈壘鍒板垯杩斿洖null
     */
    protected IPort getOutputPort(String portId) {
        for (IPort port : outputPorts) {
            if (port.getId().equals(portId)) {
                return port;
            }
        }
        return null;
    }
    
    /**
     * 绉婚櫎鎸囧畾ID鐨勮緭鍏ョ鍙?
     * @param portId 瑕佺Щ闄ょ殑绔彛ID
     */
    protected void removeInputPort(String portId) {
        inputPorts.removeIf(port -> port.getId().equals(portId));
    }
    
    /**
     * 绉婚櫎鎸囧畾ID鐨勮緭鍑虹鍙?
     * @param portId 瑕佺Щ闄ょ殑绔彛ID
     */
    protected void removeOutputPort(String portId) {
        outputPorts.removeIf(port -> port.getId().equals(portId));
    }
    
    /**
     * 娣诲姞杈撳叆绔彛
     */
    public void addInputSignalPort() {
        if (getInputPort(INPUT_SIGNAL_ID) == null) {
            addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_SIGNAL_ID, "Input", 
                    "缁勮緭鍏ヤ俊鍙?, NodeDataType.ANY, this));
            markDirty();
        }
    }

     * 娣诲姞杈撳嚭绔彛

        if (getOutputPort(OUTPUT_SIGNAL_ID) == null) {
            addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_SIGNAL_ID, "Output", 
                    "缁勮緭鍑轰俊鍙?, NodeDataType.ANY, this));
            markDirty();
        }
    }

    public void removeOutputSignalPort() {
        removeOutputPort(OUTPUT_SIGNAL_ID);
        markDirty();

    /**

     */
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 濡傛灉鏈夎緭鍏ュ拰杈撳嚭绔彛锛屽垯鐩存帴浼犻€掑€?
        if (getInputPort(INPUT_SIGNAL_ID) != null && getOutputPort(OUTPUT_SIGNAL_ID) != null) {
            Object inputSignal = inputValues.get(INPUT_SIGNAL_ID);
            outputValues.put(OUTPUT_SIGNAL_ID, inputSignal);
        }
        
        // Group鑺傜偣涓昏浣滅敤浜嶶I灞傞潰锛屼笉鎵ц瀹為檯鐨勬暟鎹鐞?

    /**

     * @param nodeId 瑕佹坊鍔犵殑鑺傜偣ID
     */
    public void addNode(UUID nodeId) {
        if (!containedNodeIds.contains(nodeId)) {
            containedNodeIds.add(nodeId);
            markDirty();
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * 浠庣粍涓Щ闄や竴涓妭鐐?
     * @param nodeId 瑕佺Щ闄ょ殑鑺傜偣ID
     */
    public void removeNode(UUID nodeId) {
        if (containedNodeIds.remove(nodeId)) {
            markDirty();
        }
    }

     * 鑾峰彇缁勪腑鍖呭惈鐨勬墍鏈夎妭鐐笽D

        // 瀹炵幇闇€瑕佺紪杈戝櫒鏀寔
        // 缂栬緫鍣ㄤ細璁＄畻鎵€鏈夊寘鍚妭鐐圭殑杈圭晫妗嗭紝鐒跺悗璋冪敤setWidth鍜宻etHeight
    }
    
    /**
     * 淇濆瓨鑺傜偣鐘舵€?
     */
    @Override
    public @Nullable Object getNodeState() {
        Object[] state = new Object[8];
        state[0] = groupName;
        state[1] = groupColor;
        state[2] = isCollapsed;
        state[3] = isLocked;
        state[4] = width;
        state[5] = height;
        state[6] = containedNodeIds.toArray(new UUID[0]);
        state[7] = new boolean[] {
            getInputPort(INPUT_SIGNAL_ID) != null,
            getOutputPort(OUTPUT_SIGNAL_ID) != null
        };

     * 鎭㈠鑺傜偣鐘舵€?

    public void setNodeState(@Nullable Object state) {
        if (state instanceof Object[]) {
            Object[] objState = (Object[]) state;
            if (objState.length >= 8) {
                if (objState[0] instanceof String) {
                    groupName = (String) objState[0];
                }
                if (objState[1] instanceof String) {
                    groupColor = (String) objState[1];
                }
                if (objState[2] instanceof Boolean) {
                    isCollapsed = (Boolean) objState[2];
                }
                if (objState[3] instanceof Boolean) {
                    isLocked = (Boolean) objState[3];
                }
                if (objState[4] instanceof Number) {
                    width = ((Number) objState[4]).doubleValue();
                }
                if (objState[5] instanceof Number) {
                    height = ((Number) objState[5]).doubleValue();
                }
                
                // 鎭㈠鍖呭惈鐨勮妭鐐笽D
                containedNodeIds.clear();
                if (objState[6] instanceof UUID[]) {
                    UUID[] nodeIds = (UUID[]) objState[6];
                    for (UUID id : nodeIds) {
                        containedNodeIds.add(id);
                    }
                }
                
                // 鎭㈠绔彛鐘舵€?
                if (objState[7] instanceof boolean[]) {
                    boolean[] portStates = (boolean[]) objState[7];
                    if (portStates.length >= 2) {
                        if (portStates[0] && getInputPort(INPUT_SIGNAL_ID) == null) {
                            addInputSignalPort();
                        } else if (!portStates[0] && getInputPort(INPUT_SIGNAL_ID) != null) {
                            removeInputSignalPort();
                        }
                        
                        if (portStates[1] && getOutputPort(OUTPUT_SIGNAL_ID) == null) {
                            addOutputSignalPort();
                        } else if (!portStates[1] && getOutputPort(OUTPUT_SIGNAL_ID) != null) {
                            removeOutputSignalPort();
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }

    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return this.description;
    }

package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.visualization.debugging;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Execution Timer 鑺傜偣: 娴嬮噺杩炴帴鍒版鑺傜偣鐨勮绠楀垎鏀墍鑺辫垂鐨勬椂闂?
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "visualization.debugging.execution_timer",
    displayName = "鎵ц璁℃椂鍣?,
    description = "娴嬮噺杩炴帴鍒版鑺傜偣鐨勮绠楀垎鏀墍鑺辫垂鐨勬椂闂?,
    category = "visualization.debugging"
)
public class ExecutionTimerNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 鑺傜偣灞炴€?---
    private boolean autoReset = true; // 姣忔鎵ц鍚庢槸鍚﹁嚜鍔ㄩ噸缃?
    private boolean showMilliseconds = true; // 鏄惁鏄剧ず姣
    private boolean printToConsole = false; // 鏄惁鎵撳嵃鍒版帶鍒跺彴
    private int precision = 2; // 娴偣鏁扮簿搴?
    
    // --- 鍐呴儴鐘舵€?---
    private long startTime = 0;
    private long endTime = 0;
    private long lastExecutionTime = 0;
    private long totalExecutionTime = 0;
    private int executionCount = 0;
    
    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_START_ID = "input_start";
    private static final String INPUT_STOP_ID = "input_stop";
    private static final String INPUT_RESET_ID = "input_reset";
    private static final String INPUT_AUTO_RESET_ID = "input_auto_reset";
    
    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_EXECUTION_TIME_ID = "output_execution_time";
    private static final String OUTPUT_TOTAL_TIME_ID = "output_total_time";
    private static final String OUTPUT_AVERAGE_TIME_ID = "output_average_time";
    private static final String OUTPUT_COUNT_ID = "output_count";
    private static final String OUTPUT_FORMATTED_TIME_ID = "output_formatted_time";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public ExecutionTimerNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "visualization.debugging.execution_timer");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_START_ID, "Start", 
                "寮€濮嬭鏃?, NodeDataType.ANY, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_STOP_ID, "Stop", 
                "鍋滄璁℃椂", NodeDataType.ANY, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_RESET_ID, "Reset", 
                "閲嶇疆璁℃椂鍣?, NodeDataType.ANY, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_AUTO_RESET_ID, "Auto Reset", 
                "鏄惁鍦ㄦ瘡娆″紑濮嬫椂鑷姩閲嶇疆", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_EXECUTION_TIME_ID, "Execution Time", 
                "鏈€杩戜竴娆℃墽琛屾椂闂达紙姣锛?, NodeDataType.FLOAT, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_TOTAL_TIME_ID, "Total Time", 
                "绱鎵ц鏃堕棿锛堟绉掞級", NodeDataType.FLOAT, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_AVERAGE_TIME_ID, "Average Time", 
                "骞冲潎鎵ц鏃堕棿锛堟绉掞級", NodeDataType.FLOAT, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_COUNT_ID, "Count", 
                "鎵ц娆℃暟", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_FORMATTED_TIME_ID, "Formatted Time", 
                "鏍煎紡鍖栫殑鏃堕棿瀛楃涓?, NodeDataType.STRING, this));
        
        // 鍒濆鍖栬緭鍑哄€?
        resetOutputs();
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object startObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_START_ID);
        Object stopObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_STOP_ID);
        Object resetObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_RESET_ID);
        Object autoResetObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_AUTO_RESET_ID);
        
        // 纭畾鏄惁鑷姩閲嶇疆
        boolean autoReset = this.autoReset;
        if (autoResetObj instanceof Boolean) {
            autoReset = (Boolean) autoResetObj;
        }
        
        // 澶勭悊閲嶇疆淇″彿
        if (resetObj != null) {
            resetTimer();
        }
        
        // 澶勭悊寮€濮嬩俊鍙?
        if (startObj != null) {
            // 濡傛灉璁剧疆浜嗚嚜鍔ㄩ噸缃紝鍒欏湪寮€濮嬫椂閲嶇疆
            if (autoReset) {
                startTime = System.currentTimeMillis();
                endTime = 0;
            } 
            // 濡傛灉鏈缃嚜鍔ㄩ噸缃笖鏈紑濮嬭鏃讹紝鍒欏紑濮嬭鏃?
            else if (startTime == 0) {
                startTime = System.currentTimeMillis();
            }
        }
        
        // 澶勭悊鍋滄淇″彿
        if (stopObj != null && startTime > 0) {
            endTime = System.currentTimeMillis();
            
            // 璁＄畻鎵ц鏃堕棿
            lastExecutionTime = endTime - startTime;
            totalExecutionTime += lastExecutionTime;
            executionCount++;
            
            // 濡傛灉鍚敤浜嗘帶鍒跺彴鎵撳嵃
            if (printToConsole) {
                System.out.println(
                    "鎵ц鏃堕棿 [" + getDisplayName() + "]: " +
                    formatDuration(lastExecutionTime) + " (" +
                    formatDuration(totalExecutionTime / executionCount) + " avg)"
                );
            }
            
            // 閲嶇疆寮€濮嬫椂闂达紝鍑嗗涓嬩竴娆℃祴閲?
            startTime = 0;
        }
        
        // 鏇存柊杈撳嚭鍊?
        updateOutputs();
    }
    
    /**
     * 閲嶇疆璁℃椂鍣?
     */
    private void resetTimer() {
        startTime = 0;
        endTime = 0;
        lastExecutionTime = 0;
        totalExecutionTime = 0;
        executionCount = 0;
        resetOutputs();
    }
    
    /**
     * 閲嶇疆杈撳嚭鍊?
     */
    private void resetOutputs() {
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_EXECUTION_TIME_ID, 0.0f);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_TOTAL_TIME_ID, 0.0f);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_AVERAGE_TIME_ID, 0.0f);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_COUNT_ID, 0);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_FORMATTED_TIME_ID, "0 ms");
    }
    
    /**
     * 鏇存柊杈撳嚭鍊?
     */
    private void updateOutputs() {
        float executionTime = (float) lastExecutionTime;
        float totalTime = (float) totalExecutionTime;
        float avgTime = executionCount > 0 ? totalTime / executionCount : 0;
        
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_EXECUTION_TIME_ID, executionTime);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_TOTAL_TIME_ID, totalTime);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_AVERAGE_TIME_ID, avgTime);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_COUNT_ID, executionCount);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_FORMATTED_TIME_ID, formatDuration(lastExecutionTime));
    }
    
    /**
     * 鏍煎紡鍖栨寔缁椂闂翠负鏄撹鐨勫瓧绗︿覆
     */
    private String formatDuration(long duration) {
        if (duration < 1000 || showMilliseconds) {
            return String.format("%." + precision + "f ms", (float) duration);
        } else {
            float seconds = duration / 1000.0f;
            return String.format("%." + precision + "f s", seconds);
        }
    }
    
    // --- Getters/Setters for Properties ---
    
    public boolean isAutoReset() {
        return autoReset;
    }
    
    public void setAutoReset(boolean autoReset) {
        this.autoReset = autoReset;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    public boolean isShowMilliseconds() {
        return showMilliseconds;
    }
    
    public void setShowMilliseconds(boolean showMilliseconds) {
        this.showMilliseconds = showMilliseconds;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    public boolean isPrintToConsole() {
        return printToConsole;
    }
    
    public void setPrintToConsole(boolean printToConsole) {
        this.printToConsole = printToConsole;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    public int getPrecision() {
        return precision;
    }
    
    public void setPrecision(int precision) {
        this.precision = Math.max(0, Math.min(6, precision));
        markDirty();
    }
    
    /**
     * 鑾峰彇鏈€杩戜竴娆℃墽琛屾椂闂?
     */
    public long getLastExecutionTime() {
        return lastExecutionTime;
    }
    
    /**
     * 鑾峰彇骞冲潎鎵ц鏃堕棿
     */
    public float getAverageExecutionTime() {
        return executionCount > 0 ? (float) totalExecutionTime / executionCount : 0;
    }
    
    /**
     * 鑾峰彇绱鎵ц鏃堕棿
     */
    public long getTotalExecutionTime() {
        return totalExecutionTime;
    }
    
    /**
     * 鑾峰彇鎵ц娆℃暟
     */
    public int getExecutionCount() {
        return executionCount;
    }
    
    /**
     * 淇濆瓨鑺傜偣鐘舵€?
     */
    @Override
    public @Nullable Object getNodeState() {
        Object[] state = new Object[8];
        state[0] = autoReset;
        state[1] = showMilliseconds;
        state[2] = printToConsole;
        state[3] = precision;
        state[4] = startTime;
        state[5] = lastExecutionTime;
        state[6] = totalExecutionTime;
        state[7] = executionCount;
        return state;
    }
    
    /**
     * 鎭㈠鑺傜偣鐘舵€?
     */
    @Override
    public void setNodeState(@Nullable Object state) {
        if (state instanceof Object[]) {
            Object[] objState = (Object[]) state;
            if (objState.length >= 8) {
                if (objState[0] instanceof Boolean) {
                    setAutoReset((Boolean) objState[0]);
                }
                if (objState[1] instanceof Boolean) {
                    setShowMilliseconds((Boolean) objState[1]);
                }
                if (objState[2] instanceof Boolean) {
                    setPrintToConsole((Boolean) objState[2]);
                }
                if (objState[3] instanceof Number) {
                    setPrecision(((Number) objState[3]).intValue());
                }
                if (objState[4] instanceof Number) {
                    startTime = ((Number) objState[4]).longValue();
                }
                if (objState[5] instanceof Number) {
                    lastExecutionTime = ((Number) objState[5]).longValue();
                }
                if (objState[6] instanceof Number) {
                    totalExecutionTime = ((Number) objState[6]).longValue();
                }
                if (objState[7] instanceof Number) {
                    executionCount = ((Number) objState[7]).intValue();
                }
                
                // 鏇存柊杈撳嚭鍊?
                updateOutputs();
            }
        }
    }

    // 娣诲姞 getDescription 鏂规硶
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "娴嬮噺杩炴帴鍒版鑺傜偣鐨勮绠楀垎鏀墍鑺辫垂鐨勬椂闂?;
    }

    // 娣诲姞 getDisplayName 鏂规硶
    @Override
    public String getDisplayName() {
        return "Execution Timer";
    }
} 
===FILE: C:\Users\navib\Desktop\development\NC\nodecraft\src\main\java\com\nodecraft\nodesystem\nodes\visualization\debugging\PanelNode.java===
package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.visualization.debugging;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;

import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Panel 鑺傜偣: 鏄剧ず杩炴帴鍒板叾杈撳叆绔彛鐨勫師濮嬫暟鎹紙鏂囨湰褰㈠紡锛?
 * 杩欐槸涓€涓皟璇曠敤鏍稿績鑺傜偣锛岀敤浜庡府鍔╃敤鎴风悊瑙ｆ暟鎹祦鍜岃妭鐐圭姸鎬?
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "visualization.debugging.panel",
    displayName = "闈㈡澘",
    description = "鏄剧ず杩炴帴鍒板叾杈撳叆绔彛鐨勫師濮嬫暟鎹紙鏂囨湰褰㈠紡锛?,
    category = "visualization.debugging"
)
public class PanelNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 鑺傜偣灞炴€?---
    private String panelContent = ""; // 闈㈡澘涓樉绀虹殑鍐呭
    private boolean useFormatting = true; // 鏄惁浣跨敤鏍煎紡鍖栨樉绀?
    private boolean autoRefresh = true; // 鏄惁鑷姩鍒锋柊
    private int maxDisplayLength = 2000; // 鏈€澶ф樉绀洪暱搴?
    private boolean wrapText = true; // 鏄惁鑷姩鎹㈣
    
    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_DATA_ID = "input_data";
    private static final String INPUT_FORMAT_ID = "input_format";
    private static final String INPUT_MAX_LENGTH_ID = "input_max_length";
    private static final String INPUT_REFRESH_ID = "input_refresh";
    
    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_TEXT_ID = "output_text";
    private static final String OUTPUT_TEXT_LENGTH_ID = "output_text_length";
    private static final String OUTPUT_DATA_TYPE_ID = "output_data_type";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public PanelNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "visualization.debugging.panel");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_DATA_ID, "Data", 
                "瑕佹樉绀虹殑鏁版嵁锛堜换鎰忕被鍨嬶級", NodeDataType.ANY, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_FORMAT_ID, "Use Formatting", 
                "鏄惁浣跨敤鏍煎紡鍖栨樉绀?, NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_MAX_LENGTH_ID, "Max Length", 
                "鏈€澶ф樉绀哄瓧绗︽暟", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_REFRESH_ID, "Refresh", 
                "鍒锋柊瑙﹀彂淇″彿", NodeDataType.ANY, this));
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_TEXT_ID, "Text", 
                "鏄剧ず鐨勬枃鏈唴瀹?, NodeDataType.STRING, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_TEXT_LENGTH_ID, "Text Length", 
                "鏄剧ず鏂囨湰鐨勯暱搴?, NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_DATA_TYPE_ID, "Data Type", 
                "杈撳叆鏁版嵁鐨勭被鍨?, NodeDataType.STRING, this));
    }

    // 娣诲姞 getDescription 鏂规硶
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "鏄剧ず杩炴帴鍒板叾杈撳叆绔彛鐨勫師濮嬫暟鎹紙鏂囨湰褰㈠紡锛?;
    }

    // 娣诲姞 getDisplayName 鏂规硶
    @Override
    public String getDisplayName() {
        return "Panel";
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object dataObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_DATA_ID);
        Object formatObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_FORMAT_ID);
        Object maxLengthObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_MAX_LENGTH_ID);
        Object refreshObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_REFRESH_ID); // 浠呯敤浜庤Е鍙戝埛鏂?
        
        // 纭畾鏄惁浣跨敤鏍煎紡鍖?
        boolean useFormatting = this.useFormatting;
        if (formatObj instanceof Boolean) {
            useFormatting = (Boolean) formatObj;
        }
        
        // 纭畾鏈€澶ф樉绀洪暱搴?
        int maxDisplayLength = this.maxDisplayLength;
        if (maxLengthObj instanceof Number) {
            maxDisplayLength = Math.max(10, ((Number) maxLengthObj).intValue());
        }
        
        // 澶勭悊寰呮樉绀烘暟鎹?
        String displayText = "";
        String dataType = "null";
        
        if (dataObj != null) {
            dataType = getDataTypeName(dataObj);
            displayText = formatDataToString(dataObj, useFormatting, maxDisplayLength);
        }
        
        // 鏇存柊闈㈡澘鍐呭
        panelContent = displayText;
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_TEXT_ID, displayText);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_TEXT_LENGTH_ID, displayText.length());
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_DATA_TYPE_ID, dataType);
    }
    
    /**
     * 鑾峰彇鏁版嵁绫诲瀷鍚嶇О
     */
    private String getDataTypeName(Object obj) {
        if (obj == null) return "null";
        
        // 澶勭悊甯歌鐨凧ava闆嗗悎鍜屾暟缁勭被鍨?
        if (obj instanceof List) {
            List<?> list = (List<?>) obj;
            return "List<" + (list.isEmpty() ? "?" : getDataTypeName(list.get(0))) + "> (size=" + list.size() + ")";
        }
        if (obj instanceof Object[]) {
            Object[] array = (Object[]) obj;
            return "Array<" + (array.length == 0 ? "?" : getDataTypeName(array[0])) + "> (length=" + array.length + ")";
        }
        if (obj instanceof String) {
            return "String (length=" + ((String) obj).length() + ")";
        }
        if (obj instanceof Number) {
            if (obj instanceof Integer) return "Integer";
            if (obj instanceof Long) return "Long";
            if (obj instanceof Float) return "Float";
            if (obj instanceof Double) return "Double";
            return "Number";
        }
        if (obj instanceof Boolean) {
            return "Boolean";
        }
        
        // 杩斿洖瀹為檯鐨勭被鍚?
        return obj.getClass().getSimpleName();
    }
    
    /**
     * 灏嗘暟鎹牸寮忓寲涓哄瓧绗︿覆
     */
    private String formatDataToString(Object data, boolean useFormatting, int maxLength) {
        if (data == null) {
            return "null";
        }
        
        StringBuilder sb = new StringBuilder();
        
        // 澶勭悊涓嶅悓绫诲瀷鐨勬暟鎹?
        if (data instanceof List) {
            formatList((List<?>) data, sb, useFormatting, 0, maxLength);
        } else if (data instanceof Object[]) {
            formatArray((Object[]) data, sb, useFormatting, 0, maxLength);
        } else if (data instanceof String) {
            formatString((String) data, sb, useFormatting, maxLength);
        } else {
            // 鍏朵粬绫诲瀷鐨勬暟鎹洿鎺ヨ皟鐢╰oString()
            sb.append(data.toString());
            
            // 鎴柇杩囬暱鐨勬枃鏈?
            if (sb.length() > maxLength) {
                sb.setLength(maxLength);
                sb.append("...");
            }
        }
        
        return sb.toString();
    }
    
    /**
     * 鏍煎紡鍖栧垪琛?
     */
    private void formatList(List<?> list, StringBuilder sb, boolean useFormatting, int indent, int maxLength) {
        if (list.isEmpty()) {
            sb.append("[]");
            return;
        }
        
        String indentStr = useFormatting ? "  ".repeat(indent) : "";
        String newLine = useFormatting ? "\n" : ", ";
        
        sb.append("[");
        if (useFormatting) sb.append(newLine);
        
        int count = 0;
        boolean reachedMax = false;
        
        for (Object item : list) {
            // 妫€鏌ユ槸鍚﹀凡缁忚秴杩囨渶澶ч暱搴?
            if (sb.length() > maxLength) {
                reachedMax = true;
                break;
            }
            
            if (count > 0) sb.append(",").append(newLine);
            if (useFormatting) sb.append(indentStr).append("  ");
            
            // 閫掑綊鏍煎紡鍖栧瓙椤?
            if (item instanceof List) {
                formatList((List<?>) item, sb, useFormatting, indent + 1, maxLength);
            } else if (item instanceof Object[]) {
                formatArray((Object[]) item, sb, useFormatting, indent + 1, maxLength);
            } else if (item instanceof String) {
                formatString((String) item, sb, useFormatting, maxLength);
            } else {
                sb.append(item == null ? "null" : item.toString());
            }
            
            count++;
        }
        
        if (reachedMax) {
            sb.append(newLine).append(indentStr).append("  ...").append(newLine);
            sb.append(indentStr).append("] (truncated, total items: ").append(list.size()).append(")");
        } else {
            if (useFormatting) sb.append(newLine).append(indentStr);
            sb.append("]");
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * 鏍煎紡鍖栨暟缁?
     */
    private void formatArray(Object[] array, StringBuilder sb, boolean useFormatting, int indent, int maxLength) {
        List<Object> list = new ArrayList<>();
        for (Object item : array) {
            list.add(item);
        }
        formatList(list, sb, useFormatting, indent, maxLength);
    }
    
    /**
     * 鏍煎紡鍖栧瓧绗︿覆
     */
    private void formatString(String str, StringBuilder sb, boolean useFormatting, int maxLength) {
        if (useFormatting) {
            sb.append("\"");
            
            // 澶勭悊杞箟瀛楃
            String escapedStr = str
                    .replace("\\", "\\\\")
                    .replace("\n", "\\n")
                    .replace("\r", "\\r")
                    .replace("\t", "\\t")
                    .replace("\"", "\\\"");
            
            // 鎴柇杩囬暱鐨勫瓧绗︿覆
            if (escapedStr.length() > maxLength - 5) {
                sb.append(escapedStr.substring(0, maxLength - 5)).append("...");
            } else {
                sb.append(escapedStr);
            }
            
            sb.append("\"");
        } else {
            // 闈炴牸寮忓寲妯″紡锛岀洿鎺ユ樉绀哄瓧绗︿覆
            if (str.length() > maxLength) {
                sb.append(str.substring(0, maxLength)).append("...");
            } else {
                sb.append(str);
            }
        }
    }
    
    // --- Getters/Setters for Properties ---
    
    public String getPanelContent() {
        return panelContent;
    }
    
    public boolean isUseFormatting() {
        return useFormatting;
    }
    
    public void setUseFormatting(boolean useFormatting) {
        this.useFormatting = useFormatting;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    public boolean isAutoRefresh() {
        return autoRefresh;
    }
    
    public void setAutoRefresh(boolean autoRefresh) {
        this.autoRefresh = autoRefresh;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    public int getMaxDisplayLength() {
        return maxDisplayLength;
    }
    
    public void setMaxDisplayLength(int maxDisplayLength) {
        this.maxDisplayLength = Math.max(10, maxDisplayLength);
        markDirty();
    }
    
    public boolean isWrapText() {
        return wrapText;
    }
    
    public void setWrapText(boolean wrapText) {
        this.wrapText = wrapText;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    /**
     * 淇濆瓨鑺傜偣鐘舵€?
     */
    @Override
    public @Nullable Object getNodeState() {
        Object[] state = new Object[4];
        state[0] = useFormatting;
        state[1] = autoRefresh;
        state[2] = maxDisplayLength;
        state[3] = wrapText;
        return state;
    }
    
    /**
     * 鎭㈠鑺傜偣鐘舵€?
     */
    @Override
    public void setNodeState(@Nullable Object state) {
        if (state instanceof Object[]) {
            Object[] objState = (Object[]) state;
            if (objState.length >= 4) {
                if (objState[0] instanceof Boolean) {
                    setUseFormatting((Boolean) objState[0]);
                }
                if (objState[1] instanceof Boolean) {
                    setAutoRefresh((Boolean) objState[1]);
                }
                if (objState[2] instanceof Number) {
                    setMaxDisplayLength(((Number) objState[2]).intValue());
                }
                if (objState[3] instanceof Boolean) {
                    setWrapText((Boolean) objState[3]);
                }
            }
        }
    }
} 
===FILE: C:\Users\navib\Desktop\development\NC\nodecraft\src\main\java\com\nodecraft\nodesystem\nodes\visualization\debugging\PrintToChatNode.java===
package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.visualization.debugging;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Print to Chat 鑺傜偣: 灏嗚緭鍏ユ暟鎹樉绀哄埌娓告垙鑱婂ぉ妗?
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "visualization.debugging.print_to_chat",
    displayName = "鎵撳嵃鍒拌亰澶?,
    description = "灏嗚緭鍏ユ暟鎹樉绀哄埌娓告垙鑱婂ぉ妗?,
    category = "visualization.debugging"
)
public class PrintToChatNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 鑺傜偣灞炴€?---
    private String prefix = "[Debug] "; // 娑堟伅鍓嶇紑
    private boolean includeNodeName = true; // 鏄惁鍖呭惈鑺傜偣鍚嶇О
    private boolean includeDataType = true; // 鏄惁鍖呭惈鏁版嵁绫诲瀷淇℃伅
    private boolean autoFormat = true; // 鏄惁鑷姩鏍煎紡鍖栧鏉傛暟鎹?
    private String textColor = "gold"; // 鏂囨湰棰滆壊
    
    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_DATA_ID = "input_data";
    private static final String INPUT_PREFIX_ID = "input_prefix";
    private static final String INPUT_COLOR_ID = "input_color";
    private static final String INPUT_TRIGGER_ID = "input_trigger";
    
    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID = "output_success";
    private static final String OUTPUT_MESSAGE_ID = "output_message";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public PrintToChatNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "visualization.debugging.print_to_chat");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_DATA_ID, "Data", 
                "瑕佹墦鍗扮殑鏁版嵁", NodeDataType.ANY, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_PREFIX_ID, "Prefix", 
                "娑堟伅鍓嶇紑", NodeDataType.STRING, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_COLOR_ID, "Color", 
                "鏂囨湰棰滆壊", NodeDataType.STRING, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_TRIGGER_ID, "Trigger", 
                "瑙﹀彂鎵撳嵃淇″彿", NodeDataType.ANY, this));
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID, "Success", 
                "鏄惁鎴愬姛鎵撳嵃", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_MESSAGE_ID, "Message", 
                "鎵撳嵃鐨勬秷鎭唴瀹?, NodeDataType.STRING, this));
    }

    // 娣诲姞 getDescription 鏂规硶
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "灏嗚緭鍏ユ暟鎹樉绀哄埌娓告垙鑱婂ぉ妗?;
    }

    // 娣诲姞 getDisplayName 鏂规硶
    @Override
    public String getDisplayName() {
        return "Print to Chat";
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 榛樿杈撳嚭鍊?
        boolean success = false;
        String message = "";
        
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object dataObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_DATA_ID);
        Object prefixObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_PREFIX_ID);
        Object colorObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_COLOR_ID);
        Object triggerObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_TRIGGER_ID); // 浠呬綔涓鸿Е鍙戝櫒
        
        // 妫€鏌ユ槸鍚︽湁瑙﹀彂淇″彿鍜岀帺瀹剁幆澧?
        if (context != null && context.getPlayerAccessor() != null) {
            try {
                // 纭畾鍓嶇紑
                String prefix = this.prefix;
                if (prefixObj instanceof String) {
                    prefix = (String) prefixObj;
                }
                
                // 纭畾棰滆壊
                String color = this.textColor;
                if (colorObj instanceof String) {
                    color = (String) colorObj;
                }
                
                // 鏋勫缓娑堟伅
                StringBuilder messageSb = new StringBuilder();
                messageSb.append(prefix);
                
                // 娣诲姞鑺傜偣鍚嶇О锛堝鏋滃惎鐢級
                if (includeNodeName) {
                    messageSb.append(getDisplayName()).append(": ");
                }
                
                // 娣诲姞鏁版嵁绫诲瀷锛堝鏋滃惎鐢級鍜屾暟鎹?
                String dataStr = formatData(dataObj);
                
                if (includeDataType && dataObj != null) {
                    messageSb.append("(").append(getDataTypeName(dataObj)).append(") ");
                }
                
                messageSb.append(dataStr);
                message = messageSb.toString();
                
                // 鍦∕inecraft涓彂閫佹秷鎭?
                /*
                鍦ㄥ疄闄呭疄鐜颁腑锛岄渶瑕佹牴鎹甅inecraft API瀹炵幇:
                context.getPlayerAccessor().sendMessage(message, color);
                */
                
                // 妯℃嫙鍙戦€佹秷鎭?
                System.out.println("妯℃嫙鍙戦€佽亰澶╂秷鎭? 棰滆壊=" + color + ", 鍐呭=\"" + message + "\"");
                success = true;
            } catch (Exception e) {
                System.err.println("Error printing to chat: " + e.getMessage());
            }
        }
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID, success);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_MESSAGE_ID, message);
    }
    
    /**
     * 鑾峰彇鏁版嵁绫诲瀷鍚嶇О
     */
    private String getDataTypeName(Object obj) {
        if (obj == null) return "null";
        
        if (obj instanceof Iterable) {
            return "List";
        }
        if (obj instanceof Object[]) {
            return "Array";
        }
        if (obj instanceof String) {
            return "String";
        }
        if (obj instanceof Number) {
            if (obj instanceof Integer) return "Int";
            if (obj instanceof Float) return "Float";
            if (obj instanceof Double) return "Double";
            return "Number";
        }
        if (obj instanceof Boolean) {
            return "Bool";
        }
        
        // 杩斿洖绠€鍖栫殑绫诲悕
        String className = obj.getClass().getSimpleName();
        return className.isEmpty() ? obj.getClass().getName() : className;
    }
    
    /**
     * 鏍煎紡鍖栨暟鎹负閫傚悎鑱婂ぉ鏄剧ず鐨勫瓧绗︿覆
     */
    private String formatData(Object data) {
        if (data == null) {
            return "null";
        }
        
        // 澶勭悊涓嶅悓绫诲瀷鐨勬暟鎹?
        if (data instanceof Iterable) {
            if (autoFormat) {
                StringBuilder sb = new StringBuilder();
                sb.append("[");
                
                boolean first = true;
                int count = 0;
                for (Object item : (Iterable<?>) data) {
                    if (count >= 5) {
                        sb.append(", ...");
                        break;
                    }
                    
                    if (!first) {
                        sb.append(", ");
                    }
                    first = false;
                    
                    sb.append(formatData(item));
                    count++;
                }
                
                sb.append("]");
                return sb.toString();
            } else {
                return data.toString();
            }
        } else if (data instanceof Object[]) {
            if (autoFormat) {
                StringBuilder sb = new StringBuilder();
                sb.append("[");
                
                Object[] array = (Object[]) data;
                for (int i = 0; i < Math.min(5, array.length); i++) {
                    if (i > 0) {
                        sb.append(", ");
                    }
                    sb.append(formatData(array[i]));
                }
                
                if (array.length > 5) {
                    sb.append(", ...");
                }
                
                sb.append("]");
                return sb.toString();
            } else {
                return data.toString();
            }
        } else if (data instanceof String) {
            if (autoFormat) {
                String str = (String) data;
                if (str.length() > 100) {
                    return "\"" + str.substring(0, 97) + "...\"";
                } else {
                    return "\"" + str + "\"";
                }
            } else {
                return (String) data;
            }
        } else {
            // 鍏朵粬绫诲瀷鐩存帴杞崲涓哄瓧绗︿覆
            return data.toString();
        }
    }
    
    // --- Getters/Setters for Properties ---
    
    public String getPrefix() {
        return prefix;
    }
    
    public void setPrefix(String prefix) {
        this.prefix = prefix;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    public boolean isIncludeNodeName() {
        return includeNodeName;
    }
    
    public void setIncludeNodeName(boolean includeNodeName) {
        this.includeNodeName = includeNodeName;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    public boolean isIncludeDataType() {
        return includeDataType;
    }
    
    public void setIncludeDataType(boolean includeDataType) {
        this.includeDataType = includeDataType;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    public boolean isAutoFormat() {
        return autoFormat;
    }
    
    public void setAutoFormat(boolean autoFormat) {
        this.autoFormat = autoFormat;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    public String getTextColor() {
        return textColor;
    }
    
    public void setTextColor(String textColor) {
        this.textColor = textColor;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    /**
     * 淇濆瓨鑺傜偣鐘舵€?
     */
    @Override
    public @Nullable Object getNodeState() {
        Object[] state = new Object[5];
        state[0] = prefix;
        state[1] = includeNodeName;
        state[2] = includeDataType;
        state[3] = autoFormat;
        state[4] = textColor;
        return state;
    }
    
    /**
     * 鎭㈠鑺傜偣鐘舵€?
     */
    @Override
    public void setNodeState(@Nullable Object state) {
        if (state instanceof Object[]) {
            Object[] objState = (Object[]) state;
            if (objState.length >= 5) {
                if (objState[0] instanceof String) {
                    setPrefix((String) objState[0]);
                }
                if (objState[1] instanceof Boolean) {
                    setIncludeNodeName((Boolean) objState[1]);
                }
                if (objState[2] instanceof Boolean) {
                    setIncludeDataType((Boolean) objState[2]);
                }
                if (objState[3] instanceof Boolean) {
                    setAutoFormat((Boolean) objState[3]);
                }
                if (objState[4] instanceof String) {
                    setTextColor((String) objState[4]);
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
