package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.visualization.debugging;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Value Monitor 鑺傜偣: 鍦ㄧ敾甯冧笂鎮仠鏄剧ず杩炴帴绔彛鐨勬暟鎹€?
 * 姝よ妭鐐瑰彲浠ヤ綔涓篣I鐗规€ф垨鐙珛鑺傜偣浣跨敤
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "visualization.debugging.value_monitor",
    displayName = "鍊肩洃瑙嗗櫒",
    description = "鍦ㄧ敾甯冧笂鎮仠鏄剧ず杩炴帴绔彛鐨勬暟鎹€?,
    category = "visualization.debugging"
)
public class ValueMonitorNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 鑺傜偣灞炴€?---
    private String displayText = ""; // 鏄剧ず鐨勬枃鏈?
    private boolean showLabel = true; // 鏄惁鏄剧ず鏍囩
    private boolean showType = true; // 鏄惁鏄剧ず绫诲瀷
    private boolean compactView = false; // 鏄惁浣跨敤绱у噾瑙嗗浘
    private int refreshInterval = 500; // 鍒锋柊闂撮殧锛堟绉掞級
    private String backgroundColor = "#333333"; // 鑳屾櫙棰滆壊
    private String textColor = "#FFFFFF"; // 鏂囨湰棰滆壊
    
    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_VALUE_ID = "input_value";
    private static final String INPUT_LABEL_ID = "input_label";
    private static final String INPUT_SHOW_TYPE_ID = "input_show_type";
    private static final String INPUT_REFRESH_INTERVAL_ID = "input_refresh_interval";
    
    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_VALUE_ID = "output_value";
    private static final String OUTPUT_DISPLAY_TEXT_ID = "output_display_text";
    private static final String OUTPUT_TYPE_ID = "output_type";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public ValueMonitorNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "visualization.debugging.value_monitor");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_VALUE_ID, "Value", 
                "瑕佺洃瑙嗙殑鍊?, NodeDataType.ANY, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_LABEL_ID, "Label", 
                "鏄剧ず鍊肩殑鏍囩", NodeDataType.STRING, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_SHOW_TYPE_ID, "Show Type", 
                "鏄惁鏄剧ず绫诲瀷淇℃伅", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_REFRESH_INTERVAL_ID, "Refresh Interval", 
                "鍒锋柊闂撮殧锛堟绉掞級", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_VALUE_ID, "Value", 
                "鐩戣鐨勫€硷紙鐩存帴浼犻€掞級", NodeDataType.ANY, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_DISPLAY_TEXT_ID, "Display Text", 
                "鏄剧ず鐨勬枃鏈?, NodeDataType.STRING, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_TYPE_ID, "Type", 
                "鐩戣鍊肩殑绫诲瀷", NodeDataType.STRING, this));
    }

    // 娣诲姞 getDescription 鏂规硶
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "鍦ㄧ敾甯冧笂鎮仠鏄剧ず杩炴帴绔彛鐨勬暟鎹€?;
    }

    // 娣诲姞 getDisplayName 鏂规硶
    @Override
    public String getDisplayName() {
        return "Value Monitor";
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object valueObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_VALUE_ID);
        Object labelObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_LABEL_ID);
        Object showTypeObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_SHOW_TYPE_ID);
        Object refreshIntervalObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_REFRESH_INTERVAL_ID);
        
        // 纭畾鏄惁鏄剧ず绫诲瀷
        boolean showType = this.showType;
        if (showTypeObj instanceof Boolean) {
            showType = (Boolean) showTypeObj;
        }
        
        // 纭畾鍒锋柊闂撮殧
        int refreshInterval = this.refreshInterval;
        if (refreshIntervalObj instanceof Number) {
            refreshInterval = Math.max(100, ((Number) refreshIntervalObj).intValue());
        }
        
        // 纭畾鏍囩
        String label = "";
        if (labelObj instanceof String) {
            label = (String) labelObj;
        }
        
        // 鑾峰彇鏁版嵁绫诲瀷
        String typeName = getDataTypeName(valueObj);
        
        // 鏍煎紡鍖栨樉绀烘枃鏈?
        String displayText = formatDisplayText(valueObj, label, typeName, showType);
        this.displayText = displayText;
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_VALUE_ID, valueObj); // 鍘熸牱浼犻€掕緭鍏ュ€?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_DISPLAY_TEXT_ID, displayText);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_TYPE_ID, typeName);
        
        // 娉ㄦ剰锛氬湪瀹為檯瀹炵幇涓紝姝よ妭鐐瑰彲鑳介渶瑕佺壒娈婄殑UI娓叉煋閫昏緫锛屼互鍦ㄧ敾甯冧笂鏄剧ず鐩戣鍣ㄦ
        // 杩欎簺UI娓叉煋浠ｇ爜閫氬父涓嶅湪鑺傜偣鐨刾rocessNode鏂规硶涓紝鑰屾槸鍦ㄧ浉鍏砋I娓叉煋绫讳腑
    }
    
    /**
     * 鑾峰彇鏁版嵁绫诲瀷鍚嶇О
     */
    private String getDataTypeName(Object obj) {
        if (obj == null) return "null";
        
        // 澶勭悊甯歌绫诲瀷
        if (obj instanceof Iterable) {
            return "List";
        }
        if (obj instanceof Object[]) {
            return "Array";
        }
        if (obj instanceof String) {
            return "String";
        }
        if (obj instanceof Number) {
            if (obj instanceof Integer) return "Int";
            if (obj instanceof Long) return "Long";
            if (obj instanceof Float) return "Float";
            if (obj instanceof Double) return "Double";
            return "Number";
        }
        if (obj instanceof Boolean) {
            return "Boolean";
        }
        
        // 杩斿洖绠€鍖栫殑绫诲悕
        return obj.getClass().getSimpleName();
    }
    
    /**
     * 鏍煎紡鍖栨樉绀烘枃鏈?
     */
    private String formatDisplayText(Object value, String label, String typeName, boolean showType) {
        StringBuilder sb = new StringBuilder();
        
        // 娣诲姞鏍囩锛堝鏋滄湁锛?
        if (showLabel && !label.isEmpty()) {
            sb.append(label).append(": ");
        }
        
        // 娣诲姞绫诲瀷锛堝鏋滃惎鐢級
        if (showType) {
            sb.append("(").append(typeName).append(") ");
        }
        
        // 鏍煎紡鍖栧€?
        if (value == null) {
            sb.append("null");
        } else if (value instanceof String) {
            String str = (String) value;
            if (compactView && str.length() > 30) {
                sb.append("\"").append(str.substring(0, 27)).append("...\"");
            } else {
                sb.append("\"").append(str).append("\"");
            }
        } else if (value instanceof Iterable) {
            if (compactView) {
                sb.append("[...]"); // 鍦ㄧ揣鍑戞ā寮忎笅鍙樉绀哄崰浣嶇
            } else {
                // 绠€鍖栫殑鍒楄〃鏄剧ず
                sb.append("[");
                Iterable<?> iterable = (Iterable<?>) value;
                boolean first = true;
                int count = 0;
                
                for (Object item : iterable) {
                    if (count >= 3) {
                        sb.append(", ...");
                        break;
                    }
                    
                    if (!first) {
                        sb.append(", ");
                    }
                    first = false;
                    
                    if (item instanceof String) {
                        sb.append("\"").append(item).append("\"");
                    } else {
                        sb.append(item);
                    }
                    count++;
                }
                
                sb.append("]");
            }
        } else if (value instanceof Object[]) {
            if (compactView) {
                sb.append("[...]"); // 鍦ㄧ揣鍑戞ā寮忎笅鍙樉绀哄崰浣嶇
            } else {
                // 绠€鍖栫殑鏁扮粍鏄剧ず
                sb.append("[");
                Object[] array = (Object[]) value;
                for (int i = 0; i < Math.min(3, array.length); i++) {
                    if (i > 0) {
                        sb.append(", ");
                    }
                    
                    Object item = array[i];
                    if (item instanceof String) {
                        sb.append("\"").append(item).append("\"");
                    } else {
                        sb.append(item);
                    }
                }
                
                if (array.length > 3) {
                    sb.append(", ...");
                }
                
                sb.append("]");
            }
        } else {
            // 鍏朵粬绫诲瀷鐩存帴杞崲涓哄瓧绗︿覆
            sb.append(value);
        }
        
        return sb.toString();
    }
    
    // --- Getters/Setters for Properties ---

        return displayText;
    }

        return showLabel;

        this.showLabel = showLabel;
        markDirty();

        return showType;

        this.showType = showType;
        markDirty();

        return compactView;
    }

        this.compactView = compactView;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    public int getRefreshInterval() {
        return refreshInterval;
    }
    
    public void setRefreshInterval(int refreshInterval) {
        this.refreshInterval = Math.max(100, refreshInterval); // 鏈€灏?00姣
        markDirty();
    }

        return backgroundColor;
    }

        this.backgroundColor = backgroundColor;

        this.textColor = textColor;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    /**
     * 淇濆瓨鑺傜偣鐘舵€?
     */
    @Override
    public @Nullable Object getNodeState() {
        Object[] state = new Object[6];
        state[0] = showLabel;
        state[1] = showType;
        state[2] = compactView;
        state[3] = refreshInterval;
        state[4] = backgroundColor;
        state[5] = textColor;
        return state;
    }
    
    /**
     * 鎭㈠鑺傜偣鐘舵€?
     */
    @Override
    public void setNodeState(@Nullable Object state) {
        if (state instanceof Object[]) {
            Object[] objState = (Object[]) state;
            if (objState.length >= 6) {
                if (objState[0] instanceof Boolean) {
                    setShowLabel((Boolean) objState[0]);
                }
                if (objState[1] instanceof Boolean) {
                    setShowType((Boolean) objState[1]);
                }
                if (objState[2] instanceof Boolean) {
                    setCompactView((Boolean) objState[2]);
                }
                if (objState[3] instanceof Number) {
                    setRefreshInterval(((Number) objState[3]).intValue());
                }
                if (objState[4] instanceof String) {
                    setBackgroundColor((String) objState[4]);
                }
                if (objState[5] instanceof String) {
                    setTextColor((String) objState[5]);
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

/**
 * Apply Changes 鑺傜偣: 鐗规畩瑙﹀彂鑺傜偣锛屽皢棰勮鐨勭粨鏋滃疄闄呭簲鐢ㄥ埌涓栫晫涓?

@NodeInfo(
    id = "visualization.execute.apply_changes",
    displayName = "搴旂敤淇敼",
    description = "灏嗛瑙堢殑缁撴灉瀹為檯搴旂敤鍒颁笘鐣屼腑",
    category = "visualization.execute"
)
public class ApplyChangesNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 鑺傜偣灞炴€?---
    private boolean showProgressBar = true; // 鏄惁鏄剧ず杩涘害鏉?
    private boolean notifyOnComplete = true; // 瀹屾垚鍚庢槸鍚﹂€氱煡
    private int executionTimeout = 30; // 鎵ц瓒呮椂锛堢锛?
    private UUID executionId = UUID.randomUUID(); // 鎵ц瀹炰緥ID
    private String description = "灏嗛瑙堢殑缁撴灉瀹為檯搴旂敤鍒颁笘鐣屼腑";

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_TRIGGER_ID = "input_trigger";
    private static final String INPUT_PREVIEW_IDS_ID = "input_preview_ids";
    private static final String INPUT_SHOW_PROGRESS_ID = "input_show_progress";
    private static final String INPUT_NOTIFY_ID = "input_notify";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID = "output_success";
    private static final String OUTPUT_OPERATION_COUNT_ID = "output_operation_count";
    private static final String OUTPUT_EXECUTION_TIME_ID = "output_execution_time";
    private static final String OUTPUT_STATUS_ID = "output_status";

    // --- 鎵ц鐘舵€?---
    private boolean isExecuting = false;
    private float progressPercentage = 0.0f;
    private String statusMessage = "Ready";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public ApplyChangesNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "visualization.execute.apply_changes");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_TRIGGER_ID, "Trigger", 
                "瑙﹀彂鎵ц鎿嶄綔鐨勪俊鍙?, NodeDataType.ANY, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_PREVIEW_IDS_ID, "Preview IDs", 
                "瑕佸簲鐢ㄧ殑棰勮ID鍒楄〃锛堝彲閫夛級", NodeDataType.LIST, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_SHOW_PROGRESS_ID, "Show Progress", 
                "鏄惁鏄剧ず杩涘害鏉?, NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_NOTIFY_ID, "Notify on Complete", 
                "瀹屾垚鍚庢槸鍚﹂€氱煡", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID, "Success", 
                "鎿嶄綔鏄惁鎴愬姛瀹屾垚", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_OPERATION_COUNT_ID, "Operation Count", 
                "鎵ц鐨勬搷浣滄€绘暟", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_EXECUTION_TIME_ID, "Execution Time", 
                "鎵ц鏃堕棿锛堟绉掞級", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_STATUS_ID, "Status", 
                "鎵ц鐘舵€佷俊鎭?, NodeDataType.STRING, this));
    }

    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return this.description;
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 榛樿杈撳嚭鍊?
        boolean success = false;
        int operationCount = 0;
        int executionTime = 0;
        String status = "No operation performed";
        
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object triggerObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_TRIGGER_ID);

        Object notifyObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_NOTIFY_ID);

        boolean showProgress = this.showProgressBar;
        if (showProgressObj instanceof Boolean) {

        }
        
        // 纭畾鏄惁瀹屾垚鍚庨€氱煡
        boolean notifyOnComplete = this.notifyOnComplete;

            // 閲嶇疆杩涘害鍜岀姸鎬?

                            // UIManager.updateProgress(executionId, progressPercentage, statusMessage);
                        }

                // 妯℃嫙澶勭悊鏃堕棿鍜屾墽琛屾楠?
                try {
                    // 妯℃嫙鍚姩闃舵
                    progressPercentage = 0.1f;
                    statusMessage = "姝ｅ湪鍑嗗搴旂敤淇敼...";
                    Thread.sleep(200);
                    
                    // 妯℃嫙杩涘害鏇存柊
                    progressPercentage = 0.3f;
                    statusMessage = "姝ｅ湪鏀堕泦涓栫晫淇敼鎿嶄綔... (1/3)";
                    Thread.sleep(300);

                    statusMessage = "姝ｅ湪楠岃瘉鎿嶄綔鍙鎬?.. (2/3)";

                    success = false;
                }

                executionTime = (int)(System.currentTimeMillis() - startTime);

                    // 鍦ㄥ疄闄呭疄鐜颁腑鏄剧ず閫氱煡
                    // UIManager.showNotification("搴旂敤淇敼瀹屾垚", "宸叉垚鍔熸墽琛?" + operationCount + " 涓笘鐣屼慨鏀规搷浣?);
                    System.out.println("搴旂敤淇敼瀹屾垚閫氱煡: 宸叉垚鍔熸墽琛?" + operationCount + " 涓笘鐣屼慨鏀规搷浣?);
                }
                
                // 鎵撳嵃璋冭瘯淇℃伅
                System.out.println("搴旂敤淇敼瀹屾垚: 鎿嶄綔鏁?" + operationCount + 
                        ", 鐢ㄦ椂=" + executionTime + "ms, 鐘舵€?\"" + statusMessage + "\"");
                
                status = statusMessage;
            } catch (Exception e) {
                success = false;
                status = "Error: " + e.getMessage();
                System.err.println("Error applying changes: " + e.getMessage());
            } finally {
                isExecuting = false;
            }
        }
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID, success);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_OPERATION_COUNT_ID, operationCount);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_EXECUTION_TIME_ID, executionTime);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_STATUS_ID, status);
    }
    
    // --- Getters/Setters for Properties ---
    
    public boolean isShowProgressBar() {
        return showProgressBar;
    }
    
    public void setShowProgressBar(boolean showProgressBar) {
        this.showProgressBar = showProgressBar;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    public boolean isNotifyOnComplete() {
        return notifyOnComplete;
    }
    
    public void setNotifyOnComplete(boolean notifyOnComplete) {
        this.notifyOnComplete = notifyOnComplete;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    public int getExecutionTimeout() {
        return executionTimeout;
    }
    
    public void setExecutionTimeout(int executionTimeout) {
        this.executionTimeout = Math.max(5, executionTimeout);
        markDirty();
    }
    
    /**
     * 鑾峰彇褰撳墠鎵ц鐘舵€?
     * @return 褰撳墠杩涘害鐧惧垎姣?0.0-1.0)
     */
    public float getProgressPercentage() {
        return progressPercentage;
    }
    
    /**
     * 鑾峰彇褰撳墠鐘舵€佹秷鎭?
     * @return 鐘舵€佷俊鎭瓧绗︿覆
     */
    public String getStatusMessage() {
        return statusMessage;
    }
    
    /**
     * 鏄惁姝ｅ湪鎵ц涓?
     * @return true琛ㄧず姝ｅ湪鎵ц
     */
    public boolean isExecuting() {
        return isExecuting;
    }
    
    /**
     * 閲嶇疆鎵цID
     */
    public void resetExecutionId() {
        executionId = UUID.randomUUID();
        markDirty();
    }
    
    /**
     * 淇濆瓨鑺傜偣鐘舵€?
     */
    @Override
    public @Nullable Object getNodeState() {
        Object[] state = new Object[4];
        state[0] = showProgressBar;
        state[1] = notifyOnComplete;
        state[2] = executionTimeout;
        state[3] = executionId.toString();
        return state;
    }
    
    /**
     * 鎭㈠鑺傜偣鐘舵€?
     */
    @Override
    public void setNodeState(@Nullable Object state) {
        if (state instanceof Object[]) {
            Object[] objState = (Object[]) state;
            if (objState.length >= 4) {
                if (objState[0] instanceof Boolean) {
                    showProgressBar = (Boolean) objState[0];
                }
                if (objState[1] instanceof Boolean) {
                    notifyOnComplete = (Boolean) objState[1];
                }
                if (objState[2] instanceof Number) {
                    executionTimeout = ((Number) objState[2]).intValue();
                }
                if (objState[3] instanceof String) {
                    try {
                        executionId = UUID.fromString((String) objState[3]);
                    } catch (IllegalArgumentException e) {
                        resetExecutionId();
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_CLEARED_COUNT_ID, "Cleared Count",

    }

        // 榛樿杈撳嚭鍊?

                clearedCount = 5; // 鍋囪娓呴櫎浜?涓瑙?
                success = true;

                System.out.println("妯℃嫙娓呴櫎 " + clearedCount + " 涓瑙?);

                success = false;
                System.err.println("Error clearing previews: " + e.getMessage());

        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID, success);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_CLEARED_COUNT_ID, clearedCount);
    }

package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.visualization.preview;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;

 * Hide Preview 鑺傜偣: 闅愯棌褰撳墠杩炴帴鍒版鑺傜偣鐨勯瑙?

    displayName = "闅愯棌棰勮",
    description = "闅愯棌褰撳墠杩炴帴鍒版鑺傜偣鐨勯瑙?,

                "鏄惁闅愯棌棰勮锛坱rue涓洪殣钘忥紝false涓烘樉绀猴級", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));

                "棰勮褰撳墠鏄惁澶勪簬闅愯棌鐘舵€?, NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
    }

    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return this.description;

        boolean isHidden = this.isHidden;
        
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object previewIdObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_PREVIEW_ID_ID);
        Object hideObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_HIDE_ID);
        
        // 纭畾鏄惁闅愯棌
        boolean shouldHide = this.isHidden;
        if (hideObj instanceof Boolean) {
            shouldHide = (Boolean) hideObj;
        }
        
        // 澶勭悊棰勮ID
        String previewId = null;
        if (previewIdObj instanceof String) {
            previewId = (String) previewIdObj;
        }
        
        // 妫€鏌ュ繀瑕佺殑杈撳叆鏄惁瀛樺湪
        if (previewId != null) {
            try {
                /*
                鍦ㄥ疄闄呭疄鐜颁腑锛岄渶瑕佹牴鎹甅inecraft API瀹炵幇浠ヤ笅鎿嶄綔:
                1. 鑾峰彇鎸囧畾ID鐨勯瑙?
                2. 璁剧疆棰勮鐨勫彲瑙佹€?
                
                // 鑾峰彇棰勮鏄惁宸插瓨鍦?
                // boolean previewExists = PreviewManager.previewExists(previewId);
                boolean previewExists = true; // 鍋囪棰勮瀛樺湪
                
                if (previewExists) {
                    if (shouldHide) {
                        // 闅愯棌棰勮
                        // PreviewManager.hidePreview(previewId);
                    } else {
                        // 鏄剧ず棰勮
                        // PreviewManager.showPreview(previewId);
                    }
                    
                    isHidden = shouldHide;
                    this.isHidden = isHidden;
                    success = true;
                }
                */
                
                // 妯℃嫙鎿嶄綔 (鍦ㄥ疄闄呭疄鐜颁腑鏇挎崲涓轰笂闈㈢殑閫昏緫)
                isHidden = shouldHide;
                this.isHidden = isHidden;
                success = true;
                
                // 鎵撳嵃璋冭瘯淇℃伅
                System.out.println("妯℃嫙" + (isHidden ? "闅愯棌" : "鏄剧ず") + "棰勮锛孖D: " + previewId);
            } catch (Exception e) {
                success = false;
                System.err.println("Error hiding/showing preview: " + e.getMessage());
            }
        }
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID, success);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_IS_HIDDEN_ID, isHidden);
    }
    
    // --- Getters/Setters for Properties ---
    
    public boolean isHidden() {
        return isHidden;
    }
    
    public void setHidden(boolean hidden) {
        isHidden = hidden;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    /**
     * 淇濆瓨鑺傜偣鐘舵€?
     */
    @Override
    public @Nullable Object getNodeState() {
        return isHidden;
    }
    
    /**
     * 鎭㈠鑺傜偣鐘舵€?
     */
    @Override
    public void setNodeState(@Nullable Object state) {
        if (state instanceof Boolean) {
            isHidden = (Boolean) state;
        }
    }
}

package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.visualization.preview;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.preview.PreviewManager;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.preview.PreviewOptions;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.util.Coordinate;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;

import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Preview Blocks 鑺傜偣: 鍦ㄤ笘鐣屼腑灏嗚緭鍏ョ殑 List<Coordinate> 鎴?List<MinecraftBlock> 棰勮涓?骞界伒鏂瑰潡"
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "visualization.preview.preview_blocks",
    displayName = "棰勮鏂瑰潡",
    description = "鍦ㄤ笘鐣屼腑灏嗚緭鍏ョ殑 List<Coordinate> 鎴?List<MinecraftBlock> 棰勮涓哄菇鐏垫柟鍧?,
    category = "visualization.preview"
)
public class PreviewBlocksNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 鑺傜偣灞炴€?---
    private String previewColor = "#3498db"; // 榛樿棰滆壊锛堝ぉ钃濊壊锛?    private float transparency = 0.5f; // 榛樿閫忔槑搴?    private int duration = 30; // 鎸佺画鏃堕棿锛堢锛?    private boolean showOutline = true; // 鏄惁鏄剧ず鏂瑰潡杞粨
    private UUID previewId = UUID.randomUUID(); // 棰勮瀹炰緥ID锛岀敤浜庢竻闄ら瑙?    private String description = "鍦ㄤ笘鐣屼腑灏嗚緭鍏ョ殑 List<Coordinate> 鎴?List<MinecraftBlock> 棰勮涓哄菇鐏垫柟鍧?;

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_BLOCKS_ID = "input_blocks";
    private static final String INPUT_COORDS_ID = "input_coords";
    private static final String INPUT_BLOCK_TYPE_ID = "input_block_type";
    private static final String INPUT_COLOR_ID = "input_color";
    private static final String INPUT_TRANSPARENCY_ID = "input_transparency";
    private static final String INPUT_DURATION_ID = "input_duration";
    private static final String INPUT_SHOW_OUTLINE_ID = "input_show_outline";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID = "output_success";
    private static final String OUTPUT_PREVIEW_ID_ID = "output_preview_id";
    private static final String OUTPUT_BLOCK_COUNT_ID = "output_block_count";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public PreviewBlocksNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "visualization.preview.preview_blocks");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_BLOCKS_ID, "Blocks", 
                "瑕侀瑙堢殑鏂瑰潡鍒楄〃", NodeDataType.LIST, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_COORDS_ID, "Coordinates", 
                "瑕侀瑙堟柟鍧楃殑鍧愭爣鍒楄〃", NodeDataType.LIST, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_BLOCK_TYPE_ID, "Block Type", 
                "鐢ㄤ簬鍧愭爣鍒楄〃鐨勬柟鍧楃被鍨嬶紙鑻ユ湭鎸囧畾锛屽垯浣跨敤'minecraft:stone'锛?, NodeDataType.STRING, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_COLOR_ID, "Color", 
                "棰勮棰滆壊锛堝崄鍏繘鍒讹紝濡?#FF0000'锛?, NodeDataType.STRING, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_TRANSPARENCY_ID, "Transparency", 
                "閫忔槑搴︼紙0.0-1.0锛?, NodeDataType.FLOAT, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_DURATION_ID, "Duration", 
                "棰勮鎸佺画鏃堕棿锛堢锛?, NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_SHOW_OUTLINE_ID, "Show Outline", 
                "鏄惁鏄剧ず鏂瑰潡杞粨", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID, "Success", 
                "鏄惁鎴愬姛鏄剧ず棰勮", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_PREVIEW_ID_ID, "Preview ID", 
                "棰勮瀹炰緥ID锛堢敤浜庡悗缁帶鍒讹級", NodeDataType.STRING, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_BLOCK_COUNT_ID, "Block Count", 
                "棰勮鐨勬柟鍧楁暟閲?, NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
    }

    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return this.description;
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 榛樿杈撳嚭鍊?        boolean success = false;
        String previewIdStr = previewId.toString();
        int blockCount = 0;
        
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?        Object blocksObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_BLOCKS_ID);
        Object coordsObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_COORDS_ID);
        Object blockTypeObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_BLOCK_TYPE_ID);
        Object colorObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_COLOR_ID);
        Object transparencyObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_TRANSPARENCY_ID);
        Object durationObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_DURATION_ID);
        Object showOutlineObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_SHOW_OUTLINE_ID);
        
        // 纭畾棰勮棰滆壊
        String previewColor = this.previewColor;
        if (colorObj instanceof String) {
            previewColor = (String) colorObj;
        }
        
        // 纭畾閫忔槑搴?        float transparency = this.transparency;
        if (transparencyObj instanceof Number) {
            transparency = Math.max(0.0f, Math.min(1.0f, ((Number) transparencyObj).floatValue()));
        }
        
        // 纭畾鎸佺画鏃堕棿
        int duration = this.duration;
        if (durationObj instanceof Number) {
            duration = Math.max(1, ((Number) durationObj).intValue());
        }
        
        // 纭畾鏄惁鏄剧ず杞粨
        boolean showOutline = this.showOutline;
        if (showOutlineObj instanceof Boolean) {
            showOutline = (Boolean) showOutlineObj;
        }
        
        // 纭畾榛樿鏂瑰潡绫诲瀷
        String defaultBlockType = "minecraft:stone";
        if (blockTypeObj instanceof String) {
            defaultBlockType = (String) blockTypeObj;
        }
        
        // 澶勭悊杈撳叆锛氭柟鍧楀垪琛ㄦ垨鍧愭爣鍒楄〃
        List<?> blocksList = null;
        List<?> coordsList = null;
        
        if (blocksObj instanceof List && !((List<?>) blocksObj).isEmpty()) {
            blocksList = (List<?>) blocksObj;
        }
        
        if (coordsObj instanceof List && !((List<?>) coordsObj).isEmpty()) {
            coordsList = (List<?>) coordsObj;
        }
        
        // 妫€鏌ュ繀瑕佺殑杈撳叆鏄惁瀛樺湪
        if (blocksList != null || coordsList != null) {
            try {
                // 浣跨敤鏂扮殑棰勮绯荤粺
                // 棣栧厛娓呴櫎鐜版湁棰勮
                PreviewManager.hideNodePreviews(getId().toString());
                
                List<Coordinate> coordinates = new ArrayList<>();
                
                // 澶勭悊鏂瑰潡鍒楄〃杈撳叆
                if (blocksList != null) {
                    for (Object obj : blocksList) {
                        // TODO: 澶勭悊 MinecraftBlock 绫诲瀷
                            blockCount++;
                    }
                }
                
                // 澶勭悊鍧愭爣鍒楄〃杈撳叆
                if (coordsList != null) {
                    for (Object obj : coordsList) {
                        if (obj instanceof Coordinate) {
                            coordinates.add((Coordinate) obj);
                            blockCount++;
                        }
                        // TODO: 澶勭悊鍏朵粬鍧愭爣绫诲瀷
                    }
                }
                
                // 搴旂敤棰勮
                if (!coordinates.isEmpty()) {
                    PreviewOptions options = new PreviewOptions()
                            .ghostBlockMode()
                            .setOpacity(transparency)
                            .setDuration(duration);
                    
                    if (previewColor != null && previewColor.startsWith("#")) {
                        // TODO: 瑙ｆ瀽棰滆壊瀛楃涓插苟璁剧疆
                    }
                    
                    String newPreviewId = PreviewManager.showGhostBlocks(getId().toString(), coordinates, options);
                    if (newPreviewId != null) {
                    success = true;
                    }
                }
                
                // 妯℃嫙棰勮鏂瑰潡 (鍦ㄥ疄闄呭疄鐜颁腑鏇挎崲涓轰笂闈㈢殑閫昏緫)
                if (blocksList != null) {
                    blockCount = blocksList.size();
                } else if (coordsList != null) {
                    blockCount = coordsList.size();
                }
                
                // 妯℃嫙鎴愬姛棰勮
                success = blockCount > 0;
                
                // 鎵撳嵃璋冭瘯淇℃伅
                System.out.println("妯℃嫙棰勮 " + blockCount + " 涓柟鍧楋紝棰滆壊: " + previewColor + 
                        "锛岄€忔槑搴? " + transparency + "锛屾寔缁? " + duration + " 绉? +
                        "锛屾樉绀鸿疆寤? " + showOutline);
            } catch (Exception e) {
                success = false;
                System.err.println("Error creating block preview: " + e.getMessage());
            }
        }
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID, success);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_PREVIEW_ID_ID, previewIdStr);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_BLOCK_COUNT_ID, blockCount);
    }
    
    // --- Getters/Setters for Properties ---
    
    public String getPreviewColor() {
        return previewColor;
    }
    
    public void setPreviewColor(String previewColor) {
        // 绠€鍗曢獙璇佸崄鍏繘鍒堕鑹?        if (previewColor != null && previewColor.matches("^#[0-9A-Fa-f]{6}$")) {
            this.previewColor = previewColor;
            markDirty();
        }
    }
    
    public float getTransparency() {
        return transparency;
    }
    
    public void setTransparency(float transparency) {
        this.transparency = Math.max(0.0f, Math.min(1.0f, transparency));
        markDirty();
    }
    
    public int getDuration() {
        return duration;
    }
    
    public void setDuration(int duration) {
        this.duration = Math.max(1, duration);
        markDirty();
    }
    
    public boolean isShowOutline() {
        return showOutline;
    }
    
    public void setShowOutline(boolean showOutline) {
        this.showOutline = showOutline;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    public UUID getPreviewId() {
        return previewId;
    }
    
    /**
     * 閲嶇疆棰勮ID锛堢敤浜庡垱寤烘柊鐨勯瑙堝疄渚嬶級
     */
    public void resetPreviewId() {
        previewId = UUID.randomUUID();
        markDirty();
    }
    
    /**
     * 淇濆瓨鑺傜偣鐘舵€?     */
    @Override
    public @Nullable Object getNodeState() {
        Object[] state = new Object[5];
        state[0] = previewColor;
        state[1] = transparency;
        state[2] = duration;
        state[3] = showOutline;
        state[4] = previewId.toString();
        return state;
    }
    
    /**
     * 鎭㈠鑺傜偣鐘舵€?     */
    @Override
    public void setNodeState(@Nullable Object state) {
        if (state instanceof Object[]) {
            Object[] objState = (Object[]) state;
            if (objState.length >= 5) {
                if (objState[0] instanceof String) {
                    setPreviewColor((String) objState[0]);
                }
                if (objState[1] instanceof Number) {
                    setTransparency(((Number) objState[1]).floatValue());
                }
                if (objState[2] instanceof Number) {
                    setDuration(((Number) objState[2]).intValue());
                }
                if (objState[3] instanceof Boolean) {
                    setShowOutline((Boolean) objState[3]);
                }
                if (objState[4] instanceof String) {
                    try {
                        previewId = UUID.fromString((String) objState[4]);
                    } catch (IllegalArgumentException e) {
                        resetPreviewId();
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.visualization.preview;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;

import java.util.List;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Preview Points 鑺傜偣: 棰勮鐐?(List<Position> 鎴?List<Coordinate>) 涓虹矑瀛愭垨灏忔爣璁?
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "visualization.preview.preview_points",
    displayName = "棰勮鐐?,
    description = "棰勮鐐?(List<Position> 鎴?List<Coordinate>) 涓虹矑瀛愭垨灏忔爣璁?,
    category = "visualization.preview"
)
public class PreviewPointsNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 鑺傜偣灞炴€?---
    private String previewColor = "#FF0000"; // 榛樿棰滆壊锛堢孩鑹诧級
    private float pointSize = 0.2f; // 鐐瑰ぇ灏忥紙鏂瑰潡鎴栫矑瀛愮殑澶у皬锛?
    private int duration = 30; // 鎸佺画鏃堕棿锛堢锛?
    private String particleType = "flame"; // 绮掑瓙绫诲瀷
    private boolean useParticles = true; // 鏄惁浣跨敤绮掑瓙鑰屼笉鏄皬鏂瑰潡
    private UUID previewId = UUID.randomUUID(); // 棰勮瀹炰緥ID
    private String description = "棰勮鐐?(List<Position> 鎴?List<Coordinate>) 涓虹矑瀛愭垨灏忔爣璁?;

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_POINTS_ID = "input_points";
    private static final String INPUT_COLOR_ID = "input_color";
    private static final String INPUT_POINT_SIZE_ID = "input_point_size";
    private static final String INPUT_DURATION_ID = "input_duration";
    private static final String INPUT_PARTICLE_TYPE_ID = "input_particle_type";
    private static final String INPUT_USE_PARTICLES_ID = "input_use_particles";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID = "output_success";
    private static final String OUTPUT_PREVIEW_ID_ID = "output_preview_id";
    private static final String OUTPUT_POINT_COUNT_ID = "output_point_count";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public PreviewPointsNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "visualization.preview.preview_points");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_POINTS_ID, "Points", 
                "瑕侀瑙堢殑鐐瑰垪琛?, NodeDataType.LIST, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_COLOR_ID, "Color", 
                "棰勮棰滆壊锛堝崄鍏繘鍒讹紝濡?#FF0000'锛?, NodeDataType.STRING, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_POINT_SIZE_ID, "Point Size", 
                "鐐瑰ぇ灏?, NodeDataType.FLOAT, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_DURATION_ID, "Duration", 
                "棰勮鎸佺画鏃堕棿锛堢锛?, NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_PARTICLE_TYPE_ID, "Particle Type", 
                "绮掑瓙绫诲瀷锛堝'flame', 'smoke', 'heart'绛夛級", NodeDataType.STRING, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_USE_PARTICLES_ID, "Use Particles", 
                "鏄惁浣跨敤绮掑瓙鑰屼笉鏄皬鏂瑰潡", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID, "Success", 
                "鏄惁鎴愬姛鏄剧ず棰勮", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_PREVIEW_ID_ID, "Preview ID", 
                "棰勮瀹炰緥ID锛堢敤浜庡悗缁帶鍒讹級", NodeDataType.STRING, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_POINT_COUNT_ID, "Point Count", 
                "棰勮鐨勭偣鏁伴噺", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
    }

    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return this.description;
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 榛樿杈撳嚭鍊?
        boolean success = false;
        String previewIdStr = previewId.toString();
        int pointCount = 0;
        
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object pointsObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_POINTS_ID);
        Object colorObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_COLOR_ID);
        Object pointSizeObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_POINT_SIZE_ID);
        Object durationObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_DURATION_ID);
        Object particleTypeObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_PARTICLE_TYPE_ID);
        Object useParticlesObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_USE_PARTICLES_ID);
        
        // 纭畾棰勮棰滆壊
        String previewColor = this.previewColor;
        if (colorObj instanceof String) {
            previewColor = (String) colorObj;
        }
        
        // 纭畾鐐瑰ぇ灏?
        float pointSize = this.pointSize;
        if (pointSizeObj instanceof Number) {
            pointSize = Math.max(0.05f, Math.min(2.0f, ((Number) pointSizeObj).floatValue()));
        }
        
        // 纭畾鎸佺画鏃堕棿
        int duration = this.duration;
        if (durationObj instanceof Number) {
            duration = Math.max(1, ((Number) durationObj).intValue());
        }
        
        // 纭畾绮掑瓙绫诲瀷
        String particleType = this.particleType;
        if (particleTypeObj instanceof String) {
            particleType = (String) particleTypeObj;
        }
        
        // 纭畾鏄惁浣跨敤绮掑瓙
        boolean useParticles = this.useParticles;
        if (useParticlesObj instanceof Boolean) {
            useParticles = (Boolean) useParticlesObj;
        }
        
        // 澶勭悊杈撳叆锛氱偣鍒楄〃
        List<?> pointsList = null;
        
        if (pointsObj instanceof List && !((List<?>) pointsObj).isEmpty()) {
            pointsList = (List<?>) pointsObj;
        }
        
        // 妫€鏌ュ繀瑕佺殑杈撳叆鏄惁瀛樺湪
        if (pointsList != null) {
            try {
                /*
                鍦ㄥ疄闄呭疄鐜颁腑锛岄渶瑕佹牴鎹甅inecraft API瀹炵幇浠ヤ笅鎿嶄綔:
                1. 娓呴櫎褰撳墠棰勮ID鐨勬墍鏈夐瑙?
                2. 澶勭悊杈撳叆鏁版嵁锛屾瀯寤洪瑙堢偣鍒楄〃
                3. 搴旂敤棰勮鏁堟灉
                
                // 棣栧厛娓呴櫎鐜版湁棰勮锛堝鏋滄湁锛?
                // PreviewManager.clearPreview(previewId);
                
                List<PreviewPoint> previewPoints = new ArrayList<>();
                
                // 澶勭悊鐐瑰垪琛ㄨ緭鍏?
                for (Object obj : pointsList) {
                    Vec3d position = null;
                    
                    if (obj instanceof Vec3d) {
                        position = (Vec3d) obj;
                    } else if (obj instanceof BlockPos) {
                        BlockPos pos = (BlockPos) obj;
                        position = new Vec3d(pos.getX() + 0.5, pos.getY() + 0.5, pos.getZ() + 0.5);
                    } else if (obj instanceof Coordinate) {
                        Coordinate coord = (Coordinate) obj;
                        position = new Vec3d(coord.getX(), coord.getY(), coord.getZ());
                    }
                    
                    if (position != null) {
                        previewPoints.add(new PreviewPoint(position, previewColor, pointSize));
                        pointCount++;
                    }
                }
                
                // 搴旂敤棰勮
                if (!previewPoints.isEmpty()) {
                    if (useParticles) {
                        // 浣跨敤绮掑瓙鏁堟灉
                        ParticleEffect particleEffect = getParticleEffect(particleType);
                        // PreviewManager.showParticlePoints(previewId, previewPoints, particleEffect, duration);
                    } else {
                        // 浣跨敤灏忔柟鍧楁爣璁?
                        // PreviewManager.showBlockPoints(previewId, previewPoints, duration);
                    }
                    success = true;
                }
                */
                
                // 妯℃嫙棰勮鐐?(鍦ㄥ疄闄呭疄鐜颁腑鏇挎崲涓轰笂闈㈢殑閫昏緫)
                pointCount = pointsList.size();
                
                // 妯℃嫙鎴愬姛棰勮
                success = pointCount > 0;
                
                // 鎵撳嵃璋冭瘯淇℃伅
                System.out.println("妯℃嫙棰勮 " + pointCount + " 涓偣锛岄鑹? " + previewColor + 
                        "锛屽ぇ灏? " + pointSize + "锛屾寔缁? " + duration + " 绉? +
                        "锛屼娇鐢ㄧ矑瀛? " + useParticles + (useParticles ? ("锛岀矑瀛愮被鍨? " + particleType) : ""));
            } catch (Exception e) {
                success = false;
                System.err.println("Error creating point preview: " + e.getMessage());
            }
        }
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID, success);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_PREVIEW_ID_ID, previewIdStr);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_POINT_COUNT_ID, pointCount);
    }
    
    // --- Getters/Setters for Properties ---
    
    public String getPreviewColor() {
        return previewColor;
    }
    
    public void setPreviewColor(String previewColor) {
        // 绠€鍗曢獙璇佸崄鍏繘鍒堕鑹?
        if (previewColor != null && previewColor.matches("^#[0-9A-Fa-f]{6}$")) {
            this.previewColor = previewColor;
            markDirty();
        }
    }
    
    public float getPointSize() {
        return pointSize;
    }
    
    public void setPointSize(float pointSize) {
        this.pointSize = Math.max(0.05f, Math.min(2.0f, pointSize));
        markDirty();
    }
    
    public int getDuration() {
        return duration;
    }
    
    public void setDuration(int duration) {
        this.duration = Math.max(1, duration);
        markDirty();
    }
    
    public String getParticleType() {
        return particleType;
    }
    
    public void setParticleType(String particleType) {
        if (isValidParticleType(particleType)) {
            this.particleType = particleType;
            markDirty();
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * 妫€鏌ョ矑瀛愮被鍨嬫槸鍚︽湁鏁?
     */
    private boolean isValidParticleType(String type) {
        if (type == null) return false;
        
        // 杩欓噷鍙槸绠€鍗曞垪涓句竴浜涘父瑙佺殑绮掑瓙绫诲瀷
        // 瀹為檯瀹炵幇涓簲璇ユ牴鎹甅inecraft鐨勭矑瀛愮郴缁熻繘琛岄獙璇?
        String[] validTypes = {
            "flame", "smoke", "cloud", "heart", "firework", "bubble", 
            "splash", "dust", "enchant", "portal", "end_rod", "totem"
        };
        
        for (String validType : validTypes) {
            if (validType.equals(type.toLowerCase())) {
                return true;
            }
        }
        
        return false;
    }
    
    public boolean isUseParticles() {
        return useParticles;
    }
    
    public void setUseParticles(boolean useParticles) {
        this.useParticles = useParticles;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    public UUID getPreviewId() {
        return previewId;
    }
    
    /**
     * 閲嶇疆棰勮ID锛堢敤浜庡垱寤烘柊鐨勯瑙堝疄渚嬶級
     */
    public void resetPreviewId() {
        previewId = UUID.randomUUID();
        markDirty();
    }
    
    /**
     * 淇濆瓨鑺傜偣鐘舵€?
     */
    @Override
    public @Nullable Object getNodeState() {
        Object[] state = new Object[6];
        state[0] = previewColor;
        state[1] = pointSize;
        state[2] = duration;
        state[3] = particleType;
        state[4] = useParticles;
        state[5] = previewId.toString();
        return state;
    }
    
    /**
     * 鎭㈠鑺傜偣鐘舵€?
     */
    @Override
    public void setNodeState(@Nullable Object state) {
        if (state instanceof Object[]) {
            Object[] objState = (Object[]) state;
            if (objState.length >= 6) {
                if (objState[0] instanceof String) {
                    setPreviewColor((String) objState[0]);
                }
                if (objState[1] instanceof Number) {
                    setPointSize(((Number) objState[1]).floatValue());
                }
                if (objState[2] instanceof Number) {
                    setDuration(((Number) objState[2]).intValue());
                }
                if (objState[3] instanceof String) {
                    setParticleType((String) objState[3]);
                }
                if (objState[4] instanceof Boolean) {
                    setUseParticles((Boolean) objState[4]);
                }
                if (objState[5] instanceof String) {
                    try {
                        previewId = UUID.fromString((String) objState[5]);
                    } catch (IllegalArgumentException e) {
                        resetPreviewId();
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.visualization.preview;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;

import java.util.List;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Preview Regions 鑺傜偣: 棰勮 List<Region> 涓虹嚎妗嗘垨鍗婇€忔槑浣?
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "visualization.preview.preview_regions",
    displayName = "棰勮鍖哄煙",
    description = "棰勮 List<Region> 涓虹嚎妗嗘垨鍗婇€忔槑浣?,
    category = "visualization.preview"
)
public class PreviewRegionsNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 鑺傜偣灞炴€?---
    private String regionColor = "#0000FF"; // 榛樿棰滆壊锛堣摑鑹诧級
    private float transparency = 0.3f; // 閫忔槑搴?
    private float lineWidth = 0.1f; // 绾挎瀹藉害
    private int duration = 30; // 鎸佺画鏃堕棿锛堢锛?
    private String displayMode = "both"; // 灞曠ず妯″紡锛?wireframe"锛堢嚎妗嗭級, "solid"锛堝崐閫忔槑锛? "both"锛堜袱鑰咃級
    private UUID previewId = UUID.randomUUID(); // 棰勮瀹炰緥ID
    private String description = "棰勮 List<Region> 涓虹嚎妗嗘垨鍗婇€忔槑浣?;

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_REGIONS_ID = "input_regions";
    private static final String INPUT_COLOR_ID = "input_color";
    private static final String INPUT_TRANSPARENCY_ID = "input_transparency";
    private static final String INPUT_LINE_WIDTH_ID = "input_line_width";
    private static final String INPUT_DURATION_ID = "input_duration";
    private static final String INPUT_DISPLAY_MODE_ID = "input_display_mode";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID = "output_success";
    private static final String OUTPUT_PREVIEW_ID_ID = "output_preview_id";
    private static final String OUTPUT_REGION_COUNT_ID = "output_region_count";
    private static final String OUTPUT_TOTAL_VOLUME_ID = "output_total_volume";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public PreviewRegionsNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "visualization.preview.preview_regions");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_REGIONS_ID, "Regions", 
                "瑕侀瑙堢殑鍖哄煙鍒楄〃", NodeDataType.LIST, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_COLOR_ID, "Color", 
                "鍖哄煙棰滆壊锛堝崄鍏繘鍒讹紝濡?#0000FF'锛?, NodeDataType.STRING, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_TRANSPARENCY_ID, "Transparency", 
                "閫忔槑搴︼紙0.0-1.0锛?, NodeDataType.FLOAT, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_LINE_WIDTH_ID, "Line Width", 
                "绾挎瀹藉害", NodeDataType.FLOAT, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_DURATION_ID, "Duration", 
                "棰勮鎸佺画鏃堕棿锛堢锛?, NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_DISPLAY_MODE_ID, "Display Mode", 
                "灞曠ず妯″紡锛坵ireframe, solid, both锛?, NodeDataType.STRING, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID, "Success", 
                "鏄惁鎴愬姛鏄剧ず棰勮", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_PREVIEW_ID_ID, "Preview ID", 
                "棰勮瀹炰緥ID锛堢敤浜庡悗缁帶鍒讹級", NodeDataType.STRING, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_REGION_COUNT_ID, "Region Count", 
                "棰勮鐨勫尯鍩熸暟閲?, NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_TOTAL_VOLUME_ID, "Total Volume", 
                "鎵€鏈夊尯鍩熺殑鎬讳綋绉?, NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
    }

    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return this.description;
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 榛樿杈撳嚭鍊?
        boolean success = false;
        String previewIdStr = previewId.toString();
        int regionCount = 0;
        int totalVolume = 0;
        
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object regionsObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_REGIONS_ID);
        Object colorObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_COLOR_ID);
        Object transparencyObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_TRANSPARENCY_ID);
        Object lineWidthObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_LINE_WIDTH_ID);
        Object durationObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_DURATION_ID);
        Object displayModeObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_DISPLAY_MODE_ID);
        
        // 纭畾鍖哄煙棰滆壊
        String regionColor = this.regionColor;
        if (colorObj instanceof String) {
            regionColor = (String) colorObj;
        }
        
        // 纭畾閫忔槑搴?
        float transparency = this.transparency;
        if (transparencyObj instanceof Number) {
            transparency = Math.max(0.0f, Math.min(1.0f, ((Number) transparencyObj).floatValue()));
        }
        
        // 纭畾绾挎瀹藉害
        float lineWidth = this.lineWidth;
        if (lineWidthObj instanceof Number) {
            lineWidth = Math.max(0.01f, Math.min(0.5f, ((Number) lineWidthObj).floatValue()));
        }
        
        // 纭畾鎸佺画鏃堕棿
        int duration = this.duration;
        if (durationObj instanceof Number) {
            duration = Math.max(1, ((Number) durationObj).intValue());
        }
        
        // 纭畾灞曠ず妯″紡
        String displayMode = this.displayMode;
        if (displayModeObj instanceof String) {
            displayMode = (String) displayModeObj;
            if (!isValidDisplayMode(displayMode)) {
                displayMode = this.displayMode;
            }
        }
        
        // 澶勭悊杈撳叆锛氬尯鍩熷垪琛?
        List<?> regionsList = null;
        
        if (regionsObj instanceof List && !((List<?>) regionsObj).isEmpty()) {
            regionsList = (List<?>) regionsObj;
        }
        
        // 妫€鏌ュ繀瑕佺殑杈撳叆鏄惁瀛樺湪
        if (regionsList != null) {
            try {
                /*
                鍦ㄥ疄闄呭疄鐜颁腑锛岄渶瑕佹牴鎹甅inecraft API瀹炵幇浠ヤ笅鎿嶄綔:
                1. 娓呴櫎褰撳墠棰勮ID鐨勬墍鏈夐瑙?
                2. 澶勭悊杈撳叆鏁版嵁锛屾瀯寤洪瑙堝尯鍩熷垪琛?
                3. 搴旂敤棰勮鏁堟灉
                
                // 棣栧厛娓呴櫎鐜版湁棰勮锛堝鏋滄湁锛?
                // PreviewManager.clearPreview(previewId);
                
                List<PreviewRegion> previewRegions = new ArrayList<>();
                
                // 澶勭悊鍖哄煙鍒楄〃
                for (Object obj : regionsList) {
                    if (obj instanceof Region) {
                        Region region = (Region) obj;
                        
                        // 璁＄畻鍖哄煙鐨勮捣鐐瑰拰缁堢偣鍧愭爣
                        BlockPos startPos = region.getMinPos();
                        BlockPos endPos = region.getMaxPos();
                        
                        // 璁＄畻浣撶Н
                        int volume = region.getVolume();
                        totalVolume += volume;
                        
                        previewRegions.add(new PreviewRegion(startPos, endPos, regionColor, transparency, lineWidth, displayMode));
                        regionCount++;
                    } else if (obj instanceof Box) {
                        // 濡傛灉鏄疊ox瀵硅薄
                        Box box = (Box) obj;
                        BlockPos startPos = new BlockPos(box.minX, box.minY, box.minZ);
                        BlockPos endPos = new BlockPos(box.maxX, box.maxY, box.maxZ);
                        
                        // 璁＄畻浣撶Н
                        int volume = (int)((box.maxX - box.minX) * (box.maxY - box.minY) * (box.maxZ - box.minZ));
                        totalVolume += volume;
                        
                        previewRegions.add(new PreviewRegion(startPos, endPos, regionColor, transparency, lineWidth, displayMode));
                        regionCount++;
                    } else if (obj instanceof Object[]) {
                        // 鍋囪鏄寘鍚袱涓綅缃殑鏁扮粍 [startPos, endPos]
                        Object[] posArray = (Object[]) obj;
                        if (posArray.length >= 2) {
                            BlockPos startPos = null;
                            BlockPos endPos = null;
                            
                            if (posArray[0] instanceof BlockPos) {
                                startPos = (BlockPos) posArray[0];
                            }
                            
                            if (posArray[1] instanceof BlockPos) {
                                endPos = (BlockPos) posArray[1];
                            }
                            
                            if (startPos != null && endPos != null) {
                                // 纭繚startPos鏄渶灏忓潗鏍囷紝endPos鏄渶澶у潗鏍?
                                BlockPos minPos = new BlockPos(
                                    Math.min(startPos.getX(), endPos.getX()),
                                    Math.min(startPos.getY(), endPos.getY()),
                                    Math.min(startPos.getZ(), endPos.getZ())
                                );
                                
                                BlockPos maxPos = new BlockPos(
                                    Math.max(startPos.getX(), endPos.getX()),
                                    Math.max(startPos.getY(), endPos.getY()),
                                    Math.max(startPos.getZ(), endPos.getZ())
                                );
                                
                                // 璁＄畻浣撶Н
                                int volume = (maxPos.getX() - minPos.getX() + 1) * 
                                           (maxPos.getY() - minPos.getY() + 1) * 
                                           (maxPos.getZ() - minPos.getZ() + 1);
                                totalVolume += volume;
                                
                                previewRegions.add(new PreviewRegion(minPos, maxPos, regionColor, transparency, lineWidth, displayMode));
                                regionCount++;
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
                
                // 搴旂敤棰勮
                if (!previewRegions.isEmpty()) {
                    // PreviewManager.showRegions(previewId, previewRegions, duration);
                    success = true;
                }
                */
                
                // 妯℃嫙棰勮鍖哄煙 (鍦ㄥ疄闄呭疄鐜颁腑鏇挎崲涓轰笂闈㈢殑閫昏緫)
                regionCount = regionsList.size();
                totalVolume = regionCount * 100; // 鍋囪姣忎釜鍖哄煙骞冲潎浣撶Н涓?00涓柟鍧?
                
                // 妯℃嫙鎴愬姛棰勮
                success = regionCount > 0;
                
                // 鎵撳嵃璋冭瘯淇℃伅
                System.out.println("妯℃嫙棰勮 " + regionCount + " 涓尯鍩燂紝鎬讳綋绉? " + totalVolume + 
                        "锛岄鑹? " + regionColor + "锛岄€忔槑搴? " + transparency + 
                        "锛岀嚎妗嗗搴? " + lineWidth + "锛屾寔缁? " + duration + " 绉? +
                        "锛屽睍绀烘ā寮? " + displayMode);
            } catch (Exception e) {
                success = false;
                System.err.println("Error creating region preview: " + e.getMessage());
            }
        }
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID, success);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_PREVIEW_ID_ID, previewIdStr);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_REGION_COUNT_ID, regionCount);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_TOTAL_VOLUME_ID, totalVolume);
    }
    
    // --- Getters/Setters for Properties ---
    
    public String getRegionColor() {
        return regionColor;
    }
    
    public void setRegionColor(String regionColor) {
        // 绠€鍗曢獙璇佸崄鍏繘鍒堕鑹?
        if (regionColor != null && regionColor.matches("^#[0-9A-Fa-f]{6}$")) {
            this.regionColor = regionColor;
            markDirty();
        }
    }
    
    public float getTransparency() {
        return transparency;
    }

        this.transparency = Math.max(0.0f, Math.min(1.0f, transparency));
        markDirty();
    }
    
    public float getLineWidth() {
        return lineWidth;
    }
    
    public void setLineWidth(float lineWidth) {
        this.lineWidth = Math.max(0.01f, Math.min(0.5f, lineWidth));
        markDirty();
    }

        return duration;
    }
    
    public void setDuration(int duration) {
        this.duration = Math.max(1, duration);
        markDirty();
    }
    
    public String getDisplayMode() {
        return displayMode;
    }

        if (isValidDisplayMode(displayMode)) {
            this.displayMode = displayMode;
            markDirty();
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * 妫€鏌ュ睍绀烘ā寮忔槸鍚︽湁鏁?
     */
    private boolean isValidDisplayMode(String mode) {
        if (mode == null) return false;
        
        return "wireframe".equals(mode) || "solid".equals(mode) || "both".equals(mode);
    }
    
    public UUID getPreviewId() {
        return previewId;
    }
    
    /**
     * 閲嶇疆棰勮ID锛堢敤浜庡垱寤烘柊鐨勯瑙堝疄渚嬶級
     */
    public void resetPreviewId() {
        previewId = UUID.randomUUID();
        markDirty();
    }
    
    /**
     * 淇濆瓨鑺傜偣鐘舵€?
     */
    @Override
    public @Nullable Object getNodeState() {
        Object[] state = new Object[6];
        state[0] = regionColor;
        state[1] = transparency;
        state[2] = lineWidth;
        state[3] = duration;
        state[4] = displayMode;
        state[5] = previewId.toString();

    /**
     * 鎭㈠鑺傜偣鐘舵€?
     */
    @Override
    public void setNodeState(@Nullable Object state) {
        if (state instanceof Object[]) {
            Object[] objState = (Object[]) state;
            if (objState.length >= 6) {
                if (objState[0] instanceof String) {
                    setRegionColor((String) objState[0]);
                }
                if (objState[1] instanceof Number) {
                    setTransparency(((Number) objState[1]).floatValue());
                }
                if (objState[2] instanceof Number) {
                    setLineWidth(((Number) objState[2]).floatValue());
                }
                if (objState[3] instanceof Number) {
                    setDuration(((Number) objState[3]).intValue());
                }
                if (objState[4] instanceof String) {
                    setDisplayMode((String) objState[4]);
                }
                if (objState[5] instanceof String) {
                    try {
                        previewId = UUID.fromString((String) objState[5]);
                    } catch (IllegalArgumentException e) {
                        resetPreviewId();
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.visualization.preview;

/**
 * Preview Vectors 鑺傜偣: 棰勮 List<Vector> 涓哄甫绠ご鐨勭嚎
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "visualization.preview.preview_vectors",
    displayName = "棰勮鍚戦噺",
    description = "棰勮 List<Vector> 涓哄甫绠ご鐨勭嚎",
    category = "visualization.preview"
)
public class PreviewVectorsNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 鑺傜偣灞炴€?---

    private float arrowSize = 0.3f; // 绠ご澶у皬

    private boolean showArrows = true; // 鏄惁鏄剧ず绠ご
    private UUID previewId = UUID.randomUUID(); // 棰勮瀹炰緥ID
    private String description = "棰勮 List<Vector> 涓哄甫绠ご鐨勭嚎";

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_VECTORS_ID = "input_vectors";

    private static final String INPUT_DURATION_ID = "input_duration";
    private static final String INPUT_SHOW_ARROWS_ID = "input_show_arrows";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---

    private static final String OUTPUT_PREVIEW_ID_ID = "output_preview_id";
    private static final String OUTPUT_VECTOR_COUNT_ID = "output_vector_count";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public PreviewVectorsNode() {

        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_COLOR_ID, "Color", 
                "绾挎潯棰滆壊锛堝崄鍏繘鍒讹紝濡?#00FF00'锛?, NodeDataType.STRING, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_LINE_WIDTH_ID, "Line Width",

        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_DURATION_ID, "Duration", 
                "棰勮鎸佺画鏃堕棿锛堢锛?, NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));

    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return this.description;
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 榛樿杈撳嚭鍊?
        boolean success = false;
        String previewIdStr = previewId.toString();
        int vectorCount = 0;
        
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object vectorsObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_VECTORS_ID);
        Object startPointsObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_START_POINTS_ID);
        Object colorObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_COLOR_ID);
        Object lineWidthObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_LINE_WIDTH_ID);
        Object arrowSizeObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_ARROW_SIZE_ID);
        Object durationObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_DURATION_ID);
        Object showArrowsObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_SHOW_ARROWS_ID);
        
        // 纭畾绾挎潯棰滆壊
        String lineColor = this.lineColor;
        if (colorObj instanceof String) {
            lineColor = (String) colorObj;
        }
        
        // 纭畾绾垮搴?
        float lineWidth = this.lineWidth;
        if (lineWidthObj instanceof Number) {
            lineWidth = Math.max(0.01f, Math.min(1.0f, ((Number) lineWidthObj).floatValue()));
        }
        
        // 纭畾绠ご澶у皬
        float arrowSize = this.arrowSize;
        if (arrowSizeObj instanceof Number) {
            arrowSize = Math.max(0.1f, Math.min(1.0f, ((Number) arrowSizeObj).floatValue()));
        }
        
        // 纭畾鎸佺画鏃堕棿
        int duration = this.duration;
        if (durationObj instanceof Number) {
            duration = Math.max(1, ((Number) durationObj).intValue());
        }
        
        // 纭畾鏄惁鏄剧ず绠ご
        boolean showArrows = this.showArrows;
        if (showArrowsObj instanceof Boolean) {
            showArrows = (Boolean) showArrowsObj;
        }
        
        // 澶勭悊杈撳叆锛氬悜閲忓垪琛ㄥ拰璧风偣鍒楄〃
        List<?> vectorsList = null;
        List<?> startPointsList = null;
        
        if (vectorsObj instanceof List && !((List<?>) vectorsObj).isEmpty()) {
            vectorsList = (List<?>) vectorsObj;
        }
        
        if (startPointsObj instanceof List && !((List<?>) startPointsObj).isEmpty()) {
            startPointsList = (List<?>) startPointsObj;
        }
        
        // 妫€鏌ュ繀瑕佺殑杈撳叆鏄惁瀛樺湪
        if (vectorsList != null) {
            try {
                /*
                鍦ㄥ疄闄呭疄鐜颁腑锛岄渶瑕佹牴鎹甅inecraft API瀹炵幇浠ヤ笅鎿嶄綔:
                1. 娓呴櫎褰撳墠棰勮ID鐨勬墍鏈夐瑙?
                2. 澶勭悊杈撳叆鏁版嵁锛屾瀯寤洪瑙堝悜閲忓垪琛?
                3. 搴旂敤棰勮鏁堟灉
                
                // 棣栧厛娓呴櫎鐜版湁棰勮锛堝鏋滄湁锛?
                // PreviewManager.clearPreview(previewId);
                
                List<PreviewVector> previewVectors = new ArrayList<>();
                
                // 澶勭悊鍚戦噺鍒楄〃鍜岃捣鐐瑰垪琛?
                for (int i = 0; i < vectorsList.size(); i++) {
                    Object vectorObj = vectorsList.get(i);
                    Vec3d vector = null;
                    Vec3d startPoint = new Vec3d(0, 0, 0); // 榛樿璧风偣涓哄師鐐?
                    
                    // 鑾峰彇鍚戦噺
                    if (vectorObj instanceof Vec3d) {
                        vector = (Vec3d) vectorObj;
                    }
                    
                    // 鑾峰彇璧风偣锛堝鏋滄湁锛?
                    if (startPointsList != null && i < startPointsList.size()) {
                        Object startObj = startPointsList.get(i);
                        if (startObj instanceof Vec3d) {
                            startPoint = (Vec3d) startObj;
                        } else if (startObj instanceof BlockPos) {
                            BlockPos pos = (BlockPos) startObj;
                            startPoint = new Vec3d(pos.getX() + 0.5, pos.getY() + 0.5, pos.getZ() + 0.5);
                        } else if (startObj instanceof Coordinate) {
                            Coordinate coord = (Coordinate) startObj;
                            startPoint = new Vec3d(coord.getX(), coord.getY(), coord.getZ());
                        }
                    } else if (i > 0 && previewVectors.size() > 0) {
                        // 濡傛灉娌℃湁鎻愪緵璧风偣锛屼笖涓嶆槸绗竴涓悜閲忥紝鍒欎娇鐢ㄤ笂涓€涓悜閲忕殑缁堢偣浣滀负璧风偣
                        PreviewVector prevVector = previewVectors.get(i - 1);
                        startPoint = prevVector.getEndPoint();
                    }
                    
                    if (vector != null) {
                        // 鍒涘缓棰勮鍚戦噺
                        Vec3d endPoint = new Vec3d(
                            startPoint.x + vector.x,
                            startPoint.y + vector.y,
                            startPoint.z + vector.z
                        );
                        
                        previewVectors.add(new PreviewVector(startPoint, endPoint, lineColor, lineWidth, arrowSize, showArrows));
                        vectorCount++;
                    }
                }
                
                // 搴旂敤棰勮
                if (!previewVectors.isEmpty()) {
                    // PreviewManager.showVectors(previewId, previewVectors, duration);
                    success = true;
                }
                */
                
                // 妯℃嫙棰勮鍚戦噺 (鍦ㄥ疄闄呭疄鐜颁腑鏇挎崲涓轰笂闈㈢殑閫昏緫)
                vectorCount = vectorsList.size();
                
                // 妯℃嫙鎴愬姛棰勮
                success = vectorCount > 0;
                
                // 鎵撳嵃璋冭瘯淇℃伅
                System.out.println("妯℃嫙棰勮 " + vectorCount + " 涓悜閲忥紝棰滆壊: " + lineColor + 
                        "锛岀嚎瀹? " + lineWidth + "锛岀澶村ぇ灏? " + arrowSize +
                        "锛屾寔缁? " + duration + " 绉掞紝鏄剧ず绠ご: " + showArrows);
            } catch (Exception e) {
                success = false;
                System.err.println("Error creating vector preview: " + e.getMessage());
            }
        }
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID, success);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_PREVIEW_ID_ID, previewIdStr);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_VECTOR_COUNT_ID, vectorCount);
    }
    
    // --- Getters/Setters for Properties ---
    
    public String getLineColor() {
        return lineColor;
    }
    
    public void setLineColor(String lineColor) {
        // 绠€鍗曢獙璇佸崄鍏繘鍒堕鑹?
        if (lineColor != null && lineColor.matches("^#[0-9A-Fa-f]{6}$")) {
            this.lineColor = lineColor;
            markDirty();
        }
    }
    
    public float getLineWidth() {
        return lineWidth;
    }
    
    public void setLineWidth(float lineWidth) {
        this.lineWidth = Math.max(0.01f, Math.min(1.0f, lineWidth));
        markDirty();
    }
    
    public float getArrowSize() {
        return arrowSize;
    }
    
    public void setArrowSize(float arrowSize) {
        this.arrowSize = Math.max(0.1f, Math.min(1.0f, arrowSize));
        markDirty();
    }
    
    public int getDuration() {
        return duration;
    }
    
    public void setDuration(int duration) {
        this.duration = Math.max(1, duration);
        markDirty();
    }
    
    public boolean isShowArrows() {
        return showArrows;
    }
    
    public void setShowArrows(boolean showArrows) {
        this.showArrows = showArrows;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    public UUID getPreviewId() {
        return previewId;
    }
    
    /**
     * 閲嶇疆棰勮ID锛堢敤浜庡垱寤烘柊鐨勯瑙堝疄渚嬶級
     */
    public void resetPreviewId() {
        previewId = UUID.randomUUID();
        markDirty();
    }
    
    /**
     * 淇濆瓨鑺傜偣鐘舵€?
     */
    @Override
    public @Nullable Object getNodeState() {
        Object[] state = new Object[6];
        state[0] = lineColor;
        state[1] = lineWidth;
        state[2] = arrowSize;
        state[3] = duration;
        state[4] = showArrows;
        state[5] = previewId.toString();
        return state;
    }
    
    /**
     * 鎭㈠鑺傜偣鐘舵€?
     */
    @Override
    public void setNodeState(@Nullable Object state) {
        if (state instanceof Object[]) {
            Object[] objState = (Object[]) state;
            if (objState.length >= 6) {
                if (objState[0] instanceof String) {
                    setLineColor((String) objState[0]);
                }
                if (objState[1] instanceof Number) {
                    setLineWidth(((Number) objState[1]).floatValue());
                }
                if (objState[2] instanceof Number) {
                    setArrowSize(((Number) objState[2]).floatValue());
                }
                if (objState[3] instanceof Number) {
                    setDuration(((Number) objState[3]).intValue());
                }
                if (objState[4] instanceof Boolean) {
                    setShowArrows((Boolean) objState[4]);
                }
                if (objState[5] instanceof String) {
                    try {
                        previewId = UUID.fromString((String) objState[5]);
                    } catch (IllegalArgumentException e) {
                        resetPreviewId();
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.world.entity;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import net.minecraft.util.math.BlockPos;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import org.joml.Vector3d;

import java.util.List;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Entity Teleport 鑺傜偣: 灏嗗疄浣撲紶閫佸埌鎸囧畾鍧愭爣
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "world.entity.entity_teleport",
    displayName = "浼犻€佸疄浣?,
    description = "浼犻€佸疄浣?,
    category = "world.entity"
)
public class EntityTeleportNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 鑺傜偣灞炴€?---
    private boolean preserveRotation = true; // 鏄惁淇濈暀瀹炰綋鐨勫師鏈夋棆杞?
    private boolean resetFallDistance = true; // 鏄惁閲嶇疆鍧犺惤璺濈
    private boolean allowAcrossDimension = false; // 鏄惁鍏佽璺ㄧ淮搴︿紶閫?
    private String description = "灏嗗疄浣撲紶閫佸埌鎸囧畾浣嶇疆";

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_ENTITY_ID = "input_entity";
    private static final String INPUT_ENTITY_LIST_ID = "input_entity_list";
    private static final String INPUT_DESTINATION_ID = "input_destination";
    private static final String INPUT_PRESERVE_ROTATION_ID = "input_preserve_rotation";
    private static final String INPUT_ROTATION_YAW_ID = "input_rotation_yaw";
    private static final String INPUT_ROTATION_PITCH_ID = "input_rotation_pitch";
    private static final String INPUT_DIMENSION_ID = "input_dimension";
    private static final String INPUT_RESET_FALL_DISTANCE_ID = "input_reset_fall_distance";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_SUCCESS_COUNT_ID = "output_success_count";
    private static final String OUTPUT_TOTAL_COUNT_ID = "output_total_count";
    private static final String OUTPUT_ALL_SUCCESS_ID = "output_all_success";
    private static final String OUTPUT_TELEPORTED_ENTITIES_ID = "output_teleported_entities";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public EntityTeleportNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "world.entity.entity_teleport");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_ENTITY_ID, "Entity", 
                "瑕佷紶閫佺殑鍗曚釜瀹炰綋", NodeDataType.MINECRAFT_ENTITY, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_ENTITY_LIST_ID, "Entity List", 
                "瑕佷紶閫佺殑瀹炰綋鍒楄〃", NodeDataType.LIST, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_DESTINATION_ID, "Destination", 
                "鐩爣浣嶇疆", NodeDataType.POSITION, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_PRESERVE_ROTATION_ID, "Preserve Rotation", 
                "鏄惁淇濈暀鍘熸湁鏃嬭浆", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_ROTATION_YAW_ID, "Yaw", 
                "姘村钩鏃嬭浆瑙掑害", NodeDataType.FLOAT, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_ROTATION_PITCH_ID, "Pitch", 
                "鍨傜洿鏃嬭浆瑙掑害", NodeDataType.FLOAT, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_DIMENSION_ID, "Dimension", 
                "鐩爣缁村害ID", NodeDataType.STRING, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_RESET_FALL_DISTANCE_ID, "Reset Fall Distance", 
                "鏄惁閲嶇疆鍧犺惤璺濈", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));

        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_COUNT_ID, "Success Count",

        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_TOTAL_COUNT_ID, "Total Count", 
                "灏濊瘯浼犻€佺殑瀹炰綋鎬绘暟", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_ALL_SUCCESS_ID, "All Success", 
                "鏄惁鎵€鏈夊疄浣撻兘鎴愬姛浼犻€?, NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_TELEPORTED_ENTITIES_ID, "Teleported Entities", 
                "鎴愬姛浼犻€佺殑瀹炰綋鍒楄〃", NodeDataType.LIST, this));
    }

    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return this.description;
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 榛樿杈撳嚭鍊?
        int successCount = 0;
        int totalCount = 0;
        boolean allSuccess = true;
        List<Object> teleportedEntities = new java.util.ArrayList<>();
        
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object entityObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_ENTITY_ID);
        Object entityListObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_ENTITY_LIST_ID);
        Object destinationObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_DESTINATION_ID);
        Object dimensionObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_DIMENSION_ID);
        
        // 鑾峰彇甯冨皵鍊煎弬鏁?
        boolean preserveRotationValue = this.preserveRotation;
        Object preserveRotationObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_PRESERVE_ROTATION_ID);
        if (preserveRotationObj instanceof Boolean) {
            preserveRotationValue = (Boolean) preserveRotationObj;
        }
        
        boolean resetFallDistanceValue = this.resetFallDistance;
        Object resetFallDistanceObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_RESET_FALL_DISTANCE_ID);
        if (resetFallDistanceObj instanceof Boolean) {
            resetFallDistanceValue = (Boolean) resetFallDistanceObj;
        }
        
        // 鑾峰彇鏃嬭浆瑙掑害
        float yaw = 0.0f;
        Object yawObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_ROTATION_YAW_ID);
        if (yawObj instanceof Number) {
            yaw = ((Number) yawObj).floatValue();
        }
        
        float pitch = 0.0f;
        Object pitchObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_ROTATION_PITCH_ID);
        if (pitchObj instanceof Number) {
            pitch = ((Number) pitchObj).floatValue();
        }
        
        // 妫€鏌ユ墽琛屼笂涓嬫枃鍜屽繀瑕佽緭鍏ユ槸鍚︽湁鏁?
        if (context != null && context.getWorld() != null && destinationObj != null) {
            // 鍒涘缓瑕佸鐞嗙殑瀹炰綋鍒楄〃
            List<Object> entitiesToTeleport = new java.util.ArrayList<>();
            
            // 娣诲姞鍗曚釜瀹炰綋
            if (entityObj != null) {
                entitiesToTeleport.add(entityObj);
            }
            
            // 娣诲姞瀹炰綋鍒楄〃
            if (entityListObj instanceof List) {
                List<?> entityList = (List<?>) entityListObj;
                entitiesToTeleport.addAll(entityList);
            }
            
            // 澶勭悊鐩爣浣嶇疆
            double x = 0.0, y = 0.0, z = 0.0;
            
            if (destinationObj instanceof Vector3d) {
                Vector3d pos = (Vector3d) destinationObj;
                x = pos.x;
                y = pos.y;
                z = pos.z;
            } else if (destinationObj instanceof BlockPos) {
                BlockPos pos = (BlockPos) destinationObj;
                x = pos.getX() + 0.5; // 涓績瀵归綈
                y = pos.getY();
                z = pos.getZ() + 0.5; // 涓績瀵归綈
            }
            
            // 澶勭悊缁村害
            String dimension = null;
            if (dimensionObj instanceof String) {
                dimension = (String) dimensionObj;
            }
            
            // 閬嶅巻瀹炰綋杩涜浼犻€?
            for (Object entity : entitiesToTeleport) {
                totalCount++;
                
                try {
                    // 鍦ㄥ疄闄呭疄鐜颁腑浼犻€佸疄浣?
                    /*
                    if (entity instanceof Entity) {
                        Entity minecraftEntity = (Entity) entity;
                        
                        // 濡傛灉闇€瑕佽法缁村害浼犻€?
                        if (dimension != null && !dimension.isEmpty() && allowAcrossDimension) {
                            RegistryKey<World> targetDimension = RegistryKey.getOrCreateKey(
                                Registry.WORLD_KEY, new ResourceLocation(dimension));
                            
                            if (minecraftEntity.world.getRegistryKey() != targetDimension) {
                                // 澶勭悊璺ㄧ淮搴︿紶閫?
                                ServerWorld targetWorld = minecraftEntity.getServer().getWorld(targetDimension);
                                if (targetWorld != null && minecraftEntity instanceof ServerPlayerEntity) {
                                    ServerPlayerEntity player = (ServerPlayerEntity) minecraftEntity;
                                    player.teleport(targetWorld, x, y, z, 
                                                   preserveRotationValue ? player.rotationYaw : yaw, 
                                                   preserveRotationValue ? player.rotationPitch : pitch);
                                    if (resetFallDistanceValue) {
                                        player.fallDistance = 0.0f;
                                    }
                                    successCount++;
                                    teleportedEntities.add(minecraftEntity);
                                    continue;
                                }
                            }
                        }
