                        boolean teleportSuccess = minecraftEntity.teleport(x, y, z);
                        
                        // 璁剧疆鏃嬭浆
                        if (!preserveRotationValue) {
                            minecraftEntity.rotationYaw = yaw;
                            minecraftEntity.rotationPitch = pitch;
                            minecraftEntity.setRotationYawHead(yaw);
                        }
                        
                        // 閲嶇疆鍧犺惤璺濈
                        if (resetFallDistanceValue) {
                            minecraftEntity.fallDistance = 0.0f;
                        }
                        
                        if (teleportSuccess) {
                            successCount++;
                            teleportedEntities.add(minecraftEntity);
                        } else {
                            allSuccess = false;
                        }
                    }
                    */
                    
                    // 妯℃嫙鎴愬姛浼犻€?
                    successCount++;
                    teleportedEntities.add(entity);
                } catch (Exception e) {
                    // 璁板綍閿欒
                    allSuccess = false;
                    System.err.println("Error teleporting entity: " + e.getMessage());
                }
            }
        }
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_COUNT_ID, successCount);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_TOTAL_COUNT_ID, totalCount);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_ALL_SUCCESS_ID, allSuccess);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_TELEPORTED_ENTITIES_ID, teleportedEntities);
    }
    
    // --- Getters/Setters for Properties ---
    
    public boolean isPreserveRotation() {
        return preserveRotation;
    }
    
    public void setPreserveRotation(boolean preserveRotation) {
        this.preserveRotation = preserveRotation;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    public boolean isResetFallDistance() {
        return resetFallDistance;
    }
    
    public void setResetFallDistance(boolean resetFallDistance) {
        this.resetFallDistance = resetFallDistance;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    public boolean isAllowAcrossDimension() {
        return allowAcrossDimension;
    }
    
    public void setAllowAcrossDimension(boolean allowAcrossDimension) {
        this.allowAcrossDimension = allowAcrossDimension;
        markDirty();
    }
}

package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.world.entity;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;

import java.util.List;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Remove Entities 鑺傜偣: 绉婚櫎瀹炰綋銆?
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "world.entity.remove_entities",
    displayName = "绉婚櫎瀹炰綋",
    description = "绉婚櫎瀹炰綋",
    category = "world.entity"
)
public class RemoveEntitiesNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 鑺傜偣灞炴€?---
    private boolean dropItems = false; // 绉婚櫎瀹炰綋鏃舵槸鍚︽帀钀界墿鍝?
    private String description = "绉婚櫎鎸囧畾鐨勫疄浣撴垨瀹炰綋鍒楄〃";

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_ENTITY_ID = "input_entity";
    private static final String INPUT_ENTITY_LIST_ID = "input_entity_list";
    private static final String INPUT_ENTITY_UUID_ID = "input_entity_uuid";
    private static final String INPUT_DROP_ITEMS_ID = "input_drop_items";
    private static final String INPUT_ENTITY_TYPE_ID = "input_entity_type";
    private static final String INPUT_MAX_COUNT_ID = "input_max_count";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_REMOVED_COUNT_ID = "output_removed_count";
    private static final String OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID = "output_success";
    private static final String OUTPUT_FAILED_ENTITIES_ID = "output_failed_entities";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public RemoveEntitiesNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "world.entity.remove_entities");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_ENTITY_ID, "Entity", 
                "瑕佺Щ闄ょ殑鍗曚釜瀹炰綋", NodeDataType.MINECRAFT_ENTITY, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_ENTITY_LIST_ID, "Entity List", 
                "瑕佺Щ闄ょ殑瀹炰綋鍒楄〃", NodeDataType.LIST, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_ENTITY_UUID_ID, "Entity UUID", 
                "瑕佺Щ闄ょ殑瀹炰綋UUID", NodeDataType.STRING, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_DROP_ITEMS_ID, "Drop Items", 
                "鏄惁鎺夎惤鐗╁搧", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_ENTITY_TYPE_ID, "Entity Type", 
                "瑕佺Щ闄ょ殑瀹炰綋绫诲瀷", NodeDataType.ENTITY_TYPE, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_MAX_COUNT_ID, "Max Count", 
                "鏈€澶хЩ闄ゆ暟閲?, NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_REMOVED_COUNT_ID, "Removed Count", 
                "鎴愬姛绉婚櫎鐨勫疄浣撴暟閲?, NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID, "Success", 
                "鏄惁鎴愬姛绉婚櫎鎵€鏈夊疄浣?, NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_FAILED_ENTITIES_ID, "Failed Entities", 
                "绉婚櫎澶辫触鐨勫疄浣撳垪琛?, NodeDataType.LIST, this));
    }

    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return this.description;
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 榛樿杈撳嚭鍊?
        int removedCount = 0;
        boolean success = false;
        List<Object> failedEntities = new java.util.ArrayList<>();
        
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object entityObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_ENTITY_ID);
        Object entityListObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_ENTITY_LIST_ID);
        Object entityUuidObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_ENTITY_UUID_ID);
        Object entityTypeObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_ENTITY_TYPE_ID);
        
        // 鑾峰彇甯冨皵鍊煎弬鏁?
        boolean dropItemsValue = this.dropItems;
        Object dropItemsObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_DROP_ITEMS_ID);
        if (dropItemsObj instanceof Boolean) {
            dropItemsValue = (Boolean) dropItemsObj;
        }
        
        // 鑾峰彇鏈€澶хЩ闄ゆ暟閲?
        int maxCount = Integer.MAX_VALUE;
        Object maxCountObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_MAX_COUNT_ID);
        if (maxCountObj instanceof Number) {
            maxCount = ((Number) maxCountObj).intValue();
            if (maxCount <= 0) {
                maxCount = Integer.MAX_VALUE;
            }
        }
        
        // 妫€鏌ユ墽琛屼笂涓嬫枃鏄惁鏈夋晥
        if (context != null && context.getWorld() != null) {
            // 鍒涘缓瑕佸鐞嗙殑瀹炰綋鍒楄〃
            List<Object> entitiesToRemove = new java.util.ArrayList<>();
            
            // 娣诲姞鍗曚釜瀹炰綋
            if (entityObj != null) {
                entitiesToRemove.add(entityObj);
            }
            
            // 娣诲姞瀹炰綋鍒楄〃
            if (entityListObj instanceof List) {
                List<?> entityList = (List<?>) entityListObj;
                entitiesToRemove.addAll(entityList);
            }
            
            // 閫氳繃UUID鏌ユ壘骞舵坊鍔犲疄浣?
            if (entityUuidObj instanceof String) {
                String uuid = (String) entityUuidObj;
                try {
                    UUID entityUUID = UUID.fromString(uuid);
                    // 鍦ㄥ疄闄呭疄鐜颁腑锛屾煡鎵惧苟娣诲姞瀹炰綋
                    // Entity entity = context.getWorld().getEntity(entityUUID);
                    // if (entity != null) {
                    //     entitiesToRemove.add(entity);
                    // }
                } catch (IllegalArgumentException e) {
                    System.err.println("Invalid UUID format: " + uuid);
                }
            }
            
            // 濡傛灉鎸囧畾浜嗗疄浣撶被鍨嬶紝鏌ユ壘鎵€鏈夎绫诲瀷鐨勫疄浣?
            if (entityTypeObj != null && (entitiesToRemove.isEmpty() || maxCount > entitiesToRemove.size())) {
                String entityType = entityTypeObj.toString();
                // 鍦ㄥ疄闄呭疄鐜颁腑锛岃幏鍙栨墍鏈夋寚瀹氱被鍨嬬殑瀹炰綋
                // 渚嬪锛歀ist<Entity> typedEntities = context.getWorld().getEntities(new EntityType.Builder().create(entityType));
                // int remainingSlots = maxCount - entitiesToRemove.size();
                // entitiesToRemove.addAll(typedEntities.subList(0, Math.min(typedEntities.size(), remainingSlots)));
            }
            
            // 闄愬埗绉婚櫎鏁伴噺
            if (entitiesToRemove.size() > maxCount) {
                entitiesToRemove = entitiesToRemove.subList(0, maxCount);
            }
            
            // 绉婚櫎瀹炰綋
            for (Object entity : entitiesToRemove) {
                try {
                    // 鍦ㄥ疄闄呭疄鐜颁腑绉婚櫎瀹炰綋
                    /*
                    if (entity instanceof Entity) {
                        Entity minecraftEntity = (Entity) entity;
                        
                        // 璁剧疆鏄惁鎺夎惤鐗╁搧
                        if (minecraftEntity instanceof LivingEntity) {
                            ((LivingEntity) minecraftEntity).setDropsItems(dropItemsValue);
                        }
                        
                        // 绉婚櫎瀹炰綋
                        minecraftEntity.remove();
                        removedCount++;
                    }
                    */
                    
                    // 妯℃嫙鎴愬姛绉婚櫎
                    removedCount++;
                } catch (Exception e) {
                    // 璁板綍澶辫触鐨勫疄浣?
                    failedEntities.add(entity);
                    System.err.println("Error removing entity: " + e.getMessage());
                }
            }
            
            // 妫€鏌ユ槸鍚﹀叏閮ㄦ垚鍔熺Щ闄?
            success = (removedCount == entitiesToRemove.size());
        }
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_REMOVED_COUNT_ID, removedCount);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID, success);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_FAILED_ENTITIES_ID, failedEntities);
    }
    
    // --- Getters/Setters for Properties ---
    
    public boolean isDropItems() {
        return dropItems;
    }
    
    public void setDropItems(boolean dropItems) {
        this.dropItems = dropItems;
        markDirty();
    }
}

package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.world.entity;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import net.minecraft.util.math.BlockPos;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import org.joml.Vector3d;

import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Spawn Entity 鑺傜偣: 鐢熸垚瀹炰綋銆?
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "world.entity.spawn_entity",
    displayName = "鐢熸垚瀹炰綋",
    description = "鐢熸垚瀹炰綋",
    category = "world.entity"
)
public class SpawnEntityNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 鑺傜偣灞炴€?---
    private boolean applyMotion = false; // 鏄惁璁剧疆瀹炰綋鍒濆閫熷害
    private boolean setNoAI = false; // 鏄惁绂佺敤AI
    private boolean setInvulnerable = false; // 鏄惁璁剧疆涓烘棤鏁?
    private boolean setPersistent = true; // 鏄惁璁剧疆涓烘寔涔呮€у疄浣擄紙涓嶄細鑷劧娑堝け锛?
    private String description = "鍦ㄦ寚瀹氬潗鏍囩敓鎴愬疄浣?;

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_POSITION_ID = "input_position";
    private static final String INPUT_ENTITY_TYPE_ID = "input_entity_type";
    private static final String INPUT_NBT_DATA_ID = "input_nbt_data";
    private static final String INPUT_MOTION_ID = "input_motion";
    private static final String INPUT_NO_AI_ID = "input_no_ai";
    private static final String INPUT_INVULNERABLE_ID = "input_invulnerable";
    private static final String INPUT_PERSISTENT_ID = "input_persistent";
    private static final String INPUT_ROTATION_YAW_ID = "input_rotation_yaw";
    private static final String INPUT_ROTATION_PITCH_ID = "input_rotation_pitch";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_ENTITY_ID = "output_entity";
    private static final String OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID = "output_success";
    private static final String OUTPUT_ENTITY_UUID_ID = "output_entity_uuid";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public SpawnEntityNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "world.entity.spawn_entity");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_POSITION_ID, "Position", 
                "鐢熸垚瀹炰綋鐨勪綅缃?, NodeDataType.POSITION, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_ENTITY_TYPE_ID, "Entity Type", 
                "瀹炰綋绫诲瀷", NodeDataType.ENTITY_TYPE, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_NBT_DATA_ID, "NBT Data", 
                "瀹炰綋鐨凬BT鏁版嵁", NodeDataType.NBT, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_MOTION_ID, "Motion", 
                "瀹炰綋鍒濆閫熷害鍚戦噺", NodeDataType.VECTOR, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_NO_AI_ID, "No AI", 
                "鏄惁绂佺敤AI", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_INVULNERABLE_ID, "Invulnerable", 
                "鏄惁璁剧疆涓烘棤鏁?, NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_PERSISTENT_ID, "Persistent", 
                "鏄惁璁剧疆涓烘寔涔呮€у疄浣?, NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_ROTATION_YAW_ID, "Yaw", 
                "姘村钩鏃嬭浆瑙掑害", NodeDataType.FLOAT, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_ROTATION_PITCH_ID, "Pitch", 
                "鍨傜洿鏃嬭浆瑙掑害", NodeDataType.FLOAT, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_ENTITY_ID, "Entity", 
                "鐢熸垚鐨勫疄浣?, NodeDataType.MINECRAFT_ENTITY, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID, "Success", 
                "鏄惁鎴愬姛鐢熸垚瀹炰綋", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_ENTITY_UUID_ID, "Entity UUID", 
                "鐢熸垚鐨勫疄浣揢UID", NodeDataType.STRING, this));
    }

    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return this.description;
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 榛樿杈撳嚭鍊?
        Object entityObj = null;
        boolean success = false;
        String entityUUID = "";
        
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object positionObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_POSITION_ID);
        Object entityTypeObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_ENTITY_TYPE_ID);
        Object nbtDataObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_NBT_DATA_ID);
        Object motionObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_MOTION_ID);
        
        // 鑾峰彇甯冨皵鍊煎弬鏁?
        boolean noAIValue = this.setNoAI;
        Object noAIObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_NO_AI_ID);
        if (noAIObj instanceof Boolean) {
            noAIValue = (Boolean) noAIObj;
        }
        
        boolean invulnerableValue = this.setInvulnerable;
        Object invulnerableObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_INVULNERABLE_ID);
        if (invulnerableObj instanceof Boolean) {
            invulnerableValue = (Boolean) invulnerableObj;
        }
        
        boolean persistentValue = this.setPersistent;
        Object persistentObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_PERSISTENT_ID);
        if (persistentObj instanceof Boolean) {
            persistentValue = (Boolean) persistentObj;
        }
        
        // 鑾峰彇鏃嬭浆瑙掑害
        float yaw = 0.0f; 
        Object yawObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_ROTATION_YAW_ID);
        if (yawObj instanceof Number) {
            yaw = ((Number) yawObj).floatValue();
        }
        
        float pitch = 0.0f;
        Object pitchObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_ROTATION_PITCH_ID);
        if (pitchObj instanceof Number) {
            pitch = ((Number) pitchObj).floatValue();
        }
        
        // 澶勭悊閫熷害鍚戦噺
        double motionX = 0.0;
        double motionY = 0.0;
        double motionZ = 0.0;
        
        if (applyMotion && motionObj instanceof Vector3d) {
            Vector3d motion = (Vector3d) motionObj;
            motionX = motion.x;
            motionY = motion.y;
            motionZ = motion.z;
        }
        
        // 妫€鏌ユ墽琛屼笂涓嬫枃鍜屽繀瑕佽緭鍏ユ槸鍚︽湁鏁?
        if (context != null && context.getWorld() != null && 
                positionObj != null && entityTypeObj != null) {
            // 澶勭悊浣嶇疆
            double x = 0.0, y = 0.0, z = 0.0;
            
            if (positionObj instanceof Vector3d) {
                Vector3d pos = (Vector3d) positionObj;
                x = pos.x;
                y = pos.y;
                z = pos.z;
            } else if (positionObj instanceof BlockPos) {
                BlockPos pos = (BlockPos) positionObj;
                x = pos.getX() + 0.5; // 涓績瀵归綈
                y = pos.getY();
                z = pos.getZ() + 0.5; // 涓績瀵归綈
            }
            
            try {
                // 鍦ㄥ疄闄呭疄鐜颁腑锛屽垱寤哄苟鐢熸垚瀹炰綋
                // 浠ヤ笅浠呬负绀轰緥浠ｇ爜锛岄渶瑕佹牴鎹甅inecraft API璋冩暣
                
                // 鑾峰彇瀹炰綋绫诲瀷
                String entityType = entityTypeObj.toString();
                
                // 鍒涘缓鍩虹NBT鏁版嵁
                // 鍦ㄥ疄闄呭疄鐜颁腑锛屽簲璇ヤ娇鐢∕inecraft鐨凬BT API鍒涘缓澶嶅悎鏍囩
                /*
                CompoundTag nbt = new CompoundTag();
                nbt.putString("id", entityType);
                nbt.putDouble("Pos", new ListTag().add(DoubleTag.of(x)).add(DoubleTag.of(y)).add(DoubleTag.of(z)));
                
                // 璁剧疆鏃嬭浆
                nbt.putFloat("Rotation", new ListTag().add(FloatTag.of(yaw)).add(FloatTag.of(pitch)));
                
                // 璁剧疆閫熷害
                if (applyMotion) {
                    nbt.putDouble("Motion", new ListTag().add(DoubleTag.of(motionX)).add(DoubleTag.of(motionY)).add(DoubleTag.of(motionZ)));
                }
                
                // 璁剧疆AI
                if (noAIValue) {
                    nbt.putByte("NoAI", (byte) 1);
                }
                
                // 璁剧疆鏃犳晫
                if (invulnerableValue) {
                    nbt.putByte("Invulnerable", (byte) 1);
                }
                
                // 璁剧疆鎸佷箙鎬?
                if (persistentValue) {
                    nbt.putByte("PersistenceRequired", (byte) 1);
                }
                
                // 鍚堝苟棰濆鐨凬BT鏁版嵁
                if (nbtDataObj instanceof CompoundTag) {
                    nbt.merge((CompoundTag) nbtDataObj);
                }
                
                // 鐢熸垚瀹炰綋
                Entity entity = EntityType.loadEntityWithPassengers(nbt, context.getWorld(), (loadedEntity) -> {
                    loadedEntity.setPos(x, y, z);
                    return loadedEntity;
                });
                
                if (entity != null) {
                    // 娣诲姞瀹炰綋鍒颁笘鐣?
                    success = context.getWorld().spawnEntity(entity);
                    if (success) {
                        entityObj = entity;
                        entityUUID = entity.getUuidAsString();
                    }
                }
                */
                
                // 妯℃嫙鎴愬姛
                success = true;
                entityObj = new Object(); // 妯℃嫙瀹炰綋瀵硅薄
                entityUUID = "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000"; // 妯℃嫙UUID
            } catch (Exception e) {
                // 璁板綍閿欒
                System.err.println("Error spawning entity: " + e.getMessage());
                success = false;
            }
        }
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_ENTITY_ID, entityObj);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID, success);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_ENTITY_UUID_ID, entityUUID);
    }
    
    // --- Getters/Setters for Properties ---
    
    public boolean isApplyMotion() {
        return applyMotion;
    }
    
    public void setApplyMotion(boolean applyMotion) {
        this.applyMotion = applyMotion;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    public boolean isSetNoAI() {
        return setNoAI;
    }
    
    public void setSetNoAI(boolean setNoAI) {
        this.setNoAI = setNoAI;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    public boolean isSetInvulnerable() {
        return setInvulnerable;
    }
    
    public void setSetInvulnerable(boolean setInvulnerable) {
        this.setInvulnerable = setInvulnerable;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    public boolean isSetPersistent() {
        return setPersistent;
    }
    
    public void setSetPersistent(boolean setPersistent) {
        this.setPersistent = setPersistent;
        markDirty();
    }
}

package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.world.interaction;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Apply Redstone Power 鑺傜偣: 搴旂敤绾㈢煶淇″彿銆?
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "world.interaction.apply_redstone_power",
    displayName = "搴旂敤绾㈢煶淇″彿",
    description = "搴旂敤绾㈢煶淇″彿",
    category = "world.interaction"
)
public class ApplyRedstonePowerNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 鑺傜偣灞炴€?---
    private int powerLevel = 15; // 榛樿鏈€澶х孩鐭宠兘閲?
    private int duration = 1; // 鎸佺画鏃堕棿锛堝埢锛?
    private String description = "鍦?Coordinate 妯℃嫙鏂藉姞绾㈢煶淇″彿";

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_COORDINATE_ID = "input_coordinate";
    private static final String INPUT_POWER_LEVEL_ID = "input_power_level";
    private static final String INPUT_DURATION_ID = "input_duration"; 
    private static final String INPUT_PLAY_SOUND_ID = "input_play_sound";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID = "output_success";
    private static final String OUTPUT_BLOCK_TYPE_ID = "output_block_type";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public ApplyRedstonePowerNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "world.interaction.apply_redstone_power");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_COORDINATE_ID, "Coordinate", 
                "鐩爣鍧愭爣", NodeDataType.COORDINATE, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_POWER_LEVEL_ID, "Power Level", 
                "绾㈢煶淇″彿寮哄害 (1-15)", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_DURATION_ID, "Duration", 
                "淇″彿鎸佺画鏃堕棿锛堝埢锛?, NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_PLAY_SOUND_ID, "Play Sound", 
                "鏄惁鎾斁绾㈢煶澹伴煶", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID, "Success", 
                "鏄惁鎴愬姛搴旂敤绾㈢煶淇″彿", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_BLOCK_TYPE_ID, "Block Type", 
                "鐩爣鏂瑰潡绫诲瀷", NodeDataType.STRING, this));
    }

    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return this.description;
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 榛樿杈撳嚭鍊?
        boolean success = false;
        String blockType = "";
        
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object coordinateObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_COORDINATE_ID);
        Object powerLevelObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_POWER_LEVEL_ID);
        Object durationObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_DURATION_ID);
        Object playSoundObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_PLAY_SOUND_ID);
        
        // 纭畾绾㈢煶鑳介噺绾у埆
        int powerLevel = this.powerLevel;
        if (powerLevelObj instanceof Number) {
            powerLevel = Math.max(0, Math.min(15, ((Number) powerLevelObj).intValue()));
        }
        
        // 纭畾鎸佺画鏃堕棿
        int duration = this.duration;
        if (durationObj instanceof Number) {
            duration = Math.max(1, ((Number) durationObj).intValue());
        }
        
        // 纭畾鏄惁鎾斁澹伴煶
        boolean playSound = true;
        if (playSoundObj instanceof Boolean) {
            playSound = (Boolean) playSoundObj;
        }
        
        // 妫€鏌ュ繀瑕佺殑杈撳叆鏄惁瀛樺湪
        if (coordinateObj != null) {
            try {
                /*
                鍦ㄥ疄闄呭疄鐜颁腑锛岄渶瑕佹牴鎹甅inecraft API瀹炵幇浠ヤ笅鎿嶄綔:
                1. 鑾峰彇鎸囧畾鍧愭爣鐨勬柟鍧?
                2. 搴旂敤绾㈢煶鑳介噺
                3. 璁剧疆涓€涓换鍔★紝鍦ㄦ寚瀹氱殑鏃堕棿鍚庡彇娑堢孩鐭宠兘閲?
                
                if (coordinateObj instanceof BlockPos) {
                    BlockPos pos = (BlockPos) coordinateObj;
                    ServerWorld world = server.getWorld(World.OVERWORLD); // 鎴栦粠涓婁笅鏂囦腑鑾峰彇
                    
                    // 鑾峰彇鏂瑰潡鐘舵€?
                    BlockState blockState = world.getBlockState(pos);
                    blockType = Registry.BLOCK.getId(blockState.getBlock()).toString();
                    
                    // 淇濆瓨鍘熷鏂瑰潡鐘舵€?
                    BlockState originalState = blockState;
                    
                    // 鍒涘缓涓存椂绾㈢煶鑳介噺婧?
                    // 娉ㄦ剰锛氳繖闇€瑕佹牴鎹叿浣撳疄鐜拌皟鏁达紝渚嬪鍙兘闇€瑕佷娇鐢ㄧ壒瀹氱殑鑳介噺鎻愪緵鍣ㄦ柟鍧?
                    // 鎴栬€呭彲浠ラ€氳繃鐗规畩鐨勬父鎴忔満鍒朵复鏃跺姞鍏ョ孩鐭宠兘閲?
                    
                    // 渚嬪锛屽彲浠ヤ复鏃舵斁缃竴涓孩鐭崇伀鎶婃垨绾㈢煶鍧?
                    BlockPos powerSourcePos = pos.offset(Direction.UP);
                    BlockState powerSource = Blocks.REDSTONE_BLOCK.getDefaultState();
                    world.setBlockState(powerSourcePos, powerSource);
                    
                    // 鎾斁绾㈢煶鐩稿叧澹伴煶
                    if (playSound) {
                        world.playSound(
                                null, 
                                pos, 
                                SoundEvents.BLOCK_REDSTONE_TORCH_BURNOUT, 
                                SoundCategory.BLOCKS, 
                                0.5f, 
                                2.6f + (world.random.nextFloat() - world.random.nextFloat()) * 0.8f
                        );
                    }
                    
                    // 璁剧疆瀹氭椂浠诲姟锛屽湪鎸囧畾鏃堕棿鍚庣Щ闄ょ孩鐭宠兘閲?
                    world.getServer().getWorldScheduler().schedule(new SingleTask(world, () -> {
                        world.setBlockState(powerSourcePos, Blocks.AIR.getDefaultState());
                    }, duration));
                    
                    success = true;
                }
                */
                
                // 妯℃嫙搴旂敤绾㈢煶鑳介噺 (鍦ㄥ疄闄呭疄鐜颁腑鏇挎崲涓轰笂闈㈢殑閫昏緫)
                success = true;
                blockType = "minecraft:stone";
                
                // 鎵撳嵃璋冭瘯淇℃伅
                System.out.println("妯℃嫙鍦ㄥ潗鏍?" + coordinateObj + " 搴旂敤绾㈢煶鑳介噺 " + powerLevel + "锛屾寔缁?" + duration + " 鍒?);
            } catch (Exception e) {
                success = false;
                System.err.println("Error applying redstone power: " + e.getMessage());
            }
        }
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID, success);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_BLOCK_TYPE_ID, blockType);
    }
    
    // --- Getters/Setters for Properties ---
    
    public int getPowerLevel() {
        return powerLevel;
    }
    
    public void setPowerLevel(int powerLevel) {
        this.powerLevel = Math.max(0, Math.min(15, powerLevel));
        markDirty();
    }
    
    public int getDuration() {
        return duration;
    }
    
    public void setDuration(int duration) {
        this.duration = Math.max(1, duration);
        markDirty();
    }
    
    /**
     * 淇濆瓨鑺傜偣鐘舵€?
     */
    @Override
    public @Nullable Object getNodeState() {
        int[] state = new int[2];
        state[0] = powerLevel;
        state[1] = duration;
        return state;
    }
    
    /**
     * 鎭㈠鑺傜偣鐘舵€?
     */
    @Override
    public void setNodeState(@Nullable Object state) {
        if (state instanceof int[]) {
            int[] intState = (int[]) state;
            if (intState.length >= 2) {
                powerLevel = intState[0];
                duration = intState[1];
            }
        }
    }
}

package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.world.interaction;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Execute Command 鑺傜偣: 鎵ц Minecraft 鍛戒护瀛楃涓?
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "world.interaction.execute_command",
    displayName = "鎵ц鍛戒护",
    description = "鎵ц鍛戒护",
    category = "world.interaction"
)
public class ExecuteCommandNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 鑺傜偣灞炴€?---
    private boolean parseResult = false; // 鏄惁瑙ｆ瀽鍛戒护杩斿洖缁撴灉
    private String description = "鎵ц Minecraft 鍛戒护瀛楃涓?;

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_COMMAND_ID = "input_command";
    private static final String INPUT_EXECUTOR_ID = "input_executor";
    private static final String INPUT_PARSE_RESULT_ID = "input_parse_result";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID = "output_success";
    private static final String OUTPUT_RESULT_CODE_ID = "output_result_code";
    private static final String OUTPUT_RESULT_TEXT_ID = "output_result_text";
    private static final String OUTPUT_PARSED_RESULT_ID = "output_parsed_result";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public ExecuteCommandNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "world.interaction.execute_command");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_COMMAND_ID, "Command", 
                "瑕佹墽琛岀殑鍛戒护瀛楃涓?, NodeDataType.STRING, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_EXECUTOR_ID, "Executor", 
                "鍛戒护鎵ц鑰咃紙涓虹┖鍒欎娇鐢ㄧ郴缁熸潈闄愶級", NodeDataType.PLAYER, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_PARSE_RESULT_ID, "Parse Result", 
                "鏄惁瑙ｆ瀽鍛戒护杩斿洖缁撴灉", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID, "Success", 
                "鍛戒护鏄惁鎴愬姛鎵ц", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_RESULT_CODE_ID, "Result Code", 
                "鍛戒护鎵ц缁撴灉浠ｇ爜", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_RESULT_TEXT_ID, "Result Text", 
                "鍛戒护鎵ц缁撴灉鏂囨湰", NodeDataType.STRING, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_PARSED_RESULT_ID, "Parsed Result", 
                "瑙ｆ瀽鍚庣殑鍛戒护缁撴灉锛堝鏋滃惎鐢級", NodeDataType.ANY, this));
    }

    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return this.description;
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 榛樿杈撳嚭鍊?
        boolean success = false;
        int resultCode = 0;
        String resultText = "";
        Object parsedResult = null;
        
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object commandObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_COMMAND_ID);
        Object executorObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_EXECUTOR_ID);
        Object parseResultObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_PARSE_RESULT_ID);
        
        // 纭畾鏄惁瑙ｆ瀽缁撴灉
        boolean parseResult = this.parseResult;
        if (parseResultObj instanceof Boolean) {
            parseResult = (Boolean) parseResultObj;
        }
        
        // 妫€鏌ュ繀瑕佺殑杈撳叆鏄惁瀛樺湪
        if (commandObj instanceof String) {
            String command = (String) commandObj;
            
            try {
                /*
                鍦ㄥ疄闄呭疄鐜颁腑锛岄渶瑕佹牴鎹甅inecraft API瀹炵幇浠ヤ笅鎿嶄綔:
                1. 鏍规嵁鎵ц鑰呯‘瀹氬懡浠ゆ簮
                2. 鎵ц鍛戒护
                3. 澶勭悊鍛戒护缁撴灉
                4. 濡傛灉闇€瑕侊紝瑙ｆ瀽鍛戒护缁撴灉
                
                // 纭畾鍛戒护婧?
                CommandSource source;
                if (executorObj instanceof PlayerEntity) {
                    PlayerEntity player = (PlayerEntity) executorObj;
                    source = player.getCommandSource();
                } else {
                    // 浣跨敤鏈嶅姟鍣ㄥ懡浠ゆ簮锛堢郴缁熸潈闄愶級
                    source = server.getCommandSource();
                }
                
                // 鎵ц鍛戒护
                try {
                    int cmdResult = server.getCommandManager().execute(source, command);
                    resultCode = cmdResult;
                    success = cmdResult > 0;
                    resultText = "Command executed with result: " + cmdResult;
                    
                    // 濡傛灉闇€瑕佽В鏋愮粨鏋?
                    if (parseResult && success) {
                        // 杩欓噷闇€瑕佹牴鎹叿浣撳懡浠ょ被鍨嬭В鏋愮粨鏋?
                        // 渚嬪锛屽浜庢暟鎹煡璇㈠懡浠ゅ彲鑳借繑鍥濶BT鏁版嵁
                        if (command.startsWith("data get") && cmdResult > 0) {
                            // 妯℃嫙瑙ｆ瀽data get鍛戒护鐨勭粨鏋?
                            // 瀹為檯瀹炵幇涓渶瑕佹崟鑾峰懡浠よ緭鍑哄苟瑙ｆ瀽
                            parsedResult = new HashMap<String, Object>();
                        }
                    }
                } catch (CommandSyntaxException e) {
                    success = false;
                    resultCode = -1;
                    resultText = "Command syntax error: " + e.getMessage();
                }
                */
                
                // 妯℃嫙鍛戒护鎵ц (鍦ㄥ疄闄呭疄鐜颁腑鏇挎崲涓轰笂闈㈢殑閫昏緫)
                success = true;
                resultCode = 1;
                resultText = "Command executed: " + command;
                
                if (parseResult) {
                    // 妯℃嫙涓€浜涜В鏋愬悗鐨勬暟鎹?
                    if (command.startsWith("data get")) {
                        // 鍋囪杩欐槸涓€涓幏鍙栨暟鎹殑鍛戒护
                        parsedResult = "{'count': 1, 'id': 'minecraft:stone'}";
                    }
                }
            } catch (Exception e) {
                success = false;
                resultCode = -2;
                resultText = "Error executing command: " + e.getMessage();
            }
        }
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID, success);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_RESULT_CODE_ID, resultCode);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_RESULT_TEXT_ID, resultText);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_PARSED_RESULT_ID, parsedResult);
    }
    
    // --- Getters/Setters for Properties ---
    
    public boolean isParseResult() {
        return parseResult;
    }
    
    public void setParseResult(boolean parseResult) {
        this.parseResult = parseResult;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    /**
     * 淇濆瓨鑺傜偣鐘舵€?
     */
    @Override
    public @Nullable Object getNodeState() {
        return parseResult;
    }
    
    /**
     * 鎭㈠鑺傜偣鐘舵€?
     */
    @Override
    public void setNodeState(@Nullable Object state) {
        if (state instanceof Boolean) {
            parseResult = (Boolean) state;
        }
    }
}

/**
 * Read Sign Text 鑺傜偣: 璇诲彇鍛婄ず鐗屾枃鏈€?
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "world.interaction.read_sign_text",
    displayName = "璇诲彇鍛婄ず鐗屾枃鏈?,
    description = "璇诲彇鍛婄ず鐗屾枃鏈?,
    category = "world.interaction"
)
public class ReadSignTextNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 鑺傜偣灞炴€?---
    private String description = "璇诲彇鍛婄ず鐗屾枃鏈?;

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_COORDINATE_ID = "input_coordinate";
    private static final String INPUT_INCLUDE_FORMATTING_ID = "input_include_formatting";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID = "output_success";
    private static final String OUTPUT_TEXT_LINES_ID = "output_text_lines";
    private static final String OUTPUT_COMBINED_TEXT_ID = "output_combined_text";
    private static final String OUTPUT_IS_SIGN_ID = "output_is_sign";
    private static final String OUTPUT_SIGN_TYPE_ID = "output_sign_type";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public ReadSignTextNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "world.interaction.read_sign_text");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_COORDINATE_ID, "Coordinate", 
                "鍛婄ず鐗屽潗鏍?, NodeDataType.COORDINATE, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_INCLUDE_FORMATTING_ID, "Include Formatting", 
                "鏄惁鍖呭惈鏍煎紡浠ｇ爜", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID, "Success", 
                "鏄惁鎴愬姛璇诲彇", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_TEXT_LINES_ID, "Text Lines", 
                "鏂囨湰琛屽垪琛?, NodeDataType.LIST, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_COMBINED_TEXT_ID, "Combined Text", 
                "鍚堝苟鍚庣殑鏂囨湰", NodeDataType.STRING, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_IS_SIGN_ID, "Is Sign", 
                "鍧愭爣澶勬槸鍚︿负鍛婄ず鐗?, NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_SIGN_TYPE_ID, "Sign Type", 
                "鍛婄ず鐗岀被鍨?, NodeDataType.STRING, this));
    }

    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return this.description;
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 榛樿杈撳嚭鍊?
        boolean success = false;
        List<String> textLines = new ArrayList<>();
        String combinedText = "";
        boolean isSign = false;
        String signType = "";
        
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object coordinateObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_COORDINATE_ID);
        Object includeFormattingObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_INCLUDE_FORMATTING_ID);
        
        // 纭畾鏄惁鍖呭惈鏍煎紡浠ｇ爜
        boolean includeFormatting = false;
        if (includeFormattingObj instanceof Boolean) {
            includeFormatting = (Boolean) includeFormattingObj;
        }
        
        // 妫€鏌ュ繀瑕佺殑杈撳叆鏄惁瀛樺湪
        if (coordinateObj != null) {
            try {
                /*
                鍦ㄥ疄闄呭疄鐜颁腑锛岄渶瑕佹牴鎹甅inecraft API瀹炵幇浠ヤ笅鎿嶄綔:
                1. 鑾峰彇鎸囧畾鍧愭爣鐨勬柟鍧?
                2. 妫€鏌ユ槸鍚︿负鍛婄ず鐗?
                3. 鎻愬彇鍛婄ず鐗屾枃鏈?
                
                if (coordinateObj instanceof BlockPos) {
                    BlockPos pos = (BlockPos) coordinateObj;
                    World world = server.getWorld(World.OVERWORLD); // 鎴栦粠涓婁笅鏂囦腑鑾峰彇
                    
                    // 鑾峰彇鏂瑰潡瀹炰綋
                    BlockEntity blockEntity = world.getBlockEntity(pos);
                    
                    // 妫€鏌ユ槸鍚︿负鍛婄ず鐗?
                    if (blockEntity instanceof SignBlockEntity) {
                        SignBlockEntity sign = (SignBlockEntity) blockEntity;
                        isSign = true;
                        
                        // 鑾峰彇鍛婄ず鐗岀被鍨?
                        BlockState blockState = world.getBlockState(pos);
                        signType = Registry.BLOCK.getId(blockState.getBlock()).toString();
                        
                        // 璇诲彇鏂囨湰琛?
                        for (int i = 0; i < 4; i++) {
                            Text text = sign.getText(i);
                            String lineText;
                            
                            if (includeFormatting) {
                                // 甯︽湁鏍煎紡鍖栦唬鐮佺殑鏂囨湰
                                lineText = text.getString();
                            } else {
                                // 绾枃鏈?
                                lineText = text.getString().replaceAll("搂[0-9a-fk-or]", "");
                            }
                            
                            textLines.add(lineText);
                            if (!lineText.isEmpty()) {
                                if (combinedText.isEmpty()) {
                                    combinedText = lineText;
                                } else {
                                    combinedText += " " + lineText;
                                }
                            }
                        }
                        
                        success = true;
                    }
                }
                */
                
                // 妯℃嫙璇诲彇鍛婄ず鐗屾枃鏈?(鍦ㄥ疄闄呭疄鐜颁腑鏇挎崲涓轰笂闈㈢殑閫昏緫)
                isSign = true;
                signType = "minecraft:oak_sign";
                
                // 妯℃嫙鏂囨湰琛?
                textLines.add("杩欐槸绗竴琛?);
                textLines.add("杩欐槸绗簩琛?);
                textLines.add("杩欐槸绗笁琛?);
                textLines.add("杩欐槸绗洓琛?);
                
                // 鍚堝苟鏂囨湰
                combinedText = String.join(" ", textLines);
                
                success = true;
            } catch (Exception e) {
                success = false;
                System.err.println("Error reading sign text: " + e.getMessage());
            }
        }
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID, success);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_TEXT_LINES_ID, textLines);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_COMBINED_TEXT_ID, combinedText);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_IS_SIGN_ID, isSign);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_SIGN_TYPE_ID, signType);
    }
}

package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.world.interaction;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Simulate Right Click 鑺傜偣: 妯℃嫙鍙抽敭鐐瑰嚮銆?
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "world.interaction.simulate_right_click",
    displayName = "妯℃嫙鍙抽敭鐐瑰嚮",
    description = "妯℃嫙鍙抽敭鐐瑰嚮",
    category = "world.interaction"
)
public class SimulateRightClickNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 鑺傜偣灞炴€?---
    private boolean playSound = true; // 鏄惁鎾斁浜や簰澹伴煶
    private String description = "妯℃嫙鐜╁鍦?Coordinate 鍙抽敭鐐瑰嚮";

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_COORDINATE_ID = "input_coordinate";
    private static final String INPUT_PLAYER_ID = "input_player";
    private static final String INPUT_ITEM_IN_HAND_ID = "input_item_in_hand";
    private static final String INPUT_PLAY_SOUND_ID = "input_play_sound";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID = "output_success";
    private static final String OUTPUT_BLOCK_TYPE_ID = "output_block_type";
    private static final String OUTPUT_INTERACTION_RESULT_ID = "output_interaction_result";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public SimulateRightClickNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "world.interaction.simulate_right_click");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_COORDINATE_ID, "Coordinate", 
                "鍙抽敭鐐瑰嚮鐨勫潗鏍?, NodeDataType.COORDINATE, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_PLAYER_ID, "Player", 
                "妯℃嫙鐐瑰嚮鐨勭帺瀹?, NodeDataType.PLAYER, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_ITEM_IN_HAND_ID, "Item in Hand", 
                "妯℃嫙鐐瑰嚮鏃剁帺瀹舵墜鎸佺殑鐗╁搧锛堝彲閫夛級", NodeDataType.ITEM_STACK, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_PLAY_SOUND_ID, "Play Sound", 
                "鏄惁鎾斁浜や簰澹伴煶", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID, "Success", 
                "浜や簰鏄惁鎴愬姛", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_BLOCK_TYPE_ID, "Block Type", 
                "浜や簰鐨勬柟鍧楃被鍨?, NodeDataType.STRING, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_INTERACTION_RESULT_ID, "Interaction Result", 
                "浜や簰缁撴灉", NodeDataType.ANY, this));
    }

    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return this.description;
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 榛樿杈撳嚭鍊?
        boolean success = false;
        String blockType = "";
        Object interactionResult = null;
        
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object coordinateObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_COORDINATE_ID);
        Object playerObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_PLAYER_ID);
        Object itemInHandObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_ITEM_IN_HAND_ID);
        Object playSoundObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_PLAY_SOUND_ID);
        
        // 纭畾鏄惁鎾斁澹伴煶
        boolean playSound = this.playSound;
        if (playSoundObj instanceof Boolean) {
            playSound = (Boolean) playSoundObj;
        }
        
        // 妫€鏌ュ繀瑕佺殑杈撳叆鏄惁瀛樺湪
        if (coordinateObj != null && playerObj != null) {
            try {
                /*
                鍦ㄥ疄闄呭疄鐜颁腑锛岄渶瑕佹牴鎹甅inecraft API瀹炵幇浠ヤ笅鎿嶄綔:
                1. 鑾峰彇鎸囧畾鍧愭爣鐨勬柟鍧?
                2. 纭畾浣跨敤鐨勭墿鍝佸拰鐜╁涓婁笅鏂?
                3. 妯℃嫙鍙抽敭鐐瑰嚮琛屼负
                4. 澶勭悊浜や簰缁撴灉
                
                if (coordinateObj instanceof BlockPos && playerObj instanceof PlayerEntity) {
                    BlockPos pos = (BlockPos) coordinateObj;
                    PlayerEntity player = (PlayerEntity) playerObj;
                    World world = player.getWorld();
                    
                    // 鑾峰彇鏂瑰潡鐘舵€?
                    BlockState blockState = world.getBlockState(pos);
                    blockType = Registry.BLOCK.getId(blockState.getBlock()).toString();
                    
                    // 纭畾鎵嬫寔鐗╁搧
                    ItemStack heldItem;
                    if (itemInHandObj instanceof ItemStack) {
                        heldItem = (ItemStack) itemInHandObj;
                    } else {
                        heldItem = player.getMainHandStack();
                    }
                    
                    // 璁＄畻鍛戒腑鐨勬柟鍚戝拰浣嶇疆
                    Direction direction = player.getHorizontalFacing();
                    float hitX = 0.5f;
                    float hitY = 0.5f;
                    float hitZ = 0.5f;
                    
                    // 鍒涘缓鍛戒腑缁撴灉
                    BlockHitResult hitResult = new BlockHitResult(
                            new Vec3d(pos.getX() + hitX, pos.getY() + hitY, pos.getZ() + hitZ),
                            direction,
                            pos,
                            false
                    );
                    
                    // 淇濆瓨鍘熷鐗╁搧
                    ItemStack originalStack = player.getMainHandStack();
                    
                    // 涓存椂鏇挎崲鐜╁鎵嬫寔鐗╁搧锛堝鏋滈渶瑕侊級
                    if (itemInHandObj instanceof ItemStack) {
                        player.setStackInHand(Hand.MAIN_HAND, heldItem.copy());
                    }
                    
                    // 妯℃嫙浜や簰
                    ActionResult result = world.getBlockState(pos)
                            .onUse(world, player, Hand.MAIN_HAND, hitResult);
                    
                    // 鎭㈠鍘熷鐗╁搧
                    if (itemInHandObj instanceof ItemStack) {
                        player.setStackInHand(Hand.MAIN_HAND, originalStack);
                    }
                    
                    success = result.isAccepted();
                    interactionResult = result.toString();
                    
                    // 鎾斁浜や簰澹伴煶
                    if (playSound && success) {
                        world.playSound(
                                null, 
                                pos, 
                                blockState.getSoundGroup().getUseSound(), 
                                SoundCategory.BLOCKS, 
                                1.0f, 
                                1.0f
                        );
                    }
                }
                */
                
                // 妯℃嫙浜や簰鎴愬姛 (鍦ㄥ疄闄呭疄鐜颁腑鏇挎崲涓轰笂闈㈢殑閫昏緫)
                success = true;
                blockType = "minecraft:chest";
                interactionResult = "SUCCESS";
            } catch (Exception e) {
                success = false;
                System.err.println("Error simulating right click: " + e.getMessage());
            }
        }
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID, success);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_BLOCK_TYPE_ID, blockType);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_INTERACTION_RESULT_ID, interactionResult);
    }
    
    // --- Getters/Setters for Properties ---
    
    public boolean isPlaySound() {
        return playSound;
    }
    
    public void setPlaySound(boolean playSound) {
        this.playSound = playSound;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    /**
     * 淇濆瓨鑺傜偣鐘舵€?
     */
    @Override
    public @Nullable Object getNodeState() {
        return playSound;
    }
    
    /**
     * 鎭㈠鑺傜偣鐘舵€?
     */
    @Override
    public void setNodeState(@Nullable Object state) {
        if (state instanceof Boolean) {
            playSound = (Boolean) state;
        }
    }
}

package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.world.interaction;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;

import java.util.List;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Write Sign Text 鑺傜偣: 璁剧疆鍛婄ず鐗屾枃鏈?
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "world.interaction.write_sign_text",
    displayName = "鍐欏叆鍛婄ず鐗屾枃鏈?,
    description = "鍐欏叆鍛婄ず鐗屾枃鏈?,
    category = "world.interaction"
)
public class WriteSignTextNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 鑺傜偣灞炴€?---
    private String[] defaultLines = new String[]{"", "", "", ""}; // 榛樿鏂囨湰琛?
    private boolean allowFormatting = true; // 鏄惁鍏佽鏍煎紡浠ｇ爜
    private String textColor = "black"; // 榛樿鏂囨湰棰滆壊
    private String description = "璁剧疆鍛婄ず鐗屾枃鏈?;

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_COORDINATE_ID = "input_coordinate";
    private static final String INPUT_LINE_1_ID = "input_line_1";
    private static final String INPUT_LINE_2_ID = "input_line_2";
    private static final String INPUT_LINE_3_ID = "input_line_3";
    private static final String INPUT_LINE_4_ID = "input_line_4";
    private static final String INPUT_LINES_LIST_ID = "input_lines_list";
    private static final String INPUT_TEXT_COLOR_ID = "input_text_color";
    private static final String INPUT_GLOWING_ID = "input_glowing";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID = "output_success";
    private static final String OUTPUT_IS_SIGN_ID = "output_is_sign";
    private static final String OUTPUT_SIGN_TYPE_ID = "output_sign_type";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public WriteSignTextNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "world.interaction.write_sign_text");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_COORDINATE_ID, "Coordinate", 
                "鍛婄ず鐗屽潗鏍?, NodeDataType.COORDINATE, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_LINE_1_ID, "Line 1", 
                "绗竴琛屾枃鏈?, NodeDataType.STRING, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_LINE_2_ID, "Line 2", 
                "绗簩琛屾枃鏈?, NodeDataType.STRING, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_LINE_3_ID, "Line 3", 
                "绗笁琛屾枃鏈?, NodeDataType.STRING, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_LINE_4_ID, "Line 4", 
                "绗洓琛屾枃鏈?, NodeDataType.STRING, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_LINES_LIST_ID, "Lines List", 
                "鏂囨湰琛屽垪琛紙浼樺厛浜庡崟鐙殑琛岃緭鍏ワ級", NodeDataType.LIST, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_TEXT_COLOR_ID, "Text Color", 
                "鏂囨湰棰滆壊", NodeDataType.STRING, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_GLOWING_ID, "Glowing", 
                "鏂囧瓧鏄惁鍙戝厜", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID, "Success", 
                "鏄惁鎴愬姛璁剧疆", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_IS_SIGN_ID, "Is Sign", 
                "鍧愭爣澶勬槸鍚︿负鍛婄ず鐗?, NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_SIGN_TYPE_ID, "Sign Type", 
                "鍛婄ず鐗岀被鍨?, NodeDataType.STRING, this));
    }

    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return this.description;
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 榛樿杈撳嚭鍊?
        boolean success = false;
        boolean isSign = false;
        String signType = "";
        
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object coordinateObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_COORDINATE_ID);
        Object line1Obj = inputValues.get(INPUT_LINE_1_ID);
        Object line2Obj = inputValues.get(INPUT_LINE_2_ID);
        Object line3Obj = inputValues.get(INPUT_LINE_3_ID);
        Object line4Obj = inputValues.get(INPUT_LINE_4_ID);
        Object linesListObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_LINES_LIST_ID);
        Object textColorObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_TEXT_COLOR_ID);
        Object glowingObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_GLOWING_ID);
        
        // 鍑嗗鏂囨湰琛?
        String[] lines = new String[4];
        System.arraycopy(defaultLines, 0, lines, 0, 4);
        
        // 浼樺厛浣跨敤鍒楄〃杈撳叆
        if (linesListObj instanceof List) {
            List<?> linesList = (List<?>) linesListObj;
            for (int i = 0; i < Math.min(linesList.size(), 4); i++) {
                Object lineObj = linesList.get(i);
                if (lineObj != null) {
                    lines[i] = lineObj.toString();
                }
            }
        } else {
            // 浣跨敤鍗曠嫭鐨勮杈撳叆
            if (line1Obj instanceof String) lines[0] = (String) line1Obj;
            if (line2Obj instanceof String) lines[1] = (String) line2Obj;
            if (line3Obj instanceof String) lines[2] = (String) line3Obj;
            if (line4Obj instanceof String) lines[3] = (String) line4Obj;
        }
        
        // 纭畾鏂囨湰棰滆壊
        String textColor = this.textColor;
        if (textColorObj instanceof String) {
            textColor = (String) textColorObj;
        }
        
        // 纭畾鏄惁鍙戝厜
        boolean glowing = false;
        if (glowingObj instanceof Boolean) {
            glowing = (Boolean) glowingObj;
        }
        
        // 妫€鏌ュ繀瑕佺殑杈撳叆鏄惁瀛樺湪
        if (coordinateObj != null) {
            try {
                /*
                鍦ㄥ疄闄呭疄鐜颁腑锛岄渶瑕佹牴鎹甅inecraft API瀹炵幇浠ヤ笅鎿嶄綔:
                1. 鑾峰彇鎸囧畾鍧愭爣鐨勬柟鍧?
                2. 妫€鏌ユ槸鍚︿负鍛婄ず鐗?
                3. 璁剧疆鍛婄ず鐗屾枃鏈?
                
                if (coordinateObj instanceof BlockPos) {
                    BlockPos pos = (BlockPos) coordinateObj;
                    World world = server.getWorld(World.OVERWORLD); // 鎴栦粠涓婁笅鏂囦腑鑾峰彇
                    
                    // 鑾峰彇鏂瑰潡瀹炰綋
                    BlockEntity blockEntity = world.getBlockEntity(pos);
                    
                    // 妫€鏌ユ槸鍚︿负鍛婄ず鐗?
                    if (blockEntity instanceof SignBlockEntity) {
                        SignBlockEntity sign = (SignBlockEntity) blockEntity;
                        isSign = true;
                        
                        // 鑾峰彇鍛婄ず鐗岀被鍨?
                        BlockState blockState = world.getBlockState(pos);
                        signType = Registry.BLOCK.getId(blockState.getBlock()).toString();
                        
                        // 璁剧疆鏂囨湰琛?
                        for (int i = 0; i < 4; i++) {
                            String lineText = lines[i] != null ? lines[i] : "";
                            
                            // 澶勭悊鏍煎紡浠ｇ爜
                            if (!allowFormatting) {
                                lineText = lineText.replaceAll("搂[0-9a-fk-or]", "");
                            }
                            
                            // 鍒涘缓鍏锋湁棰滆壊鍜屾牱寮忕殑鏂囨湰
                            Text text;
                            if (glowing) {
                                text = Text.literal(lineText).formatted(Formatting.valueOf(textColor.toUpperCase())).formatted(Formatting.BOLD);
                            } else {
                                text = Text.literal(lineText).formatted(Formatting.valueOf(textColor.toUpperCase()));
                            }
                            
                            // 璁剧疆鏂囨湰
                            sign.setText(text, i);
                        }
                        
                        // 鏇存柊鏂瑰潡瀹炰綋
                        blockEntity.markDirty();
                        world.updateListeners(pos, world.getBlockState(pos), world.getBlockState(pos), 3);
                        
                        success = true;
                    }
                }
                */
                
                // 妯℃嫙璁剧疆鍛婄ず鐗屾枃鏈?(鍦ㄥ疄闄呭疄鐜颁腑鏇挎崲涓轰笂闈㈢殑閫昏緫)
                isSign = true;
                signType = "minecraft:oak_sign";
                
                // 鎵撳嵃璋冭瘯淇℃伅
                System.out.println("妯℃嫙鍦ㄥ潗鏍?" + coordinateObj + " 鐨勫憡绀虹墝涓婅缃枃鏈?");
                for (int i = 0; i < 4; i++) {
                    System.out.println("琛?" + (i + 1) + ": " + lines[i]);
                }
                System.out.println("棰滆壊: " + textColor + ", 鍙戝厜: " + glowing);
                
                success = true;
            } catch (Exception e) {
                success = false;
                System.err.println("Error writing sign text: " + e.getMessage());
            }
        }
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID, success);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_IS_SIGN_ID, isSign);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_SIGN_TYPE_ID, signType);
    }
    
    // --- Getters/Setters for Properties ---
    
    public String[] getDefaultLines() {
        return defaultLines;
    }
    
    public void setDefaultLines(String[] defaultLines) {
        if (defaultLines != null && defaultLines.length == 4) {
            this.defaultLines = defaultLines;
            markDirty();
        }
    }
    
    public boolean isAllowFormatting() {
        return allowFormatting;
    }
    
    public void setAllowFormatting(boolean allowFormatting) {
        this.allowFormatting = allowFormatting;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    public String getTextColor() {
        return textColor;
    }
    
    public void setTextColor(String textColor) {
        if (isValidColor(textColor)) {
            this.textColor = textColor;
            markDirty();
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * 妫€鏌ラ鑹叉槸鍚︽湁鏁?
     */
    private boolean isValidColor(String color) {
        if (color == null) return false;
        
        String[] validColors = {
            "black", "dark_blue", "dark_green", "dark_aqua", "dark_red", "dark_purple", 
            "gold", "gray", "dark_gray", "blue", "green", "aqua", "red", "light_purple", 
            "yellow", "white"
        };
        
        for (String validColor : validColors) {
            if (validColor.equals(color.toLowerCase())) {
                return true;
            }
        }
        
        return false;
    }
    
    /**
     * 淇濆瓨鑺傜偣鐘舵€?
     */
    @Override
    public @Nullable Object getNodeState() {
        Object[] state = new Object[3];
        state[0] = defaultLines;
        state[1] = allowFormatting;
        state[2] = textColor;
        return state;
    }
    
    /**
     * 鎭㈠鑺傜偣鐘舵€?
     */
    @Override
    public void setNodeState(@Nullable Object state) {
        if (state instanceof Object[]) {
            Object[] objState = (Object[]) state;
            if (objState.length >= 3) {
                if (objState[0] instanceof String[]) {
                    defaultLines = (String[]) objState[0];
                }
                if (objState[1] instanceof Boolean) {
                    allowFormatting = (Boolean) objState[1];
                }
                if (objState[2] instanceof String) {
                    textColor = (String) objState[2];
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.world.inventory;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Create Item Stack 鑺傜偣: 鍒涘缓鐗╁搧鍫嗗彔銆?
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "world.inventory.create_item_stack",
    displayName = "鍒涘缓鐗╁搧鍫嗗彔",
    description = "鍒涘缓鐗╁搧鍫嗗彔",
    category = "world.inventory"
)
public class CreateItemStackNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 鑺傜偣灞炴€?---
    private String description = "鍒涘缓鏂扮殑 ItemStack";

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_ITEM_ID = "input_item_id";
    private static final String INPUT_COUNT_ID = "input_count";
    private static final String INPUT_NBT_ID = "input_nbt";
    private static final String INPUT_DAMAGE_ID = "input_damage";
    private static final String INPUT_ENCHANTMENTS_ID = "input_enchantments";
    private static final String INPUT_CUSTOM_NAME_ID = "input_custom_name";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_ITEM_STACK_ID = "output_item_stack";
    private static final String OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID = "output_success";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public CreateItemStackNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "world.inventory.create_item_stack");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_ITEM_ID, "Item ID", 
                "鐗╁搧ID锛屽 'minecraft:diamond_sword'", NodeDataType.STRING, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_COUNT_ID, "Count", 
                "鐗╁搧鏁伴噺", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_NBT_ID, "NBT Data", 
                "鐗╁搧鐨凬BT鏁版嵁", NodeDataType.NBT, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_DAMAGE_ID, "Damage", 
                "鐗╁搧鎹熻€楀€?, NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_ENCHANTMENTS_ID, "Enchantments", 
                "闄勯瓟鍒楄〃锛屾牸寮忎负 {'enchantment_id': level, ...}", NodeDataType.ANY, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_CUSTOM_NAME_ID, "Custom Name", 
                "鐗╁搧鑷畾涔夊悕绉?, NodeDataType.STRING, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_ITEM_STACK_ID, "ItemStack", 
                "鍒涘缓鐨勭墿鍝佸爢", NodeDataType.ITEM_STACK, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID, "Success", 
                "鏄惁鎴愬姛鍒涘缓鐗╁搧", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
    }

    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return this.description;
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 榛樿杈撳嚭鍊?
        Object itemStack = null;
        boolean success = false;
        
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object itemIdObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_ITEM_ID);
        Object countObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_COUNT_ID);
        Object nbtObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_NBT_ID);
        Object damageObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_DAMAGE_ID);
        Object enchantmentsObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_ENCHANTMENTS_ID);
        Object customNameObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_CUSTOM_NAME_ID);
        
        // 妫€鏌ュ繀瑕佺殑杈撳叆鏄惁瀛樺湪
        if (itemIdObj instanceof String) {
            String itemId = (String) itemIdObj;
            
            try {
                /*
                鍦ㄥ疄闄呭疄鐜颁腑锛岄渶瑕佹牴鎹甅inecraft API瀹炵幇浠ヤ笅鎿嶄綔:
                1. 鍒涘缓鍩虹ItemStack
                2. 搴旂敤NBT鏁版嵁
                3. 璁剧疆闄勯瓟鍜岃嚜瀹氫箟鍚嶇О
                
                // 鏍规嵁ID鑾峰彇鐗╁搧
                Identifier id = new Identifier(itemId);
                Item item = Registry.ITEM.get(id);
                
                // 鍒涘缓鍒濆鐗╁搧鍫?
                int count = 1; // 榛樿鏁伴噺
                if (countObj instanceof Number) {
                    count = Math.max(1, Math.min(64, ((Number) countObj).intValue()));
                }
                
                ItemStack stack = new ItemStack(item, count);
                
                // 璁剧疆NBT鏁版嵁
                if (nbtObj instanceof CompoundTag) {
                    stack.setTag((CompoundTag) nbtObj);
                }
                
                // 璁剧疆鎹熻€楀€?
                if (damageObj instanceof Number && stack.isDamageable()) {
                    int damage = ((Number) damageObj).intValue();
                    stack.setDamage(damage);
                }
                
                // 璁剧疆闄勯瓟
                if (enchantmentsObj instanceof Map) {
                    Map<?, ?> enchantments = (Map<?, ?>) enchantmentsObj;
                    
                    for (Map.Entry<?, ?> entry : enchantments.entrySet()) {
                        if (entry.getKey() instanceof String && entry.getValue() instanceof Number) {
                            String enchId = (String) entry.getKey();
                            int level = ((Number) entry.getValue()).intValue();
                            
                            Identifier enchantId = new Identifier(enchId);
                            Enchantment enchantment = Registry.ENCHANTMENT.get(enchantId);
                            
                            if (enchantment != null) {
                                stack.addEnchantment(enchantment, level);
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
                
                // 璁剧疆鑷畾涔夊悕绉?
                if (customNameObj instanceof String) {
                    String customName = (String) customNameObj;
                    if (!customName.isEmpty()) {
                        stack.setCustomName(Text.of(customName));
                    }
                }
                
                itemStack = stack;
                success = true;
                */
                
                // 妯℃嫙鎴愬姛鍒涘缓鐗╁搧鍫?(鍦ㄥ疄闄呭疄鐜颁腑鏇挎崲涓轰笂闈㈢殑閫昏緫)
                itemStack = new Object(); // 妯℃嫙鐗╁搧鍫?
                success = true;
            } catch (Exception e) {
                success = false;
                System.err.println("Error creating ItemStack: " + e.getMessage());
            }
        }
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_ITEM_STACK_ID, itemStack);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID, success);
    }
}

package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.world.inventory;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Get Item in Hand 鑺傜偣: 鑾峰彇鐜╁鎵嬩腑鐨勭墿鍝併€?
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "world.inventory.get_item_in_hand",
    displayName = "鑾峰彇鎵嬩腑鐗╁搧",
    description = "鑾峰彇鐜╁鎵嬩腑鐨勭墿鍝?,
    category = "world.inventory"
)
public class GetItemInHandNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 鑺傜偣灞炴€?---
    private boolean useOffHand = false; // 鏄惁浣跨敤鍓墜
    private String description = "鑾峰彇鐜╁鎵嬫寔 ItemStack";

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_PLAYER_ID = "input_player";
    private static final String INPUT_USE_OFFHAND_ID = "input_use_offhand";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_ITEM_ID = "output_item";
    private static final String OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID = "output_success";
    private static final String OUTPUT_IS_EMPTY_ID = "output_is_empty";
    private static final String OUTPUT_ITEM_ID_ID = "output_item_id";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public GetItemInHandNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "world.inventory.get_item_in_hand");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_PLAYER_ID, "Player", 
                "鐩爣鐜╁", NodeDataType.PLAYER, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_USE_OFFHAND_ID, "Use Off Hand", 
                "鏄惁浣跨敤鍓墜", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_ITEM_ID, "Item", 
                "鐜╁鎵嬫寔鐨勭墿鍝?, NodeDataType.ITEM_STACK, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID, "Success", 
                "鏄惁鎴愬姛鑾峰彇鐗╁搧", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_IS_EMPTY_ID, "Is Empty", 
                "鐗╁搧鏄惁涓虹┖", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_ITEM_ID_ID, "Item ID", 
                "鐗╁搧鐨処D", NodeDataType.STRING, this));
    }

    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return this.description;
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 榛樿杈撳嚭鍊?
        Object itemStack = null;
        boolean success = false;
        boolean isEmpty = true;
        String itemId = "";
        
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object playerObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_PLAYER_ID);
        Object useOffHandObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_USE_OFFHAND_ID);
        
        // 纭畾鏄惁浣跨敤鍓墜
        boolean useOffHand = this.useOffHand;
        if (useOffHandObj instanceof Boolean) {
            useOffHand = (Boolean) useOffHandObj;
        }
        
        // 妫€鏌ュ繀瑕佺殑杈撳叆鏄惁瀛樺湪
        if (playerObj != null) {
            try {
                /*
                鍦ㄥ疄闄呭疄鐜颁腑锛岄渶瑕佹牴鎹甅inecraft API瀹炵幇浠ヤ笅鎿嶄綔:
                1. 浠庣帺瀹跺璞¤幏鍙栨墜鎸佺墿鍝?
                2. 纭畾鏄富鎵嬭繕鏄壇鎵?
                3. 鎻愬彇鐗╁搧淇℃伅
                
                if (playerObj instanceof PlayerEntity) {
                    PlayerEntity player = (PlayerEntity) playerObj;
                    
                    // 鑾峰彇鎵嬫寔鐗╁搧
                    ItemStack heldItem = useOffHand ? 
                            player.getOffHandStack() : 
                            player.getMainHandStack();
                    
                    itemStack = heldItem;
                    isEmpty = heldItem.isEmpty();
                    
                    if (!isEmpty) {
                        // 鑾峰彇鐗╁搧ID
                        itemId = Registry.ITEM.getId(heldItem.getItem()).toString();
                    }
                    
                    success = true;
                }
                */
                
                // 妯℃嫙鎴愬姛鑾峰彇鎵嬫寔鐗╁搧 (鍦ㄥ疄闄呭疄鐜颁腑鏇挎崲涓轰笂闈㈢殑閫昏緫)
                itemStack = new Object(); // 妯℃嫙鐗╁搧
                isEmpty = false;
                itemId = "minecraft:diamond_sword";
                success = true;
            } catch (Exception e) {
                success = false;
                System.err.println("Error getting item in hand: " + e.getMessage());
            }
        }
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_ITEM_ID, itemStack);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID, success);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_IS_EMPTY_ID, isEmpty);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_ITEM_ID_ID, itemId);
    }
    
    // --- Getters/Setters for Properties ---
    
    public boolean isUseOffHand() {
        return useOffHand;
    }
    
    public void setUseOffHand(boolean useOffHand) {
        this.useOffHand = useOffHand;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    /**
     * 淇濆瓨鑺傜偣鐘舵€?
     */
    @Override
    public @Nullable Object getNodeState() {
        return useOffHand;
    }
    
    /**
     * 鎭㈠鑺傜偣鐘舵€?
     */
    @Override
    public void setNodeState(@Nullable Object state) {
        if (state instanceof Boolean) {
            useOffHand = (Boolean) state;
        }
    }
}
