package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.world.inventory;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;

import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.HashMap;
import java.util.Map;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Get Items in Inventory 鑺傜偣: 鑾峰彇瀹瑰櫒涓殑鐗╁搧銆?
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "world.inventory.get_items_in_inventory",
    displayName = "鑾峰彇瀹瑰櫒鐗╁搧",
    description = "鑾峰彇瀹瑰櫒涓殑鐗╁搧",
    category = "world.inventory"
)
public class GetItemsInInventoryNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 鑺傜偣灞炴€?---
    private String inventoryType = "main"; // 鑳屽寘绫诲瀷锛歮ain, armor, offhand, enderchest, all
    private String description = "鑾峰彇鐜╁鑳屽寘涓殑鎵€鏈夌墿鍝?;

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_PLAYER_ID = "input_player";
    private static final String INPUT_INVENTORY_TYPE_ID = "input_inventory_type";
    private static final String INPUT_FILTER_EMPTY_ID = "input_filter_empty";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_ITEMS_ID = "output_items";
    private static final String OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID = "output_success";
    private static final String OUTPUT_ITEM_COUNT_ID = "output_item_count";
    private static final String OUTPUT_SLOTS_INFO_ID = "output_slots_info";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public GetItemsInInventoryNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "world.inventory.get_items_in_inventory");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_PLAYER_ID, "Player", 
                "鐩爣鐜╁", NodeDataType.PLAYER, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_INVENTORY_TYPE_ID, "Inventory Type", 
                "鑳屽寘绫诲瀷 (main, armor, offhand, enderchest, all)", NodeDataType.STRING, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_FILTER_EMPTY_ID, "Filter Empty Slots", 
                "鏄惁杩囨护绌烘Ы浣?, NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_ITEMS_ID, "Items", 
                "鑾峰彇鍒扮殑鐗╁搧鍒楄〃", NodeDataType.LIST, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID, "Success", 
                "鏄惁鎴愬姛鑾峰彇鐗╁搧", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_ITEM_COUNT_ID, "Item Count", 
                "鑾峰彇鍒扮殑鐗╁搧鏁伴噺", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_SLOTS_INFO_ID, "Slots Info", 
                "姣忎釜鐗╁搧瀵瑰簲鐨勬Ы浣嶄俊鎭?, NodeDataType.LIST, this));
    }

    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return this.description;
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 榛樿杈撳嚭鍊?
        List<Object> items = new ArrayList<>();
        boolean success = false;
        int itemCount = 0;
        List<Map<String, Object>> slotsInfo = new ArrayList<>();
        
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object playerObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_PLAYER_ID);
        Object inventoryTypeObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_INVENTORY_TYPE_ID);
        Object filterEmptyObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_FILTER_EMPTY_ID);
        
        // 纭畾鑳屽寘绫诲瀷
        String invType = this.inventoryType;
        if (inventoryTypeObj instanceof String) {
            invType = ((String) inventoryTypeObj).toLowerCase();
        }
        
        // 纭畾鏄惁杩囨护绌烘Ы浣?
        boolean filterEmpty = true;
        if (filterEmptyObj instanceof Boolean) {
            filterEmpty = (Boolean) filterEmptyObj;
        }
        
        // 妫€鏌ュ繀瑕佺殑杈撳叆鏄惁瀛樺湪
        if (playerObj != null) {
            try {
                /*
                鍦ㄥ疄闄呭疄鐜颁腑锛岄渶瑕佹牴鎹甅inecraft API瀹炵幇浠ヤ笅鎿嶄綔:
                1. 鑾峰彇鐜╁鐨勮儗鍖?
                2. 鏍规嵁鑳屽寘绫诲瀷鍜岃繃婊ら€夐」鑾峰彇鐗╁搧
                3. 鎻愬彇鐗╁搧淇℃伅鍜屾Ы浣嶄俊鎭?
                
                if (playerObj instanceof PlayerEntity) {
                    PlayerEntity player = (PlayerEntity) playerObj;
                    PlayerInventory inventory = player.getInventory();
                    
                    // 澶勭悊涓嶅悓绫诲瀷鐨勮儗鍖?
                    switch (invType) {
                        case "main": 
                            // 涓昏儗鍖咃紙鍖呮嫭蹇嵎鏍忓拰涓昏儗鍖咃級
                            for (int i = 0; i < 36; i++) {
                                processInventorySlot(inventory, i, items, slotsInfo, filterEmpty);
                            }
                            break;
                            
                        case "armor":
                            // 瑁呭鏍?
                            for (int i = 36; i < 40; i++) {
                                processInventorySlot(inventory, i, items, slotsInfo, filterEmpty);
                            }
                            break;
                            
                        case "offhand":
                            // 鍓墜
                            processInventorySlot(inventory, 40, items, slotsInfo, filterEmpty);
                            break;
                            
                        case "enderchest":
                            // 鏈奖绠?
                            PlayerEntity serverPlayer = player;
                            Inventory enderChest = serverPlayer.getEnderChestInventory();
                            
                            for (int i = 0; i < enderChest.size(); i++) {
                                ItemStack item = enderChest.getStack(i);
                                if (!item.isEmpty() || !filterEmpty) {
                                    items.add(item);
                                    
                                    Map<String, Object> slotInfo = new HashMap<>();
                                    slotInfo.put("slot", i);
                                    slotInfo.put("type", "enderchest");
                                    slotsInfo.add(slotInfo);
                                }
                            }
                            break;
                            
                        case "all":
                        default:
                            // 鎵€鏈夌墿鍝佹爮
                            // 涓昏儗鍖咃紙鍖呮嫭蹇嵎鏍忓拰涓昏儗鍖咃級
                            for (int i = 0; i < 36; i++) {
                                processInventorySlot(inventory, i, items, slotsInfo, filterEmpty);
                            }
                            
                            // 瑁呭鏍?
                            for (int i = 36; i < 40; i++) {
                                processInventorySlot(inventory, i, items, slotsInfo, filterEmpty);
                            }
                            
                            // 鍓墜
                            processInventorySlot(inventory, 40, items, slotsInfo, filterEmpty);
                            break;
                    }
                    
                    itemCount = items.size();
                    success = true;
                }
                */
                
                // 妯℃嫙鎴愬姛鑾峰彇鑳屽寘鐗╁搧 (鍦ㄥ疄闄呭疄鐜颁腑鏇挎崲涓轰笂闈㈢殑閫昏緫)
                for (int i = 0; i < 5; i++) {
                    Object mockItem = new Object(); // 妯℃嫙鐗╁搧
                    items.add(mockItem);
                    
                    Map<String, Object> slotInfo = new HashMap<>();
                    slotInfo.put("slot", i);
                    slotInfo.put("type", invType);
                    slotsInfo.add(slotInfo);
                }
                
                itemCount = items.size();
                success = true;
            } catch (Exception e) {
                success = false;
                System.err.println("Error getting items in inventory: " + e.getMessage());
            }
        }
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_ITEMS_ID, items);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID, success);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_ITEM_COUNT_ID, itemCount);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_SLOTS_INFO_ID, slotsInfo);
    }
    
    /* 
    // 澶勭悊鑳屽寘妲戒綅鐨勮緟鍔╂柟娉?
    private void processInventorySlot(PlayerInventory inventory, int slot, 
                                     List<Object> items, List<Map<String, Object>> slotsInfo, 
                                     boolean filterEmpty) {
        ItemStack item = inventory.getStack(slot);
        if (!item.isEmpty() || !filterEmpty) {
            items.add(item);
            
            Map<String, Object> slotInfo = new HashMap<>();
            slotInfo.put("slot", slot);
            
            // 纭畾妲戒綅绫诲瀷
            String type = "main";
            if (slot >= 0 && slot < 9) {
                type = "hotbar";
            } else if (slot >= 9 && slot < 36) {
                type = "main";
            } else if (slot >= 36 && slot < 40) {
                type = "armor";
            } else if (slot == 40) {
                type = "offhand";
            }
            
            slotInfo.put("type", type);
            slotsInfo.add(slotInfo);
        }
    }
    */
    
    // --- Getters/Setters for Properties ---
    
    public String getInventoryType() {
        return inventoryType;
    }
    
    public void setInventoryType(String inventoryType) {
        if (isValidInventoryType(inventoryType)) {
            this.inventoryType = inventoryType.toLowerCase();
            markDirty();
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * 妫€鏌ヨ儗鍖呯被鍨嬫槸鍚︽湁鏁?
     */
    private boolean isValidInventoryType(String type) {
        if (type == null) return false;
        
        switch (type.toLowerCase()) {
            case "main":
            case "armor":
            case "offhand":
            case "enderchest":
            case "all":
                return true;
            default:
                return false;
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * 淇濆瓨鑺傜偣鐘舵€?
     */
    @Override
    public @Nullable Object getNodeState() {
        return inventoryType;
    }
    
    /**
     * 鎭㈠鑺傜偣鐘舵€?
     */
    @Override
    public void setNodeState(@Nullable Object state) {
        if (state instanceof String) {
            setInventoryType((String) state);
        }
    }
}

package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.world.inventory;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Give Item to Player 鑺傜偣: 缁欑帺瀹剁墿鍝併€?
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "world.inventory.give_item_to_player",
    displayName = "缁欑帺瀹剁墿鍝?,
    description = "缁欑帺瀹剁墿鍝?,
    category = "world.inventory"
)
public class GiveItemToPlayerNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 鑺傜偣灞炴€?---
    private boolean playSound = true; // 鏄惁鎾斁鎷惧彇澹伴煶
    private String description = "灏?ItemStack 缁欎簣鐜╁";

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_PLAYER_ID = "input_player";
    private static final String INPUT_ITEM_ID = "input_item";
    private static final String INPUT_PLAY_SOUND_ID = "input_play_sound";
    private static final String INPUT_FORCE_GIVE_ID = "input_force_give";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID = "output_success";
    private static final String OUTPUT_ITEM_LEFT_ID = "output_item_left";
    private static final String OUTPUT_AMOUNT_GIVEN_ID = "output_amount_given";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public GiveItemToPlayerNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "world.inventory.give_item_to_player");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_PLAYER_ID, "Player", 
                "鐩爣鐜╁", NodeDataType.PLAYER, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_ITEM_ID, "Item", 
                "瑕佺粰浜堢殑鐗╁搧", NodeDataType.ITEM_STACK, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_PLAY_SOUND_ID, "Play Sound", 
                "鏄惁鎾斁鎷惧彇澹伴煶", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_FORCE_GIVE_ID, "Force Give", 
                "鏄惁寮哄埗缁欎簣锛堝鏋滃簱瀛樻弧鍒欎涪寮冨湪鍦颁笂锛?, NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID, "Success", 
                "鏄惁鎴愬姛缁欎簣鐗╁搧", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_ITEM_LEFT_ID, "Item Left", 
                "鏃犳硶鏀惧叆鐨勫墿浣欑墿鍝?, NodeDataType.ITEM_STACK, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_AMOUNT_GIVEN_ID, "Amount Given", 
                "鎴愬姛缁欎簣鐨勭墿鍝佹暟閲?, NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
    }

    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return this.description;
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 榛樿杈撳嚭鍊?
        boolean success = false;
        Object itemLeft = null;
        int amountGiven = 0;
        
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object playerObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_PLAYER_ID);
        Object itemObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_ITEM_ID);
        Object playSoundObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_PLAY_SOUND_ID);
        Object forceGiveObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_FORCE_GIVE_ID);
        
        // 纭畾鏄惁鎾斁澹伴煶
        boolean playSound = this.playSound;
        if (playSoundObj instanceof Boolean) {
            playSound = (Boolean) playSoundObj;
        }
        
        // 纭畾鏄惁寮哄埗缁欎簣
        boolean forceGive = false;
        if (forceGiveObj instanceof Boolean) {
            forceGive = (Boolean) forceGiveObj;
        }
        
        // 妫€鏌ュ繀瑕佺殑杈撳叆鏄惁瀛樺湪
        if (playerObj != null && itemObj != null) {
            try {
                /*
                鍦ㄥ疄闄呭疄鐜颁腑锛岄渶瑕佹牴鎹甅inecraft API瀹炵幇浠ヤ笅鎿嶄綔:
                1. 灏濊瘯灏嗙墿鍝佹坊鍔犲埌鐜╁搴撳瓨
                2. 澶勭悊鏃犳硶鏀惧叆鐨勭墿鍝?
                3. 鍙€夋挱鏀炬嬀鍙栧０闊?
                
                if (playerObj instanceof PlayerEntity && itemObj instanceof ItemStack) {
                    PlayerEntity player = (PlayerEntity) playerObj;
                    ItemStack originalStack = (ItemStack) itemObj;
                    
                    // 澶嶅埗涓€浠界墿鍝侊紝闃叉淇敼鍘熷鐗╁搧
                    ItemStack stack = originalStack.copy();
                    
                    if (stack.isEmpty()) {
                        // 绌虹墿鍝佸爢锛岀洿鎺ョ畻鎴愬姛
                        success = true;
                        amountGiven = 0;
                    } else {
                        int originalCount = stack.getCount();
                        
                        // 灏濊瘯灏嗙墿鍝佹坊鍔犲埌鐜╁搴撳瓨
                        boolean couldMergeCompletely = player.getInventory().insertStack(stack);
                        
                        if (couldMergeCompletely) {
                            // 鍏ㄩ儴鎴愬姛鏀惧叆搴撳瓨
                            amountGiven = originalCount;
                            success = true;
                        } else {
                            // 閮ㄥ垎鎴愬姛鎴栧叏閮ㄥけ璐?
                            amountGiven = originalCount - stack.getCount();
                            
                            if (forceGive && !stack.isEmpty()) {
                                // 濡傛灉寮哄埗缁欎簣锛屽垯灏嗗墿浣欑墿鍝佷涪鍦ㄥ湴涓?
                                player.dropItem(stack.copy(), false);
                                stack.setCount(0);
                                amountGiven = originalCount;
                                success = true;
                            } else {
                                // 杩斿洖鍓╀綑鐗╁搧
                                itemLeft = stack;
                                success = (amountGiven > 0);
                            }
                        }
                        
                        // 鎾斁鎷惧彇澹伴煶
                        if (playSound && amountGiven > 0) {
                            player.playSound(SoundEvents.ENTITY_ITEM_PICKUP, 0.2f, 
                                    ((player.getRandom().nextFloat() - player.getRandom().nextFloat()) * 0.7f + 1.0f) * 2.0f);
                        }
                    }
                }
                */
                
                // 妯℃嫙鎴愬姛缁欎簣鐗╁搧 (鍦ㄥ疄闄呭疄鐜颁腑鏇挎崲涓轰笂闈㈢殑閫昏緫)
                success = true;
                amountGiven = 1;
            } catch (Exception e) {
                success = false;
                System.err.println("Error giving item to player: " + e.getMessage());
            }
        }
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID, success);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_ITEM_LEFT_ID, itemLeft);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_AMOUNT_GIVEN_ID, amountGiven);
    }
    
    // --- Getters/Setters for Properties ---
    
    public boolean isPlaySound() {
        return playSound;
    }
    
    public void setPlaySound(boolean playSound) {
        this.playSound = playSound;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    /**
     * 淇濆瓨鑺傜偣鐘舵€?
     */
    @Override
    public @Nullable Object getNodeState() {
        return playSound;
    }
    
    /**
     * 鎭㈠鑺傜偣鐘舵€?
     */
    @Override
    public void setNodeState(@Nullable Object state) {
        if (state instanceof Boolean) {
            playSound = (Boolean) state;
        }
    }
} 
===FILE: C:\Users\navib\Desktop\development\NC\nodecraft\src\main\java\com\nodecraft\nodesystem\nodes\world\inventory\PlaceItemInContainerNode.java===
package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.world.inventory;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Place Item in Container 鑺傜偣: 灏嗙墿鍝佹斁鍏ュ鍣ㄣ€?
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "world.inventory.place_item_in_container",
    displayName = "鏀剧疆鐗╁搧鍒板鍣?,
    description = "灏嗙墿鍝佹斁鍏ュ鍣?,
    category = "world.inventory"
)
public class PlaceItemInContainerNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 鑺傜偣灞炴€?---
    private boolean playSound = true; // 鏄惁鎾斁鏀剧疆澹伴煶
    private boolean mergeItems = true; // 鏄惁鍚堝苟鐩稿悓鐗╁搧
    private String description = "灏?ItemStack 鏀惧叆鎸囧畾 Coordinate 鐨勫鍣?;

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_COORDINATE_ID = "input_coordinate";
    private static final String INPUT_ITEM_ID = "input_item";
    private static final String INPUT_SLOT_ID = "input_slot";
    private static final String INPUT_PLAY_SOUND_ID = "input_play_sound";
    private static final String INPUT_MERGE_ITEMS_ID = "input_merge_items";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID = "output_success";
    private static final String OUTPUT_ITEM_LEFT_ID = "output_item_left";
    private static final String OUTPUT_AMOUNT_PLACED_ID = "output_amount_placed";
    private static final String OUTPUT_CONTAINER_TYPE_ID = "output_container_type";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public PlaceItemInContainerNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "world.inventory.place_item_in_container");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_COORDINATE_ID, "Coordinate", 
                "鐩爣瀹瑰櫒鍧愭爣", NodeDataType.COORDINATE, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_ITEM_ID, "Item", 
                "瑕佹斁鍏ョ殑鐗╁搧", NodeDataType.ITEM_STACK, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_SLOT_ID, "Slot", 
                "鐩爣妲戒綅锛?1琛ㄧず鑷姩瀵绘壘鍚堥€傛Ы浣嶏級", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_PLAY_SOUND_ID, "Play Sound", 
                "鏄惁鎾斁鏀剧疆澹伴煶", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_MERGE_ITEMS_ID, "Merge Items", 
                "鏄惁鍚堝苟鐩稿悓鐗╁搧", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID, "Success", 
                "鏄惁鎴愬姛鏀剧疆鐗╁搧", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_ITEM_LEFT_ID, "Item Left", 
                "鏃犳硶鏀惧叆鐨勫墿浣欑墿鍝?, NodeDataType.ITEM_STACK, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_AMOUNT_PLACED_ID, "Amount Placed", 
                "鎴愬姛鏀惧叆鐨勭墿鍝佹暟閲?, NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_CONTAINER_TYPE_ID, "Container Type", 
                "瀹瑰櫒绫诲瀷锛堝chest, furnace, hopper绛夛級", NodeDataType.STRING, this));
    }

    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return this.description;
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 榛樿杈撳嚭鍊?
        boolean success = false;
        Object itemLeft = null;
        int amountPlaced = 0;
        String containerType = "";
        
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object coordinateObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_COORDINATE_ID);
        Object itemObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_ITEM_ID);
        Object slotObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_SLOT_ID);
        Object playSoundObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_PLAY_SOUND_ID);
        Object mergeItemsObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_MERGE_ITEMS_ID);
        
        // 纭畾妲戒綅
        int slot = -1; // 榛樿涓鸿嚜鍔ㄥ鎵惧悎閫傛Ы浣?
        if (slotObj instanceof Number) {
            slot = ((Number) slotObj).intValue();
        }
        
        // 纭畾鏄惁鎾斁澹伴煶
        boolean playSound = this.playSound;
        if (playSoundObj instanceof Boolean) {
            playSound = (Boolean) playSoundObj;
        }
        
        // 纭畾鏄惁鍚堝苟鐗╁搧
        boolean mergeItems = this.mergeItems;
        if (mergeItemsObj instanceof Boolean) {
            mergeItems = (Boolean) mergeItemsObj;
        }
        
        // 妫€鏌ュ繀瑕佺殑杈撳叆鏄惁瀛樺湪
        if (coordinateObj != null && itemObj != null) {
            try {
                /*
                鍦ㄥ疄闄呭疄鐜颁腑锛岄渶瑕佹牴鎹甅inecraft API瀹炵幇浠ヤ笅鎿嶄綔:
                1. 鑾峰彇鎸囧畾鍧愭爣鐨勫鍣ㄦ柟鍧楀疄浣?
                2. 灏濊瘯灏嗙墿鍝佹斁鍏ュ鍣?
                3. 澶勭悊鏃犳硶鏀惧叆鐨勭墿鍝?
                4. 鍙€夋挱鏀炬斁缃０闊?
                
                if (coordinateObj instanceof BlockPos && itemObj instanceof ItemStack) {
                    BlockPos pos = (BlockPos) coordinateObj;
                    ItemStack originalStack = (ItemStack) itemObj;
                    
                    // 妫€鏌ユ柟鍧楀疄浣撴槸鍚﹀瓨鍦ㄤ笖鏄鍣?
                    BlockEntity blockEntity = world.getBlockEntity(pos);
                    if (blockEntity instanceof Inventory) {
                        Inventory inventory = (Inventory) blockEntity;
                        containerType = blockEntity.getType().toString();
                        
                        // 澶嶅埗涓€浠界墿鍝侊紝闃叉淇敼鍘熷鐗╁搧
                        ItemStack stack = originalStack.copy();
                        int originalCount = stack.getCount();
                        
                        if (stack.isEmpty()) {
                            // 绌虹墿鍝佸爢锛岀洿鎺ョ畻鎴愬姛
                            success = true;
                            amountPlaced = 0;
                        } else {
                            // 澶勭悊鎸囧畾妲戒綅鐨勬儏鍐?
                            if (slot >= 0 && slot < inventory.size()) {
                                // 鏀惧叆鎸囧畾妲戒綅
                                ItemStack slotStack = inventory.getStack(slot);
                                
                                if (slotStack.isEmpty()) {
                                    // 妲戒綅涓虹┖锛岀洿鎺ユ斁鍏?
                                    inventory.setStack(slot, stack.copy());
                                    amountPlaced = stack.getCount();
                                    stack.setCount(0);
                                    success = true;
                                } else if (mergeItems && ItemStack.canCombine(slotStack, stack)) {
                                    // 鍙悎骞剁墿鍝?
                                    int maxStackSize = Math.min(inventory.getMaxCountPerStack(), slotStack.getMaxCount());
                                    int canAdd = Math.max(0, maxStackSize - slotStack.getCount());
                                    
                                    if (canAdd > 0) {
                                        int toAdd = Math.min(canAdd, stack.getCount());
                                        slotStack.increment(toAdd);
                                        stack.decrement(toAdd);
                                        amountPlaced = toAdd;
                                        success = true;
                                    }
                                }
                            } else {
                                // 鑷姩瀵绘壘鍚堥€傛Ы浣?
                                if (mergeItems) {
                                    // 鍏堝皾璇曞悎骞跺埌鐩稿悓鐗╁搧鐨勬Ы浣?
                                    for (int i = 0; i < inventory.size() && !stack.isEmpty(); i++) {
                                        ItemStack slotStack = inventory.getStack(i);
                                        
                                        if (!slotStack.isEmpty() && ItemStack.canCombine(slotStack, stack)) {
                                            int maxStackSize = Math.min(inventory.getMaxCountPerStack(), slotStack.getMaxCount());
                                            int canAdd = Math.max(0, maxStackSize - slotStack.getCount());
                                            
                                            if (canAdd > 0) {
                                                int toAdd = Math.min(canAdd, stack.getCount());
                                                slotStack.increment(toAdd);
                                                stack.decrement(toAdd);
                                                amountPlaced += toAdd;
                                                success = true;
                                            }
                                        }
                                    }
                                }
                                
                                // 鍐嶅皾璇曟斁鍏ョ┖妲戒綅
                                for (int i = 0; i < inventory.size() && !stack.isEmpty(); i++) {
                                    ItemStack slotStack = inventory.getStack(i);
                                    
                                    if (slotStack.isEmpty()) {
                                        int toAdd = stack.getCount();
                                        inventory.setStack(i, stack.copy());
                                        stack.setCount(0);
                                        amountPlaced += toAdd;
                                        success = true;
                                        break;
                                    }
                                }
                            }
                            
                            // 澶勭悊鍓╀綑鐗╁搧
                            if (!stack.isEmpty()) {
                                itemLeft = stack;
                            }
                            
                            // 鎾斁鏀剧疆澹伴煶
                            if (playSound && amountPlaced > 0) {
                                world.playSound(null, pos, SoundEvents.BLOCK_CHEST_LOCKED, SoundCategory.BLOCKS, 
                                        0.5f, world.random.nextFloat() * 0.1f + 0.9f);
                            }
                            
                            // 鏍囪鏂瑰潡瀹炰綋涓哄凡鏇存敼
                            if (success) {
                                blockEntity.markDirty();
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
                */
                
                // 妯℃嫙鎴愬姛鏀剧疆鐗╁搧 (鍦ㄥ疄闄呭疄鐜颁腑鏇挎崲涓轰笂闈㈢殑閫昏緫)
                success = true;
                amountPlaced = 1;
                containerType = "minecraft:chest";
            } catch (Exception e) {
                success = false;
                System.err.println("Error placing item in container: " + e.getMessage());
            }
        }
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID, success);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_ITEM_LEFT_ID, itemLeft);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_AMOUNT_PLACED_ID, amountPlaced);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_CONTAINER_TYPE_ID, containerType);
    }
    
    // --- Getters/Setters for Properties ---
    
    public boolean isPlaySound() {
        return playSound;
    }
    
    public void setPlaySound(boolean playSound) {
        this.playSound = playSound;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    public boolean isMergeItems() {
        return mergeItems;
    }
    
    public void setMergeItems(boolean mergeItems) {
        this.mergeItems = mergeItems;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    /**
     * 淇濆瓨鑺傜偣鐘舵€?
     */
    @Override
    public @Nullable Object getNodeState() {
        // 灏嗕袱涓睘鎬у悎骞朵负涓€涓璞′繚瀛?
        boolean[] state = new boolean[2];
        state[0] = playSound;
        state[1] = mergeItems;
        return state;
    }
    
    /**
     * 鎭㈠鑺傜偣鐘舵€?
     */
    @Override
    public void setNodeState(@Nullable Object state) {
        if (state instanceof boolean[]) {
            boolean[] boolState = (boolean[]) state;
            if (boolState.length >= 2) {
                playSound = boolState[0];
                mergeItems = boolState[1];
            }
        }
    }
}

package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.world.modification;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.datatypes.RegionData;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.util.BlockPosList;

import net.minecraft.util.math.BlockPos;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;

import java.util.HashMap;
import java.util.Map;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Clone Region 鑺傜偣: 灏嗕竴涓尯鍩熺殑鏂瑰潡鍏嬮殕鍒板彟涓€涓綅缃?
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "world.modification.clone_region",
    displayName = "澶嶅埗鍖哄煙",
    description = "澶嶅埗鍖哄煙鍒板彟涓€涓綅缃?,
    category = "world.modification"
)
public class CloneRegionNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 鑺傜偣灞炴€?---
    private String description = "灏嗕竴涓尯鍩熺殑鏂瑰潡鍏嬮殕鍒板彟涓€涓綅缃?;
    private boolean notifyUpdate = true; // 鏄惁閫氱煡鏇存柊锛堣Е鍙戞洿鏂颁簨浠讹級
    private boolean includeEntities = false; // 鏄惁鍖呮嫭瀹炰綋
    private boolean includeAir = true; // 鏄惁鍏嬮殕绌烘皵鏂瑰潡
    private boolean batchUpdates = true; // 鏄惁鎵归噺鏇存柊锛屾彁楂樻€ц兘
    private CloneMode cloneMode = CloneMode.NORMAL; // 鍏嬮殕妯″紡
    private int maxBlocks = 32768; // 鏈€澶ф搷浣滄柟鍧楁暟锛堥槻姝㈣繃澶у尯鍩熷鑷存€ц兘闂锛?

    // --- 鍏嬮殕妯″紡鏋氫妇 ---
    public enum CloneMode {
        NORMAL("姝ｅ父", "鍘熸牱澶嶅埗婧愬尯鍩?),
        FORCE("寮哄埗", "鍗充娇婧愬尯鍩熸湁涓嶅彲绉诲姩鏂瑰潡涔熷己鍒跺厠闅?),
        MOVE("绉诲姩", "鍏嬮殕鍚庡皢婧愬尯鍩熻缃负绌烘皵"),
        MASKED("钂欑増", "鍙厠闅嗛潪绌烘皵鏂瑰潡");
        
        private final String displayName;
        private final String description;
        
        CloneMode(String displayName, String description) {
            this.displayName = displayName;
            this.description = description;
        }
        
        public String getDisplayName() {
            return displayName;
        }
        
        public String getDescription() {
            return description;
        }
    }

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_SOURCE_REGION_ID = "input_source_region";
    private static final String INPUT_DESTINATION_POS_ID = "input_destination_pos";
    private static final String INPUT_INCLUDE_ENTITIES_ID = "input_include_entities";
    private static final String INPUT_INCLUDE_AIR_ID = "input_include_air";
    private static final String INPUT_CLONE_MODE_ID = "input_clone_mode";
    private static final String INPUT_NOTIFY_ID = "input_notify";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_CLONED_BLOCKS_ID = "output_cloned_blocks";
    private static final String OUTPUT_SUCCESS_COUNT_ID = "output_success_count";
    private static final String OUTPUT_TOTAL_COUNT_ID = "output_total_count";
    private static final String OUTPUT_DESTINATION_REGION_ID = "output_destination_region";
    private static final String OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID = "output_success";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public CloneRegionNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "world.modification.clone_region");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_SOURCE_REGION_ID, "Source Region", 
                "瑕佸厠闅嗙殑婧愬尯鍩?, NodeDataType.REGION, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_DESTINATION_POS_ID, "Destination Position", 
                "鐩爣浣嶇疆锛堝乏涓嬭鍧愭爣锛?, NodeDataType.BLOCK_POS, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_INCLUDE_ENTITIES_ID, "Include Entities", 
                "鏄惁鍖呮嫭瀹炰綋", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_INCLUDE_AIR_ID, "Include Air", 
                "鏄惁鍏嬮殕绌烘皵鏂瑰潡", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_CLONE_MODE_ID, "Clone Mode", 
                "鍏嬮殕妯″紡 (0=姝ｅ父, 1=寮哄埗, 2=绉诲姩, 3=钂欑増)", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_NOTIFY_ID, "Notify Update", 
                "鏄惁閫氱煡鏇存柊锛堣Е鍙戞洿鏂颁簨浠讹級", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_CLONED_BLOCKS_ID, "Cloned Blocks", 
                "鍏嬮殕鐨勬柟鍧楁暟閲?, NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_COUNT_ID, "Success Count", 
                "鎴愬姛鏀剧疆鐨勬柟鍧楁暟閲?, NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_TOTAL_COUNT_ID, "Total Count", 
                "灏濊瘯鏀剧疆鐨勬柟鍧楁€绘暟", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_DESTINATION_REGION_ID, "Destination Region", 
                "鐩爣鍖哄煙", NodeDataType.REGION, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID, "Success", 
                "鏄惁鎿嶄綔鎴愬姛", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
    }

    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return this.description;
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 榛樿杈撳嚭鍊?
        int clonedBlocks = 0;
        int successCount = 0;
        int totalCount = 0;
        RegionData destinationRegion = null;
        boolean success = false;
        
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object sourceRegionObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_SOURCE_REGION_ID);
        Object destinationPosObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_DESTINATION_POS_ID);
        
        // 鑾峰彇甯冨皵鍊煎弬鏁?
        boolean includeEntitiesValue = this.includeEntities;
        Object includeEntitiesObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_INCLUDE_ENTITIES_ID);
        if (includeEntitiesObj instanceof Boolean) {
            includeEntitiesValue = (Boolean) includeEntitiesObj;
        }
        
        boolean includeAirValue = this.includeAir;
        Object includeAirObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_INCLUDE_AIR_ID);
        if (includeAirObj instanceof Boolean) {
            includeAirValue = (Boolean) includeAirObj;
        }
        
        boolean notifyUpdateValue = this.notifyUpdate;
        Object notifyUpdateObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_NOTIFY_ID);
        if (notifyUpdateObj instanceof Boolean) {
            notifyUpdateValue = (Boolean) notifyUpdateObj;
        }
        
        // 鑾峰彇鍏嬮殕妯″紡
        CloneMode cloneModeValue = this.cloneMode;
        Object cloneModeObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_CLONE_MODE_ID);
        if (cloneModeObj instanceof Number) {
            int modeIndex = ((Number) cloneModeObj).intValue();
            if (modeIndex >= 0 && modeIndex < CloneMode.values().length) {
                cloneModeValue = CloneMode.values()[modeIndex];
            }
        }
        
        // 妫€鏌ユ墽琛屼笂涓嬫枃鍜屽繀瑕佽緭鍏ユ槸鍚︽湁鏁?
        if (context != null && context.getWorld() != null && 
                sourceRegionObj instanceof RegionData && destinationPosObj instanceof BlockPos) {
            RegionData sourceRegion = (RegionData) sourceRegionObj;
            BlockPos destinationPos = (BlockPos) destinationPosObj;
            
            // 纭繚婧愬尯鍩熷畬鏁翠笖鏈夋晥
            if (sourceRegion.isComplete()) {
                BlockPos sourceMinCorner = sourceRegion.getMinCorner();
                BlockPos sourceMaxCorner = sourceRegion.getMaxCorner();
                
                // 璁＄畻鍖哄煙灏哄
                int width = sourceMaxCorner.getX() - sourceMinCorner.getX() + 1;
                int height = sourceMaxCorner.getY() - sourceMinCorner.getY() + 1;
                int depth = sourceMaxCorner.getZ() - sourceMinCorner.getZ() + 1;
                int volume = width * height * depth;
                
                // 妫€鏌ヤ綋绉槸鍚﹁秴杩囨渶澶ф柟鍧楁暟
                if (volume > maxBlocks) {
                    System.err.println("Region volume (" + volume + ") exceeds max blocks limit (" + maxBlocks + ").");
                    
                    // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊煎苟杩斿洖
                    outputValues.put(OUTPUT_CLONED_BLOCKS_ID, clonedBlocks);
                    outputValues.put(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_COUNT_ID, successCount);
                    outputValues.put(OUTPUT_TOTAL_COUNT_ID, totalCount);
                    outputValues.put(OUTPUT_DESTINATION_REGION_ID, destinationRegion);
                    outputValues.put(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID, success);
                    return;
                }
                
                // 璁＄畻鐩爣鍖哄煙鐨勮钀藉潗鏍?
                BlockPos destMinCorner = destinationPos;
                BlockPos destMaxCorner = new BlockPos(
                    destinationPos.getX() + width - 1,
                    destinationPos.getY() + height - 1,
                    destinationPos.getZ() + depth - 1
                );
                
                // 鍒涘缓鐩爣鍖哄煙
                destinationRegion = new RegionData(destMinCorner, destMaxCorner);
                
                // 妫€鏌ヤ袱涓尯鍩熸槸鍚﹂噸鍙狅紙闃叉鐮村潖婧愬尯鍩燂級
                boolean regionsOverlap = checkRegionsOverlap(sourceRegion, destinationRegion);
                
                if (regionsOverlap && cloneModeValue != CloneMode.MOVE) {
                    System.err.println("Source and destination regions overlap. Use MOVE mode to allow this.");
                    
                    // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊煎苟杩斿洖
                    outputValues.put(OUTPUT_CLONED_BLOCKS_ID, clonedBlocks);
                    outputValues.put(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_COUNT_ID, successCount);
                    outputValues.put(OUTPUT_TOTAL_COUNT_ID, totalCount);
                    outputValues.put(OUTPUT_DESTINATION_REGION_ID, destinationRegion);
                    outputValues.put(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID, success);
                    return;
                }
                
                // 鍦ㄥ疄闄呭疄鐜颁腑锛屽紑濮嬫壒閲忔洿鏂帮紙濡傛灉鍚敤锛?
                if (batchUpdates) {
                    // 寮€濮嬫壒閲忔洿鏂帮紝渚嬪 context.getWorld().beginBatchBlockUpdate();
                }
                
                try {
                    // 璁板綍婧愬尯鍩熶腑鐨勬墍鏈夋柟鍧楀拰瀹炰綋
                    Map<BlockPos, Object> blocksToCopy = new HashMap<>();
                    
                    // 閬嶅巻婧愬尯鍩熷唴鐨勬墍鏈夋柟鍧?
                    for (BlockPos pos : BlockPos.iterate(sourceMinCorner, sourceMaxCorner)) {
                        totalCount++;
                        BlockPos immutablePos = pos.toImmutable();
                        
                        try {
                            // 鑾峰彇鏂瑰潡鐘舵€?
                            Object blockState = context.getWorld().getBlockState(immutablePos);
                            
                            // 妫€鏌ユ槸鍚︿负绌烘皵锛堝鏋滀笉鍖呮嫭绌烘皵鍒欒烦杩囷級
                            boolean isAir = context.getWorld().isAir(immutablePos);
                            if (isAir && !includeAirValue) {
                                continue;
                            }
                            
                            // 澶勭悊钂欑増妯″紡 - 濡傛灉鏄挋鐗堟ā寮忎笖涓虹┖姘旓紝璺宠繃
                            if (cloneModeValue == CloneMode.MASKED && isAir) {
                                continue;
                            }
                            
                            // 璁＄畻婧愪笌鐩爣鍧愭爣鐨勫亸绉?
                            int offsetX = immutablePos.getX() - sourceMinCorner.getX();
                            int offsetY = immutablePos.getY() - sourceMinCorner.getY();
                            int offsetZ = immutablePos.getZ() - sourceMinCorner.getZ();
                            
                            // 璁＄畻鐩爣鍧愭爣
                            BlockPos destPos = new BlockPos(
                                destinationPos.getX() + offsetX,
                                destinationPos.getY() + offsetY,
                                destinationPos.getZ() + offsetZ
                            );
                            
                            // 璁板綍瑕佸鍒剁殑鏂瑰潡
                            blocksToCopy.put(destPos, blockState);
                        } catch (Exception e) {
                            // 璁板綍鍗曚釜鏂瑰潡璇诲彇閿欒浣嗙户缁墽琛?
                            System.err.println("Error reading block at " + immutablePos + ": " + e.getMessage());
                        }
                    }
                    
                    // 搴旂敤鍏嬮殕锛堟寜鐓ч『搴忓鐞嗭紝浠ョ‘淇濆儚閲嶅姏鏂瑰潡绛夎兘姝ｇ‘鏀剧疆锛?
                    for (Map.Entry<BlockPos, Object> entry : blocksToCopy.entrySet()) {
                        BlockPos pos = entry.getKey();
                        Object blockState = entry.getValue();
                        
                        try {
                            // 鍦ㄥ疄闄呭疄鐜颁腑鏀剧疆鏂瑰潡
                            // 渚嬪锛歜oolean blockSuccess = context.getWorld().setBlockState(pos, blockState, notifyUpdateValue, false);
                            
                            // 妯℃嫙鏀剧疆鎴愬姛
                            boolean blockSuccess = true;
                            
                            if (blockSuccess) {
                                successCount++;
                                clonedBlocks++;
                            }
                        } catch (Exception e) {
                            // 璁板綍鍗曚釜鏂瑰潡鏀剧疆閿欒浣嗙户缁墽琛?
                            System.err.println("Error placing block at " + pos + ": " + e.getMessage());
                        }
                    }
                    
                    // 濡傛灉鏄Щ鍔ㄦā寮忥紝娓呴櫎婧愬尯鍩?
                    if (cloneModeValue == CloneMode.MOVE) {
                        // 鑾峰彇绌烘皵鏂瑰潡鐘舵€?
                        // 鍦ㄥ疄闄呭疄鐜颁腑锛屽簲璇ヤ娇鐢∕inecraft API鑾峰彇绌烘皵鏂瑰潡
                        // 渚嬪锛欱lockState airState = Blocks.AIR.getDefaultState();
                        Object airState = null; // 妯℃嫙绌烘皵鏂瑰潡鐘舵€?
                        
                        // 娓呴櫎婧愬尯鍩?
                        for (BlockPos pos : BlockPos.iterate(sourceMinCorner, sourceMaxCorner)) {
                            try {
                                // 鍦ㄥ疄闄呭疄鐜颁腑璁剧疆涓虹┖姘旀柟鍧?
                                // 渚嬪锛歝ontext.getWorld().setBlockState(pos, airState, notifyUpdateValue, false);
                            } catch (Exception e) {
                                // 璁板綍鍗曚釜鏂瑰潡娓呴櫎閿欒浣嗙户缁墽琛?
                                System.err.println("Error clearing block at " + pos + ": " + e.getMessage());
                            }
                        }
                    }
                    
                    // 濡傛灉鍖呮嫭瀹炰綋锛屽厠闅嗗疄浣?
                    if (includeEntitiesValue) {
                        // 鍦ㄥ疄闄呭疄鐜颁腑锛岃幏鍙栨簮鍖哄煙鍐呯殑鎵€鏈夊疄浣?
                        // 鐒跺悗鍦ㄧ洰鏍囧尯鍩熷垱寤哄疄浣撳壇鏈?
                        // 濡傛灉鏄Щ鍔ㄦā寮忥紝鍒犻櫎婧愬尯鍩熶腑鐨勫疄浣?
                    }
                    
                    // 鎿嶄綔瀹屾垚
                    success = true;
                    
                } finally {
                    // 瀹屾垚鎵归噺鏇存柊锛堝鏋滃惎鐢級
                    if (batchUpdates) {
                        // 渚嬪: context.getWorld().endBatchBlockUpdate();
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_CLONED_BLOCKS_ID, clonedBlocks);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_COUNT_ID, successCount);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_TOTAL_COUNT_ID, totalCount);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_DESTINATION_REGION_ID, destinationRegion);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID, success);
    }
    
    /**
     * 妫€鏌ヤ袱涓尯鍩熸槸鍚﹂噸鍙?
     * @param region1 绗竴涓尯鍩?
     * @param region2 绗簩涓尯鍩?
     * @return 濡傛灉鍖哄煙閲嶅彔鍒欒繑鍥瀟rue
     */
    private boolean checkRegionsOverlap(RegionData region1, RegionData region2) {
        if (!region1.isComplete() || !region2.isComplete()) {
            return false;
        }
        
        BlockPos min1 = region1.getMinCorner();
        BlockPos max1 = region1.getMaxCorner();
        BlockPos min2 = region2.getMinCorner();
        BlockPos max2 = region2.getMaxCorner();
        
        // 妫€鏌ヤ换涓€缁村害鏄惁涓嶉噸鍙?
        return !(max1.getX() < min2.getX() || min1.getX() > max2.getX() ||
                max1.getY() < min2.getY() || min1.getY() > max2.getY() ||
                max1.getZ() < min2.getZ() || min1.getZ() > max2.getZ());
    }
    
    // --- Getters/Setters for Properties ---
    
    public boolean isNotifyUpdate() {
        return notifyUpdate;
    }
    
    public void setNotifyUpdate(boolean notifyUpdate) {
        this.notifyUpdate = notifyUpdate;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    public boolean isIncludeEntities() {
        return includeEntities;
    }
    
    public void setIncludeEntities(boolean includeEntities) {
        this.includeEntities = includeEntities;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    public boolean isIncludeAir() {
        return includeAir;
    }
    
    public void setIncludeAir(boolean includeAir) {
        this.includeAir = includeAir;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    public boolean isBatchUpdates() {
        return batchUpdates;
    }
    
    public void setBatchUpdates(boolean batchUpdates) {
        this.batchUpdates = batchUpdates;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    public CloneMode getCloneMode() {
        return cloneMode;
    }
    
    public void setCloneMode(CloneMode cloneMode) {
        this.cloneMode = cloneMode;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    public int getMaxBlocks() {
        return maxBlocks;
    }
    
    public void setMaxBlocks(int maxBlocks) {
        if (maxBlocks > 0) {
            this.maxBlocks = maxBlocks;
            markDirty();
        }
    }
} 
===FILE: C:\Users\navib\Desktop\development\NC\nodecraft\src\main\java\com\nodecraft\nodesystem\nodes\world\modification\FillRegionNode.java===
package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.world.modification;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.datatypes.RegionData;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.util.BlockPosList;

import net.minecraft.util.math.BlockPos;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Fill Region 鑺傜偣: 鐢ㄦ寚瀹氭柟鍧楀～鍏呭尯鍩熴€?
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "world.modification.fill_region",
    displayName = "濉厖鍖哄煙",
    description = "鐢ㄦ寚瀹氭柟鍧楀～鍏呭尯鍩?,
    category = "world.modification"
)
public class FillRegionNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 鑺傜偣灞炴€?---
    private String description = "鐢ㄦ寚瀹氭柟鍧椾俊鎭～鍏呭尯鍩燂紙绫讳技 /fill 鍛戒护锛?;
    private boolean notifyUpdate = true; // 鏄惁閫氱煡鏇存柊锛堣Е鍙戞洿鏂颁簨浠讹級
    private boolean spawnDrops = false; // 鏀剧疆鏂瑰潡鏃舵槸鍚︾敓鎴愭帀钀界墿
    private boolean batchUpdates = true; // 鏄惁鎵归噺鏇存柊锛屾彁楂樻€ц兘
    private boolean excludeAir = false; // 鏄惁鎺掗櫎宸插瓨鍦ㄧ殑绌烘皵鏂瑰潡锛堝彧鏇挎崲闈炵┖姘旀柟鍧楋級
    private boolean hollow = false; // 鏄惁鍒涘缓涓┖缁撴瀯锛堜粎杈圭晫鏈夋柟鍧楋級
    private int maxBlocks = 32768; // 鏈€澶ф搷浣滄柟鍧楁暟锛堥槻姝㈣繃澶у尯鍩熷鑷存€ц兘闂锛?

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_REGION_ID = "input_region";
    private static final String INPUT_BLOCK_INFO_ID = "input_block_info";
    private static final String INPUT_HOLLOW_ID = "input_hollow";
    private static final String INPUT_EXCLUDE_AIR_ID = "input_exclude_air";
    private static final String INPUT_NOTIFY_ID = "input_notify";
    private static final String INPUT_SPAWN_DROPS_ID = "input_spawn_drops";
    private static final String INPUT_MAX_BLOCKS_ID = "input_max_blocks";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_FILLED_BLOCKS_ID = "output_filled_blocks";
    private static final String OUTPUT_AFFECTED_BLOCKS_ID = "output_affected_blocks";
    private static final String OUTPUT_SUCCESS_COUNT_ID = "output_success_count";
    private static final String OUTPUT_TOTAL_COUNT_ID = "output_total_count";
    private static final String OUTPUT_COORDINATES_ID = "output_coordinates";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public FillRegionNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "world.modification.fill_region");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_REGION_ID, "Region", 
                "瑕佸～鍏呯殑鍖哄煙", NodeDataType.REGION, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_BLOCK_INFO_ID, "Block Info", 
                "濉厖鐨勬柟鍧椾俊鎭?, NodeDataType.BLOCK_INFO, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_HOLLOW_ID, "Hollow", 
                "鏄惁鍒涘缓涓┖缁撴瀯", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_EXCLUDE_AIR_ID, "Exclude Air", 
                "鏄惁鎺掗櫎宸插瓨鍦ㄧ殑绌烘皵鏂瑰潡", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_NOTIFY_ID, "Notify Update", 
                "鏄惁閫氱煡鏇存柊锛堣Е鍙戞洿鏂颁簨浠讹級", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_SPAWN_DROPS_ID, "Spawn Drops", 
                "鏀剧疆鏂瑰潡鏃舵槸鍚︾敓鎴愭帀钀界墿", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_MAX_BLOCKS_ID, "Max Blocks", 
                "鏈€澶ф搷浣滄柟鍧楁暟", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_FILLED_BLOCKS_ID, "Filled Blocks", 
                "濉厖鐨勬柟鍧楁暟閲?, NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_AFFECTED_BLOCKS_ID, "Affected Blocks", 
                "鍙楀奖鍝嶇殑鏂瑰潡鏁伴噺", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_COUNT_ID, "Success Count", 
                "鎴愬姛鏀剧疆鐨勬柟鍧楁暟閲?, NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_TOTAL_COUNT_ID, "Total Count", 
                "灏濊瘯鏀剧疆鐨勬柟鍧楁€绘暟", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_COORDINATES_ID, "Coordinates", 
                "琚～鍏呯殑鍧愭爣鍒楄〃", NodeDataType.BLOCK_LIST, this));
    }

    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return this.description;
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 榛樿杈撳嚭鍊?
        int filledBlocks = 0;
        int affectedBlocks = 0;
        int successCount = 0;
        int totalCount = 0;
        BlockPosList coordinates = new BlockPosList();
        
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object regionObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_REGION_ID);
        Object blockInfoObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_BLOCK_INFO_ID);
        
        // 鑾峰彇甯冨皵鍊煎弬鏁?
        boolean hollowValue = this.hollow;
        Object hollowObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_HOLLOW_ID);
        if (hollowObj instanceof Boolean) {
            hollowValue = (Boolean) hollowObj;
        }
        
        boolean excludeAirValue = this.excludeAir;
        Object excludeAirObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_EXCLUDE_AIR_ID);
        if (excludeAirObj instanceof Boolean) {
            excludeAirValue = (Boolean) excludeAirObj;
        }
        
        boolean notifyUpdateValue = this.notifyUpdate;
        Object notifyUpdateObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_NOTIFY_ID);
        if (notifyUpdateObj instanceof Boolean) {
            notifyUpdateValue = (Boolean) notifyUpdateObj;
        }
        
        boolean spawnDropsValue = this.spawnDrops;
        Object spawnDropsObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_SPAWN_DROPS_ID);
        if (spawnDropsObj instanceof Boolean) {
            spawnDropsValue = (Boolean) spawnDropsObj;
        }
        
        // 鑾峰彇鏈€澶ф柟鍧楁暟
        int maxBlocksValue = this.maxBlocks;
        Object maxBlocksObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_MAX_BLOCKS_ID);
        if (maxBlocksObj instanceof Number) {
            maxBlocksValue = ((Number) maxBlocksObj).intValue();
            if (maxBlocksValue <= 0) {
                maxBlocksValue = Integer.MAX_VALUE;
            }
        }
        
        // 妫€鏌ユ墽琛屼笂涓嬫枃鍜屽尯鍩熻緭鍏ユ槸鍚︽湁鏁?
        if (context != null && context.getWorld() != null && 
                regionObj instanceof RegionData && blockInfoObj != null) {
            RegionData region = (RegionData) regionObj;
            
            // 纭繚鍖哄煙瀹屾暣涓旀湁鏁?
            if (region.isComplete()) {
                BlockPos minCorner = region.getMinCorner();
                BlockPos maxCorner = region.getMaxCorner();
                
                // 璁＄畻鍖哄煙浣撶Н
                int width = maxCorner.getX() - minCorner.getX() + 1;
                int height = maxCorner.getY() - minCorner.getY() + 1;
                int depth = maxCorner.getZ() - minCorner.getZ() + 1;
                int volume = width * height * depth;
                
                // 妫€鏌ヤ綋绉槸鍚﹁秴杩囨渶澶ф柟鍧楁暟
                if (volume > maxBlocksValue) {
                    System.err.println("Region volume (" + volume + ") exceeds max blocks limit (" + maxBlocksValue + ").");
                    
                    // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊煎苟杩斿洖
                    outputValues.put(OUTPUT_FILLED_BLOCKS_ID, filledBlocks);
                    outputValues.put(OUTPUT_AFFECTED_BLOCKS_ID, affectedBlocks);
                    outputValues.put(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_COUNT_ID, successCount);
                    outputValues.put(OUTPUT_TOTAL_COUNT_ID, totalCount);
                    outputValues.put(OUTPUT_COORDINATES_ID, coordinates);
                    return;
                }
                
                // 鍦ㄥ疄闄呭疄鐜颁腑锛屽紑濮嬫壒閲忔洿鏂帮紙濡傛灉鍚敤锛?
                if (batchUpdates) {
                    // 寮€濮嬫壒閲忔洿鏂帮紝渚嬪 context.getWorld().beginBatchBlockUpdate();
                }
                
                try {
                    // 閬嶅巻鍖哄煙鍐呯殑鎵€鏈夋柟鍧?
                    for (BlockPos pos : BlockPos.iterate(minCorner, maxCorner)) {
                        totalCount++;
                        affectedBlocks++;
                        
                        // 妫€鏌ユ槸鍚︿负涓┖缁撴瀯
                        boolean isShell = false;
                        if (hollowValue) {
                            isShell = pos.getX() == minCorner.getX() || pos.getX() == maxCorner.getX() ||
                                    pos.getY() == minCorner.getY() || pos.getY() == maxCorner.getY() ||
                                    pos.getZ() == minCorner.getZ() || pos.getZ() == maxCorner.getZ();
                            
                            // 濡傛灉鏄腑绌虹粨鏋勭殑鍐呴儴锛岃烦杩?
                            if (!isShell) {
                                continue;
                            }
                        }
                        
                        try {
                            BlockPos immutablePos = pos.toImmutable();
                            
                            // 妫€鏌ユ槸鍚︽帓闄ょ┖姘旀柟鍧?
                            if (excludeAirValue) {
                                boolean isAir = context.getWorld().isAir(immutablePos);
                                if (isAir) {
                                    continue; // 璺宠繃绌烘皵鏂瑰潡
                                }
                            }
                            
                            // 鍦ㄥ疄闄呭疄鐜颁腑鏀剧疆鏂瑰潡
                            // 渚嬪锛歜oolean success = context.getWorld().setBlockState(immutablePos, blockInfoObj, notifyUpdateValue, spawnDropsValue);
                            
                            // 妯℃嫙鏀剧疆鎴愬姛
                            boolean success = true;
                            
                            if (success) {
                                successCount++;
                                filledBlocks++;
                                coordinates.add(immutablePos);
                            }
                        } catch (Exception e) {
                            // 璁板綍鍗曚釜鏂瑰潡鏀剧疆閿欒浣嗙户缁墽琛?
                            System.err.println("Error filling block at " + pos + ": " + e.getMessage());
                        }
                    }
                } finally {
                    // 瀹屾垚鎵归噺鏇存柊锛堝鏋滃惎鐢級
                    if (batchUpdates) {
                        // 渚嬪: context.getWorld().endBatchBlockUpdate();
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_FILLED_BLOCKS_ID, filledBlocks);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_AFFECTED_BLOCKS_ID, affectedBlocks);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_COUNT_ID, successCount);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_TOTAL_COUNT_ID, totalCount);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_COORDINATES_ID, coordinates);
    }
    
    // --- Getters/Setters for Properties ---
    
    public boolean isNotifyUpdate() {
        return notifyUpdate;
    }
    
    public void setNotifyUpdate(boolean notifyUpdate) {
        this.notifyUpdate = notifyUpdate;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    public boolean isSpawnDrops() {
        return spawnDrops;
    }
    
    public void setSpawnDrops(boolean spawnDrops) {
        this.spawnDrops = spawnDrops;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    public boolean isBatchUpdates() {
        return batchUpdates;
    }
    
    public void setBatchUpdates(boolean batchUpdates) {
        this.batchUpdates = batchUpdates;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    public boolean isExcludeAir() {
        return excludeAir;
    }
    
    public void setExcludeAir(boolean excludeAir) {
        this.excludeAir = excludeAir;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    public boolean isHollow() {
        return hollow;
    }
    
    public void setHollow(boolean hollow) {
        this.hollow = hollow;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    public int getMaxBlocks() {
        return maxBlocks;
    }
    
    public void setMaxBlocks(int maxBlocks) {
        if (maxBlocks > 0) {
            this.maxBlocks = maxBlocks;
            markDirty();
        }
    }
}

    public String getDescription() {
        return this.description;
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 榛樿杈撳嚭鍊?
        int removedBlocks = 0;
        int successCount = 0;
        int totalCount = 0;
        Object previousBlocks = new java.util.ArrayList<>(); // 鐢ㄤ簬瀛樺偍琚Щ闄ょ殑鏂瑰潡淇℃伅
        
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object coordinatesObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_COORDINATES_ID);
        
        // 鑾峰彇甯冨皵鍊煎弬鏁?
        boolean notifyUpdateValue = this.notifyUpdate;
        Object notifyUpdateObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_NOTIFY_ID);
        if (notifyUpdateObj instanceof Boolean) {
            notifyUpdateValue = (Boolean) notifyUpdateObj;
        }
        
        boolean spawnDropsValue = this.spawnDrops;
        Object spawnDropsObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_SPAWN_DROPS_ID);
        if (spawnDropsObj instanceof Boolean) {
            spawnDropsValue = (Boolean) spawnDropsObj;
        }
        
        // 鑾峰彇鏈€澶ф柟鍧楁暟
        int maxBlocksValue = this.maxBlocks;
        Object maxBlocksObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_MAX_BLOCKS_ID);
        if (maxBlocksObj instanceof Number) {
            maxBlocksValue = ((Number) maxBlocksObj).intValue();
            if (maxBlocksValue <= 0) {
                maxBlocksValue = Integer.MAX_VALUE;
            }
        }
        
        // 妫€鏌ユ墽琛屼笂涓嬫枃鍜屽潗鏍囧垪琛ㄨ緭鍏ユ槸鍚︽湁鏁?
        if (context != null && context.getWorld() != null && 
                coordinatesObj instanceof BlockPosList) {
            BlockPosList coordinates = (BlockPosList) coordinatesObj;
            
            // 妫€鏌ュ潗鏍囨暟閲忔槸鍚﹁秴杩囨渶澶ф柟鍧楁暟
            if (coordinates.size() > maxBlocksValue) {
                System.err.println("Coordinate list size (" + coordinates.size() + ") exceeds max blocks limit (" + maxBlocksValue + ").");
                
                // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊煎苟杩斿洖
                outputValues.put(OUTPUT_REMOVED_BLOCKS_ID, removedBlocks);
                outputValues.put(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_COUNT_ID, successCount);
                outputValues.put(OUTPUT_TOTAL_COUNT_ID, totalCount);
                outputValues.put(OUTPUT_PREVIOUS_BLOCKS_ID, previousBlocks);
                return;
            }
            
            // 鍒涘缓瀛樺偍琚Щ闄ゆ柟鍧椾俊鎭殑鍒楄〃
            java.util.List<Object> previousBlocksList = new java.util.ArrayList<>();
            
            // 鍦ㄥ疄闄呭疄鐜颁腑锛屽紑濮嬫壒閲忔洿鏂帮紙濡傛灉鍚敤锛?
            if (batchUpdates) {
                // 寮€濮嬫壒閲忔洿鏂帮紝渚嬪 context.getWorld().beginBatchBlockUpdate();
            }
            
            try {
                // 鑾峰彇绌烘皵鏂瑰潡鐘舵€?
                // 鍦ㄥ疄闄呭疄鐜颁腑锛屽簲璇ヤ娇鐢∕inecraft API鑾峰彇绌烘皵鏂瑰潡
                // 渚嬪锛欱lockState airState = Blocks.AIR.getDefaultState();
                Object airState = null; // 妯℃嫙绌烘皵鏂瑰潡鐘舵€?
                
                // 閬嶅巻鎵€鏈夊潗鏍?
                for (BlockPos pos : coordinates) {
                    totalCount++;
                    
                    try {
                        // 鑾峰彇褰撳墠鏂瑰潡鐘舵€侊紙鐢ㄤ簬杩斿洖琚浛鎹㈢殑鏂瑰潡锛?
                        Object currentBlockState = context.getWorld().getBlockState(pos);
                        previousBlocksList.add(currentBlockState);
                        
                        // 妫€鏌ュ綋鍓嶄綅缃槸鍚﹀凡缁忔槸绌烘皵
                        boolean isAir = context.getWorld().isAir(pos);
                        
                        // 濡傛灉涓嶆槸绌烘皵锛岃繘琛屾浛鎹?
                        if (!isAir) {
                            // 鍦ㄥ疄闄呭疄鐜颁腑璁剧疆涓虹┖姘旀柟鍧?
                            // 渚嬪锛歜oolean success = context.getWorld().setBlockState(pos, airState, notifyUpdateValue, spawnDropsValue);
                            
                            // 妯℃嫙鏇挎崲鎴愬姛
                            boolean success = true;
                            
                            if (success) {
                                successCount++;
                                removedBlocks++;
                            }
                        } else {
                            // 宸茬粡鏄┖姘旓紝鑰冭檻涓烘搷浣滄垚鍔?
                            successCount++;
                        }
                    } catch (Exception e) {
                        // 璁板綍鍗曚釜鏂瑰潡绉婚櫎閿欒浣嗙户缁墽琛?
                        System.err.println("Error removing block at " + pos + ": " + e.getMessage());
                    }
                }
                
                // 璁剧疆琚Щ闄ょ殑鏂瑰潡淇℃伅鍒楄〃
                previousBlocks = previousBlocksList;
                
            } finally {
                // 瀹屾垚鎵归噺鏇存柊锛堝鏋滃惎鐢級
                if (batchUpdates) {
                    // 渚嬪: context.getWorld().endBatchBlockUpdate();
                }
            }
        }
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_REMOVED_BLOCKS_ID, removedBlocks);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_COUNT_ID, successCount);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_TOTAL_COUNT_ID, totalCount);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_PREVIOUS_BLOCKS_ID, previousBlocks);
    }
    
    // --- Getters/Setters for Properties ---
    
    public boolean isNotifyUpdate() {
        return notifyUpdate;
    }
    
    public void setNotifyUpdate(boolean notifyUpdate) {
        this.notifyUpdate = notifyUpdate;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    public boolean isSpawnDrops() {
        return spawnDrops;
    }
    
    public void setSpawnDrops(boolean spawnDrops) {
        this.spawnDrops = spawnDrops;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    public boolean isBatchUpdates() {
        return batchUpdates;
    }
    
    public void setBatchUpdates(boolean batchUpdates) {
        this.batchUpdates = batchUpdates;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    public int getMaxBlocks() {
        return maxBlocks;
    }
    
    public void setMaxBlocks(int maxBlocks) {
        if (maxBlocks > 0) {
            this.maxBlocks = maxBlocks;
            markDirty();
        }
    }
} 
===FILE: C:\Users\navib\Desktop\development\NC\nodecraft\src\main\java\com\nodecraft\nodesystem\nodes\world\modification\ReplaceBlocksNode.java===
package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.world.modification;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.datatypes.RegionData;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.util.BlockPosList;

import net.minecraft.util.math.BlockPos;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Replace Blocks 鑺傜偣: 鍦ㄥ尯鍩熸垨鍧愭爣鍒楄〃涓浛鎹㈡寚瀹氭柟鍧椼€?
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "world.modification.replace_blocks",
    displayName = "鏇挎崲鏂瑰潡",
    description = "鍦ㄥ尯鍩熸垨鍧愭爣鍒楄〃涓浛鎹㈡寚瀹氭柟鍧?,
    category = "world.modification"
)
public class ReplaceBlocksNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 鑺傜偣灞炴€?---
    private String description = "鍦ㄥ尯鍩熸垨鍧愭爣鍒楄〃涓浛鎹㈡寚瀹氭柟鍧椾负鏂扮殑鏂瑰潡";
    private boolean notifyUpdate = true; // 鏄惁閫氱煡鏇存柊锛堣Е鍙戞洿鏂颁簨浠讹級
    private boolean spawnDrops = false; // 鏀剧疆鏂瑰潡鏃舵槸鍚︾敓鎴愭帀钀界墿
    private boolean batchUpdates = true; // 鏄惁鎵归噺鏇存柊锛屾彁楂樻€ц兘
    private boolean exactMatch = false; // 鏄惁瑕佹眰鏂瑰潡鐘舵€佸畬鍏ㄥ尮閰?
    private int maxBlocks = 32768; // 鏈€澶ф搷浣滄柟鍧楁暟锛堥槻姝㈣繃澶у尯鍩熷鑷存€ц兘闂锛?

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_REGION_ID = "input_region";
    private static final String INPUT_COORDINATES_ID = "input_coordinates";
    private static final String INPUT_TARGET_BLOCK_ID = "input_target_block";
    private static final String INPUT_REPLACEMENT_BLOCK_ID = "input_replacement_block";
    private static final String INPUT_EXACT_MATCH_ID = "input_exact_match";
    private static final String INPUT_NOTIFY_ID = "input_notify";
    private static final String INPUT_SPAWN_DROPS_ID = "input_spawn_drops";
    private static final String INPUT_MAX_BLOCKS_ID = "input_max_blocks";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_REPLACED_BLOCKS_ID = "output_replaced_blocks";
    private static final String OUTPUT_CHECKED_BLOCKS_ID = "output_checked_blocks";
    private static final String OUTPUT_SUCCESS_COUNT_ID = "output_success_count";
    private static final String OUTPUT_TOTAL_COUNT_ID = "output_total_count";
    private static final String OUTPUT_AFFECTED_COORDINATES_ID = "output_affected_coordinates";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public ReplaceBlocksNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "world.modification.replace_blocks");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_REGION_ID, "Region", 
                "瑕佸鐞嗙殑鍖哄煙", NodeDataType.REGION, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_COORDINATES_ID, "Coordinates", 
                "瑕佸鐞嗙殑鍧愭爣鍒楄〃", NodeDataType.BLOCK_LIST, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_TARGET_BLOCK_ID, "Target Block", 
                "瑕佹浛鎹㈢殑鏂瑰潡淇℃伅", NodeDataType.BLOCK_INFO, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_REPLACEMENT_BLOCK_ID, "Replacement Block", 
                "鏇挎崲鎴愮殑鏂瑰潡淇℃伅", NodeDataType.BLOCK_INFO, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_EXACT_MATCH_ID, "Exact Match", 
                "鏄惁瑕佹眰鏂瑰潡鐘舵€佸畬鍏ㄥ尮閰?, NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_NOTIFY_ID, "Notify Update", 
                "鏄惁閫氱煡鏇存柊锛堣Е鍙戞洿鏂颁簨浠讹級", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_SPAWN_DROPS_ID, "Spawn Drops", 
                "鏀剧疆鏂瑰潡鏃舵槸鍚︾敓鎴愭帀钀界墿", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_MAX_BLOCKS_ID, "Max Blocks", 
                "鏈€澶ф搷浣滄柟鍧楁暟", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_REPLACED_BLOCKS_ID, "Replaced Blocks", 
                "鏇挎崲鐨勬柟鍧楁暟閲?, NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_CHECKED_BLOCKS_ID, "Checked Blocks", 
                "妫€鏌ョ殑鏂瑰潡鏁伴噺", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_COUNT_ID, "Success Count", 
                "鎴愬姛鏀剧疆鐨勬柟鍧楁暟閲?, NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_TOTAL_COUNT_ID, "Total Count", 
                "灏濊瘯鏀剧疆鐨勬柟鍧楁€绘暟", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_AFFECTED_COORDINATES_ID, "Affected Coordinates", 
                "鍙楀奖鍝嶇殑鍧愭爣鍒楄〃", NodeDataType.BLOCK_LIST, this));
    }

    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return this.description;
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 榛樿杈撳嚭鍊?
        int replacedBlocks = 0;
        int checkedBlocks = 0;
        int successCount = 0;
        int totalCount = 0;
        BlockPosList affectedCoordinates = new BlockPosList();
        
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object regionObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_REGION_ID);
        Object coordinatesObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_COORDINATES_ID);
        Object targetBlockObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_TARGET_BLOCK_ID);
        Object replacementBlockObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_REPLACEMENT_BLOCK_ID);
        
        // 鑾峰彇甯冨皵鍊煎弬鏁?
        boolean exactMatchValue = this.exactMatch;
        Object exactMatchObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_EXACT_MATCH_ID);
        if (exactMatchObj instanceof Boolean) {
            exactMatchValue = (Boolean) exactMatchObj;
        }
        
        boolean notifyUpdateValue = this.notifyUpdate;
        Object notifyUpdateObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_NOTIFY_ID);
        if (notifyUpdateObj instanceof Boolean) {
            notifyUpdateValue = (Boolean) notifyUpdateObj;
        }
        
        boolean spawnDropsValue = this.spawnDrops;
        Object spawnDropsObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_SPAWN_DROPS_ID);
        if (spawnDropsObj instanceof Boolean) {
            spawnDropsValue = (Boolean) spawnDropsObj;
        }
        
        // 鑾峰彇鏈€澶ф柟鍧楁暟
        int maxBlocksValue = this.maxBlocks;
        Object maxBlocksObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_MAX_BLOCKS_ID);
        if (maxBlocksObj instanceof Number) {
            maxBlocksValue = ((Number) maxBlocksObj).intValue();
            if (maxBlocksValue <= 0) {
                maxBlocksValue = Integer.MAX_VALUE;
            }
        }
        
        // 妫€鏌ユ墽琛屼笂涓嬫枃鍜屽繀瑕佽緭鍏ユ槸鍚︽湁鏁?
        if (context != null && context.getWorld() != null && 
                targetBlockObj != null && replacementBlockObj != null) {
            
            // 鍒涘缓瑕佸鐞嗙殑鍧愭爣鍒楄〃
            BlockPosList positionsToProcess = new BlockPosList();
            
            // 浠庡尯鍩熻幏鍙栧潗鏍?
            if (regionObj instanceof RegionData) {
                RegionData region = (RegionData) regionObj;
                
                // 纭繚鍖哄煙瀹屾暣涓旀湁鏁?
                if (region.isComplete()) {
                    BlockPos minCorner = region.getMinCorner();
                    BlockPos maxCorner = region.getMaxCorner();
                    
                    // 璁＄畻鍖哄煙浣撶Н
                    int width = maxCorner.getX() - minCorner.getX() + 1;
                    int height = maxCorner.getY() - minCorner.getY() + 1;
                    int depth = maxCorner.getZ() - minCorner.getZ() + 1;
                    int volume = width * height * depth;
                    
                    // 妫€鏌ヤ綋绉槸鍚﹁秴杩囨渶澶ф柟鍧楁暟
                    if (volume > maxBlocksValue) {
                        System.err.println("Region volume (" + volume + ") exceeds max blocks limit (" + maxBlocksValue + ").");
                        
                        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊煎苟杩斿洖
                        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_REPLACED_BLOCKS_ID, replacedBlocks);
                        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_CHECKED_BLOCKS_ID, checkedBlocks);
                        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_COUNT_ID, successCount);
                        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_TOTAL_COUNT_ID, totalCount);
                        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_AFFECTED_COORDINATES_ID, affectedCoordinates);
                        return;
                    }
                    
                    // 閬嶅巻鍖哄煙鍐呯殑鎵€鏈夋柟鍧?
                    for (BlockPos pos : BlockPos.iterate(minCorner, maxCorner)) {
                        positionsToProcess.add(pos.toImmutable());
                    }
                }
            }
            
            // 浠庡潗鏍囧垪琛ㄨ幏鍙栧潗鏍?
            if (coordinatesObj instanceof BlockPosList) {
                BlockPosList coordinates = (BlockPosList) coordinatesObj;
                
                // 妫€鏌ュ潗鏍囨暟閲忔槸鍚﹁秴杩囨渶澶ф柟鍧楁暟
                if (coordinates.size() > maxBlocksValue) {
                    System.err.println("Coordinate list size (" + coordinates.size() + ") exceeds max blocks limit (" + maxBlocksValue + ").");
                    
                    // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊煎苟杩斿洖
                    outputValues.put(OUTPUT_REPLACED_BLOCKS_ID, replacedBlocks);
                    outputValues.put(OUTPUT_CHECKED_BLOCKS_ID, checkedBlocks);
                    outputValues.put(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_COUNT_ID, successCount);
                    outputValues.put(OUTPUT_TOTAL_COUNT_ID, totalCount);
                    outputValues.put(OUTPUT_AFFECTED_COORDINATES_ID, affectedCoordinates);
                    return;
                }
                
                // 濡傛灉涔嬪墠娌℃湁浠庡尯鍩熸坊鍔犲潗鏍囷紝浣跨敤杈撳叆鐨勫潗鏍囧垪琛?
                if (positionsToProcess.size() == 0) {
                    positionsToProcess = coordinates;
                }
                // 鍚﹀垯娣诲姞棰濆鐨勫潗鏍囷紙鍙兘浼氭湁閲嶅锛屼絾涓嶅奖鍝嶅姛鑳斤級
                else {
                    for (BlockPos pos : coordinates) {
                        positionsToProcess.add(pos);
                    }
                }
            }
            
            // 濡傛灉鏈夊潗鏍囬渶瑕佸鐞?
            if (positionsToProcess.size() > 0) {
                // 鍦ㄥ疄闄呭疄鐜颁腑锛屽紑濮嬫壒閲忔洿鏂帮紙濡傛灉鍚敤锛?
                if (batchUpdates) {
                    // 寮€濮嬫壒閲忔洿鏂帮紝渚嬪 context.getWorld().beginBatchBlockUpdate();
                }
                
                try {
                    // 閬嶅巻鎵€鏈夊潗鏍?
                    for (BlockPos pos : positionsToProcess) {
                        checkedBlocks++;
                        totalCount++;
                        
                        try {
                            // 鑾峰彇褰撳墠鏂瑰潡鐘舵€?
                            Object currentBlockState = context.getWorld().getBlockState(pos);
                            
                            // 鍒ゆ柇褰撳墠鏂瑰潡鏄惁绗﹀悎鐩爣鏂瑰潡锛堥渶瑕佹浛鎹㈢殑鏂瑰潡锛?
                            boolean shouldReplace = false;
                            
                            if (exactMatchValue) {
                                // 绮剧‘鍖归厤锛堟柟鍧楃被鍨嬪拰鐘舵€侀兘蹇呴』鍖归厤锛?
                                shouldReplace = targetBlockObj.equals(currentBlockState);
                            } else {
                                // 鍙尮閰嶆柟鍧楃被鍨嬶紝涓嶈€冭檻鐘舵€?
                                // 杩欓噷闇€瑕佹牴鎹甅inecraft API璋冩暣瀹炵幇
                                String currentType = currentBlockState.toString().split("\\[")[0];
                                String targetType = targetBlockObj.toString().split("\\[")[0];
                                shouldReplace = currentType.equals(targetType);
                            }
                            
                            // 濡傛灉绗﹀悎鏇挎崲鏉′欢
                            if (shouldReplace) {
                                // 鍦ㄥ疄闄呭疄鐜颁腑鏇挎崲鏂瑰潡
                                // 渚嬪锛歜oolean success = context.getWorld().setBlockState(pos, replacementBlockObj, notifyUpdateValue, spawnDropsValue);
                                
                                // 妯℃嫙鏇挎崲鎴愬姛
                                boolean success = true;
                                
                                if (success) {
                                    successCount++;
                                    replacedBlocks++;
                                    affectedCoordinates.add(pos);
                                }
                            }
                        } catch (Exception e) {
                            // 璁板綍鍗曚釜鏂瑰潡鏇挎崲閿欒浣嗙户缁墽琛?
                            System.err.println("Error replacing block at " + pos + ": " + e.getMessage());
                        }
                    }
                } finally {
                    // 瀹屾垚鎵归噺鏇存柊锛堝鏋滃惎鐢級
                    if (batchUpdates) {
                        // 渚嬪: context.getWorld().endBatchBlockUpdate();
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_REPLACED_BLOCKS_ID, replacedBlocks);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_CHECKED_BLOCKS_ID, checkedBlocks);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_COUNT_ID, successCount);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_TOTAL_COUNT_ID, totalCount);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_AFFECTED_COORDINATES_ID, affectedCoordinates);
    }
    
    // --- Getters/Setters for Properties ---
    
    public boolean isNotifyUpdate() {
        return notifyUpdate;
    }
    
    public void setNotifyUpdate(boolean notifyUpdate) {
        this.notifyUpdate = notifyUpdate;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    public boolean isSpawnDrops() {
        return spawnDrops;
    }
    
    public void setSpawnDrops(boolean spawnDrops) {
        this.spawnDrops = spawnDrops;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    public boolean isBatchUpdates() {
        return batchUpdates;
    }
    
    public void setBatchUpdates(boolean batchUpdates) {
        this.batchUpdates = batchUpdates;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    public boolean isExactMatch() {
        return exactMatch;
    }
    
    public void setExactMatch(boolean exactMatch) {
        this.exactMatch = exactMatch;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    public int getMaxBlocks() {
        return maxBlocks;
    }
    
    public void setMaxBlocks(int maxBlocks) {
        if (maxBlocks > 0) {
            this.maxBlocks = maxBlocks;
            markDirty();
        }
    }

package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.world.modification;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import net.minecraft.util.math.BlockPos;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Set Block 鑺傜偣: 鍦ㄥ崟涓潗鏍囨斁缃寚瀹氭柟鍧椼€?
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "world.modification.set_block",
    displayName = "璁剧疆鍗曚釜鏂瑰潡",
    description = "鍦ㄥ崟涓潗鏍囨斁缃寚瀹氭柟鍧?,
    category = "world.modification"
)
public class SetBlockNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 鑺傜偣灞炴€?---
    private String description = "鍦ㄥ崟涓潗鏍囨斁缃寚瀹氭柟鍧椾俊鎭?鍖呭惈鐘舵€佸拰NBT)";

    private boolean spawnDrops = false; // 鏀剧疆鏂瑰潡鏃舵槸鍚︾敓鎴愭帀钀界墿

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
