    private static final String INPUT_BLOCK_INFO_ID = "input_block_info";
    private static final String INPUT_NOTIFY_ID = "input_notify";
    private static final String INPUT_SPAWN_DROPS_ID = "input_spawn_drops";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID = "output_success";
    private static final String OUTPUT_PREVIOUS_BLOCK_ID = "output_previous_block";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public SetBlockNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "world.modification.set_block");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_COORDINATE_ID, "Coordinate", 
                "鐩爣鍧愭爣", NodeDataType.BLOCK_POS, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_BLOCK_INFO_ID, "Block Info", 
                "瑕佹斁缃殑鏂瑰潡淇℃伅", NodeDataType.BLOCK_INFO, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_NOTIFY_ID, "Notify Update", 
                "鏄惁閫氱煡鏇存柊锛堣Е鍙戞洿鏂颁簨浠讹級", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_SPAWN_DROPS_ID, "Spawn Drops", 
                "鏀剧疆鏂瑰潡鏃舵槸鍚︾敓鎴愭帀钀界墿", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID, "Success", 
                "鏂瑰潡鏄惁鎴愬姛鏀剧疆", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_PREVIOUS_BLOCK_ID, "Previous Block", 
                "琚浛鎹㈢殑鍘熸柟鍧椾俊鎭?, NodeDataType.BLOCK_INFO, this));
    }

    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return this.description;
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 榛樿杈撳嚭鍊?
        boolean success = false;
        Object previousBlock = null;
        
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object coordinateObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_COORDINATE_ID);
        Object blockInfoObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_BLOCK_INFO_ID);
        
        // 鑾峰彇甯冨皵鍊煎弬鏁?
        boolean notifyUpdateValue = this.notifyUpdate;
        Object notifyUpdateObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_NOTIFY_ID);
        if (notifyUpdateObj instanceof Boolean) {
            notifyUpdateValue = (Boolean) notifyUpdateObj;
        }
        
        boolean spawnDropsValue = this.spawnDrops;
        Object spawnDropsObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_SPAWN_DROPS_ID);
        if (spawnDropsObj instanceof Boolean) {
            spawnDropsValue = (Boolean) spawnDropsObj;
        }
        
        // 妫€鏌ユ墽琛屼笂涓嬫枃鍜岃緭鍏ユ槸鍚︽湁鏁?
        if (context != null && context.getWorld() != null && 
                coordinateObj instanceof BlockPos && blockInfoObj != null) {
            BlockPos pos = (BlockPos) coordinateObj;
            
            try {
                // 鑾峰彇褰撳墠鏂瑰潡淇℃伅锛堢敤浜庤繑鍥炶鏇挎崲鐨勬柟鍧楋級
                previousBlock = context.getWorld().getBlockState(pos);
                
                // 鍦ㄥ疄闄呭疄鐜颁腑锛屾斁缃柟鍧?
                // 杩欓噷鏄ず渚嬩唬鐮侊紝闇€瑕佹牴鎹甅inecraft API杩涜璋冩暣
                
                // 璁剧疆鏂瑰潡
                // 鏍规嵁鏄惁鐢熸垚鎺夎惤鐗╁拰鏄惁閫氱煡鏇存柊锛岄€夋嫨瀵瑰簲鐨勬柟娉?
                // 渚嬪锛歝ontext.getWorld().setBlockState(pos, blockState, notifyUpdateValue, spawnDropsValue);

                // 妯℃嫙鏀剧疆鎴愬姛
                success = true;
                
            } catch (Exception e) {
                // 璁板綍閿欒
                System.err.println("Error setting block at " + pos + ": " + e.getMessage());
                success = false;
            }
        }
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID, success);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_PREVIOUS_BLOCK_ID, previousBlock);
    }
    
    // --- Getters/Setters for Properties ---
    
    public boolean isNotifyUpdate() {
        return notifyUpdate;
    }
    
    public void setNotifyUpdate(boolean notifyUpdate) {
        this.notifyUpdate = notifyUpdate;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    public boolean isSpawnDrops() {
        return spawnDrops;
    }
    
    public void setSpawnDrops(boolean spawnDrops) {
        this.spawnDrops = spawnDrops;
        markDirty();
    }
}

package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.world.modification;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;

/**
 * Set Blocks 鑺傜偣: 鍦ㄥ潗鏍囧垪琛ㄤ笂鎵归噺鏀剧疆鏂瑰潡淇℃伅(鍙緭鍏ユ柟鍧椾俊鎭垪琛ㄨ繘琛屼竴瀵逛竴鎴栧垪琛ㄥ惊鐜?
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "world.modification.set_blocks",
    displayName = "璁剧疆鏂瑰潡",
    description = "鍦ㄥ潗鏍囧垪琛ㄤ笂鎵归噺鏀剧疆鏂瑰潡",
    category = "world.modification"
)
public class SetBlocksNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 鑺傜偣灞炴€?---
    private String description = "鍦ㄥ潗鏍囧垪琛ㄤ笂鎵归噺鏀剧疆鏂瑰潡淇℃伅(鍙緭鍏ユ柟鍧椾俊鎭垪琛ㄨ繘琛屼竴瀵逛竴鎴栧垪琛ㄥ惊鐜?";
    private boolean notifyUpdate = true; // 鏄惁閫氱煡鏇存柊锛堣Е鍙戞洿鏂颁簨浠讹級
    private boolean spawnDrops = false; // 鏀剧疆鏂瑰潡鏃舵槸鍚︾敓鎴愭帀钀界墿
    private boolean batchUpdates = true; // 鏄惁鎵归噺鏇存柊锛屾彁楂樻€ц兘

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_COORDINATES_ID = "input_coordinates";
    private static final String INPUT_BLOCK_INFO_ID = "input_block_info";
    private static final String INPUT_BLOCK_INFO_LIST_ID = "input_block_info_list";
    private static final String INPUT_NOTIFY_ID = "input_notify";
    private static final String INPUT_SPAWN_DROPS_ID = "input_spawn_drops";
    private static final String INPUT_BATCH_UPDATES_ID = "input_batch_updates";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_SUCCESS_COUNT_ID = "output_success_count";
    private static final String OUTPUT_TOTAL_COUNT_ID = "output_total_count";
    private static final String OUTPUT_ALL_SUCCESS_ID = "output_all_success";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public SetBlocksNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "world.modification.set_blocks");

        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_COORDINATES_ID, "Coordinates", 
                "鐩爣鍧愭爣鍒楄〃", NodeDataType.BLOCK_LIST, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_BLOCK_INFO_ID, "Block Info", 
                "瑕佹斁缃殑鏂瑰潡淇℃伅", NodeDataType.BLOCK_INFO, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_BLOCK_INFO_LIST_ID, "Block Info List", 
                "瑕佹斁缃殑鏂瑰潡淇℃伅鍒楄〃", NodeDataType.BLOCK_INFO_LIST, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_NOTIFY_ID, "Notify Update", 
                "鏄惁閫氱煡鏇存柊锛堣Е鍙戞洿鏂颁簨浠讹級", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_SPAWN_DROPS_ID, "Spawn Drops", 
                "鏀剧疆鏂瑰潡鏃舵槸鍚︾敓鎴愭帀钀界墿", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_BATCH_UPDATES_ID, "Batch Updates", 
                "鏄惁鎵归噺鏇存柊锛堟彁楂樻€ц兘锛?, NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_COUNT_ID, "Success Count", 
                "鎴愬姛鏀剧疆鐨勬柟鍧楁暟閲?, NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_TOTAL_COUNT_ID, "Total Count", 
                "灏濊瘯鏀剧疆鐨勬柟鍧楁€绘暟", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_ALL_SUCCESS_ID, "All Success", 
                "鏄惁鎵€鏈夋柟鍧楅兘鎴愬姛鏀剧疆", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));

    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return this.description;
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 榛樿杈撳嚭鍊?
        int successCount = 0;
        int totalCount = 0;
        boolean allSuccess = true;
        
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object coordinatesObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_COORDINATES_ID);
        Object blockInfoObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_BLOCK_INFO_ID);
        Object blockInfoListObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_BLOCK_INFO_LIST_ID);
        
        // 鑾峰彇甯冨皵鍊煎弬鏁?
        boolean notifyUpdateValue = this.notifyUpdate;
        Object notifyUpdateObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_NOTIFY_ID);
        if (notifyUpdateObj instanceof Boolean) {
            notifyUpdateValue = (Boolean) notifyUpdateObj;
        }
        
        boolean spawnDropsValue = this.spawnDrops;
        Object spawnDropsObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_SPAWN_DROPS_ID);
        if (spawnDropsObj instanceof Boolean) {
            spawnDropsValue = (Boolean) spawnDropsObj;
        }
        
        boolean batchUpdatesValue = this.batchUpdates;
        Object batchUpdatesObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_BATCH_UPDATES_ID);
        if (batchUpdatesObj instanceof Boolean) {
            batchUpdatesValue = (Boolean) batchUpdatesObj;
        }
        
        // 妫€鏌ユ墽琛屼笂涓嬫枃鍜屽潗鏍囧垪琛ㄨ緭鍏ユ槸鍚︽湁鏁?
        if (context != null && context.getWorld() != null && 
                coordinatesObj instanceof BlockPosList) {
            BlockPosList coordinates = (BlockPosList) coordinatesObj;
            
            // 鑾峰彇鏂瑰潡淇℃伅鍒楄〃锛堝鏋滄湁锛?
            List<?> blockInfoList = null;
            if (blockInfoListObj instanceof List) {
                blockInfoList = (List<?>) blockInfoListObj;
            }
            
            // 濡傛灉鏂瑰潡淇℃伅鍒楄〃涓虹┖浣嗘彁渚涗簡鍗曚釜鏂瑰潡淇℃伅锛屽垱寤哄崟鍏冪礌鍒楄〃
            if ((blockInfoList == null || blockInfoList.isEmpty()) && blockInfoObj != null) {
                // 浣跨敤鍗曚釜鏂瑰潡淇℃伅搴旂敤浜庢墍鏈夊潗鏍?
                
                // 鍦ㄥ疄闄呭疄鐜颁腑锛屽紑濮嬫壒閲忔洿鏂帮紙濡傛灉鍚敤锛?
                if (batchUpdatesValue) {
                    // 寮€濮嬫壒閲忔洿鏂帮紝渚嬪 context.getWorld().beginBatchBlockUpdate();
                }
                
                try {
                    // 涓烘墍鏈夊潗鏍囨斁缃浉鍚岀殑鏂瑰潡
                    for (BlockPos pos : coordinates) {
                        totalCount++;
                        try {
                            // 鍦ㄥ疄闄呭疄鐜颁腑鏀剧疆鏂瑰潡
                            // 渚嬪锛歜oolean success = context.getWorld().setBlockState(pos, blockInfoObj, notifyUpdateValue, spawnDropsValue);
                            
                            // 妯℃嫙鏀剧疆鎴愬姛
                            boolean success = true;
                            
                            if (success) {
                                successCount++;
                            } else {
                                allSuccess = false;
                            }
                        } catch (Exception e) {
                            // 璁板綍鍗曚釜鏂瑰潡鏀剧疆閿欒浣嗙户缁墽琛?
                            System.err.println("Error setting block at " + pos + ": " + e.getMessage());
                            allSuccess = false;
                        }
                    }
                } finally {
                    // 瀹屾垚鎵归噺鏇存柊锛堝鏋滃惎鐢級
                    if (batchUpdatesValue) {
                        // 渚嬪: context.getWorld().endBatchBlockUpdate();
                    }
                }
            } 
            // 浣跨敤鏂瑰潡淇℃伅鍒楄〃
            else if (blockInfoList != null && !blockInfoList.isEmpty()) {
                
                // 鍦ㄥ疄闄呭疄鐜颁腑锛屽紑濮嬫壒閲忔洿鏂帮紙濡傛灉鍚敤锛?
                if (batchUpdatesValue) {
                    // 寮€濮嬫壒閲忔洿鏂帮紝渚嬪 context.getWorld().beginBatchBlockUpdate();
                }
                
                try {
                    // 鏍规嵁涓や釜鍒楄〃鐨勯暱搴︾‘瀹氬鐞嗘ā寮?
                    if (blockInfoList.size() == coordinates.size()) {
                        // 涓€瀵逛竴妯″紡锛氭瘡涓潗鏍囧搴斾竴涓柟鍧椾俊鎭?
                        int i = 0;
                        for (BlockPos pos : coordinates) {
                            totalCount++;
                            try {
                                Object currentBlockInfo = blockInfoList.get(i++);
                                
                                // 鍦ㄥ疄闄呭疄鐜颁腑鏀剧疆鏂瑰潡
                                // 渚嬪锛歜oolean success = context.getWorld().setBlockState(pos, currentBlockInfo, notifyUpdateValue, spawnDropsValue);
                                
                                // 妯℃嫙鏀剧疆鎴愬姛
                                boolean success = true;
                                
                                if (success) {
                                    successCount++;
                                } else {
                                    allSuccess = false;
                                }
                            } catch (Exception e) {
                                // 璁板綍鍗曚釜鏂瑰潡鏀剧疆閿欒浣嗙户缁墽琛?
                                System.err.println("Error setting block at " + pos + ": " + e.getMessage());
                                allSuccess = false;
                            }
                        }
                    } else {
                        // 寰幆妯″紡锛氬惊鐜娇鐢ㄦ柟鍧椾俊鎭垪琛?
                        int infoListSize = blockInfoList.size();
                        int i = 0;
                        for (BlockPos pos : coordinates) {
                            totalCount++;
                            try {
                                // 寰幆浣跨敤鏂瑰潡淇℃伅鍒楄〃涓殑鍏冪礌
                                Object currentBlockInfo = blockInfoList.get(i % infoListSize);
                                i++;
                                
                                // 鍦ㄥ疄闄呭疄鐜颁腑鏀剧疆鏂瑰潡
                                // 渚嬪锛歜oolean success = context.getWorld().setBlockState(pos, currentBlockInfo, notifyUpdateValue, spawnDropsValue);
                                
                                // 妯℃嫙鏀剧疆鎴愬姛
                                boolean success = true;
                                
                                if (success) {
                                    successCount++;
                                } else {
                                    allSuccess = false;
                                }
                            } catch (Exception e) {
                                // 璁板綍鍗曚釜鏂瑰潡鏀剧疆閿欒浣嗙户缁墽琛?
                                System.err.println("Error setting block at " + pos + ": " + e.getMessage());
                                allSuccess = false;
                            }
                        }
                    }
                } finally {
                    // 瀹屾垚鎵归噺鏇存柊锛堝鏋滃惎鐢級
                    if (batchUpdatesValue) {
                        // 渚嬪: context.getWorld().endBatchBlockUpdate();
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_COUNT_ID, successCount);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_TOTAL_COUNT_ID, totalCount);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_ALL_SUCCESS_ID, allSuccess);
    }
    
    // --- Getters/Setters for Properties ---
    
    public boolean isNotifyUpdate() {
        return notifyUpdate;
    }
    
    public void setNotifyUpdate(boolean notifyUpdate) {
        this.notifyUpdate = notifyUpdate;
        markDirty();
    }

    }

        return batchUpdates;
    }

        this.batchUpdates = batchUpdates;

    }

package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.world.nbt;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;

import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Create NBT Compound 鑺傜偣: 鍒涘缓 NBT 澶嶅悎鏍囩缁撴瀯
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "world.nbt.create_nbt_compound",
    displayName = "鍒涘缓NBT澶嶅悎鏍囩",
    description = "鍒涘缓NBT澶嶅悎鏍囩缁撴瀯",
    category = "world.nbt"
)
public class CreateNBTCompoundNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 鑺傜偣灞炴€?---
    private String description = "鍒涘缓 NBT 澶嶅悎鏍囩缁撴瀯";
    private int pairCount = 5; // 閿€煎鏁伴噺
    
    // --- 杈撳叆/杈撳嚭绔彛ID鍓嶇紑 ---
    private static final String INPUT_KEY_PREFIX = "input_key_";
    private static final String INPUT_VALUE_PREFIX = "input_value_";
    private static final String INPUT_VALUE_TYPE_PREFIX = "input_value_type_";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_NBT_ID = "output_nbt";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public CreateNBTCompoundNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "world.nbt.create_nbt_compound");
        
        // 鍒涘缓鍔ㄦ€佺鍙?
        rebuildPorts();
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_NBT_ID, "NBT Compound", 
                "鍒涘缓鐨凬BT澶嶅悎鏍囩", NodeDataType.NBT_COMPOUND, this));
    }

    /**
     * 閲嶅缓杈撳叆绔彛
     */
    private void rebuildPorts() {
        // 娓呴櫎鎵€鏈夌幇鏈夎緭鍏ョ鍙?
        inputPorts.clear();
        
        // 鍒涘缓閿€煎杈撳叆绔彛
        for (int i = 0; i < pairCount; i++) {
            // 閿緭鍏ョ鍙?
            addInputPort(new BasePort(
                INPUT_KEY_PREFIX + i, 
                "Key " + (i + 1), 
                "NBT鏍囩鐨勯敭鍚嶇О", 
                NodeDataType.STRING, 
                this
            ));
            
            // 鍊艰緭鍏ョ鍙?
            addInputPort(new BasePort(
                INPUT_VALUE_PREFIX + i, 
                "Value " + (i + 1), 
                "瀵瑰簲鐨勫€?, 
                NodeDataType.ANY, 
                this
            ));
            
            // 鍊肩被鍨嬭緭鍏ョ鍙?
            addInputPort(new BasePort(
                INPUT_VALUE_TYPE_PREFIX + i, 
                "Type " + (i + 1), 
                "鍊肩殑绫诲瀷 (string, int, float, double, byte, list, compound)", 
                NodeDataType.STRING, 
                this
            ));
        }
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---

        // 鍒涘缓杈撳嚭
        Object nbtCompound = null;

            // 鍒涘缓鏂扮殑澶嶅悎鏍囩

                    valueType = ((String) typeObj).toLowerCase();

                    valueType = "string";
                } else if (valueObj instanceof Integer) {
                    valueType = "int";
                } else if (valueObj instanceof Float) {
                    valueType = "float";
                } else if (valueObj instanceof Double) {
                    valueType = "double";
                } else if (valueObj instanceof Boolean) {
                    valueType = "byte"; // Minecraft涓竷灏斿€奸€氬父瀛樺偍涓哄瓧鑺?
                } else if (valueObj instanceof java.util.List) {
                    valueType = "list";

        }

    // 鍦ㄥ疄闄呭疄鐜颁腑闇€瑕佽繖涓緟鍔╂柟娉曟潵鍒涘缓姝ｇ‘绫诲瀷鐨凬BT鏍囩
    private Tag createTag(String type, Object value) {
        switch (type.toLowerCase()) {
            case "string":
                return StringTag.of(String.valueOf(value));
                
            case "int":
                if (value instanceof Number) {
                    return IntTag.of(((Number) value).intValue());
                } else {
                    try {
                        return IntTag.of(Integer.parseInt(String.valueOf(value)));
                    } catch (NumberFormatException e) {
                        return IntTag.of(0);
                    }
                }
                
            case "float":
                if (value instanceof Number) {
                    return FloatTag.of(((Number) value).floatValue());
                } else {
                    try {
                        return FloatTag.of(Float.parseFloat(String.valueOf(value)));
                    } catch (NumberFormatException e) {
                        return FloatTag.of(0);
                    }
                }
                
            case "double":
                if (value instanceof Number) {
                    return DoubleTag.of(((Number) value).doubleValue());
                } else {
                    try {
                        return DoubleTag.of(Double.parseDouble(String.valueOf(value)));
                    } catch (NumberFormatException e) {
                        return DoubleTag.of(0);
                    }
                }
                
            case "byte":
                // 澶勭悊甯冨皵鍊?
                if (value instanceof Boolean) {
                    return ByteTag.of((Boolean) value ? (byte) 1 : (byte) 0);
                } else if (value instanceof Number) {
                    return ByteTag.of(((Number) value).byteValue());
                } else {
                    try {
                        return ByteTag.of(Byte.parseByte(String.valueOf(value)));
                    } catch (NumberFormatException e) {
                        return ByteTag.of((byte) 0);
                    }
                }
                
            case "long":
                if (value instanceof Number) {
                    return LongTag.of(((Number) value).longValue());
                } else {
                    try {
                        return LongTag.of(Long.parseLong(String.valueOf(value)));
                    } catch (NumberFormatException e) {
                        return LongTag.of(0L);
                    }
                }
                
            case "short":
                if (value instanceof Number) {
                    return ShortTag.of(((Number) value).shortValue());
                } else {
                    try {
                        return ShortTag.of(Short.parseShort(String.valueOf(value)));
                    } catch (NumberFormatException e) {
                        return ShortTag.of((short) 0);
                    }
                }
                
            case "list":
                if (value instanceof java.util.List) {
                    ListTag listTag = new ListTag();
                    for (Object item : (java.util.List<?>) value) {
                        // 閫掑綊澶勭悊鍒楄〃椤癸紝鍋囪鎵€鏈夐」閮芥槸鍚屼竴绫诲瀷
                        // 瀹為檯瀹炵幇鍙兘闇€瑕佹洿澶嶆潅鐨勭被鍨嬫娴?
                        if (item instanceof String) {
                            listTag.add(StringTag.of((String) item));
                        } else if (item instanceof Integer) {
                            listTag.add(IntTag.of((Integer) item));
                        } else if (item instanceof Double) {
                            listTag.add(DoubleTag.of((Double) item));
                        } else {
                            // 榛樿澶勭悊涓哄鍚堟爣绛?
                            listTag.add(new CompoundTag());
                        }
                    }
                    return listTag;
                }
                return new ListTag();
                
            case "compound":
                if (value instanceof CompoundTag) {
                    return (CompoundTag) value;
                }
                return new CompoundTag();
                
            default:
                return StringTag.of(String.valueOf(value));
        }
    }
    */
    
    // --- Getters/Setters for Properties ---
    
    public int getPairCount() {
        return pairCount;
    }
    
    public void setPairCount(int pairCount) {
        if (pairCount < 1) {
            pairCount = 1;
        } else if (pairCount > 20) {
            pairCount = 20; // 璁剧疆鏈€澶ч檺鍒讹紝闃叉鍒涘缓杩囧绔彛
        }
        
        if (this.pairCount != pairCount) {
            this.pairCount = pairCount;
            rebuildPorts();
            markDirty();
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * 淇濆瓨鑺傜偣鐘舵€?
     */
    @Override
    public @Nullable Object getNodeState() {
        return pairCount;
    }
    
    /**
     * 鎭㈠鑺傜偣鐘舵€?
     */
    @Override
    public void setNodeState(@Nullable Object state) {
        if (state instanceof Integer) {
            setPairCount((Integer) state);
        } else if (state instanceof Number) {
            setPairCount(((Number) state).intValue());
        }
    }

    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return this.description;
    }
}

package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.world.nbt;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;

import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Create NBT List 鑺傜偣: 鍒涘缓 NBT 鍒楄〃鏍囩
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "world.nbt.create_nbt_list",
    displayName = "鍒涘缓NBT鍒楄〃",
    description = "鍒涘缓NBT鍒楄〃鏍囩",
    category = "world.nbt"
)
public class CreateNBTListNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 鑺傜偣灞炴€?---
    private String description = "鍒涘缓 NBT 鍒楄〃鏍囩";
    private int itemCount = 5; // 鍒楄〃椤规暟閲?
    private String itemType = "string"; // 鍒楄〃椤圭被鍨?
    
    // --- 杈撳叆/杈撳嚭绔彛ID鍓嶇紑 ---
    private static final String INPUT_ITEM_PREFIX = "input_item_";
    private static final String INPUT_LIST_TYPE_ID = "input_list_type";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_LIST_ID = "output_list";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public CreateNBTListNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "world.nbt.create_nbt_list");
        
        // 鍒涘缓绫诲瀷杈撳叆绔彛
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_LIST_TYPE_ID, "List Type", 
                "鍒楄〃椤圭殑绫诲瀷 (string, int, float, double, byte, compound)", 
                NodeDataType.STRING, this));
        
        // 鍒涘缓鍔ㄦ€侀」鐩鍙?
        rebuildItemPorts();
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_LIST_ID, "NBT List", 
                "鍒涘缓鐨凬BT鍒楄〃鏍囩", NodeDataType.NBT_LIST, this));
    }

    /**
     * 閲嶅缓椤圭洰杈撳叆绔彛
     */
    private void rebuildItemPorts() {
        // 绉婚櫎鏃х殑椤圭洰绔彛
        List<BasePort> portsToKeep = new ArrayList<>();
        for (int i = 0; i < inputPorts.size(); i++) {
            BasePort port = (BasePort) inputPorts.get(i);
            if (!port.getId().startsWith(INPUT_ITEM_PREFIX)) {
                portsToKeep.add(port);
            }
        }
        
        // 娓呴櫎鎵€鏈夌幇鏈夎緭鍏ョ鍙?
        inputPorts.clear();
        
        // 閲嶆柊娣诲姞瑕佷繚鐣欑殑绔彛
        for (BasePort port : portsToKeep) {
            addInputPort(port);
        }
        
        // 鍒涘缓鏂扮殑椤圭洰杈撳叆绔彛
        for (int i = 0; i < itemCount; i++) {
            addInputPort(new BasePort(
                INPUT_ITEM_PREFIX + i, 
                "Item " + (i + 1), 
                "鍒楄〃椤圭殑鍊?, 
                NodeDataType.ANY, 
                this
            ));
        }
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 鍒涘缓杈撳嚭
        Object nbtList = null;
        
        // 鑾峰彇鍒楄〃绫诲瀷
        Object typeObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_LIST_TYPE_ID);
        String listType = this.itemType;
        if (typeObj instanceof String) {
            listType = ((String) typeObj).toLowerCase();
            if (!isValidType(listType)) {
                listType = "string"; // 濡傛灉绫诲瀷鏃犳晥鍒欎娇鐢ㄩ粯璁ゅ€?
            }
        }
        
        try {
            /*
            鍦ㄥ疄闄呭疄鐜颁腑锛岄渶瑕佹牴鎹甅inecraft API瀹炵幇浠ヤ笅鎿嶄綔:
            
            // 纭畾鏍囩绫诲瀷
            int tagType;
            switch (listType) {
                case "byte": tagType = Tag.BYTE_TYPE; break;
                case "short": tagType = Tag.SHORT_TYPE; break;
                case "int": tagType = Tag.INT_TYPE; break;
                case "long": tagType = Tag.LONG_TYPE; break;
                case "float": tagType = Tag.FLOAT_TYPE; break;

                        listTag.add(tag);

            }

            nbtList = new Object(); // 杩欓噷鍙槸涓€涓崰浣嶇
        } catch (Exception e) {
            System.err.println("Error creating NBT list: " + e.getMessage());
        }
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_LIST_ID, nbtList);
    }
    
    /**
     * 妫€鏌ョ被鍨嬫槸鍚︽湁鏁?
     */
    private boolean isValidType(String type) {
        switch (type.toLowerCase()) {
            case "string":
            case "int":
            case "float":
            case "double":
            case "byte":
            case "long":
            case "short":
            case "compound":
                return true;
            default:
                return false;
        }
    }

        return itemCount;
    }
    
    public void setItemCount(int itemCount) {
        if (itemCount < 1) {
            itemCount = 1;
        } else if (itemCount > 50) {
            itemCount = 50; // 璁剧疆鏈€澶ч檺鍒讹紝闃叉鍒涘缓杩囧绔彛
        }

            rebuildItemPorts();

        if (isValidType(itemType)) {
            this.itemType = itemType.toLowerCase();
            markDirty();
        }
    }

     * 淇濆瓨鑺傜偣鐘舵€?
     */
    @Override
    public @Nullable Object getNodeState() {

        return new Object[] { itemCount, itemType };
    }
    
    /**
     * 鎭㈠鑺傜偣鐘舵€?
     */
    @Override
    public void setNodeState(@Nullable Object state) {
        if (state instanceof Object[]) {
            Object[] stateArray = (Object[]) state;
            
            if (stateArray.length >= 1 && stateArray[0] instanceof Number) {
                setItemCount(((Number) stateArray[0]).intValue());
            }
            
            if (stateArray.length >= 2 && stateArray[1] instanceof String) {
                setItemType((String) stateArray[1]);
            }
        }
    }

    public String getDescription() {
        return this.description;
    }

package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.world.nbt;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Get Block State 鑺傜偣: 鑾峰彇鏂瑰潡鐨勭姸鎬佸睘鎬с€?
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "world.nbt.get_block_state",
    displayName = "鑾峰彇鏂瑰潡鐘舵€?,
    description = "鑾峰彇鏂瑰潡鐨勭姸鎬佸睘鎬?,
    category = "world.nbt"
)
public class GetBlockStateNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 鑺傜偣灞炴€?---
    private String description = "浠?MinecraftBlock 鑾峰彇鎸囧畾鐘舵€佸睘鎬х殑鍊?;

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_BLOCK_ID = "input_block";
    private static final String INPUT_PROPERTY_ID = "input_property";
    private static final String INPUT_DEFAULT_VALUE_ID = "input_default_value";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_VALUE_ID = "output_value";
    private static final String OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID = "output_success";
    private static final String OUTPUT_PROPERTIES_ID = "output_properties";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public GetBlockStateNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "world.nbt.get_block_state");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_BLOCK_ID, "Block", 
                "鐩爣鏂瑰潡", NodeDataType.MINECRAFT_BLOCK, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_PROPERTY_ID, "Property", 
                "瑕佽幏鍙栫殑灞炴€у悕绉?, NodeDataType.STRING, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_DEFAULT_VALUE_ID, "Default Value", 
                "濡傛灉鎵句笉鍒板睘鎬ф椂杩斿洖鐨勯粯璁ゅ€?, NodeDataType.ANY, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_VALUE_ID, "Value", 
                "灞炴€х殑鍊?, NodeDataType.ANY, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID, "Success", 
                "鏄惁鎴愬姛鑾峰彇鍊?, NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_PROPERTIES_ID, "All Properties", 
                "鏂瑰潡鐨勬墍鏈夊睘鎬?, NodeDataType.ANY, this));
    }

    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return this.description;
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 榛樿杈撳嚭鍊?
        Object value = null;
        boolean success = false;
        Object allProperties = new java.util.HashMap<String, Object>();
        
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object blockObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_BLOCK_ID);
        Object propertyObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_PROPERTY_ID);
        Object defaultValueObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_DEFAULT_VALUE_ID);
        
        // 妫€鏌ュ繀瑕佺殑杈撳叆鏄惁瀛樺湪
        if (blockObj != null && propertyObj instanceof String) {
            String propertyName = (String) propertyObj;
            
            try {
                /*
                鍦ㄥ疄闄呭疄鐜颁腑锛岄渶瑕佹牴鎹甅inecraft API瀹炵幇浠ヤ笅鎿嶄綔:
                1. 鑾峰彇鏂瑰潡鐘舵€?
                2. 鏌ユ壘鎸囧畾灞炴€?
                3. 鑾峰彇灞炴€у€?
                
                if (blockObj instanceof BlockState) {
                    BlockState blockState = (BlockState) blockObj;
                    
                    // 鑾峰彇鎵€鏈夊睘鎬?
                    Map<String, Object> properties = new HashMap<>();
                    for (Property<?> property : blockState.getProperties()) {
                        String name = property.getName();
                        Comparable<?> propValue = blockState.get(property);
                        properties.put(name, propValue);
                    }
                    
                    // 璁剧疆鎵€鏈夊睘鎬ц緭鍑?
                    allProperties = properties;
                    
                    // 鏌ユ壘鎸囧畾灞炴€?
                    for (Property<?> property : blockState.getProperties()) {
                        if (property.getName().equals(propertyName)) {
                            value = blockState.get(property);
                            success = true;
                            break;
                        }
                    }
                }
                */
                
                // 妯℃嫙鎴愬姛鑾峰彇鏂瑰潡鐘舵€佸睘鎬?(鍦ㄥ疄闄呭疄鐜颁腑鏇挎崲涓轰笂闈㈢殑閫昏緫)
                java.util.Map<String, Object> mockProperties = new java.util.HashMap<>();
                mockProperties.put("facing", "north");
                mockProperties.put("powered", false);
                mockProperties.put("waterlogged", false);
                
                allProperties = mockProperties;
                
                if (mockProperties.containsKey(propertyName)) {
                    value = mockProperties.get(propertyName);
                    success = true;
                }
            } catch (Exception e) {
                success = false;
                System.err.println("Error getting block state: " + e.getMessage());
            }
        }
        
        // 濡傛灉鑾峰彇澶辫触骞朵笖鎻愪緵浜嗛粯璁ゅ€硷紝鍒欎娇鐢ㄩ粯璁ゅ€?
        if (!success && defaultValueObj != null) {
            value = defaultValueObj;
        }
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_VALUE_ID, value);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID, success);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_PROPERTIES_ID, allProperties);
    }
}

package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.world.nbt;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Get NBT Tag 鑺傜偣: 鑾峰彇鏂瑰潡瀹炰綋鎴栧疄浣撶殑NBT鏍囩鍊笺€?
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "world.nbt.get_nbt_tag",
    displayName = "鑾峰彇NBT鏍囩",
    description = "鑾峰彇鏂瑰潡瀹炰綋鎴栧疄浣撶殑NBT鏍囩鍊?,
    category = "world.nbt"
)
public class GetNBTTagNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 鑺傜偣灞炴€?---
    private String description = "浠嶮inecraftBlock鎴朚inecraftEntity鑾峰彇鎸囧畾璺緞鐨凬BT鍊?;

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_TARGET_ID = "input_target";
    private static final String INPUT_PATH_ID = "input_path";
    private static final String INPUT_DEFAULT_VALUE_ID = "input_default_value";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_VALUE_ID = "output_value";
    private static final String OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID = "output_success";
    private static final String OUTPUT_TYPE_ID = "output_type";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public GetNBTTagNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "world.nbt.get_nbt_tag");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_TARGET_ID, "Target", 
                "鐩爣鏂瑰潡鎴栧疄浣?, NodeDataType.ANY, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_PATH_ID, "Path", 
                "NBT鏍囩璺緞 (濡?'Items[0].id')", NodeDataType.STRING, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_DEFAULT_VALUE_ID, "Default Value", 
                "濡傛灉鎵句笉鍒版爣绛炬椂杩斿洖鐨勯粯璁ゅ€?, NodeDataType.ANY, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_VALUE_ID, "Value", 
                "NBT鏍囩鐨勫€?, NodeDataType.ANY, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID, "Success", 
                "鏄惁鎴愬姛鑾峰彇鍊?, NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_TYPE_ID, "Type", 
                "NBT鍊肩殑绫诲瀷", NodeDataType.STRING, this));
    }

    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return this.description;
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 榛樿杈撳嚭鍊?
        Object value = null;
        boolean success = false;
        String type = "none";
        
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object targetObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_TARGET_ID);
        Object pathObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_PATH_ID);
        Object defaultValueObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_DEFAULT_VALUE_ID);
        
        // 妫€鏌ュ繀瑕佺殑杈撳叆鏄惁瀛樺湪
        if (targetObj != null && pathObj instanceof String) {
            String path = (String) pathObj;
            
            try {
                // 纭畾鐩爣瀵硅薄绫诲瀷骞惰幏鍙朜BT
                if (targetObj instanceof Object) { // 闇€瑕佷娇鐢ㄦ纭殑Minecraft绫诲瀷妫€鏌?
                    /*
                    鍦ㄥ疄闄呭疄鐜颁腑锛岄渶瑕佹牴鎹甅inecraft API瀹炵幇浠ヤ笅鎿嶄綔:
                    1. 妫€鏌argetObj鏄惁涓烘柟鍧楁垨瀹炰綋
                    2. 鑾峰彇鍏禢BT鏁版嵁
                    3. 瑙ｆ瀽璺緞锛岃幏鍙栨寚瀹氫綅缃殑鍊?
                    4. 纭畾鍊肩殑绫诲瀷
                    
                    CompoundTag nbt = null;
                    if (targetObj instanceof BlockEntity) {
                        nbt = ((BlockEntity) targetObj).saveWithFullMetadata();
                    } else if (targetObj instanceof Entity) {
                        nbt = ((Entity) targetObj).writeNbt(new CompoundTag());
                    }
                    
                    if (nbt != null) {
                        // 澶勭悊NBT璺緞浠ヨ幏鍙栫壒瀹氱殑鍊?
                        // 绠€鍖栫増鏈?- 瀹為檯浠ｇ爜闇€瑕佽В鏋愬鏉傝矾寰勫 "Items[0].id"
                        Object nbtValue = null;
                        
                        if (path.contains(".")) {
                            // 澶勭悊宓屽璺緞
                            String[] parts = path.split("\\.");
                            CompoundTag current = nbt;
                            
                            for (int i = 0; i < parts.length - 1; i++) {
                                String part = parts[i];
                                if (part.contains("[") && part.contains("]")) {
                                    // 澶勭悊鏁扮粍绱㈠紩锛屼緥濡?Items[0]
                                    String name = part.substring(0, part.indexOf("["));
                                    int index = Integer.parseInt(part.substring(
                                        part.indexOf("[") + 1, part.indexOf("]")));

                                        ListTag list = current.getList(name, Tag.LIST_TYPE);

                                        } else {
                                            break;
                                        }
                                    } else {
                                        break;
                                    }
                                } else if (current.contains(part)) {
                                    current = current.getCompound(part);
                                } else {
                                    break;
                                }
                            }
                            
                            String lastPart = parts[parts.length - 1];
                            if (current.contains(lastPart)) {

                                nbtValue = getNbtValue(tag);
                                type = getTagType(tag);
                                success = true;
                            }
                        } else {
                            // 绠€鍗曡矾寰?
                            if (nbt.contains(path)) {
                                Tag tag = nbt.get(path);
                                nbtValue = getNbtValue(tag);
                                type = getTagType(tag);
                                success = true;
                            }
                        }
                        
                        if (success) {
                            value = nbtValue;
                        }
                    }
                    */
                    
                    // 妯℃嫙鎴愬姛鑾峰彇NBT鍊?(鍦ㄥ疄闄呭疄鐜颁腑鏇挎崲涓轰笂闈㈢殑閫昏緫)
                    value = "绀轰緥NBT鍊?;
                    type = "string";
                    success = true;
                }
            } catch (Exception e) {
                success = false;
                System.err.println("Error getting NBT tag: " + e.getMessage());
            }
        }
        
        // 濡傛灉鑾峰彇澶辫触骞朵笖鎻愪緵浜嗛粯璁ゅ€硷紝鍒欎娇鐢ㄩ粯璁ゅ€?
        if (!success && defaultValueObj != null) {
            value = defaultValueObj;
            if (defaultValueObj instanceof String) {
                type = "string";
            } else if (defaultValueObj instanceof Number) {
                type = "number";
            } else if (defaultValueObj instanceof Boolean) {
                type = "boolean";
            } else {
                type = "compound";
            }
        }
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_VALUE_ID, value);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID, success);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_TYPE_ID, type);
    }

package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.world.nbt;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Merge NBT 鑺傜偣: 鍚堝苟涓や釜 NBT 缁撴瀯
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "world.nbt.merge_nbt",
    displayName = "鍚堝苟NBT",
    description = "鍚堝苟涓や釜NBT澶嶅悎鏍囩",
    category = "world.nbt"
)
public class MergeNBTNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 鑺傜偣灞炴€?---
    private String description = "鍚堝苟涓や釜 NBT 缁撴瀯";
    private boolean overwriteExisting = true; // 鏄惁瑕嗙洊宸插瓨鍦ㄧ殑閿?

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_BASE_NBT_ID = "input_base_nbt";
    private static final String INPUT_OVERLAY_NBT_ID = "input_overlay_nbt";
    private static final String INPUT_OVERWRITE_ID = "input_overwrite";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_MERGED_NBT_ID = "output_merged_nbt";
    private static final String OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID = "output_success";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public MergeNBTNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "world.nbt.merge_nbt");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_BASE_NBT_ID, "Base NBT", 
                "鍩虹 NBT 鏁版嵁", NodeDataType.NBT_COMPOUND, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_OVERLAY_NBT_ID, "Overlay NBT", 
                "瑕佽鐩栫殑 NBT 鏁版嵁", NodeDataType.NBT_COMPOUND, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_OVERWRITE_ID, "Overwrite Existing", 
                "鏄惁瑕嗙洊宸插瓨鍦ㄧ殑閿?, NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_MERGED_NBT_ID, "Merged NBT", 
                "鍚堝苟鍚庣殑 NBT 鏁版嵁", NodeDataType.NBT_COMPOUND, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID, "Success", 
                "鏄惁鎴愬姛鍚堝苟", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
    }

    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return this.description;
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 榛樿杈撳嚭鍊?
        Object mergedNbt = null;
        boolean success = false;
        
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object baseNbtObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_BASE_NBT_ID);
        Object overlayNbtObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_OVERLAY_NBT_ID);
        Object overwriteObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_OVERWRITE_ID);
        
        // 鑾峰彇鏄惁瑕嗙洊宸插瓨鍦ㄧ殑閿?
        boolean overwrite = this.overwriteExisting;
        if (overwriteObj instanceof Boolean) {
            overwrite = (Boolean) overwriteObj;
        }
        
        // 妫€鏌ュ繀瑕佺殑杈撳叆鏄惁瀛樺湪
        if (baseNbtObj != null && overlayNbtObj != null) {
            try {
                /*
                鍦ㄥ疄闄呭疄鐜颁腑锛岄渶瑕佹牴鎹甅inecraft API瀹炵幇浠ヤ笅鎿嶄綔:
                1. 纭杈撳叆瀵硅薄鏄疦BT澶嶅悎鏍囩
                2. 鍏嬮殕鍩虹NBT
                3. 閫掑綊鍚堝苟涓や釜NBT缁撴瀯
                
                if (baseNbtObj instanceof CompoundTag && overlayNbtObj instanceof CompoundTag) {
                    CompoundTag baseNbt = (CompoundTag) baseNbtObj;
                    CompoundTag overlayNbt = (CompoundTag) overlayNbtObj;
                    
                    // 鍒涘缓鍩虹NBT鐨勫壇鏈?
                    CompoundTag result = baseNbt.copy();
                    
                    // 閫掑綊鍚堝苟NBT
                    mergeNbt(result, overlayNbt, overwrite);
                    
                    mergedNbt = result;
                    success = true;
                }
                */
                
                // 妯℃嫙鎴愬姛鍚堝苟NBT (鍦ㄥ疄闄呭疄鐜颁腑鏇挎崲涓轰笂闈㈢殑閫昏緫)
                mergedNbt = baseNbtObj;
                success = true;
            } catch (Exception e) {
                success = false;
                System.err.println("Error merging NBT: " + e.getMessage());
            }
        }
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_MERGED_NBT_ID, mergedNbt);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID, success);
    }
    
    /* 
    // 鍦ㄥ疄闄呭疄鐜颁腑闇€瑕佽繖涓緟鍔╂柟娉曟潵閫掑綊鍚堝苟NBT缁撴瀯
    private void mergeNbt(CompoundTag target, CompoundTag source, boolean overwrite) {
        for (String key : source.getKeys()) {
            if (!target.contains(key) || overwrite) {
                // 鏍囩涓嶅瓨鍦ㄦ垨闇€瑕佽鐩?
                Tag sourceTag = source.get(key);
                
                // 澶勭悊澶嶅悎鏍囩鐨勭壒娈婃儏鍐?
                if (sourceTag instanceof CompoundTag && target.contains(key) && target.get(key) instanceof CompoundTag) {
                    // 閫掑綊鍚堝苟澶嶅悎鏍囩
                    CompoundTag targetChild = target.getCompound(key);
                    CompoundTag sourceChild = (CompoundTag) sourceTag;
                    mergeNbt(targetChild, sourceChild, overwrite);
                } else if (sourceTag instanceof ListTag && target.contains(key) && target.get(key) instanceof ListTag) {
                    // 鍚堝苟鍒楄〃鏍囩
                    ListTag targetList = target.getList(key, ((ListTag) sourceTag).getElementType());
                    ListTag sourceList = (ListTag) sourceTag;
                    
                    // 娣诲姞婧愬垪琛ㄤ腑鐨勬墍鏈夊厓绱?
                    for (int i = 0; i < sourceList.size(); i++) {
                        targetList.add(sourceList.get(i).copy());
                    }
                } else {
                    // 鐩存帴澶嶅埗鏍囩
                    target.put(key, sourceTag.copy());
                }
            }
        }
    }
    */
    
    // --- Getters/Setters for Properties ---
    
    public boolean isOverwriteExisting() {
        return overwriteExisting;
    }
    
    public void setOverwriteExisting(boolean overwriteExisting) {
        this.overwriteExisting = overwriteExisting;
        markDirty();
    }
}

package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.world.nbt;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Set Block State 鑺傜偣: 淇敼 BlockInfo 鎴?MinecraftBlock 鐨勭姸鎬佸睘鎬?
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "world.nbt.set_block_state",
    displayName = "璁剧疆鏂瑰潡鐘舵€?,
    description = "璁剧疆鏂瑰潡鐨勭姸鎬佸睘鎬?,
    category = "world.nbt"
)
public class SetBlockStateNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_BLOCK_ID = "input_block";
    private static final String INPUT_PROPERTY_ID = "input_property";
    private static final String INPUT_VALUE_ID = "input_value";
    private static final String INPUT_UPDATE_CLIENTS_ID = "input_update_clients";
    private static final String INPUT_UPDATE_NEIGHBORS_ID = "input_update_neighbors";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_BLOCK_ID = "output_block";
    private static final String OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID = "output_success";

    // --- 鑺傜偣灞炴€?---
    private String description = "淇敼 BlockInfo 鎴?MinecraftBlock 鐨勭姸鎬佸睘鎬?;
    private boolean updateClients = true; // 鏄惁閫氱煡瀹㈡埛绔洿鏂?
    private boolean updateNeighbors = true; // 鏄惁閫氱煡鐩搁偦鏂瑰潡鏇存柊

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public SetBlockStateNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "world.nbt.set_block_state");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_BLOCK_ID, "Block", 
                "鐩爣鏂瑰潡", NodeDataType.ANY, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_PROPERTY_ID, "Property", 
                "瑕佽缃殑灞炴€у悕绉?, NodeDataType.STRING, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_VALUE_ID, "Value", 
                "瑕佽缃殑灞炴€у€?, NodeDataType.ANY, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_UPDATE_CLIENTS_ID, "Update Clients", 
                "鏄惁閫氱煡瀹㈡埛绔洿鏂?, NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_UPDATE_NEIGHBORS_ID, "Update Neighbors", 
                "鏄惁閫氱煡鐩搁偦鏂瑰潡鏇存柊", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_BLOCK_ID, "Modified Block", 
                "琚慨鏀圭殑鏂瑰潡瀵硅薄", NodeDataType.ANY, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID, "Success", 
                "鏄惁鎴愬姛璁剧疆灞炴€?, NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
    }

    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return this.description;
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 榛樿杈撳嚭鍊?
        Object modifiedBlock = null;
        boolean success = false;
        
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object blockObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_BLOCK_ID);
        Object propertyObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_PROPERTY_ID);
        Object valueObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_VALUE_ID);
        Object updateClientsObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_UPDATE_CLIENTS_ID);
        Object updateNeighborsObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_UPDATE_NEIGHBORS_ID);
        
        // 鑾峰彇鏄惁鏇存柊瀹㈡埛绔拰鐩搁偦鏂瑰潡
        boolean shouldUpdateClients = this.updateClients;
        if (updateClientsObj instanceof Boolean) {
            shouldUpdateClients = (Boolean) updateClientsObj;
        }
        
        boolean shouldUpdateNeighbors = this.updateNeighbors;
        if (updateNeighborsObj instanceof Boolean) {
            shouldUpdateNeighbors = (Boolean) updateNeighborsObj;
        }
        
        // 妫€鏌ュ繀瑕佺殑杈撳叆鏄惁瀛樺湪
        if (blockObj != null && propertyObj instanceof String && valueObj != null) {
            String propertyName = (String) propertyObj;
            
            try {
                /* 
                鍦ㄥ疄闄呭疄鐜颁腑锛岄渶瑕佹牴鎹甅inecraft API瀹炵幇浠ヤ笅鎿嶄綔:
                1. 鑾峰彇鏂瑰潡鐘舵€?
                2. 鏌ユ壘骞朵慨鏀规寚瀹氬睘鎬?
                3. 搴旂敤鏂扮殑鐘舵€?
                
                绀轰緥浠ｇ爜濡備笅锛堥渶瑕佹牴鎹疄闄匒PI璋冩暣锛?
                
                // 璁＄畻鏇存柊鏍囧織
                int updateFlags = 0;
                if (shouldUpdateClients) {
                    updateFlags |= Block.NOTIFY_LISTENERS;
                }
                if (shouldUpdateNeighbors) {
                    updateFlags |= Block.NOTIFY_NEIGHBORS;
                }

                            Optional<Object> validValue = parsePropertyValue(property, valueObj);

                                // 娉ㄦ剰锛氳繖閲岄渶瑕佺被鍨嬭浆鎹㈠拰绫诲瀷瀹夊叏澶勭悊
                                // Property<Object> uncheckedProperty = (Property<Object>) property;
                                // BlockState newState = oldState.with(uncheckedProperty, validValue.get());
                                
                                // 濡傛灉鍖呭惈鍦ㄤ笘鐣屼腑鐨勬柟鍧楋紝鍒欏簲鐢ㄦ洿鏀?
                                // if (context != null && context.getWorld() != null) {
                                //     BlockPos pos = ...; // 闇€瑕佺‘瀹氭柟鍧椾綅缃?
                                //     context.getWorld().setBlockState(pos, newState, updateFlags);
                                // }
                                
                                // modifiedBlock = newState;

                                // break;
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }

                // else if (blockObj instanceof BlockInfo) {
                //     BlockInfo blockInfo = (BlockInfo) blockObj;
                //     BlockState oldState = blockInfo.getState();
                //

                //             
                //             if (validValue.isPresent()) {
                //                 Property<Object> uncheckedProperty = (Property<Object>) property;

                //                     blockInfo.getPos(),
                //                     newState,
                //                     blockInfo.getNbt() != null ? blockInfo.getNbt().copy() : null
                //                 );
                //                 
                //                 modifiedBlock = newBlockInfo;
                //                 success = true;
                //                 break;
                //             }
                //         }
                //     }
                // }

                modifiedBlock = blockObj;
                success = true;
            } catch (Exception e) {
                success = false;
                System.err.println("Error setting block state: " + e.getMessage());
            }
        }
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_BLOCK_ID, modifiedBlock);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID, success);
    }
    
    /* 
    // 鍦ㄥ疄闄呭疄鐜颁腑闇€瑕佽繖涓緟鍔╂柟娉曟潵瑙ｆ瀽灞炴€у€?
    private Optional<Object> parsePropertyValue(Property<?> property, Object value) {
        // 澶勭悊瀛楃涓插€?
        if (value instanceof String) {
            return property.parse((String) value);
        }
        
        // 澶勭悊甯冨皵鍊?
        if (property instanceof BooleanProperty && value instanceof Boolean) {
            return Optional.of(value);
        }
        
        // 澶勭悊鏁存暟鍊?
        if (property instanceof IntProperty && value instanceof Number) {
            int intValue = ((Number) value).intValue();
            IntProperty intProperty = (IntProperty) property;
            if (intValue >= intProperty.getMin() && intValue <= intProperty.getMax()) {
                return Optional.of(intValue);
            }
        }
        
        // 澶勭悊鏋氫妇鍊硷紙濡傛柟鍚戯級
        if (property instanceof EnumProperty && value instanceof String) {
            String strValue = (String) value;
            EnumProperty<?> enumProperty = (EnumProperty<?>) property;
            
            for (Object enumConstant : enumProperty.getValues()) {
                if (enumConstant.toString().equalsIgnoreCase(strValue)) {
                    return Optional.of(enumConstant);
                }
            }
        }
        
        return Optional.empty();
    }

    // --- Getters/Setters for Properties ---
    
    public boolean isUpdateClients() {
        return updateClients;
    }
    
    public void setUpdateClients(boolean updateClients) {
        this.updateClients = updateClients;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    public boolean isUpdateNeighbors() {
        return updateNeighbors;
    }
    
    public void setUpdateNeighbors(boolean updateNeighbors) {
        this.updateNeighbors = updateNeighbors;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    /**
     * 淇濆瓨鑺傜偣鐘舵€?
     */
    @Override
    public @Nullable Object getNodeState() {
        return new boolean[] { updateClients, updateNeighbors };
    }
    
    /**
     * 鎭㈠鑺傜偣鐘舵€?
     */
    @Override
    public void setNodeState(@Nullable Object state) {
        if (state instanceof boolean[]) {
            boolean[] boolArray = (boolean[]) state;
            if (boolArray.length >= 1) {
                updateClients = boolArray[0];
            }
            if (boolArray.length >= 2) {
                updateNeighbors = boolArray[1];
            }
        }
    }
}

package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.world.nbt;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Set NBT Tag 鑺傜偣: 璁剧疆鏂瑰潡瀹炰綋鎴栧疄浣撶殑NBT鏍囩銆?
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "world.nbt.set_nbt_tag",
    displayName = "璁剧疆NBT鏍囩",
    description = "璁剧疆鏂瑰潡瀹炰綋鎴栧疄浣撶殑NBT鏍囩",
    category = "world.nbt"
)
public class SetNBTTagNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 鑺傜偣灞炴€?---
    private String description = "璁剧疆 MinecraftBlock 鎴?MinecraftEntity 鐨?NBT 鍊?;

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_TARGET_ID = "input_target";
    private static final String INPUT_PATH_ID = "input_path";
    private static final String INPUT_VALUE_ID = "input_value";
    private static final String INPUT_VALUE_TYPE_ID = "input_value_type";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_TARGET_ID = "output_target";
    private static final String OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID = "output_success";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public SetNBTTagNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "world.nbt.set_nbt_tag");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_TARGET_ID, "Target", 
                "鐩爣鏂瑰潡鎴栧疄浣?, NodeDataType.ANY, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_PATH_ID, "Path", 
                "NBT鏍囩璺緞 (濡?'Items[0].id')", NodeDataType.STRING, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_VALUE_ID, "Value", 
                "瑕佽缃殑鍊?, NodeDataType.ANY, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_VALUE_TYPE_ID, "Value Type", 
                "鍊肩殑绫诲瀷 (string, int, float, double, byte, list, compound绛?", NodeDataType.STRING, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_TARGET_ID, "Modified Target", 
                "琚慨鏀圭殑鐩爣瀵硅薄", NodeDataType.ANY, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID, "Success", 
                "鏄惁鎴愬姛璁剧疆鍊?, NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
    }

    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return this.description;
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 榛樿杈撳嚭鍊?
        Object modifiedTarget = null;
        boolean success = false;
        
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object targetObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_TARGET_ID);
        Object pathObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_PATH_ID);
        Object valueObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_VALUE_ID);
        Object valueTypeObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_VALUE_TYPE_ID);
        
        // 纭畾鍊肩被鍨?
        String valueType = "string"; // 榛樿绫诲瀷
        if (valueTypeObj instanceof String) {
            valueType = ((String) valueTypeObj).toLowerCase();
        } else if (valueObj instanceof String) {
            valueType = "string";
        } else if (valueObj instanceof Integer) {
            valueType = "int";
        } else if (valueObj instanceof Float) {
            valueType = "float";
        } else if (valueObj instanceof Double) {
            valueType = "double";
        } else if (valueObj instanceof Boolean) {
            valueType = "byte"; // Minecraft涓竷灏斿€奸€氬父瀛樺偍涓哄瓧鑺?
        } else if (valueObj instanceof java.util.List) {
            valueType = "list";
        } else if (valueObj != null && valueObj.getClass().getSimpleName().contains("CompoundTag")) {
            valueType = "compound";
        }
        
        // 妫€鏌ュ繀瑕佺殑杈撳叆鏄惁瀛樺湪
        if (targetObj != null && pathObj instanceof String && valueObj != null) {
            String path = (String) pathObj;
            
            try {
                // 纭畾鐩爣瀵硅薄绫诲瀷骞惰缃甆BT
                if (targetObj instanceof Object) { // 闇€瑕佷娇鐢ㄦ纭殑Minecraft绫诲瀷妫€鏌?
                    /*
                    鍦ㄥ疄闄呭疄鐜颁腑锛岄渶瑕佹牴鎹甅inecraft API瀹炵幇浠ヤ笅鎿嶄綔:
                    1. 妫€鏌argetObj鏄惁涓烘柟鍧楁垨瀹炰綋
                    2. 鑾峰彇鍏禢BT鏁版嵁
                    3. 瑙ｆ瀽璺緞锛岃缃寚瀹氫綅缃殑鍊?
                    4. 灏嗘洿鏂板悗鐨凬BT搴旂敤鍥炲璞?
                    
                    CompoundTag nbt = null;
                    boolean isBlockEntity = false;
                    
                    if (targetObj instanceof BlockEntity) {
                        BlockEntity blockEntity = (BlockEntity) targetObj;
                        nbt = blockEntity.saveWithFullMetadata();
                        isBlockEntity = true;
                    } else if (targetObj instanceof Entity) {
                        Entity entity = (Entity) targetObj;
                        nbt = entity.writeNbt(new CompoundTag());
                    }
                    
                    if (nbt != null) {
                        // 澶勭悊NBT璺緞浠ヨ缃壒瀹氱殑鍊?
                        if (path.contains(".") || path.contains("[")) {
                            // 澶勭悊宓屽璺緞
                            String[] parts = path.split("\\.");
                            CompoundTag current = nbt;
                            
                            // 澶勭悊闄ゆ渶鍚庝竴閮ㄥ垎澶栫殑宓屽璺緞
                            for (int i = 0; i < parts.length - 1; i++) {
                                String part = parts[i];
                                if (part.contains("[") && part.contains("]")) {
                                    // 澶勭悊鏁扮粍绱㈠紩锛屼緥濡?Items[0]
                                    String name = part.substring(0, part.indexOf("["));
                                    int index = Integer.parseInt(part.substring(
                                        part.indexOf("[") + 1, part.indexOf("]")));
                                    
                                    if (!current.contains(name)) {
                                        // 鍒涘缓鏂扮殑鍒楄〃
                                        current.put(name, new ListTag());
                                    }
                                    
                                    ListTag list = current.getList(name, Tag.COMPOUND_TYPE);
                                    while (list.size() <= index) {
                                        // 纭繚鍒楄〃鏈夎冻澶熺殑鍏冪礌
                                        list.add(new CompoundTag());
                                    }
                                    
                                    current = list.getCompound(index);
                                } else {
                                    if (!current.contains(part)) {
                                        // 鍒涘缓鏂扮殑澶嶅悎鏍囩
                                        current.put(part, new CompoundTag());
                                    }
                                    current = current.getCompound(part);
                                }
                            }
                            
                            // 澶勭悊鏈€鍚庝竴閮ㄥ垎锛岃缃疄闄呭€?
                            String lastPart = parts[parts.length - 1];
                            Tag tag = createTag(valueType, valueObj);
                            
                            // 璁剧疆鏈€缁堝€?
                            if (lastPart.contains("[") && lastPart.contains("]")) {
                                // 澶勭悊鏁扮粍绱㈠紩
                                String name = lastPart.substring(0, lastPart.indexOf("["));
                                int index = Integer.parseInt(lastPart.substring(
                                    lastPart.indexOf("[") + 1, lastPart.indexOf("]")));
                                
                                if (!current.contains(name)) {
                                    // 鍒涘缓鏂扮殑鍒楄〃
                                    current.put(name, new ListTag());
                                }
                                
                                ListTag list = current.getList(name, Tag.LIST_TYPE);
                                while (list.size() <= index) {
                                    // 纭繚鍒楄〃鏈夎冻澶熺殑鍏冪礌
                                    list.add(new CompoundTag());
                                }
                                
                                list.setTag(index, tag);
                            } else {
                                current.put(lastPart, tag);
                            }
                        } else {
                            // 绠€鍗曡矾寰勶紝鐩存帴璁剧疆鍊?
                            Tag tag = createTag(valueType, valueObj);
                            nbt.put(path, tag);
                        }
                        
                        // 灏嗘洿鏂板悗鐨凬BT搴旂敤鍥炲璞?
                        if (isBlockEntity) {
                            BlockEntity blockEntity = (BlockEntity) targetObj;
                            blockEntity.loadNbt(nbt);
                            blockEntity.markDirty();
                            // 濡傛灉鍦ㄦ湇鍔″櫒绔紝鍙兘闇€瑕佸悓姝ュ埌瀹㈡埛绔?
                            if (blockEntity.getWorld() instanceof ServerWorld) {
                                ((ServerWorld) blockEntity.getWorld()).updateListeners(
                                    blockEntity.getPos(), 
                                    blockEntity.getCachedState(), 
                                    blockEntity.getCachedState(), 
                                    Block.NOTIFY_LISTENERS);
                            }
                        } else if (targetObj instanceof Entity) {
                            Entity entity = (Entity) targetObj;
                            entity.readNbt(nbt);
                        }
                        
                        modifiedTarget = targetObj;
                        success = true;
                    }
                    */
                    
                    // 妯℃嫙鎴愬姛璁剧疆NBT鍊?(鍦ㄥ疄闄呭疄鐜颁腑鏇挎崲涓轰笂闈㈢殑閫昏緫)
                    modifiedTarget = targetObj;
                    success = true;
                }
            } catch (Exception e) {
                success = false;
                System.err.println("Error setting NBT tag: " + e.getMessage());
            }
        }
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_TARGET_ID, modifiedTarget);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_SUCCESS_ID, success);
    }
    
    /* 
    // 鍦ㄥ疄闄呭疄鐜颁腑闇€瑕佽繖涓緟鍔╂柟娉曟潵鍒涘缓姝ｇ‘绫诲瀷鐨凬BT鏍囩
    private Tag createTag(String type, Object value) {
        switch (type.toLowerCase()) {
            case "string":
                return StringTag.of(String.valueOf(value));
                
            case "int":
                if (value instanceof Number) {
                    return IntTag.of(((Number) value).intValue());
                } else {
                    try {
                        return IntTag.of(Integer.parseInt(String.valueOf(value)));
                    } catch (NumberFormatException e) {
                        return IntTag.of(0);
                    }
                }
                
            case "float":
                if (value instanceof Number) {
                    return FloatTag.of(((Number) value).floatValue());
                } else {
                    try {
                        return FloatTag.of(Float.parseFloat(String.valueOf(value)));
                    } catch (NumberFormatException e) {
                        return FloatTag.of(0);
                    }
                }
                
            case "double":
                if (value instanceof Number) {
                    return DoubleTag.of(((Number) value).doubleValue());
                } else {
                    try {
                        return DoubleTag.of(Double.parseDouble(String.valueOf(value)));
                    } catch (NumberFormatException e) {
                        return DoubleTag.of(0);
                    }
                }
                
            case "byte":
                // 澶勭悊甯冨皵鍊?
                if (value instanceof Boolean) {
                    return ByteTag.of((Boolean) value ? (byte) 1 : (byte) 0);
                } else if (value instanceof Number) {
                    return ByteTag.of(((Number) value).byteValue());
                } else {
                    try {
                        return ByteTag.of(Byte.parseByte(String.valueOf(value)));
                    } catch (NumberFormatException e) {
                        return ByteTag.of((byte) 0);
                    }
                }
                
            case "long":
                if (value instanceof Number) {
                    return LongTag.of(((Number) value).longValue());
                } else {
                    try {
                        return LongTag.of(Long.parseLong(String.valueOf(value)));
                    } catch (NumberFormatException e) {
                        return LongTag.of(0L);
                    }
                }
                
            case "short":
                if (value instanceof Number) {
                    return ShortTag.of(((Number) value).shortValue());
                } else {
                    try {
                        return ShortTag.of(Short.parseShort(String.valueOf(value)));
                    } catch (NumberFormatException e) {
                        return ShortTag.of((short) 0);
                    }
                }
                
            case "list":
                if (value instanceof java.util.List) {
                    ListTag listTag = new ListTag();
                    for (Object item : (java.util.List<?>) value) {
                        // 閫掑綊澶勭悊鍒楄〃椤癸紝鍋囪鎵€鏈夐」閮芥槸鍚屼竴绫诲瀷
                        // 瀹為檯瀹炵幇鍙兘闇€瑕佹洿澶嶆潅鐨勭被鍨嬫娴?
                        if (item instanceof String) {
                            listTag.add(StringTag.of((String) item));
                        } else if (item instanceof Integer) {
                            listTag.add(IntTag.of((Integer) item));
                        } else if (item instanceof Double) {
                            listTag.add(DoubleTag.of((Double) item));
                        } else {
                            // 榛樿澶勭悊涓哄鍚堟爣绛?
                            listTag.add(new CompoundTag());
                        }
                    }
                    return listTag;
                }
                return new ListTag();
                
            case "compound":
                if (value instanceof CompoundTag) {
                    return (CompoundTag) value;
                }
                return new CompoundTag();
                
            default:
                return StringTag.of(String.valueOf(value));
        }
    }
    */
} 
===FILE: C:\Users\navib\Desktop\development\NC\nodecraft\src\main\java\com\nodecraft\nodesystem\nodes\world\query\FindBlocksNode.java===
package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.world.query;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.datatypes.RegionData;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.util.BlockPosList;

import net.minecraft.util.math.BlockPos;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Find Blocks 鑺傜偣: 鍦?Region 鍐呮寜 BlockInfo 鏉′欢鏌ユ壘 Coordinate 鍒楄〃銆?
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "world.query.find_blocks",
    displayName = "鏌ユ壘鏂瑰潡",
    description = "鍦ㄥ尯鍩熷唴鎸夋柟鍧楃被鍨嬫煡鎵惧潗鏍囧垪琛?,
    category = "world.query"
)
public class FindBlocksNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 鑺傜偣灞炴€?---
    private String description = "鍦ㄥ尯鍩熷唴鎸夋柟鍧楃被鍨嬫煡鎵惧潗鏍囧垪琛?;
    private int maxResults = 1000; // 鏈€澶х粨鏋滄暟閲忥紝闃叉杩囧害鎼滅储

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_REGION_ID = "input_region";
    private static final String INPUT_BLOCK_INFO_ID = "input_block_info";
    private static final String INPUT_EXACT_MATCH_ID = "input_exact_match";
    private static final String INPUT_MAX_RESULTS_ID = "input_max_results";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_FOUND_BLOCKS_ID = "output_found_blocks";
    private static final String OUTPUT_COUNT_ID = "output_count";
    private static final String OUTPUT_FIRST_POS_ID = "output_first_pos";
    private static final String OUTPUT_FOUND_ANY_ID = "output_found_any";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public FindBlocksNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "world.query.find_blocks");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_REGION_ID, "Region", 
                "瑕佹悳绱㈢殑鍖哄煙", NodeDataType.REGION, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_BLOCK_INFO_ID, "Block Info", 
                "瑕佹煡鎵剧殑鏂瑰潡淇℃伅", NodeDataType.BLOCK_INFO, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_EXACT_MATCH_ID, "Exact Match", 
                "鏄惁闇€瑕佸畬鍏ㄥ尮閰嶏紙鍖呮嫭鏂瑰潡鐘舵€侊級", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_MAX_RESULTS_ID, "Max Results", 
                "鏈€澶х粨鏋滄暟閲?, NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_FOUND_BLOCKS_ID, "Found Blocks", 
                "鎵惧埌鐨勬柟鍧楀潗鏍囧垪琛?, NodeDataType.BLOCK_LIST, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_COUNT_ID, "Count", 
                "鎵惧埌鐨勬柟鍧楁暟閲?, NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_FIRST_POS_ID, "First Position", 
                "绗竴涓壘鍒扮殑浣嶇疆", NodeDataType.BLOCK_POS, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_FOUND_ANY_ID, "Found Any", 
                "鏄惁鎵惧埌浠讳綍鍖归厤鏂瑰潡", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
    }

    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return this.description;
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 榛樿杈撳嚭鍊?
        BlockPosList foundBlocks = new BlockPosList();
        int count = 0;
        BlockPos firstPos = null;
        boolean foundAny = false;
        
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object regionObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_REGION_ID);
        Object blockInfoObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_BLOCK_INFO_ID);
        
        // 鑾峰彇甯冨皵鍊煎弬鏁帮紝濡傛灉娌℃湁鎻愪緵鍒欎娇鐢ㄩ粯璁ゅ€?
        boolean exactMatch = true;
        Object exactMatchObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_EXACT_MATCH_ID);
        if (exactMatchObj instanceof Boolean) {
            exactMatch = (Boolean) exactMatchObj;
        }
        
        // 鑾峰彇鏈€澶х粨鏋滄暟閲?
        int maxResultsValue = this.maxResults;
        Object maxResultsObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_MAX_RESULTS_ID);
        if (maxResultsObj instanceof Number) {
            maxResultsValue = ((Number) maxResultsObj).intValue();
            if (maxResultsValue <= 0) {
                maxResultsValue = Integer.MAX_VALUE; // 鏃犻檺鍒?
            }
        }
        
        // 妫€鏌ユ墽琛屼笂涓嬫枃銆佸尯鍩熷拰鏂瑰潡淇℃伅杈撳叆鏄惁鏈夋晥
        if (context != null && context.getWorld() != null && 
                regionObj instanceof RegionData && blockInfoObj != null) {
            RegionData region = (RegionData) regionObj;
            
            // 纭繚鍖哄煙瀹屾暣涓旀湁鏁?
            if (region.isComplete()) {
                BlockPos minCorner = region.getMinCorner();
                BlockPos maxCorner = region.getMaxCorner();
                
                // 閬嶅巻鍖哄煙鍐呯殑鎵€鏈夋柟鍧?
                blockSearch:
                for (BlockPos pos : BlockPos.iterate(minCorner, maxCorner)) {
                    BlockPos immutablePos = pos.toImmutable();
                    
                    try {
                        // 鑾峰彇鏂瑰潡鐘舵€?
                        Object blockState = context.getWorld().getBlockState(immutablePos);
                        
                        // 鍖归厤閫昏緫锛屽疄闄呭疄鐜颁腑搴旀牴鎹甅inecraft API杩涜姝ｇ‘鐨勬瘮杈?
                        boolean isMatch = false;
                        
                        if (exactMatch) {
                            // 绮剧‘鍖归厤锛堟柟鍧楃被鍨嬪拰鐘舵€侀兘蹇呴』鍖归厤锛?
                            isMatch = blockInfoObj.equals(blockState);
                        } else {
                            // 鍙尮閰嶆柟鍧楃被鍨嬶紝涓嶈€冭檻鐘舵€?
                            // 杩欓噷闇€瑕佹牴鎹甅inecraft API璋冩暣瀹炵幇
                            String blockStateType = blockState.toString().split("\\[")[0];
                            String targetType = blockInfoObj.toString().split("\\[")[0];
                            isMatch = blockStateType.equals(targetType);
                        }
                        
                        if (isMatch) {
                            // 鎵惧埌鍖归厤鏂瑰潡
                            foundBlocks.add(immutablePos);
                            count++;
                            
                            // 璁板綍绗竴涓壘鍒扮殑浣嶇疆
                            if (firstPos == null) {
                                firstPos = immutablePos;
                                foundAny = true;
                            }
                            
                            // 濡傛灉杈惧埌鏈€澶х粨鏋滄暟閲忓垯鍋滄鎼滅储
                            if (count >= maxResultsValue) {
                                break blockSearch;
                            }
                        }
                    } catch (Exception e) {
                        // 璁板綍閿欒浣嗙户缁鐞嗗叾浠栨柟鍧?
                        System.err.println("Error checking block at " + pos + ": " + e.getMessage());
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_FOUND_BLOCKS_ID, foundBlocks);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_COUNT_ID, count);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_FIRST_POS_ID, firstPos);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_FOUND_ANY_ID, foundAny);
    }
    
    // --- Getters/Setters for Properties ---
    
    public int getMaxResults() {
        return maxResults;
    }
    
    public void setMaxResults(int maxResults) {
        if (maxResults > 0) {
            this.maxResults = maxResults;
            markDirty();
        }
    }
}

/**
 * Get Biome 鑺傜偣: 鑾峰彇鎸囧畾鍧愭爣鐨勭敓鐗╃兢绯诲悕绉般€?
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "world.query.get_biome",
    displayName = "鑾峰彇鐢熺墿缇ょ郴",
    description = "鑾峰彇鎸囧畾鍧愭爣鐨勭敓鐗╃兢绯讳俊鎭?,
    category = "world.query"
)
public class GetBiomeNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 鑺傜偣灞炴€?---
    private String description = "鑾峰彇鎸囧畾鍧愭爣鐨勭敓鐗╃兢绯讳俊鎭?;

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_COORDINATE_ID = "input_coordinate";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_BIOME_ID = "output_biome";
    private static final String OUTPUT_BIOME_NAME_ID = "output_biome_name";
    private static final String OUTPUT_BIOME_TEMP_ID = "output_biome_temperature";
    private static final String OUTPUT_IS_OCEAN_ID = "output_is_ocean";
    private static final String OUTPUT_DOWNFALL_ID = "output_downfall";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public GetBiomeNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "world.query.get_biome");
