                "瑕佹煡璇㈢殑鍧愭爣", NodeDataType.BLOCK_POS, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_BIOME_ID, "Biome", 
                "鐢熺墿缇ょ郴瀵硅薄", NodeDataType.BIOME, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_BIOME_NAME_ID, "Biome Name", 
                "鐢熺墿缇ょ郴鍚嶇О", NodeDataType.STRING, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_BIOME_TEMP_ID, "Temperature", 
                "鐢熺墿缇ょ郴娓╁害", NodeDataType.FLOAT, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_IS_OCEAN_ID, "Is Ocean", 
                "鏄惁涓烘捣娲嬬敓鐗╃兢绯?, NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_DOWNFALL_ID, "Downfall", 
                "闄嶆按閲?, NodeDataType.FLOAT, this));
    }

    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return this.description;
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 榛樿杈撳嚭鍊?
        Object biomeObj = null;
        String biomeName = "";
        float temperature = 0.0f;
        boolean isOcean = false;
        float downfall = 0.0f;
        
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍧愭爣
        Object coordinateObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_COORDINATE_ID);
        
        // 妫€鏌ユ墽琛屼笂涓嬫枃鍜屽潗鏍囪緭鍏ユ槸鍚︽湁鏁?
        if (context != null && context.getWorld() != null && coordinateObj instanceof BlockPos) {
            BlockPos pos = (BlockPos) coordinateObj;

                // 鍦ㄥ疄闄呭疄鐜颁腑锛屼粠涓栫晫鑾峰彇鐢熺墿缇ょ郴淇℃伅
                // 杩欓噷鍙槸绀轰緥浠ｇ爜锛岄渶瑕佹牴鎹甅inecraft瀹為檯API璋冩暣
                // biomeObj = context.getWorld().getBiome(pos);
                
                // 鑾峰彇鐢熺墿缇ょ郴鍚嶇О
                if (biomeObj != null) {
                    // 鍋囪鑾峰彇鐢熺墿缇ょ郴淇℃伅鐨勫疄鐜?
                    // biomeName = Registry.BIOME.getId(biomeObj).toString();
                    biomeName = "minecraft:plains"; // 妯℃嫙鍚嶇О
                    
                    // 鑾峰彇鐢熺墿缇ょ郴娓╁害
                    // temperature = biomeObj.getTemperature();
                    temperature = 0.8f; // 妯℃嫙娓╁害
                    
                    // 妫€鏌ユ槸鍚︿负娴锋磱
                    // isOcean = biomeObj.getCategory() == Biome.Category.OCEAN;
                    isOcean = biomeName.contains("ocean"); // 妯℃嫙娴锋磱妫€鏌?
                    
                    // 鑾峰彇闄嶆按閲?
                    // downfall = biomeObj.getDownfall();
                    downfall = 0.4f; // 妯℃嫙闄嶆按閲?
                }
            } catch (Exception e) {
                // 璁板綍閿欒浣嗙户缁墽琛岋紝浣跨敤榛樿鍊?
                System.err.println("Error getting biome at " + pos + ": " + e.getMessage());
            }
        }
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_BIOME_ID, biomeObj);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_BIOME_NAME_ID, biomeName);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_BIOME_TEMP_ID, temperature);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_IS_OCEAN_ID, isOcean);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_DOWNFALL_ID, downfall);
    }
}

package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.world.query;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import net.minecraft.util.math.BlockPos;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Get Block 鑺傜偣: 鑾峰彇鎸囧畾鍧愭爣鐨?MinecraftBlock 淇℃伅銆?
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "world.query.get_block",
    displayName = "鑾峰彇鏂瑰潡",
    description = "鑾峰彇鎸囧畾鍧愭爣鐨勬柟鍧椾俊鎭?,
    category = "world.query"
)
public class GetBlockNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 鑺傜偣灞炴€?---
    private String description = "鑾峰彇鎸囧畾鍧愭爣鐨勬柟鍧椾俊鎭?;

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_COORDINATE_ID = "input_coordinate";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_BLOCK_ID = "output_block";
    private static final String OUTPUT_BLOCK_TYPE_ID = "output_block_type";
    private static final String OUTPUT_IS_AIR_ID = "output_is_air";
    private static final String OUTPUT_IS_SOLID_ID = "output_is_solid";
    private static final String OUTPUT_LIGHT_LEVEL_ID = "output_light_level";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public GetBlockNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "world.query.get_block");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_COORDINATE_ID, "Coordinate", 
                "瑕佹煡璇㈢殑鏂瑰潡鍧愭爣", NodeDataType.BLOCK_POS, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_BLOCK_ID, "Block", 
                "鏂瑰潡瀵硅薄", NodeDataType.MINECRAFT_BLOCK, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_BLOCK_TYPE_ID, "Block Type", 
                "鏂瑰潡绫诲瀷ID", NodeDataType.BLOCK_TYPE, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_IS_AIR_ID, "Is Air", 
                "鏄惁涓虹┖姘旀柟鍧?, NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_IS_SOLID_ID, "Is Solid", 
                "鏄惁涓哄疄蹇冩柟鍧?, NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_LIGHT_LEVEL_ID, "Light Level", 
                "鏂瑰潡鍏夌収绛夌骇", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
    }

    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return this.description;
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 榛樿杈撳嚭鍊?
        Object blockObj = null;
        String blockType = "";
        boolean isAir = true;
        boolean isSolid = false;
        int lightLevel = 0;
        
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍧愭爣
        Object coordinateObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_COORDINATE_ID);
        
        // 妫€鏌ユ墽琛屼笂涓嬫枃鍜屽潗鏍囪緭鍏ユ槸鍚︽湁鏁?
        if (context != null && context.getWorld() != null && coordinateObj instanceof BlockPos) {
            BlockPos pos = (BlockPos) coordinateObj;
            
            try {
                // 鍦ㄥ疄闄呭疄鐜颁腑锛屼粠涓栫晫鑾峰彇鏂瑰潡淇℃伅
                // 杩欓噷鍙槸绀轰緥浠ｇ爜锛岄渶瑕佹牴鎹甅inecraft瀹為檯API璋冩暣
                blockObj = context.getWorld().getBlockState(pos);
                
                // 鑾峰彇鏂瑰潡绫诲瀷
                if (blockObj != null) {
                    // 鍋囪blockObj鏄疊lockState锛岃幏鍙栨柟鍧桰D
                    blockType = blockObj.toString(); // 鍦ㄥ疄闄呭疄鐜颁腑搴旇鑾峰彇姝ｇ‘鐨処D
                    
                    // 妫€鏌ユ槸鍚︿负绌烘皵
                    isAir = context.getWorld().isAir(pos);
                    
                    // 妫€鏌ユ槸鍚︿负瀹炲績鏂瑰潡
                    isSolid = !isAir; // 绠€鍖栧疄鐜帮紝瀹為檯搴旀鏌ョ鎾炵
                    
                    // 鑾峰彇鍏夌収绛夌骇
                    lightLevel = context.getWorld().getLightLevel(pos);
                }
            } catch (Exception e) {
                // 璁板綍閿欒浣嗙户缁墽琛岋紝浣跨敤榛樿鍊?
                System.err.println("Error getting block at " + pos + ": " + e.getMessage());
            }
        }
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_BLOCK_ID, blockObj);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_BLOCK_TYPE_ID, blockType);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_IS_AIR_ID, isAir);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_IS_SOLID_ID, isSolid);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_LIGHT_LEVEL_ID, lightLevel);
    }
} 
===FILE: C:\Users\navib\Desktop\development\NC\nodecraft\src\main\java\com\nodecraft\nodesystem\nodes\world\query\GetBlocksInRegionNode.java===
package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.world.query;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.datatypes.RegionData;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.util.BlockPosList;

import net.minecraft.util.math.BlockPos;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;

import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Get Blocks in Region 鑺傜偣: 鑾峰彇鍖哄煙鍐呮墍鏈夋柟鍧楃殑鍒楄〃銆?
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "world.query.get_blocks_in_region",
    displayName = "鑾峰彇鍖哄煙鍐呮柟鍧?,
    description = "鑾峰彇鍖哄煙鍐呮墍鏈夋柟鍧楃殑鍒楄〃",
    category = "world.query"
)
public class GetBlocksInRegionNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 鑺傜偣灞炴€?---
    private String description = "鑾峰彇鍖哄煙鍐呮墍鏈夋柟鍧楃殑鍒楄〃";
    private boolean excludeAir = true; // 榛樿鎺掗櫎绌烘皵鏂瑰潡

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_REGION_ID = "input_region";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_BLOCKS_LIST_ID = "output_blocks_list";
    private static final String OUTPUT_COORDINATES_ID = "output_coordinates";
    private static final String OUTPUT_BLOCK_COUNT_ID = "output_block_count";
    private static final String OUTPUT_AIR_COUNT_ID = "output_air_count";
    private static final String OUTPUT_SOLID_COUNT_ID = "output_solid_count";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public GetBlocksInRegionNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "world.query.get_blocks_in_region");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_REGION_ID, "Region", 
                "瑕佹煡璇㈢殑鍖哄煙", NodeDataType.REGION, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_BLOCKS_LIST_ID, "Blocks List", 
                "鍖哄煙鍐呯殑鏂瑰潡鍒楄〃", NodeDataType.LIST, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_COORDINATES_ID, "Coordinates", 
                "鏂瑰潡鍧愭爣鍒楄〃", NodeDataType.BLOCK_LIST, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_BLOCK_COUNT_ID, "Block Count", 
                "鏂瑰潡鎬绘暟", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_AIR_COUNT_ID, "Air Count", 
                "绌烘皵鏂瑰潡鏁伴噺", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_SOLID_COUNT_ID, "Solid Count", 
                "闈炵┖姘旀柟鍧楁暟閲?, NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
    }

    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return this.description;
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 榛樿杈撳嚭鍊?
        List<Object> blocksList = new ArrayList<>();
        BlockPosList coordsList = new BlockPosList();
        int blockCount = 0;
        int airCount = 0;
        int solidCount = 0;
        
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍖哄煙
        Object regionObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_REGION_ID);
        
        // 妫€鏌ユ墽琛屼笂涓嬫枃鍜屽尯鍩熻緭鍏ユ槸鍚︽湁鏁?
        if (context != null && context.getWorld() != null && regionObj instanceof RegionData) {
            RegionData region = (RegionData) regionObj;
            
            // 纭繚鍖哄煙瀹屾暣涓旀湁鏁?
            if (region.isComplete()) {
                BlockPos minCorner = region.getMinCorner();
                BlockPos maxCorner = region.getMaxCorner();
                
                // 閬嶅巻鍖哄煙鍐呯殑鎵€鏈夋柟鍧?
                for (BlockPos pos : BlockPos.iterate(minCorner, maxCorner)) {
                    BlockPos immutablePos = pos.toImmutable();
                    
                    try {
                        // 鑾峰彇鏂瑰潡鐘舵€?
                        Object blockState = context.getWorld().getBlockState(immutablePos);
                        
                        // 妫€鏌ユ槸鍚︿负绌烘皵
                        boolean isAir = context.getWorld().isAir(immutablePos);
                        
                        // 鏍规嵁璁剧疆鍐冲畾鏄惁鍖呮嫭绌烘皵鏂瑰潡
                        if (!excludeAir || !isAir) {
                            blocksList.add(blockState);
                            coordsList.add(immutablePos);
                        }
                        
                        // 鏇存柊璁℃暟
                        blockCount++;
                        if (isAir) {
                            airCount++;
                        } else {
                            solidCount++;
                        }
                    } catch (Exception e) {
                        // 璁板綍閿欒浣嗙户缁鐞嗗叾浠栨柟鍧?
                        System.err.println("Error getting block at " + pos + ": " + e.getMessage());
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_BLOCKS_LIST_ID, blocksList);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_COORDINATES_ID, coordsList);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_BLOCK_COUNT_ID, blockCount);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_AIR_COUNT_ID, airCount);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_SOLID_COUNT_ID, solidCount);
    }
    
    // --- Getters/Setters for Properties ---
    
    public boolean isExcludeAir() {
        return excludeAir;
    }
    
    public void setExcludeAir(boolean excludeAir) {
        this.excludeAir = excludeAir;
        markDirty();
    }
} 
===FILE: C:\Users\navib\Desktop\development\NC\nodecraft\src\main\java\com\nodecraft\nodesystem\nodes\world\query\GetEntitiesInRegionNode.java===
package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.world.query;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.datatypes.RegionData;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import net.minecraft.util.math.BlockPos;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;

import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Get Entities in Region 鑺傜偣: 鑾峰彇鍖哄煙鍐呮墍鏈夊疄浣撶殑鍒楄〃銆?
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "world.query.get_entities_in_region",
    displayName = "鑾峰彇鍖哄煙鍐呭疄浣?,
    description = "鑾峰彇鍖哄煙鍐呮墍鏈夊疄浣撶殑鍒楄〃",
    category = "world.query"
)
public class GetEntitiesInRegionNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 鑺傜偣灞炴€?---
    private String description = "鑾峰彇鍖哄煙鍐呮墍鏈夊疄浣撶殑鍒楄〃";
    private boolean excludePlayers = false; // 鏄惁鎺掗櫎鐜╁
    private boolean includeItems = true; // 鏄惁鍖呮嫭鎺夎惤鐗╁搧

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_REGION_ID = "input_region";
    private static final String INPUT_ENTITY_TYPE_ID = "input_entity_type";
    private static final String INPUT_EXCLUDE_PLAYERS_ID = "input_exclude_players";
    private static final String INPUT_INCLUDE_ITEMS_ID = "input_include_items";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_ENTITIES_LIST_ID = "output_entities_list";
    private static final String OUTPUT_COUNT_ID = "output_count";
    private static final String OUTPUT_PLAYER_COUNT_ID = "output_player_count";
    private static final String OUTPUT_NEAREST_ENTITY_ID = "output_nearest_entity";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public GetEntitiesInRegionNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "world.query.get_entities_in_region");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_REGION_ID, "Region", 
                "瑕佹煡璇㈢殑鍖哄煙", NodeDataType.REGION, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_ENTITY_TYPE_ID, "Entity Type", 
                "杩囨护鐨勫疄浣撶被鍨嬶紙鍙€夛級", NodeDataType.ENTITY_TYPE, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_EXCLUDE_PLAYERS_ID, "Exclude Players", 
                "鏄惁鎺掗櫎鐜╁", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_INCLUDE_ITEMS_ID, "Include Items", 
                "鏄惁鍖呮嫭鎺夎惤鐗╁搧", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_ENTITIES_LIST_ID, "Entities List", 
                "鍖哄煙鍐呯殑瀹炰綋鍒楄〃", NodeDataType.LIST, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_COUNT_ID, "Count", 
                "瀹炰綋鎬绘暟", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_PLAYER_COUNT_ID, "Player Count", 
                "鐜╁鏁伴噺", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_NEAREST_ENTITY_ID, "Nearest Entity", 
                "鏈€杩戠殑瀹炰綋", NodeDataType.MINECRAFT_ENTITY, this));
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return this.description;
    }

    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 榛樿杈撳嚭鍊?
        List<Object> entitiesList = new ArrayList<>();
        int count = 0;
        int playerCount = 0;
        Object nearestEntity = null;
        
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object regionObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_REGION_ID);
        Object entityTypeObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_ENTITY_TYPE_ID);
        
        // 鑾峰彇甯冨皵鍊煎弬鏁?
        boolean excludePlayersValue = this.excludePlayers;
        Object excludePlayersObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_EXCLUDE_PLAYERS_ID);
        if (excludePlayersObj instanceof Boolean) {
            excludePlayersValue = (Boolean) excludePlayersObj;
        }
        
        boolean includeItemsValue = this.includeItems;
        Object includeItemsObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_INCLUDE_ITEMS_ID);
        if (includeItemsObj instanceof Boolean) {
            includeItemsValue = (Boolean) includeItemsObj;
        }
        
        // 瀹炰綋绫诲瀷杩囨护鍣?
        String entityTypeFilter = null;
        if (entityTypeObj instanceof String) {
            entityTypeFilter = (String) entityTypeObj;
            if (entityTypeFilter.isEmpty()) {
                entityTypeFilter = null;
            }
        }
        
        // 妫€鏌ユ墽琛屼笂涓嬫枃鍜屽尯鍩熻緭鍏ユ槸鍚︽湁鏁?
        if (context != null && context.getWorld() != null && regionObj instanceof RegionData) {
            RegionData region = (RegionData) regionObj;
            
            // 纭繚鍖哄煙瀹屾暣涓旀湁鏁?
            if (region.isComplete()) {
                BlockPos minCorner = region.getMinCorner();
                BlockPos maxCorner = region.getMaxCorner();
                
                // 鍦ㄥ疄闄呭疄鐜颁腑锛岃幏鍙栧尯鍩熷唴鐨勬墍鏈夊疄浣?
                // 涓嬮潰鏄ā鎷熷疄鐜帮紝闇€瑕佹浛鎹负瀹為檯鐨凪inecraft API璋冪敤
                
                // 鍋囪浠巆ontext鑾峰彇鍖呭惈鎵€鏈夊疄浣撶殑鍒楄〃
                // List<Entity> allEntities = context.getWorld().getAllEntities();
                List<Object> allEntities = new ArrayList<>(); // 妯℃嫙鍒楄〃
                
                // 鏈€杩戝疄浣撶殑璺濈璁＄畻锛堝鏋滄湁鐜╁鍙傝€冪偣锛?
                double nearestDistance = Double.MAX_VALUE;
                
                // 杩囨护鍖哄煙鍐呯殑瀹炰綋
                for (Object entity : allEntities) {
                    // 妫€鏌ュ疄浣撴槸鍚﹀湪鍖哄煙鍐?
                    // double x = entity.getX(), y = entity.getY(), z = entity.getZ();
                    // boolean inRegion = x >= minCorner.getX() && x <= maxCorner.getX() &&
                    //                   y >= minCorner.getY() && y <= maxCorner.getY() &&
                    //                   z >= minCorner.getZ() && z <= maxCorner.getZ();
                    boolean inRegion = false; // 妯℃嫙妫€鏌?
                    
                    if (inRegion) {
                        // 鍒ゆ柇瀹炰綋绫诲瀷
                        // boolean isPlayer = entity instanceof PlayerEntity;
                        boolean isPlayer = false; // 妯℃嫙妫€鏌?
                        // boolean isItem = entity instanceof ItemEntity;
                        boolean isItem = false; // 妯℃嫙妫€鏌?
                        
                        // 搴旂敤杩囨护鍣?
                        boolean shouldInclude = true;
                        
                        if (excludePlayersValue && isPlayer) {
                            shouldInclude = false;
                        }
                        
                        if (!includeItemsValue && isItem) {
                            shouldInclude = false;
                        }
                        
                        if (entityTypeFilter != null) {
                            // 妫€鏌ュ疄浣撶被鍨嬫槸鍚﹀尮閰嶈繃婊ゅ櫒
                            // String entityType = Registry.ENTITY_TYPE.getId(entity.getType()).toString();
                            String entityType = "minecraft:unknown"; // 妯℃嫙绫诲瀷
                            if (!entityTypeFilter.equals(entityType)) {
                                shouldInclude = false;
                            }
                        }
                        
                        if (shouldInclude) {
                            entitiesList.add(entity);
                            count++;
                            
                            if (isPlayer) {
                                playerCount++;
                            }
                            
                            // 璁＄畻鍒扮帺瀹剁殑璺濈锛屾壘鍑烘渶杩戠殑瀹炰綋
                            if (context.getPlayer() != null) {
                                // double distance = context.getPlayer().getPos().distanceTo(entity.getPos());
                                double distance = 0; // 妯℃嫙璺濈
                                
                                if (distance < nearestDistance) {
                                    nearestDistance = distance;
                                    nearestEntity = entity;
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_ENTITIES_LIST_ID, entitiesList);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_COUNT_ID, count);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_PLAYER_COUNT_ID, playerCount);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_NEAREST_ENTITY_ID, nearestEntity);
    }
    
    // --- Getters/Setters for Properties ---
    
    public boolean isExcludePlayers() {
        return excludePlayers;
    }
    
    public void setExcludePlayers(boolean excludePlayers) {
        this.excludePlayers = excludePlayers;
        markDirty();
    }
    
    public boolean isIncludeItems() {
        return includeItems;
    }
    
    public void setIncludeItems(boolean includeItems) {
        this.includeItems = includeItems;
        markDirty();
    }
}

package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.world.query;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;

import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Get Entity 鑺傜偣: 鏍规嵁瀹炰綋ID鎴栭€夋嫨鍣ㄨ幏鍙栧疄浣撲俊鎭€?
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "world.query.get_entity",
    displayName = "鑾峰彇瀹炰綋",
    description = "鏍规嵁瀹炰綋ID鎴栭€夋嫨鍣ㄨ幏鍙栧疄浣撲俊鎭?,
    category = "world.query"
)
public class GetEntityNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_UUID_ID = "input_uuid";
    private static final String INPUT_ENTITY_TYPE_ID = "input_entity_type";
    private static final String INPUT_FIND_NEAREST_ID = "input_find_nearest";
    private static final String INPUT_MAX_DISTANCE_ID = "input_max_distance";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_ENTITY_ID = "output_entity";
    private static final String OUTPUT_ENTITY_TYPE_ID = "output_entity_type";
    private static final String OUTPUT_ENTITY_POS_ID = "output_entity_pos";
    private static final String OUTPUT_FOUND_ID = "output_found";
    private static final String OUTPUT_DISTANCE_ID = "output_distance";
    
    // 鑺傜偣鎻忚堪
    private final String description = "閫氳繃UUID鎴栫被鍨嬭幏鍙栧疄浣撲俊鎭?;

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public GetEntityNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "world.query.get_entity");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_UUID_ID, "UUID", 
                "瀹炰綋鐨刄UID", NodeDataType.STRING, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_ENTITY_TYPE_ID, "Entity Type", 
                "瀹炰綋绫诲瀷锛堝鏋滄病鏈夋寚瀹歎UID锛?, NodeDataType.ENTITY_TYPE, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_FIND_NEAREST_ID, "Find Nearest", 
                "鏌ユ壘鏈€杩戠殑瀹炰綋锛堟寜绫诲瀷鏃讹級", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_MAX_DISTANCE_ID, "Max Distance", 
                "鏌ユ壘鐨勬渶澶ц窛绂?, NodeDataType.DOUBLE, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_ENTITY_ID, "Entity", 
                "瀹炰綋瀵硅薄", NodeDataType.MINECRAFT_ENTITY, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_ENTITY_TYPE_ID, "Entity Type", 
                "瀹炰綋绫诲瀷", NodeDataType.ENTITY_TYPE, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_ENTITY_POS_ID, "Entity Position", 
                "瀹炰綋浣嶇疆", NodeDataType.POSITION, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_FOUND_ID, "Found", 
                "鏄惁鎵惧埌瀹炰綋", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_DISTANCE_ID, "Distance", 
                "鍒板疄浣撶殑璺濈", NodeDataType.DOUBLE, this));
    }
    
    /**
     * 瀹炵幇INode鎺ュ彛鐨刧etDescription鏂规硶
     * @return 鑺傜偣鎻忚堪
     */
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return this.description;
    }
    
    /**
     * 瀹炵幇INode鎺ュ彛鐨刧etDisplayName鏂规硶
     * @return 鑺傜偣鏄剧ず鍚嶇О
     */
    @Override
    public String getDisplayName() {
        return "Get Entity";
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 榛樿杈撳嚭鍊?
        Object entityObj = null;
        String entityType = "";
        Object entityPos = null;
        boolean found = false;
        double distance = Double.MAX_VALUE;
        
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍊?
        Object uuidObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_UUID_ID);
        Object entityTypeObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_ENTITY_TYPE_ID);
        
        // 鑾峰彇棰濆杈撳叆鍙傛暟
        boolean findNearest = false;
        Object findNearestObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_FIND_NEAREST_ID);
        if (findNearestObj instanceof Boolean) {
            findNearest = (Boolean) findNearestObj;
        }
        
        // 璁剧疆榛樿鏈€澶ц窛绂讳负100涓柟鍧?
        double maxDistance = 100.0;
        Object maxDistanceObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_MAX_DISTANCE_ID);
        if (maxDistanceObj instanceof Number) {
            maxDistance = ((Number) maxDistanceObj).doubleValue();
            if (maxDistance <= 0) {
                maxDistance = Double.MAX_VALUE; // 鏃犻檺鍒?
            }
        }
        
        // 妫€鏌ユ墽琛屼笂涓嬫枃鏄惁鏈夋晥
        if (context != null && context.getWorld() != null) {
            try {
                if (uuidObj instanceof String) {
                    // 灏濊瘯瑙ｆ瀽UUID
                    try {
                        UUID uuid = UUID.fromString((String) uuidObj);
                        
                        // 閫氳繃UUID鏌ユ壘瀹炰綋锛堝湪瀹為檯瀹炵幇涓娇鐢∕inecraft API锛?
                        // entityObj = context.getWorld().getEntity(uuid);
                        
                        // 妯℃嫙瀹炵幇
                        if (entityObj != null) {
                            found = true;
                            // 鑾峰彇瀹炰綋绫诲瀷
                            entityType = entityObj.getClass().getSimpleName();
                            
                            // 鑾峰彇瀹炰綋浣嶇疆锛堝疄闄呭疄鐜颁腑浣跨敤entity.getPos()鎴栫被浼兼柟娉曪級
                            // entityPos = new Vector3d(entity.getX(), entity.getY(), entity.getZ());
                            
                            // 璁＄畻璺濈锛堝鏋滄湁鐜╁浣嶇疆锛?
                            if (context.getPlayer() != null) {
                                // 鍦ㄥ疄闄呭疄鐜颁腑璁＄畻鐜╁鍒板疄浣撶殑璺濈
                                // distance = context.getPlayer().getPos().distanceTo(entity.getPos());
                            }
                        }
                    } catch (IllegalArgumentException e) {
                        // UUID鏍煎紡鏃犳晥锛岃褰曢敊璇?
                        System.err.println("Invalid UUID format: " + uuidObj);
                    }
                } 
                // 濡傛灉娌℃湁鎵惧埌瀹炰綋閫氳繃UUID鎴栨病鏈夋彁渚沀UID锛屽皾璇曟寜绫诲瀷鏌ユ壘
                else if (!found && entityTypeObj instanceof String) {
                    String type = (String) entityTypeObj;
                    
                    // 鍦ㄥ疄闄呭疄鐜颁腑閫氳繃绫诲瀷鏌ユ壘瀹炰綋锛堝彲鑳芥壘鍒板涓級
                    // List<Entity> entities = context.getWorld().getEntitiesByType(...);
                    
                    // 濡傛灉鎵惧埌澶氫釜瀹炰綋
                    if (findNearest && context.getPlayer() != null) {
                        // 鏌ユ壘鏈€杩戠殑瀹炰綋
                        // 浠ｇ爜搴旀牴鎹疄闄匨inecraft API瀹炵幇
                    } else {
                        // 杩斿洖绗竴涓壘鍒扮殑瀹炰綋
                        // 浠ｇ爜搴旀牴鎹疄闄匨inecraft API瀹炵幇
                    }
                    
                    // 濡傛灉鎵惧埌瀹炰綋锛岃缃緭鍑哄€?
                    if (entityObj != null) {
                        found = true;
                        entityType = type;
                        // 鑾峰彇瀹炰綋浣嶇疆鍜岃绠楄窛绂?
                        // 浠ｇ爜搴旀牴鎹疄闄匨inecraft API瀹炵幇
                    }
                }
            } catch (Exception e) {
                // 璁板綍閿欒
                System.err.println("Error finding entity: " + e.getMessage());
            }
        }
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_ENTITY_ID, entityObj);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_ENTITY_TYPE_ID, entityType);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_ENTITY_POS_ID, entityPos);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_FOUND_ID, found);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_DISTANCE_ID, found ? distance : -1.0);
    }
}

package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.world.query;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import net.minecraft.util.math.BlockPos;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Get Fluid Level 鑺傜偣: 鑾峰彇鎸囧畾鍧愭爣鐨勬祦浣撶瓑绾с€?
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "world.query.get_fluid_level",
    displayName = "鑾峰彇娴佷綋绛夌骇",
    description = "鑾峰彇鎸囧畾鍧愭爣鐨勬祦浣撶瓑绾?,
    category = "world.query"
)
public class GetFluidLevelNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 鑺傜偣灞炴€?---
    private String description = "鑾峰彇鍧愭爣澶勬祦浣撴柟鍧楃殑娑查潰楂樺害鍜屾祦浣撲俊鎭?;

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_COORDINATE_ID = "input_coordinate";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_FLUID_LEVEL_ID = "output_fluid_level";
    private static final String OUTPUT_FLUID_TYPE_ID = "output_fluid_type";
    private static final String OUTPUT_IS_SOURCE_ID = "output_is_source";
    private static final String OUTPUT_IS_FLOWING_ID = "output_is_flowing";
    private static final String OUTPUT_IS_WATER_ID = "output_is_water";
    private static final String OUTPUT_IS_LAVA_ID = "output_is_lava";
    private static final String OUTPUT_HAS_FLUID_ID = "output_has_fluid";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public GetFluidLevelNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "world.query.get_fluid_level");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_COORDINATE_ID, "Coordinate", 
                "瑕佹煡璇㈢殑鍧愭爣", NodeDataType.BLOCK_POS, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_FLUID_LEVEL_ID, "Fluid Level", 
                "娴佷綋楂樺害 (0-8锛?涓烘弧鏂瑰潡)", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_FLUID_TYPE_ID, "Fluid Type", 
                "娴佷綋绫诲瀷", NodeDataType.STRING, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_IS_SOURCE_ID, "Is Source", 
                "鏄惁涓烘簮澶存柟鍧?, NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_IS_FLOWING_ID, "Is Flowing", 
                "鏄惁涓烘祦鍔ㄦ恫浣?, NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_IS_WATER_ID, "Is Water", 
                "鏄惁涓烘按", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_IS_LAVA_ID, "Is Lava", 
                "鏄惁涓哄博娴?, NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_HAS_FLUID_ID, "Has Fluid", 
                "鍧愭爣澶勬槸鍚﹀瓨鍦ㄦ祦浣?, NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
    }

    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return this.description;
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 榛樿杈撳嚭鍊?
        int fluidLevel = 0;
        String fluidType = "";
        boolean isSource = false;
        boolean isFlowing = false;
        boolean isWater = false;
        boolean isLava = false;
        boolean hasFluid = false;
        
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍧愭爣
        Object coordinateObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_COORDINATE_ID);
        
        // 妫€鏌ユ墽琛屼笂涓嬫枃鍜屽潗鏍囪緭鍏ユ槸鍚︽湁鏁?
        if (context != null && context.getWorld() != null && coordinateObj instanceof BlockPos) {
            BlockPos pos = (BlockPos) coordinateObj;
            
            try {
                // 鍦ㄥ疄闄呭疄鐜颁腑锛屼粠涓栫晫鑾峰彇娴佷綋淇℃伅
                // 杩欓噷鍙槸绀轰緥浠ｇ爜锛岄渶瑕佹牴鎹甅inecraft瀹為檯API璋冩暣
                
                // 鑾峰彇鏂瑰潡鐘舵€?
                // BlockState blockState = context.getWorld().getBlockState(pos);
                
                // 妫€鏌ユ槸鍚︿负娴佷綋鏂瑰潡
                // FluidState fluidState = blockState.getFluidState();
                // hasFluid = !fluidState.isEmpty();
                
                // 濡傛灉鏈夋祦浣擄紝鑾峰彇娴佷綋淇℃伅
                if (hasFluid) {
                    // 鑾峰彇娴佷綋绫诲瀷
                    // fluidType = Registry.FLUID.getId(fluidState.getFluid()).toString();
                    fluidType = "minecraft:water"; // 妯℃嫙绫诲瀷
                    
                    // 鑾峰彇娴佷綋楂樺害锛堝疄闄呬娇鐢?fluidState.getLevel() 鎴栫被浼兼柟娉曪級
                    // 閫氬父姘存簮鏄?锛屾祦鍔ㄧ殑姘存槸1-7
                    // fluidLevel = fluidState.getLevel();
                    fluidLevel = 8; // 妯℃嫙娑查潰楂樺害
                    
                    // 鍒ゆ柇鍚勭娴佷綋鐘舵€?
                    isSource = fluidLevel == 8; // 閫氬父8琛ㄧず婧愬潡
                    isFlowing = hasFluid && !isSource;
                    
                    // 鍒ゆ柇娴佷綋绫诲瀷
                    // isWater = fluidState.isSource() && fluidState.getFluid() == Fluids.WATER;
                    // isLava = fluidState.isSource() && fluidState.getFluid() == Fluids.LAVA;
                    isWater = fluidType.contains("water");
                    isLava = fluidType.contains("lava");
                }
                
            } catch (Exception e) {
                // 璁板綍閿欒浣嗙户缁墽琛岋紝浣跨敤榛樿鍊?
                System.err.println("Error getting fluid level at " + pos + ": " + e.getMessage());
            }
        }
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_FLUID_LEVEL_ID, fluidLevel);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_FLUID_TYPE_ID, fluidType);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_IS_SOURCE_ID, isSource);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_IS_FLOWING_ID, isFlowing);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_IS_WATER_ID, isWater);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_IS_LAVA_ID, isLava);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_HAS_FLUID_ID, hasFluid);
    }
}

package com.nodecraft.nodesystem.nodes.world.query;

import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeDataType;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.api.NodeInfo;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BaseNode;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.core.BasePort;
import com.nodecraft.nodesystem.execution.ExecutionContext;
import net.minecraft.util.math.BlockPos;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
import java.util.UUID;

/**
 * Get Light Level 鑺傜偣: 鑾峰彇鎸囧畾鍧愭爣鐨勫厜鐓х瓑绾с€?
 */
@NodeInfo(
    id = "world.query.get_light_level",
    displayName = "鑾峰彇鍏夌収绛夌骇",
    description = "鑾峰彇鎸囧畾鍧愭爣鐨勫厜鐓х瓑绾?,
    category = "world.query"
)
public class GetLightLevelNode extends BaseNode {

    // --- 杈撳叆绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String INPUT_COORDINATE_ID = "input_coordinate";

    // --- 杈撳嚭绔彛 IDs ---
    private static final String OUTPUT_LIGHT_LEVEL_ID = "output_light_level";
    private static final String OUTPUT_SKY_LIGHT_ID = "output_sky_light";
    private static final String OUTPUT_BLOCK_LIGHT_ID = "output_block_light";
    private static final String OUTPUT_IS_DAY_ID = "output_is_day";
    private static final String OUTPUT_CAN_SEE_SKY_ID = "output_can_see_sky";

    // --- 鏋勯€犲嚱鏁?---
    public GetLightLevelNode() {
        super(UUID.randomUUID(), "world.query.get_light_level");
        
        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍏ョ鍙?
        addInputPort(new BasePort(INPUT_COORDINATE_ID, "Coordinate", 
                "瑕佹煡璇㈢殑鍧愭爣", NodeDataType.BLOCK_POS, this));

        // 鍒涘缓骞舵坊鍔犺緭鍑虹鍙?
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_LIGHT_LEVEL_ID, "Light Level", 
                "缁煎悎鍏夌収绛夌骇 (0-15)", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_SKY_LIGHT_ID, "Sky Light", 
                "澶╃┖鍏夌収绛夌骇 (0-15)", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_BLOCK_LIGHT_ID, "Block Light", 
                "鏂瑰潡鍏夌収绛夌骇 (0-15)", NodeDataType.INTEGER, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_IS_DAY_ID, "Is Day", 
                "鏄惁涓虹櫧澶?, NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
        addOutputPort(new BasePort(OUTPUT_CAN_SEE_SKY_ID, "Can See Sky", 
                "璇ヤ綅缃槸鍚﹁兘鐪嬪埌澶╃┖", NodeDataType.BOOLEAN, this));
    }

    // --- INode 鏂规硶瀹炵幇 ---
    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "鑾峰彇鎸囧畾鍧愭爣鐨勫厜鐓х瓑绾с€佸ぉ绌哄厜鐓с€佹柟鍧楀厜鐓с€佹槸鍚︾櫧澶╀互鍙婃槸鍚﹁兘鐪嬪埌澶╃┖銆?;
    }

    @Override
    public String getDisplayName() {
        return "Get Light Level";
    }

    // --- 鏍稿績閫昏緫 ---
    @Override
    public void processNode(@Nullable ExecutionContext context) {
        // 榛樿杈撳嚭鍊?
        int lightLevel = 0;
        int skyLight = 0;
        int blockLight = 0;
        boolean isDay = true;
        boolean canSeeSky = false;
        
        // 鑾峰彇杈撳叆鍧愭爣
        Object coordinateObj = inputValues.get(INPUT_COORDINATE_ID);
        
        // 妫€鏌ユ墽琛屼笂涓嬫枃鍜屽潗鏍囪緭鍏ユ槸鍚︽湁鏁?
        if (context != null && context.getWorld() != null && coordinateObj instanceof BlockPos) {
            BlockPos pos = (BlockPos) coordinateObj;
            
            try {
                // 鍦ㄥ疄闄呭疄鐜颁腑锛屼粠涓栫晫鑾峰彇鍏夌収淇℃伅
                // 杩欓噷鍙槸绀轰緥浠ｇ爜锛岄渶瑕佹牴鎹甅inecraft瀹為檯API璋冩暣
                
                // 鑾峰彇缁煎悎鍏夌収绛夌骇
                // lightLevel = context.getWorld().getLightLevel(pos);
                
                // 鑾峰彇澶╃┖鍏夌収
                // skyLight = context.getWorld().getLightFor(LightType.SKY, pos);
                
                // 鑾峰彇鏂瑰潡鍏夌収
                // blockLight = context.getWorld().getLightFor(LightType.BLOCK, pos);
                
                // 鍒ゆ柇鏄惁涓虹櫧澶?
                // isDay = context.getWorld().isDay();
                
                // 妫€鏌ユ槸鍚﹁兘鐪嬪埌澶╃┖
                // canSeeSky = context.getWorld().canSeeSky(pos);
                
                // 妯℃嫙鍊?
                lightLevel = 12;
                skyLight = 15;
                blockLight = 0;
                isDay = true;
                canSeeSky = true;
                
            } catch (Exception e) {
                // 璁板綍閿欒浣嗙户缁墽琛岋紝浣跨敤榛樿鍊?
                System.err.println("Error getting light level at " + pos + ": " + e.getMessage());
            }
        }
        
        // 璁剧疆杈撳嚭鍊?
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_LIGHT_LEVEL_ID, lightLevel);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_SKY_LIGHT_ID, skyLight);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_BLOCK_LIGHT_ID, blockLight);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_IS_DAY_ID, isDay);
        outputValues.put(OUTPUT_CAN_SEE_SKY_ID, canSeeSky);
    }
}
